const C = {

  teal:"#0d9488", tealD:"#0f766e", tealL:"rgba(13,148,136,0.1)", tealB:"rgba(13,148,136,0.2)",

  nav:"#0c1a28", navBorder:"rgba(255,255,255,0.07)", navHover:"rgba(255,255,255,0.055)",

  adminNav:"#160b2e", adminAccent:"#f97316", adminL:"rgba(249,115,22,0.15)",

  red:"#dc2626", amber:"#d97706", green:"#16a34a", blue:"#0369a1",

  purple:"#7c3aed", indigo:"#4f46e5", pink:"#db2777", orange:"#ea580c",

  bg:"#eef2f7", card:"#ffffff", border:"#e2e8f0", text:"#0f172a", muted:"#64748b",

  wa:"#25d366", waD:"#075e54", nhs:"#005eb8",

};

const inp = {background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"9px 12px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%",transition:"border-color .15s"};

const f = n => n?.toLocaleString("en-GB",{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2});

// ── VAT helpers (all prices ex. VAT; 20% VAT added at checkout/billing)

const VAT_RATE=0.20;

const vatOf=p=>Math.round(p*VAT_RATE*100)/100;

const incVAT=p=>Math.round(p*1.20*100)/100;

const fVAT=p=>`£${f(incVAT(p))}`; // formatted inc. VAT

const VATBadge=()=><span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e",marginLeft:4}}>ex. VAT</span>;

const VATBreakdown=({price,style:sx})=><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.8,...sx}}>

  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}><span>Subtotal (ex. VAT)</span><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{f(price)}</span></div>

  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}><span>VAT (20%)</span><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{f(vatOf(price))}</span></div>

  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontWeight:800,color:"#0f172a",marginTop:3,paddingTop:3,borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}><span>Total (inc. VAT)</span><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{fVAT(price)}</span></div>

</div>;

function Btn({children,onClick,v="ghost",disabled,full,style:sx}){

  const st={ghost:{bg:"#f8fafc",b:`1px solid ${C.border}`,c:"#374151"},primary:{bg:C.teal,b:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,c:"#fff"},danger:{bg:"#fef2f2",b:"1px solid #fecaca",c:C.red},amber:{bg:"#fffbeb",b:"1px solid #fde68a",c:C.amber},admin:{bg:C.adminAccent,b:`1px solid ${C.adminAccent}`,c:"#fff"},nhs:{bg:C.nhs,b:`1px solid ${C.nhs}`,c:"#fff"},green:{bg:C.green,b:`1px solid ${C.green}`,c:"#fff"}}[v]||{};

  return <button onClick={onClick} disabled={disabled} style={{background:st.bg,border:st.b,color:st.c,padding:"6px 14px",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontWeight:500,cursor:disabled?"not-allowed":"pointer",opacity:disabled?.5:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:6,whiteSpace:"nowrap",width:full?"100%":undefined,...sx}}>{children}</button>;

}

function Chip({children,color=C.muted,bg}){return <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:bg||color+"1a",color,letterSpacing:".04em"}}>{children}</span>;}

function Row({label,value,mono}){return <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"6px 0",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>{label}</span><span style={{fontWeight:500,fontFamily:mono?"monospace":"inherit"}}>{value}</span></div>;}

// ── Global platform version (updated by Super Admin) ──────────────────────────

let PLATFORM_VERSION={major:2,minor:4,patch:1};

const getVersion=()=>`v${PLATFORM_VERSION.major}.${PLATFORM_VERSION.minor}.${PLATFORM_VERSION.patch}`;

const bumpPatch=()=>{PLATFORM_VERSION={...PLATFORM_VERSION,patch:PLATFORM_VERSION.patch+1};};

const setVersion=(v)=>{const m=v.match(/(\d+)\.(\d+)\.(\d+)/);if(m)PLATFORM_VERSION={major:+m[1],minor:+m[2],patch:+m[3]};};

// ── Practice isolation helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

// Production: enforced via server-side JWT claims — each API query is scoped

// to the user's practiceId. Client never receives other practices' data.

// Client-side demo: filter PRACTICES to only the user's own practice.

const getUserPractices=(user)=>{

  if(!user||user.role==="superadmin")return PRACTICES; // super admin sees all

  return PRACTICES.filter(p=>p.id===user.practiceId);  // everyone else: own only

};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// LOGIN SCREEN

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function LoginScreen({onLogin}){

  const [username,setUsername]=useState("");

  const [pass,setPass]=useState("");

  const [pin,setPin]=useState("");

  const [authMode,setAuthMode]=useState("password"); // "password" | "pin"

  const [showPass,setShowPass]=useState(false);

  const [err,setErr]=useState("");

  const [loading,setLoading]=useState(false);

  const [step,setStep]=useState("login"); // "login" | "2fa"

  const [twoFa,setTwoFa]=useState("");

  // Switch between modes — clear the other credential and errors

  const switchMode=mode=>{

    setAuthMode(mode);

    setErr("");

    if(mode==="password")setPin("");

    else setPass("");

  };

  const doLogin=()=>{

    setErr("");setLoading(true);

    setTimeout(()=>{

      // Match by username or email (flexible)

      const u=USERS.find(x=>

        x.username?.toLowerCase()===username.toLowerCase()||

        x.email?.toLowerCase()===username.toLowerCase()

      );

      if(!u){setErr("Username not found. Check your username and try again.");setLoading(false);return;}

      // Validate whichever mode is active

      if(authMode==="password"){

        if(!pass){setErr("Please enter your password.");setLoading(false);return;}

        if(u.password!==pass){setErr("Incorrect password. Please try again.");setLoading(false);return;}

      } else {

        if(pin.length<4||!/^\d+$/.test(pin)){setErr("PIN must be at least 4 digits.");setLoading(false);return;}

        if(u.pin!==pin){setErr("Incorrect PIN. Please try again.");setLoading(false);return;}

      }

      if(u.role==="superadmin"){setStep("2fa");setLoading(false);}

      else{onLogin(u);}

    },700);

  };

  const quickLogin=u=>{

    const usr=USERS.find(x=>x.email===u.email);

    setUsername(usr.username);

    if(authMode==="password"){setPass("demo");}

    else{setPin(usr.pin||"");}

    setErr("");

    setTimeout(()=>{

      if(usr.role==="superadmin"){setPass("admin");setStep("2fa");return;}

      onLogin(usr);

    },450);

  };

  const do2FA=()=>{

    if(twoFa==="123456"||twoFa==="000000"){

      const u=USERS.find(u=>u.role==="superadmin");onLogin(u);

    } else setErr("Invalid code. Please check your authenticator app.");

  };

  const quickUsers=[

    {label:"Reception", email:"ewilson@riverside.co.uk",  icon:"👤",color:C.blue},

    {label:"Dentist",   email:"spatel@riverside.co.uk",   icon:"🦷",color:C.teal},

    {label:"Manager",   email:"kmanager@riverside.co.uk", icon:"📊",color:C.indigo},

    {label:"Dr. Chen",  email:"mchen@riverside.co.uk",    icon:"🦷",color:C.purple},

    {label:"Admin",     email:"admin@prodental.co.uk",    icon:"⚙️",color:C.orange},

  ];

  return(

    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:"linear-gradient(145deg,#0c1a28 0%,#0d2a3d 45%,#0a3d3d 100%)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontFamily:"system-ui,sans-serif",padding:20,position:"relative",overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {/* Ambient glow orbs */}

      <div style={{position:"absolute",width:700,height:700,borderRadius:"50%",background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(13,148,136,.12),transparent 65%)",top:"-25%",right:"-15%",pointerEvents:"none"}}/>

      <div style={{position:"absolute",width:500,height:500,borderRadius:"50%",background:"radial-gradient(circle,rgba(3,105,161,.1),transparent 65%)",bottom:"-20%",left:"-10%",pointerEvents:"none"}}/>

      <div style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:420,position:"relative"}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:20,boxShadow:"0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.55)",overflow:"hidden"}}>

          {/* Header gradient */}

          <div style={{padding:"30px 36px 22px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#0a3d3d,#0d9488)",textAlign:"center"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:38,marginBottom:8,filter:"drop-shadow(0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.35))"}}>🦷</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:23,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",letterSpacing:"-.2px"}}>ProDentalConnect</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",marginTop:3,letterSpacing:".07em",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Dental Practice Management · {getVersion()}</div>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,justifyContent:"center",marginTop:10,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

              {["🔒 TLS 1.3","🇬🇧 UK Hosted","GDPR","NHS DSP Toolkit"].map(b=>(

                <span key={b} style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,fontWeight:600,letterSpacing:".04em"}}>{b}</span>

              ))}

            </div>

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:"26px 36px 30px"}}>

            {step==="login"&&<>

              {/* Username field */}

              <div style={{marginBottom:20}}>

                <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:6,letterSpacing:".05em",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Username</label>

                <input

                  value={username}

                  onChange={e=>{setUsername(e.target.value);setErr("");}}

                  onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&doLogin()}

                  placeholder="e.g. dr.patel or emma.w"

                  autoComplete="username"

                  style={{...inp,fontSize:14,letterSpacing:".01em"}}

                  onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.teal}

                  onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.border}

                />

              </div>

              {/* Windows-style auth mode toggle */}

              <div style={{marginBottom:16}}>

                <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:8,letterSpacing:".05em",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Sign in with</label>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:11,padding:4,marginBottom:14}}>

                  {[

                    {id:"password", label:"Password", icon:"🔑"},

                    {id:"pin",      label:"PIN Code",  icon:"🔢"},

                  ].map(m=>(

                    <button

                      key={m.id}

                      onClick={()=>switchMode(m.id)}

                      style={{

                        flex:1,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",

                        padding:"10px 8px",borderRadius:8,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",

                        background:authMode===m.id?"#fff":"transparent",

                        boxShadow:authMode===m.id?"0 1px 5px rgba(0,0,0,.12)":"none",

                        color:authMode===m.id?"#0c1a28":"#94a3b8",

                        fontWeight:authMode===m.id?700:400,

                        fontSize:13,

                        transition:"all .18s",

                      }}

                    >

                      <span style={{fontSize:16}}>{m.icon}</span>

                      <span>{m.label}</span>

                    </button>

                  ))}

                </div>

                {/* Password input */}

                {authMode==="password"&&(

                  <div style={{position:"relative"}}>

                    <input

                      type={showPass?"text":"password"}

                      value={pass}

                      onChange={e=>{setPass(e.target.value);setErr("");}}

                      onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&doLogin()}

                      placeholder="Enter your password"

                      autoComplete="current-password"

                      style={{...inp,fontSize:14,paddingRight:52}}

                      onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.teal}

                      onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.border}

                    />

                    <button

                      onClick={()=>setShowPass(s=>!s)}

                      style={{position:"absolute",right:12,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,padding:"4px 6px",borderRadius:5}}

                    >

                      {showPass?"Hide":"Show"}

                    </button>

                  </div>

                )}

                {/* PIN input — typed manually, no keypad */}

                {authMode==="pin"&&(

                  <div style={{position:"relative"}}>

                    <input

                      type="password"

                      value={pin}

                      onChange={e=>{

                        const v=e.target.value.replace(/\D/g,"").slice(0,12);

                        setPin(v);setErr("");

                      }}

                      onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&doLogin()}

                      placeholder="Enter your PIN"

                      autoComplete="off"

                      inputMode="numeric"

                      maxLength={12}

                      style={{

                        ...inp,

                        fontSize:22,

                        letterSpacing:pin?"10px":"normal",

                        textAlign:"center",

                        paddingRight:12,

                        fontFamily:"monospace",

                        fontWeight:700,

                      }}

                      onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.teal}

                      onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.border}

                    />

                    {/* PIN progress dots */}

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,justifyContent:"center",marginTop:8}}>

                      {[0,1,2,3].map(i=>(

                        <div key={i} style={{

                          width:10,height:10,borderRadius:"50%",

                          background:i<pin.length?C.teal:"transparent",

                          border:`2px solid ${i<pin.length?C.teal:"#cbd5e1"}`,

                          transition:"all .1s",

                        }}/>

                      ))}

                    </div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center",marginTop:6}}>Type your PIN using your keyboard (4–12 digits)</div>

                  </div>

                )}

              </div>

              {/* Error */}

              {err&&(

                <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#fee2e2",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.red,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>

                  <span style={{fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>⚠</span>{err}

                </div>

              )}

              {/* Sign In button */}

              <button

                onClick={doLogin}

                disabled={!username||(authMode==="password"?!pass:pin.length<4)||loading}

                style={{

                  width:"100%",padding:"13px",

                  background:!username||(authMode==="password"?!pass:pin.length<4)||loading

                    ?"#e2e8f0"

                    :"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",

                  color:!username||(authMode==="password"?!pass:pin.length<4)||loading?"#94a3b8":"#fff",

                  border:"none",borderRadius:11,fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,

                  cursor:!username||(authMode==="password"?!pass:pin.length<4)||loading?"not-allowed":"pointer",

                  marginBottom:20,transition:"all .2s",letterSpacing:".02em",

                }}

              >

                {loading?"Signing in…":"Sign In →"}

              </button>

              {/* Quick login demo strip */}

              <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,paddingTop:16}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center",marginBottom:9,letterSpacing:".08em",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Demo Quick Access</div>

                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:5}}>

                  {quickUsers.map(u=>{

                    const usr=USERS.find(x=>x.email===u.email);

                    return(

                      <button key={u.email} onClick={()=>quickLogin(u)}

                        style={{padding:"8px 4px",background:u.color+"14",border:`1.5px solid ${u.color}25`,borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:u.color,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:3,transition:"all .12s"}}

                        onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=u.color+"28"}

                        onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=u.color+"14"}

                      >

                        <span style={{fontSize:18}}>{u.icon}</span>

                        <span>{u.label}</span>

                        <span style={{fontSize:7,opacity:.6,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{usr?.username}</span>

                      </button>

                    );

                  })}

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center",marginTop:8}}>



                  &nbsp;·&nbsp; PIN examples: <code style={{background:"#f1f5f9",padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:3}}>9999</code> (Dr. Chen) <code style={{background:"#f1f5f9",padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:3}}>1111</code> (Amy)

                </div>

              </div>

            </>}

            {step==="2fa"&&<>

              <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:22}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:42,marginBottom:10}}>🔐</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,color:"#0c1a28",marginBottom:6}}>Two-Factor Authentication</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.6}}>Super Admin access requires 2FA. Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.</div>

              </div>

              <input

                value={twoFa}

                onChange={e=>setTwoFa(e.target.value.replace(/\D/g,"").slice(0,6))}

                onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&do2FA()}

                placeholder="000000"

                inputMode="numeric"

                style={{...inp,fontSize:28,textAlign:"center",letterSpacing:"12px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,borderColor:C.adminAccent}}

              />

              {err&&<div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.red,marginBottom:10}}>{err}</div>}

              <button onClick={do2FA} disabled={twoFa.length!==6} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px",background:twoFa.length===6?C.adminAccent:"#e2e8f0",color:twoFa.length===6?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:11,fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,cursor:twoFa.length===6?"pointer":"not-allowed",marginBottom:10}}>Verify & Enter Admin Console</button>

              <button onClick={()=>{setStep("login");setErr("");setTwoFa("");}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",background:"transparent",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>← Back to login</button>



            </>}

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:"10px 36px",background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>🔒 Encrypted · GDPR · NHS DSP Toolkit</span>

            <button onClick={()=>window.open&&window.open("mailto:support@prodental.co.uk","_blank")} style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,border:`1px solid ${C.teal}30`,background:"rgba(13,148,136,.06)",borderRadius:6,padding:"3px 9px",cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}>❓ Help &amp; Support</button>

            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{getVersion()}</span>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

// SHARED NAVIGATION COMPONENTS

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ROLE-BASED PERMISSION SYSTEM

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const ROLE_DEFAULTS={

  reception:   new Set(["huddle","online_booking","dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","teamchat","whatsapp","receptionai","recovery","shortnotice","finance","tasks","helpsupport","myreports"]),

  dentist:     new Set(["dashboard","nba","calendar","patients","notes","xray","fp17","uda","teamchat","lab","tasks","helpsupport","myreports"]),

  hygienist:   new Set(["dashboard","nba","calendar","patients","notes","recovery","teamchat","tasks","helpsupport","myreports"]),

  manager:     new Set(["huddle","online_booking","dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","notes","xray","fp17","uda","teamchat","whatsapp","receptionai","comms","recovery","shortnotice","lab","accounts","payments","reports","finance","tasks","rota","manager","subscription","comms_usage","helpsupport","templates","audit","integrations","settings","myreports","usermgmt"]),

  superadmin:  new Set([]),

};

// Per-user permission overrides (starts = role defaults, manager can add/remove)

const INIT_USER_PERMS=()=>Object.fromEntries(USERS.map(u=>([u.id,new Set(ROLE_DEFAULTS[u.role]||[])])));

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const ROLE_META={

  reception: {label:"Reception",     color:"#0369a1", bg:"#dbeafe", accent:"#0369a1"},

  dentist:   {label:"Dentist",       color:"#0d9488", bg:"#ccfbf1", accent:"#0d9488"},

  hygienist: {label:"Hygienist",     color:"#16a34a", bg:"#dcfce7", accent:"#16a34a"},

  manager:   {label:"Manager",       color:"#7c3aed", bg:"#ede9fe", accent:"#7c3aed"},

  superadmin:{label:"Super Admin",   color:"#f97316", bg:"#fff7ed", accent:"#f97316"},

};

// MODERN SIDEBAR — role-aware, permission-filtered

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function Sidebar({page,setPage,user,onLogout,waiting,tasks,unread,userPerms}){

  const isAdmin=user?.role==="superadmin";

  const [wOpen,setWOpen]=useState(false); // waiting room widget expanded

  const rm=ROLE_META[user?.role]||ROLE_META.reception;

  const accent=isAdmin?C.adminAccent:rm.accent;

  const wl=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="waiting").length;

  const ul=tasks.filter(t=>t.priority==="urgent"&&!t.done).length;

  const badges={waiting:wl,pending:4,unread,tasks:ul,rxai:3,recovery:12,nba:5,chat:4,tickets:7};

  // Build filtered nav from user permissions

  const myPerms=userPerms||ROLE_DEFAULTS[user?.role]||new Set();

  const visibleItems=ALL_NAV_ITEMS.filter(item=>myPerms.has(item.id));

  const groups=[...new Set(visibleItems.map(i=>i.g))];

  const adminGroups=[

    {g:"Overview",items:[{id:"admin_dash",l:"System Dashboard",Icon:BarChart2},{id:"admin_practices",l:"All Practices",Icon:Building2}]},

    {g:"Subscriptions",items:[{id:"admin_pricing",l:"Plan Builder",Icon:PoundSterling},{id:"admin_features",l:"Feature Management",Icon:Cpu},{id:"admin_seat_control",l:"Seat Control",Icon:Users2}]},

    {g:"Platform",items:[{id:"admin_ai",l:"Platform AI 🤖",Icon:Cpu},{id:"admin_data",l:"Data Manager",Icon:Database},{id:"admin_monitoring",l:"System Monitoring",Icon:Activity},{id:"admin_security",l:"Security & Compliance",Icon:Shield},{id:"admin_backup",l:"Cloud Backup",Icon:Server},{id:"admin_tx_plans",l:"Treatment Plans",Icon:Clipboard},{id:"admin_receptionai",l:"Reception AI",Icon:Phone},{id:"admin_updates",l:"Software Updates",Icon:Server}]},

    {g:"People",items:[{id:"admin_users",l:"Admin Users",Icon:Users2},{id:"admin_support_config",l:"Support Channels",Icon:Settings}]},

    {g:"Support",items:[{id:"admin_tickets",l:"Support Tickets",Icon:HelpCircle,badge:"tickets"},{id:"admin_support",l:"Support Access",Icon:Headphones},{id:"admin_integrations",l:"Integrations",Icon:Globe},{id:"admin_audit",l:"Activity Log",Icon:Shield},{id:"admin_appt_audit",l:"Appointment Audit",Icon:Activity}]},

  ];

  return(

    <div style={{width:220,flexShrink:0,background:isAdmin?"#0f0720":C.nav,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",height:"100%",overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"2px 0 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)"}}>

      {/* Logo */}

      <div style={{padding:"16px 16px 12px",borderBottom:`1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)`,flexShrink:0}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,marginBottom:2}}>

          <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:15,flexShrink:0}}>🦷</div>

          <span>ProDental<span style={{color:accent}}>Connect</span></span>

        </div>

        <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",marginLeft:36}}>{getVersion()} · {isAdmin?"System Admin":user?.practice}</div>

      </div>

      {/* Practice isolation badge for non-admin users */}

      {!isAdmin&&<div style={{margin:"6px 10px 0",padding:"5px 8px",background:"rgba(13,148,136,.15)",borderRadius:7,border:"1px solid rgba(13,148,136,.25)",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <span style={{fontSize:10,flexShrink:0}}>🔒</span>

        <div style={{minWidth:0}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(13,148,136,.9)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Practice Scoped</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{user?.practice}</div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {!isAdmin&&<div style={{margin:"8px 10px 2px",padding:"7px 10px",background:rm.accent+"20",borderRadius:9,border:`1px solid ${rm.accent}30`,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:user?.color||rm.accent,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{user?.avatar}</div>

        <div style={{minWidth:0}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{user?.name?.split(" ").slice(-1)[0]||user?.name}</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:rm.accent,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em"}}>{rm.label}</div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* Nav */}

      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"6px 0"}}>

        {isAdmin?adminGroups.map(grp=>(

          <div key={grp.g}>

            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".12em"}}>{grp.g}</div>

            {grp.items.map(item=>{

              const active=page===item.id;const bdg=badges[item.badge];

              return <button key={item.id} onClick={()=>setPage(item.id)} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:9,padding:"7px 14px",border:"none",background:active?"rgba(249,115,22,0.2)":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:`2px solid ${active?C.adminAccent:"transparent"}`,transition:"all .1s"}}

                onMouseOver={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>

                <item.Icon size={14} color={active?C.adminAccent:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)"}/>

                <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:12,color:active?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",fontWeight:active?600:400,textAlign:"left",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{item.l}</span>

                {bdg>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:9,background:item.id==="admin_tickets"?"#ef4444":C.adminAccent,color:"#fff"}}>{bdg}</span>}

              </button>;

            })}

          </div>

        )):groups.map(grp=>{

          const items=visibleItems.filter(i=>i.g===grp);

          return(

            <div key={grp}>

              <div style={{padding:"8px 14px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.28)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".12em"}}>{grp}</div>

              {items.map(item=>{

                const active=page===item.id;const bdg=badges[item.badge];

                return <button key={item.id} onClick={()=>setPage(item.id)} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:9,padding:"7px 14px",border:"none",background:active?accent+"28":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:`2px solid ${active?accent:"transparent"}`,transition:"all .1s"}}

                  onMouseOver={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>

                  <item.Icon size={14} color={active?accent:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}/>

                  <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:12,color:active?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",fontWeight:active?600:400,textAlign:"left",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{item.l}</span>

                  {bdg>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:9,background:bdg&&item.badge==="rxai"?C.teal:bdg&&item.badge==="recovery"?"#dc2626":accent,color:"#fff"}}>{bdg}</span>}

                </button>;

              })}

              {/* Live waiting room widget — under Front Desk group */}

              {grp==="Front Desk"&&(["reception","manager","dentist","hygienist"].includes(user?.role))&&(()=>{

                const M=60000;

                const isDoc=["dentist","hygienist"].includes(user?.role);

                const myShort=user?.name?.replace("Dr. Sarah","Dr. S.").replace("Dr. Mike","Dr. M.")||"";

                // Dentists see only their queue; reception sees all

                const wNow=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="waiting"&&(isDoc?(w.dentist===myShort||w.dentist===user?.name):true))

                  .sort((a,b)=>(a.in||0)-(b.in||0));

                const threshold=20;

                const longWait=wNow.some(w=>w.in&&(Date.now()-w.in)>threshold*M);

                if(!wNow.length)return null;

                const bc=longWait?"rgba(220,38,38,.55)":"rgba(13,148,136,.35)";

                const headerC=longWait?"#fca5a5":"#5eead4";

                return(

                  <div style={{margin:"3px 8px 8px",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${bc}`,background:longWait?"rgba(220,38,38,.1)":"rgba(13,148,136,.08)",cursor:"pointer",padding:"7px 10px",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}

                    onClick={()=>setPage("waiting")}>

                    <div style={{position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>

                      <Users2 size={13} color={headerC}/>

                      {longWait&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:-3,right:-3,width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#dc2626",animation:"waitPulse 0.9s ease-in-out infinite"}}/>}

                    </div>

                    <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:headerC}}>In Waiting Room</span>

                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:900,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:7,background:longWait?"#dc2626":"#0d9488",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{wNow.length}</span>

                  </div>

                );

              })()}

            </div>

          );

        })}

      </div>

      {/* Footer */}

      <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07)`,padding:"10px 12px",flexShrink:0}}>

        <button onClick={onLogout} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"7px 10px",border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.04)",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",fontSize:11}}>

          <LogOut size={13}/><span>Sign out</span>

        </button>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

// ENHANCED MANAGER PORTAL — User Management with seat control

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// Standalone component so useState is called at component level, never inside map()

function DeletionRequestCard({r,onDecide}){

  const [note,setNote]=useState("");

  const [confirming,setConfirming]=useState(false);

  return(

    <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:12,borderLeft:`4px solid ${C.red}`,boxShadow:"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.05)"}}>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:10}}>

        <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:"#fee2e2",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>🗑</div>

        <div style={{flex:1}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>

            {r.patientName} —{" "}

            <span style={{color:C.red}}>

              {r.type==="record"?"FULL RECORD DELETION":r.type.replace("field:","Delete field: ")}

            </span>

          </div>

          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:6}}>

            Requested by <strong>{r.requestedByName}</strong> · {r.at}

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:"8px 11px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12}}>

            <span style={{fontWeight:700}}>Reason: </span>{r.reason}

          </div>

          {r.patientId&&<div style={{marginTop:5,fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>

            Patient ID: <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.patientId}</span>

          </div>}

        </div>

        <div style={{padding:"3px 9px",background:"#fee2e2",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:8,fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:C.red,flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>

          AWAITING APPROVAL

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Warning for full record deletion */}

      {r.type==="record"&&<div style={{padding:"8px 11px",background:"#fef3c7",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:10,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <span>⚠️</span>

        <span><strong>This deletes the entire patient record permanently.</strong> All clinical notes, appointments and history will be removed. This action cannot be undone.</span>

      </div>}

      {/* Confirm step for approvals */}

      {confirming&&<div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fff5f5",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:10}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.red,marginBottom:6}}>⚠️ Confirm: this deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed.</div>

        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Click Confirm below to proceed, or Cancel to go back.</div>

      </div>}

      {/* Note input */}

      <div style={{marginBottom:8}}>

        <input

          value={note}

          onChange={e=>setNote(e.target.value)}

          placeholder="Add a note to your decision (optional) — this is logged permanently…"

          style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 11px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}

          onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.teal}

          onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=C.border}

        />

      </div>

      {/* Action buttons */}

      {!confirming&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>

        <button

          onClick={()=>onDecide(r.id,false,note||"Rejected by manager")}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:"#fff5f5",border:`1.5px solid ${C.red}`,borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.red}}>

          ✗ Reject Request

        </button>

        <button

          onClick={()=>r.type==="record"?setConfirming(true):onDecide(r.id,true,note||"Approved by manager")}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:C.red,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>

          ✓ Approve Deletion

        </button>

      </div>}

      {confirming&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>

        <button

          onClick={()=>setConfirming(false)}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>

          Cancel

        </button>

        <button

          onClick={()=>{setConfirming(false);onDecide(r.id,true,note||"Approved by manager — confirmed");}}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:C.red,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>

          ⚠️ Confirm — Delete Permanently

        </button>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

function ManagerPortal({userPerms,setUserPerms}){

  const [tab,setTab]=useState("overview");

  const PLAN_SEATS={Starter:5,Growth:15,Enterprise:999};

  const currentPlan="Growth";

  const maxSeats=PLAN_SEATS[currentPlan];

  const TABS=[{id:"overview",l:"🏥 Practice"},{id:"users",l:"👥 Staff"},{id:"permissions",l:"🔐 Permissions"},{id:"dashboard_perm",l:"🎛 Dashboard Layout"},{id:"deletions",l:"🗑 Deletion Queue",badge:true},{id:"txplans",l:"💰 Prices"},{id:"features",l:"📦 Features"},{id:"credits",l:"📊 Message Credits"},{id:"roles",l:"⚙ Login Settings"}];

  // Live user state — manager can create/edit/disable

  const [teamUsers,setTeamUsers]=useState([

    {id:"U1",name:"Dr. Sarah Patel",  role:"dentist",   email:"spatel@riverside.co.uk",  avatar:"SP",color:C.teal,  active:true,lastLogin:"Today 08:54"},

    {id:"U2",name:"Emma Wilson",      role:"reception",  email:"ewilson@riverside.co.uk",  avatar:"EW",color:C.blue,  active:true,lastLogin:"Today 08:02"},

    {id:"U4",name:"Dr. Mike Chen",    role:"dentist",   email:"mchen@riverside.co.uk",    avatar:"MC",color:C.purple,active:true,lastLogin:"Today 09:10"},

    {id:"U5",name:"Amy Grant",        role:"hygienist", email:"agrant@riverside.co.uk",   avatar:"AG",color:C.green, active:true,lastLogin:"Yesterday"},

    {id:"U_T5",name:"Tom Baker",      role:"reception",  email:"tbaker@riverside.co.uk",   avatar:"TB",color:C.indigo,active:false,lastLogin:"3 days ago"},

    {id:"U6",name:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",role:"manager",   email:"kmanager@riverside.co.uk", avatar:"KM",color:C.pink,  active:true,lastLogin:"Today 07:45"},

  ]);

  const [selUser,setSelUser]=useState(null);

  const [showCreate,setShowCreate]=useState(false);

  const [newUser,setNewUser]=useState({name:"",email:"",role:"reception",password:""});

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  // ── Features state — manager can toggle add-ons ──────────────────────────
  const PLAN_INCLUDED_IDS=["mandatory_alert_ack","nba","audit","shortnotice","finance"];
  const [activeFeatures,setActiveFeatures]=useState(()=>{
    const out={};
    GLOBAL_FEATURE_CONFIG.forEach(f=>{out[f.id]=f.enabled;});
    return out;
  });
  const [confirmFeature,setConfirmFeature]=useState(null); // {feature, enabling}
  const [showAddFeature,setShowAddFeature]=useState(false);

  const toggleFeature=(f,enabling)=>{
    if(f.price>0||!enabling){setConfirmFeature({feature:f,enabling});return;}
    applyFeatureToggle(f,enabling);
  };
  const applyFeatureToggle=(f,enabling)=>{
    setActiveFeatures(p=>({...p,[f.id]:enabling}));
    setConfirmFeature(null);
    doToast(enabling?`✓ ${f.name} activated — added to next invoice`:`✓ ${f.name} deactivated — removed from next billing cycle`);
  };

  const planBase=149;
  const addonTotal=GLOBAL_FEATURE_CONFIG.filter(f=>f.price>0&&activeFeatures[f.id]).reduce((s,f)=>s+f.price,0);
  const monthlyTotal=planBase+addonTotal;

  const activeCount=teamUsers.filter(u=>u.active).length;

  const seatsFull=activeCount>=maxSeats;

  const createUser=()=>{

    if(!newUser.name||!newUser.email)return;

    if(seatsFull){doToast("Seat limit reached. Upgrade your plan or deactivate an existing account.");return;}

    const u={id:"U_"+Date.now(),name:newUser.name,email:newUser.email,role:newUser.role,avatar:newUser.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2).toUpperCase(),color:ROLE_META[newUser.role]?.accent||C.teal,active:true,lastLogin:"Never"};

    setTeamUsers(p=>[...p,u]);

    // Set default permissions for new user

    if(setUserPerms)setUserPerms(p=>({...p,[u.id]:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULTS[u.role]||[])}));

    setNewUser({name:"",email:"",role:"reception",password:""});setShowCreate(false);

    doToast(`✓ Account created for ${u.name} — invite email sent`);

  };

  const toggleUser=(id)=>{setTeamUsers(p=>p.map(u=>u.id===id?{...u,active:!u.active}:u));doToast("Account status updated");};

  // Permission toggles for selected user

  const selPerms=selUser?(userPerms?.[selUser.id]||ROLE_DEFAULTS[selUser.role]||new Set()):new Set();

  const togglePerm=(uid,permId)=>{

    if(!setUserPerms)return;

    setUserPerms(p=>{const cur=new Set(p[uid]||ROLE_DEFAULTS[USERS.find(u=>u.id===uid)?.role]||[]);cur.has(permId)?cur.delete(permId):cur.add(permId);return{...p,[uid]:cur};});

  };

  const resetPerms=(uid,role)=>{if(!setUserPerms)return;setUserPerms(p=>({...p,[uid]:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULTS[role]||[])}));doToast("Permissions reset to role defaults");};

  const [canEditPrices,setCanEditPrices]=useState(true);

  const [staffCanEditPrices,setStaffCanEditPrices]=useState(false);

  const [deletionQueue,setDeletionQueue]=useState(DELETION_REQUESTS.filter(r=>r.status==="pending"));

  // loginMethod override per user — manager can force pin or password for any staff

  const [loginMethods,setLoginMethods]=useState({U1:"password",U2:"password",U4:"pin",U5:"pin",U_T5:"password"});

  const setLoginOverride=(uid,method)=>{setLoginMethods(p=>({...p,[uid]:method}));doToast(`Login method for ${teamUsers.find(u=>u.id===uid)?.name} set to ${method.toUpperCase()}`);};

  const approveDeleteRequest=(id,approved,note)=>{

    setDeletionQueue(p=>p.map(r=>r.id===id?{...r,status:approved?"approved":"rejected",managedBy:"U6",managedAt:"Just now",managerNote:note}:r).filter(r=>r.status==="pending"));

    DELETION_REQUESTS=DELETION_REQUESTS.map(r=>r.id===id?{...r,status:approved?"approved":"rejected",managedBy:"U6",managedAt:"Just now",managerNote:note||""}:r);

    doToast(approved?"✓ Deletion approved — record removed":"✗ Deletion request rejected");

  };

  return(

    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Header */}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 18px 0",flexShrink:0}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#4f46e5,#7c3aed)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>🛡</div>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>Manager Portal

              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:10,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple}}>Practice Admin</span>

            </div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Riverside Dentistry · <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:activeCount>=maxSeats?C.red:C.teal}}>{activeCount}/{maxSeats} seats used</span> · {currentPlan} Plan</div>

          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>

            {activeCount<maxSeats&&<button onClick={()=>setShowCreate(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>Create Account</button>}

            {activeCount>=maxSeats&&<div style={{padding:"7px 14px",background:"#fee2e2",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:C.red,fontWeight:600}}>⚠ Seat limit reached · Upgrade to add more</div>}

          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Seat bar */}

        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>

          <div style={{height:4,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:2,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${(activeCount/maxSeats)*100}%`,background:activeCount/maxSeats>.8?C.red:C.teal,borderRadius:2,transition:"width .5s"}}/></div>

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>

          {TABS.map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?C.purple:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.purple:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

            {t.l}

            {t.badge&&deletionQueue.length>0&&<span style={{background:C.red,color:"#fff",fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>{deletionQueue.length}</span>}

          </button>)}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Create user modal */}

      {showCreate&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:600}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:440,maxWidth:"95vw",padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:16,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>

            Create User Account

            <button onClick={()=>setShowCreate(false)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={16}/></button>

          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>

            <div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Full Name *</div>

              <input value={newUser.name} onChange={e=>setNewUser(p=>({...p,name:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. Dr. Jane Smith" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>

            </div>

            <div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Email Address *</div>

              <input value={newUser.email} onChange={e=>setNewUser(p=>({...p,email:e.target.value}))} placeholder="jane@riverside.co.uk" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>

            </div>

            <div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:6}}>Role</div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>

                {["reception","dentist","hygienist","manager"].map(r=>{const rm2=ROLE_META[r];return(

                  <button key={r} onClick={()=>setNewUser(p=>({...p,role:r}))} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px 4px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${newUser.role===r?rm2.accent:C.border}`,background:newUser.role===r?rm2.accent+"15":"#f8fafc",color:newUser.role===r?rm2.accent:C.muted,fontSize:10,fontWeight:newUser.role===r?800:400,cursor:"pointer",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{rm2.label}</button>

                );})}

              </div>

              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:5}}>User will get default permissions for this role. You can customise them in Access Control.</div>

            </div>

            <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:C.blue}}>

              User will receive a setup email to create their password. They can log in immediately after setup.

            </div>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:4}}>

              <button onClick={()=>setShowCreate(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12}}>Cancel</button>

              <button onClick={createUser} disabled={!newUser.name||!newUser.email} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:!newUser.name||!newUser.email?"#e2e8f0":C.teal,color:!newUser.name||!newUser.email?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:!newUser.name||!newUser.email?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Create Account</button>

            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── OVERVIEW ── */}

      {tab==="overview"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>

          {[{l:"Active Accounts",v:activeCount,c:C.teal,sub:`of ${maxSeats} seat limit`},{l:"Team Members",v:teamUsers.length,c:C.blue,sub:`${teamUsers.filter(u=>!u.active).length} inactive`},{l:"Monthly Cost",v:"£228",c:C.purple,sub:"Growth + Reception AI"},{l:"Last Activity",v:"08:54",c:C.green,sub:"Dr. Patel logged in"}].map(s=>(

            <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px"}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{s.l}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{s.sub}</div>

            </div>

          ))}

        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>

            <span>Team Overview</span>

            <button onClick={()=>setTab("users")} style={{fontSize:11,color:C.teal,border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer"}}>Manage →</button>

          </div>

          {teamUsers.map((u,i)=>{const rm2=ROLE_META[u.role];return(

            <div key={u.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center",opacity:u.active?1:.5}}>

              <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.avatar}</div>

              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{u.name}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{u.email}</div>

              </div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:7,background:rm2.bg,color:rm2.color,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{rm2.label}</span>

                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:u.active?C.green:"#94a3b8"}}>{u.active?"● Active":"○ Inactive"}</span>

                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{u.lastLogin}</span>

              </div>

            </div>

          );})}

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── USER MANAGEMENT ── */}

      {tab==="users"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Team Members ({teamUsers.length})</div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:activeCount>=maxSeats?C.red:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>{activeCount}/{maxSeats} seats active</div>

            {activeCount<maxSeats&&<button onClick={()=>setShowCreate(true)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={11}/>Add Member</button>}

          </div>

        </div>

        {teamUsers.map(u=>{const rm2=ROLE_META[u.role];return(

          <div key={u.id} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${u.active?C.border:"#f1f5f9"}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",marginBottom:10,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",opacity:u.active?1:.65}}>

            <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.avatar}</div>

            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                {u.name}

                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:rm2.bg,color:rm2.color}}>{rm2.label}</span>

                {!u.active&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:"#f1f5f9",color:"#94a3b8"}}>INACTIVE</span>}

              </div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{u.email} · Last login: {u.lastLogin}</div>

            </div>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>

              <button onClick={()=>{setSelUser(u);setTab("permissions");}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Permissions</button>

              <button onClick={()=>toggleUser(u.id)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${u.active?"#fecaca":"#bbf7d0"}`,borderRadius:8,background:u.active?"#fef2f2":"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:u.active?C.red:C.green}}>

                {u.active?"Deactivate":"Reactivate"}

              </button>

            </div>

          </div>

        );})}

        {activeCount>=maxSeats&&<div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#fef2f2",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:C.red,lineHeight:1.7}}>

          ⚠ Seat limit reached ({maxSeats} seats on {currentPlan} plan). Deactivate an existing account or <strong>upgrade your plan</strong> to add more team members.

        </div>}

      </div>}

      {/* ── ACCESS CONTROL ── */}

      {tab==="permissions"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>

        {/* User list */}

        <div style={{width:220,flexShrink:0,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#fff",overflowY:"auto"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted}}>Select Team Member</div>

          {teamUsers.map(u=>{const rm2=ROLE_META[u.role];return(

            <div key={u.id} onClick={()=>setSelUser(u)} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selUser?.id===u.id?"rgba(79,70,229,0.06)":"transparent",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selUser?.id===u.id?C.purple:"transparent"}`,opacity:u.active?1:.5}}

              onMouseOver={e=>{if(selUser?.id!==u.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fafffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selUser?.id!==u.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>

              <div style={{width:30,height:30,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.avatar}</div>

              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{u.name}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:rm2.color,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{rm2.label}</div>

              </div>

            </div>

          );})}

        </div>

        {/* Permission editor */}

        {selUser?<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>

            <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:"50%",background:selUser.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{selUser.avatar}</div>

            <div style={{flex:1}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>{selUser.name}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{ROLE_META[selUser.role]?.label} · {selUser.email}</div>

            </div>

            <button onClick={()=>resetPerms(selUser.id,selUser.role)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Reset to Role Defaults</button>

            {!selUser.active&&<button onClick={()=>{toggleUser(selUser.id);doToast(`${selUser.name} account reactivated`);}} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>✓ Reactivate Account</button>}

          </div>

          <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

            <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:8}}>

              Module Access

              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:400}}>— toggle to grant or revoke access for this user</span>

            </div>

            {[...new Set(ALL_NAV_ITEMS.map(i=>i.g))].map(grp=>(

              <div key={grp}>

                <div style={{padding:"7px 16px 3px",fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",background:"#f8fafc"}}>{grp}</div>

                {ALL_NAV_ITEMS.filter(i=>i.g===grp).map((item,idx)=>{

                  const has=selPerms.has(item.id);

                  const isRoleDefault=ROLE_DEFAULTS[selUser.role]?.has(item.id);

                  return(

                    <div key={item.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 16px",borderTop:idx>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>

                      <item.Icon size={13} color={has?C.purple:"#d1d5db"}/>

                      <div style={{flex:1}}>

                        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:500,color:has?C.text:"#94a3b8"}}>{item.l}</div>

                        {!isRoleDefault&&has&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.amber,fontWeight:700}}>Extra permission granted</div>}

                        {isRoleDefault&&!has&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.red,fontWeight:700}}>Role default — access removed</div>}

                      </div>

                      <button onClick={()=>togglePerm(selUser.id,item.id)} style={{position:"relative",width:36,height:20,borderRadius:10,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:has?C.purple:"#cbd5e1",transition:"background .15s",flexShrink:0}}>

                        <span style={{position:"absolute",top:3,left:has?"calc(100% - 17px)":3,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>

                      </button>

                    </div>

                  );

                })}

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

        </div>:<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",color:"#94a3b8",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>

          <Users2 size={32} strokeWidth={1}/>

          <div style={{fontSize:13}}>Select a team member to manage their access</div>

        </div>}

      </div>}

      {/* ── TREATMENT PLAN PRICES ── */}

      {tab==="deletions"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>🗑 Deletion Request Queue</div>

        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Staff cannot delete patient records or fields directly. All requests require your approval. Every decision is permanently logged.</div>

        {deletionQueue.length===0&&<div style={{background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:12,padding:"24px",textAlign:"center"}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:20,marginBottom:8}}>✅</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>No pending deletion requests</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginTop:4}}>All requests have been reviewed</div>

        </div>}

        {deletionQueue.map(r=>(

          <DeletionRequestCard key={r.id} r={r} onDecide={approveDeleteRequest}/>

        ))}

      </div>}

      {tab==="roles"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>⚙ Staff Login Settings</div>

        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Set login method per staff member and reset PINs. Enable 2FA for any user — authenticator app (free) or SMS.</div>

        {/* 2FA Control */}

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

            🔐 Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)

            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:"#dbeafe",color:C.blue}}>OPTIONAL · Manager Controlled</span>

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",gap:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:200}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>2FA Method</div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>

                {[{id:"authenticator",l:"📱 Authenticator App",desc:"Google/Microsoft Authenticator — free & most secure"},{id:"sms",l:"💬 SMS Code",desc:"Text message — easy but has a cost per SMS"}].map(m=>(

                  <div key={m.id} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 11px",borderRadius:10,border:`2px solid ${C.teal}30`,background:C.tealL,fontSize:10}}>

                    <div style={{fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,marginBottom:2}}>{m.l}</div>

                    <div style={{color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.4}}>{m.desc}</div>

                  </div>

                ))}

              </div>

            </div>

          </div>

          <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

            {teamUsers.filter(u=>u.role!=="manager").map((u,i)=>(

              <div key={u.id} style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:i<teamUsers.length-2?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",fontSize:12}}>

                <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.avatar}</div>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>{u.name}</div>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

                  <button onClick={()=>doToast("2FA setup email sent to "+u.email)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:7,background:C.tealL,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600}}>📧 Send Setup Link</button>

                  <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Not enrolled</span>

                </div>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Login method + PIN reset */}

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Login Method & PIN Management</div>

          {teamUsers.filter(u=>u.role!=="manager").map((u,i)=>{

            const curMethod=loginMethods[u.id]||"password";

            const rm=ROLE_META[u.role];

            return(

              <div key={u.id} style={{padding:"13px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",background:"#fff"}}>

                <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.avatar}</div>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{u.name}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}><span style={{background:rm?.bg,color:rm?.color,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,fontWeight:700,fontSize:9}}>{rm?.label}</span></div>

                </div>

                  {[{id:"password",l:"🔑 Password"},{id:"pin",l:"# PIN"}].map(m=>(

                    <button key={m.id} onClick={()=>setLoginOverride(u.id,m.id)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,border:"none",background:curMethod===m.id?"#fff":"transparent",boxShadow:curMethod===m.id?"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1)":"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:curMethod===m.id?700:400,color:curMethod===m.id?C.purple:C.muted,transition:"all .15s"}}>

                      {m.l}

                    </button>

                  ))}

                </div>

                <button onClick={()=>doToast("🔢 PIN reset for "+u.name+" — they'll be prompted to set a new PIN on next login")} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.amber}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fffbeb",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>Reset PIN</button>

                {!u.active&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Inactive</span>}

      {tab==="txplans"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>

                        <div style={{width:13,height:13,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:2,left:widgetPerms[w.id]?.[role]?15:2,transition:"left .15s",boxShadow:"0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}/>

              <button onClick={()=>applyFeatureToggle(confirmFeature.feature,confirmFeature.enabling)}
                style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:confirmFeature.enabling?C.teal:C.red,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>

            const remaining=c.limit-c.used;

            const isLow=pct>=70&&pct<90;

            const isCritical=pct>=90;
