      {tab==="roles"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Default Access by Role</div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>These defaults apply when creating new accounts. Individual overrides are managed in Access Control.</div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>

            <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>

              <th style={{padding:"10px 16px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Module</th>

              {["reception","dentist","hygienist","manager"].map(r=>{const rm2=ROLE_META[r];return <th key={r} style={{padding:"10px 14px",textAlign:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:rm2.color}}>{rm2.label}</th>;})}

            </tr></thead>

            <tbody>

              {ALL_NAV_ITEMS.map((item,i)=>(

                <tr key={item.id} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",background:i%2===0?"#fff":"#fafcff"}}>

                  <td style={{padding:"8px 16px",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                    <item.Icon size={12} color={C.muted}/><span style={{fontWeight:500}}>{item.l}</span>

                  </td>

                  {["reception","dentist","hygienist","manager"].map(r=><td key={r} style={{padding:"8px 14px",textAlign:"center"}}>

                    {ROLE_DEFAULTS[r]?.has(item.id)?<Check size={14} color={ROLE_META[r].color}/>:<X size={14} color="#e2e8f0"/>}

                  </td>)}

                </tr>

              ))}

            </tbody>

          </table>

        </div>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ADMIN — Seat Control (per practice user limits)

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function AdminSeatControl(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};


  const [practices,setPractices]=useState([

    {name:"City Smile Clinic",   plan:"Enterprise",seats:15,used:12,override:null},

    {name:"Riverside Dentistry", plan:"Growth",    seats:15,used:6, override:null},

    {name:"Bayview Dentists",    plan:"Growth",    seats:15,used:7, override:null},

    {name:"Sunshine Dental",     plan:"Starter",   seats:5, used:3, override:null},

    {name:"Northside Dental",    plan:"Growth",    seats:15,used:4, override:null},

    {name:"The Smile Studio",    plan:"Growth",    seats:15,used:8, override:null},

    {name:"Dental House",        plan:"Starter",   seats:5, used:2, override:null},

    {name:"Coastal Dentistry",   plan:"Enterprise",seats:15,used:9, override:null},

  ]);

  const [planSeats,setPlanSeats]=useState({Starter:5,Growth:15,Enterprise:999});

  const [editing,setEditing]=useState(null);

  return(

    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:400,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>User Seat Control</div>

      <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16}}>Set how many user accounts each plan includes. Override for specific practices when needed. Practices cannot create accounts beyond their seat limit.</div>

      {/* Plan defaults */}

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:20}}>

        {["Starter","Growth","Enterprise"].map(plan=>(

          <div key={plan} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

            <div style={{background:{Starter:"#64748b",Growth:"#0d9488",Enterprise:"#7c3aed"}[plan],padding:"12px 16px"}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{plan}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)"}}>Plan seat allocation</div>

            </div>

            <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

              {editing===plan

                ?<input type="number" defaultValue={planSeats[plan]} onBlur={e=>{setPlanSeats(p=>({...p,[plan]:+e.target.value}));setEditing(null);doToast(`${plan} plan updated to ${e.target.value} seats`);}} autoFocus style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:18,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace"},width:80,fontWeight:800,textAlign:"center"}}/>

                :<div style={{fontSize:28,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace",color:{Starter:"#64748b",Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[plan]}}>{planSeats[plan]===999?"∞":planSeats[plan]}</div>}

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>user seats</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{planSeats[plan]===999?"Unlimited accounts":"Per practice"}</div>

              </div>

              <button onClick={()=>setEditing(plan)} style={{padding:"5px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><Edit size={11}/></button>

            </div>

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

      {/* Per-practice overrides */}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

        <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Per-Practice Seat Usage & Overrides</span>

          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Override seat limit for a specific practice without changing their plan</span>

        </div>

        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>

          <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>

            {["Practice","Plan","Plan Limit","Override","Seats Used","Usage","Action"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"8px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>)}

          </tr></thead>

          <tbody>{practices.map((p,i)=>{

            const limit=p.override||planSeats[p.plan]||5;

            const pct=limit===999?5:Math.min(p.used/limit,1);

            const planCol={Starter:"#64748b",Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[p.plan];

            return(

              <tr key={p.name} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:planCol+"18",color:planCol}}>{p.plan}</span></td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700}}>{planSeats[p.plan]===999?"∞":planSeats[p.plan]}</td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>

                  {editing===p.name

                    ?<input type="number" defaultValue={p.override||""} placeholder="inherit" onBlur={e=>{setPractices(prev=>prev.map(x=>x.name===p.name?{...x,override:e.target.value?+e.target.value:null}:x));setEditing(null);doToast("Override saved for "+p.name);}} autoFocus style={{width:70,padding:"3px 7px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:6,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"center"}}/>

                    :<button onClick={()=>setEditing(p.name)} style={{fontSize:11,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,border:`1px solid ${p.override?"#fde68a":C.border}`,background:p.override?"#fffbeb":"#f8fafc",color:p.override?C.amber:C.muted,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.override?`${p.override} ✏`:"Set override"}</button>}

                </td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:pct>.8?C.red:C.text}}>{p.used}/{limit===999?"∞":limit}</td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:120}}>

                  <div style={{height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${pct*100}%`,background:pct>.8?C.red:pct>.6?C.amber:C.teal,borderRadius:3}}/></div>

                </td>

                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>

                  {p.override&&<button onClick={()=>{setPractices(prev=>prev.map(x=>x.name===p.name?{...x,override:null}:x));doToast("Override removed — plan default restored");}} style={{fontSize:10,color:C.red,border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer"}}>Remove override</button>}

                </td>

              </tr>

            );

          })}</tbody>

        </table>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

function Header({user,notifs,onClearNotifs,onCopilot,copilotSubscribed}){

  const unread=notifs.filter(n=>!n.read).length;

  const [open,setOpen]=useState(false);

  const ico={alert:<AlertTriangle size={11} color={C.red}/>,task:<Clipboard size={11} color={C.blue}/>,lab:<Package size={11} color={C.amber}/>,clinical:<Stethoscope size={11} color={C.teal}/>,checkin:<UserCheck size={11} color={C.green}/>,callin:<UserCheck size={11} color="#f59e0b"/>};

  const showCopilot=user&&user.role!=="superadmin";

  return <div style={{height:54,background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",padding:"0 18px",gap:12,flexShrink:0}}>

    {user?.role==="superadmin"&&<div style={{padding:"3px 10px",background:"#fff7ed",border:"1px solid #fed7aa",borderRadius:20,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.adminAccent,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Server size={10}/>Admin Console</div>}

    <div style={{position:"relative",flex:1,maxWidth:360}}>

      <Search size={13} style={{position:"absolute",left:10,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>

      <input placeholder={user?.role==="superadmin"?"Search practices, users, invoices…":"Search patients, appointments, notes…"} style={{...inp,paddingLeft:30,background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #eef2f7",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px 6px 30px"}}/>

    </div>

    <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>

      {/* Business Copilot button — top right, always accessible */}

      {showCopilot&&<button onClick={onCopilot} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,padding:"6px 14px",borderRadius:9,border:"none",background:copilotSubscribed?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#1a1035)",cursor:"pointer",position:"relative",boxShadow:copilotSubscribed?"0 2px 12px rgba(13,148,136,0.35)":"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)"}}>

        <Sparkles size={13} color={copilotSubscribed?"#5eead4":"#94a3b8"}/>

        <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:copilotSubscribed?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>Business Copilot</span>

        {!copilotSubscribed&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"rgba(249,115,22,0.8)",color:"#fff",marginLeft:2}}>PRO</span>}

      </button>}

      {/* Notif bell */}

      <div style={{position:"relative"}}>

        <button onClick={()=>{setOpen(o=>!o);if(!open)onClearNotifs();}} style={{width:34,height:34,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:C.card,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",position:"relative"}}>

          <Bell size={15} color={unread>0?C.red:C.muted}/>

          {unread>0&&<span style={{position:"absolute",top:-4,right:-4,width:16,height:16,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.red,color:"#fff",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>{unread}</span>}

        </button>

        {open&&<div style={{position:"absolute",right:0,top:"calc(100% + 6px)",width:300,background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,boxShadow:"0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)",zIndex:300,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>

            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Notifications</span>

            <button onClick={()=>setOpen(false)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={13}/></button>

          </div>

          {notifs.map((n,i)=><div key={n.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f9f9f9`:"none",background:n.read?"#fff":"#f0fff8"}}>

            <div style={{width:26,height:26,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>{ico[n.type]}</div>

            <div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:n.read?400:700}}>{n.title}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{n.desc}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace",marginTop:1}}>{n.at}</div></div>

          </div>)}

        </div>}

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{width:30,height:30,borderRadius:"50%",background:user?.color||C.teal,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{user?.avatar}</div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>;

}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ALERT MODAL

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function AlertModal({patient,onAck,onCancel}){

  const active=patient.alerts.filter(a=>a.t);if(!active.length){onAck();return null;}

  return <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.72)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:600}}>

    <div style={{background:C.card,borderRadius:16,width:530,maxWidth:"95vw",maxHeight:"88vh",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",boxShadow:"0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.45)"}}>

      <div style={{padding:"16px 22px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fee2e2",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><AlertTriangle size={18} color={C.red}/></div>

        <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>Patient Alerts — {patient.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>{active.length} active alert{active.length!==1?"s":""} · Acknowledge to proceed</div></div>
      </div>

      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"16px 22px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>

        {active.map(a=>{const m=ALERT_META[a.t]||ALERT_META.general;return <div key={a.id} style={{border:`2px solid ${m.b}`,borderLeft:`7px solid ${m.c}`,borderRadius:10,background:m.bg,padding:"12px 16px"}}>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5}}><m.Icon size={14} color={m.c}/><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:m.c,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em"}}>{({medical:"Medical Warning",anxiety:"Anxiety Alert",disability:"Disability",general:"General Note"})[a.t]||"Alert"}</span></div>

          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginBottom:5}}>{a.title}</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.75}}>{a.desc}</div>

        </div>;})}

      </div>

      <div style={{padding:"14px 22px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:9,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Lock size={10}/>Acknowledgement is mandatory and will be timestamped in the audit log.</div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          {onCancel&&<button onClick={onCancel} style={{padding:"12px 22px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>}
          <button onClick={onAck} style={{flex:1,padding:"12px",background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${C.tealD},${C.blue})`,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:8}}><Check size={16}/>Acknowledge & Open Record</button>
        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>;

}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// CALENDAR WITH FULL DND + RIGHT-CLICK

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function CalendarPage({openPatient}){
  // Leave conflict checking
  const checkStaffLeave=(staffName,date)=>{
    if(!staffName||!date)return null;
    const dateObj=typeof date==="string"?new Date(date):date;
    const staff=STAFF_LEAVE_DATA.find(s=>s.name===staffName);
    if(!staff)return null;
    return staff.approved.find(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.from)<=dateObj&&new Date(l.to)>=dateObj)||null;
  };

  const [appts,setAppts]=useState(INIT_APPTS);

  const [dragging,setDragging]=useState(null);

  const [dragOver,setDragOver]=useState(null);

  const [ctx,setCtx]=useState(null);const ctxRef=useRef(null);

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const [booking,setBooking]=useState(null);

  const [bForm,setBForm]=useState({patient:"",type:"Check-up",duration:"30",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",notes:""});

  const openBooking=(time,col)=>{setBooking({time,col});setBForm({patient:"",type:"Check-up",duration:"30",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",notes:""});};

  const createAppt=()=>{

    if(!bForm.patient.trim())return;

    const colors={"Check-up":C.teal,"Filling":C.blue,"Crown":C.purple,"Extraction":C.red,"Hygiene":C.green,"Implant":"#7c3aed","Consultation":C.amber};

    const newA={id:"A"+Date.now(),time:booking.time,col:booking.col,patient:bForm.patient,pid:null,status:"booked",type:bForm.type,color:colors[bForm.type]||C.teal};

    setAppts(p=>[...p,newA]);

    doToast("✓ Booked: "+bForm.patient+" at "+booking.time);

    setBooking(null);

  };

  useEffect(()=>{if(!ctx)return;const h=e=>{if(ctxRef.current&&!ctxRef.current.contains(e.target))setCtx(null);};document.addEventListener("mousedown",h);return()=>document.removeEventListener("mousedown",h);},[ctx]);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2200);};

  const CTX_ACTIONS=[

    {l:"👤 Open Patient Record",fn:(a)=>{a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid,"charting");setCtx(null);}},

    {l:"✅ Mark Completed",fn:(a)=>{setAppts(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===a.id?{...x,status:"completed",color:C.green}:x));setCtx(null);doToast("Marked completed");}},

    {l:"🦷 Mark In Surgery",fn:(a)=>{setAppts(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===a.id?{...x,status:"in_surgery",color:C.blue}:x));setCtx(null);doToast("Marked in surgery");}},

    {l:"⏳ Mark Waiting",fn:(a)=>{setAppts(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===a.id?{...x,status:"waiting",color:C.amber}:x));setCtx(null);doToast("Marked waiting");}},

    {sep:true},

    {l:"📋 Add Clinical Note",fn:()=>{setCtx(null);doToast("Opening clinical note editor…");}},

    {l:"✉ Send Reminder",fn:()=>{setCtx(null);doToast("SMS reminder sent to patient");}},

    {sep:true},

    {l:"❌ Mark as DNA",fn:(a)=>{setAppts(p=>p.filter(x=>x.id!==a.id));setCtx(null);doToast("Marked DNA — slot freed");}},

    {l:"🗑 Cancel Appointment",danger:true,fn:(a)=>{setAppts(p=>p.filter(x=>x.id!==a.id));setCtx(null);doToast("Appointment cancelled");}},

  ];

  const SC={completed:{c:C.green,l:"Completed"},in_surgery:{c:C.blue,l:"In Surgery"},waiting:{c:C.amber,l:"Waiting"},booked:{c:C.teal,l:"Booked"}};

  const DCOLS=["Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant (H)"];

  const TIMES=[];for(let h=8;h<18;h++)for(let m=0;m<60;m+=5)TIMES.push(`${String(h).padStart(2,"0")}:${String(m).padStart(2,"0")}`);

  return <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden",position:"relative"}}>

    {toast&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:10,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",padding:"8px 20px",background:"#0c1a28",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,zIndex:200,whiteSpace:"nowrap",boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {ctx&&<div ref={ctxRef} style={{position:"fixed",left:Math.min(ctx.x,window.innerWidth-220),top:Math.min(ctx.y,window.innerHeight-320),background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,boxShadow:"0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",zIndex:500,minWidth:210,overflow:"hidden",padding:"4px 0"}}>

      <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:6}}><div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:2,background:ctx.appt.color,marginTop:2}}/>{ctx.appt.patient} · {ctx.appt.time}</div>

      {CTX_ACTIONS.map((a,i)=>a.sep?<div key={i} style={{height:1,background:C.border,margin:"4px 0"}}/>

        :<button key={i} onClick={()=>a.fn&&a.fn(ctx.appt)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 14px",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left",fontSize:12,color:a.danger?C.red:C.text,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}

          onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=a.danger?"#fef2f2":"#f8fafc"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>{a.l}</button>)}

    </div>}

    {booking&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:380,padding:22,boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:2}}>New Appointment</div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>{booking.time} · {DCOLS[booking.col]}</div>

        {/* Patient + Type fields */}
        {[{l:"Patient Name",k:"patient",ph:"e.g. John Mills"},{l:"Type",k:"type",opts:["Check-up","Filling","Crown","Extraction","Hygiene","Implant","Consultation","Emergency","Recall","Orthodontic"]},{l:"Dentist",k:"dentist",opts:DCOLS}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>{f.l}</label>
            {f.opts
              ?<select value={bForm[f.k]} onChange={e=>setBForm(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>{f.opts.map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}</select>
              :<input value={bForm[f.k]} onChange={e=>setBForm(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>}
          </div>
        ))}
        {/* Duration dropdown */}
        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Duration</label>
          <select value={bForm.duration} onChange={e=>setBForm(p=>({...p,duration:e.target.value}))}
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer"}}>
            <option value="5">5 minutes — Emergency triage</option>
            <option value="10">10 minutes — Quick review</option>
            <option value="15">15 minutes — NHS check-up</option>
            <option value="20">20 minutes — Short treatment</option>
            <option value="25">25 minutes</option>
            <option value="30">30 minutes — Standard (recommended)</option>
            <option value="35">35 minutes</option>
            <option value="40">40 minutes</option>
            <option value="45">45 minutes — Complex treatment</option>
            <option value="50">50 minutes</option>
            <option value="55">55 minutes</option>
            <option value="60">60 minutes — Extended / implant</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        {/* Notes field */}
        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Notes (optional)</label>
          <input value={bForm.notes} onChange={e=>setBForm(p=>({...p,notes:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Any additional notes…" style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:14}}>

          <button onClick={()=>setBooking(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>

          <button onClick={createAppt} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Create Appointment</button>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>}

    <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

      <Btn onClick={()=>doToast("Previous day")}><ChevronRight size={12} style={{transform:"rotate(180deg)"}}/>Prev</Btn>

      <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:14}}>Tuesday 14 May 2026</div>

      <Btn onClick={()=>doToast("Next day")}>Next<ChevronRight size={12}/></Btn>

      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,padding:"4px 10px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:20}}>💡 Double-click empty slot to book · Right-click for actions · Drag to move</span>

      <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",gap:10}}>

        {Object.entries(SC).map(([k,s])=><div key={k} style={{display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}><div style={{width:9,height:9,borderRadius:2,background:s.c}}/>{s.l}</div>)}

      </div>

      <Btn v="primary" onClick={()=>doToast("Double-click a time slot to book")}><Plus size={12}/>New Appointment</Btn>

    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",overflowX:"auto"}}>

      <table style={{borderCollapse:"collapse",minWidth:"100%",tableLayout:"fixed"}}>

        <colgroup><col style={{width:54,minWidth:54}}/>{DCOLS.map((_,i)=><col key={i} style={{minWidth:220}}/>)}</colgroup>

        <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",position:"sticky",top:0,zIndex:10}}>

          <th style={{padding:"10px 8px",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`,textAlign:"center"}}>TIME</th>

          {DCOLS.map(c=><th key={c} style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`,textAlign:"center"}}>{c}</th>)}

        </tr></thead>

        <tbody>{TIMES.map(time=>{

          const mins=parseInt(time.split(":")[1]);

          const isHour=mins===0;const isHalf=mins===30;

          const isFive=mins%15!==0;

          if(isFive&&!appts.some(a=>a.time===time))return null;

          return(

            <tr key={time} style={{height:isHour?36:isHalf?28:22}}>

              <td style={{padding:"0 6px",fontSize:isHour?11:9,color:isHour?"#64748b":"#cbd5e1",fontWeight:isHour?600:400,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderBottom:isHour?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",verticalAlign:"top",paddingTop:isHour?4:1,fontFamily:"monospace",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{isHour||isHalf?time:""}</td>

              {DCOLS.map((_,col)=>{

                const appt=appts.find(a=>a.time===time&&a.col===col);

                return(

                  <td key={col} style={{padding:"1px 3px",borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderBottom:isHour?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",verticalAlign:"top",cursor:!appt?"pointer":"default",background:dragOver?.time===time&&dragOver?.col===col?"#f0fffe":"transparent"}}

                    onDoubleClick={()=>!appt&&openBooking(time,col)}

                    onContextMenu={e=>{if(appt){e.preventDefault();setCtx({x:e.clientX,y:e.clientY,appt});}}}

                    onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();setDragOver({time,col});}}

                    onDragLeave={()=>setDragOver(null)}

                    onDrop={()=>{if(dragging){setAppts(p=>p.map(a=>a.id===dragging.id?{...a,time,col}:a));setDragging(null);setDragOver(null);doToast("Appointment moved to "+time);}}}

                  >

                    {appt&&<div draggable onDragStart={()=>setDragging(appt)} style={{background:appt.color+"18",borderLeft:"3px solid "+appt.color,borderRadius:5,padding:"3px 7px",fontSize:11,cursor:"grab",userSelect:"none",color:appt.color,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",whiteSpace:"nowrap",textOverflow:"ellipsis"}}>

                      <span style={{fontWeight:700}}>{appt.patient}</span>

                      <span style={{fontSize:9,opacity:.7,marginLeft:4}}>{appt.type}</span>

                    </div>}

                  </td>

                );

              })}

            </tr>

          );

        })}</tbody>

      </table>

    </div>

  </div>;

}

function OnlineBookingPage({setPage}){

  const [bookings,setBookings]=useState(ONLINE_BOOKINGS);

  const [tab,setTab]=useState("requests"); // requests|calendar|types|widget|analytics

  const [selBooking,setSelBooking]=useState(null);

  const [statusFilter,setStatusFilter]=useState("all");

  const [search,setSearch]=useState("");

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const [copied,setCopied]=useState(false);

  const [showRejectModal,setShowRejectModal]=useState(false);

  const [rejectReason,setRejectReason]=useState("");

  const [rejectTarget,setRejectTarget]=useState(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};

  const pending=bookings.filter(b=>b.status==="pending");

  const confirmed=bookings.filter(b=>b.status==="confirmed");

  const filtered=bookings.filter(b=>{

    if(statusFilter!=="all"&&b.status!==statusFilter)return false;

    if(search){const s=search.toLowerCase();if(!b.name.toLowerCase().includes(s)&&!b.typeLabel.toLowerCase().includes(s)&&!b.email.toLowerCase().includes(s))return false;}

    return true;

  });

  const confirmBooking=(id)=>{

    setBookings(p=>p.map(b=>b.id===id?{...b,status:"confirmed"}:b));

    const b=bookings.find(x=>x.id===id);

    doToast("✓ Confirmed & SMS sent to "+b?.name);

    setSelBooking(prev=>prev?.id===id?{...prev,status:"confirmed"}:prev);

  };

  const rejectBooking=(id,reason)=>{

    setBookings(p=>p.map(b=>b.id===id?{...b,status:"cancelled",cancelReason:reason}:b));

    doToast("Booking declined — patient notified");

    setSelBooking(null);setShowRejectModal(false);setRejectReason("");setRejectTarget(null);

  };

  const copyWidget=()=>{

    navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText(BOOKING_WIDGET_CODE).then(()=>{setCopied(true);setTimeout(()=>setCopied(false),2500);});

  };

  const SOURCE_COLORS={"website":"#0d9488","google":"#4285f4","instagram":"#e1306c","facebook":"#1877f2","referral":"#7c3aed"};

  const TABS=[

    {id:"requests",l:"📥 Booking Requests",badge:pending.length||null},

    {id:"calendar",l:"📅 Upcoming Bookings"},

    {id:"types",l:"⚙️ Appointment Types"},

    {id:"widget",l:"🌐 Website Widget"},

    {id:"analytics",l:"📊 Analytics"},

  ];

  return(

    <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,zIndex:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.25)",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={13}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Reject modal */}

      {showRejectModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:420,padding:22,boxShadow:"0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Decline Booking</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>Patient will be notified by SMS and email with your reason.</div>

          <textarea value={rejectReason} onChange={e=>setRejectReason(e.target.value)} placeholder="Reason e.g. No NHS slots available — please call to discuss private options, or visit nhs.uk to find an NHS dentist nearby." rows={3} style={{width:"100%",padding:"9px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:12}}>

            <button onClick={()=>{setShowRejectModal(false);setRejectReason("");}} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>

            <button onClick={()=>rejectBooking(rejectTarget,rejectReason)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:C.red,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Decline & Notify Patient</button>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* Header */}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 20px 0",flexShrink:0}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

          <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>🌐</div>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Online Booking</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Manage patient self-bookings · Configure availability · Embed on your website</div>

          </div>

          {/* Stats pills */}

          {[

            {l:"Pending",v:pending.length,c:pending.length>0?C.amber:C.green,bg:pending.length>0?"#fef3c7":"#dcfce7"},

            {l:"Today",v:confirmed.filter(b=>b.date==="Today").length,c:C.teal,bg:C.tealL},

            {l:"This week",v:BOOKING_STATS.totalThisWeek,c:C.blue,bg:"#dbeafe"},

            {l:"Conversion",v:BOOKING_STATS.conversionRate+"%",c:C.purple,bg:"#ede9fe"},

          ].map(s=>(

            <div key={s.l} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:s.bg,borderRadius:9,textAlign:"center"}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:17,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:s.c,fontWeight:600,opacity:.7}}>{s.l}</div>

            </div>

          ))}

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>

          {TABS.map(t=>(

            <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:"2px solid "+(tab===t.id?C.adminAccent:"transparent"),background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.adminAccent:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

              {t.l}

              {t.badge>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:8,background:C.red,color:"#fff"}}>{t.badge}</span>}

            </button>

          ))}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* ── REQUESTS TAB ── */}

      {tab==="requests"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>

        {/* List */}

        <div style={{width:380,flexShrink:0,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:7,flexShrink:0}}>

            <div style={{position:"relative",flex:1}}>

              <Search size={12} style={{position:"absolute",left:8,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>

              <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search patient or type…" style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px 6px 26px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}/>

            </div>

            <select value={statusFilter} onChange={e=>setStatusFilter(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"6px 9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",cursor:"pointer",outline:"none"}}>

              <option value="all">All</option>

              {Object.entries(BOOKING_STATUS_META).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.l}</option>)}

            </select>

          </div>

          <div style={{overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>

            {filtered.length===0&&<div style={{padding:24,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:13}}>No bookings match</div>}

            {filtered.map((b,i)=>{

              const sm=BOOKING_STATUS_META[b.status];

              const isSelected=selBooking?.id===b.id;

              return(

                <div key={b.id} onClick={()=>setSelBooking(b)} style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,cursor:"pointer",background:isSelected?C.tealL:b.status==="pending"?"#fffbeb":"#fff",borderLeft:"3px solid "+(isSelected?C.teal:b.status==="pending"?C.amber:"transparent"),transition:"all .1s"}}>

                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>

                    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>

                        <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{b.name}</span>

                        {b.isNew&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple,flexShrink:0}}>NEW</span>}

                        {b.status==="pending"&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber,flexShrink:0}}>ACTION NEEDED</span>}

                      </div>

                      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{b.typeLabel}</div>

                      <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{b.date} at {b.time}</div>

                    </div>

                    <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>

                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:7,background:sm.bg,color:sm.c}}>{sm.icon} {sm.l}</span>

                      <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:4,display:"flex",gap:3,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>

                        <div style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:SOURCE_COLORS[b.source]||"#94a3b8"}}/>

                        {b.source}

                      </div>

                    </div>

                  </div>

                </div>

              );

            })}

          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Detail panel */}

        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",background:"#f8fafc"}}>

          {!selBooking&&<div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",height:"100%",color:"#94a3b8"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:40,marginBottom:12}}>📥</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>{pending.length>0?"Select a booking to review":"All caught up!"}</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:12}}>{pending.length>0?`${pending.length} pending booking${pending.length!==1?"s":""} need your attention`:"No pending bookings right now"}</div>

          </div>}

          {selBooking&&<div style={{padding:18}}>

            {/* Header */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)",marginBottom:14}}>

              <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#0d4a44)",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:11,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.12)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{selBooking.name.split(" ").map(w=>w[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                    {selBooking.name}

                    {selBooking.isNew&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:"rgba(124,58,237,.4)",color:"#c4b5fd"}}>NEW PATIENT</span>}

                  </div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",marginTop:2}}>{selBooking.email} · {selBooking.phone}</div>

                </div>

                <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>

                  {selBooking.status==="pending"&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>

                    <button onClick={()=>{setRejectTarget(selBooking.id);setShowRejectModal(true);}} style={{padding:"7px 14px",background:"rgba(220,38,38,.2)",color:"#fca5a5",border:"1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3)",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>✕ Decline</button>

                    <button onClick={()=>confirmBooking(selBooking.id)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>✓ Confirm & Notify</button>

                  </div>}

                  {selBooking.status==="confirmed"&&<span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(22,163,74,.2)",color:"#86efac"}}>✅ Confirmed</span>}

                  {selBooking.status==="cancelled"&&<span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(220,38,38,.2)",color:"#fca5a5"}}>❌ Declined</span>}

                </div>

              </div>

              {/* Appointment summary */}

              <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:12,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

                {[

                  {l:"Appointment Type",v:selBooking.typeLabel},

                  {l:"Date & Time",v:selBooking.date+" at "+selBooking.time},

                  {l:"Preferred Dentist",v:selBooking.dentist},

                  {l:"NHS / Private",v:selBooking.nhs?"NHS (Band 1-3)":"Private"},

                ].map(f=>(

                  <div key={f.l}>

                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{f.v}</div>

                  </div>

                ))}

              </div>

              <div style={{padding:"10px 18px",display:"flex",gap:16,alignItems:"center"}}>

                {[

                  {l:"Source",v:selBooking.source,c:SOURCE_COLORS[selBooking.source]||"#94a3b8"},

                  {l:"Submitted",v:selBooking.submittedAt},

                  {l:"Booking ID",v:selBooking.id},

                ].map(f=>(

                  <div key={f.l} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11}}>

                    {f.c&&<div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:f.c}}/>}

                    <span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>{f.l}:</span>

                    <span style={{fontWeight:600,color:f.c||C.text}}>{f.v}</span>

                  </div>

                ))}

              </div>

            </div>

            {/* Patient notes */}

            {selBooking.notes&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:12,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>Patient Notes</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:13,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.6}}>{selBooking.notes}</div>

            </div>}

            {/* Medical pre-screen */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:12,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:10}}>Pre-Screening Questionnaire</div>

              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:10}}>

                {[

                  {l:"Allergies",v:selBooking.medQ?.allergies,warn:selBooking.medQ?.allergies!=="None"},

                  {l:"Medications",v:selBooking.medQ?.medications,warn:selBooking.medQ?.medications!=="None"},

                  {l:"Medical Conditions",v:selBooking.medQ?.conditions,warn:selBooking.medQ?.conditions!=="None"},

                ].map(f=>(

                  <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"9px 11px",background:f.warn?"#fef3c7":"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${f.warn?"#fde68a":C.border}`,borderRadius:9}}>

                    <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:f.warn?C.amber:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>{f.l}{f.warn&&" ⚠️"}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:f.warn?700:400,color:f.warn?C.amber:C.text}}>{f.v}</div>

                  </div>

                ))}

              </div>

            </div>

            {/* Cancel reason */}

            {selBooking.cancelReason&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff5f5",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,color:C.red}}>

              <strong>Decline reason:</strong> {selBooking.cancelReason}

            </div>}

            {/* Actions */}

            {selBooking.status==="confirmed"&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:4}}>

              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening "+selBooking.name+"'s record — call from practice phone: "+selBooking.phone)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:9,background:C.tealL,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Phone size={13}/>Contact — {selBooking.phone}</button>

              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening in calendar…")} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>📅 View in Calendar</button>

              <button onClick={()=>{setRejectTarget(selBooking.id);setShowRejectModal(true);}} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.red}}>Cancel Booking</button>

            </div>}

          </div>}

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── UPCOMING BOOKINGS TAB ── */}

      {tab==="calendar"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{maxWidth:780,margin:"0 auto"}}>

          {["Today","Tomorrow","16 Jun 2026"].map(day=>{

            const dayBookings=bookings.filter(b=>b.date===day&&b.status!=="cancelled");

            if(!dayBookings.length)return null;

            return(

              <div key={day} style={{marginBottom:16}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:8}}>{day} — {dayBookings.length} booking{dayBookings.length!==1?"s":""}</div>

                <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.05)"}}>

                  {dayBookings.sort((a,b)=>a.time.localeCompare(b.time)).map((b,i)=>{

                    const sm=BOOKING_STATUS_META[b.status];

                    const type=APPT_TYPES_BOOKABLE.find(t=>t.id===b.type);

                    return(

                      <div key={b.id} style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",borderLeft:"3px solid "+(type?.color||C.teal)}}>

                        <div style={{flexShrink:0,textAlign:"center",minWidth:44}}>

                          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:type?.color||C.teal}}>{b.time}</div>

                          <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{type?.duration||30}min</div>

                        </div>

                        <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>

                            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{b.name}</span>

                            {b.isNew&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple}}>NEW</span>}

                          </div>

                          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{b.typeLabel} · {b.dentist}</div>

                          {b.medQ?.allergies!=="None"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:600,marginTop:2}}>⚠️ Allergy: {b.medQ.allergies}</div>}

                        </div>

                        <div style={{flexShrink:0}}>

                          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:7,background:sm.bg,color:sm.c,marginBottom:4}}>{sm.icon} {sm.l}</div>

                          {b.status==="pending"&&<button onClick={()=>confirmBooking(b.id)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"4px 8px",background:C.green,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>Confirm</button>}

                        </div>

                      </div>

                    );

                  })}

                </div>

              </div>

            );

          })}

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── APPOINTMENT TYPES TAB ── */}

      {tab==="types"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{maxWidth:780,margin:"0 auto"}}>

          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>

            <div>

              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Appointment Types</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Control which appointment types are available for online booking</div>

            </div>

            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Add appointment type — coming soon")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>Add Type</button>

          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>

            {APPT_TYPES_BOOKABLE.map((type,i)=>{

              const weekBookings=bookings.filter(b=>b.type===type.id).length;

              return(

                <div key={type.id} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,boxShadow:"0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.04)",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",borderLeft:"4px solid "+type.color}}>

                  <div style={{flex:1}}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>

                      <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{type.name}</span>

                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:type.nhs?"#dbeafe":"#ede9fe",color:type.nhs?C.blue:C.purple}}>{type.nhs?"NHS":"Private"}</span>

                    </div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>{type.desc}</div>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,fontSize:11}}>

                      <span><strong>{type.duration}</strong> min</span>

                      <span><strong>{type.price>0?"£"+type.price.toFixed(2):"Free"}</strong></span>

                      <span>Max <strong>{type.maxPerDay}</strong>/day</span>

                      <span style={{color:C.teal}}><strong>{weekBookings}</strong> bookings this week</span>

                    </div>

                  </div>

                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                    <div style={{width:36,height:20,borderRadius:10,background:C.teal,cursor:"pointer",position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>

                      <div style={{width:16,height:16,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:2,right:2,boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}/>

                    </div>

                    <button onClick={()=>doToast("Edit "+type.name)} style={{padding:"5px 11px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>Edit</button>

                  </div>

                </div>

              );

            })}

          </div>

          {/* Availability rules */}

          <div style={{marginTop:16,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

            <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Availability Rules</div>

            {[

              {l:"Online booking hours",v:"Mon–Fri 08:00–17:30, Sat 08:00–13:00"},

              {l:"Earliest bookable slot",v:"Same day (emergency only) or next day minimum"},

              {l:"Latest advance booking",v:"8 weeks ahead"},

              {l:"Buffer between appointments",v:"10 minutes automatically added"},

              {l:"New patient slots per day",v:"3 maximum (can be adjusted per appointment type)"},

              {l:"NHS slots cap",v:"Enabled — once daily NHS slots fill, private offered"},

            ].map((rule,i)=>(

              <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{rule.l}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{rule.v}</div>

                </div>

                <button onClick={()=>doToast("Edit rule")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>Edit</button>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── WIDGET TAB ── */}

      {tab==="widget"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{maxWidth:720,margin:"0 auto"}}>

          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)",marginBottom:14}}>

            <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#0d4a44)"}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:3}}>Embed on Your Website</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}>Paste this code into your practice website and patients can book 24/7</div>

            </div>

            <div style={{padding:18}}>

              <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",borderRadius:10,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>

                <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#4ade80",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>HTML</span>

                  <button onClick={copyWidget} style={{padding:"3px 11px",background:copied?"#16a34a":"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",border:"none",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>

                    {copied?"✓ Copied!":"Copy Code"}

                  </button>

                </div>

                <div style={{padding:14,overflowX:"auto"}}>

                  <pre style={{margin:0,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#7ec8e3",lineHeight:1.7,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap"}}>{BOOKING_WIDGET_CODE}</pre>

                </div>

              </div>

              <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,color:"#15803d",marginBottom:12}}>

                💡 Works with any website platform — Wix, WordPress, Squarespace, GoDaddy, or a custom site. Just paste the code where you want the booking button to appear.

              </div>

              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10}}>

                {[

                  {l:"Booking page URL",v:"booking.prodental.co.uk/riverside",action:"Copy"},

                  {l:"QR Code",v:"For posters, waiting room, business cards",action:"Download"},

                  {l:"Google Business Profile",v:"Add 'Book Online' button to your Google listing",action:"Connect"},

                  {l:"Facebook / Instagram",v:"Add booking link to your social media bio",action:"Get Link"},

                ].map((item,i)=>(

                  <div key={i} style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10}}>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>{item.l}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginBottom:8}}>{item.v}</div>

                    <button onClick={()=>doToast(item.action+" — done")} style={{padding:"5px 12px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>{item.action}</button>

                  </div>

                ))}

              </div>

            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── ANALYTICS TAB ── */}

      {tab==="analytics"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{maxWidth:780,margin:"0 auto"}}>

          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:14}}>

            {[

              {l:"Bookings this month",v:"47",sub:"↑ 23% vs last month",c:C.teal,icon:"📅"},

              {l:"Conversion rate",v:"68%",sub:"Viewed page and booked",c:C.green,icon:"✅"},

              {l:"Avg response time",v:"14 min",sub:"Pending → confirmed",c:C.blue,icon:"⚡"},

              {l:"Revenue from online",v:"£4,230",sub:"This month",c:C.purple,icon:"💰"},

              {l:"New patients via web",v:"18",sub:"This month",c:C.amber,icon:"👤"},

              {l:"Top source",v:"Website",sub:"62% of all bookings",c:"#64748b",icon:"🌐"},

            ].map(s=>(

              <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,boxShadow:"0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.04)"}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:22,marginBottom:6}}>{s.icon}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginTop:2}}>{s.l}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{s.sub}</div>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

          {/* Source breakdown */}

          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,marginBottom:12}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Bookings by Source</div>

            {[{l:"Practice Website",v:62,c:C.teal},{l:"Google Search",v:21,c:"#4285f4"},{l:"Instagram",v:9,c:"#e1306c"},{l:"Facebook",v:5,c:"#1877f2"},{l:"Patient Referral",v:3,c:C.purple}].map(s=>(

              <div key={s.l} style={{marginBottom:8}}>

                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:11,marginBottom:3}}>

                  <span style={{fontWeight:600}}>{s.l}</span><span style={{color:s.c,fontWeight:700}}>{s.v}%</span>

                </div>

                <div style={{height:8,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:4,overflow:"hidden"}}>

                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:s.v+"%",background:s.c,borderRadius:4}}/>

                </div>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

          {/* Popular types */}

          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>

            <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Most Booked Appointment Types</div>

            {[

              {t:"Routine Check-up",n:18,pct:38,c:C.teal},

              {t:"New Patient Exam",n:12,pct:26,c:C.purple},

              {t:"Scale & Polish",n:9,pct:19,c:C.blue},

              {t:"Emergency",n:5,pct:11,c:C.red},

              {t:"Whitening Consult",n:3,pct:6,c:C.amber},

            ].map((item,i)=>(

              <div key={i} style={{padding:"9px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:item.c,flexShrink:0}}/>

                <div style={{flex:1,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{item.t}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{item.n} bookings</div>

                <div style={{width:80,height:6,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>

                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:item.pct+"%",background:item.c,borderRadius:3}}/>

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:item.c,minWidth:30,textAlign:"right"}}>{item.pct}%</div>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

function IntegrationsPage({practiceName}){
  const [configureModal,setConfigureModal]=useState(null); // integration obj
  const [showRequestModal,setShowRequestModal]=useState(false);
  const [reqForm,setReqForm]=useState({name:"",website:"",reason:""});
  const [cat,setCat]=useState("All");const [search,setSearch]=useState("");const [configItem,setConfigItem]=useState(null);const [apiKey,setApiKey]=useState("");const [saved,setSaved]=useState(false);const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  // Track connected integrations as state so toggling updates the UI
  const [connectedSet,setConnectedSet]=useState(()=>{
    const s=new Set();
    INTEGRATIONS_DATA.flatMap(g=>g.items).forEach(it=>{if(it.status==="connected")s.add(it.name);});
    return s;
  });
  const toggleConnect=(itemName,connect)=>{
    setConnectedSet(prev=>{const s=new Set(prev);connect?s.add(itemName):s.delete(itemName);return s;});
  };
  // Enrich items with live connected status
  const enriched=(items)=>items.map(it=>({...it,status:connectedSet.has(it.name)?"connected":"available"}));

  const cats=["All",...INTEGRATIONS_DATA.map(c=>c.cat)];

  const allItems=INTEGRATIONS_DATA.flatMap(c=>enriched(c.items).map(i=>({...i,cat:c.cat,catColor:c.color})));

  const vis=allItems.filter(i=>{if(cat!=="All"&&i.cat!==cat)return false;if(search&&!i.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())&&!i.desc.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()))return false;return true;});

  const connected=allItems.filter(i=>i.status==="connected").length;

  const doSave=()=>{
    setSaved(true);
    toggleConnect(configItem?.name,true);
    doToast("✓ "+configItem?.name+" connected successfully"+(practiceName?" for "+practiceName:""));
    setTimeout(()=>{setSaved(false);setConfigItem(null);},1500);
  };

  return <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>

    {/* Request Integration Modal */}
    {showRequestModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Request New Integration</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:14}}>Can't find what you need? Submit a request and we'll review it for inclusion.</div>
        {[{l:"Integration / Software Name *",k:"name",ph:"e.g. Dental Monitoring"},{l:"Website / URL",k:"website",ph:"https://..."},{l:"Why do you need it?",k:"reason",ph:"Describe your use case…"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input value={reqForm[f.k]} onChange={e=>setReqForm(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:12}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowRequestModal(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>{if(!reqForm.name.trim()){doToast("Integration name required");return;}doToast("✓ Request submitted — our team will review "+reqForm.name);setShowRequestModal(false);setReqForm({name:"",website:"",reason:""}); }} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#f97316",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Submit Request</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {toast&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:10,right:10,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:200,boxShadow:"0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

    <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

        <div>

          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>Integrations & Connected Software</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>{connected} of {allItems.length} integrations active</div>

        </div>

        <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",gap:8}}>

          <div style={{position:"relative"}}>

            <Search size={13} style={{position:"absolute",left:10,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>

            <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search integrations…" style={{...inp,paddingLeft:30,width:220,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px 6px 30px"}}/>

          </div>

          <button onClick={()=>setShowRequestModal(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#f97316",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}><Plus size={12}/>Request Integration</button>

        </div>

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",paddingBottom:2}}>

        {cats.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setCat(c)} style={{padding:"4px 14px",borderRadius:20,border:`2px solid ${cat===c?C.teal:C.border}`,background:cat===c?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:cat===c?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:11,fontWeight:cat===c?700:400,cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c}</button>)}

      </div>

    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>

      {configItem&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:400}}>

        <div style={{background:C.card,borderRadius:14,width:480,maxWidth:"95vw",boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"16px 20px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}><span style={{fontSize:22}}>{configItem.icon}</span><div><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>{configItem.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{configItem.cat}</div></div></div>

            <button onClick={()=>setConfigItem(null)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={16}/></button>

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:"18px 20px"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#374151",marginBottom:16,lineHeight:1.7}}>{configItem.desc}</div>

            {configItem.status==="connected"?<>

              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:14,fontSize:12,color:C.green,display:"flex",gap:8}}><Check size={14}/>Integration active · API credentials configured · Last synced: just now</div>

              {configItem.key&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

                <span>API Key: {configItem.key}</span><button onClick={()=>{navigator.clipboard?.writeText(configItem.key||"");doToast("API key copied");}} style={{fontSize:9,padding:"2px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600,display:"flex",gap:3,alignItems:"center"}}><Copy size={9}/>Copy</button>

              </div>}

              {configItem.addon&&<div style={{padding:"9px 14px",background:"#fff7ed",border:"1px solid #fed7aa",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,color:C.orange,marginBottom:14}}>Add-on: {configItem.addon} · Currently active on your plan</div>}

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>

                <button onClick={()=>{setConfigureModal(configItem);setConfigItem(null);}} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Settings size={11}/>Configure Settings</button>
                <button onClick={()=>{toggleConnect(configItem.name,false);doToast("✓ "+configItem.name+" disconnected");setConfigItem(null);}} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>Disconnect</button>

              </div>

            </>:<>

              <div style={{marginBottom:12}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>API Key / Client ID</div><input value={apiKey} onChange={e=>setApiKey(e.target.value)} placeholder={`Enter your ${configItem.name} API credentials…`} style={inp}/></div>

              <div style={{marginBottom:16}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Webhook URL (if required)</div><input defaultValue="https://api.prodental.co.uk/webhooks/incoming" readOnly style={{...inp,background:"#f8fafc",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11}}/></div>

              {configItem.official&&<div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#dbeafe",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:C.blue,marginBottom:12}}>Official integration — approved by {configItem.name.split(" ")[0]}</div>}

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
                <button onClick={()=>{if(apiKey){doSave();}else{doToast("Enter API key to connect");}}}
                  style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:apiKey?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0",color:apiKey?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:apiKey?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                  <Link size={12}/>Connect {configItem?.name}
                </button>
                <button onClick={()=>setConfigItem(null)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
              </div>

            </>}

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* Grouped display */}

      {cat==="All"&&!search?INTEGRATIONS_DATA.map(group=><div key={group.cat} style={{marginBottom:20}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:10}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:group.color}}>{group.cat}</div>

          <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:group.color+"25"}}/>

          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{group.items.filter(i=>i.status==="connected").length}/{group.items.length} connected</span>

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(250px,1fr))",gap:10}}>

          {enriched(group.items).map(item=> <IntegCard key={item.name} item={{...item,catColor:group.color}} onConfigure={()=>setConfigItem({...item,catColor:group.color})}/>)}

        </div>

      </div>)

      :<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(250px,1fr))",gap:10}}>

        {vis.map(item=> <IntegCard key={item.name} item={item} onConfigure={()=>setConfigItem(item)}/>)}

      </div>}

    </div>

  </div>;

}

function IntegCard({item,onConfigure}){

  const isConn=item.status==="connected";

  return <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${isConn?item.catColor+"30":C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"13px 14px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start",cursor:"pointer",transition:"box-shadow .15s"}}

    onClick={onConfigure} onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.08)"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="none"}>

    <div style={{fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>{item.icon}</div>

    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>

        <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{item.name}</span>

        {item.official&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:C.nhs+"20",color:C.nhs}}>OFFICIAL</span>}

      </div>

      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.5,marginBottom:6,overflow:"hidden",display:"-webkit-box",WebkitLineClamp:2,WebkitBoxOrient:"vertical"}}>{item.desc}</div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:isConn?C.green:C.muted}}>

          <div style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:isConn?C.green:"#cbd5e1"}}/>

          {isConn?"Connected":"Available"}

        </div>

        {item.addon&&<Chip color={C.orange}>{item.addon}</Chip>}

      </div>

    </div>

  </div>;

}

  const FEATURE_LIST=[

    {id:"patients",   cat:"Core",   l:"Patient records",          hint:"Unlimited = no cap"},

    {id:"xray",       cat:"Clinical",l:"X-Ray / imaging",          hint:""},
