              <button key={i} onClick={()=>send(q)} style={{width:"100%",textAlign:"left",padding:"6px 8px",marginBottom:3,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:q.includes("source")||q.includes("Add a search")||q.includes("Export")||q.includes("£")||q.includes("DollarSign")?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.4,display:"block"}}

                onMouseEnter={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#0d9488";e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe";}}

                onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#e2e8f0";e.currentTarget.style.background=q.includes("source")||q.includes("Add a search")||q.includes("Export")||q.includes("£")||q.includes("DollarSign")?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc";}}>

                {q}

              </button>

            ))}

          </div>}

          {tab==="setup"&&<div style={{padding:"12px"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>{sourceLoaded?"✅ Source code stored":"Paste your source code"}</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1.55,marginBottom:10}}>{sourceLoaded?"Source is saved. I can now find any component automatically. Re-paste if you've downloaded an updated file.":"Copy your full ProDentalConnect_Platform.jsx file and paste it below. Stored in your browser only."}</div>

            <textarea value={sourcePaste} onChange={e=>setSourcePaste(e.target.value)} rows={8} placeholder="Paste your full .jsx source code here…" style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",resize:"none",boxSizing:"border-box",lineHeight:1.4}}/>

            <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:6}}>{sourcePaste.length>0?sourcePaste.length.toLocaleString()+" chars pasted":""}</div>

            <button onClick={async()=>{

              if(sourcePaste.length<5000){return;}

              const ok=await saveSource(sourcePaste);

              if(ok){setSourcePaste("");setTab("chat");}

            }} disabled={sourcePaste.length<5000} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",background:sourcePaste.length>=5000?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0",color:sourcePaste.length>=5000?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:sourcePaste.length>=5000?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:sourceLoaded?6:0}}>

              {sourcePaste.length>=5000?"💾 Save & Enable Code Changes":"Paste source above first"}

            </button>

            {sourceLoaded&&<>

              <button onClick={()=>downloadFile(source,"ProDentalConnect_Platform.jsx")} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px",background:"#f0fffe",border:"1px solid #0d9488",color:"#0d9488",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:4}}>

                ⬇️ Download Current Source

              </button>

              <button onClick={async()=>{await window.storage.delete(STORAGE_KEY);setSource("");setSourceLoaded(false);}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",background:"#fff5f5",color:"#dc2626",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600}}>

                🗑 Clear Stored Source

              </button>

            </>}

          </div>}

          {tab==="help"&&<div style={{padding:"12px"}}>

            {[

              {icon:"⚡",t:"Live changes",b:"Say 'turn on X-Ray feature' or 'go to monitoring' — happens in seconds, no download needed."},

              {icon:"💻",t:"Code changes",b:"Say 'add a button to tickets' or 'change the icon in plan builder' — I find the right component automatically and give you a download."},

              {icon:"⚙️",t:"First time setup",b:"Paste your JSX source in Setup once. After that I can see and modify any part of the code."},

              {icon:"⬇️",t:"After a code change",b:"Download the updated file → paste source → reload as new artifact. Your changes are permanent."},

              {icon:"🚀",t:"Going live",b:"Host on Vercel or Netlify (free). Upload your JSX → live URL in minutes. Re-upload for updates."},

              {icon:"🔄",t:"Keeping it updated",b:"Every time you download an update, paste the new source back in Setup so I stay in sync."},

            ].map((item,i)=>(

              <div key={i} style={{marginBottom:10,padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2}}>{item.icon} {item.t}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.5}}>{item.b}</div>

              </div>

            ))}

          </div>}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Chat */}

      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f8fafc"}}>

        <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

          <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:16,flexShrink:0}}>✨</div>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800}}>Claude — Platform AI</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{sourceLoaded?"Live changes + Smart code changes · "+Math.round(source.length/1000)+"K chars of source loaded":"Live changes only · Setup source for code changes"}</div>

          </div>

          {msgs.length>1&&<button onClick={()=>setMsgs([{role:"assistant",content:"Cleared. What would you like to change?",actions:[]}])} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Clear</button>}

        </div>

        {!sourceLoaded&&tab==="chat"&&<div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

          <span>⚙️</span><span>Paste your source in <strong onClick={()=>setTab("setup")} style={{cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"underline"}}>Setup</strong> to enable code changes (adding buttons, fixing icons, etc.)</span>

        </div>}

        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"16px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>

          {msgs.map((msg,mi)=>renderMsg(msg,mi))}

          {loading&&(

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>

              <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>✨</div>

              <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:"2px 14px 14px 14px"}}>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

                  {[0,1,2].map(j=><div key={j} style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#0d9488",opacity:0.4+(j*0.2),animation:"copilotPulse 1.2s "+(j*0.15)+"s ease-in-out infinite"}}/>)}

                  <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:4}}>{sourceLoaded?"Finding the right code and making the change…":"Thinking…"}</span>

                </div>

              </div>

            </div>

          )}

          <div ref={endRef}/>

        </div>

        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",background:"#fff",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",flexShrink:0}}>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-end"}}>

            <textarea ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e=>setInput(e.target.value)}

              onKeyDown={e=>{if(e.key==="Enter"&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();send();}}}

              placeholder={sourceLoaded?"Describe any change — live or code…":"Describe a change (live changes work now)…"}

              rows={2} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 12px",border:"1.5px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"none",lineHeight:1.5,maxHeight:100,overflowY:"auto"}}

              onFocus={e=>{e.target.style.borderColor="#0d9488";}}

              onBlur={e=>{e.target.style.borderColor="#e2e8f0";}}/>

            <button onClick={()=>send()} disabled={loading||!input.trim()} style={{padding:"9px 16px",background:loading||!input.trim()?"#e2e8f0":"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:loading||!input.trim()?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:loading||!input.trim()?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontWeight:700,fontSize:13,flexShrink:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5}}>

              <Send size={13}/>{loading?"…":"Send"}

            </button>

          </div>

          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:4,textAlign:"center"}}>Enter to send · Shift+Enter new line</div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

function AdminUpdates(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};


  // ── Reactive version state (syncs with mutable global) ──────────────

  const parsedV=()=>{const m=getVersion().replace("v","").split(".").map(Number);return{major:m[0]||2,minor:m[1]||4,patch:m[2]||1};};

  const [curVer,setCurVer]=useState(parsedV());

  const fmtV=v=>`v${v.major}.${v.minor}.${v.patch}`;

  const currentDisplay=fmtV(curVer);

  const [tab,setTab]=useState("deploy");

  const [codeInput,setCodeInput]=useState("");

  const [fileInfo,setFileInfo]=useState(null);

  const [bumpType,setBumpType]=useState("patch"); // patch|minor|major|hotfix

  const [customVer,setCustomVer]=useState("");

  const [changelog,setChangelog]=useState("");

  const [deployTarget,setDeployTarget]=useState("all");

  const [singlePractice,setSinglePractice]=useState("");

  const [deploying,setDeploying]=useState(false);

  const [deployProg,setDeployProg]=useState(0);

  const [deployLog,setDeployLog]=useState([]);

  const [deployed,setDeployed]=useState(null);


  const fileRef=useRef(null);


  // Compute preview of next version

  const previewVer=()=>{

    if(customVer.match(/\d+\.\d+\.\d+/))return"v"+customVer.replace("v","");

    const v={...curVer};

    if(bumpType==="patch"){v.patch++;}

    else if(bumpType==="minor"){v.minor++;v.patch=0;}

    else if(bumpType==="major"){v.major++;v.minor=0;v.patch=0;}

    else if(bumpType==="hotfix"){v.patch++;}

    return fmtV(v);

  };

  const [history,setHistory]=useState([

    {v:"v2.4.1",date:"14 May 2025",type:"feature",notes:"Calendar 5-min slots, 3-level access control, VAT pricing, finance integrations, monitoring dashboard",pushed:127,by:"Dr. Ahmed",status:"current"},

    {v:"v2.4.0",date:"1 May 2025", type:"feature",notes:"WhatsApp Business API, reception AI rebuild, support ticket system",pushed:127,by:"Dr. Ahmed",status:"deployed"},

    {v:"v2.3.8",date:"10 Apr 2025",type:"bugfix", notes:"FP17 form redesign, NHS BSA integration, clinical notes lock workflow",pushed:124,by:"Sarah Phillips",status:"deployed"},

    {v:"v2.3.5",date:"20 Mar 2025",type:"feature",notes:"Calendar drag & drop, waiting room real-time, staff rota integration",pushed:118,by:"Dr. Ahmed",status:"deployed"},

    {v:"v2.3.0",date:"1 Mar 2025", type:"feature",notes:"Initial NHS FP17 module, audit log, reusable templates, treatment plan editor",pushed:103,by:"Dr. Ahmed",status:"deprecated"},

  ]);

  // Feature flags — toggle on/off per feature

  const [features,setFeatures]=useState([

    {id:"rxai",     l:"Reception AI",          desc:"Smart phone receptionist with AI call handling",         on:true, core:false,icon:"📞"},

    {id:"whatsapp", l:"WhatsApp Messaging",     desc:"Two-way patient messaging via WhatsApp Business API",    on:true, core:false,icon:"💬"},

    {id:"shortnotice",l:"Short Notice Filler",  desc:"Auto-fill cancelled slots from a patient waitlist",      on:true, core:false,icon:"⚡"},

    {id:"recovery", l:"Revenue Recovery",       desc:"AI-powered reactivation for inactive patients",          on:true, core:false,icon:"💰"},

    {id:"xray",     l:"X-Ray Imaging",          desc:"Intraoral X-ray viewer and linking to patient records",  on:true, core:false,icon:"🦷"},

    {id:"lab",      l:"Lab Manager",            desc:"Digital lab requisition and tracking",                   on:true, core:false,icon:"🧪"},

    {id:"reporting",l:"Practice Reports",       desc:"Advanced analytics and financial reporting dashboards",  on:true, core:false,icon:"📊"},

    {id:"finance",  l:"Patient Finance",        desc:"Chrysalis / Medenta finance application in-app",         on:true, core:false,icon:"💳"},

    {id:"calendar", l:"Calendar",               desc:"Core appointment scheduling module",                     on:true, core:true, icon:"📅"},

    {id:"patients", l:"Patient Records",        desc:"Full patient record management",                         on:true, core:true, icon:"👤"},

    {id:"fp17",     l:"FP17 & NHS Claims",      desc:"NHS FP17 digital submission and UDA tracking",           on:true, core:true, icon:"🏥"},

    {id:"charting", l:"Clinical Charting",      desc:"Interactive dental charting and clinical notes",         on:true, core:true, icon:"📋"},

  ]);

  const toggleFeature=id=>setFeatures(f=>f.map(x=>x.id===id?{...x,on:!x.on}:x));

  const handleFileSelect=(e)=>{

    const file=e.target?.files?.[0];

    if(!file)return;

    if(!file.name.endsWith(".jsx")&&!file.name.endsWith(".js")){doToast("⚠ Please upload a .jsx or .js file");return;}

    const reader=new FileReader();

    reader.onload=ev=>{setCodeInput(ev.target.result||"");setFileInfo({name:file.name,size:(file.size/1024).toFixed(1)+"KB",lines:(ev.target.result||"").split("\n").length.toLocaleString()});doToast("✓ File loaded: "+file.name);};

    reader.readAsText(file);

  };

  const DEPLOY_STEPS=[

    "🔍 Validating code bundle…",

    "📦 Compressing assets…",

    "🌍 Connecting to practice nodes…",

    "⚡ Pushing to Starter tier…",

    "🚀 Pushing to Growth tier…",

    "🏢 Pushing to Enterprise tier…",

    "✅ Verifying deployment health checks…",

    "🔄 Clearing edge cache…",

  ];

  const pushUpdate=()=>{

    if(!changelog.trim()){doToast("⚠ Add release notes before deploying");return;}

    const next=previewVer();

    const count=deployTarget==="all"?127:deployTarget==="growth"?62:deployTarget==="enterprise"?31:deployTarget==="single"?1:18;

    setDeploying(true);setDeployProg(0);setDeployLog([]);setDeployed(null);

    // Step through log messages

    DEPLOY_STEPS.forEach((step,i)=>{

      setTimeout(()=>setDeployLog(p=>[...p,{t:new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB"),msg:step}]),i*1100);

    });

    const iv=setInterval(()=>{

      setDeployProg(p=>{

        const next2=p+(Math.random()*5+2.5);

        if(next2>=100){

          clearInterval(iv);

          setDeploying(false);

          // Update reactive version state

          const m=next.replace("v","").split(".").map(Number);

          const newV={major:m[0],minor:m[1],patch:m[2]};

          setCurVer(newV);

          setVersion(next);

          const today=new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"});

          setHistory(prev=>[{v:next,date:today,type:bumpType==="hotfix"?"hotfix":"feature",notes:changelog,pushed:count,by:"Dr. Ahmed",status:"current"},...prev.map(x=>x.status==="current"?{...x,status:"deployed"}:x)]);

          setDeployed({v:next,count});

          setDeployLog(p=>[...p,{t:new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB"),msg:`✅ Deployment complete — ${next} live on ${count} practices`}]);

          setCodeInput("");setFileInfo(null);setChangelog("");setCustomVer("");

          return 100;

        }

        return next2;

      });

    },180);

  };

  const BUMP_TYPES=[

    {id:"patch",   l:"Patch",   ex:"2.4.1 → 2.4.2", desc:"Bug fixes, minor tweaks",       c:"#16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4"},

    {id:"minor",   l:"Minor",   ex:"2.4.1 → 2.5.0", desc:"New features added",             c:"#0369a1",bg:"#dbeafe"},

    {id:"major",   l:"Major",   ex:"2.4.1 → 3.0.0", desc:"Breaking / large changes",       c:"#7c3aed",bg:"#ede9fe"},

    {id:"hotfix",  l:"Hotfix",  ex:"2.4.1 → 2.4.2", desc:"Critical emergency fix",         c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"},

  ];

  const TYPE_BADGE={feature:"#0369a1",bugfix:"#16a34a",hotfix:"#dc2626",deprecated:"#94a3b8"};

  const TABS2=[

    {id:"deploy",   l:"🚀 Push Update"},

    {id:"history",  l:"📋 Version History"},

    {id:"features", l:"⚙ Feature Control"},

    {id:"rollback", l:"↩ Rollback"},

  ];

  return(

    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.1)"}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Hidden file input */}

      <input ref={fileRef} type="file" accept=".jsx,.js" style={{display:"none"}} onChange={handleFileSelect}/>

      {/* Header */}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 20px 0",flexShrink:0}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

          <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#7c3aed)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20}}>🚀</div>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>

              Software Deployment Console

              <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,padding:"3px 12px",borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace",letterSpacing:".04em"}}>{currentDisplay}</span>

              {deployed&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.green,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={11}/>Deployed to {deployed.count} practices</span>}

            </div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Upload a JSX file or paste code — set version bump — push to all {deployTarget==="all"?"127":"selected"} practices</div>

          </div>

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>

          {TABS2.map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?C.adminAccent:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.adminAccent:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>{t.l}</button>)}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* ── TAB: Deploy ──────────────────────────────────── */}

      {tab==="deploy"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14}}>

          {/* Left: Upload / Code */}

          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>

            {/* Version bump */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>Version Bump</div>

              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:7,marginBottom:10}}>

                {BUMP_TYPES.map(bt=>(

                  <label key={bt.id} onClick={()=>{setBumpType(bt.id);setCustomVer("");}} style={{padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:9,border:`2px solid ${bumpType===bt.id?bt.c:C.border}`,background:bumpType===bt.id?bt.bg:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer"}}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

                      <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:bumpType===bt.id?bt.c:C.text}}>{bt.l}</span>

                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:bt.c,background:bt.bg,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4}}>{bt.ex}</span>

                    </div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{bt.desc}</div>

                  </label>

                ))}

              </div>

              {/* Custom version override */}

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,flexShrink:0}}>Custom (optional):</span>

                <input value={customVer} onChange={e=>setCustomVer(e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. 2.5.0" style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"5px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",flex:1}}/>

              </div>

              {/* Version preview */}

              <div style={{marginTop:10,padding:"10px 12px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#f8fafc,#f1f5f9)",borderRadius:9,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Current</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#475569"}}>{currentDisplay}</div>

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:20,color:"#94a3b8"}}>→</div>

                <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>After Push</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:BUMP_TYPES.find(b=>b.id===bumpType)?.c||C.teal}}>{previewVer()}</div>

                </div>

              </div>

            </div>

            {/* Release notes */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Release Notes <span style={{color:C.red}}>*</span></div>

              <textarea value={changelog} onChange={e=>setChangelog(e.target.value)} placeholder="Describe what changed in this release — shown to all practices in their update notification…" rows={4} style={{width:"100%",resize:"vertical",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"9px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>

            </div>

            {/* Deployment scope */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Deployment Scope</div>

              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:6,marginBottom:8}}>

                {[{id:"all",l:"🌍 All Practices",n:127},{id:"enterprise",l:"🏢 Enterprise",n:31},{id:"growth",l:"📈 Growth",n:62},{id:"starter",l:"🌱 Starter",n:34},{id:"single",l:"🏥 Single Practice",n:1}].map(sc=>(

                  <label key={sc.id} onClick={()=>setDeployTarget(sc.id)} style={{padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${deployTarget===sc.id?C.teal:C.border}`,background:deployTarget===sc.id?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:deployTarget===sc.id?700:400,color:deployTarget===sc.id?C.teal:C.text}}>{sc.l}</span>

                    <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{sc.n==="1"||sc.id==="single"?"Select ↓":sc.n+" practices"}</span>

                  </label>

                ))}

              </div>

              {deployTarget==="single"&&<div style={{marginTop:4}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Select Practice</div>

                <select value={singlePractice} onChange={e=>setSinglePractice(e.target.value)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:`1.5px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:8,background:C.tealL,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",color:C.teal,fontWeight:600,cursor:"pointer",outline:"none"}}>

                  <option value="">— Choose a practice —</option>

                  {PRACTICES.map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.name} ({p.plan})</option>)}

                </select>

                {singlePractice&&<div style={{marginTop:6,padding:"7px 10px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:7,fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:600}}>✓ Will deploy only to: {PRACTICES.find(p=>p.id===singlePractice)?.name}</div>}

              </div>}

            </div>

          </div>

          {/* Right: File upload / code paste */}

          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>

            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Upload Updated Platform File</div>

              {/* Drop zone */}

              <div onClick={()=>fileRef.current?.click()} onDragOver={e=>e.preventDefault()} onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault();const file=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(file){const ev={target:{files:[file]}};handleFileSelect(ev);}}}

                style={{border:`2px dashed ${fileInfo?C.teal:C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"20px 14px",textAlign:"center",cursor:"pointer",background:fileInfo?"rgba(13,148,136,0.04)":"#f8fafc",transition:"all .15s",marginBottom:10}}>

                {fileInfo?(

                  <div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:22}}>✅</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,marginTop:4}}>{fileInfo.name}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{fileInfo.size} · {fileInfo.lines} lines</div>

                    <div onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();setFileInfo(null);setCodeInput("");}} style={{marginTop:6,fontSize:10,color:C.red,cursor:"pointer"}}>✕ Remove</div>

                  </div>

                ):(

                  <div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:28}}>📁</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,marginTop:6}}>Drop .jsx or .js file here</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>or click to browse</div>

                  </div>

                )}

              </div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,textAlign:"center",marginBottom:8}}>— or paste code below —</div>

              <textarea value={codeInput} onChange={e=>setCodeInput(e.target.value)} placeholder={"// Paste updated platform code here\n// The entire .jsx file contents"} rows={8} style={{width:"100%",resize:"vertical",background:"#0c1a28",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:"#7ec8e3",fontSize:11,padding:"9px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>

              {codeInput&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:4}}>{codeInput.split("\n").length.toLocaleString()} lines · {(codeInput.length/1024).toFixed(1)} KB</div>}

            </div>

            {/* Deploy button + progress */}

            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>

              <button onClick={pushUpdate} disabled={deploying||!changelog.trim()} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px",background:deploying||!changelog.trim()?"#e2e8f0":"linear-gradient(135deg,#f97316,#dc2626)",color:deploying||!changelog.trim()?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:deploying||!changelog.trim()?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",transition:"all .15s"}}>

                <Server size={14}/>

                {deploying?"Deploying…":`Push ${previewVer()} to ${deployTarget==="all"?"All 127":deployTarget==="enterprise"?"31 Enterprise":deployTarget==="growth"?"62 Growth":deployTarget==="single"?PRACTICES.find(p=>p.id===singlePractice)?.name||"Select a practice":"34 Starter"} ${deployTarget==="single"?"":"Practice"}${deployTarget!=="all"&&deployTarget!=="single"?"s":""}`}

              </button>

              {(deploying||deployed)&&<div style={{marginTop:10}}>

                <div style={{height:8,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:4,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:8}}>

                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${deployProg}%`,background:deployed?"#22c55e":"linear-gradient(90deg,#f97316,#dc2626)",borderRadius:4,transition:"width .2s"}}/>

                </div>

                <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",borderRadius:8,padding:"8px 10px",maxHeight:120,overflowY:"auto",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:10,color:"#7ec8e3"}}>

                  {deployLog.map((l,i)=><div key={i}><span style={{color:"#475569"}}>[{l.t}]</span> {l.msg}</div>)}

                  {deploying&&<div style={{color:"#f97316"}}>▌</div>}

                </div>

                {deployed&&<div style={{marginTop:8,padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:600,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Successfully deployed {deployed.v} to {deployed.count} practices</div>}

              </div>}

            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── TAB: History ─────────────────────────────────── */}

      {tab==="history"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Release History</div>

          {history.map((h,i)=>{

            const isLatest=h.status==="current";

            return(

              <div key={i} style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:isLatest?"rgba(13,148,136,0.03)":"#fff",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>

                <div style={{minWidth:70,textAlign:"center"}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:isLatest?C.teal:"#475569"}}>{h.v}</div>

                  {isLatest&&<div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,background:C.teal,color:"#fff",borderRadius:4,padding:"1px 6px",marginTop:2}}>LIVE</div>}

                  {h.status==="deprecated"&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>deprecated</div>}

                </div>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>

                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:4,alignItems:"center"}}>

                    <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:TYPE_BADGE[h.type]+"22",color:TYPE_BADGE[h.type],textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{h.type}</span>

                    <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{h.date} · by {h.by} · pushed to {h.pushed} practices</span>

                  </div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.5}}>{h.notes}</div>

                </div>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexShrink:0}}>

                  {h.status==="deployed"&&<button onClick={()=>{setVersion(h.v);const m=h.v.replace("v","").split(".").map(Number);setCurVer({major:m[0],minor:m[1],patch:m[2]});setHistory(p=>p.map(x=>({...x,status:x.v===h.v?"current":x.status==="current"?"deployed":x.status})));doToast("↩ Rolled back to "+h.v);}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.amber}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#fffbeb",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.amber,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><RotateCcw size={10}/>Rollback</button>}

                </div>

              </div>

            );

          })}

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── TAB: Feature Control ─────────────────────────── */}

      {tab==="features"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{marginBottom:12,padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff3cd",border:"1px solid #ffc107",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:"#856404"}}>

          ⚠ <strong>Core features</strong> (marked 🔒) cannot be disabled — they are essential to all practices. Disabling an add-on removes it from the practice interface globally.

        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Platform Feature Flags</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{features.filter(f=>f.on).length}/{features.length} enabled</div>

          </div>

          {features.map(f=>(

            <div key={f.id} style={{padding:"13px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",background:f.on?"#fff":"#f8fafc",opacity:f.core?1:f.on?1:.75}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:20,width:32,textAlign:"center"}}>{f.icon}</div>

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>

                  {f.l}

                  {f.core&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,background:"#e2e8f0",color:"#64748b",padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4}}>🔒 CORE</span>}

                  {!f.on&&!f.core&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4}}>DISABLED</span>}

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{f.desc}</div>

              </div>

              <button disabled={f.core} onClick={()=>toggleFeature(f.id)} style={{position:"relative",width:40,height:22,borderRadius:11,border:"none",cursor:f.core?"not-allowed":"pointer",background:f.on?C.teal:"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0,opacity:f.core?.5:1,transition:"background .2s"}}>

                <span style={{position:"absolute",top:3,left:f.on?"calc(100% - 19px)":3,width:16,height:16,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",transition:"left .18s",boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}/>

              </button>

              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:f.on?C.teal:"#94a3b8",minWidth:40,textAlign:"center"}}>{f.core?"Always":f.on?"On":"Off"}</span>

            </div>

          ))}

        </div>

        <div style={{marginTop:12,display:"flex",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>

          <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Feature configuration saved and pushed to all practices")} style={{padding:"9px 20px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Save Feature Configuration</button>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── TAB: Rollback ────────────────────────────────── */}

      {tab==="rollback"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{marginBottom:12,padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff3cd",border:"1px solid #ffc107",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:"#856404"}}>

          ⚠ Rolling back reverts the platform for ALL practices immediately. This cannot be undone without re-deploying.

        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Emergency Rollback</div>

          {history.filter(h=>h.status==="deployed").map((h,i)=>(

            <div key={i} style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#475569"}}>{h.v}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{h.date} · {h.notes}</div>

              </div>

              <button onClick={()=>{setVersion(h.v);const m=h.v.replace("v","").split(".").map(Number);setCurVer({major:m[0],minor:m[1],patch:m[2]});setHistory(p=>p.map(x=>({...x,status:x.v===h.v?"current":x.status==="current"?"deployed":x.status})));doToast("Emergency rollback to "+h.v+" complete");}} style={{padding:"9px 18px",background:C.red,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><RotateCcw size={12}/>Roll Back to {h.v}</button>

            </div>

          ))}

        </div>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

function AppointmentAuditPage(){

  const [search,setSearch]=useState("");

  const [actionFilter,setActionFilter]=useState("all");

  const [provFilter,setProvFilter]=useState("all");

  const [dateFilter,setDateFilter]=useState("all");

  const [selEntry,setSelEntry]=useState(null);

  const [view,setView]=useState("timeline"); // timeline | table

  const providers=["Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"];

  const filtered=APPT_AUDIT_LOG.filter(e=>{

    if(actionFilter!=="all"&&e.action!==actionFilter)return false;

    if(provFilter!=="all"){const prov=e.from?.provider||e.to?.provider;if(prov!==provFilter)return false;}

    if(search){const s=search.toLowerCase();if(!e.patient.toLowerCase().includes(s)&&!e.reason.toLowerCase().includes(s)&&!(e.from?.type||"").toLowerCase().includes(s))return false;}

    if(dateFilter==="today"&&!e.at.startsWith("Today"))return false;

    if(dateFilter==="yesterday"&&!e.at.startsWith("Yesterday"))return false;

    return true;

  });

  const addAuditEntry=(entry)=>{

    APPT_AUDIT_LOG=[entry,...APPT_AUDIT_LOG];

  };

  const STATS={

    total:APPT_AUDIT_LOG.length,

    cancelled:APPT_AUDIT_LOG.filter(e=>e.action==="cancelled").length,

    dna:APPT_AUDIT_LOG.filter(e=>e.action==="dna").length,

    moved:APPT_AUDIT_LOG.filter(e=>e.action==="moved").length,

  };

  const exportLog=()=>{

    const rows=filtered.map(e=>({

      timestamp:e.at,patient:e.patient,action:ACTION_META[e.action]?.l||e.action,

      from_time:e.from?.time||"",from_provider:e.from?.provider||"",from_type:e.from?.type||"",

      to_time:e.to?.time||"",to_provider:e.to?.provider||"",

      reason:e.reason,actioned_by:e.by,role:e.role,

    }));

    const headers=Object.keys(rows[0]);

    const csv=[headers.join(","),...rows.map(r=>headers.map(h=>`"${(r[h]||"").toString().replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(","))].join("\n");

    const blob=new Blob([csv],{type:"text/csv"});

    const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);

    const a=document.createElement("a");a.href=url;a.download="appointment_audit_"+new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)+".csv";

    document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();document.body.removeChild(a);URL.revokeObjectURL(url);

  };

  return(

    <div style={{display:"flex",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {/* Detail panel */}

      {selEntry&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:560,maxHeight:"88vh",overflow:"auto",boxShadow:"0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>

          {/* Header */}

          <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${ACTION_META[selEntry.action]?.c||"#0d9488"},#0c1a28)`,padding:"16px 18px",borderRadius:"14px 14px 0 0"}}>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>

              <span style={{fontSize:24}}>{ACTION_META[selEntry.action]?.icon}</span>

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{ACTION_META[selEntry.action]?.l}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)"}}>Appointment ID: {selEntry.apptId} · {selEntry.at}</div>

              </div>

              <button onClick={()=>setSelEntry(null)} style={{border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",color:"#fff",padding:"6px 10px",fontSize:14}}>✕</button>

            </div>

          </div>

          <div style={{padding:18}}>

            {/* Patient & Attribution */}

            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>

              {[["Patient",selEntry.patient],["Action by",selEntry.by+" ("+selEntry.role+")"],["Practice",selEntry.practice],["Timestamp",selEntry.at]].map(([l,v])=>(

                <div key={l} style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",marginBottom:3}}>{l}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,color:"#0f172a"}}>{v}</div>

                </div>

              ))}

            </div>

            {/* From → To */}

            {(selEntry.from||selEntry.to)&&<div style={{marginBottom:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:8}}>Appointment Change</div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"stretch"}}>

                {selEntry.from&&<div style={{flex:1,padding:"12px 14px",background:"#fff5f5",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:10}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626",marginBottom:6,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>ORIGINAL</div>

                  {[["Date",selEntry.from.date],["Time",selEntry.from.time],["Provider",selEntry.from.provider],["Type",selEntry.from.type]].map(([l,v])=>v&&(

                    <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,padding:"3px 0",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8",minWidth:60}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:500}}>{v}</span></div>

                  ))}

                </div>}

                {selEntry.from&&selEntry.to&&<div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",fontSize:20,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>→</div>}

                {selEntry.to&&<div style={{flex:1,padding:"12px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:10}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#16a34a",marginBottom:6,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{selEntry.from?"NEW SLOT":"BOOKED"}</div>

                  {[["Date",selEntry.to.date],["Time",selEntry.to.time],["Provider",selEntry.to.provider],["Type",selEntry.to.type]].map(([l,v])=>v&&(

                    <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,padding:"3px 0",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8",minWidth:60}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:500}}>{v}</span></div>

                  ))}

                </div>}

              </div>

            </div>}

            {/* Reason */}

            <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:10,marginBottom:14}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#d97706",marginBottom:5,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>📝 Reason / Notes</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#1e293b",lineHeight:1.6}}>{selEntry.reason}</div>

            </div>

            {/* Technical */}

            <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,display:"flex",gap:20}}>

              <div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Record ID</div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{selEntry.id}</div></div>

              <div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>IP Address</div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{selEntry.ip}</div></div>

              <div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>Appt ID</div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{selEntry.apptId}</div></div>

              <div style={{flex:1,textAlign:"right"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>🔒 IMMUTABLE RECORD</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Cannot be edited or deleted</div></div>

            </div>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>

        {/* Page header */}

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 20px 0",flexShrink:0}}>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

            <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0369a1,#7c3aed)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20}}>📋</div>

            <div style={{flex:1}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Appointment Audit History</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Immutable log of every appointment change · Who moved it, when, why · Complaints, safeguarding, compliance</div>

            </div>

            {/* Stats */}

            {[{l:"Total Events",v:STATS.total,c:C.teal},{l:"Cancellations",v:STATS.cancelled,c:C.red},{l:"DNAs",v:STATS.dna,c:C.amber},{l:"Moves",v:STATS.moved,c:C.blue}].map(s=>(

              <div key={s.l} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"6px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:600}}>{s.l}</div>

              </div>

            ))}

            <button onClick={exportLog} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

              ⬇️ Export CSV

            </button>

          </div>

          {/* Filters */}

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:12,flexWrap:"wrap",alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{position:"relative",flex:1,minWidth:200}}>

              <Search size={13} style={{position:"absolute",left:9,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>

              <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search patient, reason, treatment…" style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px 7px 28px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}/>

            </div>

            <select value={actionFilter} onChange={e=>setActionFilter(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",cursor:"pointer",outline:"none"}}>

              <option value="all">All Actions</option>

              {Object.entries(ACTION_META).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.l}</option>)}

            </select>

            <select value={provFilter} onChange={e=>setProvFilter(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",cursor:"pointer",outline:"none"}}>

              <option value="all">All Providers</option>

              {providers.map(p=><option key={p} value={p}>{p}</option>)}

            </select>

            <select value={dateFilter} onChange={e=>setDateFilter(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",cursor:"pointer",outline:"none"}}>

              <option value="all">All Dates</option>

              <option value="today">Today</option>

              <option value="yesterday">Yesterday</option>

            </select>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:8,padding:3}}>

              {[{id:"timeline",l:"📜 Timeline"},{id:"table",l:"📋 Table"}].map(v=>(

                <button key={v.id} onClick={()=>setView(v.id)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:6,border:"none",background:view===v.id?"#fff":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:view===v.id?700:400,color:view===v.id?C.teal:"#94a3b8",boxShadow:view===v.id?"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08)":"none"}}>{v.l}</button>

              ))}

            </div>

            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginLeft:"auto"}}>{filtered.length} of {APPT_AUDIT_LOG.length} events</span>

          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Content */}

        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>

          {/* ── TIMELINE VIEW ── */}

          {view==="timeline"&&<div style={{maxWidth:740,margin:"0 auto"}}>

            {filtered.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"48px",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:14}}>No events match your filters</div>}

            {filtered.map((entry,ei)=>{

              const meta=ACTION_META[entry.action]||{l:entry.action,icon:"📋",c:"#64748b",bg:"#f8fafc"};

              return(

                <div key={entry.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:0,marginBottom:0}}>

                  {/* Timeline line */}

                  <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",width:44,flexShrink:0}}>

                    <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:meta.bg,border:`2px solid ${meta.c}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,flexShrink:0,zIndex:1}}>{meta.icon}</div>

                    {ei<filtered.length-1&&<div style={{width:2,flex:1,minHeight:20,background:"#e2e8f0",marginTop:2,marginBottom:2}}/>}

                  </div>

                  {/* Event card */}

                  <div onClick={()=>setSelEntry(entry)} style={{flex:1,marginLeft:10,marginBottom:12,cursor:"pointer"}}>

                    <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"13px 16px",transition:"box-shadow .15s"}}

                      onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.08)"}

                      onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="none"}>

                      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:6}}>

                        <div style={{flex:1}}>

                          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>

                            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{entry.patient}</span>

                            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:meta.bg,color:meta.c}}>{meta.l}</span>

                            {entry.action==="dna"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>⚠ 3RD DNA</span>}

                          </div>

                          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>

                            {entry.from?.type||entry.to?.type} · {entry.from?.provider||entry.to?.provider}

                          </div>

                        </div>

                        <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>

                          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{entry.at}</div>

                          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{entry.by}</div>

                        </div>

                      </div>

                      {/* From → To inline */}

                      {entry.from&&entry.to&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"7px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,marginBottom:8,fontSize:11}}>

                        <span style={{color:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{entry.from.date} {entry.from.time}</span>

                        {entry.from.provider!==entry.to.provider&&<span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>({entry.from.provider})</span>}

                        <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700}}>→</span>

                        <span style={{color:C.green,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{entry.to.date} {entry.to.time}</span>

                        {entry.from.provider!==entry.to.provider&&<span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>({entry.to.provider})</span>}

                      </div>}

                      {entry.action==="cancelled"&&entry.from&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"7px 10px",background:"#fff5f5",borderRadius:8,marginBottom:8,fontSize:11}}>

                        <span style={{color:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{entry.from.date} {entry.from.time} — {entry.from.provider}</span>

                        <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,marginLeft:"auto"}}>CANCELLED</span>

                      </div>}

                      {/* Reason */}

                      <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.5,padding:"7px 10px",background:"#fffbeb",borderRadius:8,borderLeft:`3px solid #f59e0b`}}>

                        <span style={{color:"#d97706",fontWeight:700,fontSize:10,textTransform:"uppercase",marginRight:6}}>Reason:</span>

                        {entry.reason}

                      </div>

                      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginTop:7}}>

                        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>🔒 Immutable · ID: {entry.id}</span>

                        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600}}>View full detail →</span>

                      </div>

                    </div>

                  </div>

                </div>

              );

            })}

          </div>}

          {/* ── TABLE VIEW ── */}

          {view==="table"&&<div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

            <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>

              <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>

                {["Time","Patient","Action","Original Slot","New Slot","Provider Change","Reason","By",""].map(h=>(

                  <th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 12px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>

                ))}

              </tr></thead>

              <tbody>{filtered.map((entry,i)=>{

                const meta=ACTION_META[entry.action]||{l:entry.action,icon:"📋",c:"#64748b",bg:"#f8fafc"};

                const provChanged=entry.from&&entry.to&&entry.from.provider!==entry.to.provider;

                return(

                  <tr key={entry.id} style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:i%2===0?"#fff":"#fafafa",cursor:"pointer"}}

                    onClick={()=>setSelEntry(entry)}

                    onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe"}

                    onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=i%2===0?"#fff":"#fafafa"}>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{entry.at}</td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontWeight:600}}>{entry.patient}</td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}>

                      <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:meta.bg,color:meta.c,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{meta.icon} {meta.l}</span>

                    </td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:11,color:entry.action==="cancelled"||entry.action==="dna"?C.red:C.text}}>

                      {entry.from?`${entry.from.date} ${entry.from.time}`:"—"}

                    </td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:11,color:C.green}}>{entry.to?`${entry.to.date} ${entry.to.time}`:"—"}</td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}>

                      {provChanged?<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600}}>{entry.from.provider} → {entry.to.provider}</span>:<span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:10}}>No change</span>}

                    </td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:11,color:"#374151",maxWidth:200,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}} title={entry.reason}>{entry.reason}</td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{entry.by}</td>

                    <td style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}><button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening audit entry…")} style={{padding:"3px 9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>View →</button></td>

                  </tr>

                );

              })}</tbody>

            </table>

            {filtered.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"40px",textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8"}}>No events match your filters</div>}

          </div>}

          {/* Compliance footer */}

          <div style={{marginTop:14,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:10,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#15803d"}}>

            <span style={{fontSize:16}}>🔒</span>

            <span><strong>Immutable audit log</strong> — all entries are write-once and cannot be modified or deleted. Retained for 7 years per NHS / CQC requirements. Full export available at any time for complaints, safeguarding and regulatory reporting.</span>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

          {[

            {icon:"🔑",l:"MFA Users",v:"2/6",sub:"Admin & Manager enforced",c:C.green},

          })}

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── Audit Log ── */}

      {tab==="audit"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

        </div>

      </div>}

}

function AdminUsers(){

  const adminUsers=[{name:"Dr. Ahmed",email:"admin@prodental.co.uk",role:"Super Admin",last:"Just now",status:"active"},{name:"Sarah Phillips",email:"sphillips@prodental.co.uk",role:"Support Agent",last:"2 hours ago",status:"active"},{name:"James Okafor",email:"jokafor@prodental.co.uk",role:"Developer",last:"Yesterday",status:"active"},{name:"Emma Richardson",email:"erichardson@prodental.co.uk",role:"Customer Success",last:"3 days ago",status:"inactive"}];

  return <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>

    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>

      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>Admin Users</div>

      <Btn v="admin" onClick={()=>doToast("Invite Admin User modal coming soon")}><Plus size={12}/>Invite Admin User</Btn>

    </div>

    <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {adminUsers.map((u,i)=><div key={u.email} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.orange,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{u.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>

        <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600}}>{u.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{u.email} · {u.role}</div></div>

        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Last active: {u.last}</div>

        <Chip color={u.status==="active"?C.green:"#94a3b8"}>{u.status}</Chip>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5}}>

          <Btn style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 8px"}} onClick={()=>doToast("Edit user permissions")}><Settings size={9}/>Permissions</Btn>

          {u.role!=="Super Admin"&&<Btn v="danger" style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 8px"}} onClick={()=>doToast("Access revoked for "+u.name)}>Revoke</Btn>}

        </div>

      </div>)}

    </div>

  </div>;

}

function AdminSupport(){

  const [reqs,setReqs]=useState([{id:1,agent:"Sarah Phillips",practice:"City Smile Clinic",reason:"Patient unable to access records — urgent support needed",requested:"Today 09:15",duration:"4 hours",status:"pending"},{id:2,agent:"James Okafor",practice:"Northside Dental",reason:"Data migration assistance — R4 import issue",requested:"Yesterday 14:30",duration:"2 hours",status:"approved"},{id:3,agent:"Sarah Phillips",practice:"Bayview Dentists",reason:"FP17 submission error investigation",requested:"2 days ago",duration:"1 hour",status:"expired"}]);

  const approve=id=>setReqs(p=>p.map(r=>r.id===id?{...r,status:"approved"}:r));

  const SC={pending:{c:C.amber,l:"Pending Approval"},approved:{c:C.green,l:"Active"},expired:{c:"#94a3b8",l:"Expired"}};

  return <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>

    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:14}}>

      <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>Support Access (GDPR Compliant)</div><div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>All support access is time-limited, logged, and requires explicit practice approval. GDPR Article 28 compliant.</div></div>

    </div>

    <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#dbeafe",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:14,fontSize:12,color:C.blue,display:"flex",gap:8}}><Shield size={14}/>All support access is logged to the immutable audit log. Practices are notified via email when access is granted. Access auto-expires after the approved duration.</div>

    <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {reqs.map((r,i)=>{const s=SC[r.status];return <div key={r.id} style={{padding:"14px 18px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:r.status==="pending"?"#fffbeb":"#fff"}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5}}>

              <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{r.agent}</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>→</span><span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,color:C.teal}}>{r.practice}</span>

              <Chip color={s.c}>{s.l}</Chip>

            </div>

            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",marginBottom:3}}>Reason: {r.reason}</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Requested: {r.requested} · Duration: {r.duration}</div>

          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexShrink:0}}>

            {r.status==="pending"&&<Btn v="primary" onClick={()=>approve(r.id)} style={{fontSize:11}}><Check size={11}/>Approve</Btn>}

            {r.status==="pending"&&<Btn v="danger" style={{fontSize:11}} onClick={()=>doToast("Request denied")}><X size={11}/>Deny</Btn>}

            {r.status==="approved"&&<Btn v="danger" style={{fontSize:11}} onClick={()=>doToast("Support access revoked")}>Revoke Access</Btn>}

            <Btn style={{fontSize:11}} onClick={()=>doToast("Opening access log...")}><Eye size={11}/>View Log</Btn>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>;})}

    </div>

  </div>;

}
