function PracticeInsights(){

  const [dismissed,setDismissed]=useState(new Set());

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const visible=INSIGHTS.filter((_,i)=>!dismissed.has(i));

  const doAction=(insight)=>{setToast(`${insight.type}: action triggered`);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};

  if(visible.length===0)return null;

  return(

    <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginTop:0}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:"1px solid #bbf7d0",fontSize:12,color:C.green,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}>

          <Sparkles size={14} color={C.indigo}/>Practice Insights

          <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple}}>AI-powered · {visible.length} active</span>

        </div>

        <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Updated just now</span>

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr))",gap:0}}>

        {visible.map((ins,i)=>(

          <div key={i} style={{background:ins.bg,borderRight:i<visible.length-1?`1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`:"none",padding:"16px 18px",position:"relative",minHeight:130}}>

            {/* Dismiss */}

            <button onClick={()=>setDismissed(p=>new Set([...p,INSIGHTS.indexOf(ins)]))} style={{position:"absolute",top:10,right:10,border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",borderRadius:"50%",width:20,height:20,cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>

              <X size={10}/>

            </button>

            {/* Type badge */}

            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,marginBottom:8}}>

              <span style={{fontSize:13}}>{ins.icon}</span>

              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:ins.iconColor,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em"}}>{ins.type}</span>

              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:8,background:ins.badgeBg,color:ins.iconColor,marginLeft:"auto",marginRight:20,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{ins.badge}</span>

            </div>

            {/* Headline */}

            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.45,marginBottom:5}}>{ins.headline}</div>

            {/* Sub detail */}

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",lineHeight:1.55,marginBottom:10}}>{ins.sub}</div>

            {/* Action link */}

            <button onClick={()=>doAction(ins)} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:ins.actionColor,padding:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>

              {ins.action}

            </button>

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

function MorningHuddlePage({openPatient}){

  const now=new Date();

  const dayNames=["Sunday","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday"];

  const monthNames=["January","February","March","April","May","June","July","August","September","October","November","December"];

  const todayStr=`${dayNames[now.getDay()]}, ${now.getDate()} ${monthNames[now.getMonth()]} ${now.getFullYear()}`;

  // ── Seed data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const TODAY_APPTS=[

    {id:"TA1",time:"08:30",patient:"John Mills",    pid:"P1",type:"Check-up & Composite Filling",dentist:"Dr. Patel", duration:60,confirmed:true, dnaHistory:0,balance:73.50,alerts:["Warfarin — INR check required"],color:C.green},

    {id:"TA2",time:"09:00",patient:"Tom Bright",    pid:null,type:"Extraction LL7",               dentist:"Dr. Chen",  duration:45,confirmed:true, dnaHistory:3,balance:0,    alerts:["3 previous DNAs","Anxious patient"],color:C.red},

    {id:"TA3",time:"09:30",patient:"Sarah Chen",    pid:"P2",type:"Crown Fit UR6",                dentist:"Dr. Patel", duration:60,confirmed:false,dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:C.amber},

    {id:"TA4",time:"10:00",patient:"Carol Nash",    pid:null,type:"New Patient Examination",       dentist:"Dr. Patel", duration:60,confirmed:true, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:["New patient — forms needed"],      color:C.blue},

    {id:"TA5",time:"10:30",patient:"Amy Torres",    pid:"P4",type:"Implant Consultation",          dentist:"Dr. Chen",  duration:45,confirmed:false,dnaHistory:1,balance:150,  alerts:["Outstanding balance £150"],        color:C.purple},

    {id:"TA6",time:"11:00",patient:"— AVAILABLE —", pid:null,type:"",                              dentist:"Dr. Patel", duration:30,confirmed:null, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:"#e2e8f0"},

    {id:"TA7",time:"11:30",patient:"David Park",    pid:"P5",type:"OPG Review",                    dentist:"Dr. Chen",  duration:45,confirmed:false,dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:C.teal},

    {id:"TA8",time:"12:00",patient:"LUNCH",         pid:null,type:"",                              dentist:"All",       duration:60,confirmed:null, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:"#f1f5f9"},

    {id:"TA9",time:"13:00",patient:"Robert Hall",   pid:"P3",type:"RCT Session 3 — LL7",          dentist:"Dr. Chen",  duration:60,confirmed:false,dnaHistory:2,balance:230,  alerts:["2 previous DNAs","Outstanding £230"],color:C.red},

    {id:"TA10",time:"14:00",patient:"Lisa White",   pid:"P6",type:"Composite Smile Makeover",      dentist:"Dr. Patel", duration:90,confirmed:true, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:["Nervous patient — extra time booked"],color:C.green},

    {id:"TA11",time:"14:00",patient:"Amy Grant (H)",pid:null,type:"Scale & Polish — NHS",          dentist:"Amy Grant", duration:45,confirmed:false,dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:C.teal},

    {id:"TA12",time:"15:30",patient:"— AVAILABLE —",pid:null,type:"",                              dentist:"Amy Grant", duration:45,confirmed:null, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:"#e2e8f0"},

    {id:"TA13",time:"16:00",patient:"Sarah Chen",   pid:"P2",type:"Hygiene Review",                dentist:"Amy Grant", duration:30,confirmed:true, dnaHistory:0,balance:0,    alerts:[],                                  color:C.teal},

  ];

  const GAPS=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.patient.startsWith("—"));

  const OUTSTANDING=[

    {id:"O1",type:"callback",icon:"📞",text:"Call Amy Torres — interested in implant plan",priority:"high",patient:"Amy Torres",pid:"P4"},

    {id:"O2",type:"lab",    icon:"🔬",text:"Chase Prestige Lab — Sarah Chen crown PFM UR6",priority:"high",patient:"Sarah Chen",pid:"P2"},

    {id:"O3",type:"payment",icon:"💳",text:"Robert Hall payment plan — 2nd instalment £115 due",priority:"medium",patient:"Robert Hall",pid:"P3"},

    {id:"O4",type:"callback",icon:"📞",text:"John Mills left message — query about appointment time",priority:"low",patient:"John Mills",pid:"P1"},

    {id:"O5",type:"referral",icon:"📋",text:"Send referral letter — David Park periodontal specialist",priority:"medium",patient:"David Park",pid:"P5"},

  ];

  const SN_PATIENTS=[

    {id:"SN1",name:"Emma Davies", phone:"07700 912233",type:"Check-up",   duration:30,distance:"0.8 miles",pid:null},

    {id:"SN2",name:"Mark Johnson",phone:"07700 445566",type:"Scale & Polish",duration:45,distance:"1.2 miles",pid:null},

    {id:"SN3",name:"Priya Sharma",phone:"07700 778899",type:"Check-up",   duration:30,distance:"2.0 miles",pid:null},

  ];

  // ── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const [reminderSent,setReminderSent]=useState({});         // apptId → bool

  const [dismissed,setDismissed]=useState({});               // apptId → bool

  const [taskDone,setTaskDone]=useState({});                  // taskId → bool

  const [contacted,setContacted]=useState({});               // patientId/id → bool

  const [balanceCollected,setBalanceCollected]=useState({}); // apptId → bool

  const [gapFilled,setGapFilled]=useState({});               // gapId → bool

  const [openBox,setOpenBox]=useState(null);                  // which box panel is open

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};

  // ── Derived ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const realAppts=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.pid||a.patient.startsWith("NEW"));

  const unconfirmed=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.confirmed===false&&!dismissed[a.id]);

  const withAlerts=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.alerts.length>0&&!a.patient.startsWith("—")&&a.patient!=="LUNCH");

  const withBalance=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.balance>0);

  const dnaRisk=TODAY_APPTS.filter(a=>a.dnaHistory>=2&&!a.patient.startsWith("—")&&a.patient!=="LUNCH");

  // ── Box completion logic ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const unconfirmedRemaining=unconfirmed.filter(a=>!reminderSent[a.id]);

  const tasksRemaining=OUTSTANDING.filter(t=>!taskDone[t.id]);

  const alertsRemaining=withAlerts.filter(a=>!dismissed[a.id]);

  const balanceRemaining=withBalance.filter(a=>!balanceCollected[a.id]);

  const gapsRemaining=GAPS.filter(g=>!gapFilled[g.id]);

  const BOXES=[

    {id:"unconfirmed",label:"Unconfirmed",  icon:"⚠️",total:unconfirmed.length,  done:unconfirmed.length-unconfirmedRemaining.length, sub:"reminders",   urgency:unconfirmedRemaining.length>0?"red":"green"},

    {id:"alerts",     label:"Alerts",       icon:"🚨",total:withAlerts.length,    done:withAlerts.length-alertsRemaining.length,        sub:"patients",    urgency:alertsRemaining.length>0?"amber":"green"},

    {id:"tasks",      label:"Outstanding",  icon:"📋",total:OUTSTANDING.length,   done:OUTSTANDING.length-tasksRemaining.length,        sub:"tasks",       urgency:tasksRemaining.filter(t=>t.priority==="high").length>0?"red":tasksRemaining.length>0?"amber":"green"},

    {id:"collect",    label:"Collect",      icon:"💳",total:withBalance.length,   done:withBalance.length-balanceRemaining.length,      sub:"payments",    urgency:balanceRemaining.length>0?"amber":"green"},

    {id:"gaps",       label:"Open Slots",   icon:"🕐",total:GAPS.length,          done:GAPS.length-gapsRemaining.length,                sub:"slots",       urgency:gapsRemaining.length>0?"blue":"green"},

  ];

  const totalRevToday=realAppts.length*73.5+680+319;

  const targetToday=1400;

  const revenueProgress=Math.min(100,Math.round(totalRevToday/targetToday*100));

  const urgencyStyle=(u)=>{

    if(u==="green") return{border:"1.5px solid #16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4",num:"#16a34a",badge:"#dcfce7"};

    if(u==="red")   return{border:"1.5px solid #dc2626",bg:"#fff5f5",num:"#dc2626",badge:"#fee2e2"};

    if(u==="amber") return{border:"1.5px solid #d97706",bg:"#fffbeb",num:"#d97706",badge:"#fef3c7"};

    if(u==="blue")  return{border:"1.5px solid #0369a1",bg:"#dbeafe",num:"#0369a1",badge:"#dbeafe"};

    return{border:"1.5px solid #94a3b8",bg:"#f1f5f9",num:"#64748b",badge:"#f1f5f9"};

  };

  // ── Panel content per box ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const renderPanel=(boxId)=>{

    if(boxId==="unconfirmed") return(

      <div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>{unconfirmedRemaining.length} still need a reminder · £{(unconfirmedRemaining.length*73.5).toFixed(0)} at risk</div>

        {unconfirmed.map(a=>(

          <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:8,background:reminderSent[a.id]?"#f0fdf4":"#fff",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{flex:1}}>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:a.pid?"pointer":"default",color:a.pid?C.teal:C.text}} onClick={()=>a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid)}>{a.patient}</span>

                {a.dnaHistory>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>DNA ×{a.dnaHistory}</span>}

              </div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{a.time} · {a.type} · {a.dentist}</div>

              {a.balance>0&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:600,marginTop:2}}>💳 Outstanding £{a.balance.toFixed(2)}</div>}

            </div>

            {reminderSent[a.id]

              ?<span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.green,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Reminded</span>

              :<button onClick={()=>{setReminderSent(p=>({...p,[a.id]:true}));doToast("Reminder sent to "+a.patient);}} style={{padding:"6px 13px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>📱 Send Reminder</button>

            }

          </div>

        ))}

        {unconfirmedRemaining.length>1&&<button onClick={()=>{const s={};unconfirmed.forEach(a=>{s[a.id]=true;});setReminderSent(p=>({...p,...s}));doToast("All reminders sent!");}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginTop:4}}>Send All Remaining ({unconfirmedRemaining.length})</button>}

      </div>

    );

    if(boxId==="alerts") return(

      <div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Review each alert before the patient arrives</div>

        {withAlerts.map(a=>(

          <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:8,background:dismissed[a.id]?"#f0fdf4":"#fff"}}>

            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:dismissed[a.id]?0:6}}>

              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,cursor:a.pid?"pointer":"default",color:a.pid?C.teal:C.text,flex:1}} onClick={()=>a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid)}>{a.patient} — {a.time}</span>

              {dismissed[a.id]

                ?<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Noted</span>

                :<button onClick={()=>{setDismissed(p=>({...p,[a.id]:true}));doToast("Alert noted for "+a.patient);}} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid "+C.green,borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.green,flexShrink:0}}>✓ Mark Noted</button>

              }

            </div>

            {!dismissed[a.id]&&a.alerts.map((alert,ai)=>(

              <div key={ai} style={{fontSize:11,color:C.red,padding:"3px 8px",background:"#fff5f5",borderRadius:6,border:"1px solid #fecaca",marginTop:3,fontWeight:500}}>⚠ {alert}</div>

            ))}

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

    );

    if(boxId==="tasks") return(

      <div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>{tasksRemaining.length} outstanding from yesterday</div>

        {OUTSTANDING.map(t=>{

          const pc={high:{c:C.red,bg:"#fee2e2"},medium:{c:C.amber,bg:"#fef3c7"},low:{c:"#64748b",bg:"#f1f5f9"}}[t.priority];

          return(

            <div key={t.id} style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:8,background:taskDone[t.id]?"#f0fdf4":"#fff",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start",opacity:taskDone[t.id]?0.7:1}}>

              <span style={{fontSize:18,flexShrink:0,marginTop:1}}>{t.icon}</span>

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:12,color:taskDone[t.id]?"#94a3b8":C.text,lineHeight:1.5,textDecoration:taskDone[t.id]?"line-through":"none"}}>{t.text}</div>

                {t.pid&&<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600}} onClick={()=>openPatient(t.pid)}>→ View {t.patient}'s record</span>}

              </div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:5,alignItems:"flex-end",flexShrink:0}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:pc.bg,color:pc.c}}>{t.priority}</span>

                {taskDone[t.id]

                  ?<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Done</span>

                  :<button onClick={()=>{setTaskDone(p=>({...p,[t.id]:true}));doToast("✓ Marked as done");}} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid "+C.green,borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>✓ Done</button>

                }

              </div>

            </div>

          );

        })}

      </div>

    );

    if(boxId==="collect") return(

      <div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Collect these when the patient checks in</div>

        {withBalance.map(a=>(

          <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:8,background:balanceCollected[a.id]?"#f0fdf4":"#fff",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{flex:1}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:a.pid?"pointer":"default",color:a.pid?C.teal:C.text}} onClick={()=>a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid)}>{a.patient}</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{a.time} · {a.dentist}</div>

            </div>

            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:balanceCollected[a.id]?C.green:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace",flexShrink:0}}>£{a.balance.toFixed(2)}</div>

            {balanceCollected[a.id]

              ?<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Collected</span>

              :<button onClick={()=>{setBalanceCollected(p=>({...p,[a.id]:true}));doToast("£"+a.balance.toFixed(2)+" collected from "+a.patient);}} style={{padding:"5px 11px",border:"1px solid "+C.green,borderRadius:8,background:"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.green,flexShrink:0}}>✓ Collected</button>

            }

          </div>

        ))}

        <div style={{marginTop:8,padding:"8px 12px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:C.amber}}>

          Total outstanding: <strong>£{withBalance.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0).toFixed(2)}</strong>

        </div>

      </div>

    );

    if(boxId==="gaps") return(

      <div>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>{gapsRemaining.length} open slots — contact short notice patients to fill</div>

        {GAPS.map((gap,gi)=>(

          <div key={gap.id} style={{marginBottom:12}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:gapFilled[gap.id]?C.green:C.teal,marginBottom:6,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

              {gapFilled[gap.id]&&<Check size={12} color={C.green}/>}

              {gap.time} — {gap.duration}min slot · {gap.dentist}

            </div>

            {!gapFilled[gap.id]&&SN_PATIENTS.filter(p=>p.duration<=gap.duration).map((p,pi)=>(

              <div key={p.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#fff",marginBottom:5}}>

                <div style={{flex:1}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{p.type} · {p.distance}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace",marginTop:1}}>{p.phone}</div>

                </div>

                {contacted[gap.id+"_"+p.id]

                  ?<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Contacted</span>

                  :<button onClick={()=>{setContacted(prev=>({...prev,[gap.id+"_"+p.id]:true}));setGapFilled(prev=>({...prev,[gap.id]:true}));doToast(p.name+" — "+p.phone+" — call from practice phone");}} style={{padding:"5px 11px",border:"1.5px solid "+C.teal,borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Phone size={10}/>Contact</button>

                }

              </div>

            ))}

            {gapFilled[gap.id]&&<div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.green,fontWeight:600,padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0"}}>✓ Patient contacted for this slot</div>}

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

    );

    return null;

  };

  return(

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",background:"#f0f4f8",position:"relative"}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,zIndex:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",pointerEvents:"none"}}><Check size={13}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Slide-out panel overlay */}

      {openBox&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:400,display:"flex"}}>

        <div onClick={()=>setOpenBox(null)} style={{flex:1,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.35)"}}/>

        <div style={{width:400,background:"#fff",boxShadow:"-8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.18)",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflowY:"auto"}}>

          {/* Panel header */}

          {(()=>{

            const box=BOXES.find(b=>b.id===openBox);

            const st=urgencyStyle(box?.urgency||"blue");

            const done=box?.done||0;const total=box?.total||0;const pct=total>0?Math.round(done/total*100):0;

            return(

              <div style={{padding:"16px 18px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",flexShrink:0}}>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:10}}>

                  <span style={{fontSize:24}}>{box?.icon}</span>

                  <div style={{flex:1}}>

                    <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>{box?.label}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{done} of {total} {box?.sub} complete</div>

                  </div>

                  <button onClick={()=>setOpenBox(null)} style={{border:"none",background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",color:"#64748b",padding:"6px 10px",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>✕</button>

                </div>

                <div style={{height:8,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:4,overflow:"hidden"}}>

                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:pct+"%",background:pct===100?"#16a34a":st.num,borderRadius:4,transition:"width .4s"}}/>

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:4,textAlign:"right"}}>{pct}% complete</div>

              </div>

            );

          })()}

          <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",flex:1}}>

            {renderPanel(openBox)}

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>}

      {/* ── HERO HEADER ── */}

      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#0d4f4a 60%,#1e3a5f 100%)",padding:"20px 24px 16px"}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:2}}>☀️ Good morning, Emma — Riverside Dentistry</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.2}}>{todayStr}</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:3}}>Practice opens in <span style={{color:"#5eead4",fontWeight:700}}>23 minutes</span> · First patient: <span style={{color:"#fbbf24",fontWeight:700}}>John Mills at 08:30</span></div>

          </div>

          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Morning briefing printed")} style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>🖨️ Print</button>

        </div>

        {/* ── INTERACTIVE STATUS BOXES ── */}

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>

          {BOXES.map(box=>{

            const st=urgencyStyle(box.urgency);

            const remaining=box.total-box.done;

            const isComplete=remaining===0;

            return(

              <button key={box.id} onClick={()=>setOpenBox(openBox===box.id?null:box.id)}

                style={{

                  padding:"12px 10px",

                  borderRadius:12,

                  border:st.border,

                  background:isComplete?"rgba(22,163,74,.18)":box.urgency==="red"?"rgba(220,38,38,.15)":box.urgency==="amber"?"rgba(217,119,6,.12)":"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",

                  cursor:"pointer",

                  textAlign:"center",

                  transition:"all .15s",

                  transform:openBox===box.id?"scale(0.97)":"scale(1)",

                  boxShadow:openBox===box.id?"0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,.25)":"none",

                }}>

                <div style={{fontSize:20,marginBottom:5}}>{isComplete?"✅":box.icon}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:isComplete?"#86efac":st.num==="green"?"#86efac":"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>

                  {isComplete?"✓":remaining}

                </div>

                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",marginTop:3,fontWeight:600,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{box.label}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.35)",marginTop:2}}>{box.done}/{box.total} done</div>

                <div style={{marginTop:6,fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 6px",borderRadius:5,display:"inline-block",background:isComplete?"rgba(22,163,74,.3)":box.urgency==="red"?"rgba(220,38,38,.3)":box.urgency==="amber"?"rgba(217,119,6,.3)":"rgba(3,105,161,.3)",color:isComplete?"#86efac":box.urgency==="red"?"#fca5a5":box.urgency==="amber"?"#fde68a":"#93c5fd"}}>

                  {isComplete?"All done ✓":"Click to action"}

                </div>

              </button>

            );

          })}

        </div>

        {/* Revenue bar */}

        <div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:4}}>

            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>Today's revenue target — £{totalRevToday.toLocaleString()} of £{targetToday.toLocaleString()}</span>

            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>{revenueProgress}%</span>

          </div>

          <div style={{height:5,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>

            <div style={{height:"100%",width:revenueProgress+"%",background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#0d9488,#a78bfa)",borderRadius:3}}/>

          </div>

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* ── TODAY'S SCHEDULE ── */}

      <div style={{padding:"16px 18px"}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06)"}}>

          <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <span style={{fontSize:16}}>📅</span>

            <div style={{flex:1}}>

              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800}}>Today's Full Schedule</div>

              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{realAppts.length} patients · {GAPS.length} open slot{GAPS.length!==1?"s":""}</div>

            </div>

          </div>

          {TODAY_APPTS.map((a,i)=>{

            const isGap=a.patient.startsWith("—");

            const isLunch=a.patient==="LUNCH";

            const sent=reminderSent[a.id];

            if(isLunch)return <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"5px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontStyle:"italic",display:"flex",gap:8}}><span style={{minWidth:44,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{a.time}</span>— Lunch Break (1 hour) —</div>;

            if(isGap)return(

              <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fffe",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderLeft:"3px solid "+C.teal,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.teal,fontWeight:700,minWidth:44}}>{a.time}</span>

                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:C.tealL,color:C.teal}}>OPEN — {a.duration}min · {a.dentist}</span>

                {!gapFilled[a.id]?<button onClick={()=>setOpenBox("gaps")} style={{marginLeft:"auto",padding:"4px 11px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>Fill from Short Notice →</button>:<span style={{marginLeft:"auto",fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:600}}>✓ Patient contacted</span>}

              </div>

            );

            return(

              <div key={a.id} style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9",borderLeft:"3px solid "+a.color,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",background:a.confirmed===false&&!sent?"#fffbeb":"#fff"}}>

                <div style={{flexShrink:0,textAlign:"center",minWidth:48}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:a.color}}>{a.time}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{a.duration}min</div>

                </div>

                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:a.pid?"pointer":"default",color:a.pid?C.teal:C.text}} onClick={()=>a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid)}>{a.patient}</span>

                    {a.confirmed===true&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>✓ CONFIRMED</span>}

                    {a.confirmed===false&&!sent&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>UNCONFIRMED</span>}

                    {sent&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:C.blue}}>REMINDED</span>}

                    {a.dnaHistory>=2&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>DNA ×{a.dnaHistory}</span>}

                  </div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{a.type} · {a.dentist}</div>

                  {a.alerts.length>0&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:3,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>{a.alerts.map((alert,ai)=><span key={ai} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:600,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>⚠ {alert}</span>)}</div>}

                </div>

                {a.balance>0&&<div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>

                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:balanceCollected[a.id]?C.green:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{balanceCollected[a.id]?"✓":""} £{a.balance.toFixed(2)}</div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{balanceCollected[a.id]?"collected":"outstanding"}</div>

                </div>}

              </div>

            );

          })}

        </div>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PRINCIPAL'S SMART INSIGHT — dynamic, data-driven, checks real metrics
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function SmartInsightBanner({doToast}){
  // Real-time data checks
  const today=new Date();
  const contractYear={start:new Date("2025-04-01"),end:new Date("2026-03-31")};
  const daysInYear=365;
  const daysRemaining=Math.max(0,Math.ceil((contractYear.end-today)/(1000*86400)));
  const daysGone=daysInYear-daysRemaining;
  const udaTarget=4560;
  const udaDone=1872;
  const udaPct=Math.round(udaDone/udaTarget*100);
  const expectedPct=Math.round(daysGone/daysInYear*100);
  const udaGap=udaPct-expectedPct;
  const udaPerDayNeeded=daysRemaining>0?Math.ceil((udaTarget-udaDone)/daysRemaining):0;

  // Revenue
  const monthRevenue=14840;
  const lastMonthRevenue=13700;
  const revGrowth=Math.round(((monthRevenue-lastMonthRevenue)/lastMonthRevenue)*100);

  // DNA rate
  const totalAppts=186;const totalDNAs=15;
  const dnaRate=Math.round((totalDNAs/totalAppts)*100);

  // Recall
  const recallBacklog=47;
  const recallConversion=76;

  // Outstanding
  const outstanding=1073.50;

  // Drafts
  const fp17Drafts=4;
  const clinicalDraftNotes=2;

  // Generate insights based on actual data
  const insights=[];

  // NHS UDA insight
  if(udaPct<expectedPct-5){
    const deficit=Math.round((expectedPct-udaPct)/100*udaTarget);
    insights.push({
      icon:"⚠️",type:"warning",priority:3,
      title:"NHS Contract Behind Target",
      message:`UDA completion is ${udaPct}% — ${deficit} UDAs behind schedule. You need ${udaPerDayNeeded} UDAs/day for the remaining ${daysRemaining} days to avoid clawback.`,
      action:"View UDA Tracker",actionId:"uda",color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",border:"#fecaca",
    });
  } else if(udaPct>=expectedPct){
    insights.push({
      icon:"✅",type:"success",priority:1,
      title:"NHS Contract On Track",
      message:`UDA completion is ${udaPct}% — ${udaGap>0?udaGap+" UDAs ahead of":"on"} schedule. ${daysRemaining} days remaining in the contract year.`,
      action:"View UDA Report",actionId:"uda",color:"#16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#bbf7d0",
    });
  }

  // Revenue growth
  if(revGrowth>5){
    insights.push({
      icon:"📈",type:"success",priority:1,
      title:`Revenue Up ${revGrowth}% vs Last Month`,
      message:`Monthly revenue of £${monthRevenue.toLocaleString()} is ${revGrowth}% ahead of last month (£${lastMonthRevenue.toLocaleString()}). Strong private case mix driving growth.`,
      action:"Full Report",actionId:"reports",color:"#0d9488",bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#99f6e4",
    });
  }

  // DNA rate
  if(dnaRate>8){
    insights.push({
      icon:"🚨",type:"warning",priority:2,
      title:"High DNA Rate — Action Required",
      message:`DNA rate is ${dnaRate}% (${totalDNAs} of ${totalAppts} appointments) — above the 8% threshold. Consider enabling SMS reminders 24h before appointments.`,
      action:"Enable Reminders",actionId:"settings",color:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",border:"#fde68a",
    });
  }

  // Recall backlog
  if(recallBacklog>30){
    insights.push({
      icon:"🔄",type:"opportunity",priority:2,
      title:`${recallBacklog} Patients Overdue for Recall`,
      message:`Recall backlog worth approximately £${(recallBacklog*90).toLocaleString()} in potential revenue. Recall conversion is currently ${recallConversion}% — activate Revenue Recovery Engine to contact them.`,
      action:"Revenue Recovery",actionId:"recovery",color:"#7c3aed",bg:"#f5f3ff",border:"#ddd6fe",
    });
  }

  // Outstanding invoices
  if(outstanding>500){
    insights.push({
      icon:"💳",type:"warning",priority:2,
      title:`£${outstanding.toFixed(2)} Outstanding — 2 Patients`,
      message:`Overdue balances need chasing. Amy Torres (£850) and John Mills (£73.50) have been outstanding over 30 days. Send payment reminders today.`,
      action:"View Accounts",actionId:"accounts",color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fff5f5",border:"#fecaca",
    });
  }

  // FP17 drafts
  if(fp17Drafts>0){
    insights.push({
      icon:"📋",type:"admin",priority:2,
      title:`${fp17Drafts} FP17 Claims in Draft`,
      message:`${fp17Drafts} NHS claims are still in draft and haven't been submitted. Submit before month-end to avoid delays in NHS payment.`,
      action:"FP17 Claims",actionId:"fp17",color:"#1d4ed8",bg:"#eff6ff",border:"#bfdbfe",
    });
  }

  // Clinical notes drafts
  if(clinicalDraftNotes>0){
    insights.push({
      icon:"📝",type:"compliance",priority:1,
      title:`${clinicalDraftNotes} Clinical Notes Need Finalising`,
      message:`${clinicalDraftNotes} notes from today are still in draft. Clinical notes must be finalised within 24 hours — CQC compliance requirement.`,
      action:"Clinical Notes",actionId:"notes",color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fff5f5",border:"#fecaca",
    });
  }

  // Sort by priority (highest first)
  insights.sort((a,b)=>b.priority-a.priority);

  const [idx,setIdx]=useState(0);
  const active=insights[idx]||{icon:"✅",title:"All Systems Normal",message:"No urgent actions — practice running smoothly. Check back later for updates.",color:"#16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#bbf7d0",type:"success"};

  return(
    <div style={{background:active.bg,border:`1px solid ${active.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 18px",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",transition:"all .3s"}}>
      <span style={{fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>{active.icon}</span>
      <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:active.color}}>Principal's Smart Insight</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:active.color+"20",color:active.color,textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{active.type||"insight"}</span>
          {insights.length>1&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{idx+1} of {insights.length}</span>}
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:2}}>{active.title}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.5}}>{active.message}</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>
        {insights.length>1&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,justifyContent:"center"}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setIdx(i=>Math.max(0,i-1))} disabled={idx===0} style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:idx===0?"#f1f5f9":"#fff",cursor:idx===0?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>‹</button>
          <button onClick={()=>setIdx(i=>Math.min(insights.length-1,i+1))} disabled={idx===insights.length-1} style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:idx===insights.length-1?"#f1f5f9":"#fff",cursor:idx===insights.length-1?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>›</button>
        </div>}
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening "+active.title+"…")} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${active.color}50`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:active.color,fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{active.action||"View"}</button>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Insight shared with team on Team Chat")} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>Discuss with Team</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Dashboard({openPatient,waiting,setWaiting}){
  const [dateRange,setDateRange]=useState("Today");
  const [brief,setBrief]=useState(false);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const wl=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="waiting").length;
  const DATE_RANGES=["Today","Yesterday","Last 7 days","Last 30 days","Last 90 days","Custom"];

  return <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>

    {/* ── Top KPI Banner Row — full-colour Dentally style ── */}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0,marginBottom:14,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",boxShadow:"0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1)"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Completed",v:18,sub:"Seen today",badge:"✓",note:"+3 vs yesterday",bg:"#16a34a",bg2:"#15803d",Icon:Check},
        {l:"Cancelled",v:3, sub:"Cancellations",badge:"✕",note:"+1 vs yesterday",bg:"#dc2626",bg2:"#b91c1c",Icon:X},
        {l:"DNA",v:2,       sub:"Did not attend",badge:"!",note:"+1 vs yesterday",bg:"#d97706",bg2:"#b45309",Icon:AlertTriangle},
        {l:"Remaining",v:6, sub:"Still to be seen",badge:"→",note:"Next: 14:00 Walsh",bg:"#2563eb",bg2:"#1d4ed8",Icon:Clock},
      ].map((s,i)=><div key={s.l} style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${s.bg} 0%,${s.bg2} 100%)`,padding:"16px 20px",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",borderRight:i<3?"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)":"none"}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",top:-10,right:-10,width:70,height:70,borderRadius:"50%",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}}/>
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:4}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".05em"}}>{s.l}</span>
          <s.Icon size={14} color="rgba(255,255,255,.5)"/>
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:40,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1,marginBottom:2}}>{s.v}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.65)"}}>{s.sub}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)",marginTop:3}}>{s.note}</div>
      </div>)}
    </div>

    {/* ── Secondary KPI row ── */}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>
      {[
        {l:"New Patients",v:2,sub:"Registered today",c:"#0d9488",Icon:User},
        {l:"Patients Seen",v:18,sub:"Completed today",c:"#16a34a",Icon:Check},
        {l:"Active Plans",v:47,sub:"Treatment plans open",c:"#7c3aed",Icon:FileText},
        {l:"DNA Rate",v:"8.7%",sub:"Target <5%",c:"#d97706",Icon:AlertTriangle},
        {l:"UDAs Today",v:21,sub:"Target 37/day ▲",c:"#0369a1",Icon:BarChart2},
      ].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 14px"}}>
        <div style={{width:26,height:26,borderRadius:7,background:s.c+"15",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",marginBottom:7}}><s.Icon size={12} color={s.c}/></div>
        <div style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1,marginBottom:2}}>{s.v}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{s.l}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.sub}</div>
      </div>)}
    </div>

    {/* ── Morning Briefing (collapsible) ── */}
    <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>
      <div onClick={()=>setBrief(o=>!o)} style={{padding:"12px 18px",background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,cursor:"pointer"}}>
        <Sparkles size={14} color="#fff"/><span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flex:1}}>Morning Briefing — Tuesday 14 May 2025</span>
        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)"}}>Generated 08:00</span>
        {brief?<ChevronUp size={14} color="#fff"/>:<ChevronDown size={14} color="#fff"/>}
      </div>
      {brief&&<div style={{padding:"14px 18px",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:12}}>
        {[{l:"Appointments Today",v:9,c:C.text},{l:"Confirmed",v:6,c:C.green},{l:"Unconfirmed",v:3,c:C.amber},{l:"Waiting Now",v:wl,c:wl>0?C.red:C.green},{l:"FP17 Pending",v:4,c:C.red}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:10,padding:"10px",textAlign:"center"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>{s.l}</div>
        </div>)}
      </div>}
    </div>

    {/* ── Date range + Export row ── */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginBottom:14,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"flex-end",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
      {DATE_RANGES.map(r=><button key={r} onClick={()=>setDateRange(r)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:`1px solid ${dateRange===r?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:6,background:dateRange===r?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:dateRange===r?700:400,color:dateRange===r?"#0d9488":"#64748b"}}>{r}</button>)}
      <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Dashboard exported")} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Download size={10}/>Export</button>
    </div>

    {/* ── Main grid ── */}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:14}}>

      {/* Treatment Plans Status */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Treatment Plans — Status Breakdown</span>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening treatment plans…")} style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>View all →</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr"}}>
          {[{l:"Started",v:14,c:"#f59e0b",bg:"#fffbeb"},{l:"Finished",v:21,c:C.green,bg:"#f0fdf4"},{l:"Open",v:12,c:C.red,bg:"#fef2f2"}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{padding:"16px",textAlign:"center",background:s.bg,borderRight:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:32,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:s.c,fontWeight:600,marginTop:4}}>{s.l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>NHS treatment plans · 47/47 active</div>
      </div>

      {/* Finance Overview Today */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Finance Overview — Today</span>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening full ledger…")} style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}>Full Ledger</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr"}}>
          {[{l:"Total Revenue",v:"£2,840",c:C.teal,sub:"+12% vs yest."},{l:"Collected",v:"£1,420",c:C.blue,sub:"↑ 5% target"},{l:"Outstanding",v:"£325",c:C.red,sub:"2 patients"}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{padding:"14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>{s.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>{s.sub}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* ── 3-col row ── */}
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:14}}>

      {/* Today's Appointments */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",marginBottom:2}}>3 patients have outstanding plans worth £1,840.</div>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening Revenue Recovery…")} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#6ee7b7",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",padding:0,fontWeight:600}}>→ Book them now</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderRadius:9,background:"#14532d"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,color:"#86efac",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>📈 Performance</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",marginBottom:2}}>Recall conversion 76%, up 5%.</div>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening Reports…")} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#86efac",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",padding:0,fontWeight:600}}>→ View report</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px"}}>
          {[{name:"Rebecca Walsh",sub:"Turns 35 today · Patient since 2021"},{name:"Tom Bright",sub:"Turns 28 today · New patient"}].map((b,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:i===0?10:0}}>

          <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#22c55e"}}/>

          {[{icon:"📋",action:"FP17 accepted",sub:"Loc #3086",time:"09:25"},{icon:"🎤",action:"Voice note saved",sub:"Mitchell #3334",time:"09:15"},{icon:"📅",action:"Appointment Booked",sub:"Priya Sharma — 10:00",time:"09:04"}].map((a,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"7px 0",borderBottom:i<2?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>

              </div>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace",flexShrink:0}}>{a.time}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <SmartInsightBanner doToast={doToast}/>

    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr",gap:12,marginBottom:14}}>

        <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>

          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Today's Appointments</span><Chip color={C.teal}>14 May 2025</Chip>

        </div>

        <div style={{maxHeight:300,overflowY:"auto"}}>

          {INIT_APPTS.map(a=>{const sc={completed:{c:C.green,l:"Completed"},in_surgery:{c:C.blue,l:"In Surgery"},waiting:{c:C.amber,l:"Waiting"},booked:{c:"#94a3b8",l:"Booked"}}[a.status];

          return <div key={a.id} onClick={()=>a.pid&&openPatient(a.pid)} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 16px",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc",cursor:a.pid?"pointer":"default",alignItems:"center",transition:"background .1s"}}

            onMouseOver={e=>{if(a.pid)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fafffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>

            <span style={{width:38,textAlign:"right",fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0}}>{a.time}</span>

            <div style={{width:4,height:38,borderRadius:2,background:sc.c,flexShrink:0}}/>
