            <Chip color={sc.c}>{sc.l}</Chip>

          </div>;})}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Urgent Tasks */}

      <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><AlertTriangle size={13} color={C.red}/>Urgent Tasks <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:10,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>3</span></div>

        {[{t:"Submit FP17 — Amy Torres",d:"2 days overdue",c:C.red},{t:"Chase lab — Sarah Chen",d:"Crown due today",c:C.amber},{t:"Confirm 8 appointments",d:"Tomorrow unconfirmed",c:C.amber},{t:"Complete note — Tom Bright",d:"Appointment 13 May",c:C.blue}].map((t,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,padding:"7px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:t.c+"0d",border:`1px solid ${t.c}20`}}>

          <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:t.c,flexShrink:0,marginTop:4}}/>

          <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.t}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{t.d}</div></div>

        </div>)}

        <div style={{marginTop:"auto",padding:"7px 9px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600,cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>View all tasks →</div>

      </div>

    </div>

    {/* ── Practice Insights (matching screenshot) ───────────────────── */}

    <PracticeInsights/>

  </div>;

}

function WaitingPage({waiting,setWaiting,user,openPatient,setNotifs,waitThreshold,setWaitThreshold}){

  const M=60000;

  const threshold=waitThreshold||20; // minutes before turning red

  const [tick,setTick]=useState(0);

  const [manualName,setManualName]=useState("");

  const [manualDentist,setManualDentist]=useState("Dr. S. Patel");

  const [manualAppt,setManualAppt]=useState("");

  const [showAdd,setShowAdd]=useState(false);

  const [showThreshold,setShowThreshold]=useState(false);

  const [newThreshold,setNewThreshold]=useState(String(threshold));

  const [viewTab,setViewTab]=useState("waiting"); // waiting | daily

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};

  useEffect(()=>{const t=setInterval(()=>setTick(n=>n+1),10000);return()=>clearInterval(t);},[]);

  const isManager=user?.role==="manager";

  const isReception=user?.role==="reception"||user?.role==="manager";

  const isDentist=user?.role==="dentist"||user?.role==="hygienist";

  const wm=w=>w.in?Math.floor((Date.now()-w.in)/M):null;

  const waitingNow=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="waiting").sort((a,b)=>(a.in||0)-(b.in||0));

  const bookedToday=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="booked");

  const calledIn=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="called");

  // Today's full schedule from INIT_APPTS — synced with calendar

  const dailyList=[

    {id:"D1",time:"08:30",name:"John Mills",     pid:"P1",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Check-up & Composite",  status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="John Mills")?.status||"scheduled"},

    {id:"D2",time:"09:00",name:"Tom Bright",     pid:null,dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Extraction LL7",          status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Tom Bright")?.status||"scheduled"},

    {id:"D3",time:"09:30",name:"Sarah Chen",     pid:"P2",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Crown Fit UR6",           status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Sarah Chen")?.status||"waiting"},

    {id:"D4",time:"10:00",name:"Carol Nash",     pid:null,dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"New Patient Exam",        status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Carol Nash")?.status||"scheduled"},

    {id:"D5",time:"10:30",name:"Amy Torres",     pid:"P4",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen", type:"Implant Consultation",    status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Amy Torres")?.status||"booked"},

    {id:"D6",time:"11:30",name:"David Park",     pid:"P5",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen", type:"OPG Review",               status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="David Park")?.status||"booked"},

    {id:"D7",time:"13:00",name:"Robert Hall",    pid:"P3",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen", type:"RCT Session 3 LL7",        status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Robert Hall")?.status||"booked"},

    {id:"D8",time:"14:00",name:"Lisa White",     pid:"P6",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Composite Smile Makeover", status:waiting.find(x=>x.name==="Lisa White")?.status||"booked"},

    {id:"D9",time:"14:00",name:"Amy Grant (H)",  pid:null,dentist:"Amy Grant",   type:"Scale & Polish NHS",       status:"scheduled"},

    {id:"D10",time:"16:00",name:"Sarah Chen",    pid:"P2",dentist:"Amy Grant",   type:"Hygiene Review",           status:"scheduled"},

  ];

  const checkInFromDaily=(apt)=>{

    // If already in waiting list update, else add new entry

    const exists=waiting.find(x=>x.name===apt.name&&x.appt===apt.time);

    if(exists){

      setWaiting(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===exists.id?{...x,in:Date.now(),status:"waiting"}:x));

    } else {

      setWaiting(p=>[...p,{id:"W"+Date.now(),name:apt.name,pid:apt.pid,appt:apt.time,dentist:apt.dentist,in:Date.now(),status:"waiting"}]);

    }

    // Notify dentist

    if(setNotifs){

      const now=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});

      setNotifs(p=>[{id:"CK"+Date.now(),type:"checkin",title:"Patient arrived — "+apt.name,desc:apt.name+" checked in for "+apt.time+" · "+apt.dentist,at:now,read:false},...p]);

    }

    doToast("✓ "+apt.name+" checked in · "+apt.dentist+" notified");

  };

  const addManual=()=>{

    if(!manualName.trim())return;

    const entry={id:"W"+Date.now(),name:manualName.trim(),pid:null,appt:manualAppt||"Walk-in",dentist:manualDentist,in:Date.now(),status:"waiting"};

    setWaiting(p=>[...p,entry]);

    if(setNotifs){

      const now=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});

      setNotifs(p=>[{id:"CK"+Date.now(),type:"checkin",title:"Walk-in arrived — "+manualName,desc:manualName+" (walk-in) · "+manualDentist,at:now,read:false},...p]);

    }

    doToast("✓ "+manualName+" added to waiting room · "+manualDentist+" notified");

    setManualName("");setManualAppt("");setShowAdd(false);

  };

  const callInPatient=(w)=>{

    setWaiting(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===w.id?{...x,status:"called",calledAt:Date.now()}:x));

    // Play audio chime notification
    try {
      const ctx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();
      const playNote=(freq,start,dur,vol=0.3)=>{
        const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain();
        osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination);
        osc.frequency.value=freq; osc.type="sine";
        gain.gain.setValueAtTime(vol,ctx.currentTime+start);
        gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001,ctx.currentTime+start+dur);
        osc.start(ctx.currentTime+start); osc.stop(ctx.currentTime+start+dur);
      };
      playNote(523,0,.3); playNote(659,.2,.3); playNote(784,.4,.5);
    } catch(e){}

    // Notify reception
    if(setNotifs){
      const now=new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});
      setNotifs(p=>[{id:"CI"+Date.now(),type:"callin",title:"Please send patient in — "+w.name,desc:user?.name+" is ready for "+w.name+" · Please ask them to go to surgery",at:now,read:false},...p]);
    }

    doToast("🔔 Reception notified — please send "+w.name+" in");

  };

  const removePatient=(id)=>setWaiting(p=>p.filter(x=>x.id!==id));

  const DENTISTS=["Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"];

  const statusMeta={

    scheduled:{bg:"#f8fafc",border:"#e2e8f0",badge:"#e2e8f0",bc:"#64748b",l:"Scheduled"},

    booked:    {bg:"#f0fffe",border:"#99f6e4",badge:C.teal+"22",bc:C.teal,l:"Due In"},

    waiting:   {bg:"#fff",   border:"#e2e8f0", badge:"#fef3c7",bc:C.amber,l:"Waiting"},

    called:    {bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#bbf7d0",badge:"#dcfce7", bc:C.green,l:"Called In"},

    completed: {bg:"#f8fafc",border:"#e2e8f0", badge:"#f1f5f9",bc:"#94a3b8",l:"Done"},

  };

  return(

    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,zIndex:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={13}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Header */}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 18px",flexShrink:0}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>

          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,flexShrink:0}}>🚪</div>

          <div style={{flex:1}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Waiting Room</div>

            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>

              {waitingNow.length} waiting · {bookedToday.length} expected · threshold: <strong style={{color:waitingNow.some(w=>(wm(w)||0)>=threshold)?C.red:C.teal}}>{threshold} min</strong>

            </div>

          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

            {/* Stat pills */}

            {[

              {l:"Waiting",v:waitingNow.length,c:waitingNow.some(w=>(wm(w)||0)>=threshold)?C.red:C.amber,bg:waitingNow.some(w=>(wm(w)||0)>=threshold)?"#fee2e2":"#fef3c7"},

              {l:"Expected",v:bookedToday.length,c:C.teal,bg:C.tealL},

              {l:"Called In",v:calledIn.length,c:C.green,bg:"#dcfce7"},

            ].map(s=>(

              <div key={s.l} style={{padding:"5px 12px",background:s.bg,borderRadius:8,textAlign:"center",minWidth:60}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:17,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:s.c,opacity:.7,fontWeight:700}}>{s.l}</div>

              </div>

            ))}

            {isReception&&<button onClick={()=>setShowAdd(v=>!v)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={13}/>Check In</button>}

            {isManager&&<button onClick={()=>setShowThreshold(v=>!v)} style={{padding:"7px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>⏱ Threshold</button>}

          </div>

        </div>

        {/* Manual check-in form */}

        {showAdd&&<div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#f0fffe",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}40`,borderRadius:10,marginBottom:8,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

          <input value={manualName} onChange={e=>setManualName(e.target.value)} placeholder="Patient name" style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",flex:1,minWidth:140}}/>

          <input value={manualAppt} onChange={e=>setManualAppt(e.target.value)} placeholder="Appt time (optional)" style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",width:120}}/>

          <select value={manualDentist} onChange={e=>setManualDentist(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"7px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>

            {DENTISTS.map(d=><option key={d}>{d}</option>)}

          </select>

          <button onClick={addManual} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Add</button>

          <button onClick={()=>setShowAdd(false)} style={{padding:"7px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>

        </div>}

        {/* Manager threshold setting */}

        {showThreshold&&isManager&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:10,marginBottom:8,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>

          <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>⏱ Alert after</span>

          <input type="number" min="5" max="60" value={newThreshold} onChange={e=>setNewThreshold(e.target.value)} style={{width:60,padding:"5px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",textAlign:"center"}}/>

          <span style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>minutes waiting</span>

          <button onClick={()=>{setWaitThreshold&&setWaitThreshold(parseInt(newThreshold)||20);setShowThreshold(false);doToast("Wait threshold set to "+newThreshold+" minutes");}} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:C.amber,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save</button>

          <button onClick={()=>setShowThreshold(false)} style={{padding:"6px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>

        </div>}

        {/* View tabs */}

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>

          {[{id:"waiting",l:"🚶 Waiting Now"},{id:"daily",l:"📅 Daily Schedule"}].map(t=>(

            <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setViewTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"6px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${viewTab===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:viewTab===t.id?700:400,color:viewTab===t.id?C.teal:C.muted,marginBottom:-1}}>

              {t.l}

            </button>

          ))}

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* ── WAITING NOW TAB ── */}

      {viewTab==="waiting"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>

        {waitingNow.length===0&&calledIn.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"40px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0"}}>

          <div style={{fontSize:36,marginBottom:10}}>✅</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>No patients waiting right now</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginTop:4}}>Use Daily Schedule to check in today's appointments</div>

        </div>}

        {calledIn.length>0&&<>

          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>Called In — In Surgery</div>

          {calledIn.map(w=>(

            <div key={w.id} style={{background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:8,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

              <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:9,background:C.green,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{w.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>

              <div style={{flex:1}}>

                <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>{w.name}</div>

                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{w.appt} · {w.dentist} · In surgery ✓</div>

              </div>

              {w.pid&&isDentist&&<button onClick={()=>openPatient&&openPatient(w.pid,"charting")} style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>🦷 Open Record</button>}

              <button onClick={()=>removePatient(w.id)} style={{padding:"6px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>Done ✓</button>

            </div>

          ))}

          <div style={{height:1,background:C.border,margin:"12px 0"}}/>

        </>}

        {waitingNow.length>0&&<>

          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>Waiting · {waitingNow.length} patient{waitingNow.length!==1?"s":""}</div>

          {waitingNow.map(w=>{

            const mins=wm(w);

            const overdue=mins!==null&&mins>=threshold;

            const warn=mins!==null&&mins>=Math.floor(threshold*0.7)&&!overdue;

            const bc=overdue?C.red:warn?C.amber:C.teal;

            const bg=overdue?"#fff5f5":warn?"#fffbeb":"#fff";

            const border=overdue?"#fecaca":warn?"#fde68a":`${C.teal}30`;

            const pt=PATIENTS.find(p=>p.id===w.pid);

            return(

              <div key={w.id} style={{background:bg,border:`1.5px solid ${border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${bc}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px",marginBottom:10,animation:overdue?"waitPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite":"none"}}>

                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>

                  {/* Avatar */}

                  <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:bc+"22",border:`1.5px solid ${bc}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:bc,flexShrink:0}}>

                    {w.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}

                  </div>

                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>

                      <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{w.name}</span>

                      {overdue&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red,animation:"waitPulse 1s infinite"}}>⚠️ OVERDUE</span>}

                    </div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{w.appt} · {w.dentist}</div>

                    {pt?.medAlerts?.length>0&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.red,fontWeight:600,marginTop:2}}>⚠ {pt.medAlerts[0]}</div>}

                  </div>

                  {/* Wait time */}

                  <div style={{textAlign:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

                    <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:bc,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{mins??"-"}</div>

                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>min</div>

                  </div>

                  {/* Actions */}

                  <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>

                    {isDentist&&<button onClick={()=>callInPatient(w)} style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap",display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}>

                      <UserCheck size={12}/>Call In

                    </button>}

                    {isDentist&&w.pid&&<button onClick={()=>openPatient&&openPatient(w.pid,"charting")} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:8,background:C.tealL,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>

                      🦷 Open Record

                    </button>}

                    {isReception&&<button onClick={()=>removePatient(w.id)} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Remove</button>}

                  </div>

                </div>

                {/* Wait bar */}

                {mins!==null&&<div style={{marginTop:8,height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>

                  <div style={{height:"100%",width:Math.min(100,mins/threshold*100)+"%",background:bc,borderRadius:3,transition:"width .5s"}}/>

                </div>}

              </div>

            );

          })}

        </>}

      </div>}

      {/* ── DAILY SCHEDULE TAB ── */}

      {viewTab==="daily"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Today's appointments · Click <strong>Check In</strong> when patient arrives · Synced with calendar</div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,boxShadow:"0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)"}}>

          {/* Column headers */}

          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"70px 1fr 130px 110px 110px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>

            <span>Time</span><span>Patient</span><span>Dentist</span><span>Treatment</span><span>Action</span>

          </div>

          {dailyList.map((apt,i)=>{

            const wEntry=waiting.find(x=>x.name===apt.name);

            const inWaiting=wEntry?.status==="waiting";

            const isCalled=wEntry?.status==="called";

            const isDone=wEntry?.status==="completed"||apt.status==="completed";

            const mins=inWaiting&&wEntry?.in?Math.floor((Date.now()-wEntry.in)/M):null;

            const overdue=mins!==null&&mins>=threshold;

            const rowBg=isCalled?"#f0fdf4":inWaiting&&overdue?"#fff5f5":inWaiting?"#fffbeb":"#fff";

            return(

              <div key={apt.id} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"70px 1fr 130px 110px 110px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center",background:rowBg}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.teal}}>{apt.time}</span>

                <div>

                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{apt.name}</div>

                  {inWaiting&&overdue&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>⚠️ {mins}m waiting</span>}

                  {inWaiting&&!overdue&&mins!==null&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:C.amber}}>Waiting {mins}m</span>}

                  {isCalled&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>✓ Called in</span>}

                </div>

                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{apt.dentist}</span>

                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{apt.type}</span>

                <div>

                  {!inWaiting&&!isCalled&&!isDone&&isReception&&

                    <button onClick={()=>checkInFromDaily(apt)} style={{padding:"5px 11px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Check In</button>}

                  {inWaiting&&isDentist&&

                    <button onClick={()=>wEntry&&callInPatient(wEntry)} style={{padding:"5px 11px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><UserCheck size={11}/>Call In</button>}

                  {inWaiting&&isReception&&

                    <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:7,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>Waiting {mins}m</span>}

                  {isCalled&&

                    <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:7,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>✓ In Surgery</span>}

                  {isDone&&

                    <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Done</span>}

                </div>

              </div>

            );

          })}

        </div>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

function PatientsPage({patients,openPatient}){

  const [q,setQ]=useState("");

  const [type,setType]=useState("all");

  const vis=patients.filter(p=>{

    if(type!=="all"&&p.type!==type)return false;

    if(!q)return true;

    const search=q.toLowerCase();

    return (p.name||"").toLowerCase().includes(search)||(p.email||"").toLowerCase().includes(search);

  });

  const STATUS_COLORS={active:C.green,inactive:"#94a3b8"};

  return(

    <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>

      {/* Toolbar */}

      <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{position:"relative",flex:1}}>

          <Search size={13} style={{position:"absolute",left:10,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>

          <input value={q} onChange={e=>setQ(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search by name or email…" style={{...inp,paddingLeft:30}}/>

        </div>

        <select value={type} onChange={e=>setType(e.target.value)} style={{...inp,width:"auto"}}>

          <option value="all">All Patients</option>

          <option value="nhs">NHS</option>

          <option value="private">Private</option>

        </select>

        <Btn v="primary" onClick={()=>doToast("Opening new patient form...")}><Plus size={12}/>Add Patient</Btn>

      </div>

      {/* Count */}

      <div style={{padding:"6px 16px",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,background:"#fafafa",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>

        Showing <strong>{vis.length}</strong> of {patients.length} patients

      </div>

      {/* Table */}

      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>

        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>

          <thead>

            <tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>

              {["Patient","DOB","NHS No.","Dentist","Next Appt","Balance","Flags",""].map(h=>(

                <th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>

              ))}

            </tr>

          </thead>

          <tbody>

            {vis.length===0&&(

              <tr><td colSpan={8} style={{padding:"32px",textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:13}}>

                No patients found matching "{q}"

              </td></tr>

            )}

            {vis.map((p,i)=>{

              const even=i%2===0;

              const bg=even?"#ffffff":"#f0fffe";

              const hoverBg="#e0f9f7";

              return(

                <tr

                  key={p.id}

                  style={{background:bg,borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",cursor:"pointer"}}

                  onClick={()=>openPatient(p.id)}

                  onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=hoverBg}

                  onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=bg}

                >

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center"}}>

                      <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{p.ini}</div>

                      <div>

                        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</div>

                        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{p.email}</div>

                      </div>

                    </div>

                  </td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted,fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11}}>{p.dob}</td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11}}>

                    {p.nhs||<span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Private</span>}

                  </td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted}}>{p.dentist}</td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:11,fontFamily:p.nextAppt?"monospace":"inherit",color:p.nextAppt?C.text:"#94a3b8"}}>

                    {p.nextAppt||"Not booked"}

                  </td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>

                    {p.balance>0

                      ?<span style={{fontWeight:700,color:p.overdue?C.red:C.amber,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{f(p.balance)}</span>

                      :<span style={{color:C.green}}>£0.00</span>

                    }

                  </td>

                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:3,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

                      {(p.medAlerts||[]).map(a=>(

                        <span key={a} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>{a}</span>

                      ))}

                      {p.ep?.anxiety>=4&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>😰 Anxious</span>}

                      {p.ep?.triggers?.includes("injections")&&<span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>💉</span>}

                      {p.ep?.extraTime&&<span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:C.blue}}>⏱ Extra time</span>}

                      {(p.ep?.flags||[]).some(flg=>flg.includes("♿")||flg.includes("Wheelchair"))&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:C.blue}}>♿</span>}

                    </div>

                  </td>

                  <td style={{padding:"6px 10px"}} onClick={e=>e.stopPropagation()}>

                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4}}>

                      <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();openPatient(p.id);}} style={{padding:"4px 9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>Record</button>

                      <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();openPatient(p.id,"charting");}} style={{padding:"4px 9px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:C.teal,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>🦷 Chart</button>

                    </div>

                  </td>

                </tr>

              );

            })}

          </tbody>

        </table>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// DATE PICKER — Calendar + manual DD/MM/YYYY input

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function DatePickerInput({value,onChange,label,accentColor}){

  const accent=accentColor||C.teal;

  const MONTHS=["January","February","March","April","May","June","July","August","September","October","November","December"];

  const MONTHS_SHORT=["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"];

  const DAYS_HDR=["Mo","Tu","We","Th","Fr","Sa","Su"];

  const parseStored=str=>{

    if(!str)return null;

    const m1=str.match(/^(\d{1,2})\s+([A-Za-z]{3})\s+(\d{4})$/);

    if(m1){const mi=MONTHS_SHORT.findIndex(m=>m.toLowerCase()===m1[2].toLowerCase());if(mi>=0)return new Date(+m1[3],mi,+m1[1]);}

    const m2=str.match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})$/);

    if(m2)return new Date(+m2[3],+m2[2]-1,+m2[1]);

    return null;

  };

  const toStorage=d=>`${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,"0")} ${MONTHS_SHORT[d.getMonth()]} ${d.getFullYear()}`;

  const toDisplay=d=>`${String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,"0")}/${String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")}/${d.getFullYear()}`;

  const storedToDisplay=str=>{if(!str)return"";const d=parseStored(str);return d?toDisplay(d):str;};

  const todayD=new Date();

  const parsedVal=parseStored(value);

  const [open,setOpen]=useState(false);

  const [typed,setTyped]=useState(()=>storedToDisplay(value));

  const [typeErr,setTypeErr]=useState("");

  const [viewYear,setViewYear]=useState((parsedVal||todayD).getFullYear());

  const [viewMonth,setViewMonth]=useState((parsedVal||todayD).getMonth());

  const ref=useRef(null);

  useEffect(()=>{

    if(!open)return;

    const h=e=>{if(ref.current&&!ref.current.contains(e.target))setOpen(false);};

    document.addEventListener("mousedown",h);

    return()=>document.removeEventListener("mousedown",h);

  },[open]);

  useEffect(()=>{setTyped(storedToDisplay(value));},[value]);

  const buildGrid=()=>{

    const firstDay=new Date(viewYear,viewMonth,1).getDay();

    const days=new Date(viewYear,viewMonth+1,0).getDate();

    const offset=(firstDay+6)%7;

    const cells=[];

    for(let i=0;i<offset;i++)cells.push(null);

    for(let d=1;d<=days;d++)cells.push(d);

    while(cells.length%7!==0)cells.push(null);

    return cells;

  };

  const selectDate=day=>{

    const d=new Date(viewYear,viewMonth,day);

    onChange(toStorage(d));setTyped(toDisplay(d));setTypeErr("");setOpen(false);

  };

  const applyTyped=raw=>{

    setTyped(raw);setTypeErr("");

    if(!raw.trim()){onChange("");return;}

    const m=raw.match(/^(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{4})$/);

    if(!m){setTypeErr("Format must be DD/MM/YYYY — e.g. 10/01/2026");return;}

    const dd=parseInt(m[1]),mm=parseInt(m[2]),yyyy=parseInt(m[3]);

    if(mm<1||mm>12){setTypeErr("Month must be 01–12");return;}

    const maxD=new Date(yyyy,mm,0).getDate();

    if(dd<1||dd>maxD){setTypeErr("Day "+dd+" is invalid for this month (max "+maxD+")");return;}

    if(yyyy<1900||yyyy>2100){setTypeErr("Year must be between 1900 and 2100");return;}

    const d=new Date(yyyy,mm-1,dd);

    onChange(toStorage(d));setViewYear(yyyy);setViewMonth(mm-1);

  };

  const grid=buildGrid();

  const years=[];for(let y=1980;y<=2040;y++)years.push(y);

  const isSel=day=>!!day&&!!parsedVal&&parsedVal.getFullYear()===viewYear&&parsedVal.getMonth()===viewMonth&&parsedVal.getDate()===day;

  const isToday=day=>!!day&&todayD.getFullYear()===viewYear&&todayD.getMonth()===viewMonth&&todayD.getDate()===day;

  return(

    <div ref={ref} style={{flex:1,position:"relative"}}>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <div style={{flex:1,position:"relative"}}>

          <input value={typed} onChange={e=>applyTyped(e.target.value)} onFocus={()=>setOpen(true)}

            placeholder="DD/MM/YYYY" maxLength={10}

            style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 32px 6px 10px",border:`1.5px solid ${typeErr?C.red:open?accent:C.border}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box",background:typeErr?"#fff5f5":"#fff",color:typeErr?C.red:C.text,transition:"border-color .15s"}}/>

          <button onClick={()=>setOpen(o=>!o)} style={{position:"absolute",right:6,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:open?accent:"#94a3b8",fontSize:14,padding:"2px",lineHeight:1}}>{"📅"}</button>

        </div>

        {value&&<button onClick={()=>{onChange("");setTyped("");setTypeErr("");}} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12,padding:"2px 4px",flexShrink:0}} title="Clear">✕</button>}

      </div>

      {typeErr&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.red,marginTop:3,fontWeight:600}}>{"⚠"} {typeErr}</div>}

      {open&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:"calc(100% + 6px)",left:0,zIndex:2000,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,boxShadow:"0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",width:268,overflow:"hidden"}}>

        <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${accent},${accent}cc)`,padding:"10px 12px",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

          <button onClick={()=>setViewMonth(m=>{if(m===0){setViewYear(y=>y-1);return 11;}return m-1;})} style={{border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.25)",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",color:"#fff",width:26,height:26,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>{"‹"}</button>

          <select value={viewMonth} onChange={e=>setViewMonth(+e.target.value)} style={{flex:1,padding:"4px 5px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.92)",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>

            {MONTHS.map((m,i)=><option key={m} value={i}>{m}</option>)}

          </select>

          <select value={viewYear} onChange={e=>setViewYear(+e.target.value)} style={{width:68,padding:"4px 5px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.92)",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>

            {years.map(y=><option key={y} value={y}>{y}</option>)}

          </select>

          <button onClick={()=>setViewMonth(m=>{if(m===11){setViewYear(y=>y+1);return 0;}return m+1;})} style={{border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.25)",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",color:"#fff",width:26,height:26,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>{"›"}</button>

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(7,1fr)",padding:"8px 10px 2px",gap:1}}>

          {DAYS_HDR.map(d=><div key={d} style={{textAlign:"center",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",padding:"2px 0"}}>{d}</div>)}

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(7,1fr)",padding:"2px 10px 8px",gap:1}}>

          {grid.map((day,i)=>{

            const sel=isSel(day);const tod=isToday(day);

            return(

              <button key={i} disabled={!day} onClick={()=>day&&selectDate(day)}

                style={{height:32,borderRadius:7,border:tod&&!sel?`1.5px solid ${accent}50`:"none",background:sel?accent:"transparent",color:sel?"#fff":tod?accent:day?"#1e293b":"transparent",fontWeight:sel||tod?800:400,fontSize:12,cursor:day?"pointer":"default",fontFamily:"monospace",transition:"background .08s"}}

                onMouseEnter={e=>{if(day&&!sel)e.currentTarget.style.background=accent+"22";}}

                onMouseLeave={e=>{if(day&&!sel)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>

                {day||""}

              </button>

            );

          })}

        </div>

        <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"7px 12px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",background:"#f8fafc"}}>

          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>DD/MM/YYYY only</span>

          <button onClick={()=>{setViewYear(todayD.getFullYear());setViewMonth(todayD.getMonth());selectDate(todayD.getDate());}} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:accent,border:`1px solid ${accent}30`,background:accent+"10",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",padding:"3px 10px"}}>Today</button>

        </div>

      </div>}

    </div>

  );

}

// ── AINoteAssistant — AI-powered clinical note generation inside PatientRecord ──

function AINoteAssistant({patient,user}){

  // Stages: list | new | recording | generating | review | saved

  const [stage,setStage]=useState("list");

  const [notes,setNotes]=useState([

    {id:"CN1",date:"Today · In Progress",by:"Dr. S. Patel",s:"draft",

     body:"Patient presents for routine check-up. Complaint: mild cold sensitivity UR6 over 2 weeks.\n\nExamination: caries noted UR6 (occlusal). BPE Score 1. Soft tissue — NAD.\n\nTreatment: Composite restoration UR6. Polish completed.\n\nPlan: Review 6 months.",

     aiGenerated:true,approvedBy:"Dr. S. Patel",apptType:"Routine Examination"},

    {id:"CN2",date:"15 Jan 2026 · 09:30",by:"Dr. S. Patel",s:"locked",body:"",aiGenerated:false,apptType:"Crown Prep"},

    {id:"CN3",date:"08 Jul 2025 · 14:00",by:"Dr. S. Patel",s:"locked",body:"",aiGenerated:false,apptType:"Scale & Polish"},

  ]);

  const [apptType,setApptType]=useState("");

  const [roughNotes,setRoughNotes]=useState("");

  const [isRecording,setIsRecording]=useState(false);

  const [recordSec,setRecordSec]=useState(0);

  const [aiDraft,setAiDraft]=useState("");

  const [editedDraft,setEditedDraft]=useState("");

  const [generating,setGenerating]=useState(false);

  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);

  const [auditLog,setAuditLog]=useState([]);

  const [showAudit,setShowAudit]=useState(false);

  const timerRef=React.useRef(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};

  const APPT_TYPES=[

    "Routine Examination","Emergency Appointment","Scale & Polish",

    "Composite Restoration","Crown Preparation","Crown Fit",

    "Root Canal Treatment","Extraction","Implant Consultation",

    "Denture Review","Orthodontic Review","Hygiene Appointment",

    "New Patient Examination","Post-Operative Review","Periodontal Assessment",

  ];

  // Recording timer

  const startRecording=()=>{

    setIsRecording(true);setRecordSec(0);

    timerRef.current=setInterval(()=>setRecordSec(s=>s+1),1000);

  };

  const stopRecording=()=>{

    setIsRecording(false);clearInterval(timerRef.current);

    // Simulate transcript added to rough notes

    setRoughNotes(r=>r+(r?" ":"")+"[Voice]: Patient reports sensitivity upper right molar, worse with cold. No spontaneous pain. Examination — caries present UR6 occlusal surface. Periapical radiograph taken, no periapical pathology. Treatment discussed, patient consented to composite restoration. Local anaesthetic administered, restoration completed, occlusion checked and adjusted.");

  };

  const fmt=s=>`${Math.floor(s/60).toString().padStart(2,"0")}:${(s%60).toString().padStart(2,"0")}`;

  // AI generation via Anthropic API

  const generateNote=async()=>{

    if(!apptType){doToast("Please select an appointment type first");return;}

    if(!roughNotes.trim()){doToast("Please add some notes or record audio first");return;}

    setGenerating(true);setStage("generating");

    try{

      const res=await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",{

        method:"POST",

        headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},

        body:JSON.stringify({

          model:"claude-sonnet-4-20250514",

          max_tokens:1000,

          system:`You are a UK dental clinical notes assistant. Generate a structured, professional dental clinical note in standard UK dental format. Use SOAP structure where appropriate. Be concise, clinically accurate, and use correct UK dental terminology. Include: Chief complaint, Examination findings, Diagnosis, Treatment provided, Plan/Recall. Return only the note text with no preamble.`,

          messages:[{role:"user",content:`Patient: ${patient.name}, DOB: ${patient.dob}\nAppointment type: ${apptType}\nDentist rough notes: ${roughNotes}\n\nGenerate a structured clinical note for this appointment.`}]

        })

      });

      const data=await res.json();

      const generated=data.content?.find(b=>b.type==="text")?.text||"Unable to generate note. Please type manually.";

      setAiDraft(generated);setEditedDraft(generated);setStage("review");

    }catch(e){

      // Fallback demo note if API fails

      const fallback=`${apptType.toUpperCase()} — ${new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"})}\n\nPatient: ${patient.name}\nDentist: ${user?.name||"Dr. S. Patel"}\n\nChief Complaint:\n${roughNotes.includes("sensitivity")?"Patient reports sensitivity, worse with cold stimuli.":"Patient presents as per appointment type."}\n\nExamination:\nIntra-oral examination performed. ${roughNotes.slice(0,120)}...\n\nDiagnosis:\nCaries noted. No periapical pathology evident on radiograph.\n\nTreatment Provided:\nLocal anaesthetic administered. Composite restoration completed. Occlusion checked.\n\nPlan:\nReview in 6 months. Patient advised on oral hygiene and dietary advice.\n\nBPE: 1 | Soft tissue: NAD`;

      setAiDraft(fallback);setEditedDraft(fallback);setStage("review");

    }

    setGenerating(false);

  };

  // Approve and save

  const approveAndSave=()=>{

    const now=new Date();

    const dateStr=now.toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"})+" · "+now.toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});

    const newNote={

      id:"CN"+Date.now(),date:dateStr,by:user?.name||"Dr. S. Patel",

      s:"draft",body:editedDraft,aiGenerated:true,

      approvedBy:user?.name||"Dr. S. Patel",apptType,

    };

    setNotes(p=>[newNote,...p]);

    // Silent AI audit log — dentist never needs to manually save this

    setAuditLog(p=>[...p,{

      id:"AL"+Date.now(),at:now.toISOString(),

      action:"AI_NOTE_APPROVED",patient:patient.id,

      dentist:user?.name,apptType,

      roughInput:roughNotes.slice(0,200),

      aiOutput:aiDraft.slice(0,200),

      editedOutput:editedDraft.slice(0,200),

      identical:aiDraft===editedDraft,

      model:"claude-sonnet-4-20250514",

    }]);

    doToast("✓ Clinical note saved to patient record");

    setStage("list");setRoughNotes("");setApptType("");setAiDraft("");setEditedDraft("");setRecordSec(0);

  };

  const finaliseNote=(id)=>setNotes(p=>p.map(n=>n.id===id?{...n,s:"locked"}:n));

  const deleteNote=(id)=>setNotes(p=>p.filter(n=>n.id!==id));

  // ── STAGE: LIST ──

  if(stage==="list")return(

    <div style={{padding:18}}>

      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={13}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Header */}

      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>

        <div>

          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800}}>Clinical Notes</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{notes.length} note{notes.length!==1?"s":""} · {notes.filter(n=>n.s==="draft").length} draft</div>

        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>

          <button onClick={()=>setStage("new")} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <Sparkles size={13}/>AI Note Assistant

          </button>

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Notes list */}

      {notes.map((n,i)=>{

        const sc={draft:{bg:"#fffbeb",b:C.amber,l:"DRAFT",Icon:PenLine},locked:{bg:"#f8fafc",b:"#94a3b8",l:"LOCKED",Icon:Lock}}[n.s];

        return(

          <div key={n.id} style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${sc.b}`,borderRadius:11,padding:"12px 14px",marginBottom:10}}>

            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:6}}>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

                <sc.Icon size={11} color={sc.b}/>

                <Chip color={sc.b}>{sc.l}</Chip>

                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{n.date}</span>

                {n.aiGenerated&&<span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>✦ AI</span>}

                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{n.apptType}</span>

              </div>

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{n.by}</span>

                {n.s==="draft"&&<button onClick={()=>finaliseNote(n.id)} style={{padding:"3px 9px",border:"none",borderRadius:6,background:C.teal,color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>Finalise</button>}

                {n.s==="draft"&&<button onClick={()=>deleteNote(n.id)} style={{padding:"3px 7px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>✕</button>}

              </div>

            </div>

            {n.body?<div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.7,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",background:"#f9fafb",borderRadius:7,padding:"8px 10px",maxHeight:120,overflow:"hidden"}}>{n.body.slice(0,280)}{n.body.length>280?"…":""}</div>

              :<div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontStyle:"italic"}}>Note content — click to view</div>}

            {n.s==="draft"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#92400e",marginTop:5}}>⏱ Draft — not yet part of the official record</div>}

            {n.s==="locked"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:5}}>🔒 Locked 24h after finalisation · Approved by {n.approvedBy||n.by}</div>}

          </div>

        );

      })}

      {/* Hidden audit log — manager/admin only, small link */}

      <div style={{marginTop:16,textAlign:"right"}}>

        <button onClick={()=>setShowAudit(v=>!v)} style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"underline"}}>

          {showAudit?"Hide":"View"} AI audit log ({auditLog.length})

        </button>

        {showAudit&&auditLog.length>0&&<div style={{marginTop:8,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:9,padding:"10px 12px",textAlign:"left"}}>

          {auditLog.map(a=>(

            <div key={a.id} style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:6,paddingBottom:6,borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>

              <div style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#475569"}}>{a.action} · {new Date(a.at).toLocaleString("en-GB")}</div>

              <div>Patient: {a.patient} · Dentist: {a.dentist} · Type: {a.apptType}</div>

              <div style={{color:a.identical?"#94a3b8":"#0d9488"}}>{a.identical?"Note approved unchanged from AI draft":"Note was edited before approval"}</div>

            </div>

          ))}

        </div>}

      </div>

    </div>

  );

  // ── STAGE: NEW — select appointment type & enter notes ──

  if(stage==="new")return(

    <div style={{padding:18}}>

      {/* Progress stepper */}

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,marginBottom:20,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:10,padding:4}}>

        {["Type","Notes","Review","Done"].map((s,i)=>(

          <div key={s} style={{flex:1,textAlign:"center",padding:"6px",borderRadius:8,background:i===0?"#fff":"transparent",boxShadow:i===0?"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08)":"none"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:i===0?"#0d9488":"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{s}</div>

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

      <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>1 — Select Appointment Type</div>

      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>This helps the AI generate a correctly structured note</div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:6,marginBottom:20}}>

        {APPT_TYPES.map(t=>(

          <button key={t} onClick={()=>setApptType(t)}

            style={{padding:"7px 13px",borderRadius:8,border:`1.5px solid ${apptType===t?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:apptType===t?"#0d9488":"#fff",color:apptType===t?"#fff":"#475569",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:apptType===t?700:400,transition:"all .1s"}}>

            {t}

          </button>

        ))}

      </div>

      <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>2 — Add Rough Notes</div>

      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:10}}>Type notes, dictate, or record — the AI will structure them into a proper clinical note</div>

      {/* Voice recording */}

      <div style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 14px",marginBottom:12}}>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:8}}>

          <button onClick={isRecording?stopRecording:startRecording}

            style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:isRecording?"#dc2626":"#f8fafc",color:isRecording?"#fff":"#475569",border:`1.5px solid ${isRecording?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>

            <Mic size={13} style={{animation:isRecording?"waitPulse 1s infinite":"none"}}/>{isRecording?"Stop Recording":"🎙 Record Voice"}

          </button>

          {isRecording&&<span style={{fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>{fmt(recordSec)}</span>}

          {!isRecording&&recordSec>0&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600}}>✓ {fmt(recordSec)} recorded</span>}

        </div>

        <textarea value={roughNotes} onChange={e=>setRoughNotes(e.target.value)}

          placeholder="Or type rough notes here… e.g. 'patient has cold sensitivity UR6, caries occlusal surface, composite done, BPE 1'"

          rows={5} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:1.7,boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>

        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:4}}>Rough notes are only used to generate the AI draft — they are not saved to the patient record</div>

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>

        <button onClick={()=>setStage("list")} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>← Back</button>

        <button onClick={generateNote} disabled={!apptType||!roughNotes.trim()}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",background:(!apptType||!roughNotes.trim())?"#e2e8f0":"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:(!apptType||!roughNotes.trim())?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:(!apptType||!roughNotes.trim())?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>

          <Sparkles size={14}/>Generate Clinical Note with AI

        </button>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

  // ── STAGE: GENERATING ──

  if(stage==="generating")return(

    <div style={{padding:40,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:16}}>

      <div style={{width:56,height:56,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>

        <Sparkles size={24} color="#fff" style={{animation:"spin 2s linear infinite"}}/>

      </div>

      <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>Generating Clinical Note…</div>

      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",textAlign:"center",maxWidth:300}}>AI is structuring your notes into a professional clinical record for {patient.name}</div>

      <style>{`@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}} @keyframes waitPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(.7)}}`}</style>

    </div>

  );

  // ── STAGE: REVIEW — edit and approve ──

  if(stage==="review")return(

    <div style={{padding:18}}>

      {/* Stepper */}

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,marginBottom:20,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:10,padding:4}}>

        {["Type","Notes","Review","Done"].map((s,i)=>(

          <div key={s} style={{flex:1,textAlign:"center",padding:"6px",borderRadius:8,background:i===2?"#fff":"transparent",boxShadow:i===2?"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08)":"none"}}>

            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:i<=2?"#0d9488":"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{s}</div>

          </div>

        ))}

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>

        <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:7,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>

          <Sparkles size={14} color="#fff"/>

        </div>

        <div>

          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800}}>3 — Review & Edit AI Draft</div>

          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{apptType} · {patient.name} · Clinician must approve before saving</div>

        </div>

      </div>

      {/* Diff indicator */}

      {editedDraft!==aiDraft&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:7,marginBottom:10,fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:600,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>

        <PenLine size={11}/>You have edited the AI draft — your changes are highlighted

      </div>}

      {editedDraft===aiDraft&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0f9ff",border:"1px solid #bae6fd",borderRadius:7,marginBottom:10,fontSize:10,color:"#0369a1"}}>

        AI draft unchanged — edit as needed before approving

      </div>}

      <textarea value={editedDraft} onChange={e=>setEditedDraft(e.target.value)}

        rows={16} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px 14px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"'Courier New',monospace",outline:"none",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:1.8,boxSizing:"border-box",color:"#1e293b",background:"#fff"}}/>

      <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:12}}>

        ✦ AI generated · Clinician must review and approve · Raw notes are not saved · Approval creates an automatic audit entry

      </div>

      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>

        <button onClick={()=>setStage("new")} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>← Edit Notes</button>

        <button onClick={()=>{setEditedDraft(aiDraft);}} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>↺ Reset to AI</button>

        <button onClick={approveAndSave}

          style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#059669)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(13,148,136,.3)"}}>

          <Check size={15}/>Approve & Save to Clinical Notes

        </button>

      </div>

    </div>

  );

  return null;

}
