function DentalWorkspace({patient,user}){
  // ── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const [teeth,setTeeth]=useState(()=>{const d={};[...Array(32)].forEach((_,i)=>{const n=[18,17,16,15,14,13,12,11,21,22,23,24,25,26,27,28,48,47,46,45,44,43,42,41,31,32,33,34,35,36,37,38][i];d[n]={cond:null,surfaces:{b:null,l:null,m:null,d:null,o:null},planned:[],completed:[]};});return d;});
  const [selTeeth,setSelTeeth]=useState([]); // multi-select
  const [activeTool,setActiveTool]=useState("exam");
  const [txPlan,setTxPlan]=useState([
    {id:"T1",teeth:["36"],surfaces:["O"],code:"400",label:"Composite — 1 Surface",status:"planned",nhs:true,fee:73.50,by:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"14 May 2026"},
    {id:"T2",teeth:[],surfaces:[],code:"200",label:"Scale & Polish",status:"planned",nhs:true,fee:0,by:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"14 May 2026"},
    {id:"T3",teeth:["16"],surfaces:["MOD"],code:"401",label:"Composite — 3 Surface",status:"completed",nhs:true,fee:73.50,by:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"15 Jan 2026"},
  ]);
  const [searchQ,setSearchQ]=useState("");
  const [openGroup,setOpenGroup]=useState("DIAGNOSTIC");
  const [favs,setFavs]=useState(new Set(["100","200","400","410","800"]));
  const [rightTab,setRightTab]=useState("tooth"); // tooth | history | notes | costs
  const [noteText,setNoteText]=useState("");
  const [noteTemplate,setNoteTemplate]=useState("");
  const [chartMode,setChartMode]=useState("chart"); // chart | perio | softtissue
  const [toastMsg,setToastMsg]=useState(null);
  const [selSurfaces,setSelSurfaces]=useState(new Set());
  const [showFavs,setShowFavs]=useState(true);
  const [showSearch,setShowSearch]=useState(false);
  const M=60000;

  const toast=m=>{setToastMsg(m);setTimeout(()=>setToastMsg(null),2200);};
  const allCodes=UK_TX.flatMap(g=>g.codes.map(c=>({...c,group:g.group,icon:g.icon})));
  const favCodes=allCodes.filter(c=>favs.has(c.c));
  const searchCodes=searchQ.length>1?allCodes.filter(c=>c.l.toLowerCase().includes(searchQ.toLowerCase())||c.c.includes(searchQ)):[];
  const hasSel=selTeeth.length>0;
  const selTooth=selTeeth[selTeeth.length-1]||null;
  const selToothData=selTooth?teeth[selTooth]:null;

  const toggleTooth=n=>{
    setSelTeeth(p=>{
      if(p.includes(n))return p.filter(x=>x!==n);
      return [...p,n];
    });
    setSelSurfaces(new Set());
    setRightTab("tooth");
  };
  const toggleSurf=s=>setSelSurfaces(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.has(s)?n.delete(s):n.add(s);return n;});

  const addTx=(code)=>{
    if(!hasSel){toast("Select one or more teeth first");return;}
    const surfaces=selSurfaces.size>0?[...selSurfaces]:[];
    const newTx={id:"T"+Date.now(),teeth:selTeeth.map(String),surfaces,code:code.c,label:code.l,status:"planned",nhs:code.nhs,fee:code.fee||0,by:user?.name||"Dr. S. Patel",date:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"})};
    setTxPlan(p=>[...p,newTx]);
    // Mark condition on teeth
    selTeeth.forEach(n=>setTeeth(p=>({...p,[n]:{...p[n],planned:[...p[n].planned,code.c]}})));
    toast(`✓ ${code.l} added for tooth ${selTeeth.join(", ")}`);
  };
  const markComplete=id=>{
    setTxPlan(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,status:"completed"}:t));
    toast("Treatment marked complete");
  };
  const removeTx=id=>setTxPlan(p=>p.filter(t=>t.id!==id));
  const toggleFav=c=>{setFavs(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.has(c)?n.delete(c):n.add(c);return n;});};

  const NOTE_TEMPLATES=[
    {l:"Routine Exam",t:"Patient presents for routine examination.\n\nBPE: [SCORE]\nSoft tissue: NAD\nOHI given: Yes\n\nFindings: [FINDINGS]\n\nTreatment provided: [TX]\n\nPlan: Review in 6 months."},
    {l:"Composite",t:"[TOOTH] composite restoration.\n\nLocal anaesthetic: [LA]\nIsolation: [ISOLATION]\nCavity preparation and placement of composite resin restoration.\nOcclusion checked and adjusted.\n\nPatient comfortable."},
    {l:"Extraction",t:"Extraction of [TOOTH].\n\nLA: [TYPE] administered.\nTooth extracted with [FORCEPS/ELEVATOR].\nSocket irrigated. Post-op instructions given."},
    {l:"RCT",t:"Root canal treatment [TOOTH] — Session [N].\n\nAccess cavity prepared. Canal patency confirmed.\nWorking length: [WL]mm.\nCanals irrigated with NaOCl.\nCanals dressed with [MEDICAMENT]."},
  ];

  const UPPER=[18,17,16,15,14,13,12,11,21,22,23,24,25,26,27,28];
  const LOWER=[48,47,46,45,44,43,42,41,31,32,33,34,35,36,37,38];
  const toothType=n=>{const d=n%10;return d<=2?"incisor":d===3?"canine":d<=5?"premolar":"molar";};
  const palmerName=n=>{const q=Math.floor(n/10);const num=n%10;const qs={1:"UR",2:"UL",4:"LR",3:"LL"};return `${qs[q]||""}${num}`;};
  const surfaceLabel={b:"Buccal",l:"Lingual",m:"Mesial",d:"Distal",o:"Occlusal"};

  const COND_COLORS={caries:"#dc2626",filling:"#0369a1",crown:"#d97706",rct:"#7c3aed",bridge:"#0d9488",veneer:"#db2777",implant:"#2563eb",watch:"#ca8a04",planned:"#f59e0b",completed:"#16a34a"};

  // Tooth SVG — Dentally style: clear 5-zone with rounded corners
  const ToothSVG=({num,selected,active})=>{
    const W=38;const H=38;const OX=11;const OY=11;
    const td=teeth[num]||{cond:null,surfaces:{},planned:[],completed:[]};
    const isMiss=td.cond==="miss";
    const hasPlanned=td.planned.length>0;
    const hasComplete=td.completed.length>0;
    const isSel=selected;

    const zones=[
      {id:"b",d:`M0,0 L${W},0 L${W-OX},${OY} L${OX},${OY} Z`},
      {id:"l",d:`M0,${H} L${W},${H} L${W-OX},${H-OY} L${OX},${H-OY} Z`},
      {id:"m",d:`M0,0 L0,${H} L${OX},${H-OY} L${OX},${OY} Z`},
      {id:"d",d:`M${W},0 L${W},${H} L${W-OX},${H-OY} L${W-OX},${OY} Z`},
      {id:"o",d:`M${OX},${OY} L${W-OX},${OY} L${W-OX},${H-OY} L${OX},${H-OY} Z`},
    ];

    return(
      <svg width={W} height={H} viewBox={`0 0 ${W} ${H}`} style={{display:"block",cursor:"pointer",borderRadius:4}}
        onClick={()=>toggleTooth(num)}>
        {/* Base */}
        <rect x={0} y={0} width={W} height={H} rx={3}
          fill={isMiss?"#f1f5f9":isSel?"#e0f7f5":"#fff"}
          stroke={isSel?"#0d9488":isMiss?"#fca5a5":"#d1d5db"}
          strokeWidth={isSel?2:1}/>
        {/* Surface zones */}
        {!isMiss&&zones.map(z=>{
          const cond=td.surfaces[z.id];
          const isSelSurf=active&&selSurfaces.has(z.id);
          const fill=cond?COND_COLORS[cond]||"#94a3b8":isSelSurf?"#0d9488":hasPlanned?"#fef9c3":"transparent";
          return(
            <path key={z.id} d={z.d} fill={fill} fillOpacity={cond?0.8:isSelSurf?0.5:hasPlanned?0.6:0}
              stroke={cond?COND_COLORS[cond]:"#d1d5db"} strokeWidth={0.8}
              style={{cursor:active?"crosshair":"pointer"}}
              onClick={e=>{if(active&&isSel){e.stopPropagation();toggleSurf(z.id);}}}
              onMouseEnter={e=>{if(!cond&&!isSelSurf)e.currentTarget.setAttribute("fill-opacity","0.3");}}
              onMouseLeave={e=>{if(!cond&&!isSelSurf)e.currentTarget.setAttribute("fill-opacity","0");}}/>
          );
        })}
        {/* Missing X */}
        {isMiss&&<><line x1={5} y1={5} x2={W-5} y2={H-5} stroke="#fca5a5" strokeWidth={2} strokeLinecap="round"/>
          <line x1={W-5} y1={5} x2={5} y2={H-5} stroke="#fca5a5" strokeWidth={2} strokeLinecap="round"/></>}
        {/* Planned dot */}
        {hasPlanned&&!isMiss&&<circle cx={W-5} cy={5} r={3.5} fill="#f59e0b" stroke="#fff" strokeWidth={0.8}/>}
        {/* Completed dot */}
        {hasComplete&&!isMiss&&<circle cx={5} cy={5} r={3.5} fill="#16a34a" stroke="#fff" strokeWidth={0.8}/>}
        {/* Selection ring */}
        {isSel&&<rect x={0.5} y={0.5} width={W-1} height={H-1} rx={3} fill="none" stroke="#0d9488" strokeWidth={2} strokeDasharray="4,2"/>}
      </svg>
    );
  };

  // Perio chart
  const PerioPocket=({tooth,val,setVal})=>{
    const c=val>=5?"#dc2626":val>=4?"#f59e0b":"#16a34a";
    return(
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:2}}>
        <div style={{width:26,height:26,borderRadius:5,background:c+"20",border:`1.5px solid ${c}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:c,cursor:"pointer"}}
          onClick={()=>setVal(tooth,(val%7)+1)}>{val}</div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const [perioPockets,setPerioPockets]=useState(()=>{const d={};UPPER.concat(LOWER).forEach(n=>{d[n]=Math.floor(Math.random()*3)+1;});return d;});

  return(
  <div style={{display:"flex",height:"100%",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f8fafc",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
    {toastMsg&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",padding:"8px 20px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:900,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{toastMsg}</div>}

    {/* ══ LEFT PANEL — Treatment Library ══ */}
    <div style={{width:220,flexShrink:0,background:"#1a2234",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",borderRight:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}}>
      {/* Search */}
      <div style={{padding:"10px 10px 6px",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{position:"relative"}}>
          <Search size={11} style={{position:"absolute",left:9,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)"}}/>
          <input value={searchQ} onChange={e=>{setSearchQ(e.target.value);setShowSearch(e.target.value.length>0);}}
            placeholder="Search treatments…"
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px 7px 27px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:8,color:"#fff",fontSize:11,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Favourites */}
      {!showSearch&&<div style={{flexShrink:0}}>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowFavs(v=>!v)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 12px",background:"rgba(255,215,0,.07)",border:"none",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",textAlign:"left"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:11}}>⭐</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fbbf24",flex:1,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Favourites</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)"}}>{showFavs?"▲":"▼"}</span>
        </button>
        {showFavs&&<div>
          {favCodes.map(c=>(
            <div key={c.c} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",padding:"5px 10px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)",cursor:"pointer"}}
              onClick={()=>addTx(c)}
              onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}
              onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>
              <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();toggleFav(c.c);}} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#fbbf24",padding:0,flexShrink:0}}>★</button>
              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",fontFamily:"monospace",display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:1}}>
                  <span>{c.c}</span>
                  {c.nhs&&c.band&&<span style={{padding:"0px 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(29,78,216,.4)",color:"#93c5fd",fontWeight:700}}>B{c.band}</span>}
                  {!c.nhs&&<span style={{padding:"0px 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(124,58,237,.3)",color:"#c4b5fd",fontWeight:700}}>Pvt</span>}
                  <span>£{c.fee||0}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();addTx(c);}} title="Add to plan"
                style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:4,background:"rgba(13,148,136,.4)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:"#5eead4",fontSize:12,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>+</button>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>}
      </div>}

      {/* Search results */}
      {showSearch&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"5px 12px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em"}}>{searchCodes.length} results</div>
        {searchCodes.map(c=>(
          <div key={c.c} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",padding:"6px 10px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)",cursor:"pointer"}}
            onClick={()=>addTx(c)}
            onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}
            onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>
            <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();toggleFav(c.c);}} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:favs.has(c.c)?"#fbbf24":"rgba(255,255,255,.2)",padding:0,flexShrink:0}}>{favs.has(c.c)?"★":"☆"}</button>
            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.75)",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.l}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:2,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.35)",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{c.c}</span>
                  {c.nhs&&c.band?<span style={{fontSize:7,fontWeight:800,padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(29,78,216,.5)",color:"#93c5fd",lineHeight:"14px"}}>B{c.band}</span>:null}
                  {!c.nhs?<span style={{fontSize:7,fontWeight:800,padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(124,58,237,.4)",color:"#c4b5fd",lineHeight:"14px"}}>Pvt</span>:null}
                  <span style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.35)",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{c.fee||0}</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();addTx(c);}} style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:4,background:"rgba(13,148,136,.4)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:"#5eead4",fontSize:12,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>+</button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}

      {/* Treatment groups */}
      {!showSearch&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
        {UK_TX.map(grp=>(
          <div key={grp.group}>
            <button onClick={()=>setOpenGroup(g=>g===grp.group?null:grp.group)}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 12px",background:openGroup===grp.group?"rgba(13,148,136,.15)":"transparent",border:"none",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",textAlign:"left"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11}}>{grp.icon}</span>
              <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:openGroup===grp.group?"#5eead4":"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".05em"}}>{grp.group}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.25)"}}>{openGroup===grp.group?"▲":"▼"}</span>
            </button>
            {openGroup===grp.group&&grp.codes.map(c=>(
              <div key={c.c} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",padding:"6px 10px 6px 26px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)",cursor:"pointer"}}
                onClick={()=>addTx({...c,icon:grp.icon})}
                onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)"}
                onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>
                <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();toggleFav(c.c);}} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:favs.has(c.c)?"#fbbf24":"rgba(255,255,255,.18)",padding:0,flexShrink:0}}>{favs.has(c.c)?"★":"☆"}</button>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.l}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:2,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.35)",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{c.c}</span>
                  {c.nhs&&c.band?<span style={{fontSize:7,fontWeight:800,padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(29,78,216,.5)",color:"#93c5fd",lineHeight:"14px"}}>B{c.band}</span>:null}
                  {!c.nhs?<span style={{fontSize:7,fontWeight:800,padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3,background:"rgba(124,58,237,.4)",color:"#c4b5fd",lineHeight:"14px"}}>Pvt</span>:null}
                  <span style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.35)",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{c.fee||0}</span>
                  {DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]&&<span style={{fontSize:7,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"rgba(94,234,212,.55)",padding:"0 3px",borderRadius:2,background:"rgba(13,148,136,.2)"}}>{DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]}</span>}
                </div>
                </div>
                <button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();addTx({...c,icon:grp.icon});}} style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:4,background:"rgba(13,148,136,.3)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:"#5eead4",fontSize:12,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>+</button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}

      {/* Bottom status */}
      <div style={{padding:"8px 10px",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",textAlign:"center"}}>
          {hasSel?`${selTeeth.length} tooth selected · Click to add treatment`:"Select a tooth to begin"}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* ══ CENTER PANEL — Odontogram ══ */}
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",minWidth:0}}>

      {/* Chart mode toolbar */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 12px",display:"flex",gap:0,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0,height:40}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,flex:1}}>
          {[{id:"chart",l:"🦷 Dental Chart"},{id:"perio",l:"📊 Perio"},{id:"softtissue",l:"🫦 Soft Tissue & Pathology"}].map(m=>(
            <button key={m.id} onClick={()=>setChartMode(m.id)} style={{padding:"0 14px",height:40,border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${chartMode===m.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:chartMode===m.id?700:400,color:chartMode===m.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
              {m.l}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        {/* Condition legend */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
          {Object.entries(COND_COLORS).slice(0,6).map(([k,c])=>(
            <div key={k} style={{display:"flex",gap:3,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:2,background:c}}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{k}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Chart view */}
      {chartMode==="chart"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",padding:"16px 12px",gap:4}}>

        {/* Palmer notation labels — Upper */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:1,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
          {[{n:"UR8",w:38},{n:"UR7",w:38},{n:"UR6",w:38},{n:"UR5",w:38},{n:"UR4",w:38},{n:"UR3",w:38},{n:"UR2",w:38},{n:"UR1",w:38}].map(t=><div key={t.n} style={{width:t.w,textAlign:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.n}</div>)}
          <div style={{width:16}}/>
          {[{n:"UL1",w:38},{n:"UL2",w:38},{n:"UL3",w:38},{n:"UL4",w:38},{n:"UL5",w:38},{n:"UL6",w:38},{n:"UL7",w:38},{n:"UL8",w:38}].map(t=><div key={t.n} style={{width:t.w,textAlign:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.n}</div>)}
        </div>

        {/* Upper arch */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:1,alignItems:"flex-end",padding:"6px 8px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:"12px 12px 0 0",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderBottom:"none",boxShadow:"0 -2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)"}}>
          {UPPER.map((n,i)=>(
            <div key={n} style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <ToothSVG num={n} selected={selTeeth.includes(n)} active={hasSel&&selTeeth.includes(n)}/>
            </div>
          ))}
          <div style={{width:16,flexShrink:0}}/>
        </div>

        {/* Midline */}
        <div style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:680,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,background:"#f8fafc",borderLeft:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRight:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"4px 8px",zIndex:1}}>
          <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:"#e2e8f0"}}/>
          <span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em",whiteSpace:"nowrap",padding:"2px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc"}}>Upper · Lower</span>
          <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:"#e2e8f0"}}/>
        </div>

        {/* Lower arch */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:1,alignItems:"flex-start",padding:"6px 8px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:"0 0 12px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:"none",boxShadow:"0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)"}}>
          {LOWER.map((n,i)=>(
            <div key={n}>
              <ToothSVG num={n} selected={selTeeth.includes(n)} active={hasSel&&selTeeth.includes(n)}/>
            </div>
          ))}
          <div style={{width:16,flexShrink:0}}/>
        </div>

        {/* Palmer labels — Lower */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:1,alignItems:"center",marginTop:2}}>
          {[{n:"LR8",w:38},{n:"LR7",w:38},{n:"LR6",w:38},{n:"LR5",w:38},{n:"LR4",w:38},{n:"LR3",w:38},{n:"LR2",w:38},{n:"LR1",w:38}].map(t=><div key={t.n} style={{width:t.w,textAlign:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.n}</div>)}
          <div style={{width:16}}/>
          {[{n:"LL1",w:38},{n:"LL2",w:38},{n:"LL3",w:38},{n:"LL4",w:38},{n:"LL5",w:38},{n:"LL6",w:38},{n:"LL7",w:38},{n:"LL8",w:38}].map(t=><div key={t.n} style={{width:t.w,textAlign:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.n}</div>)}
        </div>

        {/* Treatment plan summary at bottom of chart */}
        {txPlan.length>0&&<div style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:700,marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>Treatment Plan ({txPlan.filter(t=>t.status==="planned").length} planned · {txPlan.filter(t=>t.status==="completed").length} complete)</div>
          {txPlan.map(tx=>(
            <div key={tx.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"6px 10px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:8,marginBottom:4,border:`1px solid ${tx.status==="completed"?"#bbf7d0":"#e2e8f0"}`,opacity:tx.status==="completed"?0.7:1}}>
              <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:2,background:tx.status==="completed"?"#16a34a":"#f59e0b",flexShrink:0}}/>
              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:tx.status==="completed"?"#94a3b8":"#374151",textDecoration:tx.status==="completed"?"line-through":"none"}}>{tx.label}</span>
                {tx.teeth.length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:6}}>Tooth {tx.teeth.join(", ")}{tx.surfaces.length>0?` — ${tx.surfaces.join("")}`:""}</span>}
              </div>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:tx.nhs?"#dbeafe":"#ede9fe",color:tx.nhs?"#1d4ed8":"#7c3aed"}}>{tx.nhs?"NHS":"Pvt"}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151"}}>£{tx.fee.toFixed(2)}</span>
              {tx.status==="planned"&&<button onClick={()=>markComplete(tx.id)} title="Mark complete" style={{padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",background:"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:700}}>✓</button>}
              <button onClick={()=>removeTx(tx.id)} style={{padding:"2px 5px",borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #fecaca",background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:800}}>✕</button>
            </div>
          ))}
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"flex-end",gap:12,padding:"6px 10px",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>
            <span style={{color:"#64748b"}}>NHS: £{txPlan.filter(t=>t.nhs).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0).toFixed(2)}</span>
            <span style={{color:"#7c3aed"}}>Private: £{txPlan.filter(t=>!t.nhs).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0).toFixed(2)}</span>
            <span style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>Total: £{txPlan.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0).toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>}

      </div>}

      {/* Perio view */}
      {chartMode==="perio"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>BPE / Perio Chart</div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:16,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>BPE Scores</div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(6,1fr)",gap:8,marginBottom:8}}>
            {[{s:"UR",v:1},{s:"UF",v:2},{s:"UL",v:2},{s:"LR",v:1},{s:"LF",v:1},{s:"LL",v:1}].map(b=>{
              const bc=b.v>=3?"#dc2626":b.v===2?"#f59e0b":"#16a34a";
              return(<div key={b.s} style={{textAlign:"center"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>{b.s}</div><div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:10,background:bc+"15",border:`2px solid ${bc}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:bc,margin:"0 auto"}}>{b.v}</div></div>);
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:16,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Pocket Depths — click to increment</div>
          {[{label:"Upper",row:UPPER.slice(0,8)},{label:"Lower",row:LOWER.slice(0,8)}].map(arch=>(
            <div key={arch.label} style={{marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:6}}>{arch.label}</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                {arch.row.map(n=>(
                  <div key={n} style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>{palmerName(n)}</div>
                    <PerioPocket tooth={n} val={perioPockets[n]||1} setVal={(t,v)=>setPerioPockets(p=>({...p,[t]:v}))}/>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Soft tissue view */}
      {chartMode==="softtissue"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Soft Tissue Examination</div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {[{area:"Lips & commissures",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Buccal mucosa (L+R)",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Tongue (dorsum + ventral)",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Floor of mouth",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Hard & soft palate",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Oropharynx & tonsils",finding:"NAD",editable:true},{area:"Gingiva",finding:"Mild generalised gingivitis",editable:true},{area:"Lymph nodes (extra-oral)",finding:"NAD — no palpable lymphadenopathy",editable:true}].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{width:200,fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",flexShrink:0}}>{r.area}</span>
              <input defaultValue={r.finding} style={{flex:1,border:"none",outline:"none",fontSize:11,color:r.finding==="NAD"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626",fontWeight:r.finding==="NAD"?400:600,background:"transparent",cursor:"text"}}/>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>

    {/* ══ RIGHT PANEL — Contextual Details ══ */}
    <div style={{width:280,flexShrink:0,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",background:"#fff",borderLeft:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {/* Right panel tabs */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",flexShrink:0}}>
        {[{id:"tooth",l:"Tooth"},{id:"notes",l:"Notes"},{id:"costs",l:"Costs"},{id:"history",l:"History"}].map(t=>(
          <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setRightTab(t.id)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px 4px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${rightTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:rightTab===t.id?700:400,color:rightTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b"}}>
            {t.l}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Tooth details */}
      {rightTab==="tooth"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
        {!selTooth&&<div style={{padding:24,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:8}}>🦷</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:4}}>No tooth selected</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11}}>Click a tooth on the chart to view details and add treatments</div>
        </div>}
        {selTooth&&<>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",background:"#f0fffe"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
              <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:9,background:"#0d9488",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{selTooth}</div>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488"}}>{palmerName(selTooth)}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{toothType(selTooth)} · FDI {selTooth}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            {selTeeth.length>1&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",background:"#0d9488"+"15",padding:"3px 8px",borderRadius:5}}>Multi-select: {selTeeth.join(", ")}</div>}
          </div>

          {/* Surface selector */}
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Surfaces</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5}}>
              {["b","l","m","d","o"].map(s=>{
                const cond=selToothData?.surfaces?.[s];
                const isSel=selSurfaces.has(s);
                const col=cond?COND_COLORS[cond]||"#94a3b8":null;
                return(
                  <button key={s} onClick={()=>toggleSurf(s)}
                    style={{flex:1,padding:"8px 4px",borderRadius:7,border:`1.5px solid ${isSel?"#0d9488":col||"#e2e8f0"}`,background:isSel?"#0d9488":col?col+"20":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:isSel?"#fff":col||"#64748b"}}>{s.toUpperCase()}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:8,color:isSel?"rgba(255,255,255,.7)":col?"rgba(0,0,0,.5)":"#94a3b8"}}>{surfaceLabel[s].slice(0,3)}</div>
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Existing conditions */}
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Conditions</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:5}}>
              {Object.entries(COND_COLORS).map(([k,c])=>{
                const isActive=selToothData?.cond===k;
                return(
                  <button key={k} onClick={()=>setTeeth(p=>({...p,[selTooth]:{...p[selTooth],cond:p[selTooth].cond===k?null:k}}))}
                    style={{padding:"3px 8px",borderRadius:6,border:`1.5px solid ${isActive?c:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:isActive?c+"20":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,fontWeight:isActive?700:400,color:isActive?c:"#64748b",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>
                    {k}
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Quick add treatments */}
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>Quick Add Treatment</div>
            {favCodes.slice(0,6).map(c=>(
              <button key={c.c} onClick={()=>{addTx(c);toast("✓ "+c.l+(selTooth?" — tooth "+selTooth:""));}}
                style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"7px 9px",marginBottom:4,borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left",transition:"all .1s"}}
                onMouseEnter={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe";e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#0d9488";e.currentTarget.style.transform="translateX(2px)";}}
                onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff";e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#e2e8f0";e.currentTarget.style.transform="none";}}>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#0f172a",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.l}</div>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,marginTop:2,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{c.c}</span>
                    {c.nhs&&c.band&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"0px 5px",borderRadius:3,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>Band {c.band}</span>}
                    {!c.nhs&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"0px 5px",borderRadius:3,background:"#ede9fe",color:"#7c3aed"}}>Private</span>}
                    <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{c.fee||0}</span>
                    {DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488",background:"#f0fffe",padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3,border:"1px solid #99f6e4"}}>{DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]}</span>}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{width:24,height:24,borderRadius:6,background:"#0d9488",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:16,color:"#fff",fontWeight:800,lineHeight:1}}>+</span>
                </div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>}
      </div>}

      {/* Notes — modern panel */}
      {rightTab==="notes"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f8fafc"}}>
        {/* Template picker */}
        <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:6}}>Templates</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {NOTE_TEMPLATES.map(t=>(
              <button key={t.l} onClick={()=>{setNoteTemplate(t.l);setNoteText(t.t);}}
                style={{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:6,border:`1.5px solid ${noteTemplate===t.l?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:noteTemplate===t.l?"#0d9488":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:noteTemplate===t.l?700:400,color:noteTemplate===t.l?"#fff":"#64748b",transition:"all .1s"}}>
                {t.l}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Word count bar */}
        {noteText&&<div style={{padding:"4px 12px",background:"#f0fffe",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>{noteText.trim().split(" ").filter(s=>s.length>0).length} words</span>
          {selTooth&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>Tooth {selTooth}</span>}
        </div>}
        {/* Textarea */}
        <textarea value={noteText} onChange={e=>setNoteText(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="Type clinical note freely, or pick a template above…&#10;&#10;Use brackets [ ] for fields to complete."
          style={{flex:1,padding:"14px",border:"none",outline:"none",fontSize:12,fontFamily:"ui-monospace,'Cascadia Code','Fira Code',monospace",lineHeight:1.8,resize:"none",color:"#1e293b",background:"#fafafa"}}/>
        {/* Toolbar */}
        <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginBottom:6}}>
            {["NAD","BPE: ","OHI given","Pt comfortable","LA administered","Consent obtained"].map(s=>(
              <button key={s} onClick={()=>setNoteText(n=>n+(n&&n.slice(-1)!=="\n"?"\n":"")+s+" ")}
                style={{padding:"3px 8px",borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                +{s}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{if(!noteText.trim()){toast("Nothing to save");return;}toast("✓ Note locked & saved");setNoteText("");setNoteTemplate("");}}
              style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              🔒 Lock & Save Note
            </button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setNoteText("");setNoteTemplate("");}}
              style={{padding:"8px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Clear</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Costs */}
      {rightTab==="costs"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"12px 14px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Cost Summary</div>
        {txPlan.map(tx=>(
          <div key={tx.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"6px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
            <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:2,background:tx.status==="completed"?"#16a34a":"#f59e0b",flexShrink:0}}/>
            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{tx.label}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{tx.status}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{tx.fee.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{marginTop:12,padding:"10px 0",borderTop:"2px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
          {[["NHS Total","#1d4ed8",txPlan.filter(t=>t.nhs).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0)],["Private Total","#7c3aed",txPlan.filter(t=>!t.nhs).reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0)],["Grand Total","#0d9488",txPlan.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.fee,0)]].map(([l,c,v])=>(
            <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"4px 0"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{l}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{v.toFixed(2)}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>toast("FP17 generated")} style={{width:"100%",marginTop:8,padding:"8px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Generate FP17</button>
      </div>}

      {/* History */}
      {rightTab==="history"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"12px 14px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Treatment History</div>
        {[
          {date:"15 Jan 2026",tx:"Crown — UR6",by:"Dr. S. Patel",status:"completed"},
          {date:"10 Jul 2025",tx:"Scale & Polish",by:"Amy Grant",status:"completed"},
          {date:"14 May 2025",tx:"Composite — 36 O",by:"Dr. S. Patel",status:"completed"},
          {date:"03 Feb 2025",tx:"Extraction — LL8",by:"Dr. M. Chen",status:"completed"},
        ].map((h,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{padding:"8px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
              <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:2,background:"#16a34a",flexShrink:0}}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{h.tx}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",paddingLeft:13}}>{h.date} · {h.by}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}
    </div>
  </div>);
}

function ChartingPage({openPatient,embeddedPatient}){
  return <DentalWorkspace patient={embeddedPatient||PATIENTS[0]} user={null}/>;
}


function PatientRecord({patient,onBack,defaultTab,user,openPatient}){

  const [tab,setTab]=useState(defaultTab||"overview");const [ep,setEp]=useState(patient.ep||{flags:[],notes:"",anxiety:1,triggers:[],dentistPref:"none",commsStyle:"brief",contactPref:"call",costSensitive:false,extraTime:false,waitNote:""});const [epSaved,setEpSaved]=useState(false);const [waMsg,setWaMsg]=useState("");const [waMsgs,setWaMsgs]=useState([{dir:"out",body:"Hi, reminder of your appointment tomorrow at 09:30 with Dr. Patel. Reply YES to confirm.",at:"Yesterday",st:"read"},{dir:"in",body:"YES confirmed!",at:"Yesterday"},{dir:"out",body:"Great, see you then! 🦷",at:"Yesterday",st:"read"}]);

  // ── Edit + Audit log ──────────────────────────────────────

  const [editingField,setEditingField]=useState(null);

  const [editVal,setEditVal]=useState("");

  const [patientDetails,setPatientDetails]=useState({

    ...patient,

    // Extended fields with defaults

    gender:       patient.gender||"Not specified",

    patientType:  patient.type||"nhs",
    // NHS region/workflow determined by practice contract — NOT by patient flag

    hygienist:    patient.hygienist||"Amy Grant",

    evidence:     patient.evidence||"Seen",

    treatmentStart:patient.treatmentStart||"02 Jan 2026",

    treatmentEnd:  patient.treatmentEnd||"20 Feb 2026",

    recallDue:     patient.recallDue||"20 Aug 2026",

    gpName:        patient.gpName||"Dr. James Wilson",

    gpContact:     patient.gpContact||"Riverdale Medical Centre · 0207 222 3333",

    referredFrom:  patient.referredFrom||"Existing Patient",

    marketingSms:  patient.marketingSms!==undefined?patient.marketingSms:true,

    marketingEmail:patient.marketingEmail!==undefined?patient.marketingEmail:true,

    marketingLetter:patient.marketingLetter!==undefined?patient.marketingLetter:false,

    exceptions:    patient.exceptions||[],

    familyId:      patient.familyId||("FAM-"+patient.id+"-001"),

    familyMembers: patient.familyMembers||[

      {id:"FM1",name:"Carol Mills",relation:"Partner",dob:"05 Jun 1987"},

      {id:"FM2",name:"Ella Mills",relation:"Child",dob:"12 Mar 2016"},

    ],

  });

  const [auditToast,setAuditToast]=useState(null);

  const doAuditToast=m=>{setAuditToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setAuditToast(null),2500);};
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const [patientAudit,setPatientAudit]=useState(PATIENT_AUDIT_LOG.filter(e=>e.pid===patient.id));

  const [deleteModal,setDeleteModal]=useState(null); // {type:"record"|"field", field?:str, label?:str}

  const [deleteReason,setDeleteReason]=useState("");

  const [deletionReqs,setDeletionReqs]=useState(DELETION_REQUESTS.filter(r=>r.pid===patient.id));

  const [addFamilyModal,setAddFamilyModal]=useState(false);

  const [familyForm,setFamilyForm]=useState({});

  const startEdit=(field,val)=>{setEditingField(field);setEditVal(String(val||""));};

  const commitEdit=(field,label)=>{

    const oldVal=String(patientDetails[field]||"");

    const newVal=editVal.trim();

    if(oldVal===newVal){setEditingField(null);return;}

    setPatientDetails(p=>({...p,[field]:newVal}));

    const entry={id:"AE"+Date.now(),pid:patient.id,type:"edit",field:label||field,oldVal,newVal,by:"U2",byName:"Current User",at:"Just now",date:new Date().toISOString()};

    PATIENT_AUDIT_LOG=[entry,...PATIENT_AUDIT_LOG];

    setPatientAudit(p=>[entry,...p]);

    setEditingField(null);

    doAuditToast(`✓ ${label||field} updated — logged`);

  };

  const requestDeletion=()=>{

    if(!deleteReason.trim())return;

    const req={id:"DR"+Date.now(),pid:patient.id,patientName:patientDetails.name,type:deleteModal.type==="record"?"record":`field:${deleteModal.field}`,requestedBy:"U2",requestedByName:"Current User",at:"Just now",status:"pending",reason:deleteReason,managedBy:null,managedAt:null,managerNote:null};

    DELETION_REQUESTS=[req,...DELETION_REQUESTS];

    setDeletionReqs(p=>[req,...p]);

    setDeleteModal(null);setDeleteReason("");

    doAuditToast("🔐 Deletion request sent to Manager for approval");

  };

  const sendWA=()=>{if(!waMsg.trim())return;setWaMsgs(p=>[...p,{dir:"out",body:waMsg,at:"Now",st:"sent"}]);setWaMsg("");};

  const TABS=[
    {id:"details",  l:"Details",          icon:"👤"},
    {id:"chart",    l:"Chart",            icon:"🦷"},
    {id:"medical",  l:"Medical",          icon:"🩺"},
