        const docContent=showDocPreview.type==="Consent"
          ?`PATIENT CONSENT FORM

Patient: ${patient.name}
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}
Practice: East Molesey Dental Practice

I consent to the following treatment:
${showDocPreview.tx||"Composite restoration UR6"}

I understand the nature, risks, benefits and alternatives of the proposed treatment, and I have had the opportunity to ask questions.

Signed: ________________________      Date: ${showDocPreview.date}

Witnessed by (Clinician): Dr. S. Patel GDC No: 123456`
          :showDocPreview.type==="Referral"
          ?`Dear Colleague,

Re: ${patient.name}, DOB: ${patient.dob}
NHS No: ${patient.nhs||"N/A"}

Thank you for seeing this patient. I am referring them for specialist periodontal assessment.

Reason for referral: Persistent BPE 3 in the upper right sextant with clinical attachment loss. Patient has been maintaining good oral hygiene but has not responded adequately to basic periodontal treatment.

Medical history: ${patient.medAlerts?.length?"Please see attached alert summary":"No significant medical history"}

I would be grateful for your assessment and management.

Yours sincerely,
Dr. S. Patel, BDS
East Molesey Dental Practice`
          :`Document: ${showDocPreview.name}
Type: ${showDocPreview.type}
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}
Author: ${showDocPreview.by}

This document is stored securely in the patient record.`;
        const handleDownload=()=>{
          try{
            const blob=new Blob([docContent],{type:"text/plain;charset=utf-8"});
            const url=window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            const link=document.createElement("a");
            link.style.display="none";
            link.href=url;
            link.setAttribute("download",(showDocPreview.name||"document").replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]/g,"_")+".txt");
            document.body.appendChild(link);
            link.click();
            document.body.removeChild(link);
            setTimeout(()=>window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url),100);
            doToast("✓ Downloading "+showDocPreview.name);
          }catch(e){doToast("Download ready — check browser settings");}
        };
        const handlePrint=()=>{
          try{
            const printWin=window.open("","_blank","width=800,height=900");
            if(!printWin){doToast("Allow popups to print");return;}
            const css=[
              "body{font-family:Georgia,serif;max-width:680px;margin:48px auto;color:#1e293b;line-height:1.9;font-size:14px}",
              "h1{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#0d9488;margin:0 0 4px}",
              ".meta{color:#64748b;font-size:12px;margin:0 0 28px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0}",
              ".body{white-space:pre-wrap;font-size:13px;line-height:2}",
              ".footer{margin-top:40px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:11px;color:#94a3b8}"
            ].join("");
            const html=[
              "<html><head><title>"+showDocPreview.name+"</title>",
              "<style>"+css+"</style></head><body>",
              "<h1>"+showDocPreview.name+"</h1>",
              "<p class='meta'>"+showDocPreview.date+" &nbsp;·&nbsp; "+showDocPreview.by+" &nbsp;·&nbsp; East Molesey Dental Practice</p>",
              "<div class='body'>"+docContent+"</div>",
              "<div class='footer'>Printed from ProDentalConnect &nbsp;·&nbsp; "+new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB")+"</div>",
              "</body></html>"
            ].join("");
            printWin.document.write(html);
            printWin.document.close();
            printWin.onload=()=>{printWin.focus();printWin.print();};
            setTimeout(()=>{try{printWin.focus();printWin.print();}catch(e){}},400);
          }catch(e){doToast("Print failed — try download instead");}
        };
        return(
        <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(15,23,42,.6)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:20,width:580,maxHeight:"88vh",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",boxShadow:"0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35)"}}>
            {/* Header */}
            <div style={{padding:"18px 22px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
              <div style={{width:42,height:42,borderRadius:11,background:"#0d948815",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>{showDocPreview.icon}</div>
              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#0f172a",marginBottom:2}}>{showDocPreview.name}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>
                  <span>{showDocPreview.date}</span><span>·</span><span>{showDocPreview.by}</span>
                  <span style={{padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8",fontWeight:700}}>{showDocPreview.type}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={()=>setShowDocPreview(null)} style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:16,color:"#94a3b8",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>✕</button>
            </div>
            {/* Document body */}
            <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"24px 28px",background:"#fafafa"}}>
              <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,padding:"32px 36px",boxShadow:"0 1px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06)",border:"1px solid #f1f5f9",fontFamily:"Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif",fontSize:13,lineHeight:2,color:"#1e293b",whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",minHeight:300}}>
              {showDocPreview.type==="Consent"
                ?`PATIENT CONSENT FORM

Patient: ${patient.name}
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}
Practice: East Molesey Dental

I consent to the following treatment:
${showDocPreview.tx||"Composite restoration UR6"}

I have been informed of the risks, benefits, and alternatives.

Signed: ________________________
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}

Clinician: Dr. S. Patel`
                :showDocPreview.type==="Referral"
                ?`REFERRAL LETTER

To: Periodontal Specialist
From: Dr. S. Patel, BDS
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}
Re: ${patient.name}, DOB: ${patient.dob}

Dear Colleague,

I am writing to refer the above patient for specialist periodontal assessment. The patient presents with persistent BPE scores of 3 in the upper right sextant with evidence of attachment loss.

Medical history: ${patient.medAlerts?.length?"See attached alerts":"NAD"}

Kind regards,
Dr. S. Patel`
                :`DOCUMENT: ${showDocPreview.name}
Type: ${showDocPreview.type}
Date: ${showDocPreview.date}
Added by: ${showDocPreview.by}

[Document content would be displayed here]`}
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Footer toolbar */}
            <div style={{padding:"14px 22px",borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:"#fff",flexShrink:0,borderRadius:"0 0 20px 20px"}}>
              <button onClick={handleDownload} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",padding:"8px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#374151",fontWeight:600}}>
                <Download size={13}/> Download
              </button>
              <button onClick={handlePrint} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",padding:"8px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#374151",fontWeight:600}}>
                🖨 Print
              </button>
              <div style={{flex:1}}/>
              <button onClick={()=>setShowDocPreview(null)} style={{padding:"8px 18px",border:"none",borderRadius:9,background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Close</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })()}
    </>
  );

  return(
  <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",height:"100%",background:"#f1f5f9",overflow:"hidden"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:900,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={13}/>{toast}</div>}
    {MODALS}

    {/* ══ STICKY PATIENT HEADER ══ */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",flexShrink:0,position:"sticky",top:0,zIndex:50}}>
      <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center"}}>
        {/* Back */}
        <button onClick={onBack} style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)"}}>
          <ArrowLeft size={15} color="rgba(255,255,255,.7)"/>
        </button>
        {/* Avatar */}
        <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:12,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{patient.ini}</div>
        {/* Name & core info */}
        <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{patient.name}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:patient.type==="nhs"?"#1d4ed8":"#7c3aed",color:"#fff"}}>{(patient.type||"NHS").toUpperCase()}</span>
            {hasAlert&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",animation:"waitPulse 2s infinite"}}>⚠ ALERT</span>}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,marginTop:3,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {[
              {l:"DOB",v:patient.dob+" ("+ageStr+")"},
              patient.nhs&&{l:"NHS",v:patient.nhs},
              {l:"📞",v:patient.phone},
              {l:"👨‍⚕️",v:patient.dentist},
            ].filter(Boolean).map(i=>(
              <span key={i.l} style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}><span style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)"}}>{i.l} </span>{i.v}</span>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Balance */}
        <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>Balance</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:17,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace",color:isOverdue?"#fca5a5":patient.balance>0?"#fde68a":"#4ade80"}}>
            £{(patient.balance||0).toFixed(2)}
          </div>
          {isOverdue&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#fca5a5",fontWeight:700}}>OVERDUE</div>}
        </div>
        {/* Quick actions */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>
          {[
            {l:"Book",icon:"📅",fn:()=>doToast("Opening booking…")},
            {l:"Note",icon:"📝",fn:()=>setTab("notes")},
            {l:"Chart",icon:"🦷",fn:()=>setTab("chart")},
            {l:"Tx",icon:"💊",fn:()=>setTab("plans")},
            {l:"Pay",icon:"💷",fn:()=>setTab("accounts")},
          ].map(a=>(
            <button key={a.l} onClick={a.fn} title={a.l} style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:1,padding:"5px 8px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",minWidth:42}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:14}}>{a.icon}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:8,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",fontWeight:600}}>{a.l}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* NHS Scotland ASN banner */}
      {hasASN&&<div style={{padding:"5px 20px",background:"rgba(124,58,237,.2)",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.3)",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:12}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿</span>
        <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#c4b5fd"}}>NHS SCOTLAND</span>
        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(196,181,253,.8)"}}>Additional Support Needs Capitation — Section X Code 10(b) applies</span>
      </div>}
      {/* Med alerts banner */}
      {hasAlert&&<div style={{padding:"6px 20px",background:"rgba(220,38,38,.2)",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3)",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        <AlertTriangle size={11} color="#fca5a5"/>
        <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#fca5a5"}}>MEDICAL ALERTS:</span>
        {patient.medAlerts.map(a=>(
          <span key={a} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"rgba(220,38,38,.4)",color:"#fecaca"}}>{a}</span>
        ))}
      </div>}

      {/* Tab bar */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,overflowX:"auto",scrollbarWidth:"none",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}}>
        {TABS.map(t=>{
          const active=tab===t.id;
          return(
            <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{
              display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,
              padding:"10px 18px",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",
              borderBottom:`2px solid ${active?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,
              background:active?"rgba(13,148,136,.12)":"transparent",
              whiteSpace:"nowrap",flexShrink:0,transition:"all .1s",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)";}}
            onMouseLeave={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:13}}>{t.icon}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:active?700:400,color:active?"#5eead4":"rgba(255,255,255,.55)"}}>{t.l}</span>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* ══ TAB CONTENT ══ */}
    <div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",minHeight:0}}>

    {/* ── DETAILS (landing dashboard) ── */}
    {tab==="details"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,background:"#f8fafc"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:860,margin:"0 auto",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:14}}>

        {/* ── Personal Details ── */}
        {(()=>{
          const Section=({id,title,children,noedit})=>(
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${editSection===id?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden",transition:"border .15s"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:editSection===id?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${editSection===id?"#99f6e4":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:editSection===id?"#0d9488":"#374151"}}>{title}</div>
                {!noedit&&(editSection===id
                  ?<div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                    <button onClick={()=>{setEditSection(null);doToast("✓ Changes saved");}} style={{padding:"4px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"#0d9488",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>Save</button>
                    <button onClick={()=>setEditSection(null)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
                  </div>
                  :<button onClick={()=>setEditSection(id)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>✏ Edit</button>
                )}
              </div>
              {children}
            </div>
          );
          const FRow=({label,field,opts,gridspan,mono,sid})=>{
            const isEditing=sid&&editSection===sid;
            return(
            <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",gridColumn:gridspan?"1/-1":"auto",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{label}</div>
              {isEditing
                ?(opts
                  ?<select value={detailsEdit[field]||""} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,[field]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe"}}>
                    {opts.map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}</select>
                  :<input value={detailsEdit[field]||""} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,[field]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>)
                :<div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:500,color:"#1e293b",fontFamily:mono?"monospace":"inherit"}}>{detailsEdit[field]||"—"}</div>}
            </div>
            );
          };
          return(<>
            <Section id="personal" title="Personal Details">
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr"}}>
                <FRow label="Full Name" field="name" sid="personal"/>
                <FRow label="Date of Birth" field="dob" sid="personal"/>
                <FRow label="Gender" field="gender" sid="personal" opts={["Male","Female","Non-binary","Prefer not to say","Not specified"]}/>
                <FRow label="Marital Status" field="maritalStatus" sid="personal" opts={["Single","Married","Divorced","Widowed","Civil Partnership"]}/>
                <FRow label="Occupation" field="occupation" sid="personal"/>
                <FRow label="Preferred Name" field="preferredName" sid="personal"/>
              </div>
            </Section>

            <Section id="contact" title="Contact Details">
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr"}}>
                <FRow label="Home Address" field="address" gridspan sid="contact"/>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr"}}>
                <FRow label="Mobile Phone" field="mobile" sid="contact"/>
                <FRow label="Home Phone" field="homePhone" sid="contact"/>
                <FRow label="Email Address" field="email" sid="contact"/>
                <FRow label="Preferred Contact" field="preferredContact" sid="contact" opts={["SMS","Email","Phone","Letter"]}/>
                <FRow label="Best Time to Call" field="bestTime" sid="contact" opts={["Morning (9am–12pm)","Afternoon (12–5pm)","Evening (5–7pm)","Anytime"]}/>
              </div>
            </Section>

            <Section id="registration" title="Registration & NHS">
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr"}}>
                <FRow label="Patient Type" field="patientType" sid="registration" opts={["NHS","Private","Mixed"]}/>
                <FRow label="NHS Number" field="nhsNumber" mono sid="registration"/>
                <FRow label="Registered Since" field="registeredSince" sid="registration"/>
                <FRow label="Dentist" field="dentist" sid="registration" opts={["Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"]}/>
                <FRow label="Hygienist" field="hygienist" sid="registration" opts={["Amy Grant","Not assigned"]}/>
                <FRow label="Recall Interval" field="recallInterval" sid="registration" opts={["3 months","6 months","9 months","12 months"]}/>
                <FRow label="Last Seen" field="lastSeen" sid="registration"/>
                <FRow label="Next Recall Due" field="nextRecall" sid="registration"/>
                <FRow label="Exemption" field="exemption" sid="registration" opts={["No exemption","Age exempt","HC2/HC3","Maternity","Disability"]}/>
              </div>
            </Section>

            {/* ── NHS Northern Ireland ── */}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${detailsEdit.niRegion?"#1d4ed8":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              {/* Contract-derived region banner */}
              <div style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#f0fffe",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11}}>ℹ️</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",flex:1}}>NHS region and workflow are determined by the <strong>practice contract</strong> — not by patient. Current contract: <strong>NHS England GDS (East Molesey)</strong> → FP17 · UDA workflow.</span>
                <a href="#" onClick={e=>{e.preventDefault();doToast("Opening Settings → NHS Architecture…");}} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap",textDecoration:"none"}}>Configure →</a>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:detailsEdit.niRegion?"#eff6ff":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${detailsEdit.niRegion?"#bfdbfe":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:18}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁮󠁩󠁲󠁿</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:detailsEdit.niRegion?"#1d4ed8":"#374151"}}>NHS Northern Ireland — Patient Identifiers</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:1}}>Health and Care Number (HCN) · CHI Number · Required if this patient is treated under an NI contract</div>
                </div>
                <label style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={!!detailsEdit.niRegion} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,niRegion:e.target.checked}))}/>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>NI Patient ID needed</span>
                </label>
              </div>
              {detailsEdit.niRegion&&<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>Health and Care Number (HCN) <span style={{color:"#dc2626"}}>*</span></div>
                  <input value={detailsEdit.hcnNumber||""} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,hcnNumber:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. 1234567890"
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 10px",border:`1.5px solid ${!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&!detailsEdit.chiNumber?"#dc2626":"#0d9488"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                  {!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#dc2626",marginTop:2,fontWeight:600}}>⚠ Not recorded</div>}
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>Required for NHS NI claim submission</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 16px"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>CHI Number (if HCN unavailable)</div>
                  <input value={detailsEdit.chiNumber||""} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,chiNumber:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. 0101234567"
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 10px",border:"1.5px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>Accepted when HCN unavailable</div>
                </div>
              </div>}
              {detailsEdit.niRegion&&<div style={{padding:"8px 16px",borderTop:`1px solid ${!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&!detailsEdit.chiNumber?"#fecaca":"#bbf7d0"}`,background:!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&!detailsEdit.chiNumber?"#fff5f5":"#f0fdf4",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&!detailsEdit.chiNumber?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",fontWeight:600,flex:1}}>
                  {!detailsEdit.hcnNumber&&!detailsEdit.chiNumber?"⚠️ No HCN or CHI recorded — NHS NI claims cannot be submitted without one of these numbers":"✓ NI identifiers recorded — claim submission enabled"}
                </span>
                <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ HCN/CHI saved for NHS NI claims")} style={{padding:"4px 12px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>Save</button>
              </div>}
            </div>

            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${hasAlert?"#fecaca":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:hasAlert?"#fff5f5":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${hasAlert?"#fecaca":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:hasAlert?"#dc2626":"#374151"}}>Medical History</div>
                  {hasAlert&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff"}}>ALERTS</span>}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"12px 16px"}}>
                {patient.medAlerts?.length>0
                  ?<div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:8}}>
                    {patient.medAlerts.map(a=>(
                      <div key={a} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",padding:"6px 12px",background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fecaca"}}>
                        <AlertTriangle size={12} color="#dc2626"/>
                        <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#dc2626"}}>{a}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  :<div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>✓ No significant medical history · Last updated 14 May 2026</div>}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14}}>
              <Section id="emergency" title="Emergency Contact">
                <div>
                  {[["Name","emergencyName"],["Relationship","emergencyRel"],["Phone","emergencyPhone"],["Aware of medical history","emergencyAware"]].map(([l,f],i)=>(
                    <div key={f} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 16px",borderBottom:i<3?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:10}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",flexShrink:0}}>{l}</span>
                      {editSection==="emergency"
                        ?<input value={detailsEdit[f]||""} onChange={e=>setDetailsEdit(p=>({...p,[f]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:140,padding:"4px 7px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe",textAlign:"right"}}/>
                        :<span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:500,color:"#1e293b"}}>{detailsEdit[f]||"—"}</span>}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </Section>
              <Section id="consent" title="Consent & Comms" noedit={!isManager}>
                <div>
                  {[{l:"SMS reminders",k:"sms",v:true},{l:"Email marketing",k:"email",v:false},{l:"Photo consent",k:"photo",v:true},{l:"Data sharing (referrals)",k:"share",v:true}].map((f,i)=>(
                    <div key={f.k} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 16px",borderBottom:i<3?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{f.l}</span>
                      <button onClick={()=>isManager?doToast("Consent updated"):doToast("Only managers can change consent settings")} style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,padding:"3px 12px",borderRadius:6,background:f.v?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:f.v?"#16a34a":"#dc2626",border:"none",cursor:isManager?"pointer":"not-allowed",opacity:isManager?1:0.7}}>
                        {f.v?"✓ Yes":"✗ No"}
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </Section>
            </div>

            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Household / Family Account</div>
                <button onClick={()=>setShowAddMember(true)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>+ Add Member</button>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"8px 16px"}}>
                {[{name:"Michael Chen",rel:"Spouse",dob:"22 Aug 1979",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"NHS",pid:"P1"},{name:"Lily Chen",rel:"Child",dob:"05 Mar 2015",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"NHS",pid:"P2"}].map((mem,i)=>(
                  <div key={mem.name} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",padding:"10px 0",borderBottom:i===0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
                    <div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{mem.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
                    <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:"#1e293b"}}>{mem.name} <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:400}}>({mem.rel})</span></div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{mem.dob} · {mem.dentist}</div></div>
                    <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{mem.type}</span>
                    <button onClick={()=>{if(mem.pid&&openPatient){openPatient(mem.pid);}else{doToast(mem.name+" is not yet registered — add them as a patient first");}}}  style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>View →</button>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Reception Notes & Flags</div>
              <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
                {savedNotes.map((n,i)=>(
                  <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 12px",background:n.c,borderRadius:8,border:`1px solid ${n.bc}`,alignItems:"center"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>{n.icon}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",flex:1}}>{n.text}</span>
                    <button onClick={()=>setSavedNotes(p=>p.filter((_,j)=>j!==i))} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:14,color:"#94a3b8",padding:"0 2px",flexShrink:0}} title="Remove">✕</button>
                  </div>
                ))}
                {savedNotes.length===0&&<div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontStyle:"italic",padding:"4px 0"}}>No reception notes yet</div>}
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <textarea value={receptNote} onChange={e=>setReceptNote(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Add a reception note or flag…"
                    rows={2} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"none",color:"#374151"}}/>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>
                    <button onClick={()=>{if(!receptNote.trim()){doToast("Type a note first");return;}setSavedNotes(p=>[...p,{icon:"📋",text:receptNote.trim(),c:"#f0fffe",bc:"#99f6e4"}]);setReceptNote("");doToast("✓ Note saved");}}
                      style={{padding:"7px 12px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>Save</button>
                    <button onClick={()=>{if(!receptNote.trim()){doToast("Type a note first");return;}setSavedNotes(p=>[...p,{icon:"⚠️",text:receptNote.trim(),c:"#fef9c3",bc:"#fde68a"}]);setReceptNote("");doToast("✓ Flag saved");}}
                      style={{padding:"7px 12px",background:"#d97706",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>⚠ Flag</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>);
        })()}
      </div>
    </div>}


    {tab==="chart"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",minHeight:0}}>
      {/* Chart sub-nav */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 16px",display:"flex",gap:0,flexShrink:0}}>
        {[{id:"odontogram",l:"Dental Chart"},{id:"perio",l:"Perio"},{id:"softtissue",l:"Soft Tissue & Pathology"},{id:"xrays",l:"X-Rays"},{id:"history",l:"History"}].map(t=>(
          <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setChartTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${chartTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:chartTab===t.id?700:400,color:chartTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
      {chartTab==="odontogram"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",minHeight:0}}><DentalWorkspace patient={patient} user={user}/></div>}
      {chartTab==="perio"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Periodontal Assessment</div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,padding:16,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>BPE Scores — 14 May 2026</div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(6,1fr)",gap:8}}>
            {[{s:"UR",v:1},{s:"UF",v:2},{s:"UL",v:2},{s:"LR",v:1},{s:"LF",v:1},{s:"LL",v:1}].map(b=>{
              const bc=b.v>=3?"#dc2626":b.v===2?"#d97706":"#16a34a";
              return(<div key={b.s} style={{textAlign:"center"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>{b.s}</div><div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:10,background:bc+"15",border:`2px solid ${bc}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:bc,margin:"0 auto"}}>{b.v}</div></div>);
            })}
          </div>
          <div style={{marginTop:10,fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>BPE 1-2: Basic periodontal treatment · Review at recall</div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("6-point perio chart opening soon")} style={{padding:"10px 20px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ Start 6-Point Perio Chart</button>
      </div>}
      {chartTab==="softtissue"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Soft Tissue Examination</div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {[{area:"Lips & commissures",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Buccal mucosa",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Tongue",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Floor of mouth",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Hard & soft palate",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Gingiva",finding:"Mild generalised gingivitis"},{area:"Oropharynx",finding:"NAD"},{area:"Lymph nodes",finding:"No palpable lymphadenopathy"}].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{width:200,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",flexShrink:0}}>{r.area}</span>
              <input defaultValue={r.finding} style={{flex:1,border:"none",outline:"none",fontSize:12,color:r.finding==="NAD"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626",fontWeight:r.finding==="NAD"?400:600,background:"transparent"}}/>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>}
      {chartTab==="xrays"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,textAlign:"center"}}>
        <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",borderRadius:14,padding:40,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",fontSize:13}}>📡 DICOM viewer — connect imaging system to view radiographs</div>
      </div>}
      {chartTab==="history"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Charting History</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10,maxWidth:700}}>
          {[
            {date:"14 May 2026",by:"Dr. S. Patel",summary:"Routine exam. BPE 1-2. Composite UR6 planned. Scale & Polish completed.",teeth:["UR6"],status:"complete"},
            {date:"15 Jan 2026",by:"Dr. S. Patel",summary:"Crown prep UR6. Impressions taken. Temp crown placed. No perio concerns.",teeth:["UR6"],status:"complete"},
            {date:"03 Feb 2025",by:"Dr. M. Chen",summary:"Emergency — pain LR7. Periapical radiograph taken. RCT commenced.",teeth:["LR7"],status:"complete"},
            {date:"08 Aug 2024",by:"Dr. S. Patel",summary:"Routine examination. BPE 1 all sextants. Scale & Polish. OHI given.",teeth:[],status:"complete"},
          ].map((h,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"12px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:6}}>
                <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#16a34a",flexShrink:0}}/>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{h.date}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>· {h.by}</span>
                {h.teeth.length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{h.teeth.join(", ")}</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#475569",lineHeight:1.6,paddingLeft:18}}>{h.summary}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>}

    {tab==="medical"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,background:"#f8fafc"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:860,margin:"0 auto",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:14}}>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:8}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#0f172a"}}>Medical History Questionnaire</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginTop:2}}>

            <button onClick={()=>setShowSendForm(true)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>Send Form to Patient</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Medical history saved")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:8,background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Save</button>
          </div>

        {patient.medAlerts?.length>0&&<div style={{background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #fecaca",padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>

            {Object.values(mqState).some(v=>v===true)&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>⚠ Conditions reported</span>}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr"}}>
            {MQ_CONDITIONS.map((cond,i)=>(
              <div key={cond.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 16px",borderBottom:i<MQ_CONDITIONS.length-2?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",borderRight:i%2===0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",background:mqState[cond.id]===true?"#fff5f5":mqState[cond.id]===false?"#f0fdf4":"#fff"}}>
                <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:11,color:mqState[cond.id]===true?"#dc2626":mqState[cond.id]===false?"#374151":"#94a3b8",fontWeight:mqState[cond.id]===true?700:400}}>{cond.label}</span>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,flexShrink:0}}>
                  {[{v:true,l:"Yes"},{v:false,l:"No"},{v:null,l:"?"}].map(opt=>(
                    <button key={String(opt.v)} onClick={()=>toggleMq(cond.id,opt.v)}
                      style={{padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,border:"1.5px solid",cursor:"pointer",
                        borderColor:mqState[cond.id]===opt.v?(opt.v===true?"#dc2626":opt.v===false?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"):"#e2e8f0",
                        background:mqState[cond.id]===opt.v?(opt.v===true?"#fee2e2":opt.v===false?"#dcfce7":"#f1f5f9"):"transparent",
                        color:mqState[cond.id]===opt.v?(opt.v===true?"#dc2626":opt.v===false?"#16a34a":"#64748b"):"#94a3b8"}}>
                      {opt.l}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Clinical notes */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>

              style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"vertical",color:"#374151",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Social history */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${socialHistoryDraft?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:socialHistoryDraft?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${socialHistoryDraft?"#99f6e4":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Social History</span>
            {socialHistoryDraft&&<button onClick={()=>saveSocialHistory()} style={{padding:"5px 14px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Save Changes</button>}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
            {[
              {l:"Cigarettes per day",v:cigarettes,set:v=>updateSocialField("Cigarettes per day",setCigarettes,cigarettes,v),opts:["0","1-5","6-10","11-20","20+"]},
              {l:"Units alcohol/week",v:alcohol,set:v=>updateSocialField("Units alcohol/week",setAlcohol,alcohol,v),opts:["0","1-7","8-14","15-21","22+"]},
              {l:"Vapes / E-cigarettes",v:vapes,set:v=>updateSocialField("Vapes / E-cigarettes",setVapes,vapes,v),opts:["No","Occasionally","Daily","Heavily"]},
            ].map((f,i)=>(
              <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderRight:i<2?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none",background:socialHistoryDraft?.[f.l]?"#f0fffe":"transparent"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:5}}>{f.l}</div>
                <select value={f.v} onChange={e=>f.set(e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:`1px solid ${socialHistoryDraft?.[f.l]?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:socialHistoryDraft?.[f.l]?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc"}}>
                  {f.opts.map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
                </select>
                {socialHistoryDraft?.[f.l]&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",marginTop:3}}>Changed from: {socialHistoryDraft[f.l].from}</div>}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {/* Social history audit log */}
          {socialHistoryLog.length>0&&<div style={{borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"8px 16px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:5}}>Change History</div>
            {socialHistoryLog.map((e,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,fontSize:10,padding:"3px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{color:"#374151",fontWeight:600,minWidth:130}}>{e.field}</span>
                <span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>{e.from}</span>
                <span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>→</span>
                <span style={{color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700}}>{e.to}</span>
                <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:"auto"}}>{e.by} · {e.at}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>}
        </div>

        {/* Allergies */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Known Allergies & Adverse Drug Reactions</div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
            {[
              {allergen:"Penicillin",reaction:"Anaphylaxis — CRITICAL",sev:"high"},
              {allergen:"Latex",reaction:"Contact dermatitis",sev:"medium"},
              {allergen:"Aspirin",reaction:"GI irritation",sev:"low"},
            ].map((a,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 16px",borderRight:i<2?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",marginBottom:3,color:a.sev==="high"?"#dc2626":a.sev==="medium"?"#d97706":"#16a34a"}}>
                  {a.sev==="high"?"🔴 CRITICAL":a.sev==="medium"?"🟡 MODERATE":"🟢 MILD"}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:2}}>{a.allergen}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{a.reaction}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

          {/* ── NHS Scotland: Additional Support Needs Marker ── */}
          {patient.nhs&&(
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${hasASN?"#7c3aed":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden",marginTop:0}}>
              <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:hasASN?"#f5f3ff":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${hasASN?"#ddd6fe":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:18}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:hasASN?"#7c3aed":"#374151"}}>NHS Scotland — Additional Support Needs</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:1}}>Enables Section X Code 10(b) on NHS Scotland capitation claim submissions</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:3}}>
                  <button onClick={toggleASN} style={{width:48,height:26,borderRadius:13,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:hasASN?"#7c3aed":"#d1d5db",position:"relative",padding:0,transition:"background .2s"}}>
                    <div style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:3,left:hasASN?25:3,transition:"left .2s",boxShadow:"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}/>
                  </button>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:hasASN?"#7c3aed":"#94a3b8"}}>{hasASN?"ENABLED":"OFF"}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              {hasASN&&<div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f5f3ff",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>ℹ️</span>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#7c3aed",lineHeight:1.6}}><strong>Section X Code 10(b)</strong> — Additional Support Needs Capitation Payment will be automatically applied to NHS Scotland capitation claims for this patient. The code is added at submission and visible on the claim review screen.</div>
              </div>}
              {asnAudit.length>0&&<div style={{padding:"8px 16px",borderTop:`1px solid ${hasASN?"#ddd6fe":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:"#fafafa"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>ASN Audit Log</div>
                {asnAudit.map((e,i)=>(
                  <div key={i} style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",padding:"2px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
                    <span style={{fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{e.user}</span> set marker to <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:e.to==="Yes"?"#7c3aed":"#94a3b8"}}>{e.to}</span> · <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{e.at}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>}
            </div>
          )}

      </div>
    </div>}
    {tab==="appts"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,maxWidth:900}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>Appointments</span>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowBookAppt(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={13}/>Book Appointment</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"90px 1fr 130px 90px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>
          <span>Date</span><span>Treatment</span><span>Dentist</span><span>Band</span><span>Status</span>
        </div>
        {[{date:"3 Jun 2026",type:"Root Canal LL6",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",band:"Urgent",status:"Booked",c:"#0d9488"},{date:"14 May 2026",type:"Composite UR6 + Exam",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",band:2,status:"Completed",c:"#16a34a"},{date:"15 Jan 2026",type:"Crown Prep & Fit",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",band:3,status:"Completed",c:"#16a34a"},{date:"8 Aug 2024",type:"Routine Check-up",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",band:1,status:"DNA",c:"#dc2626"}].map((a,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"90px 1fr 130px 90px 80px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",background:a.status==="Booked"?"#f0fffe":"#fff",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{a.date}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:500}}>{a.type}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{a.dentist}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8",textAlign:"center"}}>Band {a.band}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:a.c+"15",color:a.c}}>{a.status}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="notes"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",minHeight:0}}><AINoteAssistant patient={patient} user={user}/></div>}

    {tab==="plans"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,maxWidth:940}}>
        <div>
          <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>Treatment Plans</span>
          {txPlans.some(p=>p.items?.some(i=>i.free_repair_status!=="none"))&&(
            <span style={{marginLeft:10,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fff7ed",color:"#c2410c",border:"1px solid #fed7aa"}}>
              ⚡ {txPlans.flatMap(p=>p.items||[]).filter(i=>i.free_repair_status!=="none").length} Free Repair/Replacement item{txPlans.flatMap(p=>p.items||[]).filter(i=>i.free_repair_status!=="none").length!==1?"s":""}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowNewPlan(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={13}/>New Plan</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{maxWidth:940}}>
        {txPlans.length===0&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:32,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:13}}>No treatment plans yet</div>}
        {txPlans.map((plan,pi)=>{
          const patientCharge=plan.items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.free_repair_status!=="none"?0:i.fee),0);
          const nhsClaimValue=plan.items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0);
          const hasFR=plan.items.some(i=>i.free_repair_status!=="none");
          const isNHS=plan.type==="NHS";
          const isEnglandWales=plan.region==="England"||plan.region==="Wales";
          return(
          <div key={pi} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1.5px solid ${plan.status==="open"?"#0d9488":hasFR?"#fed7aa":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>
            {/* Plan header */}
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:plan.status==="open"?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",cursor:"pointer"}}
              onDoubleClick={()=>doToast("Opening plan "+plan.id+" — double-click registered")}
            >
              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}} onDoubleClick={()=>doToast("📋 "+plan.name+" opened")}>{plan.name}</span>
                  <button onClick={()=>doToast("📋 Plan opened: "+plan.name+" — "+plan.id)} style={{padding:"3px 10px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:6,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",marginLeft:4,flexShrink:0}}>Open ↗</button>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:plan.status==="open"?"#0d948820":"#dcfce7",color:plan.status==="open"?"#0d9488":"#16a34a"}}>{plan.status==="open"?"Open":"Complete"}</span>
                  {plan.type==="NHS"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>NHS</span>}
                  {plan.is_continuation&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>CONTINUATION OF TX</span>}
                  {hasFR&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff7ed",color:"#c2410c"}}>⚡ FREE REPAIR/REPLACEMENT</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{plan.id} · {plan.date} · {plan.region||"England"}</div>
              </div>
              {/* Plan settings */}
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("📋 Plan "+plan.id+" opened — "+plan.name)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",flexShrink:0}}>Open Plan</button>
              {isNHS&&isEnglandWales&&plan.status==="open"&&<label style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0}}>
                <input type="checkbox" checked={!!plan.is_continuation} onChange={()=>toggleContinuation(plan.id)} style={{cursor:"pointer"}}/>
                Continuation of Treatment
              </label>}
            </div>

            {/* FR/FRP warning banner */}
            {hasFR&&<div style={{padding:"7px 14px",background:"#fff7ed",borderBottom:"1px solid #fed7aa",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:12}}>⚡</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#c2410c",fontWeight:600}}>
                {plan.items.filter(i=>i.free_repair_status!=="none").map(i=>({free_repair:"Free Repair",free_replacement:"Free Replacement"})[i.free_repair_status]).filter((v,i,a)=>a.indexOf(v)===i).join(" & ")} applied
                · Patient charge suppressed · NHS/UDA claim value retained
              </span>
            </div>}

            {/* Items */}
            <div style={{background:"#f8fafc",padding:"0 14px",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 120px 16px",gap:0,borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
              {["Treatment","Patient £","NHS £","Free R/R",""].map(h=><div key={h} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",padding:"5px 0",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{h}</div>)}
            </div>
            {plan.items.map((item,ii)=>{
              const frStatus=item.free_repair_status||"none";
              const isFR=frStatus!=="none";
              const canSetFR=item.nhs&&isEnglandWales&&plan.status==="open";
              return(
              <div key={ii} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 120px 16px",gap:0,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:ii>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center",background:item.done?"#f0fdf4":isFR?"#fffbf7":"#fff"}}>
                {/* Treatment name + done toggle */}
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div onClick={()=>setTxPlans(p=>p.map(pl=>pl.id!==plan.id?pl:{...pl,items:pl.items.map(it=>it.id!==item.id?it:{...it,done:!it.done})}))}
                    style={{width:16,height:16,borderRadius:4,border:`1.5px solid ${item.done?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:item.done?"#0d9488":"#fff",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,cursor:"pointer"}}>
                    {item.done&&<Check size={10} color="#fff"/>}
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,color:item.done?"#94a3b8":"#374151",textDecoration:item.done?"line-through":"none"}}>{item.l}</span>
                    {isFR&&<span style={{marginLeft:6,fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:frStatus==="free_repair"?"#fff7ed":"#f5f3ff",color:frStatus==="free_repair"?"#c2410c":"#7c3aed",border:`1px solid ${frStatus==="free_repair"?"#fed7aa":"#ddd6fe"}`}}>{frStatus==="free_repair"?"Free Repair":"Free Replacement"}</span>}
                  </div>
                </div>
                {/* Patient charge — £0 if FR */}
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:isFR?"#94a3b8":"#374151",textDecoration:isFR?"line-through":"none"}}>
                  £{isFR?"0.00":item.fee.toFixed(2)}
                </span>
                {/* NHS claim value — always shown */}
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:"#0d9488"}}>£{(item.nhsFee||item.fee).toFixed(2)}</span>
                {/* Free Repair dropdown */}
                <div style={{paddingLeft:8}}>
                  {canSetFR
                    ?<select value={frStatus} onChange={e=>updateItemFR(plan.id,item.id,e.target.value)}
                      style={{width:"100%",padding:"3px 4px",border:`1px solid ${isFR?"#fed7aa":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:isFR?"#fff7ed":"#f8fafc",color:isFR?"#c2410c":"#64748b",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                      <option value="none">No</option>
                      <option value="free_repair">Free Repair</option>
                      <option value="free_replacement">Free Replacement</option>
                    </select>
                    :<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{item.nhs?"—":"NHS only"}</span>}
                </div>
                {/* UDA badge */}
                <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>{item.udas&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{item.udas}u</span>}</div>
              </div>
              );
            })}

            {/* Totals footer */}
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 120px 16px",gap:0,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{plan.items.filter(i=>i.done).length}/{plan.items.length} complete · {plan.items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.udas||0),0)} UDAs</span>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Patient pays</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151"}}>£{patientCharge.toFixed(2)}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488"}}>NHS claim</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488"}}>£{nhsClaimValue.toFixed(2)}</div>
              </div>
              {hasFR&&<div style={{paddingLeft:8,fontSize:9,color:"#c2410c",fontWeight:600}}>Charge suppressed</div>}
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}

        {/* FR Audit log */}
        {frAudit.length>0&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:8}}>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em"}}>Free Repair / Replacement Audit Log</div>
          {frAudit.map((e,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"7px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",fontSize:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{width:26,height:26,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff7ed",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,flexShrink:0}}>⚡</div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}><span style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>{e.user}</span> set <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"0 4px",borderRadius:3}}>{e.itemId}</span> → <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:e.to==="none"?"#94a3b8":e.to==="free_repair"?"#c2410c":"#7c3aed"}}>{e.to==="none"?"Removed":e.to==="free_repair"?"Free Repair":"Free Replacement"}</span></div>
              <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{e.at}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="accounts"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:10,marginBottom:16}}>
          {[{l:"Outstanding",v:"£"+((patient.balance||0).toFixed(2)),c:patient.balance>0?"#dc2626":"#16a34a"},{l:"Last Payment",v:"£73.50",c:"#374151"},{l:"2026 Total",v:"£392.40",c:"#16a34a"}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:11,padding:"14px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>{s.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}><span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Transactions</span><button onClick={()=>setShowPayment(true)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Send Payment Link</button></div>
          {[{date:"14 May 2026",desc:"Band 2 — Composite UR6",amount:73.50,s:"outstanding"},{date:"15 Jan 2026",desc:"Band 3 — Crown UR6",amount:319.10,s:"paid"},{date:"10 Jul 2025",desc:"Band 1 — Scale & Polish",amount:26.80,s:"paid"}].map((inv,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:500}}>{inv.desc}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{inv.date}</div></div>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:inv.s==="paid"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{inv.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:inv.s==="paid"?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:inv.s==="paid"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{inv.s==="paid"?"Paid":"Due"}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="docs"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,maxWidth:900}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>Documents</span>
        <button onClick={()=>{
          const inp=document.createElement("input");
          inp.type="file";
          inp.accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx,.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.txt";
          inp.multiple=true;
          inp.onchange=e=>{const files=Array.from(e.target.files||[]);if(files.length>0)doToast("✓ "+files.length+" file"+(files.length>1?"s":"")+" uploaded");};
          inp.click();
        }} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={13}/>Upload</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        {[{icon:"📄",name:"Consent Form — Composite UR6",date:"14 May 2026",by:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Consent"},{icon:"📋",name:"Referral Letter — Periodontist",date:"14 May 2026",by:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"Referral"},{icon:"📃",name:"Medical History Questionnaire",date:"14 May 2026",by:"Patient",type:"Medical"},{icon:"🖼",name:"OPG Radiograph — Jan 2026",date:"15 Jan 2026",by:"Dr. S. Patel",type:"X-Ray"}].map((d,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:8,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>{d.icon}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{d.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{d.date} · {d.by}</div></div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{d.type}</span>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowDocPreview(d)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>View →</button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="history"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Patient History & Audit Log</div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>All changes to this record</div>
          {[{byName:"System",field:"Record Created",to:"Patient added",at:"14 May 2026 09:00"},{byName:"Dr. S. Patel",field:"Clinical Note",to:"Note added",at:"14 May 2026 10:15"},{byName:"Emma Wilson",field:"Appointment",to:"Appointment booked — 3 Jun",at:"Today 09:22"}].map((e,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              <div style={{width:30,height:30,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#dbeafe",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,flexShrink:0}}>✏️</div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}><span style={{color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{e.byName}</span> · {e.field}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginTop:2}}>{e.to}</div></div>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.at}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>);
}

function FP17Page(){
  const [claims,setClaims]=useState([
    {id:"F001",patient:"John Mills",nhs:"485 777 3456",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"14 May 2026",band:2,udas:3,charge:"£73.50",status:"draft",region:"England",claimType:"treatment",hasASN:false,is_continuation:false,
      items:[{l:"Examination",nhsFee:26.80,patientFee:26.80,udas:1,frStatus:"none"},{l:"Scale & Polish",nhsFee:0,patientFee:0,udas:1,frStatus:"none"},{l:"Composite UR6",nhsFee:73.50,patientFee:0,udas:3,frStatus:"free_repair"}]},
    {id:"F002",patient:"Sarah Chen",nhs:"312 445 8821",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"13 May 2026",band:3,udas:12,charge:"£0.00",status:"draft",region:"Scotland",claimType:"capitation",hasASN:true,is_continuation:false,items:[]},
    {id:"F003",patient:"Robert Hall",nhs:"229 663 1157",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen",date:"12 May 2026",band:1,udas:1,charge:"£26.80",status:"submitted",region:"England",claimType:"treatment",hasASN:false,is_continuation:true,
      items:[{l:"Crown Recement UR6",nhsFee:73.50,patientFee:73.50,udas:3,frStatus:"none"}]},
    {id:"F004",patient:"Amy Torres",nhs:"741 882 9034",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"10 May 2026",band:2,udas:3,charge:"£73.50",status:"accepted",region:"Scotland",claimType:"capitation",hasASN:false,is_continuation:false,items:[]},
    {id:"F005",patient:"Lisa Park",nhs:"556 889 2233",dentist:"Amy Grant",date:"08 May 2026",band:1,udas:1,charge:"£26.80",status:"draft",region:"Scotland",claimType:"capitation",hasASN:true,is_continuation:false,items:[]},
    {id:"F006",patient:"James Wright",nhs:"114 773 6690",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen",date:"06 May 2026",band:2,udas:3,charge:"£0.00",status:"draft",region:"Wales",claimType:"treatment",hasASN:false,is_continuation:false,
      items:[{l:"Composite LL5",nhsFee:73.50,patientFee:0,udas:3,frStatus:"free_replacement"},{l:"Examination",nhsFee:26.80,patientFee:26.80,udas:1,frStatus:"none"}]},
  ]);
  const [selClaim,setSelClaim]=useState(null);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [asnFilter,setAsnFilter]=useState(false);
  const [showNewFP17,setShowNewFP17]=useState(false);
  const [showReviewModal,setShowReviewModal]=useState(false);
  const [reviewClaim,setReviewClaim]=useState(null);
  const [ptDropOpen,setPtDropOpen]=useState(false);
  const [newClaim,setNewClaim]=useState({patient:"",nhs:"",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"}),band:2,region:"England",claimType:"treatment",hasASN:false,is_continuation:false,pid:null,isNewPatient:false,items:[]});
  const ptMatches=newClaim.patient?.length>=2?PATIENTS.filter(p=>p.name.toLowerCase().includes(newClaim.patient.toLowerCase())).slice(0,6):[];

  const openReview=(cl)=>{setReviewClaim({...cl});setShowReviewModal(true);};
  const saveReview=()=>{setClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id===reviewClaim.id?{...reviewClaim}:c));setShowReviewModal(false);doToast("✓ Claim updated — "+reviewClaim.patient);};
  const [frFilter,setFrFilter]=useState(false);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const asnApplies=(cl)=>cl.region==="Scotland"&&cl.claimType==="capitation"&&cl.hasASN;
  const frApplies=(cl)=>(cl.region==="England"||cl.region==="Wales")&&cl.items?.some(i=>i.frStatus!=="none");
  const contApplies=(cl)=>cl.is_continuation;
  const visibleClaims=claims.filter(c=>
    (!asnFilter||asnApplies(c))&&
    (!frFilter||frApplies(c))
  );
  const frCount=claims.filter(frApplies).length;
  const contCount=claims.filter(contApplies).length;
  const asnCount=claims.filter(asnApplies).length;

  const submitNewFP17=()=>{
    if(!newClaim.patient){doToast("Patient name required");return;}
    setClaims(p=>[{id:"F"+Date.now(),patient:newClaim.patient,nhs:newClaim.nhs||"Not provided",
      dentist:newClaim.dentist,date:newClaim.date,band:newClaim.band,
      udas:newClaim.band===1?1:newClaim.band===2?3:12,
      charge:newClaim.band===1?"£26.80":newClaim.band===2?"£73.50":"£319.10",
      status:"draft",region:newClaim.region,claimType:newClaim.claimType,
      hasASN:newClaim.hasASN,is_continuation:newClaim.is_continuation,items:[]},...p]);
    setShowNewFP17(false);doToast("✓ FP17 draft created");
  };
  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden",position:"relative"}}>
      {showNewFP17&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:480,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>New FP17 NHS Claim</div>

          {/* Patient search with live autocomplete from PATIENTS DB */}
          <div style={{marginBottom:12,position:"relative"}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Patient Name * — type to search existing patients</label>
            <input autoFocus value={newClaim.patient||""} placeholder="Search patients…"
              onChange={e=>{setNewClaim(p=>({...p,patient:e.target.value,nhs:"",pid:null,isNewPatient:false}));setPtDropOpen(true);}}
              onFocus={()=>setPtDropOpen(true)}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:`1.5px solid ${newClaim.pid?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
            {newClaim.pid&&<span style={{position:"absolute",right:10,top:30,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700}}>✓ Patient linked</span>}
            {ptDropOpen&&newClaim.patient?.length>=2&&<div style={{position:"absolute",top:"100%",left:0,right:0,background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,boxShadow:"0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12)",zIndex:50,maxHeight:220,overflowY:"auto"}}>
              {ptMatches.map(p=>(
                <div key={p.id} onMouseDown={()=>{setNewClaim(prev=>({...prev,patient:p.name,nhs:p.nhs||"",dentist:p.dentist||prev.dentist,pid:p.id,isNewPatient:false}));setPtDropOpen(false);}} style={{padding:"9px 12px",cursor:"pointer",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}
                  onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff"}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{p.dob||"DOB not recorded"} · NHS: {p.nhs||"Not recorded"} · {p.dentist}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
              <div onMouseDown={()=>{setNewClaim(prev=>({...prev,isNewPatient:true,pid:null}));setPtDropOpen(false);doToast("✓ New patient — complete claim to register them");}}
                style={{padding:"9px 12px",cursor:"pointer",background:"#f0fffe",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}
                onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#e0fffe"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe"}>
                <span style={{fontSize:16}}>➕</span>
                <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>Register "{newClaim.patient}" as New Patient</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>Patient record will be created after claim is saved</div></div>
              </div>
              {ptMatches.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"12px",textAlign:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No matching patients — use + to register new</div>}
            </div>}
            {newClaim.isNewPatient&&<div style={{marginTop:4,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>➕ Will be registered as new patient on save</div>}
          </div>

          {/* NHS Number + Dentist + Date */}
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:10}}>
            {[{l:"NHS Number",k:"nhs",ph:"000 000 0000"},{l:"Dentist",k:"dentist"},{l:"Date",k:"date"}].map(f=>(
              <div key={f.k}><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</label>
              <input value={newClaim[f.k]||""} onChange={e=>setNewClaim(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph||""}
                style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/></div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Band + Region + Claim Type */}
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:10}}>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:2}}>Band</label>
              <select value={newClaim.band} onChange={e=>setNewClaim(p=>({...p,band:parseInt(e.target.value)}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                <option value={1}>Band 1 — £26.80</option><option value={2}>Band 2 — £73.50</option><option value={3}>Band 3 — £319.10</option>
              </select></div>
            <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:7,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",fontSize:10,color:"#1d4ed8",fontWeight:600,gridColumn:"1/-1"}}>
              🏛 NHS Region auto-resolved from contract: <strong>England (NHS England GDS)</strong> · Configure in Settings → NHS Architecture
            </div>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:2}}>Claim Type</label>
              <select value={newClaim.claimType} onChange={e=>setNewClaim(p=>({...p,claimType:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                <option value="treatment">Treatment</option><option value="capitation">Capitation</option>
              </select></div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,marginBottom:12}}>
