            <label style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,cursor:"pointer"}}><input type="checkbox" checked={!!newClaim.is_continuation} onChange={e=>setNewClaim(p=>({...p,is_continuation:e.target.checked}))}/> Continuation of Treatment</label>
            {newClaim.region==="Scotland"&&<label style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,cursor:"pointer"}}><input type="checkbox" checked={!!newClaim.hasASN} onChange={e=>setNewClaim(p=>({...p,hasASN:e.target.checked}))}/> ASN Code 10(b)</label>}
          </div>

          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{setShowNewFP17(false);setPtDropOpen(false);setNewClaim({patient:"",nhs:"",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"}),band:2,region:"England",claimType:"treatment",hasASN:false,is_continuation:false,pid:null,isNewPatient:false,items:[]});}} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{submitNewFP17();setPtDropOpen(false);}} disabled={!newClaim.patient?.trim()} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:newClaim.patient?.trim()?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0",color:newClaim.patient?.trim()?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:newClaim.patient?.trim()?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>
              {newClaim.isNewPatient?"Create Claim + Register New Patient":"Create FP17 Draft"}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

      {/* ── Review Modal ── */}
      {showReviewModal&&reviewClaim&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:560,maxHeight:"88vh",overflowY:"auto",boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"18px 22px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",position:"sticky",top:0,background:"#fff",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",zIndex:2}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Review FP17 Claim</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{reviewClaim.patient} · {reviewClaim.date} · NHS {reviewClaim.nhs}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:{draft:"#fef3c7",submitted:"#dbeafe",accepted:"#dcfce7",rejected:"#fee2e2"}[reviewClaim.status]||"#f1f5f9",color:{draft:"#92400e",submitted:"#1d4ed8",accepted:"#16a34a",rejected:"#dc2626"}[reviewClaim.status]||"#374151"}}>{reviewClaim.status?.toUpperCase()}</span>
              <button onClick={()=>setShowReviewModal(false)} style={{border:"none",background:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:20,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1}}>✕</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"18px 22px"}}>
            {/* Core claim fields — all editable */}
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>
              {[{l:"Patient Name",k:"patient"},{l:"NHS Number",k:"nhs"},{l:"Dentist",k:"dentist"},{l:"Date",k:"date"}].map(f=>(
                <div key={f.k}>
                  <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
                  <input value={reviewClaim[f.k]||""} onChange={e=>setReviewClaim(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))}
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:12}}>
              <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Band</label>
                <select value={reviewClaim.band||2} onChange={e=>setReviewClaim(p=>({...p,band:parseInt(e.target.value),charge:e.target.value==="1"?"£26.80":e.target.value==="2"?"£73.50":"£319.10",udas:e.target.value==="1"?1:e.target.value==="2"?3:12}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  <option value={1}>Band 1 — £26.80 (1 UDA)</option><option value={2}>Band 2 — £73.50 (3 UDA)</option><option value={3}>Band 3 — £319.10 (12 UDA)</option>
                </select></div>
              <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Region</label>
                <select value={reviewClaim.region||"England"} onChange={e=>setReviewClaim(p=>({...p,region:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  <option>England</option><option>Wales</option><option>Scotland</option><option>Northern Ireland</option>
                </select></div>
              <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Claim Type</label>
                <select value={reviewClaim.claimType||"treatment"} onChange={e=>setReviewClaim(p=>({...p,claimType:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  <option value="treatment">Treatment</option><option value="capitation">Capitation</option>
                </select></div>
            </div>
            {/* Flags */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,marginBottom:14,padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              {[{k:"is_continuation",l:"Continuation of Treatment"},{k:"hasASN",l:"Scotland ASN Code 10(b)"}].map(f=>(
                <label key={f.k} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={!!reviewClaim[f.k]} onChange={e=>setReviewClaim(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.checked}))}/>
                  {f.l}
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
            {/* Summary */}
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:14}}>
              {[{l:"Patient Charge",v:reviewClaim.charge||"£73.50"},{l:"UDAs",v:reviewClaim.udas||3},{l:"Contract",v:reviewClaim.contract||"NHS Standard"}].map(f=>(
                <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",textAlign:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{f.v}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            {/* Actions */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
              <button onClick={()=>setShowReviewModal(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Discard Changes</button>
              <button onClick={saveReview} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",background:"#f59e0b",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>💾 Save Changes</button>
              {reviewClaim.status==="draft"&&<button onClick={()=>{saveReview();doToast("✓ "+reviewClaim.patient+" claim submitted");}} style={{flex:2,padding:"10px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Save & Submit Claim</button>}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Claims list */}
      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>FP17 NHS Claims</span>
          {asnCount>0&&<div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:"#f5f3ff",border:"1px solid #ddd6fe",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:13}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#7c3aed"}}>{asnCount} ASN 10(b)</span>
            <button onClick={()=>{setAsnFilter(v=>!v);setFrFilter(false);}} style={{fontSize:10,color:"#7c3aed",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"underline"}}>{asnFilter?"All":"Filter"}</button>
          </div>}
          {frCount>0&&<div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff7ed",border:"1px solid #fed7aa",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11}}>⚡</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#c2410c"}}>{frCount} Free R/R</span>
            <button onClick={()=>{setFrFilter(v=>!v);setAsnFilter(false);}} style={{fontSize:10,color:"#c2410c",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"underline"}}>{frFilter?"All":"Filter"}</button>
          </div>}
          {contCount>0&&<div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:"#fef3c7",border:"1px solid #fde68a",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#92400e"}}>{contCount} Continuation</span>
          </div>}
          <button onClick={()=>setShowNewFP17(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ New FP17</button>
        </div>

        {visibleClaims.map((cl,i)=>{
          const sc={draft:{c:C.amber,l:"Draft"},submitted:{c:C.blue,l:"Submitted"},accepted:{c:C.green,l:"Accepted"},rejected:{c:C.red,l:"Rejected"}}[cl.status];
          const scotlandASN=asnApplies(cl);
          return(<div key={i} onClick={()=>setSelClaim(selClaim===cl.id?null:cl.id)}
            style={{background:C.card,border:`1.5px solid ${selClaim===cl.id?"#0d9488":scotlandASN?"#ddd6fe":C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 14px",marginBottom:8,cursor:"pointer",transition:"border .1s"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>FP17 — {cl.date}</span>
                  <Chip color={sc.c}>{sc.l}</Chip>
                  <Chip color={C.blue}>Band {cl.band}</Chip>
                  {cl.region==="Scotland"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#eff6ff",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland</span>}
                  {(cl.region==="England"||cl.region==="Wales")&&cl.items?.some(i=>i.frStatus!=="none")&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff7ed",color:"#c2410c",border:"1px solid #fed7aa"}}>⚡ Free R/R</span>}
                  {cl.is_continuation&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>Continuation</span>}
                  {scotlandASN&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f5f3ff",color:"#7c3aed",border:"1px solid #ddd6fe"}}>⚡ ASN Code 10(b)</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{cl.patient} · NHS {cl.nhs} · {cl.udas} UDA{cl.udas!==1?"s":""} · {cl.dentist}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                <Btn style={{fontSize:11}} onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();openReview(cl);}}><Eye size={11}/>Review</Btn>
                {cl.status==="draft"&&<Btn v="nhs" style={{fontSize:11}} onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();doToast("✓ "+cl.patient+" claim submitted"+(scotlandASN?" with Section X Code 10(b)":""));}}>
                  <Send size={11}/>Submit
                </Btn>}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Claim review panel — inline */}
            {selClaim===cl.id&&<div style={{marginTop:12,paddingTop:12,borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:8}}>Claim Review — {cl.patient}</div>
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:6,marginBottom:10}}>
                {[{l:"Patient",v:cl.patient},{l:"NHS Number",v:cl.nhs},{l:"NHS Region",v:cl.region},{l:"Claim Type",v:cl.claimType},{l:"Dentist",v:cl.dentist},{l:"Date",v:cl.date},{l:"Band",v:cl.band},{l:"Charge",v:cl.charge}].map(f=>(
                  <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:7}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:1}}>{f.l}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{f.v}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Scotland ASN marker */}
              {scotlandASN&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f5f3ff",borderRadius:10,border:"2px solid #7c3aed",marginBottom:10}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:16}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#7c3aed"}}>ADDITIONAL SUPPORT NEEDS CAPITATION MARKER APPLIED</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#7c3aed",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:3}}>Section X — Additional Payments · Code 10(b)</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>This code has been automatically applied because: NHS Region = Scotland · Claim Type = Capitation · Patient ASN marker = Enabled. No manual entry required.</div>
              </div>}

              {/* Scotland capitation without ASN */}
              {cl.region==="Scotland"&&cl.claimType==="capitation"&&!cl.hasASN&&<div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:10,fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>
                🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland capitation claim — ASN marker not set. Section X Code 10(b) not applied.
              </div>}

              {/* Free Repair / Replacement items table */}
              {(cl.region==="England"||cl.region==="Wales")&&cl.items?.length>0&&<div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:6}}>Treatment Items</div>
                <div style={{border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                  <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 70px 70px 110px 100px",padding:"5px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
                    {["Treatment","NHS £","Patient £","Free R/R","SNOMED"].map(h=><div key={h} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{h}</div>)}
                  </div>
                  {cl.items.map((item,ii)=>{
                    const snomedCode=Object.entries(DEFAULT_SNOMED).find(([k])=>cl.items[ii]&&k)?.[1]||null;
                    const snomedTerm=snomedCode?SNOMED_CODES.find(s=>s.code===snomedCode)?.term:"";
                    return(
                    <div key={ii} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 70px 70px 110px 100px",padding:"7px 10px",borderTop:ii>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",background:item.frStatus!=="none"?"#fffbf7":"#fff",alignItems:"center"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11}}>{item.l}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488"}}>£{item.nhsFee.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:item.frStatus!=="none"?"#94a3b8":"#374151",textDecoration:item.frStatus!=="none"?"line-through":"none"}}>£{item.frStatus!=="none"?"0.00":item.patientFee.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:item.frStatus==="free_repair"?"#fff7ed":item.frStatus==="free_replacement"?"#f5f3ff":"#f8fafc",color:item.frStatus==="free_repair"?"#c2410c":item.frStatus==="free_replacement"?"#7c3aed":"#94a3b8"}}>{item.frStatus==="none"?"No":item.frStatus==="free_repair"?"Free Repair":"Free Replacement"}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}} title={snomedTerm}>{snomedCode||"—"}</span>
                    </div>
                    );
                  })}
                  <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 70px 70px 110px 100px",padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b"}}>Totals</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488"}}>£{cl.items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0).toFixed(2)}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{cl.items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.frStatus!=="none"?0:i.patientFee),0).toFixed(2)}</span>
                    {cl.items.some(i=>i.frStatus!=="none")&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#c2410c",fontWeight:700}}>Charge suppressed</span>}
                  </div>
                </div>
                {cl.items.some(i=>i.frStatus!=="none")&&<div style={{marginTop:6,padding:"7px 10px",background:"#fff7ed",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fed7aa",fontSize:10,color:"#c2410c",fontWeight:600}}>
                  ⚡ Free {cl.items.some(i=>i.frStatus==="free_repair")?"Repair":""}{cl.items.some(i=>i.frStatus==="free_replacement")?"Replacement":""} applied — patient charge £0.00 · NHS/UDA claim value submitted normally
                </div>}
              </div>}

              {/* Continuation of Treatment */}
              {cl.is_continuation&&<div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fde68a",marginBottom:10,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span>📋</span>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#92400e",fontWeight:600}}>Continuation of Treatment — marker will be included in NHS claim submission</div>
              </div>}

              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                {cl.status==="draft"&&<button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ "+cl.patient+" claim submitted"+(scotlandASN?" including Section X Code 10(b)":""))}
                  style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                  <Send size={12}/>Submit Claim{scotlandASN?" + ASN Code 10(b)":""}
                </button>}
                <button onClick={()=>setSelClaim(null)} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Close</button>
              </div>
            </div>}
          </div>);
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ReceptionAIPage({rxEnabled}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState(rxEnabled?"inbox":"settings");
  const [paused,setPaused]=useState(false);
  const [selCall,setSelCall]=useState("CL1");
  const [showTx,setShowTx]=useState(true);
  const [showActions,setShowActions]=useState(true);
  const [answerMode,setAnswerMode]=useState("all");
  const [voice,setVoice]=useState("british_female");
  const [tone,setTone]=useState("friendly");
  const [greeting,setGreeting]=useState("Thank you for calling Riverside Dentistry, how can I help today?");
  const [afterHours,setAfterHours]=useState("Thank you for calling Riverside Dentistry. We are currently closed. For dental emergencies please call NHS 111. Otherwise please call back during opening hours or press 1 to leave a message.");
  const [fallback,setFallback]=useState("07700 900000");
  const [emergency,setEmergency]=useState("07700 999000");
  const [hours,setHours]=useState(OPENING_HOURS_INIT);
  const [bookRules,setBookRules]=useState(BOOKING_RULES_INIT);
  const [setupStep,setSetupStep]=useState(4);
  const [overflowSec,setOverflowSec]=useState(20);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2200);};

  const selLog=CALL_LOG.find(c=>c.id===selCall);
  const TABS=[{id:"inbox",l:"Call Inbox",n:CALL_LOG.length},{id:"settings",l:"AI Settings"},{id:"hours",l:"Opening Hours"},{id:"booking",l:"Booking Rules"},{id:"setup",l:"Setup & Test"},{id:"usage",l:"Usage & Billing"}];

  // ── Locked/upsell screen ──
  if(!rxEnabled) return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#1a1035 100%)",padding:32}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:560,textAlign:"center"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:56,marginBottom:14}}>📞</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:8}}>Reception AI</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.65)",lineHeight:1.8,marginBottom:28}}>Your 24/7 AI phone receptionist. Books appointments, answers enquiries and handles cancellations — without changing your phone number or provider.</div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:28,textAlign:"left"}}>
          {["No phone provider change needed","Books & cancels appointments 24/7","Full call transcripts & recordings","Transfers to human when needed","British voice — friendly or formal","SMS confirmations sent automatically","Intent detection — 14 call types","GDPR compliant — UK data only","After-hours emergency routing","Customisable greeting & tone","NHS & private fee information","Complaint detection & escalation"].map(f=><div key={f} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.75)"}}><span style={{color:"#5eead4",flexShrink:0}}>✓</span>{f}</div>)}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"18px 24px",background:"rgba(13,148,136,.12)",border:"1px solid rgba(13,148,136,.3)",borderRadius:14,marginBottom:20}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:900,color:"#5eead4",marginBottom:4}}>£79<span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:400,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}> / month</span></div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}>Includes 300 AI minutes · Additional minutes £0.08/min · SMS included</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"rgba(249,115,22,.1)",border:"1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.3)",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#fb923c",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:16}}>
          ⚡ This feature must be activated by your ProDentalConnect Super Admin. Once enabled it will be added to your monthly bill automatically.
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)"}}>Powered by Twilio · OpenAI · ProDentalConnect AI Engine · Provider-agnostic architecture</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  return(
    <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.12)",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* ── Header banner ── */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12,padding:"10px 18px 0"}}>
          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#7c3aed)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>📞</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              Reception AI
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:10,background:paused?"#fef3c7":!paused?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:paused?C.amber:C.green}}>{paused?"⏸ PAUSED":"● LIVE"}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:10,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple}}>Add-on · £79/mo</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginTop:1}}>
              <span>AI Number: <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:C.teal}}>0208 999 1234</span></span>
              <span>·</span><span>Provider: <strong>Twilio</strong></span>
              <span>·</span><span>Voice: British Female</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Test call initiated — call 0208 999 1234 to verify")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Phone size={12}/>Test Call</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setPaused(p=>!p);doToast(paused?"Reception AI resumed — now answering calls":"Reception AI paused — calls forwarding to fallback number");}} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${paused?"#bbf7d0":"#fde68a"}`,borderRadius:8,background:paused?"#f0fdf4":"#fffbeb",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:paused?C.green:C.amber}}>
              {paused?"▶ Resume":"⏸ Pause AI"}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,paddingLeft:4,marginTop:6}}>
          {TABS.map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,padding:"7px 15px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.teal:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>
            {t.l}{t.n?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:8,background:C.tealL,color:C.teal}}>{t.n}</span>:null}
          </button>)}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ════════════ CALL INBOX ════════════ */}
      {tab==="inbox"&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {/* Call list */}
        <div style={{width:310,flexShrink:0,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:C.card,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"9px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>All Calls ({CALL_LOG.length})</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.green,fontWeight:600}}>{CALL_LOG.filter(c=>c.booked).length} booked</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:600}}>{CALL_LOG.filter(c=>c.transferred).length} transferred</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
            {CALL_LOG.map(c=>{const intent=INTENTS[c.intent]||INTENTS.unknown;return(
              <div key={c.id} onClick={()=>setSelCall(c.id)} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",background:selCall===c.id?"rgba(13,148,136,0.06)":"transparent",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selCall===c.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`}}
                onMouseOver={e=>{if(selCall!==c.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fafffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selCall!==c.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:3}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:600}}>{c.caller}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{c.duration}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{c.time}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:intent.c+"15",color:intent.c}}>{intent.l}</span>
                  {c.booked&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>✓ Booked</span>}
                  {c.cancelled&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>Cancelled</span>}
                  {c.transferred&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>↗ Transferred</span>}
                  {c.risk==="high"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>⚠ High Risk</span>}
                </div>
              </div>
            );})}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Call detail */}
        {selLog&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            {/* Call header */}
            <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${RISK_C[selLog.risk]}12,#fff)`,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:"50%",background:RISK_C[selLog.risk]+"20",border:`2px solid ${RISK_C[selLog.risk]}40`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>📞</div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>{selLog.caller}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,fontSize:11,color:C.muted,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{selLog.phone}</span><span>·</span><span>{selLog.time}</span><span>·</span><span>{selLog.duration}</span>
                  <span>·</span><span>Confidence: <strong style={{color:selLog.confidence>.9?C.green:selLog.confidence>.75?C.amber:C.red}}>{(selLog.confidence*100).toFixed(0)}%</strong></span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:8,background:`${RISK_C[selLog.risk]}15`,color:RISK_C[selLog.risk]}}>Risk: {selLog.risk.toUpperCase()}</span>
                {selLog.booked&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:8,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>✓ Appointment Booked</span>}
                {selLog.transferred&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:8,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>↗ Transferred to Human</span>}
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* Stats grid */}
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
              {[["Intent",(INTENTS[selLog.intent]||INTENTS.unknown).l],["Result",selLog.result],["Duration",selLog.duration],["Called",selLog.time]].map(([l,v])=><div key={l} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,lineHeight:1.4}}>{v}</div>
              </div>)}
            </div>
            {/* Summary */}
            <div style={{padding:"12px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:5,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",color:C.text}}><Sparkles size={12} color={C.teal}/>AI Summary</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.75,background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,padding:"9px 12px"}}>{selLog.summary}</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* AI Actions */}
          {selLog.actions.length>0&&<div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowActions(v=>!v)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"11px 14px",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",textAlign:"left"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>AI Actions ({selLog.actions.length})</span>
              <ChevronDown size={13} color={C.muted} style={{transform:showActions?"rotate(180deg)":"none",transition:"transform .2s"}}/>
            </button>
            {showActions&&<div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
              {selLog.actions.map((a,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:a.status==="success"?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:a.status==="success"?C.green:C.red,flexShrink:0,marginTop:1}}>{a.status.toUpperCase()}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.muted,marginBottom:2}}>{a.type}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{a.result}</div>
                </div>
              </div>)}
            </div>}
          </div>}

          {/* Transcript */}
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowTx(v=>!v)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"11px 14px",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Full Transcript ({selLog.transcript.length} turns)</span>
              <ChevronDown size={13} color={C.muted} style={{transform:showTx?"rotate(180deg)":"none",transition:"transform .2s"}}/>
            </button>
            {showTx&&<div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 14px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:9}}>
              {selLog.transcript.map((line,i)=>{
                const meta={ai:{bg:C.tealL,border:C.tealB,c:C.teal,l:"AI"},patient:{bg:"#f1f5f9",border:"#e2e8f0",c:C.muted,l:"Patient"},system:{bg:"#fef3c7",border:"#fde68a",c:C.amber,l:"System"}}[line.s]||{};
                return <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:meta.bg,border:`1px solid ${meta.border}`,color:meta.c,flexShrink:0,minWidth:52,textAlign:"center",marginTop:2}}>{meta.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.65,flex:1}}>{line.m}</span>
                </div>;
              })}
            </div>}
          </div>
        </div>}
      </div>}

      {/* ════════════ AI SETTINGS ════════════ */}
      {tab==="settings"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14,maxWidth:940}}>
          {/* Answer mode */}
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Phone size={13} color={C.teal}/>Answer Mode</div>
            {[{id:"all",l:"Answer all calls",d:"AI answers every incoming call immediately"},
              {id:"after_hours",l:"After-hours only",d:"AI only answers outside your set opening hours"},
              {id:"missed",l:"Missed calls only",d:"AI catches unanswered calls after 4 rings"},
              {id:"overflow",l:"Overflow after seconds",d:"AI answers if staff don't pick up in time"},
              {id:"disabled",l:"Disabled",d:"AI never answers — forwarding disabled"}
            ].map(m=><label key={m.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:5,background:answerMode===m.id?C.tealL:"transparent",border:`1px solid ${answerMode===m.id?C.teal:C.border}`}} onClick={()=>setAnswerMode(m.id)}>
              <div style={{width:16,height:16,borderRadius:"50%",border:`2px solid ${answerMode===m.id?C.teal:"#d1d5db"}`,background:answerMode===m.id?C.teal:"transparent",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,marginTop:1}}>
                {answerMode===m.id&&<div style={{width:5,height:5,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff"}}/>}
              </div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{m.l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:1}}>{m.d}</div>
              </div>
            </label>)}
            {answerMode==="overflow"&&<div style={{marginTop:6,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Transfer to AI after</span>
              <input type="number" value={overflowSec} onChange={e=>setOverflowSec(e.target.value)} style={{width:60,padding:"4px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"center"}}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>seconds</span>
            </div>}
          </div>

          {/* Voice & Tone */}
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Star size={13} color={C.amber}/>Voice & Tone</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:8}}>Voice Profile</div>
            {[{id:"british_female",l:"British Female — Friendly",e:"👩‍💼",sub:"Warm, clear, approachable"},
              {id:"british_male",l:"British Male — Professional",e:"👨‍💼",sub:"Confident, formal, precise"},
              {id:"calm_premium",l:"Calm Premium Clinic",e:"✨",sub:"Relaxed, luxury practice tone"}
            ].map(v=><label key={v.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 10px",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:6,border:`1px solid ${voice===v.id?C.teal:C.border}`,background:voice===v.id?C.tealL:"transparent"}} onClick={()=>setVoice(v.id)}>
              <span style={{fontSize:18,flexShrink:0}}>{v.e}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:voice===v.id?700:500}}>{v.l}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{v.sub}</div></div>
              {voice===v.id&&<Check size={14} color={C.teal}/>}
            </label>)}
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:7,marginTop:8}}>Tone</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
              {["friendly","formal","direct"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setTone(t)} style={{flex:1,padding:"7px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${tone===t?C.teal:C.border}`,background:tone===t?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:tone===t?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:11,fontWeight:tone===t?700:400,cursor:"pointer",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{t}</button>)}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Greetings */}
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><MessageSquare size={13} color={C.purple}/>Greetings</div>
            <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Main greeting <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:400}}>(spoken on answer)</span></div>
              <textarea rows={3} value={greeting} onChange={e=>setGreeting(e.target.value)} style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%",resize:"none",lineHeight:1.75}}/>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>After-hours greeting</div>
              <textarea rows={3} value={afterHours} onChange={e=>setAfterHours(e.target.value)} style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%",resize:"none",lineHeight:1.75}}/>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Transfer numbers */}
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Phone size={13} color={C.red}/>Transfer Numbers</div>
            <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Fallback human number</div>
              <input value={fallback} onChange={e=>setFallback(e.target.value)} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}/>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>Reception desk or manager mobile — used for transfers and missed call overflow</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Emergency transfer number</div>
              <input value={emergency} onChange={e=>setEmergency(e.target.value)} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}/>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>Out-of-hours emergencies — AI also always advises 999 for life-threatening situations</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",lineHeight:1.65}}>
              🛡 <strong>AI Safety:</strong> The AI will never diagnose, prescribe, or give clinical advice. For emergencies it always says: "If you have facial swelling, uncontrolled bleeding, or difficulty breathing — call 999 or NHS 111 immediately."
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{marginTop:14}}>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("AI Receptionist settings saved")} style={{padding:"9px 24px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={13}/>Save Settings</button>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ════════════ OPENING HOURS ════════════ */}
      {tab==="hours"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:520}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Opening Hours</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>AI uses these hours to determine when to answer calls and what after-hours greeting to play.</div>
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            {Object.entries(hours).map(([day,h],i)=>(
              <div key={day} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"11px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{width:36,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:h.open?C.text:"#94a3b8"}}>{day}</div>
                <button onClick={()=>setHours(p=>({...p,[day]:{...p[day],open:!p[day].open}}))} style={{position:"relative",width:36,height:20,borderRadius:10,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:h.open?C.teal:"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0,transition:"background .15s"}}>
                  <span style={{position:"absolute",top:3,left:h.open?"calc(100% - 17px)":3,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                </button>
                {h.open?<>
                  <input type="time" value={h.from} onChange={e=>setHours(p=>({...p,[day]:{...p[day],from:e.target.value}}))} style={{border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,padding:"4px 7px",fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",cursor:"pointer"}}/>
                  <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>to</span>
                  <input type="time" value={h.to} onChange={e=>setHours(p=>({...p,[day]:{...p[day],to:e.target.value}}))} style={{border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,padding:"4px 7px",fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",cursor:"pointer"}}/>
                </>:<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",fontStyle:"italic"}}>Closed</span>}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening hours saved")} style={{marginTop:12,padding:"8px 20px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Save Hours</button>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ════════════ BOOKING RULES ════════════ */}
      {tab==="booking"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>AI Booking Rules</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>Control which appointment types the AI can book autonomously, which require staff approval, and which should always transfer to a human.</div>
        <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
            <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
              {["Appointment Type","AI Can Book","Requires Approval","Max Days Ahead","Same Day Only","Transfer to Human"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>)}
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody>{bookRules.map((r,i)=>(
              <tr key={r.type} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:r.transferHuman?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:600}}>{r.type}</td>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <button onClick={()=>setBookRules(p=>p.map((x,j)=>j===i?{...x,ai_book:!x.ai_book,transferHuman:false}:x))} style={{position:"relative",width:34,height:18,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:r.ai_book?C.teal:"#cbd5e1",transition:"background .15s"}}>
                    <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:r.ai_book?"calc(100% - 15px)":2,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                  </button>
                </td>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <button onClick={()=>setBookRules(p=>p.map((x,j)=>j===i?{...x,approval:!x.approval}:x))} disabled={!r.ai_book} style={{position:"relative",width:34,height:18,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:r.ai_book?"pointer":"not-allowed",background:r.approval&&r.ai_book?C.amber:"#cbd5e1",opacity:r.ai_book?1:.4,transition:"background .15s"}}>
                    <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:r.approval&&r.ai_book?"calc(100% - 15px)":2,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                  </button>
                </td>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <input type="number" value={r.max_days} min={0} max={365} disabled={!r.ai_book||r.same_day} onChange={e=>setBookRules(p=>p.map((x,j)=>j===i?{...x,max_days:+e.target.value}:x))} style={{width:60,padding:"3px 7px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",opacity:r.ai_book&&!r.same_day?1:.4}}/>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:4}}>days</span>
                </td>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <button onClick={()=>setBookRules(p=>p.map((x,j)=>j===i?{...x,same_day:!x.same_day,max_days:0}:x))} disabled={!r.ai_book} style={{position:"relative",width:34,height:18,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:r.ai_book?"pointer":"not-allowed",background:r.same_day&&r.ai_book?C.blue:"#cbd5e1",opacity:r.ai_book?1:.4,transition:"background .15s"}}>
                    <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:r.same_day&&r.ai_book?"calc(100% - 15px)":2,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                  </button>
                </td>
                <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <button onClick={()=>setBookRules(p=>p.map((x,j)=>j===i?{...x,transferHuman:!x.transferHuman,ai_book:false}:x))} style={{position:"relative",width:34,height:18,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:r.transferHuman?C.red:"#cbd5e1",transition:"background .15s"}}>
                    <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:r.transferHuman?"calc(100% - 15px)":2,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                  </button>
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}</tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        <div style={{marginTop:10,padding:"10px 14px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:C.blue,lineHeight:1.7}}>
          ℹ AI will always transfer to human when: complaint detected · angry language · legal threat · medical emergency risk · payment dispute · safeguarding concern · AI confidence below 70%.
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Booking rules saved")} style={{marginTop:12,padding:"8px 20px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Save Rules</button>
      </div>}

      {/* ════════════ SETUP WIZARD ════════════ */}
      {tab==="setup"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:580}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Setup Reception AI</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16}}>You do not need to change your phone provider. Just forward calls to your AI number.</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
            {[
              {n:1,l:"Choose your AI voice & greeting",done:true,detail:"British Female · Friendly tone"},
              {n:2,l:"Set your opening hours",done:true,detail:"Mon–Fri 8:30–17:30 · Sat 9–13:00"},
              {n:3,l:"Configure booking rules",done:true,detail:"9 appointment types configured"},
              {n:4,l:"Set fallback & emergency numbers",done:true,detail:`Fallback: ${fallback}`},
              {n:5,l:"Receive your AI forwarding number",done:true,detail:"Your number: 0208 999 1234",highlight:true},
              {n:6,l:"Forward your practice calls to the AI number",done:setupStep>=5,detail:"Log into your phone provider and forward 0207 111 2222 → 0208 999 1234"},
              {n:7,l:"Click Test Setup",done:setupStep>=6,detail:"Sends a test call to verify forwarding is working"},
              {n:8,l:"Make a test call to your practice number",done:setupStep>=7,detail:"Call 0207 111 2222 — the AI should answer"},
              {n:9,l:"Verify AI answered correctly",done:setupStep>=8,detail:"Check the Call Inbox for the test call transcript"},
              {n:10,l:"Turn Reception AI live ✓",done:setupStep>=9,detail:"Your AI receptionist is now answering real calls 24/7"},
            ].map((s,i)=>(
              <div key={s.n} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 14px",background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${s.done?C.teal+"40":s.highlight?"#fde68a":C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${s.done?C.teal:s.highlight?C.amber:C.border}`,borderRadius:10}}>
                <div style={{width:30,height:30,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.done?"#dcfce7":"#f1f5f9",border:`2px solid ${s.done?C.green:"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:s.done?C.green:"#94a3b8"}}>
                  {s.done?<Check size={14}/>:s.n}
                </div>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:s.done?C.text:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:s.highlight?C.amber:C.muted,marginTop:2,fontFamily:s.highlight?"monospace":"inherit",fontWeight:s.highlight?700:400}}>{s.detail}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:14}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{setSetupStep(s=>Math.min(s+1,9));doToast(setupStep>=8?"✓ All done — Reception AI is live!":"Step completed");}} style={{padding:"10px 24px",background:setupStep>=9?"#dcfce7":C.teal,color:setupStep>=9?C.green:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${setupStep>=9?C.green:C.teal}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>
              {setupStep===0?"Start Setup →":setupStep>=9?"✓ All Steps Complete":"Next Step →"}
            </button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setSetupStep(s=>Math.max(s-1,0));}} disabled={setupStep===0} style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted,opacity:setupStep===0?.4:1}}>← Back</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Test call initiated — call 0208 999 1234 now")} style={{padding:"10px 18px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",marginLeft:"auto"}}><Phone size={12}/>Test Call</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ════════════ USAGE & BILLING ════════════ */}
      {tab==="usage"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:14}}>
          {[{l:"AI Minutes Used",v:187,max:300,pct:62,c:C.teal},{l:"Calls Handled",v:54,max:null,c:C.green},{l:"SMS Sent",v:43,max:null,c:C.blue},{l:"Appointments Booked",v:31,max:null,c:C.purple}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>{s.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:s.pct>80?C.red:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>
              {s.max&&<><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>of {s.max} included · {s.pct}%</div>
              <div style={{height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,marginTop:6,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${s.pct}%`,background:s.pct>80?C.red:s.pct>60?C.amber:s.c,borderRadius:3,transition:"width .5s"}}/></div></>}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        {/* 80% alert */}
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:14,fontSize:12,color:"#92400e",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <AlertTriangle size={14} color={C.amber}/>
          <span><strong>62% of included minutes used.</strong> At current usage you will use approximately 301 minutes this month — 1 min over your plan. Extra minutes charged at £0.08/min.</span>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr",gap:14}}>
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Call Detail — This Month</div>
            {CALL_LOG.map((c,i)=>{const intent=INTENTS[c.intent]||INTENTS.unknown;return(
              <div key={c.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.caller}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{c.time}</div></div>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:intent.c+"15",color:intent.c,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>{intent.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.muted,flexShrink:0}}>{c.duration}</span>
                {c.booked&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:C.green,flexShrink:0}}>✓</span>}
              </div>
            );})}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>Monthly Bill Breakdown</div>
              {[["Reception AI base","£79.00"],["Included minutes (300)","£0.00"],["Extra minutes (0)","£0.00"],["SMS (43 sent)","Included"],["AI tokens","Included"],["Total this month","£79.00"]].map(([l,v],i)=><div key={l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"5px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",fontSize:12}}>
                <span style={{color:C.muted}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:i===5?800:500,color:i===5?C.teal:C.text}}>{v}</span>
              </div>)}
            </div>
            <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Usage Limits</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:11,marginBottom:6}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>Soft limit warning</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>80% ✓</span></div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:11,marginBottom:6}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>Hard limit</span><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Off</span></div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:11}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>Auto top-up</span><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Off</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── ADMIN — Reception AI Global Control ──────────────────────────────────────
function AdminReceptionAI({onTogglePractice}){
  const [globalEnabled,setGlobalEnabled]=useState(true);
  const [provider,setProvider]=useState("Twilio");
  const [prices,setPrices]=useState({base:79,includedMins:300,extraPerMin:0.08,sms:0});
  const [editField,setEditField]=useState(null);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2200);};

  const practiceStatus=[
    {name:"City Smile Clinic",   loc:"London EC1",  plan:"Enterprise",enabled:true, mins:523,calls:89,booked:67,bill:79,ai_number:"0208 001 0001"},
    {name:"Riverside Dentistry", loc:"Southampton",  plan:"Growth",    enabled:true, mins:241,calls:61,booked:44,bill:79,ai_number:"0208 001 0002"},
    {name:"Bayview Dentists",    loc:"Bristol BS1",  plan:"Growth",    enabled:true, mins:187,calls:54,booked:31,bill:79,ai_number:"0208 001 0003"},
    {name:"The Smile Studio",    loc:"Edinburgh EH1",plan:"Growth",    enabled:true, mins:98, calls:28,booked:19,bill:79,ai_number:"0208 001 0004"},
    {name:"Northside Dental",    loc:"Manchester M1",plan:"Starter",   enabled:false,mins:0,  calls:0, booked:0, bill:0, ai_number:null},
    {name:"Sunshine Dental",     loc:"Leeds LS1",    plan:"Growth",    enabled:false,mins:0,  calls:0, booked:0, bill:0, ai_number:null},
    {name:"Dental House",        loc:"Birmingham B1",plan:"Starter",   enabled:false,mins:0,  calls:0, booked:0, bill:0, ai_number:null},
    {name:"Coastal Dentistry",   loc:"Brighton BN1", plan:"Starter",   enabled:false,mins:0,  calls:0, booked:0, bill:0, ai_number:null},
  ];
  const activeP=practiceStatus.filter(p=>p.enabled);
  const totalRev=activeP.length*prices.base;
  const totalMins=practiceStatus.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.mins,0);
  const totalBooked=practiceStatus.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.booked,0);

  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Hero */}
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#1a1035 100%)",borderRadius:14,padding:"20px 24px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:20,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:44}}>📞</div>
        <div style={{flex:1}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:4,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            Reception AI — System Control
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 10px",borderRadius:10,background:globalEnabled?"rgba(13,148,136,.3)":"rgba(220,38,38,.3)",color:globalEnabled?"#5eead4":"#fca5a5"}}>{globalEnabled?"GLOBALLY ENABLED":"GLOBALLY DISABLED"}</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",lineHeight:1.7}}>Enable Reception AI per practice. Each activation adds £{prices.base}/mo to that practice's bill automatically. Provider-agnostic architecture — Twilio MVP, Vonage/SIP/Aircall planned.</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginBottom:2}}>Add-on Revenue / Month</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:30,fontWeight:900,color:"#5eead4",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{totalRev}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>{activeP.length} of {practiceStatus.length} practices active</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:16}}>
        {/* Global switch */}
        <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Server size={14} color={C.adminAccent}/>Global Feature Switch</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,padding:"12px",background:globalEnabled?"#f0fdf4":"#fef2f2",border:`1px solid ${globalEnabled?"#bbf7d0":"#fecaca"}`,borderRadius:9,marginBottom:12}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{setGlobalEnabled(v=>!v);doToast(globalEnabled?"Reception AI globally disabled":"Reception AI globally enabled — practices can now activate");}} style={{position:"relative",width:40,height:22,borderRadius:11,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:globalEnabled?C.teal:"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0,transition:"background .15s"}}>
              <span style={{position:"absolute",top:3,left:globalEnabled?"calc(100% - 19px)":3,width:16,height:16,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
            </button>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:globalEnabled?C.green:C.red}}>Reception AI {globalEnabled?"Enabled":"Disabled"}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>When off, no practice can activate</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:8}}>Telephony Provider</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {["Twilio","Vonage","Aircall","SIP"].map(p=><button key={p} onClick={()=>{setProvider(p);doToast(`Provider set to ${p}`);}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,border:`1.5px solid ${provider===p?C.teal:C.border}`,background:provider===p?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:provider===p?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:10,fontWeight:provider===p?700:400,cursor:"pointer"}}>{p}{provider===p?" ✓":""}</button>)}
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:6,lineHeight:1.6}}>Provider-agnostic architecture. Twilio is live MVP. Vonage, Aircall &amp; SIP coming Q3 2025.</div>
        </div>

        {/* Pricing */}
        <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><DollarSign size={14} color={C.green}/>Pricing</div>
          {[{k:"base",l:"Monthly base (£)",v:prices.base},{k:"includedMins",l:"Included minutes",v:prices.includedMins},{k:"extraPerMin",l:"Extra min rate (£)",v:prices.extraPerMin}].map(f=>(
            <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                {editField===f.k
                  ?<input type="number" defaultValue={f.v} onBlur={e=>{setPrices(p=>({...p,[f.k]:parseFloat(e.target.value)}));setEditField(null);doToast("Pricing updated");}} autoFocus style={{flex:1,padding:"5px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace"}}/>
                  :<div style={{flex:1,padding:"5px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",cursor:"text"}} onClick={()=>setEditField(f.k)}>£{f.v}</div>}
                <button onClick={()=>setEditField(f.k)} style={{padding:"5px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><Edit size={11}/></button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Stats */}
        <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><Activity size={14} color={C.blue}/>Platform Stats</div>
          {[{l:"Active Practices",v:activeP.length,c:C.teal},{l:"Total AI Minutes/mo",v:totalMins.toLocaleString(),c:C.blue},{l:"Appointments Booked",v:totalBooked,c:C.green},{l:"Monthly Revenue",v:`£${totalRev}`,c:C.purple}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"6px 0",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc",fontSize:12}}>
            <span style={{color:C.muted}}>{s.l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:700,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</span>
          </div>)}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Per-practice table */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Per-Practice Control</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Enabling adds £{prices.base}/mo to practice bill · AI number provisioned automatically</span>
        </div>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
          <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
            {["Practice","Plan","AI Number","Status","AI Mins","Calls","Booked","Bill Impact","Action"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"8px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>)}
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>{practiceStatus.map((p,i)=>(
            <tr key={p.name} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:p.enabled?"#fff":"#fafafa"}}>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><div style={{fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{p.loc}</div></td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:{Starter:C.muted,Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[p.plan]+"20",color:{Starter:C.muted,Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[p.plan]}}>{p.plan}</span></td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11,color:p.ai_number?C.teal:"#94a3b8"}}>{p.ai_number||"—"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:p.enabled?C.green:"#94a3b8"}}/><span style={{fontSize:11,color:p.enabled?C.green:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:600}}>{p.enabled?"Live":"Inactive"}</span></div></td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.mins||"—"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.calls||"—"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.teal,fontWeight:700}}>{p.booked||"—"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:p.enabled?C.teal:"#94a3b8"}}>{p.enabled?`+£${prices.base}/mo`:"£0"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                <button onClick={()=>doToast(`Reception AI ${p.enabled?"disabled for":"enabled for"} ${p.name}. Bill ${p.enabled?"reduced by":"increased by"} £${prices.base}/mo.`)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:7,border:"none",background:p.enabled?"#fef2f2":"#f0fdf4",color:p.enabled?C.red:C.green,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                  {p.enabled?"Disable":"Enable"}
                </button>
              </td>
            </tr>
          ))}</tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── ADMIN — Feature Management (all optional add-ons) ─────────────────────────

// ── ADMIN — Reception AI Global Control ──────────────────────────────────────
const REC_STATUS={
  not_contacted:{l:"Not contacted",bg:"#fee2e2",c:"#dc2626"},
  contacted:     {l:"Contacted",   bg:"#fef3c7",c:"#d97706"},
  responded:     {l:"Responded",   bg:"#dbeafe",c:"#1d4ed8"},
  rebooked:      {l:"Rebooked",    bg:"#dcfce7",c:"#16a34a"},
  converted:     {l:"Converted",   bg:"#dcfce7",c:"#16a34a"},
  declined:      {l:"Declined",    bg:"#f1f5f9",c:"#94a3b8"},
};

function RecoveryRow({item,type,onAction,onPreview}){
  const s=REC_STATUS[item.status]||REC_STATUS.not_contacted;
  const needsAction=item.status==="not_contacted";
  return(
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid #f8fafc`,alignItems:"center",background:needsAction?"#fff":"#fafeff",transition:"background .1s"}}
      onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=needsAction?"#fff":"#fafeff"}>
      {/* Value */}
      <div style={{minWidth:68,textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
        {item.value?<div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{item.value.toLocaleString()}</div>:<div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Unknown</div>}
      </div>
      {/* Info */}
      <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{item.patient||item.caller}</span>
          {item.dnaCount>1&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>{item.dnaCount}× DNA</span>}
          {item.nhs===true&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:C.blue}}>NHS</span>}
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{item.type}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:1}}>{item.since}{item.dentist?` · ${item.dentist}`:""}</div>
      </div>
      {/* Status */}
      <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:s.bg,color:s.c,flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{s.l}</span>
      {/* Actions */}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>
        <button onClick={()=>onPreview(item,type)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:7,border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,background:C.tealL,color:C.teal,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Eye size={9}/>Preview</button>
        {item.status==="not_contacted"&&<button onClick={()=>onAction(item,type,"send")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:7,border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,background:C.teal,color:"#fff",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>Send</button>}
        {item.value&&item.value>200&&item.status==="contacted"&&<button onClick={()=>onAction(item,type,"finance")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:7,border:"1px solid #d97706",background:"#fffbeb",color:C.amber,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer"}}>Finance</button>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function OutreachModal({item,type,onClose,onSend}){
  const [channel,setChannel]=useState(item.channel||"whatsapp");
  const [msg,setMsg]=useState(MSG_TEMPLATES[type]?.(item)||"");
  const [finance,setFinance]=useState(false);
  const finalMsg=finance?msg+"\n\n"+MSG_TEMPLATES.finance(item):msg;
  const chIcons={whatsapp:"💬",sms:"📱",email:"✉️"};
  return(
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:500,backdropFilter:"blur(4px)"}}>
      <div style={{background:C.card,borderRadius:14,width:540,maxWidth:"95vw",boxShadow:"0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4)",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",maxHeight:"90vh"}}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>Outreach — {item.patient||item.caller}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Message will appear to come from Riverside Dentistry</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={16}/></button>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 18px",flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {/* Channel selector */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:12}}>
            {["whatsapp","sms","email"].map(ch=><button key={ch} onClick={()=>setChannel(ch)} style={{flex:1,padding:"7px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${channel===ch?ch==="whatsapp"?C.wa:C.teal:C.border}`,background:channel===ch?ch==="whatsapp"?"#f0fdf4":C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:channel===ch?ch==="whatsapp"?C.wa:C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:12,fontWeight:channel===ch?700:400,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              <span>{chIcons[ch]}</span>{ch==="whatsapp"?"WhatsApp":ch==="sms"?"SMS":"Email"}
            </button>)}
          </div>
          {/* Patient info */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,marginBottom:12,fontSize:12}}>
            <Phone size={12} color={C.muted}/><span style={{color:C.muted}}>To:</span><strong>{item.patient||item.caller}</strong><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{item.phone}</span>
          </div>
          {/* Message */}
          <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Message <span style={{fontWeight:400,color:"#94a3b8"}}>(sent from Riverside Dentistry — edit freely)</span></div>
            <textarea rows={6} value={finalMsg} onChange={e=>setMsg(finance?e.target.value.replace(MSG_TEMPLATES.finance(item),""):e.target.value)} style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"9px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:1.75}}/>
          </div>
          {/* Finance toggle */}
          {(item.value>200||type==="plan")&&<label style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 12px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:10}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setFinance(v=>!v)} style={{position:"relative",width:32,height:18,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:finance?C.amber:"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0}}>
              <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:finance?"calc(100% - 15px)":2,width:14,height:14,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
            </button>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#92400e"}}>Add payment plan offer <span style={{fontWeight:400,color:"#b45309"}}>(Chrysalis Finance — 0% options available)</span></div>
          </label>}
          {/* Preview note */}
          <div style={{padding:"8px 11px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:10,color:C.green,lineHeight:1.6}}>
            ✓ Patient will receive this as a message from <strong>Riverside Dentistry</strong> — your practice name only, no software mention.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,justifyContent:"flex-end",flexShrink:0}}>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:500,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>{onSend(item,channel);onClose();}} style={{padding:"7px 18px",background:channel==="whatsapp"?C.wa:C.teal,border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <Send size={12}/>{channel==="whatsapp"?"Send via WhatsApp":channel==="sms"?"Send SMS":"Send Email"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// RECOVERY_DATA — complete structure matching RevenueRecoveryPage
const RECOVERY_DATA={
  plans:[
