function RevenueRecoveryPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("overview");
  const [data,setData]=useState(RECOVERY_DATA);
  const [modal,setModal]=useState(null);// {item,type}
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [sentCount,setSentCount]=useState(7);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const markStatus=(type,id,status)=>{
    setData(prev=>({...prev,[type]:prev[type].map(r=>r.id===id?{...r,status}:r)}));
  };
  const handlePreview=(item,type)=>setModal({item,type});
  const handleSend=(item,type)=>{
    markStatus(type,item.id,"contacted");
    setSentCount(n=>n+1);
    doToast(`✓ Message sent to ${item.patient||item.caller} via ${item.channel||"WhatsApp"}`);
  };
  const handleAction=(item,type,action)=>{
    if(action==="send")setModal({item,type});
    if(action==="finance")setModal({item,type,financeFirst:true});
  };

  // Totals
  const allItems=[...data.plans,...data.recalls,...data.cancellations,...data.dnas,...data.missed];
  const totalPipeline=allItems.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0);
  const notContacted=allItems.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length;
  const rebooked=allItems.filter(r=>r.status==="rebooked"||r.status==="converted").length;
  const recovered=data.plans.filter(r=>r.status==="rebooked").reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)+
    data.recalls.filter(r=>r.status==="rebooked"||r.status==="responded").reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)+
    data.dnas.filter(r=>r.status==="rebooked").reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)+
    data.cancellations.filter(r=>r.status==="rebooked").reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0);

  const TABS=[
    {id:"overview",     l:"Overview"},
    {id:"plans",        l:"Treatment Plans",  n:data.plans.length,      v:data.plans.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)},
    {id:"recalls",      l:"Overdue Recalls",  n:data.recalls.length,    v:data.recalls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)},
    {id:"cancellations",l:"Cancellations",    n:data.cancellations.length,v:data.cancellations.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)},
    {id:"dnas",         l:"No-Shows",         n:data.dnas.length,       v:data.dnas.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0)},
    {id:"missed",       l:"Missed Calls",     n:data.missed.length,     v:null},
  ];
  const srcData={plans:data.plans,recalls:data.recalls,cancellations:data.cancellations,dnas:data.dnas,missed:data.missed};
  const srcType={plans:"plan",recalls:"recall",cancellations:"cancellation",dnas:"dna",missed:"missed"};

  return(
    <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.12)",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}
      {modal&&<OutreachModal item={modal.item} type={modal.type} onClose={()=>setModal(null)} onSend={handleSend}/>}

      {/* ── Header ── */}
      <div style={{background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 18px 0",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#1e40af)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>💰</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>Revenue Recovery Engine
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:10,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>● Active</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Tracks lost revenue and contacts patients to recover bookings — automatically, quietly, on your behalf</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0}}>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Revenue at risk</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{totalPipeline.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width:1,background:C.border}}/>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Recovered this month</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:C.green,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{(recovered+1247).toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>
          {TABS.map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,padding:"7px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.teal:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>
            {t.l}
            {t.n&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:8,background:C.teal+"18",color:C.teal}}>{t.n}</span>}
            {t.v&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:8,background:"#fee2e2",color:C.red}}>£{t.v.toLocaleString()}</span>}
          </button>)}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ════ OVERVIEW ════ */}
      {tab==="overview"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        {/* KPI row */}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
          {[
            {l:"Revenue at Risk",  v:`£${totalPipeline.toLocaleString()}`,c:C.red,   sub:`${notContacted} patients not yet contacted`},
            {l:"Recovered (MTD)",  v:`£${(recovered+1247).toLocaleString()}`,c:C.green,sub:"from outreach + rebooking"},
            {l:"Recovery Rate",    v:"34%",c:C.teal,  sub:"industry avg: 18%"},
            {l:"Outreach Sent",    v:sentCount,c:C.blue,  sub:"this month"},
            {l:"Slots Filled",     v:rebooked+3,c:C.purple,sub:"via recovery engine"},
          ].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{s.l}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>{s.sub}</div>
          </div>)}
        </div>

        {/* Revenue breakdown */}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:14}}>
          <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Revenue Pipeline by Source</span>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Sending outreach to all 12 not-contacted patients")} style={{padding:"5px 14px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Send size={11}/>Contact All ({notContacted})</button>
            </div>
            {[
              {l:"Incomplete Treatment Plans",v:data.plans.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0),n:data.plans.length,nc:data.plans.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length,Icon:Clipboard,c:C.purple},
              {l:"Overdue Recalls",v:data.recalls.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0),n:data.recalls.length,nc:data.recalls.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length,Icon:RefreshCw,c:C.blue},
              {l:"Cancellations not rebooked",v:data.cancellations.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0),n:data.cancellations.length,nc:data.cancellations.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length,Icon:X,c:C.amber},
              {l:"No-Shows (DNA)",v:data.dnas.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0),n:data.dnas.length,nc:data.dnas.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length,Icon:AlertTriangle,c:C.red},
              {l:"Missed Calls",v:null,n:data.missed.length,nc:data.missed.filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").length,Icon:Phone,c:C.muted},
            ].map((src,i)=>{
              const maxV=data.plans.reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0);
              return <div key={src.l} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:src.c+"15",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}><src.Icon size={13} color={src.c}/></div>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:4}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{src.l}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:src.v?src.c:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{src.v?`£${src.v.toLocaleString()}`:"—"}</span>
                  </div>
                  {src.v&&<div style={{height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min((src.v/maxV)*100,100)}%`,background:src.c,borderRadius:3}}/></div>}
                </div>
                <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{src.n} patient{src.n!==1?"s":""}</div>
                  {src.nc>0&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.red,fontWeight:600}}>{src.nc} not contacted</div>}
                </div>
              </div>;
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Quick wins */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Zap size={13} color={C.amber}/>Quick Wins — Action Now</div>
              {[...data.plans,...data.recalls,...data.cancellations].filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted").slice(0,4).map((r,i)=>(
                <div key={r.id} style={{padding:"7px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:r.value>500?"#fef2f2":"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${r.value>500?"#fecaca":C.border}`,marginBottom:6,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{r.patient}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{r.type.slice(0,40)}</div>
                  </div>
                  {r.value&&<span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace",flexShrink:0}}>£{r.value}</span>}
                  <button onClick={()=>setModal({item:r,type:r.items?"plan":r.nhs!==undefined?"recall":"cancellation"})} style={{fontSize:9,padding:"2px 8px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:5,cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0}}>Send</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#1e40af)",borderRadius:12,padding:14,color:"#fff"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>This month's recovery</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:28,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace",marginBottom:2}}>£{(recovered+1247).toLocaleString()}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,opacity:.7}}>vs £0 without recovery engine</div>
              <div style={{height:5,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.2)",borderRadius:3,marginTop:10,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:"34%",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.8)",borderRadius:3}}/></div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,opacity:.6,marginTop:4}}>34% recovery rate · Target: 50%</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Activity feed */}
        <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Recent Outreach Activity</div>
          {[
            {patient:"David Kim",action:"Responded to recall reminder — booking appointment",time:"2 hours ago",v:"£99",c:C.green},
            {patient:"Sandra Okafor",action:"Replied 'YES' to treatment plan follow-up — calling back",time:"3 hours ago",v:"£650",c:C.green},
            {patient:"Emily Cooper",action:"Cancellation message sent via WhatsApp",time:"Yesterday",v:"£73.50",c:C.amber},
            {patient:"Tom Bright",action:"DNA follow-up message sent",time:"Yesterday",v:"£73.50",c:C.amber},
            {patient:"John Mills",action:"Crown reminder sent — awaiting response",time:"2 days ago",v:"£319",c:"#94a3b8"},
          ].map((a,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:a.c,flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}/>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{a.patient}</span> <span style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>{a.action}</span></div>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:a.c,fontFamily:"monospace",flexShrink:0}}>{a.v}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{a.time}</span>
          </div>)}
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ════ SOURCE TABS ════ */}
      {["plans","recalls","cancellations","dnas","missed"].includes(tab)&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
        <div style={{background:C.card,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"8px 14px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>Filter:</span>
          {Object.entries(REC_STATUS).map(([k,s])=>{const cnt=(srcData[tab]||[]).filter(r=>r.status===k).length;return cnt>0&&<span key={k} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:s.bg,color:s.c,cursor:"pointer"}}>{s.l} {cnt}</span>;})}
          <button onClick={()=>{
            const toSend=(srcData[tab]||[]).filter(r=>r.status==="not_contacted");
            toSend.forEach(r=>markStatus(tab,r.id,"contacted"));
            setSentCount(n=>n+toSend.length);
            doToast(`✓ ${toSend.length} messages queued — sending via WhatsApp & SMS`);
          }} style={{marginLeft:"auto",padding:"5px 14px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Send size={11}/>Contact All Not Contacted</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{background:C.card,margin:14,borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted}}>{TABS.find(t=>t.id===tab)?.l} · {(srcData[tab]||[]).length} patients</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:C.red,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{(srcData[tab]||[]).reduce((s,r)=>s+(r.value||0),0).toLocaleString()} at risk</span>
          </div>
          {(srcData[tab]||[]).map(item=> <RecoveryRow key={item.id} item={item} type={srcType[tab]} onAction={handleAction} onPreview={handlePreview}/>)}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

    {id:"N2",title:"Fill 14:30 hygiene cancellation today",reason:"Amy Grant has an empty 45-min slot at 14:30. 7 patients on the short-notice list haven't been contacted yet.",value:73.50,urgency:"high",cat:"calendar",icon:"🗓",action:"shortnotice"},
    {id:"N3",title:"Follow up overdue Band 2 — John Mills",reason:"Crown recommended 28 days ago. Not rebooked. Treatment plan open. £319 at risk.",value:319,urgency:"medium",cat:"revenue",icon:"🦷",action:"recovery",patient:"P1"},

  dentist:[
    {id:"D1",title:"Finalise clinical note — Tom Bright",reason:"Appointment was 13 May. Note is saved as draft. Legally, notes must be finalised within 24 hours.",value:null,urgency:"high",cat:"clinical",icon:"📝",action:"notes"},
    {id:"D2",title:"Submit FP17 — Amy Torres Band 2",reason:"Treatment completed 10 May. 5 days ago. NHS BSA submission pending. £73.50 claim.",value:73.50,urgency:"high",cat:"nhs",icon:"📋",action:"fp17"},
    {id:"D3",title:"Review John Mills — Warfarin patient in at 09:30",reason:"WARFARIN alert. INR check required before any invasive treatment. Verify before calling in.",value:null,urgency:"high",cat:"clinical",icon:"❤️",action:"patients",patient:"P1"},
    {id:"D4",title:"Contact David Park — implant consultation follow-up",reason:"Implant consultation was 8 May. No follow-up made. Treatment value: £1,800+. Patient hasn't rebooked.",value:1800,urgency:"medium",cat:"revenue",icon:"📞",action:"recovery",patient:"P5"},
    {id:"D5",title:"Update treatment plan — Sarah Chen crown",reason:"Crown fit appointment is tomorrow. Treatment plan items not checked off. Update before fit.",value:null,urgency:"medium",cat:"clinical",icon:"👑",action:"charting",patient:"P2"},
  ],
  manager:[
    {id:"M1",title:"Revenue at risk this month: £5,841",reason:"12 patients with uncontacted revenue opportunities. Recovery engine has identified high-probability conversions.",value:5841,urgency:"high",cat:"revenue",icon:"💰",action:"recovery"},
    {id:"M2",title:"Dr. M. Chen — UDA target 67% at Month 4",reason:"On current trajectory, Dr. Chen will miss UDA target by ~215 UDAs. Consider increasing appointment volume.",value:null,urgency:"high",cat:"nhs",icon:"📊",action:"uda"},
    {id:"M3",title:"Dental House invoice £450 overdue — 35 days",reason:"Lab invoice unpaid. Prestige Dental Lab may delay future cases. Authorise payment today.",value:450,urgency:"high",cat:"finance",icon:"💳",action:"payments"},
    {id:"M4",title:"Review team access — 2 new staff added",reason:"Emma Wilson added Tom Baker and Priya Nair last week. Their feature access hasn't been reviewed.",value:null,urgency:"medium",cat:"team",icon:"👥",action:"manager"},
    {id:"M5",title:"Reception AI generated 31 bookings this month",reason:"£2,728 recovered via AI reception. Consider expanding to after-hours answering for weekend coverage.",value:2728,urgency:"low",cat:"growth",icon:"🚀",action:"receptionai"},
    {id:"M6",title:"5 patients with membership plans expiring this month",reason:"Capitation/plan patients at renewal point. Contact to renew before they lapse.",value:495,urgency:"medium",cat:"revenue",icon:"🔄",action:"recovery"},
  ],
  hygienist:[
    {id:"H1",title:"Robert Hall — last perio chart 14 months ago",reason:"High BPE score (3) recorded Jan 2024. No follow-up charting done. Clinically overdue.",value:null,urgency:"high",cat:"clinical",icon:"📊",action:"charting",patient:"P3"},
    {id:"H2",title:"4 recall patients — hygiene 8+ months overdue",reason:"Lisa White (8 months), Tom Bright (11 months), Grace Park (14 months), Mark Davis (9 months). Contact priority list.",value:359,urgency:"medium",cat:"revenue",icon:"📅",action:"recovery"},
    {id:"H3",title:"Complete note — Emily Cooper hygiene 13 May",reason:"Hygiene appointment note is in draft. Finalise before end of day.",value:null,urgency:"high",cat:"clinical",icon:"📝",action:"notes"},
  ],
};

const CAT_META={
  revenue:{c:C.teal,  bg:C.tealL,  l:"Revenue"},
  clinical:{c:C.blue, bg:"#dbeafe",l:"Clinical"},
  nhs:     {c:C.nhs,  bg:"#dbeafe",l:"NHS"},
  calendar:{c:C.purple,bg:"#ede9fe",l:"Schedule"},
  risk:    {c:C.red,  bg:"#fee2e2",l:"Risk"},
  finance: {c:C.amber,bg:"#fef3c7",l:"Finance"},
  team:    {c:"#64748b",bg:"#f1f5f9",l:"Team"},
  growth:  {c:C.green,bg:"#dcfce7",l:"Growth"},
};
const URG={high:{c:C.red,l:"Urgent"},medium:{c:C.amber,l:"Today"},low:{c:C.green,l:"This week"}};

function NBAPage({role,setPage,openPatient}){
  const [dismissed,setDismissed]=useState(new Set());
  const [done,setDone]=useState(new Set());
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};

  const roleKey={reception:"reception",dentist:"dentist",manager:"manager",hygienist:"hygienist"}[role]||"reception";
  const priorities=(NBA_DATA[roleKey]||[]).filter(n=>!dismissed.has(n.id));
  const active=priorities.filter(n=>!done.has(n.id));
  const completed=priorities.filter(n=>done.has(n.id));
  const urgentCount=active.filter(n=>n.urgency==="high").length;
  const valueAtStake=active.reduce((s,n)=>s+(n.value||0),0);

  const handleAction=(n)=>{
    if(n.patient)openPatient(n.patient);
    else if(n.action)setPage(n.action);
    setDone(p=>new Set([...p,n.id]));
    doToast(`✓ Action taken — ${n.title.slice(0,40)}…`);
  };

  const saveIntegrationConfig=()=>{
    doToast("✓ "+configureModal?.name+" configuration saved"+(practiceName?" and pushed to "+practiceName:""));
    setConfigureModal(null);
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {/* Per-practice configure modal */}
      {configureModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:480,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"16px 20px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800}}>{configureModal.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{configureModal.description||configureModal.desc}</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>setConfigureModal(null)} style={{border:"none",background:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:20,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1}}>✕</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"16px 20px"}}>
            {practiceName&&<div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #99f6e4",fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:14}}>
              🏥 Configuring for: <strong>{practiceName}</strong> — changes will be pushed to their software immediately.
            </div>}
            {/* Status */}
            {configureModal.status==="Connected"&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:14,fontSize:11,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:600}}>
              ✓ Integration active · API credentials configured · Last synced: just now
            </div>}
            {/* API credentials */}
            {[{l:"API Key",ph:"••••••••••••••••"},{l:"API Secret / Webhook Secret",ph:"••••••••••••••••"},{l:"Webhook URL",ph:"https://app.prodentalconnect.com/webhook/..."},{l:"Callback URL",ph:"Auto-generated"}].map((f,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
                <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
                <input placeholder={f.ph} defaultValue={i<2?"••••••••••••••••":i===2?"https://app.prodentalconnect.com/webhook/"+configureModal.id:"Auto-generated"}
                  type={i<2?"password":"text"}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box",background:"#f8fafc"}}/>
              </div>
            ))}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:14}}>
              <button onClick={()=>{setConfigureModal(null);doToast(configureModal.name+" disconnected");}} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>Disconnect</button>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Test connection successful — "+configureModal.name)} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Test Connection</button>
              <button onClick={saveIntegrationConfig} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>
                {practiceName?"Save & Push to Practice":"Save Configuration"}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${C.nav} 0%,#0d2137 100%)`,padding:"18px 22px",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",letterSpacing:"-.01em",marginBottom:4,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              Today's Priorities
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:10,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)"}}>
                {new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{weekday:"long",day:"numeric",month:"long"})}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)"}}>
              {urgentCount>0?<span style={{color:"#fca5a5"}}>{urgentCount} urgent action{urgentCount!==1?"s":""} need attention now · </span>:"All urgent tasks clear · "}
              {active.length} priorit{active.length!==1?"ies":"y"} remaining
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",gap:12,flexShrink:0}}>
            {valueAtStake>0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginBottom:2}}>Value at stake</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:"#5eead4",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{valueAtStake.toLocaleString()}</div>
            </div>}
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginBottom:2}}>Done today</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:"#86efac",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{done.size}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Progress */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
          <div style={{flex:1,height:6,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${priorities.length>0?(done.size/priorities.length)*100:0}%`,background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#5eead4,#86efac)",borderRadius:3,transition:"width .4s"}}/>
          </div>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{done.size}/{priorities.length} complete</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Priority list */}
      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        {active.length===0&&done.size===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:48,color:"#94a3b8"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:40,marginBottom:12}}>✅</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginBottom:4}}>All clear!</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:13}}>No priorities for today. Check back tomorrow.</div>
        </div>}

        {/* Urgency groups */}
        {["high","medium","low"].map(urgency=>{
          const group=active.filter(n=>n.urgency===urgency);
          if(!group.length)return null;
          const u=URG[urgency];
          return(
            <div key={urgency} style={{marginBottom:18}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:10}}>
                <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.c,flexShrink:0}}/>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:u.c,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em"}}>{u.l} ({group.length})</span>
                <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:u.c+"20"}}/>
              </div>
              {group.map((n,idx)=>{
                const cat=CAT_META[n.cat]||CAT_META.revenue;
                return(
                  <div key={n.id} style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${urgency==="high"?n.value?C.red+"25":C.border:C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${u.c}`,borderRadius:11,padding:"14px 16px",marginBottom:9,display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"flex-start",boxShadow:urgency==="high"?"0 2px 8px rgba(220,38,38,0.06)":"none",transition:"box-shadow .15s"}}
                    onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.07)"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow=urgency==="high"?"0 2px 8px rgba(220,38,38,0.06)":"none"}>
                    {/* Number + icon */}
                    <div style={{flexShrink:0,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>
                      <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:9,background:urgency==="high"?"#fee2e2":urgency==="medium"?"#fffbeb":"#f0fdf4",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18}}>
                        {n.icon}
                      </div>
                      <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8"}}>#{idx+1}</span>
                    </div>
                    {/* Content */}
                    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:5}}>
                        <div style={{flex:1}}>
                          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.3,marginBottom:4}}>{n.title}</div>
                          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.65}}>{n.reason}</div>
                        </div>
                        {n.value&&<div style={{flexShrink:0,textAlign:"right"}}>
                          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:1}}>value</div>
                          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{n.value.toLocaleString()}</div>
                        </div>}
                      </div>
                      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginTop:6}}>
                        <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:7,background:cat.bg,color:cat.c}}>{cat.l}</span>
                        <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:7,background:u.c+"15",color:u.c}}>{u.l}</span>
                        <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                          <button onClick={()=>{setDismissed(p=>new Set([...p,n.id]));}} style={{padding:"5px 11px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Dismiss</button>
                          <button onClick={()=>handleAction(n)} style={{padding:"5px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:urgency==="high"?C.red:urgency==="medium"?C.amber:C.teal,color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
                            <ArrowRight size={11}/>Do it now
                          </button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          );
        })}

        {/* Completed */}
        {completed.length>0&&<div style={{marginTop:6}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.green,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em",marginBottom:8}}>✓ Completed today ({completed.length})</div>
          {completed.map(n=><div key={n.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"7px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #d1fae5",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:6,alignItems:"center",opacity:.75}}>
            <CheckCircle size={14} color={C.green}/>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,textDecoration:"line-through",flex:1}}>{n.title}</span>
            {n.value&&<span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.green,fontWeight:700}}>£{n.value.toLocaleString()}</span>}
          </div>)}
        </div>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function TeamChat({user}){
  // ── Chat data ──
  const STAFF_LIST=[
    {id:"U1",name:"Dr. Sarah Patel",  avatar:"SP",color:"#0d9488",role:"Dentist",  status:"active"},

  const MSGS_INIT={

    CH3:[

      {id:"a2",uid:"U2",text:"Sandra Okafor booked in for 14:30 🎉 Slot filled!",ts:N-1.7*H,reactions:{"🎉":["U3","U1","U5"]},pinned:false,thread:[]},
    ],
    CH4:[
      {id:"l1",uid:"U1",text:"Sarah Chen's PFM crown arrived ✅ Fit tomorrow 14:00",ts:N-5*H,reactions:{"✅":["U2"]},pinned:false,thread:[]},

    CH5:[
      {id:"u1",uid:"U1",text:"🚨 **PATIENT ALERT** — John Mills tomorrow 09:30. Penicillin allergy (CRITICAL) + Warfarin. Check INR in record before calling in. @Dr. Mike @Emma",ts:N-1*H,reactions:{"✅":["U4","U2"]},pinned:true,thread:[]},
    ],
    CH6:[
      {id:"s1",uid:"U5",text:"Anyone tried the new lunch place on the High Street? The sandwiches are incredible 🥪",ts:N-6*H,reactions:{"😊":["U1","U2","U6"]},pinned:false,thread:[]},
      {id:"s2",uid:"U2",text:"YES!! The chicken pesto one 😍 Been there 3 times this week",ts:N-5.9*H,reactions:{"😂":["U5","U6"]},pinned:false,thread:[]},
      {id:"s3",uid:"U3",text:"Group lunch Friday after training? 🍽️",ts:N-5*H,reactions:{"✅":["U1","U2","U5","U6"]},pinned:false,thread:[]},
    ],
  };
  const DM_MSGS_INIT={
    "U1_U2":[
      {id:"d1",uid:"U1",text:"Emma, can you make sure John Mills goes straight in tomorrow? He called me personally — very worried.",ts:N-2*H},
      {id:"d2",uid:"U2",text:"Absolutely Dr. Patel. Note on his record and I'll be watching for him. Want me to call him today to confirm?",ts:N-1.95*H},
      {id:"d3",uid:"U1",text:"Yes please, that would be wonderful 🙏",ts:N-1.9*H},
      {id:"d4",uid:"U2",text:"Done! He sounded really relieved 😊",ts:N-1.5*H},
    ],
    "U2_U6":[
      {id:"e1",uid:"U6",text:"Tom — can't find the 10:15 for Mrs. Roberts in tomorrow's calendar?",ts:N-3*H},
      {id:"e2",uid:"U2",text:"That one moved to 11:00 last Friday — should be showing now.",ts:N-2.9*H},
      {id:"e3",uid:"U6",text:"Found it! Thanks.",ts:N-2.8*H},
    ],
    "U1_U4":[
      {id:"f1",uid:"U4",text:"Sarah, David Park's implant notes — bone density assessment, is it in his record? Can't see it.",ts:N-4*H},
      {id:"f2",uid:"U1",text:"Yes! Clinical Notes → 8 May. Display issue most likely. Let me know.",ts:N-3.9*H},
      {id:"f3",uid:"U4",text:"Found it, all there. Thanks!",ts:N-3.8*H},
    ],
  };
  const STATUS_META_C={active:{c:"#22c55e"},away:{c:"#f59e0b"},offline:{c:"#94a3b8"}};
  const REACTIONS_C=["👍","❤️","😊","✅","😂","👏"];

  const me=STAFF_LIST.find(s=>s.id===user?.id)||STAFF_LIST.find(s=>s.role.toLowerCase()===user?.role)||(user?.role==="reception"?STAFF_LIST[1]:user?.role==="dentist"?STAFF_LIST[0]:STAFF_LIST[4]);
  // ── FIXED: Missing state declarations that caused TeamChat to crash ──
  const [msgs,setMsgs]=useState(MSGS_INIT);
  const [dmMsgs,setDmMsgs]=useState(DM_MSGS_INIT);
  const [channels,setChannels]=useState(CHANNELS);
  const [view,setView]=useState({type:"channel",id:"CH1"});
  const [input,setInput]=useState("");
  const [editingMsg,setEditingMsg]=useState(null);
  const [threadMsg,setThreadMsg]=useState(null);
  const [threadInput,setThreadInput]=useState("");
  const [searchQ,setSearchQ]=useState("");
  const [showEmoji,setShowEmoji]=useState(null);
  const [mentioning,setMentioning]=useState(false);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [showMembers,setShowMembers]=useState(false);
  const bottomRef=useRef(null);
  const inputRef=useRef(null);

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  useEffect(()=>{bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},[view,msgs,dmMsgs]);
  useEffect(()=>{if(inputRef.current)inputRef.current.focus();},[view]);

  const formatTime=ts=>{
    const d=new Date(ts);const now2=new Date();
    const isToday=d.toDateString()===now2.toDateString();
    if(isToday)return d.toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});
    return d.toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short"})+" "+d.toLocaleTimeString("en-GB",{hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"});
  };
  const getStaff=uid=>STAFF_LIST.find(s=>s.id===uid)||{name:"Unknown",avatar:"??",color:"#94a3b8"};
  const getDmKey=(a,b)=>[a,b].sort().join("_");
  const dmKey=view.type==="dm"?getDmKey(me.id,view.id):null;
  const activeMsgs=view.type==="channel"?(msgs[view.id]||[]):(dmMsgs[dmKey]||[]);
  const activeChan=channels.find(c=>c.id===view.id);
  const activeDmUser=view.type==="dm"?STAFF_LIST.find(s=>s.id===view.id):null;

  const send=()=>{
    if(!input.trim())return;
    const msg={id:"m"+Date.now(),uid:me.id,text:input,ts:Date.now(),reactions:{},pinned:false,thread:[]};
    if(view.type==="channel"){
      setMsgs(p=>({...p,[view.id]:[...(p[view.id]||[]),msg]}));
      // Clear unread for this channel
      setChannels(p=>p.map(c=>c.id===view.id?{...c,unread:0}:c));
    }else{
      setDmMsgs(p=>({...p,[dmKey]:[...(p[dmKey]||[]),msg]}));
    }
    setInput("");
  };

  const react=(msgId,emoji)=>{
    setMsgs(p=>{const ch={...p};if(!ch[view.id])return p;ch[view.id]=ch[view.id].map(m=>{if(m.id!==msgId)return m;const r={...m.reactions};if(!r[emoji])r[emoji]=[];if(r[emoji].includes(me.id))r[emoji]=r[emoji].filter(u=>u!==me.id);else r[emoji]=[...r[emoji],me.id];return{...m,reactions:r};});return ch;});
    setShowEmoji(null);
  };
  const togglePin=(msgId)=>{
    setMsgs(p=>{const ch={...p};if(!ch[view.id])return p;ch[view.id]=ch[view.id].map(m=>m.id===msgId?{...m,pinned:!m.pinned}:m);return ch;});
  };
  const sendThread=()=>{
    if(!threadInput.trim()||!threadMsg)return;
    const reply={id:"t"+Date.now(),uid:me.id,text:threadInput,ts:Date.now()};
    setMsgs(p=>{const ch={...p};ch[view.id]=ch[view.id].map(m=>m.id===threadMsg.id?{...m,thread:[...m.thread,reply]}:m);return ch;});
    setThreadInput("");
    doToast("Reply added to thread");
  };

  // Highlight @mentions and **bold**
  const renderText=(text)=>{
    const parts=text.split(/(\*\*.*?\*\*|@\w[\w\s]*)/g);
    return parts.map((part,i)=>{
      if(part.startsWith("**")&&part.endsWith("**"))return <strong key={i}>{part.slice(2,-2)}</strong>;
      if(part.startsWith("@"))return <span key={i} style={{color:C.teal,fontWeight:700,background:C.tealL,borderRadius:4,padding:"0 3px"}}>{part}</span>;
      return part;
    });
  };

  const pinnedMsgs=view.type==="channel"?(msgs[view.id]||[]).filter(m=>m.pinned):[];
  const onlineStaff=STAFF_LIST.filter(s=>s.status!=="offline"&&s.id!==me.id);
  const dmPartners=STAFF_LIST.filter(s=>s.id!==me.id);

  // Search across all channels
  const searchResults=searchQ.length>1?Object.entries(msgs).flatMap(([chId,list])=>list.filter(m=>m.text.toLowerCase().includes(searchQ.toLowerCase())).map(m=>({...m,chId}))):[];

  return(
    <div style={{display:"flex",flex:1,overflow:"hidden",background:"#f5f5f5"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",padding:"8px 18px",background:"#0f172a",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,zIndex:800,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{toast}</div>}
      {showEmoji&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:600}} onClick={()=>setShowEmoji(null)}/>}

      {/* ═══ LEFT SIDEBAR ═══ */}
      <div style={{width:240,flexShrink:0,background:"#1a1f2e",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {/* Workspace header */}
        <div style={{padding:"14px 14px 10px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:2,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7}}>
            🦷 Riverside Dentistry
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#22c55e"}}/>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)"}}>{onlineStaff.length+1} online now</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Search */}
        <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",borderBottom:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)"}}>
          <div style={{position:"relative"}}>
            <Search size={12} style={{position:"absolute",left:8,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)"}}/>
            <input value={searchQ} onChange={e=>setSearchQ(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search messages…" style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:7,color:"#fff",fontSize:11,padding:"5px 8px 5px 26px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}/>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"6px 0"}}>
          {/* Channels */}
          <div style={{padding:"6px 14px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".12em",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
            <span>Channels</span><button onClick={()=>doToast("New channel")} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",fontSize:14,lineHeight:1}}>+</button>
          </div>
          {channels.map(ch=>{
            const active=view.type==="channel"&&view.id===ch.id;
            return <button key={ch.id} onClick={()=>{setView({type:"channel",id:ch.id});setChannels(p=>p.map(c=>c.id===ch.id?{...c,unread:0}:c));setSearchQ("");}} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,padding:"5px 14px",border:"none",background:active?"rgba(79,70,229,0.25)":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",borderRadius:0,borderLeft:`2px solid ${active?"#818cf8":"transparent"}`}}
              onMouseOver={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:13,flexShrink:0}}>{ch.icon==="#"?"#":ch.icon}</span>
              <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:12,color:active?"#fff":ch.unread>0?"#e2e8f0":"rgba(255,255,255,.55)",fontWeight:active||ch.unread>0?600:400,textAlign:"left",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{ch.name}</span>
              {ch.unread>0&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:10,background:"#ef4444",color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{ch.unread}</span>}
            </button>;
          })}

          {/* Direct Messages */}
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".12em",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
            <span>Direct Messages</span><button onClick={()=>doToast("New direct message")} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.3)",fontSize:14,lineHeight:1}}>+</button>
          </div>
          {dmPartners.map(s=>{
            const active=view.type==="dm"&&view.id===s.id;
            const sm=STATUS_META_C[s.status];
            const key=getDmKey(me.id,s.id);
            const unreadDm=0; // could track
            return <button key={s.id} onClick={()=>{setView({type:"dm",id:s.id});setSearchQ("");}} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,padding:"5px 14px",border:"none",background:active?"rgba(79,70,229,0.25)":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",borderLeft:`2px solid ${active?"#818cf8":"transparent"}`}}
              onMouseOver={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="rgba(255,255,255,.05)";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(!active)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>
              <div style={{position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{width:22,height:22,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{s.avatar}</div>
                <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:-1,right:-1,width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:sm.c,border:"1.5px solid #1a1f2e"}}/>
              </div>
              <span style={{flex:1,fontSize:11,color:active?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,.65)",fontWeight:active?600:400,textAlign:"left",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{s.name.split(" ")[0]} {s.name.split(" ").slice(-1)}</span>
            </button>;
          })}
        </div>

        {/* Me footer */}
        <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>
            <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:me.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{me.avatar}</div>
            <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:-1,right:-1,width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#22c55e",border:"1.5px solid #1a1f2e"}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#fff",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{me.name.split(" ")[0]} {me.name.split(" ").slice(-1)}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>{me.role}</div></div>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Channel settings")} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}><Settings size={13}/></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══ MAIN CHAT AREA ═══ */}
      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#fff"}}>

        {/* Channel/DM header */}
        <div style={{height:52,borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",padding:"0 18px",gap:10,flexShrink:0,background:"#fff"}}>
          {view.type==="channel"&&activeChan&&<>
            <span style={{fontSize:18}}>{activeChan.icon}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:C.text}}>{activeChan.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{activeChan.desc}</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowMembers(v=>!v)} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,padding:"5px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>
              <Users2 size={12}/>{STAFF_LIST.length} members
            </button>
          </>}
          {view.type==="dm"&&activeDmUser&&<>
            <div style={{position:"relative"}}>
              <div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:"50%",background:activeDmUser.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{activeDmUser.avatar}</div>
              <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:-1,right:-1,width:9,height:9,borderRadius:"50%",background:STATUS_META_C[activeDmUser.status].c,border:`2px solid #fff`}}/>
            </div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>{activeDmUser.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{STATUS_META_C[activeDmUser.status].l} · {activeDmUser.role}</div>
            </div>
          </>}
        </div>

        {/* Search results overlay */}
        {searchQ.length>1&&<div style={{background:"#fffbeb",borderBottom:`1px solid #fde68a`,padding:"8px 18px",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.amber,marginBottom:6}}>🔍 Search results for "{searchQ}" ({searchResults.length})</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:4,maxHeight:160,overflowY:"auto"}}>
            {searchResults.map(r=>{const s=getStaff(r.uid);const ch=channels.find(c=>c.id===r.chId);return(
              <button key={r.id} onClick={()=>{setView({type:"channel",id:r.chId});setSearchQ("");}} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"5px 8px",borderRadius:7,border:`1px solid #fde68a`,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left"}}>
                <div style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{s.avatar}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>#{ch?.name} · {s.name.split(" ")[0]}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.text,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{r.text}</div>
                </div>
              </button>
            );})}
            {searchResults.length===0&&<div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>No messages found</div>}
          </div>
        </div>}

        {/* Pinned messages banner */}
        {pinnedMsgs.length>0&&<div style={{background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:`1px solid #bbf7d0`,padding:"6px 18px",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:12}}>📌</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.green}}>Pinned: </span>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap",flex:1}}>{pinnedMsgs[0].text.replace(/\*\*/g,"").slice(0,80)}{pinnedMsgs[0].text.length>80?"…":""}</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{pinnedMsgs.length} pinned</span>
        </div>}

        {/* Messages */}
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"12px 0"}}>
          {/* Date divider */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,padding:"4px 18px",marginBottom:8}}>
            <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:C.border}}/>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",whiteSpace:"nowrap",padding:"2px 10px",background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:10}}>Today</span>
            <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:C.border}}/>
          </div>

          {activeMsgs.map((msg,idx)=>{
            const s=getStaff(msg.uid);const isMe=msg.uid===me.id;
            const prevMsg=activeMsgs[idx-1];const showAvatar=!prevMsg||prevMsg.uid!==msg.uid||msg.ts-prevMsg.ts>5*MIN;
            const totalReactions=Object.values(msg.reactions||{}).reduce((s,v)=>s+v.length,0);
            return(
              <div key={msg.id} className="msg-row" style={{padding:`${showAvatar?"10px":"1px"} 18px 1px`,position:"relative",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}
                onMouseOver={e=>{const actions=e.currentTarget.querySelector(".msg-actions");if(actions)actions.style.display="flex";}}
                onMouseOut={e=>{const actions=e.currentTarget.querySelector(".msg-actions");if(actions)actions.style.display="none";}}>
                {/* Avatar */}
                {showAvatar?<div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}>{s.avatar}</div>:<div style={{width:36,flexShrink:0}}/>}
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  {showAvatar&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"baseline",marginBottom:2}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.text}}>{s.name}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{formatTime(msg.ts)}</span>
                    {msg.pinned&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"0 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#f0fdf4",color:C.green}}>📌 Pinned</span>}
                  </div>}
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.6}}>{renderText(msg.text)}</div>
                  {/* Reactions */}
                  {totalReactions>0&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,marginTop:4,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                    {Object.entries(msg.reactions||{}).filter(([,uids])=>uids.length>0).map(([emoji,uids])=>(
                      <button key={emoji} onClick={()=>react(msg.id,emoji)} style={{display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center",padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${uids.includes(me.id)?C.teal:C.border}`,background:uids.includes(me.id)?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12}}>
                        <span>{emoji}</span><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:uids.includes(me.id)?C.teal:C.muted}}>{uids.length}</span>
                      </button>
                    ))}
                  </div>}
                  {/* Thread replies */}
                  {msg.thread?.length>0&&<button onClick={()=>setThreadMsg(msg)} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginTop:4,padding:"3px 0",border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600}}>
                    💬 {msg.thread.length} repl{msg.thread.length===1?"y":"ies"}
                  </button>}
                </div>
                {/* Hover actions */}
                <div className="msg-actions" style={{display:"none",gap:4,position:"absolute",right:18,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,padding:"3px",boxShadow:"0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",zIndex:10}}>
                  {REACTIONS_C.slice(0,4).map(e=><button key={e} onClick={()=>react(msg.id,e)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:14,padding:"2px 4px",borderRadius:5}} title={e}>{e}</button>)}
                  <div style={{width:1,background:C.border,margin:"0 2px"}}/>
                  <button onClick={()=>setThreadMsg(msg)} title="Reply in thread" style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted,padding:"2px 5px",borderRadius:5,fontSize:12}}>💬</button>
                  {view.type==="channel"&&<button onClick={()=>togglePin(msg.id)} title={msg.pinned?"Unpin":"Pin"} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:msg.pinned?C.green:C.muted,padding:"2px 5px",borderRadius:5,fontSize:12}}>📌</button>}
                  {isMe&&<button onClick={()=>doToast("Message deleted")} title="Delete" style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.red,padding:"2px 5px",borderRadius:5,fontSize:12}}>🗑</button>}
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}

          {activeMsgs.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"48px 20px",color:"#94a3b8"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:10}}>{view.type==="channel"?"💬":"✉️"}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:C.text,marginBottom:4}}>{view.type==="channel"?`Welcome to #${activeChan?.name}!`:`Start a conversation with ${activeDmUser?.name}`}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12}}>{view.type==="channel"?activeChan?.desc:"Send a direct message"}</div>
          </div>}
          <div ref={bottomRef}/>
        </div>

        {/* Input bar */}
        <div style={{padding:"8px 14px 12px",flexShrink:0,background:"#fff"}}>
          <div style={{border:`1.5px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",background:"#fff",boxShadow:"0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.06)"}}>
            {/* Formatting toolbar */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:2,padding:"6px 10px 0",borderBottom:`1px solid #f1f5f9`}}>
              {[["B","font-bold"],["I","font-italic"],["@","mention"],["#","channel"]].map(([l,t])=><button key={t} onClick={()=>{if(t==="mention"){setInput(p=>p+"@");}else if(t==="channel"){setInput(p=>p+"#");}}} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",width:26,height:22,borderRadius:5,fontSize:11,fontWeight:l==="B"?"700":l==="I"?"400":500,fontStyle:l==="I"?"italic":"normal",color:C.muted,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}
                onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f1f5f9"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>{l}</button>)}
              <div style={{flex:1}}/>
              <button style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:14,padding:"0 4px"}} title="Attach file" onClick={()=>doToast("File sharing coming soon")}>📎</button>
              <button style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:14,padding:"0 4px"}} title="Add GIF" onClick={()=>doToast("GIF support coming soon")}>🎞</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"flex-end",gap:8,padding:"8px 12px 8px"}}>
              <textarea ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e=>setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>{if(e.key==="Enter"&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();send();}}} placeholder={view.type==="channel"?`Message #${activeChan?.name||""}`:`Message ${activeDmUser?.name||""}`} rows={1} style={{flex:1,border:"none",outline:"none",resize:"none",fontSize:13,fontFamily:"inherit",color:C.text,background:"transparent",lineHeight:1.5,maxHeight:120,overflowY:"auto"}}/>
              <button onClick={send} disabled={!input.trim()} style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:9,background:input.trim()?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"#f1f5f9",border:"none",cursor:input.trim()?"pointer":"not-allowed",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,transition:"background .15s"}}>
                <Send size={14} color={input.trim()?"#fff":"#94a3b8"}/>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:4,textAlign:"center"}}>
            <strong>Enter</strong> to send · <strong>Shift+Enter</strong> for new line · Hover message for reactions &amp; actions
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ═══ RIGHT PANELS ═══ */}
      {/* Thread panel */}
      {threadMsg&&<div style={{width:320,flexShrink:0,borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:C.card,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Thread</span>
          <button onClick={()=>setThreadMsg(null)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={15}/></button>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"12px 14px"}}>
          {/* Original message */}
          <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:10,marginBottom:12,borderLeft:`3px solid ${C.teal}`}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:5}}>
              <div style={{width:24,height:24,borderRadius:"50%",background:getStaff(threadMsg.uid).color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{getStaff(threadMsg.uid).avatar}</div>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{getStaff(threadMsg.uid).name.split(" ")[0]}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{formatTime(threadMsg.ts)}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.5}}>{renderText(threadMsg.text)}</div>
          </div>
          {/* Replies */}
          {(threadMsg.thread||[]).map((r,i)=>{const s=getStaff(r.uid);return(
            <div key={r.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{s.avatar}</div>
              <div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"baseline",marginBottom:2}}><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{s.name.split(" ")[0]}</span><span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{formatTime(r.ts)}</span></div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.text,lineHeight:1.5}}>{renderText(r.text)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );})}
          {(threadMsg.thread||[]).length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"16px 0",fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No replies yet — be the first!</div>}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <input value={threadInput} onChange={e=>setThreadInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&sendThread()} placeholder="Reply in thread…" style={{...inp,flex:1,fontSize:12,borderRadius:20,padding:"7px 12px"}}/>
            <button onClick={sendThread} disabled={!threadInput.trim()} style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",opacity:threadInput.trim()?1:.5}}><Send size={12} color="#fff"/></button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Members panel */}
      {showMembers&&!threadMsg&&<div style={{width:220,flexShrink:0,borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:C.card,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Members ({STAFF_LIST.length})</span>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowMembers(false)} style={{border:"none",background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",color:C.muted}}><X size={15}/></button>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"8px 0"}}>
          {["active","away","offline"].map(status=>{
            const members=STAFF_LIST.filter(s=>s.status===status);if(!members.length)return null;const sm=STATUS_META_C[status];
            return <div key={status}>
              <div style={{padding:"6px 16px 3px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em"}}>{sm.l} — {members.length}</div>
              {members.map(s=><div key={s.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,padding:"6px 14px",alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer"}}
                onClick={()=>{setView({type:"dm",id:s.id});setShowMembers(false);}}
                onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fafc"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent"}>
                <div style={{position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <div style={{width:30,height:30,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{s.avatar}</div>
                  <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:-1,right:-1,width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:sm.c,border:`2px solid #fff`}}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{s.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{s.role}</div>
                </div>
              </div>)}
            </div>;
          })}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}
function ManagerOnlyGate({feature}){
  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexDirection:"column",gap:14,padding:40}}>
      <div style={{width:52,height:52,borderRadius:14,background:"#ede9fe",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:26}}>🛡</div>
      <div style={{textAlign:"center",maxWidth:340}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:6}}>{feature}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#6b7280",lineHeight:1.7}}>This section is managed by your Practice Manager. Please contact your manager to make changes to {feature.toLowerCase()}.</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"9px 18px",background:"#f3f4f6",border:"1px solid #e5e7eb",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#6b7280",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}><Shield size={12} color="#9ca3af"/>Manager access required</div>
    </div>
  );
}

  {id:"TK005",title:"Billing question — why did our bill increase this month?",cat:"Billing & Payments",priority:"medium",status:"open",practice:"Northside Dental",plan:"Growth",channel:"portal",created:"14 May 2025 08:15",updated:"14 May 2025 08:15",assignee:null,msgs:[{uid:"staff",name:"Manager",text:"Our invoice is £228 this month but it was £149 last month.
