// Support channels per plan
const PLAN_SUPPORT={
  Starter:{channels:["email"],response:"24 hours",phone:null,whatsapp:false,chat:false,csm:false,emergency:false},
  Growth:{channels:["email","phone","whatsapp"],response:"4 hours",phone:"0800 123 4567",whatsapp:"+44 7700 900900",chat:false,csm:false,emergency:false},
  Enterprise:{channels:["email","phone","whatsapp","chat"],response:"1 hour",phone:"0800 123 4567",whatsapp:"+44 7700 900900",chat:true,csm:true,csm_name:"Alex M.",csm_email:"alex@prodental.co.uk",emergency:true,emergency_line:"0800 999 4567"},
};

const STATUS_META_TICKET={
  open:       {c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",l:"Open"},
  in_progress:{c:"#0369a1",bg:"#dbeafe",l:"In Progress"},
  waiting:    {c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",l:"Waiting on Customer"},
  resolved:   {c:"#16a34a",bg:"#dcfce7",l:"Resolved"},
  closed:     {c:"#94a3b8",bg:"#f1f5f9",l:"Closed"},
};
const CHAN_ICON={portal:"🌐",email:"✉️",phone:"📞",whatsapp:"💬"};

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PRACTICE — Help & Support Page
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function HelpSupportPage({user}){
  const practicePlan="Growth"; // In real app: from practice data
  const support=PLAN_SUPPORT[practicePlan]||PLAN_SUPPORT.Starter;
  const [tickets,setTickets]=useState(TICKETS_INIT.filter(t=>t.practice==="Riverside Dentistry"));
  const [view,setView]=useState("list"); // list | new | detail
  const [selTicket,setSelTicket]=useState(null);
  const [newMsg,setNewMsg]=useState("");
  const [form,setForm]=useState({title:"",cat:TICKET_CATS[0],priority:"medium",desc:""});
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2200);};

  const submitTicket=()=>{
    if(!form.title.trim()||!form.desc.trim())return;
    const t={id:"TK"+Date.now(),title:form.title,cat:form.cat,priority:form.priority,status:"open",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",plan:practicePlan,channel:"portal",created:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),updated:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),assignee:null,
      msgs:[{uid:"staff",name:user?.name||"Staff",text:form.desc,ts:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")}]};
    setTickets(p=>[t,...p]);setView("list");setForm({title:"",cat:TICKET_CATS[0],priority:"medium",desc:""});
    doToast("✓ Ticket submitted — we'll respond within "+support.response);
  };
  const sendReply=()=>{
    if(!newMsg.trim())return;
    const reply={uid:"staff",name:user?.name||"Staff",text:newMsg,ts:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")};
    setTickets(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===selTicket.id?{...t,msgs:[...t.msgs,reply],updated:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")}:t));
    setSelTicket(p=>({...p,msgs:[...p.msgs,reply]}));
    setNewMsg("");doToast("Reply sent");
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"14px 20px",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>🎧</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Help & Support</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Riverside Dentistry · <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:C.teal}}>{practicePlan} Plan</span> · Response within <strong>{support.response}</strong></div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
            {view!=="new"&&<button onClick={()=>{setView("new");setSelTicket(null);}} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>New Ticket</button>}
            {view!=="list"&&<button onClick={()=>setView("list")} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>← All Tickets</button>}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Contact options based on plan */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>🌐</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>Support Portal</span><span style={{color:C.muted}}>Always available</span>
          </div>
          {support.channels.includes("email")&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>✉️</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>Email</span><a href="mailto:support@prodental.co.uk" style={{color:C.teal,textDecoration:"none"}}>support@prodental.co.uk</a>
          </div>}
          {support.channels.includes("phone")&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>📞</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>Phone</span><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:C.teal}}>{support.phone}</span><span style={{color:C.muted}}>Mon–Fri 8am–6pm</span>
          </div>}
          {support.channels.includes("whatsapp")&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>💬</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>WhatsApp</span><span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:"#25d366"}}>{support.whatsapp}</span>
          </div>}
          {support.csm&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#ede9fe",border:"1px solid #c4b5fd",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>👤</span><span style={{fontWeight:600,color:C.purple}}>Dedicated CSM:</span><span style={{color:C.purple}}>{support.csm_name}</span>
          </div>}
          {!support.channels.includes("phone")&&<div style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>📞</span>Phone support — upgrade to Growth or Enterprise
          </div>}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── List view ── */}
      {view==="list"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        {tickets.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:48,color:"#94a3b8"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:12}}>🎉</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,color:C.text,marginBottom:4}}>No support tickets</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12}}>Create a ticket if you need any help</div>
        </div>}
        {tickets.map(t=>{const s=STATUS_META_TICKET[t.status];const p=TICKET_PRIORITIES.find(x=>x.id===t.priority);return(
          <div key={t.id} onClick={()=>{setSelTicket(t);setView("detail");}} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${p.c}`,borderRadius:11,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:10,cursor:"pointer",transition:"box-shadow .15s"}}
            onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07)"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="none"}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.id}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:s.bg,color:s.c}}>{s.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:p.c+"18",color:p.c}}>{p.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{CHAN_ICON[t.channel]} {t.channel}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginBottom:3}}>{t.title}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{t.cat} · Created {t.created} · {t.msgs.length} message{t.msgs.length!==1?"s":""}</div>
              </div>
              {t.assignee&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:600,flexShrink:0}}>Assigned: {t.assignee}</div>}
            </div>
          </div>
        );})}
      </div>}

      {/* ── New ticket form ── */}
      {view==="new"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:640}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Create Support Ticket</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16}}>We'll respond within {support.response}. For critical issues, please also call {support.phone||"your support line"} if available on your plan.</div>
          <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:20,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:14}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Title *</div>
              <input value={form.title} onChange={e=>setForm(p=>({...p,title:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Brief description of the issue…" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Category</div>
                <select value={form.cat} onChange={e=>setForm(p=>({...p,cat:e.target.value}))} style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}>
                  {TICKET_CATS.map(c=><option key={c}>{c}</option>)}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Priority</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                  {TICKET_PRIORITIES.map(p=><button key={p.id} onClick={()=>setForm(x=>({...x,priority:p.id}))} style={{flex:1,padding:"7px 4px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${form.priority===p.id?p.c:C.border}`,background:form.priority===p.id?p.c+"18":"#f8fafc",color:form.priority===p.id?p.c:C.muted,fontSize:10,fontWeight:form.priority===p.id?800:400,cursor:"pointer"}}>{p.l}</button>)}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:5}}>Description *</div>
              <textarea rows={5} value={form.desc} onChange={e=>setForm(p=>({...p,desc:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Please describe the issue in detail. Include steps to reproduce, what you expected to happen, and what actually happened. Screenshots can be attached via email to support@prodental.co.uk" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"},resize:"vertical",lineHeight:1.7}}/>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:C.blue}}>
              ℹ Your ticket will be assigned a reference number. You can track progress here in the portal and we'll also reply by email to {user?.email||"your registered email"}.
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
              <button onClick={submitTicket} disabled={!form.title.trim()||!form.desc.trim()} style={{padding:"9px 24px",background:form.title&&form.desc?C.teal:"#e2e8f0",color:form.title&&form.desc?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:form.title&&form.desc?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Submit Ticket</button>
              <button onClick={()=>setView("list")} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ── Ticket detail ── */}
      {view==="detail"&&selTicket&&(()=>{const s=STATUS_META_TICKET[selTicket.status];const p=TICKET_PRIORITIES.find(x=>x.id===selTicket.priority);return(
        <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#f8fafc",flexShrink:0}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{selTicket.id}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:s.bg,color:s.c}}>{s.l}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:p.c+"18",color:p.c}}>{p.l}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{selTicket.title}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"16px 20px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
            {selTicket.msgs.map((m,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,justifyContent:m.uid==="staff"?"flex-end":"flex-start"}}>
              {m.uid==="admin"&&<div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>🎧</div>}
              <div style={{maxWidth:"75%"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3,textAlign:m.uid==="staff"?"right":"left"}}>{m.name} · {m.ts}</div>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 13px",borderRadius:m.uid==="staff"?"12px 12px 0 12px":"12px 12px 12px 0",background:m.uid==="staff"?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"#fff",border:m.uid==="staff"?"none":`1px solid ${C.border}`,color:m.uid==="staff"?"#fff":C.text,fontSize:13,lineHeight:1.65}}>{m.text}</div>
              </div>
              {m.uid==="staff"&&<div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{m.name[0]}</div>}
            </div>)}
          </div>
          {selTicket.status!=="resolved"&&selTicket.status!=="closed"&&<div style={{padding:"12px 20px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,flexShrink:0}}>
            <textarea rows={2} value={newMsg} onChange={e=>setNewMsg(e.target.value)} placeholder="Add a reply or more information…" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",flex:1},resize:"none"}}/>
            <button onClick={sendReply} disabled={!newMsg.trim()} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:newMsg.trim()?C.teal:"#e2e8f0",color:newMsg.trim()?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:newMsg.trim()?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,alignSelf:"flex-end",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Send size={12}/>Reply</button>
          </div>}
        </div>
      );})()||null}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN — Support Ticket Management System
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminTickets(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const [tickets,setTickets]=useState(TICKETS_INIT);
  const [selId,setSelId]=useState("TK007");
  const [statusFilter,setStatusFilter]=useState("all");
  const [priorityFilter,setPriorityFilter]=useState("all");
  const [planFilter,setPlanFilter]=useState("all");
  const [reply,setReply]=useState("");
  const [assignee,setAssignee]=useState("");

  const filtered=tickets.filter(t=>{
    if(statusFilter!=="all"&&t.status!==statusFilter)return false;
    if(priorityFilter!=="all"&&t.priority!==priorityFilter)return false;
    if(planFilter!=="all"&&t.plan!==planFilter)return false;
    return true;
  }).sort((a,b)=>{const po={critical:0,high:1,medium:2,low:3};return po[a.priority]-po[b.priority];});
  const sel=tickets.find(t=>t.id===selId);

  const sendReply=()=>{
    if(!reply.trim())return;
    const msg={uid:"admin",name:(assignee||"Support Team")+" (Support)",text:reply,ts:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")};
    setTickets(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===selId?{...t,msgs:[...t.msgs,msg],updated:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),assignee:assignee||t.assignee,status:t.status==="open"?"in_progress":t.status}:t));
    setReply("");doToast("Reply sent to "+sel?.practice);
  };
  const updateStatus=(id,status)=>{setTickets(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,status}:t));doToast("Status updated to "+STATUS_META_TICKET[status]?.l);};
  const updateAssignee=(id,name)=>{setTickets(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,assignee:name}:t));};

  const stats={open:tickets.filter(t=>t.status==="open").length,in_progress:tickets.filter(t=>t.status==="in_progress").length,critical:tickets.filter(t=>t.priority==="critical").length,resolved:tickets.filter(t=>t.status==="resolved").length};

  return(
    <div style={{display:"flex",flex:1,overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Left — ticket list */}
      <div style={{width:360,flexShrink:0,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#fff"}}>
        {/* Stats */}
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#1a1035)",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:8}}>Support Tickets</div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:6}}>
            {[{l:"Open",v:stats.open,c:"#fca5a5"},{l:"Active",v:stats.in_progress,c:"#93c5fd"},{l:"Critical",v:stats.critical,c:"#c4b5fd"},{l:"Resolved",v:stats.resolved,c:"#86efac"}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"5px",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.07)"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>{s.l}</div>
            </div>)}
          </div>
        </div>
        {/* Filters */}
        <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap",flexShrink:0,background:"#f8fafc"}}>
          <select value={statusFilter} onChange={e=>setStatusFilter(e.target.value)} style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 6px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
            <option value="all">All Status</option>
            {Object.entries(STATUS_META_TICKET).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.l}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={priorityFilter} onChange={e=>setPriorityFilter(e.target.value)} style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 6px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
            <option value="all">All Priority</option>
            {TICKET_PRIORITIES.map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.l}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={planFilter} onChange={e=>setPlanFilter(e.target.value)} style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 6px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
            <option value="all">All Plans</option>
            {["Starter","Growth","Enterprise"].map(p=><option key={p}>{p}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        {/* List */}
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {filtered.map(t=>{const s=STATUS_META_TICKET[t.status];const p=TICKET_PRIORITIES.find(x=>x.id===t.priority);return(
            <div key={t.id} onClick={()=>setSelId(t.id)} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selId===t.id?"rgba(13,148,136,0.06)":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selId===t.id?C.teal:p.c}`}}
              onMouseOver={e=>{if(selId!==t.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selId!==t.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff";}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginBottom:4,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0}}>{t.id}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"0px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:p.c+"18",color:p.c,flexShrink:0}}>{p.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"0px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:s.bg,color:s.c,flexShrink:0}}>{s.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0,marginLeft:"auto"}}>{CHAN_ICON[t.channel]}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:2}}>{t.title}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                <span style={{fontWeight:600}}>{t.practice}</span>
                <span>·</span>
                <span style={{padding:"0 5px",borderRadius:4,background:{Starter:"#f1f5f9",Growth:C.tealL,Enterprise:"#ede9fe"}[t.plan]||"#f1f5f9",color:{Starter:"#64748b",Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[t.plan]||"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>{t.plan}</span>
                {t.assignee&&<><span>·</span><span style={{color:C.blue}}>{t.assignee}</span></>}
              </div>
            </div>
          );})}
          {filtered.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:32,color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12}}>No tickets match filters</div>}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right — ticket detail */}
      {sel&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {/* Ticket header */}
        <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#f8fafc",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{sel.id}</span>
                {[sel.priority,sel.status].map((k,i)=>{const meta=i===0?TICKET_PRIORITIES.find(x=>x.id===k):STATUS_META_TICKET[k];return <span key={k} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:i===0?meta?.c+"18":meta?.bg,color:i===0?meta?.c:meta?.c}}>{i===0?meta?.l:meta?.l}</span>;})}
                <span style={{fontSize:10,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:{Starter:"#f1f5f9",Growth:C.tealL,Enterprise:"#ede9fe"}[sel.plan],color:{Starter:"#64748b",Growth:C.teal,Enterprise:C.purple}[sel.plan],fontWeight:700}}>{sel.plan}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{CHAN_ICON[sel.channel]} via {sel.channel}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2}}>{sel.title}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{sel.practice} · Created {sel.created} · Last updated {sel.updated}</div>
            </div>
            {/* Admin controls */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexShrink:0,flexWrap:"wrap",justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>
              <select value={sel.status} onChange={e=>updateStatus(sel.id,e.target.value)} style={{fontSize:11,padding:"4px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit",fontWeight:600}}>
                {Object.entries(STATUS_META_TICKET).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.l}</option>)}
              </select>
              <input value={sel.assignee||""} onChange={e=>updateAssignee(sel.id,e.target.value)} placeholder="Assign to…" style={{fontSize:11,padding:"4px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:110}}/>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Messages */}
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"14px 18px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
          {/* SLA notice */}
          {(()=>{const ps=PLAN_SUPPORT[sel.plan];return ps&&<div style={{padding:"7px 12px",background:sel.priority==="critical"?"#fef2f2":"#eff6ff",border:`1px solid ${sel.priority==="critical"?"#fecaca":"#bfdbfe"}`,borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:sel.priority==="critical"?C.red:C.blue,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
            {sel.priority==="critical"&&"🚨 "}<strong>{sel.plan} Plan SLA:</strong> {ps.response} response time · Channels: {ps.channels.join(", ")}
          </div>;})()||null}
          {sel.msgs.map((m,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,justifyContent:m.uid==="admin"?"flex-end":"flex-start"}}>
              {m.uid==="staff"&&<div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}>{m.name[0]}</div>}
              <div style={{maxWidth:"78%"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3,textAlign:m.uid==="admin"?"right":"left"}}>{m.name} · {m.ts}</div>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 13px",borderRadius:m.uid==="staff"?"12px 12px 12px 0":"12px 12px 0 12px",background:m.uid==="admin"?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"#fff",border:m.uid==="admin"?"none":`1px solid ${C.border}`,color:m.uid==="admin"?"#fff":C.text,fontSize:13,lineHeight:1.65}}>{m.text}</div>
              </div>
              {m.uid==="admin"&&<div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:16,flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}>🎧</div>}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Reply bar */}
        <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,flexShrink:0,background:"#f8fafc",alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
          <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:6}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
              <input value={assignee} onChange={e=>{setAssignee(e.target.value);updateAssignee(sel.id,e.target.value);}} placeholder="Your name (e.g. Alex M.)" style={{...{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:11,padding:"6px 9px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"},width:160}}/>
              <select onChange={e=>{if(e.target.value)updateStatus(sel.id,e.target.value);}} defaultValue="" style={{fontSize:11,padding:"6px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
                <option value="" disabled>Quick action…</option>
                <option value="resolved">Mark Resolved</option>
                <option value="closed">Close Ticket</option>
                <option value="waiting">Waiting on Customer</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <textarea rows={2} value={reply} onChange={e=>setReply(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&e.ctrlKey&&sendReply()} placeholder="Reply to practice… (Ctrl+Enter to send)" style={{...{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"},resize:"none",lineHeight:1.7}}/>
          </div>
          <button onClick={sendReply} disabled={!reply.trim()} style={{padding:"10px 18px",background:reply.trim()?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"#e2e8f0",color:reply.trim()?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:reply.trim()?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",height:36,alignSelf:"flex-end"}}><Send size={12}/>Send Reply</button>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN — Support Channel Configuration (per plan)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminSupportConfig(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const [planConfigs,setPlanConfigs]=useState({
    Starter: {channels:{email:true,phone:false,whatsapp:false,chat:false,csm:false},response:"24 hours",phone_num:"",whatsapp_num:"",csm_name:"",csm_email:"",emergency:false,emergency_num:"",sla_text:"Email support · 24h response · Mon–Fri 9–5"},
    Growth:  {channels:{email:true,phone:true,whatsapp:true,chat:false,csm:false},response:"4 hours",phone_num:"0800 123 4567",whatsapp_num:"+44 7700 900900",csm_name:"",csm_email:"",emergency:false,emergency_num:"",sla_text:"Phone + Email + WhatsApp · 4h response · Mon–Fri 8–6"},
    Enterprise:{channels:{email:true,phone:true,whatsapp:true,chat:true,csm:true},response:"1 hour",phone_num:"0800 123 4567",whatsapp_num:"+44 7700 900900",csm_name:"Assigned per practice",csm_email:"csm@prodental.co.uk",emergency:true,emergency_num:"0800 999 4567",sla_text:"All channels · 1h response · 24/7 · Dedicated CSM"},
  });
  const setPC=(plan,key,val)=>setPlanConfigs(p=>({...p,[plan]:{...p[plan],[key]:val}}));
  const setChan=(plan,ch,val)=>setPlanConfigs(p=>({...p,[plan]:{...p[plan],channels:{...p[plan].channels,[ch]:val}}}));
  const PLAN_COLORS={Starter:"#64748b",Growth:"#0d9488",Enterprise:"#7c3aed"};
  const CHANNEL_META={email:{icon:"✉️",l:"Email Support"},phone:{icon:"📞",l:"Phone Support"},whatsapp:{icon:"💬",l:"WhatsApp Support"},chat:{icon:"💻",l:"Live Chat"},csm:{icon:"👤",l:"Dedicated CSM"}};

  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Support Channel Configuration</div>
      <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16}}>Control which contact methods are available to practices on each subscription plan. These settings appear in the practice Help & Support page automatically.</div>

      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:14}}>
        {Object.entries(planConfigs).map(([plan,cfg])=>(
          <div key={plan} style={{background:"#fff",border:`2px solid ${PLAN_COLORS[plan]}30`,borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            {/* Plan header */}
            <div style={{background:PLAN_COLORS[plan],padding:"12px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:2}}>{plan} Plan</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.65)"}}>{cfg.sla_text}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:16,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
              {/* Response time */}
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:5}}>Response Time SLA</div>
                <input value={cfg.response} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"response",e.target.value)} style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>
              </div>
              {/* Channel toggles */}
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>Contact Channels</div>
                {Object.entries(CHANNEL_META).map(([ch,meta])=>(
                  <label key={ch} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",padding:"5px 0",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                    <button onClick={()=>setChan(plan,ch,!cfg.channels[ch])} style={{position:"relative",width:30,height:17,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:cfg.channels[ch]?PLAN_COLORS[plan]:"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0}}>
                      <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:cfg.channels[ch]?"calc(100% - 14px)":2,width:13,height:13,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                    </button>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,color:cfg.channels[ch]?C.text:"#94a3b8"}}>{meta.icon} {meta.l}</span>
                  </label>
                ))}
              </div>
              {/* Contact details */}
              {cfg.channels.phone&&<div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:5}}>📞 Phone Number</div>
                <input value={cfg.phone_num} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"phone_num",e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. 0800 123 4567" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/>
              </div>}
              {cfg.channels.whatsapp&&<div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:5}}>💬 WhatsApp Number</div>
                <input value={cfg.whatsapp_num} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"whatsapp_num",e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. +44 7700 900900" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/>
              </div>}
              {cfg.channels.csm&&<div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:5}}>👤 CSM Contact</div>
                <input value={cfg.csm_name} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"csm_name",e.target.value)} placeholder="CSM name" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"},marginBottom:5}}/>
                <input value={cfg.csm_email} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"csm_email",e.target.value)} placeholder="csm@prodental.co.uk" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/>
              </div>}
              {/* Emergency line */}
              <div>
                <label style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer",marginBottom:cfg.emergency?8:0}}>
                  <button onClick={()=>setPC(plan,"emergency",!cfg.emergency)} style={{position:"relative",width:30,height:17,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:cfg.emergency?"#dc2626":"#cbd5e1",flexShrink:0}}>
                    <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:cfg.emergency?"calc(100% - 14px)":2,width:13,height:13,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .15s"}}/>
                  </button>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,color:cfg.emergency?C.red:"#94a3b8"}}>🚨 Emergency / Out-of-hours line</span>
                </label>
                {cfg.emergency&&<input value={cfg.emergency_num} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"emergency_num",e.target.value)} placeholder="Emergency number" style={{...{background:"#fff5f5",border:`1px solid #fecaca`,borderRadius:8,color:C.red,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/>}
              </div>
              {/* SLA display text */}
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:5}}>Support page display text</div>
                <textarea rows={2} value={cfg.sla_text} onChange={e=>setPC(plan,"sla_text",e.target.value)} style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:11,padding:"6px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"},resize:"none"}}/>
              </div>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast(`${plan} plan support config saved`)} style={{padding:"8px",background:PLAN_COLORS[plan],color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Save {plan} Config</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const PLAN_DETAILS={
  Starter:{price:99,yearly:990,color:"#64748b",gradient:"linear-gradient(135deg,#475569,#64748b)",desc:"Perfect for small practices looking for a modern foundation.",renewal:"12 Aug 2026",minutes:200,sms:500,users:5,clinics:1},
  Growth: {price:149,yearly:1490,color:"#0d9488",gradient:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",desc:"The complete growth toolkit for ambitious practices.",renewal:"12 Aug 2026",minutes:1000,sms:2000,users:15,clinics:1},
  Enterprise:{price:299,yearly:2990,color:"#7c3aed",gradient:"linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4f46e5)",desc:"Full automation suite for high-performing and multi-clinic groups.",renewal:"12 Aug 2026",minutes:5000,sms:10000,users:999,clinics:10},
};

function FeatureDetailModal({feature:f, currentPlan, onClose, onUpgrade}){
  const planLevel=f.plans[currentPlan];
  const isLocked=!planLevel||planLevel==="no";
  return(
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800,padding:16}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:520,maxWidth:"100%",maxHeight:"85vh",overflowY:"auto",boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}>
        <div style={{background:isLocked?"#f8fafc":"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",borderRadius:"16px 16px 0 0",padding:"20px 22px",position:"relative"}}>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{position:"absolute",top:14,right:14,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.2)",border:"none",borderRadius:8,width:28,height:28,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",color:isLocked?"#64748b":"#fff",fontSize:16}}>✕</button>
          <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:8}}>{f.icon}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,color:isLocked?"#374151":"#fff",marginBottom:4}}>{f.name}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:isLocked?"#64748b":"rgba(255,255,255,.75)"}}>{f.cat} · {f.included_in}</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"20px 22px"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.75,marginBottom:16}}>{f.long}</div>
          {f.benefits?.length>0&&<>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:C.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".05em",marginBottom:8}}>What's included</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:6,marginBottom:16}}>
              {f.benefits.map((b,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,fontSize:12,color:"#374151"}}><span style={{color:C.green,flexShrink:0}}>✓</span>{b}</div>)}
            </div>
          </>}
          {f.impact&&(f.impact.booked||f.impact.revenue)&&<div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:C.tealL,border:`1px solid ${C.teal}30`,borderRadius:10,marginBottom:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>Typical impact</div>
            {f.impact.booked&&<div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal}}>{f.impact.booked} {f.impact.label}</div>}
            {f.impact.revenue&&<div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal}}>£{f.impact.revenue.toLocaleString()} {f.impact.label}</div>}
          </div>}
          {isLocked
            ?<button onClick={onUpgrade} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px",background:C.adminAccent,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:800}}>Upgrade to unlock this feature ↗</button>
            :<button onClick={onClose} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Feature active on your plan</button>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ActiveFeatureCard({feature:f, plan, usage, onLearnMore}){
  const planLevel=f.plans[plan];
  const isLimited=planLevel==="limited"||planLevel==="basic";
  return(
    <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1.5px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:24,flexShrink:0}}>{f.icon}</span>
        <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:3}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{f.name}</span>
            {isLimited
              ?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:C.amber}}>LIMITED</span>
              :<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>✓ ACTIVE</span>}
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.5}}>{f.short}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {usage&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        {usage.mins&&<div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:C.tealL,color:C.teal}}>{usage.mins} mins used</div>}
        {usage.booked&&<div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>{usage.booked} appts booked</div>}
        {usage.revenue&&<div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple}}>£{usage.revenue.toLocaleString()} revenue</div>}
        {usage.msgs&&<div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#f0f9ff",color:C.blue}}>{usage.msgs} messages</div>}
        {usage.sent&&<div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#dcfce7",color:C.green}}>{usage.sent} sent · {usage.read} read</div>}
      </div>}
      <button onClick={onLearnMore} style={{alignSelf:"flex-start",padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>Details →</button>
    </div>
  );
}

function LockedFeatureCard({feature:f, onLearnMore, onUpgrade}){
  return(
    <div style={{background:"#fafafa",border:`1.5px dashed ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10,opacity:0.85}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:24,flexShrink:0,filter:"grayscale(0.6)"}}>{f.icon}</span>
        <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:3}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b"}}>{f.name}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f1f5f9",color:"#94a3b8"}}>🔒 {f.included_in}</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1.5}}>{f.short}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
        <button onClick={onLearnMore} style={{flex:1,padding:"6px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>Learn more</button>
        <button onClick={onUpgrade} style={{flex:1,padding:"6px 10px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:C.adminAccent,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>Upgrade ↗</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function SubscriptionFeaturesPage(){
  const [currentPlan] = useState("Growth");
  const [selFeature,setSelFeature]=useState(null);
  const [view,setView]=useState("features"); // features | compare | usage
  const [catFilter,setCatFilter]=useState("All");
  const [subConfirm,setSubConfirm]=useState(false);
  const plan=PLAN_DETAILS[currentPlan];

  const cats=["All",...new Set(FEATURE_LIBRARY.map(f=>f.cat))];
  const filtered=catFilter==="All"?FEATURE_LIBRARY:FEATURE_LIBRARY.filter(f=>f.cat===catFilter);
  const myFeats=FEATURE_LIBRARY.filter(f=>f.plans[currentPlan]==="full"||f.plans[currentPlan]==="limited"||f.plans[currentPlan]==="basic"||f.plans[currentPlan]==="advanced");
  const lockedFeats=FEATURE_LIBRARY.filter(f=>!f.plans[currentPlan]||f.plans[currentPlan]==="no");

  // Usage stats for active features
  const USAGE={receptionai:{mins:420,booked:81,revenue:6200},recovery:{pipeline:5841,recovered:1247,rate:34},teamchat:{msgs:1240,active:6},whatsapp:{sent:43,read:41},nba:{done:23,pending:4},emotional:{profiles:186,flags:312}};
  const totalRevRecovered=7447;

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:C.bg}}>
      {/* Feature detail modal */}
      {selFeature&&<FeatureDetailModal feature={selFeature} currentPlan={currentPlan} onClose={()=>setSelFeature(null)} onUpgrade={()=>{setSelFeature(null);setSubConfirm(true);}}/>}

      {/* Upgrade confirm */}
      {subConfirm&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:700,backdropFilter:"blur(4px)"}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,maxWidth:"95vw",padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Upgrade to Enterprise</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16,lineHeight:1.7}}>Unlock Business Copilot, Multi-Clinic Intelligence, Voice Clinical Notes and all Enterprise features. Added to your monthly bill immediately.</div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:16,fontSize:12,color:C.blue,lineHeight:1.7}}>This upgrade requires Super Admin approval and will add <strong>£150/mo</strong> to your subscription. Contact your ProDentalConnect account manager to activate.</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setSubConfirm(false);}} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Request Upgrade</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ── Header ── */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"14px 20px 0",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:14}}>
          {/* Plan badge */}
          <div style={{background:plan.gradient,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 16px",flexShrink:0}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em",marginBottom:2}}>Current Plan</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff"}}>{currentPlan}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.8)",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{plan.price}/mo</div>
          </div>
          {/* Plan info */}
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:3}}>Features & Subscription</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:10}}>{plan.desc} Renewal: {plan.renewal}.</div>
            {/* Usage bar */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              {[{l:"Smart Receptionist minutes",v:420,max:plan.minutes},{l:"SMS messages",v:43,max:plan.sms},{l:"Staff accounts",v:6,max:plan.users}].map(u=>(
                <div key={u.l} style={{minWidth:160}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3}}><span>{u.l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:700,color:u.v/u.max>.8?C.red:C.muted}}>{u.v}/{u.max}</span></div>
                  <div style={{height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min(u.v/u.max*100,100)}%`,background:u.v/u.max>.8?C.red:u.v/u.max>.6?C.amber:plan.color,borderRadius:3,transition:"width .5s"}}/></div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,flexShrink:0}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Upgrade Plan</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Cancelled")} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Manage Billing</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Smart insight upgrade nudge */}
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#fffbeb,#fff)",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:9,padding:"8px 14px",marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:16,flexShrink:0}}>💡</span>
          <div style={{flex:1,fontSize:11,color:"#92400e"}}>Your clinic handled <strong>187 incoming calls</strong> this month with Smart Receptionist. Upgrading minutes to the Enterprise plan would give you unlimited capacity — with no overage risk.</div>
          <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"5px 14px",background:C.amber,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>See Enterprise</button>
        </div>

        {/* View tabs */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>
          {[{id:"features",l:"All Features"},{id:"compare",l:"Plan Comparison"},{id:"usage",l:"ROI & Usage"}].map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setView(t.id)} style={{padding:"7px 18px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${view===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:view===t.id?700:400,color:view===t.id?C.teal:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>{t.l}</button>)}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ════ FEATURES VIEW ════ */}
      {view==="features"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        {/* Category filter */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:16}}>
          {cats.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setCatFilter(c)} style={{padding:"5px 14px",borderRadius:20,border:`1.5px solid ${catFilter===c?C.teal:C.border}`,background:catFilter===c?C.tealL:"#fff",color:catFilter===c?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:11,fontWeight:catFilter===c?700:400,cursor:"pointer"}}>{c}</button>)}
        </div>

        {/* Active features */}
        {(catFilter==="All"||filtered.some(f=>myFeats.includes(f)))&&<>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:C.text,marginBottom:10,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <Check size={14} color={C.green}/>Active Features <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:400,color:C.muted}}>— included in your {currentPlan} plan</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr))",gap:12,marginBottom:20}}>
            {filtered.filter(f=>myFeats.includes(f)).map(f=>(
              <ActiveFeatureCard key={f.id} feature={f} plan={currentPlan} usage={USAGE[f.id]} onLearnMore={()=>setSelFeature(f)}/>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>}

        {/* Locked features */}
        {lockedFeats.some(f=>filtered.includes(f))&&<>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:C.text,marginBottom:10,marginTop:8,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <Lock size={14} color="#94a3b8"/>Unlock More Features <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:400,color:C.muted}}>— available on higher plans</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr))",gap:12}}>
            {filtered.filter(f=>lockedFeats.includes(f)).map(f=>(
              <LockedFeatureCard key={f.id} feature={f} onLearnMore={()=>setSelFeature(f)} onUpgrade={()=>setSubConfirm(true)}/>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>}
      </div>}

      {/* ════ PLAN COMPARISON ════ */}
      {view==="compare"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {/* Plan headers */}
          <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse"}}>
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th style={{padding:"16px 20px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`,width:"30%"}}>Feature</th>
                {["Starter","Growth","Enterprise"].map(p=>(
                  <th key={p} style={{padding:"16px",textAlign:"center",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`,background:p===currentPlan?`${PLAN_DETAILS[p].color}08`:"#f8fafc",borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:PLAN_DETAILS[p].color}}>{p}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",color:C.muted}}>£{PLAN_DETAILS[p].price}/mo</div>
                    {p===currentPlan&&<div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:9,background:PLAN_DETAILS[p].color,color:"#fff",display:"inline-block",marginTop:4}}>YOUR PLAN</div>}
                  </th>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {FEATURE_LIBRARY.map((feat,i)=>(
                <tr key={feat.id} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",background:i%2===0?"#fff":"#fafcff"}}>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 20px",fontSize:12}}>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:16}}>{feat.icon}</span>
                      <div>
                        <div style={{fontWeight:600}}>{feat.name}</div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{feat.cat}{feat.coming_soon&&" · Coming Soon"}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  {["Starter","Growth","Enterprise"].map(p=>{
                    const status=feat.plans[p];
                    const isCurrentPlan=p===currentPlan;
                    const cell=status==="full"?{icon:"✓",c:C.green,bg:isCurrentPlan?`${PLAN_DETAILS[p].color}08`:"transparent"}:
                      status==="limited"||status==="basic"||status==="advanced"?{icon:"~",c:C.amber,bg:"transparent",l:status}:
                      {icon:"—",c:"#e2e8f0",bg:"transparent"};
                    return <td key={p} style={{padding:"10px 16px",textAlign:"center",borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:isCurrentPlan?`${PLAN_DETAILS[p].color}06`:undefined}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:15,color:cell.c,fontWeight:800}}>{cell.icon}</span>
                      {cell.l&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:cell.c,fontWeight:700,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{cell.l}</div>}
                    </td>;
                  })}
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
            <tfoot>
              <tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
                <td style={{padding:"12px 20px",fontSize:12,color:C.muted,fontWeight:600}}>Upgrade</td>
                {["Starter","Growth","Enterprise"].map(p=>(
                  <td key={p} style={{padding:"12px 16px",textAlign:"center",borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
                    {p===currentPlan
                      ?<span style={{fontSize:11,color:PLAN_DETAILS[p].color,fontWeight:700}}>Current Plan</span>
                      :<button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:PLAN_DETAILS[p].gradient,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Switch to {p}</button>}
                  </td>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </tfoot>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* ════ ROI & USAGE ════ */}
      {view==="usage"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#1a1035 100%)",borderRadius:16,padding:"24px 28px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:28,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".12em",marginBottom:6}}>This Month's Platform Impact</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:16}}>
              {[{l:"Calls handled",v:"187",c:"#5eead4"},{l:"Appointments recovered",v:"31",c:"#86efac"},{l:"Revenue recovered",v:"£7,447",c:"#fde68a"},{l:"Hours saved",v:"~14",c:"#c4b5fd"}].map(s=>(
                <div key={s.l}><div style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{s.v}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)",marginTop:3}}>{s.l}</div></div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{flexShrink:0,textAlign:"center"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginBottom:4}}>estimated monthly value</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:40,fontWeight:900,color:"#5eead4",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£7,447</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}>recovered this month</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>Feature Usage Breakdown</div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr))",gap:12}}>
          {[{name:"Smart Receptionist",icon:"📞",stats:[["Calls handled","187"],["Appointments booked","81"],["Est. revenue recovered","£6,200"]],color:C.teal},{name:"Revenue Recovery",icon:"💰",stats:[["Pipeline value","£5,841"],["Recovered this month","£1,247"],["Recovery rate","34%"]],color:C.blue},{name:"Daily Priorities",icon:"⚡",stats:[["Actions surfaced","147"],["Completed by team","89"],["Completion rate","61%"]],color:C.amber},{name:"Patient Profiles",icon:"💛",stats:[["Profiles created","186"],["Preference flags","312"],["High-anxiety patients","23"]],color:C.purple},{name:"WhatsApp Messaging",icon:"💬",stats:[["Messages sent","43"],["Open rate","97%"],["Replies received","28"]],color:"#25d366"},{name:"Team Chat",icon:"🗨️",stats:[["Messages this month","1,240"],["Channels active","6"],["Staff using daily","6/6"]],color:C.indigo}].map(item=>(
            <div key={item.name} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:`${item.color}12`,borderBottom:`1px solid ${item.color}20`,display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center"}}><span style={{fontSize:20}}>{item.icon}</span><span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:item.color}}>{item.name}</span></div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>{item.stats.map(([l,v],i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"5px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{v}</span></div>)}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#fef3c7,#fff)",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 18px",marginTop:14,display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:32,flexShrink:0}}>🔒</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>Unlock more with Enterprise</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.7}}>Business Copilot, Multi-Clinic Intelligence and Voice Clinical Notes. Enterprise practices recover on average <strong>£3,200 more per month</strong>.</div></div>
          <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"9px 18px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>See Enterprise</button>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}
