function RotaPage({user}){
  // ── Week navigation ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  const WEEKS=[
    {label:"Week of 5–11 May 2025",  start:new Date("2025-05-05")},
    {label:"Week of 12–18 May 2025", start:new Date("2025-05-12")},
    {label:"Week of 19–25 May 2025", start:new Date("2025-05-19")},
    {label:"Week of 26 May–1 Jun",   start:new Date("2025-05-26")},
    {label:"Week of 2–8 Jun 2025",   start:new Date("2025-06-02")},
  ];
  const [weekIdx,setWeekIdx]=useState(1);
  const currentWeek=WEEKS[weekIdx]||WEEKS[1];
  const prevWeek=()=>setWeekIdx(i=>Math.max(0,i-1));
  const nextWeek=()=>setWeekIdx(i=>Math.min(WEEKS.length-1,i+1));

  const [rota,setRota]=useState(INIT_ROTA);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const [published,setPublished]=useState(false);

  // Leave request modal
  const [showLeaveRequest,setShowLeaveRequest]=useState(false);
  const [leaveReq,setLeaveReq]=useState({staffId:"S1",type:"al",day:"Mon",note:""});
  const [leaveRequests,setLeaveRequests]=useState([
    {id:"LR1",staffName:"Dr. M. Chen",staffId:"S2",type:"al",day:"Wed",week:"Week of 19–25 May 2025",note:"Pre-booked holiday",status:"approved"},
    {id:"LR2",staffName:"Dr. M. Chen",staffId:"S2",type:"al",day:"Thu",week:"Week of 19–25 May 2025",note:"Pre-booked holiday",status:"approved"},
    {id:"LR3",staffName:"Dr. M. Chen",staffId:"S2",type:"al",day:"Fri",week:"Week of 19–25 May 2025",note:"Pre-booked holiday",status:"approved"},
  ]);

  const isManager=user?.role==="manager"||user?.role==="superadmin";
  const setShift=(uid,day,shift)=>{setRota(p=>({...p,[uid]:{...p[uid],[day]:shift}}));doToast("✓ Rota updated");};
  const totalHours=uid=>{const shifts=Object.values(rota[uid]||{});return shifts.reduce((s,sh)=>s+(sh==="full"?9:sh==="morning"||sh==="afternoon"?4.5:0),0);};

  const submitLeaveRequest=()=>{
    const staff=ROTA_STAFF.find(s=>s.id===leaveReq.staffId);
    const id="LR"+Date.now();
    const newReq={id,staffName:staff?.name,staffId:leaveReq.staffId,type:leaveReq.type,day:leaveReq.day,week:currentWeek.label,note:leaveReq.note,status:isManager?"approved":"pending"};
    setLeaveRequests(p=>[...p,newReq]);
    if(isManager){
      // Manager can directly set the shift
      setRota(p=>({...p,[leaveReq.staffId]:{...(p[leaveReq.staffId]||{}),[leaveReq.day]:leaveReq.type}}));
      doToast("✓ "+SHIFTS[leaveReq.type]?.l+" added to rota for "+staff?.name);
    } else {
      doToast("✓ Leave request submitted — awaiting manager approval");
    }
    setShowLeaveRequest(false);
    setLeaveReq({staffId:"S1",type:"al",day:"Mon",note:""});
  };

  const approveLeave=(reqId)=>{
    const req=leaveRequests.find(r=>r.id===reqId);
    if(req){
      setRota(p=>({...p,[req.staffId]:{...(p[req.staffId]||{}),[req.day]:req.type}}));
      setLeaveRequests(p=>p.map(r=>r.id!==reqId?r:{...r,status:"approved"}));
      doToast("✓ Leave approved — rota updated automatically");
    }
  };

  const pendingRequests=leaveRequests.filter(r=>r.status==="pending");

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#0f172a",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Leave Request Modal */}
      {showLeaveRequest&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>{isManager?"Add Leave / Day Off":"Request Leave or Day Off"}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:14}}>{isManager?"As manager, changes apply immediately to the rota.":"Your request will be sent to the manager for approval."}</div>
          {isManager&&<div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Staff Member</label>
            <select value={leaveReq.staffId} onChange={e=>setLeaveReq(p=>({...p,staffId:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
              {ROTA_STAFF.map(s=><option key={s.id} value={s.id}>{s.name}</option>)}
            </select>
          </div>}
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:10}}>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Type</label>
              <select value={leaveReq.type} onChange={e=>setLeaveReq(p=>({...p,type:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                {Object.entries(SHIFTS).filter(([k])=>["al","sick","off"].includes(k)).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.l}</option>)}
              </select></div>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Day</label>
              <select value={leaveReq.day} onChange={e=>setLeaveReq(p=>({...p,day:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                {DAYS.map(d=><option key={d}>{d}</option>)}
              </select></div>
          </div>
          <div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Note (optional)</label>
            <input value={leaveReq.note} onChange={e=>setLeaveReq(p=>({...p,note:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Reason…"
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"7px 10px",background:isManager?"#f0fffe":"#fef3c7",borderRadius:8,marginBottom:14,fontSize:10,color:isManager?"#0d9488":"#92400e"}}>
            {isManager?"✓ Changes apply immediately to the rota":"⏳ Submitted to manager — will appear on rota once approved"}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowLeaveRequest(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={submitLeaveRequest} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{isManager?"Apply to Rota":"Submit Request"}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Pending requests banner */}
      {isManager&&pendingRequests.length>0&&<div style={{padding:"9px 20px",background:"#fef3c7",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:14}}>⏳</span>
        <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#92400e"}}>{pendingRequests.length} pending leave request{pendingRequests.length!==1?"s":""}</span>
        {pendingRequests.map(r=>(
          <div key={r.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginLeft:8}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#92400e"}}>{r.staffName} · {SHIFTS[r.type]?.l} · {r.day}</span>
            <button onClick={()=>approveLeave(r.id)} style={{padding:"2px 8px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:5,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Approve</button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}

      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>Staff Rota</div>
        {published&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:10,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>● Published</span>}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",marginLeft:"auto"}}>
          <button onClick={prevWeek} disabled={weekIdx===0} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:weekIdx===0?"#f1f5f9":"#f8fafc",cursor:weekIdx===0?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:weekIdx===0?"#94a3b8":"#374151",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>← Prev</button>
          <div style={{padding:"7px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,minWidth:180,textAlign:"center"}}>{currentWeek.label}</div>
          <button onClick={nextWeek} disabled={weekIdx===WEEKS.length-1} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:weekIdx===WEEKS.length-1?"#f1f5f9":"#f8fafc",cursor:weekIdx===WEEKS.length-1?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:weekIdx===WEEKS.length-1?"#94a3b8":"#374151",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>Next →</button>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowLeaveRequest(true)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal}}>+ {isManager?"Add Leave":"Request Leave"}</button>
        {isManager&&<button onClick={()=>{setPublished(true);doToast("✓ Rota published — all staff notified by email and SMS");}} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Publish Rota</button>}
      </div>
      <div style={{flex:1,overflowX:"auto",overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{minWidth:900}}>
          {/* Legend */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {Object.entries(SHIFTS).map(([k,s])=><div key={k} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:10,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:s.c+"18",color:s.c,fontWeight:600}}><div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.c}}/>{s.l}{s.h&&<span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:400}}>· {s.h}</span>}</div>)}
          </div>
          {/* Grid */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"180px repeat(7,1fr)",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted}}>Staff Member</div>
              {DAYS.map(d=><div key={d} style={{padding:"10px 8px",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,textAlign:"center",borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>{d}</div>)}
            </div>
            {ROTA_STAFF.map((s,si)=>(
              <div key={s.id} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"180px repeat(7,1fr)",borderTop:si>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:si%2===0?"#fff":"#fafcff"}}>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{s.avatar}</div>
                  <div style={{minWidth:0}}><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{s.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{s.role} · {totalHours(s.id)}h/wk</div></div>
                </div>
                {DAYS.map(d=>{const sh=rota[s.id]?.[d]||"off";const sm=SHIFTS[sh];return(
                  <div key={d} style={{borderLeft:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"6px 4px",textAlign:"center"}}>
                    <select value={sh} onChange={e=>setShift(s.id,d,e.target.value)} style={{width:"100%",fontSize:10,padding:"4px 2px",border:`1px solid ${sm.c}30`,borderRadius:6,background:sm.c+"18",color:sm.c,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit",fontWeight:600,textAlign:"center",outline:"none"}}>
                      {Object.entries(SHIFTS).map(([k,sv])=><option key={k} value={k}>{sv.l}</option>)}
                    </select>
                    {sm.h&&<div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{sm.h}</div>}
                  </div>
                );})}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {/* Summary */}
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(5,1fr)",gap:10,marginTop:14}}>
            {ROTA_STAFF.map(s=>{
              const shifts=Object.values(rota[s.id]||{});
              const leaves=shifts.filter(sh=>sh==="al").length;
              const sick=shifts.filter(sh=>sh==="sick").length;
              return <div key={s.id} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 12px"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginBottom:4}}>{s.name.split(" ")[0]} {s.name.split(" ").slice(-1)}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{totalHours(s.id)}h this week</div>
                {leaves>0&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.amber,marginTop:2}}>📅 {leaves} day{leaves>1?"s":""} annual leave</div>}
                {sick>0&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.red,marginTop:2}}>🤒 {sick} sick day{sick>1?"s":""}</div>}
              </div>;
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TEMPLATES — Clinical notes, letters, emails, consent forms
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const TEMPLATE_DATA=[
  {id:"T1",cat:"Clinical Notes",name:"New Patient Examination",icon:"🦷",desc:"Comprehensive new patient exam template with medical history prompt",preview:"Patient presents for new patient examination. Medical history reviewed and updated. BP: []. Soft tissue examination: NAD. Periodontal assessment: BPE []. Dentition: []. Risk assessment: []. Treatment plan discussed: []. Patient consent obtained."},
  {id:"T2",cat:"Clinical Notes",name:"Routine Check-up",icon:"✓",desc:"Standard recall examination clinical note",preview:"Patient presents for routine recall examination. Medical history updated — no changes. Soft tissue: NAD. BPE: []. Clinical examination: []. Radiographs: []. Treatment plan: []. Recall: 6 months."},
  {id:"T3",cat:"Clinical Notes",name:"RCT Session",icon:"🔬",desc:"Root canal treatment clinical note — single session",preview:"Patient presents for RCT [tooth]. LA administered — []. Rubber dam placed. Access cavity prepared. WL determined: []mm. Canals located: []. Instrumentation to []. Irrigation: NaOCl/CHX. Temporary dressing placed. Patient advised: []. Next appointment: []"},
  {id:"T4",cat:"Clinical Notes",name:"Extraction",icon:"⚕️",desc:"Simple or surgical extraction note",preview:"Patient presents for extraction [tooth]. Indication: []. LA: [cartridges] [solution]. Luxators used: Y/N. Forceps: []. Tooth extracted intact/in sections. Socket curetted: Y/N. Haemostasis achieved: Y/N. Post-op instructions given verbally and written. Follow-up: [] days."},
  {id:"T5",cat:"Letters",name:"Referral Letter — Specialist",icon:"✉️",desc:"Standard specialist referral letter",preview:"Dear Dr [],\n\nRe: [Patient Name], DOB []\n\nThank you for seeing this patient. [Patient] is a [age]-year-old [NHS/private] patient who presents with [complaint]. Medical history includes: [].\n\nClinical findings: []\n\nI would be grateful for your assessment and advice.\n\nYours sincerely,\n[Dentist Name]"},
  {id:"T6",cat:"Letters",name:"Treatment Plan Letter",icon:"📋",desc:"Letter outlining proposed treatment and costs",preview:"Dear [Patient Name],\n\nFollowing your recent examination, I am writing to outline your proposed treatment plan and associated costs.\n\nProposed treatment:\n[Treatment items]\n\nEstimated cost:\nNHS: £[]\nPrivate: £[]\n\nPlease contact us to book your first appointment. Finance options are available if required.\n\nKind regards,\n[Dentist Name]"},
  {id:"T7",cat:"Consent Forms",name:"NHS Treatment Consent",icon:"🖊️",desc:"NHS Band 1/2/3 patient consent form",preview:"NHS Treatment Consent\n\nI, [Patient Name], consent to the proposed dental treatment as outlined to me by [Dentist Name]. I understand:\n\n• The nature of the proposed treatment\n• The associated NHS charge (Band [])\n• Alternative treatment options discussed\n• Risks and benefits explained\n\nPatient signature: ___________  Date: ___________"},
  {id:"T8",cat:"Consent Forms",name:"Implant Consent",icon:"🔩",desc:"Implant placement informed consent",preview:"Dental Implant Informed Consent\n\nProposed treatment: Implant placement [site]\nEstimated cost: £[]\n\nI understand the procedure involves: surgical placement, healing period of 3–6 months, potential risks including infection, nerve proximity, failure to integrate.\n\nI have read the patient information leaflet and had the opportunity to ask questions.\n\nSignature: ___________ Date: ___________"},
  {id:"T9",cat:"Emails",name:"Appointment Confirmation",icon:"📅",desc:"Appointment confirmation email to patient",preview:"Subject: Your Appointment at Riverside Dentistry — [Date]\n\nDear [Patient Name],\n\nThis is to confirm your appointment with [Dentist Name] on [Date] at [Time].\n\nPlease arrive 5 minutes early. If you need to cancel, please give us at least 24 hours notice.\n\nSee you soon!\nThe Team at Riverside Dentistry\n📞 0207 111 2222"},
  {id:"T10",cat:"Emails",name:"Recall Reminder",icon:"🔄",desc:"Patient recall reminder email",preview:"Subject: It's time for your dental check-up, [First Name]!\n\nDear [Patient Name],\n\nIt's been a while since your last visit and we'd love to see you soon for your routine check-up and clean.\n\nRegular visits help us catch small issues early — and keep your smile healthy.\n\nClick below to book your appointment or call us on 0207 111 2222.\n\nThe Team at Riverside Dentistry"},
  {id:"T11",cat:"WhatsApp",name:"WhatsApp Confirmation",icon:"💬",desc:"Short WhatsApp appointment confirmation",preview:"Hi [First Name] 👋 Just confirming your appointment at Riverside Dentistry on [Date] at [Time] with [Dentist]. Reply YES to confirm or call 0207 111 2222 if you need to change it. See you soon! 🦷"},
  {id:"T12",cat:"WhatsApp",name:"WhatsApp Recall",icon:"💬",desc:"Friendly recall reminder via WhatsApp",preview:"Hi [First Name]! It's Riverside Dentistry — it's been a while since your last check-up 🦷 We'd love to see you soon. Reply to this message to book or call us on 0207 111 2222. Hope to see you soon! 😊"},
];

function TemplatesPage(){
  const [selCat,setSelCat]=useState("All");
  const [selTemplate,setSelTemplate]=useState(TEMPLATE_DATA[0]);
  const [editMode,setEditMode]=useState(false);
  const [editText,setEditText]=useState("");
  const [search,setSearch]=useState("");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};

  const cats=["All",...new Set(TEMPLATE_DATA.map(t=>t.cat))];
  const filtered=TEMPLATE_DATA.filter(t=>(selCat==="All"||t.cat===selCat)&&(search===""||t.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())));

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      {/* Left panel */}
      <div style={{width:280,flexShrink:0,background:"#fff",borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:10}}>Templates</div>
          <div style={{position:"relative",marginBottom:8}}>
            <Search size={12} style={{position:"absolute",left:8,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:"#94a3b8"}}/>
            <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search templates…" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"6px 8px 6px 26px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {cats.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setSelCat(c)} style={{padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${selCat===c?C.teal:C.border}`,background:selCat===c?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:selCat===c?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:9,fontWeight:selCat===c?700:400,cursor:"pointer"}}>{c}</button>)}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {filtered.map((t,i)=>(
            <div key={t.id} onClick={()=>{setSelTemplate(t);setEditMode(false);}} style={{padding:"9px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selTemplate?.id===t.id?"rgba(13,148,136,0.06)":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selTemplate?.id===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`}}
              onMouseOver={e=>{if(selTemplate?.id!==t.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selTemplate?.id!==t.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff";}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:16}}>{t.icon}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,flex:1}}>{t.name}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,paddingLeft:24}}>{t.desc}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("New template editor coming soon")} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px",border:`2px dashed ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
            <Plus size={12}/>Create New Template
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      {/* Right panel — template detail/editor */}
      {selTemplate&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#fff",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:22}}>{selTemplate.icon}</span>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700}}>{selTemplate.name}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{selTemplate.cat} · {selTemplate.desc}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
            <button onClick={()=>navigator.clipboard?.writeText(selTemplate.preview).then(()=>doToast("Copied to clipboard"))} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Copy size={11}/>Copy</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setEditMode(!editMode);setEditText(selTemplate.preview);}} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${editMode?C.teal:C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:editMode?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:editMode?C.teal:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Edit size={11}/>{editMode?"Done":"Edit"}</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Template saved")} style={{padding:"6px 12px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Use Template</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,padding:20,overflow:"auto"}}>
          {/* Placeholder variables */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:14}}>
            {["[Patient Name]","[First Name]","[Date]","[Time]","[Dentist Name]","[Treatment]","[Cost]"].map(v=><span key={v} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#ede9fe",color:C.purple,cursor:"pointer"}} onClick={()=>doToast(`Click inside the template then insert ${v}`)}>{v}</span>)}
          </div>
          {editMode
            ?<textarea value={editText} onChange={e=>setEditText(e.target.value)} style={{width:"100%",height:"calc(100% - 60px)",background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"14px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",resize:"none",lineHeight:1.8}}/>
            :<div style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"16px 18px",fontSize:13,color:"#374151",lineHeight:2,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap",fontFamily:"inherit",minHeight:300}}>{selTemplate.preview}</div>}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// AUDIT LOG — immutable record of all system actions
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AuditPage(){
  const AUDIT=[
    {id:1,time:"Today 11:32",user:"Emma Wilson",role:"Reception",action:"Patient record updated",detail:"John Mills — Medical history updated: Warfarin dose changed",type:"edit",ip:"192.168.1.10"},
    {id:2,time:"Today 11:15",user:"Dr. Sarah Patel",role:"Dentist",action:"Clinical note finalised",detail:"Tom Bright — Composite restoration UR6, dated 14 May 2025",type:"finalise",ip:"192.168.1.12"},
    {id:3,time:"Today 10:42",user:"Reception AI",role:"System",action:"Appointment booked",detail:"Sarah Jones — Emergency slot 4:10pm with Dr. Patel",type:"system",ip:"AI System"},
    {id:4,time:"Today 10:00",user:"Dr. Mike Chen",role:"Dentist",action:"FP17 claim submitted",detail:"Claim #FP001234 — Amy Torres — Band 2 — £73.50",type:"nhs",ip:"192.168.1.14"},
    {id:5,time:"Today 09:30",user:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",role:"Manager",action:"Staff account created",detail:"Priya Nair — Reception role — invite sent",type:"admin",ip:"192.168.1.15"},
    {id:6,time:"Today 09:15",user:"Tom Baker",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment cancelled",detail:"Robert Hall — 10:00am — Reason: Patient request",type:"cancel",ip:"192.168.1.11"},
    {id:7,time:"Yesterday 17:45",user:"Emma Wilson",role:"Reception",action:"Payment recorded",detail:"Amy Torres — £319.00 — Crown UR6 — Card payment",type:"payment",ip:"192.168.1.10"},
    {id:8,time:"Yesterday 16:30",user:"Amy Grant",role:"Hygienist",action:"Clinical note finalised",detail:"David Park — Hygiene appointment — BPE 2",type:"finalise",ip:"192.168.1.13"},
    {id:9,time:"Yesterday 14:00",user:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",role:"Manager",action:"Plan features updated",detail:"Reception AI enabled — added £79/mo to subscription",type:"billing",ip:"192.168.1.15"},
    {id:10,time:"Yesterday 09:00",user:"System",role:"System",action:"Automated recall sent",detail:"Lisa White — WhatsApp recall reminder — 8 months overdue",type:"system",ip:"System"},
  ];
  const TYPE_META={edit:{c:C.blue,l:"Edit"},finalise:{c:C.green,l:"Finalised"},system:{c:C.muted,l:"System"},nhs:{c:C.nhs,l:"NHS"},admin:{c:C.purple,l:"Admin"},cancel:{c:C.amber,l:"Cancel"},payment:{c:C.teal,l:"Payment"},billing:{c:C.orange,l:"Billing"}};
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Audit Log</div><div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Immutable record of all system actions · INSERT-ONLY · Cannot be edited or deleted</div></div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting audit log…")} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Download size={11}/>Export CSV</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {AUDIT.map((a,i)=>{const t=TYPE_META[a.type]||{c:C.muted,l:a.type};return(
          <div key={a.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0,minWidth:130}}>{a.time}</div>
            <div style={{flexShrink:0,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",minWidth:140}}>
              <div style={{width:24,height:24,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal+"20",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:C.teal}}>{a.user.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{a.user}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{a.role}</div></div>
            </div>
            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:1}}>{a.action}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{a.detail}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:t.c+"18",color:t.c,flexShrink:0}}>{t.l}</span>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0}}>{a.ip}</div>
          </div>
        );})}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SETTINGS — Practice configuration
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ── Controlled inline edit field component ──────────────────────
// ── Dashboard Visibility — proper component with top-level state ──
function DashboardVisibilitySection({doToast}){
  const ALL_MODULES=["dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","notes","fp17","uda","teamchat","whatsapp","receptionai","reports","tasks","rota","recovery","lab","accounts","payments"];
  const MODULE_LABELS={"dashboard":"Dashboard","nba":"Today's Priorities","calendar":"Calendar","waiting":"Waiting Room","patients":"Patient Records","notes":"Clinical Notes","fp17":"FP17 Claims","uda":"UDA Tracker","teamchat":"Team Chat","whatsapp":"WhatsApp","receptionai":"Reception AI","reports":"Reports","tasks":"Tasks","rota":"Staff Rota","recovery":"Revenue Recovery","lab":"Lab Manager","accounts":"Accounts","payments":"Payments"};
  const ROLES=["reception","dentist","hygienist","manager"];
  const ROLE_COLORS={"reception":"#0d9488","dentist":"#1d4ed8","hygienist":"#16a34a","manager":"#7c3aed"};
  const ROLE_DEFAULTS={"reception":["dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","teamchat","tasks","recovery"],"dentist":["dashboard","nba","calendar","patients","notes","fp17","uda","teamchat","tasks"],"hygienist":["dashboard","nba","calendar","patients","notes","teamchat","tasks"],"manager":ALL_MODULES};
  const [visibility,setVisibility]=useState(()=>Object.fromEntries(ROLES.map(r=>[r,new Set(ROLE_DEFAULTS[r])])));
  const toggle=(role,mod)=>setVisibility(v=>{const s=new Set(v[role]);s.has(mod)?s.delete(mod):s.add(mod);return{...v,[role]:s};});
  return(
    <div style={{marginBottom:16}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Staff Dashboard & Nav Visibility</div>
      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:14}}>Control which modules each staff role can see. Changes take effect immediately.</div>
      {ROLES.map(role=>(
        <div key={role} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${ROLE_COLORS[role]}30`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:10}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:ROLE_COLORS[role]+"10",borderBottom:`1px solid ${ROLE_COLORS[role]}20`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:7,background:ROLE_COLORS[role],display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{role[0].toUpperCase()}</div>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:ROLE_COLORS[role],flex:1,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{role} — {visibility[role].size} modules enabled</span>
            <button onClick={()=>setVisibility(v=>({...v,[role]:new Set(ALL_MODULES)}))} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",background:"none",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,cursor:"pointer",padding:"2px 8px"}}>All on</button>
            <button onClick={()=>setVisibility(v=>({...v,[role]:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULTS[role])}))} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",background:"none",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,cursor:"pointer",padding:"2px 8px"}}>Defaults</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:6,padding:"10px 14px"}}>
            {ALL_MODULES.map(mod=>{const on=visibility[role].has(mod);return(
              <button key={mod} onClick={()=>toggle(role,mod)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:6,border:`1.5px solid ${on?ROLE_COLORS[role]:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:on?ROLE_COLORS[role]+"15":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:on?700:400,color:on?ROLE_COLORS[role]:"#94a3b8"}}>
                {on?"✓ ":""}{MODULE_LABELS[mod]||mod}
              </button>
            );})}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Dashboard visibility saved for all roles")} style={{padding:"9px 24px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save Dashboard Layout</button>
    </div>
  );
}

function EditFieldInline({initialValue,onSave,onCancel,label,hint}){
  const [val,setVal]=useState(initialValue||"");
  const isSAField=label&&label.includes("SA Approval");
  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <input autoFocus value={val} onChange={e=>setVal(e.target.value)}
          style={{flex:1,padding:"6px 10px",border:`1.5px solid ${isSAField?"#dc2626":"#0d9488"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:isSAField?"#fff5f5":"#f0fffe",minWidth:0}}
          onKeyDown={e=>{if(e.key==="Enter")onSave(val);if(e.key==="Escape")onCancel();}}/>
        <button onClick={()=>onSave(val)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:isSAField?"#dc2626":"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {label||"Save"}
        </button>
        <button onClick={onCancel} style={{padding:"6px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",flexShrink:0}}>✕</button>
      </div>
      {hint&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#dc2626",marginTop:4,fontWeight:600}}>⚠ {hint}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

function SettingsPage({user}){
  const [activeSection,setActiveSection]=useState("practice");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};
  // Inline editing state
  const [editingField,setEditingField]=useState(null); // {section, key, value}
  const [configData,setConfigData]=useState(null); // overrides to CONFIGS
  const [pendingApprovals,setPendingApprovals]=useState([
    {id:"PA001",section:"practice",field:"Practice Name",oldVal:"Riverside Dentistry",newVal:"Riverside Dental Practice",submittedBy:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",at:"14 May 2026 10:22",status:"pending"},
  ]);
  const [accessRequests,setAccessRequests]=useState([
    {id:"AR001",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",grantedBy:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",duration:"1 hour",expiresAt:"14 May 2026 15:00",status:"active"},
  ]);
  // Backup state
  const [backupFreq,setBackupFreq]=useState("Every hour (recommended)");
  const [backupRetention,setBackupRetention]=useState("90 days rolling");
  const [showPlanPicker,setShowPlanPicker]=useState(false);
  const [selectedPlan,setSelectedPlan]=useState("growth");
  const [logoUrl,setLogoUrl]=useState(null); // uploaded logo data URL
  const [logoDragging,setLogoDragging]=useState(false);
  // Staff access granted toggle
  const [supportAccessActive,setSupportAccessActive]=useState(false);
  const [supportDuration,setSupportDuration]=useState(null);

  // Fields that ALWAYS require Super Admin (protect software provider integrity)
  const SUPER_ADMIN_ONLY_FIELDS=["CQC Registration","GDC Number","ODS Code"];
  // Sections where manager changes need Super Admin approval
  const needsApproval=(section)=>["practice","nhs"].includes(section);
  const isSuperAdminOnly=(key)=>SUPER_ADMIN_ONLY_FIELDS.includes(key);
  const isSuperAdmin=user?.role==="superadmin";
  const getVal=(section,key)=>configData?.[section]?.[key]??null;
  const submitEdit=(section,key,newVal,oldVal)=>{
    if(isSuperAdminOnly(key)){
      // CQC / GDC / ODS — request goes to SA approval queue only
      setPendingApprovals(p=>[{
        id:"PA"+Date.now(),section,field:key,oldVal,newVal,
        submittedBy:user?.name||"Manager",
        at:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),
        status:"pending",requiresSuperAdmin:true,
        note:"⚠ Protected field — only Super Admin can approve",
      },...p]);
      doToast("🔒 Change request submitted — only Super Admin can approve "+key);
    } else {
      // All other fields save immediately
      setConfigData(p=>({...p,[section]:{...(p?.[section]||{}),[key]:newVal}}));
      doToast("✓ "+key+" updated successfully");
    }
    setEditingField(null);
  };
  const approveChange=(id)=>{
    const pa=pendingApprovals.find(p=>p.id===id);
    if(pa){setConfigData(p=>({...p,[pa.section]:{...(p?.[pa.section]||{}),[pa.field]:pa.newVal}}));}
    setPendingApprovals(p=>p.map(a=>a.id!==id?a:{...a,status:"approved"}));
    doToast("✓ Change approved and applied");
  };
  const grantSupportAccess=(dur)=>{
    setSupportAccessActive(true);
    setSupportDuration(dur);
    const ms=dur==="1 Hour"?3600000:dur==="4 Hours"?14400000:86400000;
    setAccessRequests(p=>[{id:"AR"+Date.now(),practice:"Riverside Dentistry",grantedBy:user?.name||"Dr. Kim (Manager)",duration:dur,expiresAt:new Date(Date.now()+ms).toLocaleString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"}),status:"active"},...p]);
    doToast("✓ Support access granted for "+dur+" — logged and audited (Article 28 compliant)");
  };
  const [snomedSearch,setSnomedSearch]=useState("");
  const [editingCode,setEditingCode]=useState(null); // code id being edited
  const [txSettings,setTxSettings]=useState(()=>
    UK_TX.flatMap(g=>g.codes.map(c=>({...c,group:g.group,icon:g.icon,
      snomed:DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]||null,
      snomedTerm:DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c]?SNOMED_CODES.find(s=>s.code===DEFAULT_SNOMED[c.c])?.term||null:null
    })))
  );
  const filteredTx=txSettings.filter(t=>
    !snomedSearch||t.l.toLowerCase().includes(snomedSearch.toLowerCase())||t.c.includes(snomedSearch)||(t.snomed||"").includes(snomedSearch)
  );
  const updateSnomed=(txCode,snomedCode)=>{
    const sn=SNOMED_CODES.find(s=>s.code===snomedCode);
    setTxSettings(p=>p.map(t=>t.c!==txCode?t:{...t,snomed:snomedCode,snomedTerm:sn?.term||null}));
    setEditingCode(null);
    doToast("✓ SNOMED code saved for treatment "+txCode);
  };
  const SECTIONS=[
    {id:"practice",l:"Practice Details",icon:"🏥"},
    {id:"calendar",l:"Calendar & Appointments",icon:"📅"},
    {id:"clinical",l:"Clinical Settings",icon:"🩺"},
    {id:"treatments",l:"Treatment Settings",icon:"🦷"},
    {id:"dashboards",l:"Dashboard Visibility",icon:"📊"},
    {id:"nhs",l:"NHS Configuration",icon:"🏛"},
    {id:"backup",l:"Backup & Data",icon:"☁️"},
    {id:"integrations",l:"Integrations",icon:"🔌"},
    {id:"notifications",l:"Notifications",icon:"🔔"},
    {id:"billing",l:"Billing & Payments",icon:"💳"},
    {id:"security",l:"Security",icon:"🔒"},
    {id:"branding",l:"Branding",icon:"🎨"},
    {id:"superadmin",l:"Super Admin Access",icon:"🛡",superAdminOnly:true},
  ];
  const CONFIGS={
    practice:[["Practice Name","Riverside Dentistry"],["CQC Registration","1-123456789"],["GDC Number","123456"],["Address","1 High Street, Southampton SO14 1AB"],["Phone","0207 111 2222"],["Email","info@riverside.co.uk"],["ODS Code","Y00001"],["Performer PIN","55A"]],
    calendar:[["Default appointment duration","30 minutes"],["Working hours start","08:30"],["Working hours end","17:30"],["DNA threshold (auto-flag)","2 DNAs"],["Appointment reminder","24 hours before"],["Cancellation buffer","2 hours notice required"]],
    nhs:[["NHS Contract number","C123456"],["UDA target (annual)","4,560"],["BSA submission method","Compass (online)"],["Recall interval","6 months"],["Band 1 charge","£26.80"],["Band 2 charge","£73.50"],["Band 3 charge","£319.10"]],
    notifications:[["Patient appointment reminders","WhatsApp & SMS"],["Staff rota published","Email"],["FP17 rejection alerts","Email"],["DNA alerts","In-app"],["Revenue recovery digest","Weekly email"],["System maintenance","Email"]],
    billing:[["Current plan","Growth · £149/mo"],["Next billing date","1 Jun 2025"],["Payment method","Visa ending 4242"],["Invoice email","accounts@riverside.co.uk"],["Auto-renewal","Enabled"]],
    security:[["Two-factor authentication","Enabled — all managers"],["Session timeout","30 minutes"],["Password policy","8+ chars, uppercase, number"],["IP allowlist","Disabled"],["Audit log retention","7 years (CQC requirement)"]],
    branding:[["Practice name on comms","Riverside Dentistry"],["SMS sender name","RiversideDent"],["Email from name","Riverside Dentistry"],["Primary colour","#0d9488 (teal)"],["Logo","Uploaded ✓"]],
  };
  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{width:220,flexShrink:0,background:"#fff",borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 0"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"0 14px 10px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted}}>Settings</div>
        {SECTIONS.map(s=><button key={s.id} onClick={()=>setActiveSection(s.id)} style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderLeft:`3px solid ${activeSection===s.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:activeSection===s.id?"rgba(13,148,136,0.06)":"transparent",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"left"}}
          onMouseOver={e=>{if(activeSection!==s.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(activeSection!==s.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="transparent";}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:16,flexShrink:0}}>{s.icon}</span><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:activeSection===s.id?700:400,color:activeSection===s.id?C.teal:C.text}}>{s.l}</span>
        </button>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:600}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>{SECTIONS.find(s=>s.id===activeSection)?.l}</div>
          {/* Pending approval banner */}
          {pendingApprovals.filter(a=>a.section===activeSection&&a.status==="pending"&&a.requiresSuperAdmin).length>0&&(
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #fde68a",marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:18}}>⏳</span>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#92400e"}}>{pendingApprovals.filter(a=>a.section===activeSection&&a.status==="pending"&&a.requiresSuperAdmin).length} protected field change(s) pending Super Admin approval</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#92400e"}}>Approve in Settings → Super Admin Access</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection==="practice"&&<div style={{padding:"7px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",marginBottom:10,fontSize:10,color:"#1d4ed8",display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
            🛡 Fields marked with a shield (🛡) require Super Admin approval — all other fields save immediately.
          </div>}

          <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            {(CONFIGS[activeSection]||[]).map(([l,v],i)=>{
              const currentVal=getVal(activeSection,l)??v;
              const isEditing=editingField?.section===activeSection&&editingField?.key===l;
              // Branding — Logo: real file upload, not text field
              if(activeSection==="branding"&&l==="Logo"){return(
                <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"flex-start",background:"#fff"}}>
                  <div style={{minWidth:180,fontSize:12,color:C.muted,fontWeight:500,flexShrink:0,paddingTop:4}}>{l}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
                    {/* Current logo preview */}
                    {logoUrl
                      ?<div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                        <img src={logoUrl} alt="Practice logo" style={{height:40,maxWidth:160,objectFit:"contain",borderRadius:6,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",padding:4}}/>
                        <button onClick={()=>setLogoUrl(null)} style={{padding:"3px 10px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:6,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>Remove</button>
                        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:600}}>✓ Logo uploaded</span>
                      </div>
                      :<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No logo uploaded</span>}
                    {/* Drop zone / upload */}
                    <label onDragOver={e=>{e.preventDefault();setLogoDragging(true);}} onDragLeave={()=>setLogoDragging(false)}
                      onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault();setLogoDragging(false);const f=e.dataTransfer.files[0];if(f&&f.type.startsWith("image/")){const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>setLogoUrl(ev.target.result);r.readAsDataURL(f);}}}
                      style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:"14px",border:`2px dashed ${logoDragging?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:9,background:logoDragging?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",transition:"all .15s"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:20,marginBottom:4}}>🖼</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>Drop image here or click to upload</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>PNG, JPG, SVG · Max 2MB · Recommended: 200×60px</span>
                      <input type="file" accept="image/*" style={{display:"none"}} onChange={e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(f){const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{setLogoUrl(ev.target.result);doToast("✓ Logo uploaded — will appear across all patient communications");};r.readAsDataURL(f);}}}/>
                    </label>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );}

              // Billing — Current plan: show Change Plan button, not text edit
              if(activeSection==="billing"&&l==="Current plan"&&!isEditing){return(
                <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"center",background:"#fff"}}>
                  <div style={{minWidth:180,fontSize:12,color:C.muted,fontWeight:500,flexShrink:0}}>{l}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{currentVal}</span>
                    {pendingApprovals.some(a=>a.section==="billing"&&a.field==="Current plan"&&a.status==="pending")&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e",border:"1px solid #fde68a"}}>⏳ Awaiting SA approval</span>}
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={()=>setShowPlanPicker(true)} style={{padding:"5px 14px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",flexShrink:0}}>Change Plan</button>
                </div>
              );}
              const isPending=pendingApprovals.some(a=>a.section===activeSection&&a.field===l&&a.status==="pending");
              return(
              <div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"center",background:isPending?"#fffbf7":"#fff",minHeight:46}}>
                <div style={{minWidth:180,fontSize:12,color:C.muted,fontWeight:500,flexShrink:0}}>{l}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,minWidth:0}}>
                  {isEditing
                    ?<EditFieldInline
                        key={l}
                        initialValue={currentVal}
                        onSave={v=>submitEdit(activeSection,l,v,currentVal)}
                        onCancel={()=>setEditingField(null)}
                        label={isSuperAdminOnly(l)?"🔒 Request SA Approval":"Save"}
                        hint={isSuperAdminOnly(l)?"This change must be approved by Super Admin before it takes effect":null}
                      />
                    :<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,flex:1,color:isPending?"#92400e":"#374151",wordBreak:"break-word"}}>{currentVal}</span>
                      {isPending&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e",border:"1px solid #fde68a",flexShrink:0}}>⏳ Awaiting approval</span>}
                    </div>}
                </div>
                {!isEditing&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                  {isSuperAdminOnly(l)&&<span title="Only Super Admin can approve changes to this field" style={{fontSize:9,cursor:"default"}}>🛡</span>}
                  <button onClick={()=>setEditingField({section:activeSection,key:l})} style={{border:"none",background:"none",cursor:"pointer",color:"#94a3b8",padding:"4px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center"}} title={"Edit "+l}><Edit size={13}/></button>
                </div>}
              </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
          {activeSection==="clinical"&&(()=>{
            const feat=GLOBAL_FEATURE_CONFIG.find(f=>f.id==="mandatory_alert_ack");
            const toggleAlert=()=>{if(feat)feat.enabled=!feat.enabled;doToast(feat?.enabled?"✓ Mandatory alert acknowledgement enabled":"Alert acknowledgement disabled");};
            return(
              <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
                <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                  <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>⚠️</span>
                    <div style={{flex:1}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>Mandatory Alert Acknowledgement</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.6}}>When enabled, staff must acknowledge patient medical alerts every time a patient record is opened — every visit, every user. When disabled, alerts are still displayed but staff can open the record without acknowledging.</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{flexShrink:0}}>
                      <button onClick={toggleAlert} style={{width:44,height:24,borderRadius:12,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:feat?.enabled?"#0d9488":"#d1d5db",position:"relative",transition:"background .2s",padding:0}}>
                        <div style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:3,left:feat?.enabled?23:3,transition:"left .2s",boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}/>
                      </button>
                      <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:feat?.enabled?"#0d9488":"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center",marginTop:3}}>{feat?.enabled?"ON":"OFF"}</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>🔒 This setting is for managers only · Changes are logged in the audit trail</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })()}
          {/* ── Treatment Settings & SNOMED ── */}
          {activeSection==="treatments"&&<div style={{marginBottom:16}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:C.text,marginBottom:4}}>Treatment Settings & SNOMED CT Codes</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12,lineHeight:1.6}}>
              SNOMED CT is the structured clinical vocabulary used in NHS electronic health records.<br/>
              Assign SNOMED codes to your treatment items for NHS England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland claims.
              <a href="https://www.nhsbsa.nhs.uk/dental-provider-assurance/clinical-services/snomed-ct" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" style={{color:C.teal,marginLeft:6}}>NHSBSA SNOMED guidance ↗</a>
            </div>

            {/* Search */}
            <div style={{position:"relative",marginBottom:10}}>
              <Search size={12} style={{position:"absolute",left:10,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",color:C.muted}}/>
              <input value={snomedSearch} onChange={e=>setSnomedSearch(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Search treatments by name, code, or SNOMED code…"
                style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px 7px 30px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
            </div>

            {/* Stats row */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:12}}>
              {[
                {l:"Total treatments",v:txSettings.length,c:"#374151"},
                {l:"SNOMED assigned",v:txSettings.filter(t=>t.snomed).length,c:"#16a34a"},
                {l:"Missing SNOMED",v:txSettings.filter(t=>!t.snomed).length,c:"#dc2626"},
              ].map(s=>(
                <div key={s.l} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,textAlign:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:s.c}}>{s.v}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{s.l}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Treatment table */}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"60px 1fr 80px 1fr 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",gap:8}}>
                <span>Code</span><span>Treatment</span><span>Band</span><span>SNOMED Code</span><span>Action</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{maxHeight:480,overflowY:"auto"}}>
                {filteredTx.map((tx,i)=>{
                  const isEditing=editingCode===tx.c;
                  const hasSno=!!tx.snomed;
                  return(
                  <div key={tx.c} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"60px 1fr 80px 1fr 80px",padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:isEditing?"#f0fffe":"#fff",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:C.blue}}>{tx.c}</span>
                    <div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:500,color:C.text}}>{tx.l}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{tx.group}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div>{tx.nhs&&tx.band?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>Band {tx.band}</span>:<span style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>Pvt</span>}</div>
                    <div>
                      {isEditing
                        ?<div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                          <select onChange={e=>updateSnomed(tx.c,e.target.value)}
                            style={{flex:1,padding:"4px 6px",border:`1.5px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:"#f0fffe"}}>
                            <option value="">— Select SNOMED code —</option>
                            {[...new Set(SNOMED_CODES.map(s=>s.cat))].map(cat=>(
                              <optgroup key={cat} label={cat}>
                                {SNOMED_CODES.filter(s=>s.cat===cat).map(s=>(
                                  <option key={s.code} value={s.code}>{s.code} — {s.term}</option>
                                ))}
                              </optgroup>
                            ))}
                          </select>
                          <button onClick={()=>setEditingCode(null)} style={{padding:"4px 8px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>✕</button>
                        </div>
                        :<div>
                          {hasSno
                            ?<div>
                              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>{tx.snomed}</span>
                              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,marginTop:1}}>{tx.snomedTerm}</div>
                            </div>
                            :<span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>Not assigned</span>}
                        </div>}
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      {!isEditing&&<button onClick={()=>setEditingCode(tx.c)}
                        style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:hasSno?"#64748b":"#0d9488",fontWeight:hasSno?400:700}}>
                        {hasSno?"Edit":"Assign"}
                      </button>}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:8}}>🔒 NHS England, Wales, Scotland, Northern Ireland only · SNOMED codes are included in NHS claim submissions</div>
          </div>}

          {/* ── Dashboard Visibility Manager — state hoisted from IIFE ── */}
          {activeSection==="dashboards"&&<DashboardVisibilitySection doToast={doToast}/>}

          {/* ── BACKUP & DATA — read-only for non-SA ── */}
          {activeSection==="backup"&&<div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            {!isSuperAdmin&&<div style={{padding:"9px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:10,color:"#92400e",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
              🔒 Backup settings are managed by Super Admin. You can view the current configuration below.
            </div>}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",opacity:isSuperAdmin?1:1}}>
              <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:"1px solid #bbf7d0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:18}}>☁️</span>
                <div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#16a34a"}}>Auto-backup active</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Last backup: Today 08:58 · 147ms · All data encrypted AES-256</div></div>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10,pointerEvents:isSuperAdmin?"auto":"none",opacity:isSuperAdmin?1:0.5}}>
                <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Backup frequency</label>
                  <select value={backupFreq} onChange={e=>setBackupFreq(e.target.value)} disabled={!isSuperAdmin} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:isSuperAdmin?"#fff":"#f1f5f9",cursor:isSuperAdmin?"pointer":"not-allowed"}}>
                    {["Every 15 minutes","Every hour (recommended)","Every 4 hours","Daily"].map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
                  </select></div>
                <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Backup retention</label>
                  <select value={backupRetention} onChange={e=>setBackupRetention(e.target.value)} disabled={!isSuperAdmin} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:isSuperAdmin?"#fff":"#f1f5f9",cursor:isSuperAdmin?"pointer":"not-allowed"}}>
                    {["30 days rolling","90 days rolling","1 year rolling","7 years (CQC)"].map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
                  </select></div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:4}}>
                  <button disabled={!isSuperAdmin} onClick={()=>isSuperAdmin&&doToast("✓ Export started")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:isSuperAdmin?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,opacity:isSuperAdmin?1:0.5}}>⬇ Export all data (GDPR)</button>
                  <button disabled={!isSuperAdmin} onClick={()=>isSuperAdmin&&doToast("✓ Restore point selected")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"1px solid #1d4ed8",borderRadius:8,background:"#eff6ff",cursor:isSuperAdmin?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:isSuperAdmin?"#1d4ed8":"#94a3b8",opacity:isSuperAdmin?1:0.5}}>↩ Restore backup</button>
                  {isSuperAdmin&&<button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Backup settings saved")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Save</button>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>}

          {/* ── INTEGRATIONS ── */}
          {activeSection==="integrations"&&<div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:12}}>Connect external services to Pro Dental Connect. All integrations are encrypted and GDPR-compliant.</div>
            {[
              {name:"Stripe",icon:"💳",status:"Connected",desc:"Card payments & payment links",category:"Payments"},
              {name:"GoCardless",icon:"🏦",status:"Not connected",desc:"Direct Debit for payment plans",category:"Payments"},
              {name:"Chrysalis Finance",icon:"💰",status:"Connected",desc:"Patient finance applications",category:"Payments"},
              {name:"WhatsApp Business",icon:"💬",status:"Connected",desc:"Two-way patient messaging",category:"Comms"},
              {name:"NHS BSA Compass",icon:"🏛",status:"Connected",desc:"FP17 NHS claim submission",category:"NHS"},
              {name:"WebEDI Wales",icon:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿",status:"Not connected",desc:"NHS Wales claim submission",category:"NHS"},
              {name:"Calendly",icon:"📅",status:"Not connected",desc:"Online appointment booking widget",category:"Booking"},
              {name:"Xero",icon:"📊",status:"Not connected",desc:"Accounting & payroll",category:"Finance"},
            ].map((int,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>{int.icon}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{int.name}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{int.category}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{int.desc}</div>
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:int.status==="Connected"?"#dcfce7":"#f8fafc",color:int.status==="Connected"?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{int.status}</span>
                <button onClick={()=>doToast(int.status==="Connected"?"✓ "+int.name+" settings opened":"🔗 Connecting "+int.name+"…")} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:int.status==="Connected"?"#f8fafc":"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:int.status==="Connected"?"#64748b":"#0d9488"}}>
                  {int.status==="Connected"?"Configure":"Connect"}
                </button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>}

          {/* ── SUPER ADMIN ACCESS ── */}
          {activeSection==="superadmin"&&<div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            {/* Pending approvals for this practice */}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>⏳ Pending Change Approvals</div>
              {pendingApprovals.filter(a=>a.status==="pending").length===0&&<div style={{padding:"16px",textAlign:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No pending changes</div>}
              {pendingApprovals.filter(a=>a.status==="pending").map((pa,i)=>(
                <div key={pa.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"11px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center",background:pa.requiresSuperAdmin?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                  <div style={{flex:1}}>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{pa.section==="practice"?"Practice Details":"NHS Config"} — {pa.field}</span>
                      {pa.requiresSuperAdmin&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>🔒 SA Only</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginTop:1}}>{pa.oldVal} → <strong style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>{pa.newVal}</strong></div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{pa.submittedBy} · {pa.at}</div>
                    {pa.note&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#dc2626",marginTop:2}}>{pa.note}</div>}
                  </div>
                  {pa.requiresSuperAdmin&&!isSuperAdmin
                    ?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626",border:"1px solid #fecaca"}}>🔒 Super Admin approval only</span>
                    :<>
                      <button onClick={()=>approveChange(pa.id)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Approve</button>
                      <button onClick={()=>{setPendingApprovals(p=>p.map(a=>a.id!==pa.id?a:{...a,status:"rejected"}));doToast("Change rejected");}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>Reject</button>
                    </>}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* GDPR-Compliant Support Access */}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>🛡 GDPR-Compliant Remote Support Access</div>
              <div style={{padding:"14px 16px"}}>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:14,fontSize:10,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.7}}>
                  <strong>UK GDPR (Article 28) Compliance Protocol:</strong> Remote access is disabled by default. By enabling this, you grant Pro-Dental Support a temporary, purpose-limited sub-processor authorisation to access your practice data for troubleshooting.
                  <ul style={{margin:"6px 0 0 16px",padding:0}}>
                    <li>Actions are fully audited and append-only</li>
                    <li>Access automatically expires after the selected duration</li>
                    <li>Covered by the master Data Processing Agreement (DPA)</li>
                  </ul>
                </div>
                {!supportAccessActive?<>
                  <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"16px 0"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:8}}>🔒</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Grant Temporary Support Access</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Select the duration for which our support team can access your clinic.</div>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,justifyContent:"center"}}>
                      {["1 Hour","4 Hours","24 Hours"].map(d=><button key={d} onClick={()=>grantSupportAccess(d)} style={{padding:"8px 20px",border:"1.5px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{d}</button>)}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:3}}>LEGAL VERDICT</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:700}}>✓ UK GDPR Article 28(3) Compliant</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>This mechanism ensures that any access is "on documented instructions from the controller" and strictly time-bound to prevent unauthorised long-term data exposure.</div>
                  </div>
                </>:<div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#dcfce7",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:16}}>🔓</span>
                  <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>Support Access Active — {supportDuration}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Expires: {new Date(Date.now()+(supportDuration==="1 Hour"?3600:supportDuration==="4 Hours"?14400:86400)*1000).toLocaleString("en-GB")}</div></div>
                  <button onClick={()=>{setSupportAccessActive(false);setSupportDuration(null);doToast("✓ Support access revoked");}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>Revoke Access</button>
                </div>}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Active access log */}
            {accessRequests.length>0&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Access Log</div>
              {accessRequests.map((ar,i)=>(
                <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{flex:1}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{ar.practice} · {ar.duration}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Granted by {ar.grantedBy} · Expires {ar.expiresAt}</div>
                  </div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:ar.status==="active"?"#dcfce7":"#f8fafc",color:ar.status==="active"?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{ar.status}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>}
          </div>}

          {/* ── BILLING PLAN SELECTOR ── */}
          {activeSection==="billing"&&showPlanPicker&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span>Select New Plan</span>
              <button onClick={()=>setShowPlanPicker(false)} style={{border:"none",background:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:18,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1}}>✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:14,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
              {[{id:"starter",l:"Starter",price:"£79/mo",desc:"1 dentist · Core features · NHS FP17 · Basic reports"},{id:"growth",l:"Growth",price:"£149/mo",desc:"Up to 3 dentists · All NHS regions · Advanced analytics · WhatsApp"},{id:"enterprise",l:"Enterprise",price:"Custom",desc:"Unlimited users · All modules · API · White label · Priority support"}].map(p=>(
                <div key={p.id} onClick={()=>setSelectedPlan(p.id)} style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderRadius:10,border:`2px solid ${selectedPlan===p.id?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:selectedPlan===p.id?"#f0fffe":"#fff",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{p.l} {p.id==="growth"&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>CURRENT</span>}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.price}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{p.desc}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
              <button onClick={()=>{
                const plans=[{id:"starter",l:"Starter",price:"£79/mo"},{id:"growth",l:"Growth",price:"£149/mo"},{id:"enterprise",l:"Enterprise",price:"Custom"}];
                const p=plans.find(x=>x.id===selectedPlan);
                setPendingApprovals(prev=>[{id:"PA"+Date.now(),section:"billing",field:"Current plan",oldVal:"Growth · £149/mo",newVal:p?.l+" · "+p?.price,submittedBy:user?.name||"Manager",at:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),status:"pending",requiresSuperAdmin:true,note:"⚠ Plan change requires Super Admin approval"},...prev]);
                setShowPlanPicker(false);
                doToast("⏳ Plan change to "+p?.l+" submitted — Super Admin will approve");
              }} style={{padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginTop:4}}>
                Request Plan Change → Super Admin Approval
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>}

          {!["backup","integrations","superadmin","treatments","clinical","dashboards"].includes(activeSection)&&<button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Settings saved")} style={{padding:"9px 24px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Check size={12}/>Save Changes</button>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CLINICAL NOTES — draft / finalise / lock workflow
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function ClinicalNotesPage({openPatient}){
  const NOTES_INIT=[
    {id:"N1",patient:"Tom Bright", pid:null, dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"Today · 09:00",  status:"draft",    body:"Patient presents for extraction LL7. Complaint: severe pain. LA administered — 2 cartridges Articaine. Tooth extracted intact. Post-op instructions given."},
    {id:"N2",patient:"Sarah Chen", pid:"P2", dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"Today · 09:30",  status:"draft",    body:"Patient presents for crown fit UR6. PFM crown fitted and cemented with GIC. Occlusion checked — satisfactory. Patient advised to avoid hard foods for 24 hours."},
    {id:"N3",patient:"John Mills", pid:"P1", dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"14 May · 14:00", status:"finalised",body:"Routine check-up. Medical history reviewed. BPE 2. Caries UR6 — composite restoration planned. OHI reinforced."},
    {id:"N4",patient:"Amy Torres", pid:"P4", dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",date:"10 May · 09:00", status:"locked",   body:"Implant consultation. CBCT discussed. Treatment plan presented — single implant UL2. Cost: £2,600. Finance options discussed. Patient considering."},
  ];
  const STATUS_META_NOTES={
    draft:     {c:C.amber, l:"Draft",     Icon:PenLine, bg:"#fffbeb"},
    finalised: {c:C.blue,  l:"Finalised", Icon:Check,   bg:"#dbeafe"},
    locked:    {c:"#94a3b8",l:"Locked",  Icon:Lock,    bg:"#f1f5f9"},
  };
  const [notes,setNotes]=useState(NOTES_INIT);
  const [selId,setSelId]=useState("N1");
  const [body,setBody]=useState(NOTES_INIT[0].body);
  const [dirty,setDirty]=useState(false);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [showFinaliseConfirm,setShowFinaliseConfirm]=useState(false);

  const doToast=(m,type="success")=>{setToast({m,type});setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};
  const sel=notes.find(n=>n.id===selId);
  const drafts=notes.filter(n=>n.status==="draft");

  const selectNote=(n)=>{
    if(dirty&&sel?.status==="draft"){
      if(!window.confirm("You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?"))return;
    }
    setSelId(n.id);setBody(n.body);setDirty(false);
  };

  const saveDraft=()=>{
    setNotes(p=>p.map(n=>n.id!==selId?n:{...n,body}));
    setDirty(false);
    doToast("✓ Draft saved — "+sel?.patient,"success");
  };

  const finaliseNote=()=>{
    setNotes(p=>p.map(n=>n.id!==selId?n:{...n,body,status:"finalised"}));
    setDirty(false);setShowFinaliseConfirm(false);
    doToast("✓ Note finalised for "+sel?.patient+" — will lock in 24 hours","finalised");
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {/* Toast */}
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 18px",background:toast.type==="finalised"?"#dbeafe":toast.type==="error"?"#fee2e2":"#f0fdf4",border:`1px solid ${toast.type==="finalised"?"#bfdbfe":toast.type==="error"?"#fecaca":"#bbf7d0"}`,borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:toast.type==="finalised"?"#1d4ed8":toast.type==="error"?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",fontWeight:600}}>{toast.m}</div>}

      {/* Finalise confirmation modal */}
