      {showFinaliseConfirm&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:380,padding:22,boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:6}}>Finalise Clinical Note?</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8,lineHeight:1.6}}>
            Finalising <strong>{sel?.patient}</strong>'s note confirms it is clinically accurate. The note will be locked automatically 24 hours after finalisation and cannot be edited.
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#fffbeb",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:14}}>
            ⚠ Once finalised and locked, this note forms part of the permanent clinical record and cannot be changed.
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowFinaliseConfirm(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={finaliseNote} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Finalise Note</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Left panel — note list */}
      <div style={{width:280,flexShrink:0,background:"#fff",borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Clinical Notes</div>
          {drafts.length>0&&<span style={{fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:8,background:"#fffbeb"}}>{drafts.length} draft{drafts.length!==1?"s":""} pending</span>}
        </div>
        {notes.map((n)=>{const s=STATUS_META_NOTES[n.status];return(
          <div key={n.id} onClick={()=>selectNote(n)} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selId===n.id?"rgba(13,148,136,0.06)":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selId===n.id?C.teal:s.c}`}}
            onMouseOver={e=>{if(selId!==n.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selId!==n.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff";}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,marginBottom:3,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{n.patient}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:s.bg,color:s.c}}>{s.l}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{n.date}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginTop:2}}>{n.body.slice(0,55)}…</div>
          </div>
        );})}
      </div>

      {/* Right panel — note editor */}
      {sel&&<div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:1}}>{sel.patient} <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:400,color:C.muted}}>— {sel.date} · {sel.dentist}</span></div>
            {sel.status==="draft"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.amber,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
              ⏱ Draft{dirty?" · Unsaved changes":""} — notes must be finalised within 24 hours of treatment.
            </div>}
            {sel.status==="finalised"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.blue}}>✓ Finalised — will lock automatically in 24 hours</div>}
            {sel.status==="locked"&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>🔒 Locked — immutable clinical record</div>}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
            {sel.pid&&<button onClick={()=>openPatient(sel.pid)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><User size={11}/>Record</button>}
            {sel.status==="draft"&&<>
              <button onClick={saveDraft}
                style={{padding:"6px 16px",border:`1.5px solid ${C.amber}`,borderRadius:8,background:dirty?"#fffbeb":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:dirty?C.amber:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,transition:"all .15s"}}>
                💾 Save Draft
              </button>
              <button onClick={()=>{saveDraft();setShowFinaliseConfirm(true);}}
                style={{padding:"6px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <Check size={12}/>Finalise Note
              </button>
            </>}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Unsaved changes banner */}
        {dirty&&sel.status==="draft"&&<div style={{padding:"7px 20px",background:"#fffbeb",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:10,color:C.amber,fontWeight:600,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
          ✏ Unsaved changes — click Save Draft to save, or Finalise Note to complete.
        </div>}

        <div style={{flex:1,padding:18,overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {sel.status==="draft"
            ?<textarea rows={18} value={body} onChange={e=>{setBody(e.target.value);setDirty(e.target.value!==sel.body);}}
                style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1.5px solid ${dirty?"#f59e0b":C.border}`,borderRadius:10,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"14px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%",resize:"vertical",lineHeight:1.8,boxSizing:"border-box",transition:"border-color .15s"}}/>
            :<div style={{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"14px 16px",fontSize:13,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.8,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap"}}>{sel.body}</div>}
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DAILY TASKS — personalised task list with completion
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function TasksPage({user}){
  const [tasks,setTasks]=useState([
    {id:"TK1",title:"Submit FP17 — Amy Torres (Band 2)",priority:"urgent",done:false,cat:"NHS",due:"Today"},
    {id:"TK2",title:"Confirm tomorrow's 8 unconfirmed appointments",priority:"urgent",done:false,cat:"Appointments",due:"Today"},
    {id:"TK3",title:"Chase Prestige Lab — Sarah Chen crown overdue",priority:"urgent",done:false,cat:"Lab",due:"Today"},
    {id:"TK4",title:"Contact John Mills — confirm 09:30 tomorrow",priority:"normal",done:false,cat:"Appointments",due:"Today"},
    {id:"TK5",title:"Update waiting room display with new dentist list",priority:"normal",done:true,cat:"Practice",due:"Today"},
    {id:"TK6",title:"Review 4 outstanding FP17 claims",priority:"normal",done:false,cat:"NHS",due:"This week"},
    {id:"TK7",title:"Book staff training — Friday 5:30pm",priority:"low",done:true,cat:"Practice",due:"This week"},
    {id:"TK8",title:"Send recall reminders — May batch",priority:"normal",done:false,cat:"Patients",due:"This week"},
  ]);
  const [newTask,setNewTask]=useState("");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),1500);};
  const toggle=(id)=>setTasks(p=>p.map(t=>t.id===id?{...t,done:!t.done}:t));
  const addTask=()=>{if(!newTask.trim())return;setTasks(p=>[...p,{id:"TK"+Date.now(),title:newTask,priority:"normal",done:false,cat:"General",due:"Today"}]);setNewTask("");doToast("Task added");};
  const pending=tasks.filter(t=>!t.done);const done=tasks.filter(t=>t.done);
  const PRI={urgent:{c:C.red,bg:"#fee2e2"},normal:{c:C.amber,bg:"#fffbeb"},low:{c:C.muted,bg:"#f1f5f9"}};
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#0f172a",color:"#fff",borderRadius:20,fontSize:12,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
        {[{l:"Urgent",v:tasks.filter(t=>t.priority==="urgent"&&!t.done).length,c:C.red},{l:"Pending",v:pending.length,c:C.amber},{l:"Completed today",v:done.length,c:C.green}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.l}</div></div>)}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,flex:2,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <input value={newTask} onChange={e=>setNewTask(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&addTask()} placeholder="Add a task…" style={{...{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"},flex:1}}/>
          <button onClick={addTask} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      {["Today","This week"].map(due=>{const group=pending.filter(t=>t.due===due);if(!group.length)return null;return(
        <div key={due} style={{marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:C.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>{due} ({group.length})</div>
          {group.map(t=><div key={t.id} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${PRI[t.priority]?.c||C.muted}`,borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:8,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <button onClick={()=>toggle(t.id)} style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:"50%",border:`2px solid ${PRI[t.priority]?.c||C.muted}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0}}/>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{t.title}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{t.cat} · {t.priority}</div></div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:PRI[t.priority]?.bg,color:PRI[t.priority]?.c,textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{t.priority}</span>
          </div>)}
        </div>
      );})}
      {done.length>0&&<div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:C.green,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:8}}>Completed ({done.length})</div>
      {done.map(t=><div key={t.id} style={{background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #d1fae5",borderRadius:10,padding:"9px 14px",marginBottom:7,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",opacity:.7}}>
        <button onClick={()=>toggle(t.id)} style={{width:20,height:20,borderRadius:"50%",border:`2px solid ${C.green}`,background:C.green,cursor:"pointer",flexShrink:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Check size={10} color="#fff"/></button>
        <div style={{flex:1,fontSize:12,color:C.muted,textDecoration:"line-through"}}>{t.title}</div>
      </div>)}
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UDA TRACKER
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function UDAPage(){
  const dentists=[{name:"Dr. S. Patel",target:2280,done:1872,color:C.teal},{name:"Dr. M. Chen",target:2280,done:1529,color:C.purple}];
  const month=4;const totalMonths=12;
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>UDA Tracker — 2025/26 Contract Year</div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(2,1fr)",gap:14,marginBottom:16}}>
        {dentists.map(d=>{const pct=Math.round(d.done/d.target*100);const monthlyNeeded=Math.ceil((d.target-d.done)/(12-month));const onTrack=d.done/(month/12*d.target)>=0.9;return(
          <div key={d.name} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:18}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:10}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>{d.name}</div>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:onTrack?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:onTrack?C.green:C.red}}>{onTrack?"On Track ✓":"Behind Target ⚠"}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:12}}>
              {[{l:"Target",v:d.target.toLocaleString()},{l:"Completed",v:d.done.toLocaleString()},{l:"Remaining",v:(d.target-d.done).toLocaleString()}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{textAlign:"center"}}><div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:d.color,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.l}</div></div>)}
            </div>
            <div style={{height:10,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:5,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:6}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min(pct,100)}%`,background:pct<80?C.red:pct<95?C.amber:C.green,borderRadius:5,transition:"width .5s"}}/></div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>
              <span>{pct}% complete at month {month}</span><span>Need ~{monthlyNeeded} UDA/month to hit target</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        );})}
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Monthly UDA Activity</div>
        {["January","February","March","April"].map((m,i)=>{const target=380;const vals=[368,391,355,315];const v=vals[i];const pct=Math.round(v/target*100);return(
          <div key={m} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{minWidth:80,fontSize:11,fontWeight:500}}>{m}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1,height:6,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min(pct,100)}%`,background:pct<85?C.red:pct<98?C.amber:C.green,borderRadius:3}}/></div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,minWidth:60,textAlign:"right"}}>{v}/{target}</div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:pct>=100?"#dcfce7":pct>=85?"#fef3c7":"#fee2e2",color:pct>=100?C.green:pct>=85?C.amber:C.red,minWidth:48}}>{pct}%</span>
          </div>
        );})}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ACCOUNTS — Patient balances and invoices
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AccountsPage(){
  const ACCS_INIT=[
    {id:"AC1",patient:"John Mills",   type:"NHS",  balance:73.50, overdue:true, lastPaid:"14 Feb 2025",email:"john.mills@email.com",phone:"07700 900111",items:["Band 2 — Composite UR6"]},
    {id:"AC2",patient:"Amy Torres",   type:"Priv", balance:850,   overdue:false,lastPaid:"10 Apr 2025",email:"amy.torres@email.com",phone:"07700 900444",items:["Crown UR6 — £319","Implant deposit — £531"]},
    {id:"AC3",patient:"Lisa White",   type:"NHS",  balance:150,   overdue:true, lastPaid:"7 Jan 2025", email:"lisa.white@email.com",phone:"07700 900555",items:["Band 2 x2 outstanding"]},
    {id:"AC4",patient:"Sarah Chen",   type:"NHS",  balance:0,     overdue:false,lastPaid:"13 May 2025",email:"s.chen@email.co.uk",phone:"07700 900222",items:[]},
    {id:"AC5",patient:"David Park",   type:"NHS",  balance:0,     overdue:false,lastPaid:"8 May 2025", email:"d.park@email.com",phone:"07700 900777",items:[]},
    {id:"AC6",patient:"Robert Hall",  type:"NHS",  balance:0,     overdue:false,lastPaid:"12 May 2025",email:"r.hall@email.com",phone:"07700 900333",items:[]},
  ];
  const [accs,setAccs]=useState(ACCS_INIT);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [showPayModal,setShowPayModal]=useState(null); // patient record
  const [showReminderModal,setShowReminderModal]=useState(null);
  const [payMethod,setPayMethod]=useState("link");
  const [payAmount,setPayAmount]=useState("");
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};
  const total=accs.reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);
  const overdue=accs.filter(a=>a.overdue).reduce((s,a)=>s+a.balance,0);

  const sendReminder=(a)=>{doToast(`📱 Payment reminder SMS sent to ${a.patient} — £${a.balance.toFixed(2)} outstanding`);setShowReminderModal(null);};
  const takePayment=(a,method)=>{
    if(method==="mark_paid"){
      setAccs(p=>p.map(ac=>ac.id!==a.id?ac:{...ac,balance:0,overdue:false,lastPaid:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"})}));
      doToast(`✓ £${a.balance.toFixed(2)} marked as paid for ${a.patient}`);
    } else if(method==="link"){
      doToast(`💳 Stripe payment link sent to ${a.email} — £${a.balance.toFixed(2)}`);
    } else if(method==="card"){
      doToast(`💳 Card reader payment of £${payAmount||a.balance.toFixed(2)} initiated for ${a.patient}`);
    }
    setShowPayModal(null);setPayAmount("");
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1)"}}>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Send Reminder Modal */}
      {showReminderModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:400,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Send Payment Reminder</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Sending reminder to <strong>{showReminderModal.patient}</strong> for <strong style={{color:C.red}}>£{showReminderModal.balance.toFixed(2)}</strong></div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,marginBottom:14}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>Reminder message preview:</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.6,fontStyle:"italic"}}>"Hi {showReminderModal.patient.split(" ")[0]}, this is a friendly reminder that you have an outstanding balance of £{showReminderModal.balance.toFixed(2)} at Riverside Dentistry. Please call us on 0207 111 2222 or click the link below to pay online. Thank you!"</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginBottom:10}}>
            <div style={{flex:1,padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10}}><div style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>Phone</div>{showReminderModal.phone}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1,padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10}}><div style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>Email</div>{showReminderModal.email}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowReminderModal(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>sendReminder(showReminderModal)} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:8,background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>📱 Send SMS</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{doToast("✉ Email reminder sent to "+showReminderModal.email);setShowReminderModal(null);}} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:8,background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>✉ Email</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Take Payment Modal */}
      {showPayModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Take Payment — {showPayModal.patient}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Outstanding: <strong style={{color:C.red,fontSize:13}}>£{showPayModal.balance.toFixed(2)}</strong></div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:14}}>
            {[{id:"link",l:"💳 Payment Link",sub:"Send Stripe link"},{id:"card",l:"📱 Card Reader",sub:"Terminal payment"},{id:"mark_paid",l:"✓ Mark Paid",sub:"Manual record"}].map(m=>(
              <button key={m.id} onClick={()=>setPayMethod(m.id)} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px 6px",borderRadius:9,border:`2px solid ${payMethod===m.id?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:payMethod===m.id?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:payMethod===m.id?"#0d9488":"#374151"}}>{m.l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{m.sub}</div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          {payMethod==="card"&&<div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Amount (£)</label>
            <input type="number" value={payAmount||showPayModal.balance} onChange={e=>setPayAmount(e.target.value)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>}
          {payMethod==="link"&&<div style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",marginBottom:12}}>Stripe payment link will be sent to {showPayModal.email}</div>}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowPayModal(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>takePayment(showPayModal,payMethod)} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>
              {payMethod==="link"?"Send Payment Link":payMethod==="card"?"Process Payment":"Mark as Paid"}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
          {[{l:"Total Outstanding",v:`£${total.toFixed(2)}`,c:C.teal},{l:"Overdue (>30 days)",v:`£${overdue.toFixed(2)}`,c:C.red},{l:"Collected this month",v:"£2,840.00",c:C.green}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"14px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4,fontWeight:700,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em"}}>{s.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
            <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
              {["Patient","Type","Outstanding","Status","Last Payment","Actions"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{h}</th>)}
            </tr></thead>
            <tbody>{accs.map((a,i)=><tr key={a.id} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:600}}>{a.patient}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><Chip color={a.type==="NHS"?C.nhs:C.purple}>{a.type}</Chip></td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:a.balance>0?a.overdue?C.red:C.amber:C.green}}>£{a.balance.toFixed(2)}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>{a.balance===0?<Chip color={C.green}>Paid</Chip>:a.overdue?<Chip color={C.red}>Overdue</Chip>:<Chip color={C.amber}>Pending</Chip>}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted,fontSize:11}}>{a.lastPaid}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>{a.balance>0&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:5}}>
                <button onClick={()=>setShowReminderModal(a)} style={{padding:"5px 10px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>Send Reminder</button>
                <button onClick={()=>{setShowPayModal(a);setPayAmount("");setPayMethod("link");}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:C.teal,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>Take Payment</button>
              </div>}</td>
            </tr>)}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function LabPage(){
  const LABS=[
    {id:"L1",patient:"Sarah Chen",  pid:"P2",lab:"Prestige Dental Lab",type:"PFM Crown UR6",      sent:"6 May",due:"14 May",status:"arrived", shade:"A2",notes:"Arrived today — checked shade ✓"},

    {id:"L3",patient:"Helen Rowe",  pid:null,lab:"Southern Ceramics",  type:"Composite veneer UL1",sent:"8 May",due:"15 May",status:"in_lab",  shade:"B1",notes:"Confirm shade B1 not A2 on arrival"},
    {id:"L4",patient:"Tom Smith",   pid:null,lab:"Prestige Dental Lab",type:"Chrome denture",      sent:"1 May",due:"20 May",status:"in_lab",  shade:"N/A",notes:""},
    {id:"L5",patient:"Amy Torres",  pid:"P4",lab:"Implant Direct",    type:"Implant crown UL2",    sent:"20 Apr",due:"25 May",status:"in_lab",  shade:"A1",notes:"Allow extra time for try-in"},
  ];
  const STAT={arrived:{c:C.green,l:"Arrived ✓"},in_lab:{c:C.blue,l:"In Lab"},overdue:{c:C.red,l:"Overdue ⚠"},sent:{c:C.amber,l:"Sent"}};
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Lab Manager</div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("New case form coming soon")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>New Lab Case</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
          <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
            {["Patient","Lab","Type","Shade","Sent","Due Date","Status","Notes","Actions"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>)}
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>{LABS.map((l,i)=>{const s=STAT[l.status];return(
            <tr key={l.id} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",background:l.status==="overdue"?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:600}}>{l.patient}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted,fontSize:11}}>{l.lab}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>{l.type}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:600}}>{l.shade}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted,fontSize:11}}>{l.sent}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:600,color:l.status==="overdue"?C.red:C.text}}>{l.due}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><Chip color={s.c}>{s.l}</Chip></td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:C.muted,fontSize:11,maxWidth:160,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{l.notes||"—"}</td>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><div style={{display:"flex",gap:4}}>
                {l.status==="overdue"&&<Btn v="danger" style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 8px"}} onClick={()=>doToast(`Chasing ${l.lab} for ${l.patient}'s case`)}>Chase</Btn>}
                {l.status==="arrived"&&<Btn v="primary" style={{fontSize:10,padding:"3px 8px"}} onClick={()=>doToast("Case marked complete")}>Complete</Btn>}
              </div></td>
            </tr>
          );})}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// SHORT NOTICE LIST — opt-in patients for last-minute slots
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function ShortNoticePage(){

          {p.booked&&<Chip color={C.green}>Booked ✓</Chip>}
          {p.responded&&!p.booked&&<Chip color={C.amber}>Responded</Chip>}

        </div>)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// COMMS HUB — outgoing communications overview
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function CommsPage(){
  const COMMS=[
    {type:"WhatsApp",icon:"💬",sent:43,opened:41,replied:28,pending:2,color:"#25d366"},
    {type:"SMS",icon:"📱",sent:87,opened:null,replied:null,pending:5,color:C.blue},
    {type:"Email",icon:"✉️",sent:124,opened:89,replied:34,pending:8,color:C.purple},
  ];
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Communications Hub</div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:14,marginBottom:16}}>
        {COMMS.map(c=><div key={c.type} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}><span style={{fontSize:22}}>{c.icon}</span><span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:700,color:c.color}}>{c.type}</span></div>
          {[["Sent this month",c.sent],c.opened!=null&&["Opened",`${c.opened} (${Math.round(c.opened/c.sent*100)}%)`],c.replied!=null&&["Replied",c.replied],["Pending",c.pending]].filter(Boolean).map(([l,v])=><div key={l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"5px 0",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:C.muted}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:700}}>{v}</span></div>)}
        </div>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Recent Communications</div>
        {[{type:"WhatsApp",patient:"Sandra Okafor",msg:"Hi Sandra, your appointment tomorrow...",sent:"2h ago",status:"Read"},
          {type:"SMS",patient:"John Mills",msg:"Reminder: your appointment is tomorrow at 09:30",sent:"3h ago",status:"Sent"},
          {type:"Email",patient:"Amy Torres",msg:"Treatment plan summary — Crown UR6",sent:"Yesterday",status:"Opened"},
          {type:"WhatsApp",patient:"Tom Bright",msg:"We missed you today — please call to rebook",sent:"Yesterday",status:"Delivered"}].map((c,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 0",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:16,flexShrink:0}}>{c.type==="WhatsApp"?"💬":c.type==="SMS"?"📱":"✉️"}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{c.patient}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.msg}</div></div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{c.sent}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:c.status==="Read"?C.teal:c.status==="Opened"?C.blue:C.muted}}>{c.status}</div></div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// PAYMENTS — payment configuration and history
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function PaymentsPage(){
  const [providers,setProviders]=useState([
    {icon:"💳",name:"Stripe",status:"Connected",type:"Card",fees:"1.4% + 20p",apiKey:"sk_live_••••••••",webhookUrl:"https://pro.dental/webhooks/stripe"},
    {icon:"💰",name:"Chrysalis Finance",status:"Connected",type:"Finance",fees:"Revenue share",apiKey:"CRY-••••••••",webhookUrl:""},
    {icon:"🏦",name:"GoCardless",status:"Not connected",type:"DD",fees:"1% + 20p",apiKey:"",webhookUrl:""},
    {icon:"💳",name:"Square",status:"Not connected",type:"Card",fees:"1.75%",apiKey:"",webhookUrl:""},
  ]);
  const TXS=[{patient:"Amy Torres",amount:850,method:"Card (Stripe)",date:"10 May 2025",ref:"TXN001",status:"completed"},{patient:"John Mills",amount:73.50,method:"Cash",date:"14 May 2025",ref:"TXN002",status:"pending"},{patient:"Helen Rowe",amount:200,method:"Finance (Chrysalis)",date:"8 May 2025",ref:"TXN003",status:"completed"}];
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [connectModal,setConnectModal]=useState(null);
  const [apiKeyInput,setApiKeyInput]=useState("");
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const connectProvider=(name)=>{
    if(!apiKeyInput.trim()){doToast("⚠ API key required");return;}
    setProviders(p=>p.map(pr=>pr.name!==name?pr:{...pr,status:"Connected",apiKey:apiKeyInput}));
    setConnectModal(null);setApiKeyInput("");doToast("✓ "+name+" connected successfully — test transaction sent");
  };
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Connect Modal */}
      {connectModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:400,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>{connectModal.icon} Connect {connectModal.name}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>{connectModal.type} · {connectModal.fees}</div>
          <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>API Key / Secret Key</label>
            <input value={apiKeyInput} onChange={e=>setApiKeyInput(e.target.value)} placeholder={connectModal.name==="GoCardless"?"access_••••••••":"sk_live_••••••••"}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",marginBottom:14}}>
            ✓ Encrypted in transit · Stored securely · Test transaction sent on connect
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{setConnectModal(null);setApiKeyInput("");}} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>connectProvider(connectModal.name)} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Connect {connectModal.name}</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Payment Configuration</div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:10,marginBottom:16}}>
        {providers.map(p=><div key={p.name} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${p.status==="Connected"?C.teal:C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:14,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}><span style={{fontSize:20}}>{p.icon}</span><div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{p.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{p.type} · {p.fees}</div></div></div>
          <Chip color={p.status==="Connected"?C.green:C.muted}>{p.status}</Chip>
          {p.status==="Connected"&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"2px 6px",borderRadius:4}}>{p.apiKey}</div>}
          {p.status!=="Connected"&&<button onClick={()=>setConnectModal(p)} style={{padding:"6px",border:`1px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:7,background:C.tealL,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:C.teal,fontWeight:700}}>Connect</button>}
        </div>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Recent Transactions</div>
        {TXS.map((t,i)=><div key={t.ref} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid #f8fafc`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{t.patient}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted}}>{t.method} · {t.date} · {t.ref}</div></div>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:t.status==="completed"?C.teal:C.amber,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{t.amount.toFixed(2)}</div>
          <Chip color={t.status==="completed"?C.green:C.amber}>{t.status==="completed"?"Paid":"Pending"}</Chip>
        </div>)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

  const {BarChart,Bar,LineChart,Line,PieChart:PC,Pie,Cell,XAxis,YAxis,CartesianGrid,Tooltip,Legend,ResponsiveContainer}=window.Recharts||{};
  const [activeReport,setActiveReport]=useState(null);
  const [selCat,setSelCat]=useState("All");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};

  const REPORT_DATA={

    "FP17 Claims Summary":{
      type:"pie",

      kpis:[{l:"Submitted",v:"47",c:C.teal},{l:"Accepted",v:"42 (89%)",c:C.green},{l:"Rejected",v:"3",c:C.red},{l:"Pending",v:"4",c:C.amber}],
      pieData:[{name:"Accepted",value:42},{name:"Pending",value:4},{name:"Rejected",value:3}],
      colors:[C.green,C.amber,C.red],
    },
    "Treatment Completion Rate":{
      type:"bar",
      title:"Treatment Plan Acceptance & Completion",
      kpis:[{l:"Plans Presented",v:"38",c:C.teal},{l:"Accepted",v:"29 (76%)",c:C.green},{l:"Completed",v:"22",c:C.blue},{l:"Revenue",v:"£12,400",c:C.purple}],
      data:[{name:"Band 1",presented:18,accepted:16,completed:15},{name:"Band 2",presented:12,accepted:9,completed:7},{name:"Band 3",presented:5,accepted:3,completed:2},{name:"Private",presented:3,accepted:1,completed:1}],
      keys:[{k:"presented",c:"#e2e8f0"},{k:"accepted",c:C.teal},{k:"completed",c:C.green}],
    },
    "Clinical Notes Audit":{
      type:"table",
      title:"Clinical Notes Status — May 2025",
      kpis:[{l:"Total Notes",v:"138",c:C.teal},{l:"Finalised",v:"134 (97%)",c:C.green},{l:"Draft",v:"4",c:C.amber},{l:"Overdue (>24h)",v:"1",c:C.red}],
      tableData:[{patient:"Tom Bright",dentist:"Dr. Patel",date:"Today 09:00",status:"Draft — 4h old"},
        {patient:"Sarah Chen",dentist:"Dr. Patel",date:"Today 09:30",status:"Draft — 2h old"},
        {patient:"John Mills",dentist:"Dr. Patel",date:"14 May",status:"Finalised"},
        {patient:"Amy Torres",dentist:"Dr. Patel",date:"10 May",status:"Locked"}],
    },
  };

  const REPS=[
    {cat:"Revenue",name:"Monthly Revenue Summary",desc:"Revenue by dentist, treatment and NHS/private split",icon:"💰"},
    {cat:"Revenue",name:"Outstanding Balances",desc:"Patient balances, overdue amounts and collection rate",icon:"📊"},
    {cat:"NHS",name:"UDA Performance Report",desc:"Monthly UDA activity vs target per dentist",icon:"🏛"},
    {cat:"NHS",name:"FP17 Claims Summary",desc:"Submitted, accepted and rejected claims with values",icon:"📋"},
    {cat:"Clinical",name:"Treatment Completion Rate",desc:"Treatment plans: presented vs accepted vs completed",icon:"✅"},
    {cat:"Clinical",name:"Clinical Notes Audit",desc:"Draft, finalised and locked notes by dentist",icon:"📝"},
    {cat:"Patients",name:"New Patient Report",desc:"New patients this month with acquisition source breakdown",icon:"👤"},
    {cat:"Patients",name:"Patient Retention",desc:"Recall compliance and patient return rates over 6 months",icon:"🔄"},
    {cat:"Appointments",name:"DNA & Cancellation Analysis",desc:"No-show and cancellation rates by day, dentist and type",icon:"❌"},
    {cat:"Appointments",name:"Chair Utilisation",desc:"Available vs used appointment time per surgery",icon:"🦷"},
  ];
  const cats=[...new Set(REPS.map(r=>r.cat))];
  const filtered=selCat==="All"?REPS:REPS.filter(r=>r.cat===selCat);

  const renderChart=(rd)=>{
    if(!rd)return null;
    // SVG bar — works without Recharts
    if(rd.type==="bar"){const keys=rd.keys||[{k:Object.keys(rd.data?.[0]||{})[1]||"v",c:"#0d9488"}];const pts=(rd.data||[]).length;const maxVal=Math.max(...(rd.data||[]).flatMap(d=>keys.map(k=>d[k.k]||0)),1);const W=540;const H=180;const groupW=(W-40)/Math.max(pts,1);const bW=Math.min(28,groupW/Math.max(keys.length,1)-4);
    return(<div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}><svg viewBox={`0 0 ${W} ${H+44}`} style={{width:"100%",maxHeight:230}}>
      {(rd.data||[]).map((d,di)=>keys.map((key,ki)=>{const x=20+di*groupW+ki*(bW+3)+(groupW-keys.length*(bW+3))/2;const val=d[key.k]||0;const bh=Math.max(2,Math.round(val/maxVal*(H-20)));return(<g key={`${di}${ki}`}><rect x={x} y={H-bh} width={Math.max(bW,4)} height={bh} fill={key.c} rx={3} opacity={0.85}/>{bh>18&&<text x={x+bW/2} y={H-bh-3} textAnchor="middle" fontSize="7.5" fill={key.c} fontWeight="700">{val>=1000?(val/1000).toFixed(1)+"k":val}</text>}</g>);}))}
      {(rd.data||[]).map((d,di)=><text key={di} x={20+di*groupW+groupW/2} y={H+16} textAnchor="middle" fontSize="9" fill="#64748b">{d.name}</text>)}
      {keys.map((key,i)=><g key={key.k}><rect x={20+i*90} y={H+28} width={10} height={8} fill={key.c} rx={2}/><text x={34+i*90} y={H+36} fontSize="9" fill="#64748b">{key.k}</text></g>)}
    </svg></div>);}
    if(rd.type==="bar"&&BarChart)return(
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={240}>
        <BarChart data={rd.data} margin={{top:5,right:20,left:0,bottom:5}}>
          <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f1f5f9"/>
          <XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{fontSize:11}} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}/>
          <YAxis tick={{fontSize:11}} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}/>
          <Tooltip contentStyle={{borderRadius:9,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12}}/>
          <Legend wrapperStyle={{fontSize:11}}/>
          {(rd.keys||[]).map(({k,c})=> <Bar key={k} dataKey={k} fill={c} radius={[4,4,0,0]}/>)}
        </BarChart>
      </ResponsiveContainer>
    );
    if(rd.type==="line"&&LineChart)return(
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={240}>
        <LineChart data={rd.data} margin={{top:5,right:20,left:0,bottom:5}}>
          <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f1f5f9"/>
          <XAxis dataKey="name" tick={{fontSize:11}} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}/>
          <YAxis tick={{fontSize:11}} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}/>
          <Tooltip contentStyle={{borderRadius:9,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:12}}/>
          <Legend wrapperStyle={{fontSize:11}}/>
          {(rd.lineKeys||[]).map(({k,c})=> <Line key={k} type="monotone" dataKey={k} stroke={c} strokeWidth={2} dot={{r:4,fill:c}} activeDot={{r:6}}/>)}
        </LineChart>
      </ResponsiveContainer>
    );
    if(rd.type==="pie"&&PC)return(
      <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
        <PC><Pie data={rd.pieData} cx="50%" cy="50%" innerRadius={60} outerRadius={90} paddingAngle={4} dataKey="value" label={({name,percent})=>`${name} ${(percent*100).toFixed(0)}%`} labelLine={false}>
          {rd.pieData.map((_,i)=> <Cell key={i} fill={rd.colors[i%rd.colors.length]}/>)}
        </Pie><Tooltip contentStyle={{borderRadius:9,fontSize:12}}/></PC>
      </ResponsiveContainer>
    );
    if(rd.type==="table")return(
      <div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
          <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
            {Object.keys(rd.tableData[0]||{}).map(k=><th key={k} style={{padding:"8px 12px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{k}</th>)}
          </tr></thead>
          <tbody>{rd.tableData.map((row,i)=><tr key={i} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>
            {Object.values(row).map((v,j)=><td key={j} style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:j===0?600:400,color:typeof v==="string"&&v.includes("Overdue")?C.red:typeof v==="string"&&v.includes("Draft")?C.amber:C.text}}>{v}</td>)}
          </tr>)}</tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    );
    // Native chart renderer — no Recharts dependency
    if(rd.type==="bar"&&rd.data){
      const keys=rd.keys||rd.lineKeys||[];
      const allVals=rd.data.flatMap(d=>keys.map(k=>d[k.k]||0));
      const maxV=Math.max(...allVals,1);
      const colors=keys.map(k=>k.c);
      return(
        <div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:10,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {keys.map((k,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:10}}><div style={{width:10,height:10,borderRadius:2,background:colors[i]}}/>{k.k}</div>)}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"flex-end",height:180,padding:"0 0 20px"}}>
            {rd.data.map((d,di)=>(
              <div key={di} style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:1,alignItems:"flex-end",width:"100%",justifyContent:"center"}}>
                  {keys.map((k,ki)=>{const h=Math.max(2,Math.round((d[k.k]||0)/maxV*140));return(
                    <div key={ki} title={`${k.k}: ${d[k.k]}`}
                      style={{flex:1,height:h,background:colors[ki],borderRadius:"3px 3px 0 0",cursor:"pointer",transition:"opacity .15s",minWidth:4}}
                      onMouseOver={e=>e.target.style.opacity=".75"} onMouseOut={e=>e.target.style.opacity="1"}/>
                  );})}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:8,color:C.muted,textAlign:"center",marginTop:3,whiteSpace:"nowrap",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",maxWidth:50}}>{d.name}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }
    if(rd.type==="line"&&rd.data){
      const keys=rd.lineKeys||rd.keys||[];
      const allVals=rd.data.flatMap(d=>keys.map(k=>Number(d[k.k])||0));
      const maxV=Math.max(...allVals,1);const minV=Math.min(...allVals,0);const range=maxV-minV||1;
      const W=600;const H=140;const pts=rd.data.length;
      return(
        <div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:8,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {keys.map((k,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:10}}><div style={{width:12,height:3,background:k.c,borderRadius:1}}/>{k.k}</div>)}
          </div>
          <svg viewBox={`0 0 ${W} ${H+30}`} style={{width:"100%",maxWidth:W,height:H+30}} xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            {[0,.25,.5,.75,1].map((t,i)=><line key={i} x1="0" y1={H-t*H} x2={W} y2={H-t*H} stroke="#f1f5f9" strokeWidth="1"/>)}
            {keys.map((k,ki)=>{
              const coords=rd.data.map((d,di)=>[di/(pts-1||1)*W,(1-(Number(d[k.k]||0)-minV)/range)*H]);
              const path="M "+coords.map(([x,y])=>`${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`).join(" L ");
              return(<g key={ki}>
                <path d={path} fill="none" stroke={k.c} strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinejoin="round"/>
                {coords.map(([x,y],di)=><circle key={di} cx={x} cy={y} r="4" fill={k.c} stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="1.5"/>)}
              </g>);
            })}
            {rd.data.map((d,di)=><text key={di} x={di/(pts-1||1)*W} y={H+18} textAnchor="middle" fontSize="9" fill="#94a3b8">{d.name}</text>)}
          </svg>
        </div>
      );
    }
    if(rd.type==="pie"&&rd.pieData){
      const total=rd.pieData.reduce((s,d)=>s+d.value,0);
      let angle=0;
      const slices=rd.pieData.map((d,i)=>{const pct=d.value/total;const a1=angle;const a2=angle+pct*360;angle=a2;return{...d,pct,a1,a2,c:rd.colors[i]||C.teal};});
      const arc=(cx,cy,r,a1,a2)=>{const toRad=a=>a*Math.PI/180;const x1=cx+r*Math.cos(toRad(a1-90));const y1=cy+r*Math.sin(toRad(a1-90));const x2=cx+r*Math.cos(toRad(a2-90));const y2=cy+r*Math.sin(toRad(a2-90));const large=a2-a1>180?1:0;return `M${cx},${cy} L${x1.toFixed(1)},${y1.toFixed(1)} A${r},${r},0,${large},1,${x2.toFixed(1)},${y2.toFixed(1)} Z`;};
      return(
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:24,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          <svg viewBox="0 0 160 160" style={{width:160,height:160,flexShrink:0}}>
            {slices.map((s,i)=><path key={i} d={arc(80,80,70,s.a1,s.a2)} fill={s.c} stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="2">
              <title>{s.name}: {s.value} ({(s.pct*100).toFixed(0)}%)</title>
            </path>)}
          </svg>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:6}}>
            {slices.map((s,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11}}>
              <div style={{width:12,height:12,borderRadius:3,background:s.c,flexShrink:0}}/>
              <span style={{color:C.text}}>{s.name}</span>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace",marginLeft:"auto"}}>{s.value} ({(s.pct*100).toFixed(0)}%)</span>
            </div>)}
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }
    if(rd.type==="table"&&rd.tableData){return(
      <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
        <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`2px solid ${C.border}`}}>
          {Object.keys(rd.tableData[0]||{}).map(k=><th key={k} style={{padding:"8px 12px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{k}</th>)}
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>{rd.tableData.map((row,i)=><tr key={i} style={{borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>
          {Object.values(row).map((v,j)=><td key={j} style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:j===0?600:400,color:typeof v==="string"&&v.includes("Overdue")?C.red:typeof v==="string"&&v.includes("Draft")?C.amber:C.text}}>{v}</td>)}
        </tr>)}</tbody>
      </table>
    );}
    // SVG line chart fallback
    if(rd.type==="line"){
      const allVals=(rd.data||[]).flatMap(d=>(rd.lineKeys||[{k:Object.keys(d)[1]}]).map(k=>d[k.k]||0));
      const maxV=Math.max(...allVals,1);const minV=Math.min(...allVals,0);const range=maxV-minV||1;
      const w=540;const h=160;const pts=(rd.data||[]).length;
      return(<svg viewBox={`0 0 ${w} ${h+30}`} style={{width:"100%",maxHeight:200}}>
        {(rd.lineKeys||[{k:"value",c:C.teal}]).map(key=>{
          const points=(rd.data||[]).map((d,di)=>`${20+di*(w-40)/(pts-1||1)},${h-Math.round(((d[key.k]||0)-minV)/range*(h-20))}`).join(" ");
          return <polyline key={key.k} points={points} fill="none" stroke={key.c} strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinejoin="round"/>;
        })}
        {(rd.data||[]).map((d,di)=><text key={di} x={20+di*(w-40)/(pts-1||1)} y={h+18} textAnchor="middle" fontSize="8" fill="#94a3b8">{d.name}</text>)}
      </svg>);
    }
    // SVG pie chart fallback
    if(rd.type==="pie"&&rd.pieData){
      const total=(rd.pieData||[]).reduce((s,d)=>s+d.value,0)||1;
      let cum=0;const cx=80;const cy=80;const r=70;
      const toRad=a=>a*Math.PI/180;
      const arc=(a1,a2)=>{const x1=cx+r*Math.cos(toRad(a1-90));const y1=cy+r*Math.sin(toRad(a1-90));const x2=cx+r*Math.cos(toRad(a2-90));const y2=cy+r*Math.sin(toRad(a2-90));return `M${cx},${cy} L${x1.toFixed(1)},${y1.toFixed(1)} A${r},${r},0,${a2-a1>180?1:0},1,${x2.toFixed(1)},${y2.toFixed(1)} Z`;};
      return(<div style={{display:"flex",gap:20,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 160 160" style={{width:160,height:160,flexShrink:0}}>
          {(rd.pieData||[]).map((d,i)=>{const a1=cum*360/total;cum+=d.value;const a2=cum*360/total;return <path key={i} d={arc(a1,a2)} fill={(rd.colors||["#0d9488","#1d4ed8","#7c3aed","#d97706"])[i%4]} stroke="#fff" strokeWidth="2"><title>{d.name}: {d.value}</title></path>;})}
        </svg>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:5}}>
          {(rd.pieData||[]).map((d,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11}}>
            <div style={{width:10,height:10,borderRadius:2,background:(rd.colors||["#0d9488","#1d4ed8","#7c3aed","#d97706"])[i%4],flexShrink:0}}/>
            <span>{d.name}</span>
            <span style={{fontWeight:700,marginLeft:"auto",paddingLeft:8}}>{d.value} ({Math.round(d.value/total*100)}%)</span>
          </div>)}
        </div>
      </div>);
    }
    return <div style={{padding:20,textAlign:"center",color:C.muted,fontSize:12}}>No chart available</div>;
  };

  if(activeReport){
    const rd=REPORT_DATA[activeReport.name];
    return(
      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setActiveReport(null)} style={{border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,padding:"5px 12px",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><ArrowLeft size={11}/>Reports</button>
          <span style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,flex:1}}>{activeReport.icon} {activeReport.name}</span>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Report exported to PDF")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Download size={11}/>PDF</button>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("Report exported to CSV")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><Download size={11}/>CSV</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
          {rd?<>
            {/* KPIs */}
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
              {rd.kpis.map(k=><div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{k.l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
              </div>)}
            </div>
            {/* Chart */}
            <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 14px",marginBottom:14}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>{rd.title}</div>
              {renderChart(rd)}
            </div>
          </>:<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:48,color:C.muted}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:12}}>{activeReport.icon}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:4}}>{activeReport.name}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12}}>{activeReport.desc}</div>
          </div>}
        </div>
        {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,marginBottom:14,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,flex:1}}>Reports & Analytics</div>
        {["All",...cats].map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setSelCat(c)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,border:`1.5px solid ${selCat===c?C.teal:C.border}`,background:selCat===c?C.tealL:"#f8fafc",color:selCat===c?C.teal:C.muted,fontSize:11,fontWeight:selCat===c?700:400,cursor:"pointer"}}>{c}</button>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr))",gap:12}}>
        {filtered.map((r,i)=><div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10,transition:"box-shadow .15s",cursor:"pointer"}}
          onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.07)"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow="none"}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:24,flexShrink:0}}>{r.icon}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}><Chip color={C.muted}>{r.cat}</Chip></div>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>{r.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.5}}>{r.desc}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginTop:4}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setActiveReport(r)} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              <BarChart2 size={12}/>Run Report
            </button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting "+r.name)} style={{padding:"8px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}><Download size={11}/></button>
          </div>
        </div>)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// X-RAY / IMAGING placeholder with IRMER compliance
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function XRayPage(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const XRAYS=[{id:"X1",patient:"John Mills",type:"Bitewings (2 films)",date:"14 May 2025",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",reason:"Caries detection — UR6 concern",report:"Caries evident UR6 mesial surface. No other pathology."},
    {id:"X2",patient:"Sarah Chen",type:"PA UR6",date:"13 May 2025",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",reason:"Pre-crown periapical check",report:"Periapical area clear. Bone levels satisfactory."},
    {id:"X3",patient:"David Park",type:"OPG",date:"8 May 2025",dentist:"Dr. M. Chen",reason:"Implant planning — UL2",report:"Bone height satisfactory UL2 region. Sinus floor noted at 14mm. CBCT recommended before placement."}];
  return(
    <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:14,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>X-Ray & Imaging</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>IRMER compliant · Full justification and reporting log</div></div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("New X-ray log entry created")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>Log X-Ray</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {XRAYS.map((x,i)=><div key={x.id} style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:8,background:"#0f172a",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>🫁</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:4}}><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{x.patient}</span><Chip color={C.muted}>{x.type}</Chip><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{x.date} · {x.dentist}</span></div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}><strong>Justification:</strong> {x.reason}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}><strong>Report:</strong> {x.report}</div></div>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening viewer…")} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,flexShrink:0}}>View</button>
          </div>
        </div>)}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// WHATSAPP BUSINESS INBOX — two-way patient messaging
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function WhatsAppPage(){
  const [selConv,setSelConv]=useState(0);const [msg,setMsg]=useState("");const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const CONVS=[
    {name:"Sandra Okafor",phone:"07923 456789",last:"YES please book me in!",time:"2m ago",unread:1,msgs:[{dir:"out",text:"Hi Sandra, we have a 14:30 slot today — interested?",at:"13:15"},{dir:"in",text:"YES please book me in!",at:"13:17"}]},
    {name:"John Mills",phone:"07700 900111",last:"Thank you, see you then 😊",time:"1h ago",unread:0,msgs:[{dir:"out",text:"Hi John, confirming your 09:30 appointment tomorrow with Dr. Patel. Reply YES to confirm.",at:"09:00"},{dir:"in",text:"YES confirmed",at:"09:05"},{dir:"out",text:"Great, see you tomorrow! 🦷",at:"09:06"},{dir:"in",text:"Thank you, see you then 😊",at:"09:10"}]},
    {name:"Lisa White",phone:"07700 900666",last:"I'll call back tomorrow",time:"2h ago",unread:0,msgs:[{dir:"out",text:"Hi Lisa, it's been 8 months since your last visit — time for a check-up! Reply to book.",at:"11:00"},{dir:"in",text:"I'll call back tomorrow",at:"11:30"}]},
  ];
  const conv=CONVS[selConv];
  const send=()=>{if(!msg.trim())return;doToast("Message sent via WhatsApp");setMsg("");};
  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{width:280,flexShrink:0,background:"#fff",borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#25d366",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}><MessageSquare size={14}/>WhatsApp</div>
          <Chip color={C.amber}>1 unread</Chip>
        </div>
        {CONVS.map((c,i)=><div key={i} onClick={()=>setSelConv(i)} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selConv===i?"rgba(37,211,102,0.05)":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selConv===i?"#25d366":"transparent"}`}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:2}}><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{c.name}</span><span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{c.time}</span></div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{c.last}</div>
          {c.unread>0&&<div style={{width:16,height:16,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#25d366",color:"#fff",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",marginTop:4}}>{c.unread}</div>}
        </div>)}
      </div>
      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",background:"#efeae2",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#25d366",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>{conv.name[0]}</div>
          <div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{conv.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{conv.phone}</div></div>
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:16,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
          {conv.msgs.map((m,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:m.dir==="out"?"flex-end":"flex-start"}}>
            <div style={{maxWidth:"70%",padding:"8px 12px",borderRadius:m.dir==="out"?"14px 14px 0 14px":"14px 14px 14px 0",background:m.dir==="out"?"#dcf8c6":"#fff",boxShadow:"0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",fontSize:12,lineHeight:1.5}}>
              {m.text}
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"right",marginTop:3}}>{m.at}{m.dir==="out"&&" ✓✓"}</div>
            </div>
          </div>)}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,flexShrink:0}}>
          <input value={msg} onChange={e=>setMsg(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&send()} placeholder="Type a message…" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:20,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 14px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"},flex:1}}/>
          <button onClick={send} style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#25d366",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Send size={14} color="#fff"/></button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// USER MANAGEMENT — create accounts, control permissions, seat limits
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const UM_STAFF=[
  {id:"U1",name:"Dr. Sarah Patel",  email:"spatel@riverside.co.uk",  role:"dentist",  color:"#0d9488",avatar:"SP",active:true, lastLogin:"Today 08:14"},
  {id:"U2",name:"Emma Wilson",      email:"ewilson@riverside.co.uk", role:"reception",color:"#0369a1",avatar:"EW",active:true, lastLogin:"Today 08:02"},
  {id:"U3",name:"Dr. Mike Chen",    email:"mchen@riverside.co.uk",   role:"dentist",  color:"#7c3aed",avatar:"MC",active:true, lastLogin:"Today 09:30"},
  {id:"U4",name:"Amy Grant",        email:"agrant@riverside.co.uk",  role:"hygienist",color:"#16a34a",avatar:"AG",active:true, lastLogin:"Yesterday 17:05"},
  {id:"U5",name:"Tom Baker",        email:"tbaker@riverside.co.uk",  role:"reception",color:"#4f46e5",avatar:"TB",active:true, lastLogin:"Today 07:58"},
  {id:"U6",name:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",email:"kim@riverside.co.uk",     role:"manager",  color:"#db2777",avatar:"KM",active:true, lastLogin:"Today 08:30"},

];
const ALL_PAGE_PERMS=[
  {g:"Front Desk",items:["dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients"]},
  {g:"Clinical",items:["charting","notes","xray"]},
  {g:"NHS",items:["fp17","uda"]},

const ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS={
  reception:new Set(["dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","teamchat","whatsapp","receptionai","recovery","shortnotice","tasks","helpsupport","myreports","fp17","lab"]),
  dentist:  new Set(["dashboard","nba","calendar","patients","charting","notes","xray","fp17","uda","teamchat","lab","tasks","helpsupport","myreports"]),
