  manager:  new Set(["dashboard","nba","calendar","waiting","patients","charting","notes","xray","fp17","uda","teamchat","whatsapp","receptionai","comms","recovery","shortnotice","lab","accounts","payments","reports","tasks","rota","usermgmt","manager","subscription","helpsupport","templates","audit","integrations","settings","myreports"]),
};
const PERM_LABEL_MAP={dashboard:"Dashboard",nba:"Today's Priorities",calendar:"Calendar",waiting:"Waiting Room",patients:"Patient Records",charting:"Clinical Charting",notes:"Clinical Notes",xray:"X-Ray Imaging",fp17:"FP17 Claims",uda:"UDA Tracker",teamchat:"Team Chat",whatsapp:"WhatsApp Inbox",receptionai:"Reception AI",comms:"Comms Hub",recovery:"Revenue Recovery",shortnotice:"Short Notice List",lab:"Lab Manager",accounts:"Patient Accounts",payments:"Payments",reports:"Practice Reports",tasks:"Daily Tasks",myreports:"My Reports",templates:"Templates",helpsupport:"Help & Support",rota:"Staff Rota",usermgmt:"User Management",manager:"Manager Portal",subscription:"Features & Plans",audit:"Audit Log",integrations:"Integrations",settings:"Settings"};
const SEAT_MAP={Starter:5,Growth:15,Enterprise:999};

function UserManagementPage({plan="Growth"}){
  const seatLimit=SEAT_MAP[plan]||5;
  const [staff,setStaff]=useState(UM_STAFF.map(u=>({...u,perms:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS[u.role]||[])})));
  const [selId,setSelId]=useState("U1");
  const [createMode,setCreateMode]=useState(false);
  const [form,setForm]=useState({name:"",email:"",role:"reception"});
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2000);};
  const sel=staff.find(u=>u.id===selId);
  const activeCount=staff.filter(u=>u.active).length;
  const atLimit=activeCount>=seatLimit;

  const togglePerm=(uid,perm)=>{
    setStaff(p=>p.map(u=>u.id===uid?{...u,perms:new Set(u.perms.has(perm)?[...u.perms].filter(x=>x!==perm):[...u.perms,perm])}:u));
    doToast("Permission updated");
  };
  const changeRole=(uid,role)=>{setStaff(p=>p.map(u=>u.id===uid?{...u,role,perms:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS[role]||[])}:u));doToast("Role changed — permissions reset to role defaults");};
  const toggleActive=(uid)=>{
    const u=staff.find(x=>x.id===uid);
    if(!u.active&&atLimit){doToast("Seat limit reached ("+seatLimit+"/"+seatLimit+"). Upgrade plan for more accounts.");return;}
    setStaff(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===uid?{...x,active:!x.active}:x));
    doToast(u.active?"User deactivated":"User reactivated");
  };
  const createUser=()=>{
    if(!form.name.trim()||!form.email.trim())return;
    if(atLimit){doToast("Seat limit reached. Deactivate a user or upgrade your plan.");return;}
    const nu={id:"U"+Date.now(),name:form.name,email:form.email,role:form.role,color:["#0d9488","#0369a1","#7c3aed","#16a34a"][Math.floor(Math.random()*4)],avatar:form.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2).toUpperCase(),active:true,lastLogin:"Never",perms:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS[form.role]||[])};
    setStaff(p=>[...p,nu]);setCreateMode(false);setSelId(nu.id);setForm({name:"",email:"",role:"reception"});
    doToast("✓ Invite sent to "+form.email);
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.1)",display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{flex:1}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>User Management</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span>{activeCount}/{seatLimit===999?"Unlimited":seatLimit} seats used</span>
            <span>·</span><span>{plan} Plan</span>
            {activeCount/seatLimit>.8&&seatLimit!==999&&<span style={{color:C.red,fontWeight:700}}>⚠ Approaching seat limit</span>}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{width:140}}>
          <div style={{height:6,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{height:"100%",width:seatLimit===999?"0":`${Math.min(activeCount/seatLimit*100,100)}%`,background:activeCount/seatLimit>.8?C.red:C.teal,borderRadius:3}}/>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>setCreateMode(true)} disabled={atLimit} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:atLimit?"#f1f5f9":C.teal,color:atLimit?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:atLimit?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Plus size={12}/>{atLimit?"Seat Limit Reached":"Add Staff Member"}</button>
      </div>

      {/* Create modal */}
      {createMode&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:700,backdropFilter:"blur(4px)"}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:480,maxWidth:"95vw",boxShadow:"0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35)",padding:24}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Add Staff Member</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:14}}>An invite will be sent to their email with {form.role} defaults.</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            <input value={form.name} onChange={e=>setForm(p=>({...p,name:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Full name *" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"9px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/>
            <input type="email" value={form.email} onChange={e=>setForm(p=>({...p,email:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Email address *" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:13,padding:"9px 11px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(2,1fr)",gap:7}}>
              {[{r:"reception",l:"🗂 Reception",d:"Calendar, patients, messaging"},{r:"dentist",l:"🦷 Dentist",d:"Charting, FP17, clinical notes"},{r:"hygienist",l:"🧹 Hygienist",d:"Charting, notes, recalls"},{r:"manager",l:"🛡 Manager",d:"Full access to all features"}].map(({r,l,d})=>(
                <label key={r} onClick={()=>setForm(p=>({...p,role:r}))} style={{padding:"9px 11px",borderRadius:9,border:`2px solid ${form.role===r?ROLE_META[r].color:C.border}`,background:form.role===r?ROLE_META[r].bg+"80":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:form.role===r?ROLE_META[r].color:C.text}}>{l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:C.muted,marginTop:2}}>{d}</div>
                </label>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:16}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setCreateMode(false)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={createUser} disabled={!form.name.trim()||!form.email.trim()} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:form.name&&form.email?C.teal:"#e2e8f0",color:form.name&&form.email?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:form.name&&form.email?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Send size={12}/>Send Invite</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {/* Staff list */}
        <div style={{width:260,flexShrink:0,borderRight:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#fff",overflow:"auto"}}>
          {staff.map(u=>{const rm=ROLE_META[u.role];return(
            <div key={u.id} onClick={()=>setSelId(u.id)} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`,cursor:"pointer",background:selId===u.id?"rgba(79,70,229,0.06)":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${selId===u.id?"#4f46e5":"transparent"}`,opacity:u.active?1:.6}}
              onMouseOver={e=>{if(selId!==u.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fafffe";}} onMouseOut={e=>{if(selId!==u.id)e.currentTarget.style.background="#fff";}}>
              <div style={{position:"relative",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>{u.avatar}</div>
                <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:-1,right:-1,width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:u.active&&u.lastLogin.includes("Today")?"#22c55e":u.active?"#f59e0b":"#94a3b8",border:"2px solid #fff"}}/>
              </div>
              <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{u.name}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,marginTop:2,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:rm?.bg,color:rm?.color}}>{rm?.label}</span>
                  {!u.active&&<span style={{fontSize:8,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Inactive</span>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );})}
        </div>

        {/* Permission editor */}
        {sel&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
          <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:14,display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:48,height:48,borderRadius:"50%",background:sel.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:16,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{sel.avatar}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>{sel.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{sel.email}</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <select value={sel.role} onChange={e=>changeRole(sel.id,e.target.value)} style={{fontSize:11,padding:"4px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${ROLE_META[sel.role]?.color||C.border}`,borderRadius:7,background:ROLE_META[sel.role]?.bg||"#f8fafc",color:ROLE_META[sel.role]?.color||C.text,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"inherit",fontWeight:700}}>
                  {["reception","dentist","hygienist","manager"].map(r=><option key={r} value={r}>{r.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+r.slice(1)}</option>)}
                </select>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Last login: {sel.lastLogin}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Password reset email sent to "+sel.email)} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Reset Password</button>
              <button onClick={()=>toggleActive(sel.id)} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${sel.active?"#fecaca":"#bbf7d0"}`,borderRadius:8,background:sel.active?"#fef2f2":"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:sel.active?C.red:C.green}}>{sel.active?"Deactivate":"Reactivate"}</button>
              <button onClick={()=>{setStaff(p=>p.map(u=>u.id===sel.id?{...u,perms:new Set(ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS[u.role]||[])}:u));doToast("Permissions reset to "+sel.role+" defaults");}} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}><RotateCcw size={11}/>Reset Defaults</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Feature Access <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:400,color:C.muted}}>— toggle individual page access for this user</span></div>
            <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:"0 24px"}}>
              {ALL_PAGE_PERMS.map(grp=>(
                <div key={grp.g} style={{marginBottom:12}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",marginBottom:6,paddingBottom:4,borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>{grp.g}</div>
                  {grp.items.map(perm=>{
                    const on=sel.perms.has(perm);
                    const isDefault=ROLE_DEFAULT_PERMS[sel.role]?.has(perm)===on;
                    return(
                      <label key={perm} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"center",padding:"3px 0",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                        <button onClick={()=>togglePerm(sel.id,perm)} style={{position:"relative",width:30,height:17,borderRadius:9,border:"none",cursor:"pointer",background:on?"#4f46e5":"#cbd5e1",transition:"background .12s",flexShrink:0}}>
                          <span style={{position:"absolute",top:2,left:on?"calc(100% - 14px)":2,width:13,height:13,borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",transition:"left .12s"}}/>
                        </button>
                        <span style={{fontSize:11,color:on?C.text:"#94a3b8",flex:1}}>{PERM_LABEL_MAP[perm]||perm}</span>
                        {!isDefault&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"0 5px",borderRadius:4,background:on?"#ede9fe":"#fef2f2",color:on?C.purple:C.red}}>{on?"ADDED":"REMOVED"}</span>}
                      </label>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function FinancePage({openPatient}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("applications");
  const [sendModal,setSendModal]=useState(null);
  const [providers,setProviders]=useState(FINANCE_PROVIDERS);
  const [apps,setApps]=useState(FINANCE_APPS);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [sendForm,setSendForm]=useState({patient:"",email:"",amount:"",provider:"chrysalis",treatment:""});

  const sendApplication=()=>{
    if(!sendForm.patient||!sendForm.email||!sendForm.amount)return;
    const newApp={id:"FA"+Date.now(),patient:sendForm.patient,pid:null,provider:providers.find(p=>p.id===sendForm.provider)?.name||"",amount:+sendForm.amount,term:24,monthly:Math.round(+sendForm.amount/24),status:"pending",date:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"}),treatment:sendForm.treatment,decision:"Application sent — awaiting patient completion"};
    setApps(p=>[newApp,...p]);setSendModal(null);setSendForm({patient:"",email:"",amount:"",provider:"chrysalis",treatment:""});
    doToast("✓ Finance application link sent to "+sendForm.email);
  };

  return(
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:C.green,zIndex:500,display:"flex",gap:6}}><Check size={12}/>{toast}</div>}

      {/* Send finance modal */}
      {sendModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:700,backdropFilter:"blur(4px)"}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:500,maxWidth:"95vw",boxShadow:"0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.35)",padding:24}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Send Finance Application</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:16}}>The patient will receive an email with a secure link to complete their finance application online. Once approved or declined, it automatically attaches to their patient record.</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10}}>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Patient Name *</div><input value={sendForm.patient} onChange={e=>setSendForm(p=>({...p,patient:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. Amy Torres" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"7px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/></div>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Patient Email *</div><input type="email" value={sendForm.email} onChange={e=>setSendForm(p=>({...p,email:e.target.value}))} placeholder="patient@email.com" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"7px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/></div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10}}>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Treatment Amount (£) *</div><input type="number" value={sendForm.amount} onChange={e=>setSendForm(p=>({...p,amount:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. 2400" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"7px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"monospace",width:"100%"}}}/></div>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Finance Provider</div>
                <select value={sendForm.provider} onChange={e=>setSendForm(p=>({...p,provider:e.target.value}))} style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"7px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}>
                  {providers.filter(p=>p.connected).map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.name}</option>)}
                </select></div>
            </div>
            <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>Treatment Description</div><input value={sendForm.treatment} onChange={e=>setSendForm(p=>({...p,treatment:e.target.value}))} placeholder="e.g. Dental Implant UL2" style={{...{background:"#f8fafc",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,fontSize:12,padding:"7px 10px",outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",width:"100%"}}}/></div>
            {sendForm.amount&&sendForm.provider&&<div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:C.green,lineHeight:1.7}}>
              ✓ Estimated monthly repayment: <strong>£{Math.round(+sendForm.amount/24)}/mo</strong> over 24 months (0% APR via {providers.find(p=>p.id===sendForm.provider)?.name}). Patient will see all options when they complete the application.
            </div>}
            <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:9,fontSize:11,color:C.blue}}>
              ℹ Once the patient completes and submits their application, the decision and agreement will automatically attach to their patient profile. You will be notified of the outcome.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:16}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setSendModal(null)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={sendApplication} disabled={!sendForm.patient||!sendForm.email||!sendForm.amount} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:sendForm.patient&&sendForm.email&&sendForm.amount?C.teal:"#e2e8f0",color:sendForm.patient&&sendForm.email&&sendForm.amount?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:sendForm.patient&&sendForm.email&&sendForm.amount?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Send size={12}/>Send Finance Application</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}

      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,padding:"14px 20px 0",flexShrink:0}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{width:38,height:38,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#16a34a,#0d9488)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:20,flexShrink:0}}>💳</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Patient Finance</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Integrated with Chrysalis Finance & Medenta — send applications, track decisions, auto-attach to patient records</div></div>
          <button onClick={()=>setSendModal(true)} style={{padding:"8px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Send size={12}/>Send Finance Application</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>
          {[{id:"applications",l:"Applications"},{id:"providers",l:"Finance Providers"},{id:"howit",l:"How It Works"}].map(t=><button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?C.teal:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>{t.l}</button>)}
        </div>
      </div>

      {tab==="applications"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3,1fr)",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
          {[{l:"Applications Sent",v:apps.length,c:C.teal},{l:"Approved",v:apps.filter(a=>a.status==="approved").length,c:C.green},{l:"Finance Arranged",v:`£${apps.filter(a=>a.status==="approved").reduce((s,a)=>s+a.amount,0).toLocaleString()}`,c:C.purple}].map(s=><div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"12px 14px"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:3}}>{s.l}</div><div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div></div>)}
        </div>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {apps.map((a,i)=>{const s=FA_STATUS[a.status];return(
            <div key={a.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:14,padding:"14px 16px",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{a.patient}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:6,background:s.bg,color:s.c}}>{s.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{a.provider}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted,marginBottom:3}}>{a.treatment} · Sent {a.date}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:a.status==="approved"?C.green:a.status==="declined"?C.red:C.amber}}>{a.decision}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{a.amount.toLocaleString()}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>£{Math.round(a.monthly)}/mo × {a.term}mo</div>
              </div>
              {a.pid&&<button onClick={()=>openPatient(a.pid)} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:C.muted,flexShrink:0}}>Open Record</button>}
            </div>
          );})}
        </div>
      </div>}

      {tab==="providers"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr))",gap:14}}>
          {providers.map(p=>(
            <div key={p.id} style={{background:"#fff",border:`2px solid ${p.connected?p.color+"40":C.border}`,borderRadius:14,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{background:p.color,padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:28}}>{p.logo}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{p.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)"}}>{p.apr}</div>
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"3px 9px",borderRadius:8,background:p.connected?"rgba(255,255,255,.25)":"rgba(0,0,0,.2)",color:"#fff"}}>{p.connected?"Connected ✓":"Not Connected"}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:16}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.7,marginBottom:12}}>{p.desc}</div>
                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:6,marginBottom:12,fontSize:11}}>
                  <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:7}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Min:</span> <strong>£{p.minLoan.toLocaleString()}</strong></div>
                  <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:7}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Max:</span> <strong>£{p.maxLoan.toLocaleString()}</strong></div>
                  <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:7}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>Terms:</span> <strong>Up to {p.maxMonths}mo</strong></div>
                  <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:7}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>APR:</span> <strong>{p.apr.split(" ")[0]}</strong></div>
                </div>
                {p.benefits.map((b,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,fontSize:11,color:"#374151",padding:"2px 0"}}><Check size={11} color={p.color} style={{flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}/>{b}</div>)}
                <button onClick={()=>p.connected?doToast("Disconnecting "+p.name):setProviders(prev=>prev.map(x=>x.id===p.id?{...x,connected:true,apiConnected:true}:x))} style={{width:"100%",marginTop:14,padding:"8px",border:`1px solid ${p.connected?"#fecaca":p.color}`,borderRadius:9,background:p.connected?"#fef2f2":`${p.color}15`,color:p.connected?C.red:p.color,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>
                  {p.connected?"Disconnect":"Connect & Integrate"}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>}

      {tab==="howit"&&<div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:640}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>How Patient Finance Works</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:20,lineHeight:1.7}}>Integrated with Chrysalis Finance and Medenta — the UK's leading dental finance providers. Patients apply online, get instant decisions, and their agreements automatically attach to their record.</div>
          {[{n:1,title:"Treatment plan agreed",desc:"Patient accepts treatment plan — dentist or treatment coordinator identifies finance opportunity"},
            {n:2,title:"Send finance application link",desc:"Click 'Send Finance Application', enter patient email and treatment amount. A branded, secure application link is emailed to the patient instantly"},
            {n:3,title:"Patient completes online",desc:"Patient opens the link on their phone or computer. The FCA-regulated provider (Chrysalis/Medenta) handles the full application — typically 2 minutes"},
            {n:4,title:"Instant decision",desc:"Patient receives an instant decision. Approved patients see their monthly repayment schedule and can digitally sign the agreement"},
            {n:5,title:"Auto-attached to patient record",desc:"The decision (approved/declined) and any agreement details automatically attach to the patient's profile in ProDentalConnect — no manual entry needed"},
            {n:6,title:"Practice receives funds",desc:"The finance provider pays the practice directly. Patient pays the provider in monthly instalments"}
          ].map((step,i)=>(
            <div key={step.n} style={{display:"flex",gap:14,marginBottom:14,padding:"14px 16px",background:"#fff",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderLeft:`4px solid ${C.teal}`,borderRadius:10}}>
              <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",fontSize:12,flexShrink:0}}>{step.n}</div>
              <div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>{step.title}</div><div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.65}}>{step.desc}</div></div>
            </div>
          ))}
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#eff6ff",border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:10,fontSize:11,color:C.blue,lineHeight:1.7}}>
            ℹ All finance providers integrated here are FCA regulated. The practice acts as a credit broker, not a lender. Patient data is transmitted securely via encrypted API connections. No patient payment data is stored in ProDentalConnect.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </div>
  );
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN PRACTICE DETAIL MODAL — full practice info, subscription, tickets
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function PracticeDetailModal({practice,onClose}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("overview");
  const p=practice;
  if(!p)return null;

  const contactPerson={name:p.plan==="Enterprise"?"Sarah Okafor":p.plan==="Growth"?"Dr. James Patel":"Tom Richards",role:p.plan==="Enterprise"?"Principal Dentist / Owner":p.plan==="Growth"?"Practice Manager":"Reception Manager",email:`manager@${p.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,"")}dental.co.uk`,phone:`0800 ${Math.floor(Math.random()*900+100)} ${Math.floor(Math.random()*9000+1000)}`,address:`${Math.floor(Math.random()*200+1)} High Street, ${p.location.split(" ")[0]}`};

  const subHistory=[
    {date:"Jan 2024",plan:p.plan,action:"Account created",amount:`£${p.mrr||0}/mo`},
    {date:"Mar 2024",plan:p.plan,action:"WhatsApp Business added",amount:"+£39/mo"},
    {date:"Jun 2024",plan:p.plan,action:"Reception AI enabled",amount:"+£79/mo"},
    {date:"Jan 2025",plan:p.plan,action:"Annual renewal",amount:`£${p.mrr||0}/mo`},
  ];

  const tickets=TICKETS_INIT.filter(t=>t.practice===p.name).slice(0,3);

  return(
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800,backdropFilter:"blur(4px)"}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:680,maxWidth:"95vw",maxHeight:"90vh",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",boxShadow:"0 32px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4)"}}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#1a1035)",padding:"16px 20px",borderRadius:"16px 16px 0 0",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:12,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.15)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:22,flexShrink:0}}>🏥</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>{p.name}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.55)"}}>{p.location} · {p.plan} Plan · {p.status}</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} style={{border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",color:"#fff",padding:"6px 8px",display:"flex"}}><X size={16}/></button>
        </div>
        {/* Tabs */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0,background:"#f8fafc"}}>
          {["overview","contact","subscription","tickets"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setTab(t)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t?C.teal:"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t?700:400,color:tab===t?C.teal:C.muted,textTransform:"capitalize",whiteSpace:"nowrap",marginBottom:-1}}>{t}</button>)}
        </div>
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
          {tab==="overview"&&<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
            {[{l:"Plan",v:p.plan},{l:"MRR",v:`£${p.mrr||0}/mo`},{l:"Status",v:p.status},{l:"Location",v:p.location},{l:"Users",v:p.users},{l:"Patients",v:p.patients?.toLocaleString()},{l:"UDA Target",v:p.uda?.toLocaleString()},{l:"Joined",v:p.joined||"Jan 2024"}].map(([l,v])=><div key={l} style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,padding:"10px 12px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2}}>{l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{v}</div>
            </div>)}
            <div style={{gridColumn:"1/-1"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:C.muted,marginBottom:7}}>Active Add-ons</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>{(p.addons||[]).map(a=> <Chip key={a} color={C.purple}>{a}</Chip>)}{(!p.addons||p.addons.length===0)&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No add-ons</span>}</div>
            </div>
          </div>}
          {tab==="contact"&&<div>
            <div style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:12,padding:16,marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>Primary Contact</div>
              {[["Name",contactPerson.name],["Role",contactPerson.role],["Email",contactPerson.email],["Phone",contactPerson.phone],["Address",contactPerson.address]].map(([l,v])=><div key={l} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"8px 0",borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9",fontSize:12}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8",minWidth:80}}>{l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:600}}>{v}</span></div>)}
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Practice details saved")} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Mail size={12}/>Send Email</button>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Cancelled")} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Phone size={12}/>Call</button>
            </div>
          </div>}
          {tab==="subscription"&&<div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>Subscription History</div>
            {subHistory.map((s,i)=><div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 0",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none",fontSize:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8",minWidth:60}}>{s.date}</span>
              <span style={{flex:1}}>{s.action}</span>
              <span style={{fontWeight:700,color:C.teal,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.amount}</span>
            </div>)}
          </div>}
          {tab==="tickets"&&<div>
            {tickets.length===0&&<div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:32,color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12}}>No support tickets for this practice</div>}
            {tickets.map((t,i)=>{const s=STATUS_META_TICKET[t.status];const p2=TICKET_PRIORITIES.find(x=>x.id===t.priority);return(
              <div key={t.id} style={{padding:"12px 0",borderTop:i>0?`1px solid ${C.border}`:"none"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:4,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{t.id}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:s?.bg,color:s?.c}}>{s?.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:p2?.c+"18",color:p2?.c}}>{p2?.l}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{t.title}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>{t.created}</div>
              </div>
            );})}
          </div>}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function GenericPage({page}){
  const T={notes:"Clinical Notes — draft/finalise/lock workflow",xray:"X-Ray Imaging — DICOM viewer, FDI tooth chart, IRMER logging",uda:"UDA Tracker — monthly targets vs actuals by dentist",recall:"AI Recall — personalised patient outreach generation",comms:"Automated Comms Hub — reminders, confirmations, recalls",lab:"Lab Manager — kanban board, overdue cases, turnaround stats",accounts:"Accounts — patient balances, invoices, payment history",payments:"Payment Configuration — 10 providers: Stripe, Square, Chrysalis Finance…",reports:"Reports Library — 65 reports across 9 categories",tasks:"Daily Tasks — role-personalised, auto-generated, carried over",rota:"Staff Rota — weekly grid, rota gaps, calendar integration",templates:"Template Library — clinical notes, emails, consent forms, treatment plans",audit:"Audit Log — immutable INSERT-ONLY record of all edits",settings:"Practice Settings — 24 sections: calendar, NHS, permissions, branding, notifications",shortnotice:"Short Notice — opt-in patient list, slot publishing, bulk SMS",whatsapp:"WhatsApp Business Inbox — two-way messaging, pre-approved templates"};
  return <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexDirection:"column",gap:14,padding:32,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center"}}>
    <div style={{width:64,height:64,borderRadius:16,background:C.tealL,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}><Settings size={28} color={C.teal}/></div>
    <div><div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:700,color:C.text,marginBottom:6}}>{T[page]?.split(" — ")[0]||page}</div><div style={{fontSize:13,color:C.muted,maxWidth:420,lineHeight:1.7}}>{T[page]?.split(" — ")[1]||"Full interactive module available as dedicated component"}</div></div>
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}><Btn v="primary" style={{fontSize:12}} onClick={()=>doToast("Opening dedicated view...")}><Eye size={12}/>View Dedicated Component</Btn><Btn style={{fontSize:12}} onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting data...")}><Download size={12}/>Export Data</Btn></div>
  </div>;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP ROOT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ── SMART WAITING WIDGET — bottom-right floating popup ───────────────────────
// Doctors: see their own patients by name. Other surgeries = count only (GDPR).
// Reception: first name + last initial for waiting; initials-only for upcoming.
function WaitingWidget({waiting,setWaiting,user,openPatient}){
  const [open,setOpen]=useState(false);
  const [tick,setTick]=useState(0);
  useEffect(()=>{const t=setInterval(()=>setTick(n=>n+1),15000);return()=>clearInterval(t);},[]);

  const wm=w=>w.in?Math.floor((Date.now()-w.in)/M):0;
  const wc=m=>m>=20?C.red:m>=10?C.amber:C.green;
  const wb=m=>m>=20?"#fff1f1":m>=10?"#fffcf0":"#f0fdf4";

  const isDentist=user?.role==="dentist";
  const isReception=user?.role==="reception"||user?.role==="manager"||user?.role==="hygienist";
  const myShort=user?.name?.replace("Dr. Sarah","Dr. S.").replace("Dr. Mike","Dr. M.")||"";

  const allWaiting=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="waiting").sort((a,b)=>(a.in||0)-(b.in||0));
  const upcoming=waiting.filter(w=>w.status==="booked");
  const myQueue=isDentist?allWaiting.filter(w=>w.dentist===myShort||w.dentist===user?.name):[];
  const othersWaiting=isDentist?allWaiting.filter(w=>w.dentist!==myShort&&w.dentist!==user?.name):allWaiting;
  const otherDentists=["Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"].filter(d=>d!==myShort&&d!==user?.name);

  const doCallIn=w=>{setWaiting(p=>p.filter(x=>x.id!==w.id));if(w.pid)openPatient(w.pid);setOpen(false);};
  const doCheckIn=id=>setWaiting(p=>p.map(x=>x.id===id?{...x,in:Date.now(),status:"waiting"}:x));
  const initials=name=>name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2).toUpperCase();

  const totalWaiting=allWaiting.length;
  const anyOverdue=allWaiting.some(w=>wm(w)>=20);
  const myNext=myQueue[0];
  const badgeBg=anyOverdue?C.red:totalWaiting>0?C.amber:"#22c55e";

  return(
    <>
      {/* Floating button */}
      <button onClick={()=>setOpen(o=>!o)} style={{position:"fixed",bottom:22,right:22,zIndex:700,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,padding:"10px 16px",borderRadius:28,border:"none",background:open?"#0c1a28":"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",cursor:"pointer",boxShadow:"0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)",transition:"all .2s"}}>
        <div style={{position:"relative"}}>
          <Users2 size={16} color="#fff"/>
          {totalWaiting>0&&<span style={{position:"absolute",top:-6,right:-6,width:15,height:15,borderRadius:"50%",background:badgeBg,color:"#fff",fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488"}}>{totalWaiting}</span>}
        </div>
        <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {open?"Close":totalWaiting>0?`${totalWaiting} Waiting`:"Waiting Room"}
        </span>
        {myNext&&!open&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.75)",borderLeft:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25)",paddingLeft:8,maxWidth:100,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>Next: {myNext.name.split(" ")[0]}</span>}
      </button>

      {/* Popup panel */}
      {open&&<div style={{position:"fixed",bottom:74,right:22,zIndex:699,width:300,maxHeight:"70vh",background:C.card,borderRadius:14,boxShadow:"0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.22)",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{padding:"11px 14px 8px",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:C.card,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7}}>
            <Clock size={13} color={anyOverdue?C.red:totalWaiting>0?C.amber:C.green}/>
            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>Waiting Room</span>
            {totalWaiting>0&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:10,background:anyOverdue?C.red:C.amber,color:"#fff"}}>{totalWaiting} waiting</span>}
            <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",display:"flex",gap:3,alignItems:"center"}}><Shield size={9}/>GDPR</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
          {/* ── DENTIST VIEW ── */}
          {isDentist&&<>
            <div style={{padding:"7px 14px 5px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:C.teal,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:`1px solid #d1fae5`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5}}>
              <span style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,display:"inline-block"}}/>
              Waiting For You ({myQueue.length})
            </div>
            {myQueue.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"16px",textAlign:"center",background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:`1px solid #d1fae5`}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:18,marginBottom:3}}>✓</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.green}}>No one waiting</div>
            </div>}
            {myQueue.map((w,idx)=>{
              const m=wm(w);const c=wc(m);const isNext=idx===0;
              const pt=PATIENTS?.find(p=>p.id===w.pid);
              return(
                <div key={w.id} style={{borderBottom:`1px solid #e6faf3`,background:isNext?wb(m):"#fff",borderLeft:`4px solid ${isNext?c:"#d1fae5"}`}}>
                  {isNext&&<div style={{padding:"3px 10px",background:c,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",textTransform:"uppercase"}}>{m>=20?"⚠ Overdue":m>=10?"Waiting":"Ready"}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{m}m</span>
                  </div>}
                  <div style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:isNext?14:12,fontWeight:isNext?800:600,marginBottom:2}}>{w.name}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,marginBottom:4}}>{w.appt}{!isNext&&` · ${m}m`}</div>
                    {/* Emotional profile flags for dentist */}
                    {pt?.ep?.flags?.length>0&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:3,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:6}}>
                      {pt.ep.flags.slice(0,3).map(f=><span key={f} style={{fontSize:8,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)",color:"#374151"}}>{f}</span>)}
                    </div>}
                    {isNext
                      ?<button onClick={()=>doCallIn(w)} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px",background:c,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:5}}>
                        <UserCheck size={12}/>Call In → Open Record
                      </button>
                      :<div style={{height:4,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:2,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                        <div style={{height:"100%",width:`${Math.min(m/30*100,100)}%`,background:c,borderRadius:2}}/>
                      </div>}
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
            {/* Other surgeries */}
            {othersWaiting.length>0&&<>
              <div style={{padding:"7px 14px 4px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderTop:`4px solid #f1f5f9`}}>Other Surgeries</div>
              {otherDentists.map(dentist=>{
                const dPts=othersWaiting.filter(w=>w.dentist===dentist);
                if(!dPts.length)return null;
                const maxM=Math.max(...dPts.map(w=>wm(w)));
                return(
                  <div key={dentist} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,padding:"8px 12px",borderBottom:`1px solid #f8fafc`}}>
                    <div style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:wc(maxM),flexShrink:0}}/>
                    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{dentist}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted}}>{dPts.length} patient{dPts.length!==1?"s":""} · {maxM}m max</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </>}
          </>}

          {/* ── RECEPTION VIEW ── */}
          {isReception&&<>
            {allWaiting.length>0&&<>
              <div style={{padding:"7px 14px 4px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:C.muted,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>In Waiting Room</div>
              {allWaiting.map(w=>{
                const m=wm(w);const c=wc(m);
                const parts=w.name.split(" ");
                const display=parts[0]+" "+parts[parts.length-1][0]+".";
                return(
                  <div key={w.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"9px 12px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",borderLeft:`3px solid ${c}`,alignItems:"center"}}>
                    <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{display}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:9,color:C.muted,overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{w.dentist}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                      <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:c,fontFamily:"monospace",lineHeight:1}}>{m}</div>
                      <div style={{fontSize:8,color:c}}>min</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </>}
            {upcoming.length>0&&<>
              <div style={{padding:"7px 14px 4px",fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".09em",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <Shield size={8} color="#94a3b8"/>Upcoming · initials only
              </div>
              {upcoming.map(w=>(
                <div key={w.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"7px 12px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#e2e8f0",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:800,color:"#64748b",flexShrink:0}}>{initials(w.name)}</div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:C.muted}}>{w.appt}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",overflow:"hidden",textOverflow:"ellipsis",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{w.dentist}</div>
                  </div>
                  <button onClick={()=>doCheckIn(w.id)} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 9px",background:C.tealL,color:C.teal,border:`1px solid ${C.tealB}`,borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>Check In</button>
                </div>
              ))}
            </>}
          </>}

          {/* Empty */}
          {allWaiting.length===0&&upcoming.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"32px 14px",textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8"}}>
            <Clock size={24} strokeWidth={1} style={{margin:"0 auto 8px",display:"block",opacity:.3}}/>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:500}}>Waiting room is clear</div>
          </div>}
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setWaiting(p=>p.map((w,i)=>i===2&&w.status==="booked"?{...x=>x,in:Date.now(),status:"waiting"}:w))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:5}}>
            <UserCheck size={12}/>Check In Patient
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>}
    </>
  );
}

function BusinessCopilot({open,onClose,subscribed,onSubscribe}){
  const [msgs,setMsgs]=useState([]);
  const [input,setInput]=useState("");
  const [loading,setLoading]=useState(false);
  const [subConfirm,setSubConfirm]=useState(false);
  const inputRef=useRef(null);
  const bottomRef=useRef(null);

  useEffect(()=>{if(open&&inputRef.current)setTimeout(()=>inputRef.current?.focus(),100);},[open]);
  useEffect(()=>{bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},[msgs,loading]);

  // Initial greeting on first open
  useEffect(()=>{
    if(open&&msgs.length===0){
      setMsgs([{role:"assistant",content:subscribed
        ?"Good morning! I'm your Business Copilot. I have full access to your practice data — revenue, team performance, appointments, patient trends and more. What would you like to explore today?"
        :"I'm Business Copilot — your AI business advisor for Riverside Dentistry. Subscribe to unlock full access to your practice intelligence. You can see below exactly what I can do for you.",
      }]);
    }
  },[open]);

  const sendMessage=async(text)=>{
    const q=text||input.trim();if(!q)return;
    setInput("");
    const newMsgs=[...msgs,{role:"user",content:q}];
    setMsgs(newMsgs);setLoading(true);

    if(!subscribed){
      // Not subscribed — generate a teaser then lock
      setTimeout(()=>{
        setMsgs(p=>[...p,{role:"assistant",content:"__locked__",question:q}]);
        setLoading(false);
      },800);
      return;
    }

    // Subscribed — real API call
    try{
      const systemPrompt=`You are Business Copilot, an AI business advisor embedded in ProDentalConnect dental practice management software. You have access to real practice data for Riverside Dentistry. Answer the owner or manager's questions about their business performance, revenue, team, patients, and operations. Be direct, specific, and data-driven. Use the practice data provided. Give actionable recommendations. Use bullet points for clarity. Format numbers with £ signs. Be concise — 6-10 bullet points max. Never say you are an AI or mention Claude. Refer to yourself as "Business Copilot".

PRACTICE DATA:
${PRACTICE_CONTEXT}`;
      const res=await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({model:"claude-sonnet-4-20250514",max_tokens:600,system:systemPrompt,messages:newMsgs.map(m=>({role:m.role,content:m.content}))})});
      const data=await res.json();
      const reply=data.content?.[0]?.text||"I couldn't retrieve that analysis. Please try again.";
      setMsgs(p=>[...p,{role:"assistant",content:reply}]);
    }catch(e){
      setMsgs(p=>[...p,{role:"assistant",content:"Connection error — please check your internet and try again."}]);
    }
    setLoading(false);
  };

  const formatMsg=(text)=>{
    return text.split("\n").filter(l=>l.trim()).map((line,i)=>{
      const isBullet=line.match(/^[•\-*]/)||line.match(/^\d+\./);
      const clean=line.replace(/^[•\-*]\s*/,"").replace(/^\d+\.\s*/,"");
      const isBold=clean.match(/^\*\*(.*)\*\*$/);
      if(isBold)return <div key={i} style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:C.text,marginTop:8,marginBottom:2}}>{isBold[1]}</div>;
      if(isBullet)return(
        <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"4px 0"}}>
          <span style={{color:C.teal,flexShrink:0,fontWeight:700,marginTop:1}}>•</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.6,flex:1}}>{clean}</span>
        </div>
      );
      return <div key={i} style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.6,padding:"2px 0"}}>{clean}</div>;
    });
  };

  if(!open)return null;

  return(
    <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,zIndex:700,display:"flex",justifyContent:"flex-end",pointerEvents:"none"}}>
      {/* Backdrop */}
      <div onClick={onClose} style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,0.25)",pointerEvents:"all",backdropFilter:"blur(2px)"}}/>

      {/* Panel */}
      <div style={{position:"relative",width:440,maxWidth:"95vw",height:"100%",background:C.card,boxShadow:"-8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",pointerEvents:"all"}}>

        {/* Header */}
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#1a1035 100%)",padding:"16px 18px",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,marginBottom:subscribed?4:8}}>
            <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:10,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,flexShrink:0}}>✨</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
                Business Copilot
                {subscribed?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(94,234,212,0.2)",color:"#5eead4"}}>ACTIVE</span>
                  :<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:8,background:"rgba(249,115,22,0.3)",color:"#fb923c"}}>SUBSCRIBE TO UNLOCK</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}>Riverside Dentistry · {new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{weekday:"short",day:"numeric",month:"short"})}</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={onClose} style={{border:"none",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",padding:"5px 7px",display:"flex"}}><X size={15}/></button>
          </div>
          {!subscribed&&<div style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"rgba(249,115,22,.15)",border:"1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.3)",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,color:"#fb923c",lineHeight:1.6}}>
            ⚡ Subscribe to get AI-powered analysis of your revenue, team, patients and operations — all from your own practice data.
          </div>}
        </div>

        {/* Subscribe confirmation */}
        {subConfirm&&<div style={{padding:"14px 18px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"none",borderBottom:`1px solid #fde68a`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:6}}>Activate Business Copilot · £49/mo</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",lineHeight:1.6,marginBottom:10}}>Added to your Riverside Dentistry monthly bill. Cancel anytime from Manager Portal → Features & Billing.</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{onSubscribe();setSubConfirm(false);setMsgs([{role:"assistant",content:"Business Copilot is now active! I have full access to your practice data. What would you like to know?"}]);}} style={{padding:"7px 18px",background:C.teal,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>Confirm · £49/mo</button>
            <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(false)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:C.muted}}>Cancel</button>
          </div>
        </div>}

        {/* Messages */}
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:"14px 18px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>

          {/* Not subscribed — preview cards */}
          {!subscribed&&msgs.length<=1&&<div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".1em",marginBottom:10}}>What Business Copilot can answer</div>
            {COPILOT_PREVIEW.map((p,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{marginBottom:12,borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>
                {/* Question */}
                <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:15}}>👤</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,color:C.text}}>{p.q}</span>
                </div>
                {/* Answer — blurred */}
                <div style={{position:"relative",padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fff"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.65,filter:"blur(4px)",userSelect:"none",pointerEvents:"none"}}>
                    {p.a.split("\n").map((line,j)=><div key={j}>{line}</div>)}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.6)"}}>
                    <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"7px 18px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:20,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,boxShadow:"0 4px 14px rgba(13,148,136,0.35)",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
                      <Sparkles size={11}/>Subscribe to unlock this insight
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>}

          {/* Chat messages */}
          {msgs.map((m,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"flex-start",justifyContent:m.role==="user"?"flex-end":"flex-start"}}>
              {m.role==="assistant"&&<div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}>✨</div>}
              <div style={{maxWidth:"85%"}}>
                {m.role==="user"
                  ?<div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28,#1a1035)",color:"#fff",borderRadius:"12px 12px 0 12px",padding:"9px 13px",fontSize:12,lineHeight:1.5}}>{m.content}</div>
                  :m.content==="__locked__"
                    ?<div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:"12px 12px 12px 0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                      <div style={{padding:"9px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Here's what Business Copilot would tell you about: <em>"{m.question}"</em></div>
                      <div style={{position:"relative",padding:"10px 12px"}}>
                        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,lineHeight:1.7,filter:"blur(5px)",userSelect:"none"}}>Revenue analysis shows three key factors affecting your performance this week. Dr Patel's schedule contributed significantly to the variance. Cancellation patterns indicate a 17% uptick in hygiene slot losses. Implant conversion dropped from 60% to 25% week-on-week. There are clear actionable steps to address each of these areas immediately.</div>
                        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:8,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"}}>
                          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:C.muted}}>Subscribe to see the full analysis</span>
                          <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"6px 16px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:20,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Sparkles size={11}/>Unlock · £49/mo</button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    :<div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:"12px 12px 12px 0",padding:"11px 13px"}}>
                      {formatMsg(m.content)}
                    </div>}
              </div>
              {m.role==="user"&&<div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.blue,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0,marginTop:2}}>KM</div>}
            </div>
          ))}

          {loading&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:9,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:8,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>✨</div>
            <div style={{background:C.card,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:"12px 12px 12px 0",padding:"12px 14px",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
              {[0,1,2].map(i=><div key={i} style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:C.teal,animation:`bounce${i} 1s infinite`,opacity:.7}}/>)}
              <style>{`@keyframes bounce0{0%,80%,100%{transform:scale(0)}40%{transform:scale(1)}}@keyframes bounce1{0%,80%,100%{transform:scale(0)}40%{transform:scale(1)}animation-delay:.15s}@keyframes bounce2{0%,80%,100%{transform:scale(0)}40%{transform:scale(1)}animation-delay:.3s}`}</style>
            </div>
          </div>}
          <div ref={bottomRef}/>
        </div>

        {/* Suggested questions */}
        {msgs.length<=2&&<div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".08em",marginBottom:7}}>Suggested questions</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,overflowX:"auto",paddingBottom:4}}>
            {COPILOT_SUGGESTED.slice(0,5).map(q=><button key={q} onClick={()=>sendMessage(q)} style={{padding:"5px 11px",borderRadius:16,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:500,color:C.muted,whiteSpace:"nowrap",flexShrink:0}}>{q}</button>)}
          </div>
        </div>}

        {/* Input */}
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid ${C.border}`,display:"flex",gap:8,flexShrink:0,background:"#fafcff"}}>
          <input ref={inputRef} value={input} onChange={e=>setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&!e.shiftKey&&sendMessage()} placeholder={subscribed?"Ask anything about your practice…":"Ask a question to see what you'd get…"} style={{...inp,borderRadius:20,flex:1,fontSize:12,padding:"8px 14px"}}/>
          <button onClick={()=>sendMessage()} disabled={!input.trim()||loading} style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:"50%",background:input.trim()&&!loading?"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)":"#e2e8f0",border:"none",cursor:input.trim()&&!loading?"pointer":"not-allowed",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0,transition:"background .2s"}}>
            <Send size={14} color={input.trim()&&!loading?"#fff":"#94a3b8"}/>
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Subscribe footer — not subscribed */}
        {!subscribed&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#0c1a28,#1a1035)",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#fff"}}>Unlock full Business Copilot</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.45)"}}>Full practice AI · revenue intelligence · team analytics</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={()=>setSubConfirm(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#4f46e5)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,whiteSpace:"nowrap",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><Sparkles size={11}/>£49/mo</button>
        </div>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function LoginPage({onLogin}){
  const [pin,setPin]=useState("");const [selectedUser,setSelectedUser]=useState(null);const [err,setErr]=useState("");
  const doLogin=()=>{if(!selectedUser){setErr("Select a user");return;}if(selectedUser.pin&&pin!==String(selectedUser.pin)){setErr("Wrong PIN");return;}onLogin(selectedUser);};
  return(
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:"#0c1a28",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:20,padding:40,width:360,boxShadow:"0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4)"}}>
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:24}}><div style={{fontSize:36,marginBottom:8}}>🦷</div><div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:"#0c1a28"}}>ProDentalConnect</div></div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:16}}>
          {USERS.map(u=><button key={u.id} onClick={()=>{setSelectedUser(u);setPin("");setErr("");}} style={{padding:"10px 8px",borderRadius:10,border:`2px solid ${selectedUser?.id===u.id?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:selectedUser?.id===u.id?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:selectedUser?.id===u.id?"#0d9488":"#374151"}}>{u.name.split(" ")[0]}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{u.role}</div>
          </button>)}
        </div>
        {selectedUser&&<><input type="password" value={pin} onChange={e=>setPin(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&doLogin()} placeholder="PIN (leave blank for admin/emma)" style={{width:"100%",padding:"10px 14px",border:"1.5px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,fontSize:16,outline:"none",textAlign:"center",letterSpacing:8,boxSizing:"border-box",marginBottom:8}}/></>}
        {err&&<div style={{color:"#dc2626",fontSize:12,marginBottom:8,textAlign:"center"}}>{err}</div>}
        <button onClick={doLogin} disabled={!selectedUser} style={{width:"100%",padding:"12px",background:selectedUser?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0",color:selectedUser?"#fff":"#94a3b8",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:selectedUser?"pointer":"not-allowed",fontSize:14,fontWeight:700}}>Sign In →</button>
        {selectedUser?.role==="superadmin"&&<div style={{marginTop:8,fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center"}}>Use PIN: 0000 for admin access</div>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
