    txCodes:["250","251","252","253","255","256"],
    color:"#7c3aed",bg:"#f5f3ff",border:"#ddd6fe",
    clinicalDataRequired:["tooth_number","working_length","canal_count"],
  },
  {
    id:"CP5",code:"CP5",name:"Care Package 5 — Surgical",
    desc:"Simple and surgical extractions, wisdom teeth, retained roots",
    nhsValue:67.00,patientCharge:47.00,udas:3,
    treatments:["Extraction","Surgical Extraction","Wisdom Tooth Extraction","Retained Root"],
    txCodes:["300","301","302","303","304","305","306","307","308"],
    color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fff5f5",border:"#fecaca",
    clinicalDataRequired:["tooth_number","extraction_reason"],
  },
  {
    id:"CP6",code:"CP6",name:"Care Package 6 — Prosthetic",
    desc:"Crowns, bridges, dentures (partial and full), immediate dentures",
    nhsValue:203.00,patientCharge:203.00,udas:12,
    treatments:["Crown","Bridge","Partial Denture","Full Denture","Immediate Denture"],
    txCodes:["350","351","352","353","354","355","356","357","380","381","382","383","384","400","401","402","403","404","405","406","407"],
    color:"#b45309",bg:"#fffbeb",border:"#fde68a",
    clinicalDataRequired:["tooth_number","material","shade"],
  },
  {
    id:"CP7",code:"CP7",name:"Care Package 7 — Orthodontic",
    desc:"Orthodontic assessments, appliances, retainers",
    nhsValue:203.00,patientCharge:203.00,udas:12,
    treatments:["Orthodontic Assessment","Fixed Braces","Removable Appliance","Retainer"],
    txCodes:["500","501","502","503","505","506","507","508"],
    color:"#0891b2",bg:"#ecfeff",border:"#a5f3fc",
    clinicalDataRequired:["occlusion_class","overjet","overbite"],
  },
  {
    id:"CPE",code:"CPE",name:"Emergency — Urgent Care",
    desc:"Emergency examination and immediate pain relief treatment",
    nhsValue:14.70,patientCharge:0,udas:1.2,
    treatments:["Emergency Appointment","Pain Relief","Trauma Assessment"],
    txCodes:["600","601","602","603","604","605"],
    color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",border:"#fecaca",
    clinicalDataRequired:["presenting_complaint","pain_score"],
  },
];

// NHS Wales / England ethnicity — grouped by ONS category (Image 2 reference)
const WALES_ETHNICITY_GROUPS=[
  {group:"Unknown",codes:[
    {code:"X",label:"Ethnicity Not Stated"},
    {code:"99",label:"Patient Ethnicity Unknown"},
  ]},
  {group:"White",codes:[
    {code:"A",label:"English or Welsh or Scottish or Northern Irish or British"},
    {code:"B",label:"Irish"},
    {code:"C0",label:"Gypsy or Irish Traveller"},
    {code:"C",label:"Any other White background"},
  ]},
  {group:"Mixed or Multiple ethnic groups",codes:[
    {code:"D",label:"White and Black Caribbean"},
    {code:"E",label:"White and Black African"},
    {code:"F",label:"White and Asian"},
    {code:"G",label:"Any other Mixed or Multiple ethnic background"},
  ]},
  {group:"Asian or Asian British",codes:[
    {code:"H",label:"Indian"},
    {code:"J",label:"Pakistani"},
    {code:"K",label:"Bangladeshi"},
    {code:"L0",label:"Chinese"},
    {code:"L",label:"Any other Asian background"},
  ]},
  {group:"Black, African, Caribbean or Black British",codes:[
    {code:"M",label:"African"},
    {code:"N",label:"Caribbean"},
    {code:"P",label:"Any other Black, African or Caribbean background"},
  ]},
  {group:"Other ethnic group",codes:[
    {code:"R",label:"Arab"},
    {code:"S",label:"Any other ethnic group"},
  ]},
];
const WALES_ETHNICITY=WALES_ETHNICITY_GROUPS.flatMap(g=>g.codes.map(c=>({...c,group:g.group})));

// NHS number — no-number reason codes (Image 1 reference)
const NHS_NO_NUMBER_REASONS=[
  {code:"non_reg_uk",label:"Non-registered UK resident"},
  {code:"non_uk",label:"Non UK resident"},
  {code:"no_consent",label:"Data sharing consent not given"},
  {code:"not_found",label:"NHS number not found"},
];

const WALES_CONTRACTS=[
  {id:"WC001",name:"NHS Wales Standard Contract",performer:"Dr. S. Patel",udaTarget:4560,region:"Wales"},
  {id:"WC002",name:"NHS Wales Enhanced Services",performer:"Dr. M. Chen",udaTarget:3200,region:"Wales"},
  {id:"WC003",name:"NHS Wales Orthodontic",performer:"Dr. S. Patel",udaTarget:1200,region:"Wales"},
];


// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS WALES CARE PACKAGE CLAIM SUPPORT
// Applies only to NHS Wales — does not replace FP17/claims workflow
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSWalesClaimPage(){
  const [walesClaims,setWalesClaims]=useState([
    {id:"WC001",patient:"James Wright",nhs:"114 773 6690",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",
     contract:"WC001",date:"06 May 2026",txStart:"22 Apr 2026",txEnd:"06 May 2026",
     status:"draft",ethnicity:"A",nhsStatus:"provided",exemption:"none",
     packages:["CP2","CPE"],
     items:[
       {code:"210",label:"Composite Filling — Posterior",pkg:"CP2",nhsFee:67.00,patientFee:47.00,frStatus:"free_replacement"},
       {code:"600",label:"Emergency Appointment",pkg:"CPE",nhsFee:14.70,patientFee:0,frStatus:"none"},
     ],
     notes:"Tooth 36 — composite MOD. Emergency visit 22 Apr.",
     auditLog:[{user:"Dr. S. Patel",at:"06 May 2026 10:15",action:"Draft created"}],
    },
    {id:"WC002",patient:"Lisa Park",nhs:"556 889 2233",dentist:"Amy Grant",
     contract:"WC001",date:"08 May 2026",txStart:"08 May 2026",txEnd:"08 May 2026",
     status:"draft",ethnicity:null,nhsStatus:"not_checked",exemption:"none",
     packages:["CP1"],
     items:[
       {code:"100",label:"Routine Examination",pkg:"CP1",nhsFee:47.00,patientFee:14.70,frStatus:"none"},
     ],
     notes:"Routine recall.",
     auditLog:[{user:"Amy Grant",at:"08 May 2026 09:00",action:"Draft created"}],
    },
    {id:"WC003",patient:"Carol Davis",nhs:"998 441 5521",dentist:"Dr. S. Patel",
     contract:"WC001",date:"15 May 2026",txStart:"15 May 2026",txEnd:null,
     status:"draft",ethnicity:"H",nhsStatus:"provided",exemption:"income",
     packages:["CP4","CP2"],
     items:[
       {code:"253",label:"Root Canal — Molar",pkg:"CP4",nhsFee:110.00,patientFee:0,frStatus:"none"},
       {code:"212",label:"Composite — Posterior 1 Surface",pkg:"CP2",nhsFee:67.00,patientFee:0,frStatus:"none"},
     ],
     notes:"RCT LL6 + composite restoration. Exempt — income support.",
     auditLog:[{user:"Dr. S. Patel",at:"15 May 2026 11:30",action:"Draft created"}],
    },
  ]);
  const [selClaim,setSelClaim]=useState(null);
  const [filterStatus,setFilterStatus]=useState("All");
  const [filterPkg,setFilterPkg]=useState("All");
  const [showNewClaim,setShowNewClaim]=useState(false);
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const [expandedPkgs,setExpandedPkgs]=useState(new Set());
  const [validated,setValidated]=useState(new Set());

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const togglePkg=id=>setExpandedPkgs(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.has(id)?n.delete(id):n.add(id);return n;});

  // ── Care Package auto-mapper ────────────────────────────────────
  const mapPackages=(items)=>{
    const pkgSet=new Set();
    items.forEach(item=>{
      WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.forEach(pkg=>{
        if(pkg.txCodes.includes(item.code))pkgSet.add(pkg.id);
      });
    });
    return [...pkgSet];
  };

  // ── Validation ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const validateClaim=(cl)=>{
    const errs=[];
    if(!cl.packages||cl.packages.length===0)errs.push({sev:"error",msg:"No Care Package exists. At least one Care Package is required for NHS Wales claims."});
    if(!cl.ethnicity||cl.ethnicity==="not_checked"||cl.nhsStatus==="not_checked")errs.push({sev:"error",msg:"Patient ethnicity must be completed before submission."});
    if(!cl.txStart)errs.push({sev:"error",msg:"Treatment start date is required."});
    if(!cl.txEnd)errs.push({sev:"warning",msg:"Treatment end date not set — claim may remain open."});
    if(!cl.contract)errs.push({sev:"error",msg:"No NHS Wales contract selected."});
    const contract=WALES_CONTRACTS.find(c=>c.id===cl.contract);
    if(contract&&contract.region!=="Wales")errs.push({sev:"error",msg:"Selected contract is not valid for NHS Wales submissions."});
    cl.packages?.forEach(pkgId=>{
      const pkg=WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.find(p=>p.id===pkgId);
      const pkgItems=cl.items?.filter(i=>i.pkg===pkgId)||[];
      if(pkg&&pkgItems.length===0)errs.push({sev:"error",msg:`Care Package ${pkg.code} (${pkg.name.split("—")[0].trim()}) has no treatment items assigned.`});
    });
    return errs;
  };

  const submitClaim=(clId)=>{
    const cl=walesClaims.find(c=>c.id===clId);
    if(!cl)return;
    const errs=validateClaim(cl).filter(e=>e.sev==="error");
    if(errs.length>0){doToast("❌ "+errs[0].msg);return;}
    setWalesClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==clId?c:{...c,status:"submitted",
      auditLog:[{user:"Current User",at:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),action:"Claim submitted — packages: "+cl.packages.join(", ")},{...c.auditLog[0]}]}));
    doToast("✓ NHS Wales claim submitted successfully — "+cl.packages.length+" Care Package"+(cl.packages.length!==1?"s":""));
    setSelClaim(null);
    setTimeout(()=>{if(window.confirm("Treatment plan complete? Mark as closed?"))doToast("✓ Treatment plan closed");},400);
  };

  const updateClaim=(id,field,val)=>{
    setWalesClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==id?c:{...c,[field]:val,
      auditLog:[{user:"Current User",at:new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB"),action:`${field} updated`},...(c.auditLog||[])]}));
  };

  const visibleClaims=walesClaims.filter(c=>
    (filterStatus==="All"||c.status===filterStatus)&&
    (filterPkg==="All"||c.packages?.includes(filterPkg))
  );

  const STAT={draft:{c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",l:"Draft"},submitted:{c:"#2563eb",bg:"#dbeafe",l:"Submitted"},accepted:{c:"#16a34a",bg:"#dcfce7",l:"Accepted"},rejected:{c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",l:"Rejected"}};
  const PKG_STATUS=(cl)=>{
    if(!cl.packages||cl.packages.length===0)return{l:"No Care Package",c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"};
    const hasEmptyPkg=cl.packages.some(pkgId=>(cl.items?.filter(i=>i.pkg===pkgId)||[]).length===0);
    if(hasEmptyPkg)return{l:"Missing Mapping",c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7"};
    if(!cl.ethnicity||cl.nhsStatus==="not_checked")return{l:"Validation Error",c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"};
    return{l:"Care Package Complete",c:"#16a34a",bg:"#dcfce7"};
  };
  const [activeTab,setActiveTab]=useState("claims"); // claims | reporting

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Page header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:20}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿</span>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Wales Care Package Claims</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Care Package submission · Wales-specific validation · Ethnicity & NHS number compliance</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting Wales claims report…")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export</button>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowNewClaim(true)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"#22c55e",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>+ New Wales Claim</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* KPI row */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Total Claims",v:walesClaims.length,c:"#374151"},
        {l:"Draft",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>c.status==="draft").length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"Submitted",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>c.status==="submitted").length,c:"#2563eb"},
        {l:"Missing Ethnicity",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>!c.ethnicity||c.nhsStatus==="not_checked").length,c:"#dc2626"},
        {l:"NHS Value",v:"£"+walesClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0).toFixed(2),c:"#0d9488"},
        {l:"Patient Charges",v:"£"+walesClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.frStatus!=="none"?0:i.patientFee),0).toFixed(2),c:"#374151"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"11px 16px",minWidth:120,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Filters */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"8px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <select value={filterStatus} onChange={e=>setFilterStatus(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
        {["All","draft","submitted","accepted","rejected"].map(s=><option key={s} value={s}>{s==="All"?"All Statuses":s.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+s.slice(1)}</option>)}
      </select>
      <select value={filterPkg} onChange={e=>setFilterPkg(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
        <option value="All">All Care Packages</option>
        {WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.code} — {p.name.split("—")[1]?.trim()||p.name}</option>)}
      </select>
      <div style={{flex:1}}/>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{visibleClaims.length} claim{visibleClaims.length!==1?"s":""}</span>
    </div>

    {/* Page tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",gap:0,flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"claims",l:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Claims"},{id:"reporting",l:"📊 Wales Reporting"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setActiveTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${activeTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:activeTab===t.id?700:400,color:activeTab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {t.l}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Claims list + review panel */}
    {activeTab==="claims"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",minHeight:0}}>

      {/* Claims list */}
      <div style={{width:selClaim?380:undefined,flex:selClaim?undefined:1,overflowY:"auto",borderRight:selClaim?"1px solid #e2e8f0":"none"}}>
        {visibleClaims.length===0&&<div style={{padding:40,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:13}}>No Wales claims match the current filters</div>}
        {visibleClaims.map(cl=>{
          const errs=validateClaim(cl);
          const hasError=errs.some(e=>e.sev==="error");
          const hasWarn=errs.some(e=>e.sev==="warning");
          const sc=STAT[cl.status]||STAT.draft;
          const isSel=selClaim===cl.id;
          return(
          <div key={cl.id} onClick={()=>setSelClaim(isSel?null:cl.id)} style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",cursor:"pointer",background:isSel?"#f0fffe":"#fff",borderLeft:isSel?"3px solid #0d9488":"3px solid transparent"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:6}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:3}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{cl.patient}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:sc.bg,color:sc.c}}>{sc.l}</span>
                  {hasError&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>⚠ {errs.filter(e=>e.sev==="error").length} Error{errs.filter(e=>e.sev==="error").length!==1?"s":""}</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.dentist} · {cl.date} · {cl.contract}</div>
              </div>
              {cl.status==="draft"&&<button onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();submitClaim(cl.id);}}
                style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:hasError?"#f1f5f9":"#0d9488",color:hasError?"#94a3b8":"#fff",cursor:hasError?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>
                Submit
              </button>}
            </div>
            {/* Package status + chips */}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap",alignItems:"center"}}>
              {(()=>{const ps=PKG_STATUS(cl);return <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:ps.bg,color:ps.c,border:`1px solid ${ps.c}30`}}>{ps.l}</span>;})()}
              {(cl.packages||[]).map(pkgId=>{
                const pkg=WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.find(p=>p.id===pkgId);
                if(!pkg)return null;
                const pkgItems=cl.items?.filter(i=>i.pkg===pkgId)||[];
                const isComplete=pkgItems.length>0;
                return(
                  <span key={pkgId} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:isComplete?pkg.bg:"#f8fafc",color:isComplete?pkg.color:"#94a3b8",border:`1px solid ${isComplete?pkg.border:"#e2e8f0"}`}}>
                    {pkg.code}{isComplete?"":"⚠"}
                  </span>
                );
              })}
              {(!cl.ethnicity)&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff5f5",color:"#dc2626",border:"1px solid #fecaca"}}>⚠ Ethnicity missing</span>}
              {cl.exemption&&cl.exemption!=="none"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f0fdf4",color:"#16a34a",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0"}}>Exempt</span>}
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Claim review panel */}
      {selClaim&&(()=>{
        const cl=walesClaims.find(c=>c.id===selClaim);
        if(!cl)return null;
        const errs=validateClaim(cl);
        const contract=WALES_CONTRACTS.find(c=>c.id===cl.contract);
        const totalNHS=cl.items?.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0)||0;
        const totalPt=cl.items?.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.frStatus!=="none"?0:i.patientFee),0)||0;
        return(
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,background:"#fafafa"}}>
          {/* Claim header */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#0f172a"}}>{cl.patient}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.id} · NHS {cl.nhs||"Not provided"} · {cl.date}</div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>setSelClaim(null)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>✕ Close</button>
          </div>

          {/* Validation errors */}
          {errs.length>0&&<div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
            {errs.map((e,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 12px",borderRadius:8,background:e.sev==="error"?"#fee2e2":"#fef3c7",border:`1px solid ${e.sev==="error"?"#fecaca":"#fde68a"}`,marginBottom:6,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>{e.sev==="error"?"⛔":"⚠️"}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:e.sev==="error"?"#dc2626":"#92400e",fontWeight:600}}>{e.msg}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>}

          {/* Wales mandatory fields */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Wales Mandatory Fields</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
              {/* Ethnicity */}
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>Patient Ethnicity *</div>
                <select value={cl.ethnicity||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"ethnicity",e.target.value||null)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${!cl.ethnicity?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:!cl.ethnicity?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                  <option value="">— Select ethnicity —</option>
                  {WALES_ETHNICITY_GROUPS.map(g=>(
                    <optgroup key={g.group} label={g.group}>
                      {g.codes.map(e=><option key={e.code} value={e.code}>{e.label}</option>)}
                    </optgroup>
                  ))}
                </select>
                {cl.ethnicity&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>
                  Code: <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700}}>{cl.ethnicity}</span> · {WALES_ETHNICITY.find(e=>e.code===cl.ethnicity)?.group}
                </div>}
              </div>
              {/* NHS number status */}
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>NHS Number Status *</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5}}>
                  <input type="text" value={cl.nhs||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"nhs",e.target.value)} placeholder="NHS Number"
                    style={{flex:1,padding:"5px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${!cl.nhs&&cl.nhsStatus!=="not_provided"?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none"}}/>
                </div>
                <label style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5,fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={cl.nhsStatus==="not_provided"} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"nhsStatus",e.target.checked?"not_provided":"not_checked")}/>
                  NHS number not provided
                </label>
                {cl.nhsStatus==="not_provided"&&<>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#dc2626",marginBottom:3}}>Reason for no NHS number *</div>
                  <select value={cl.nhsNoNumberReason||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"nhsNoNumberReason",e.target.value)}
                    style={{width:"100%",marginBottom:4,padding:"5px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${!cl.nhsNoNumberReason?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:!cl.nhsNoNumberReason?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                    <option value="">Select reason</option>
                    {NHS_NO_NUMBER_REASONS.map(r=><option key={r.code} value={r.code}>{r.label}</option>)}
                  </select>
                  {cl.nhsNoNumberReason==="non_uk"&&<div style={{marginBottom:4}}>
                    <input placeholder="NI Number (if applicable)" style={{width:"100%",padding:"4px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                  </div>}
                </>}
                <select value={cl.nhsStatus||"not_checked"} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"nhsStatus",e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${cl.nhsStatus==="not_checked"?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",background:cl.nhsStatus==="not_checked"?"#fff5f5":"#fff",display:"none"}}>
                  <option value="not_checked">— Confirm status —</option>
                  <option value="provided">NHS Number provided</option>
                  <option value="not_provided">Not provided — confirmed</option>
                  <option value="not_known">Not known to patient</option>
                </select>
                {cl.nhs&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",marginTop:4,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>✓ {cl.nhs}</div>}
              </div>
              {/* Contract */}
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9",borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>NHS Wales Contract *</div>
                <select value={cl.contract||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"contract",e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  {WALES_CONTRACTS.map(c=><option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.id} — {c.performer}</option>)}
                </select>
                {contract&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",marginTop:3}}>✓ {contract.name} · {contract.udaTarget} UDA target</div>}
              </div>
              {/* Exemption */}
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em",marginBottom:4}}>Exemption Status</div>
                <select value={cl.exemption||"none"} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"exemption",e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  {["none","age","income","maternity","disability","other"].map(e=><option key={e} value={e}>{e==="none"?"No exemption":e.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+e.slice(1)+" exempt"}</option>)}
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Treatment dates */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Treatment Dates</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>Treatment Start Date *</div>
                <input type="date" value={cl.txStart||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"txStart",e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:`1.5px solid ${!cl.txStart?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box",background:!cl.txStart?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}/>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>Treatment End Date</div>
                <input type="date" value={cl.txEnd||""} onChange={e=>updateClaim(cl.id,"txEnd",e.target.value)}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Care Packages */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151",flex:1}}>Care Packages ({cl.packages?.length||0})</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Auto-derived from selected treatments</span>
            </div>
            {(cl.packages||[]).length===0&&<div style={{padding:"14px",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",textAlign:"center"}}>⛔ No Care Packages — add treatment items to auto-assign</div>}
            {(cl.packages||[]).map(pkgId=>{
              const pkg=WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.find(p=>p.id===pkgId);
              if(!pkg)return null;
              const pkgItems=cl.items?.filter(i=>i.pkg===pkgId)||[];
              const isExpanded=expandedPkgs.has(pkgId+cl.id);
              const isComplete=pkgItems.length>0;
              const pkgNHS=pkgItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0)||pkg.nhsValue;
              const pkgPt=pkgItems.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.frStatus!=="none"?0:i.patientFee),0)||pkg.patientCharge;
              return(
              <div key={pkgId} style={{borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <div onClick={()=>togglePkg(pkgId+cl.id)}
                  style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 14px",alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer",background:isExpanded?pkg.bg+"80":"#fff"}}>
                  <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:8,background:pkg.bg,border:`1.5px solid ${pkg.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:900,color:pkg.color}}>{pkg.code}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:0}}>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>{pkg.name}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:isComplete?pkg.bg:"#fee2e2",color:isComplete?pkg.color:"#dc2626",border:`1px solid ${isComplete?pkg.border:"#fecaca"}`}}>
                        {isComplete?"Complete ✓":"Missing Items ⚠"}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginTop:1}}>{pkgItems.length} treatment item{pkgItems.length!==1?"s":""} · {pkg.udas} UDA{pkg.udas!==1?"s":""}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:pkg.color,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{pkgNHS.toFixed(2)}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>NHS value</div>
                  </div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{isExpanded?"▲":"▼"}</span>
                </div>
                {isExpanded&&<div style={{background:pkg.bg+"40",borderTop:`1px solid ${pkg.border}40`}}>
                  {pkgItems.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626"}}>⚠ No treatment items assigned to this Care Package</div>}
                  {pkgItems.map((item,ii)=>(
                    <div key={ii} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 100px",gap:8,padding:"7px 14px",borderTop:ii>0?"1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.04)":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                      <div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:500,color:"#374151"}}>{item.label}</div>
                        <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{item.code} · SNOMED: {DEFAULT_SNOMED[item.code]||"—"}</div>
                      </div>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",color:pkg.color,textAlign:"right"}}>£{item.nhsFee.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:item.frStatus!=="none"?"#94a3b8":"#374151",textDecoration:item.frStatus!=="none"?"line-through":"none",textAlign:"right"}}>£{item.frStatus!=="none"?"0.00":item.patientFee.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {item.frStatus!=="none"&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff7ed",color:"#c2410c",border:"1px solid #fed7aa"}}>{item.frStatus==="free_repair"?"Free Repair":"Free Replacement"}</span>}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                  {/* Clinical dataset requirements */}
                  <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:`1px solid ${pkg.border}40`,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.5)"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>CLINICAL DATASET REQUIRED</div>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                      {pkg.clinicalDataRequired.map(f=><span key={f} style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",color:"#374151"}}>{f.replace(/_/g," ")}</span>)}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>}
              </div>
              );
            })}
            {/* Care Package totals */}
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:16,justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Total NHS Value</div><div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{totalNHS.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Patient Charge</div><div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:"#374151",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{totalPt.toFixed(2)}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Audit log */}
          {cl.auditLog?.length>0&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Audit Log</div>
            {cl.auditLog.map((e,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"7px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",fontSize:10}}>
                <span style={{fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{e.user}</span>
                <span style={{flex:1,color:"#64748b"}}>{e.action}</span>
                <span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{e.at}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>}

          {/* Submit / actions */}
          {cl.status==="draft"&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>submitClaim(cl.id)}
              style={{flex:1,padding:"11px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Submit NHS Wales Claim
            </button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Claim saved as draft")} style={{padding:"11px 18px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Save Draft</button>
          </div>}
          {cl.status!=="draft"&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#dcfce7",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",fontSize:11,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:700,textAlign:"center"}}>✓ Claim {cl.status} — read only</div>}
        </div>
        );
      })()}
    </div>}

    {/* Wales Reporting */}
    {activeTab==="reporting"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14,color:"#0f172a"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 NHS Wales — Care Package Reporting</div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:16}}>

          {/* Claims by Care Package */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",gridColumn:"1/-1"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Claims by Care Package</div>
            {WALES_CARE_PACKAGES.map(pkg=>{
              const pkgClaims=walesClaims.filter(c=>c.packages?.includes(pkg.id));
              const nhsTotal=pkgClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).filter(i=>i.pkg===pkg.id).reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0);
              return(
              <div key={pkg.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:8,background:pkg.bg,border:`1.5px solid ${pkg.border}`,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:900,color:pkg.color}}>{pkg.code}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{pkg.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{pkgClaims.length} claim{pkgClaims.length!==1?"s":""}</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:pkg.color}}>£{nhsTotal.toFixed(2)}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>NHS value</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{width:80}}>
                  <div style={{height:6,borderRadius:3,background:"#f1f5f9",overflow:"hidden"}}>
                    <div style={{height:"100%",background:pkg.color,borderRadius:3,width:Math.min(100,(pkgClaims.length/Math.max(1,walesClaims.length))*100)+"%"}}/>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Compliance issues */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Compliance Issues</div>
            {[
              {l:"Missing ethnicity",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>!c.ethnicity).length,c:"#dc2626"},
              {l:"NHS number unconfirmed",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>c.nhsStatus==="not_checked").length,c:"#d97706"},
              {l:"No Care Package",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>!c.packages||c.packages.length===0).length,c:"#dc2626"},
              {l:"Missing mapping",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>c.packages?.some(p=>(c.items||[]).filter(i=>i.pkg===p).length===0)).length,c:"#d97706"},
              {l:"No tx end date",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>!c.txEnd).length,c:"#64748b"},
            ].map(r=>(
              <div key={r.l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Payment summary */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Payment Summary</div>
            {[
              {l:"Total NHS value",v:"£"+walesClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0).toFixed(2),c:"#0d9488"},
              {l:"Total patient charges",v:"£"+walesClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.frStatus!=="none"?0:i.patientFee),0).toFixed(2),c:"#374151"},
              {l:"Free Repair/Replacement (charge suppressed)",v:"£"+walesClaims.flatMap(c=>c.items||[]).filter(i=>i.frStatus!=="none").reduce((s,i)=>s+i.nhsFee,0).toFixed(2),c:"#c2410c"},
              {l:"Exempt claims",v:walesClaims.filter(c=>c.exemption&&c.exemption!=="none").length+" claims",c:"#16a34a"},
            ].map(r=>(
              <div key={r.l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid #f8fafc"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:6,justifyContent:"flex-end"}}>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("Action completed")} style={{padding:"5px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b"}}>⬇ Export Care Package Reconciliation</button>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

  </div>
  );
}


function NHSReconciliationPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("issues");
  const [dateRange,setDateRange]=useState({from:"2026-01-01",to:"2026-05-31"});
  const [filterPractitioner,setFilterPractitioner]=useState("All");
  const [filterSeverity,setFilterSeverity]=useState("All");
  const [filterIssue,setFilterIssue]=useState("All");
  const [showResolved,setShowResolved]=useState(false);
  const [notes,setNotes]=useState({});
  const [resolved,setResolved]=useState(new Set());
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const PRACTITIONERS=["All","Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"];

  const ISSUES=[

    {id:"I007",patient:"James Wright",nhs:"114 773 6690",practitioner:"Dr. M.     {id:"I008",patient:"Carol Davis",nhs:"998 441 5521",practitioner:"Dr. S.
