  ];

  const NHS_PAYMENTS=[
    {ref:"BSA-PAY-2026-041",date:"12 May 2026",claimRef:"FP17-2026-001",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",expected:73.50,paid:73.50,diff:0,status:"matched"},
    {ref:"BSA-PAY-2026-040",date:"10 May 2026",claimRef:"FP17-2026-004",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",expected:26.80,paid:20.00,diff:6.80,status:"underpaid"},
    {ref:"BSA-PAY-2026-039",date:"08 May 2026",claimRef:"FP17-2026-005",practitioner:null,expected:319.10,paid:319.10,diff:0,status:"unallocated"},
    {ref:"BSA-PAY-2026-038",date:"05 May 2026",claimRef:"FP17-2026-006",practitioner:"Amy Grant",expected:73.50,paid:60.00,diff:13.50,status:"adjusted"},
    {ref:"BSA-PAY-2026-037",date:"01 May 2026",claimRef:"FP17-2026-007",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",expected:26.80,paid:26.80,diff:0,status:"matched"},
  ];

  const PRACTITIONER_ALLOC=[
    {name:"Dr. S. Patel",completed:1250.80,submitted:950.60,approved:877.10,paid:580.00,unallocated:0,rejected:319.10,adjustments:13.50,net:566.50},
    {name:"Dr. M. Chen",completed:392.60,submitted:392.60,approved:346.00,paid:346.00,unallocated:319.10,rejected:0,adjustments:0,net:346.00},
    {name:"Amy Grant",completed:220.00,submitted:220.00,approved:206.50,paid:206.50,unallocated:0,rejected:0,adjustments:13.50,net:193.00},
  ];

  const AUDIT=[
    {user:"Emma Wilson",at:"14 May 2026 11:32",record:"I004 — Amy Torres",field:"Claim Status",from:"approved",to:"queried",reason:"Payment shortfall — raised with BSA"},
    {user:"Dr. S. Patel",at:"13 May 2026 09:15",record:"I001 — John Mills",field:"Internal Note",from:"",to:"Awaiting BSA processing",reason:"Chasing payment"},
    {user:"Emma Wilson",at:"10 May 2026 16:44",record:"I006 — Lisa Park",field:"Review Status",from:"open",to:"reviewed",reason:"BSA adjustment accepted"},
  ];

  const activeIssues=ISSUES.filter(i=>!resolved.has(i.id)&&(showResolved||!resolved.has(i.id)));
  const visibleIssues=activeIssues.filter(i=>
    (filterPractitioner==="All"||i.practitioner===filterPractitioner)&&
    (filterSeverity==="All"||i.severity===filterSeverity)&&
    (filterIssue==="All"||i.issueType===filterIssue)
  );

  const kpis=[
    {l:"Completed NHS Value",v:"£2,145.20",sub:"Estimated treatment value",c:"#374151"},
    {l:"Submitted Claims",v:"£1,782.90",sub:"Claims raised with BSA",c:"#2563eb"},
    {l:"Approved Value",v:"£1,449.90",sub:"BSA approved",c:"#0d9488"},
    {l:"Paid to Practice",v:"£1,132.40",sub:"Received from BSA",c:"#16a34a"},
    {l:"Outstanding",v:"£650.00",sub:"Unpaid approved claims",c:"#d97706"},
    {l:"Rejected",v:"£319.10",sub:"Requires re-submission",c:"#dc2626"},
    {l:"Underpaid",v:"£20.30",sub:"Shortfall vs approved",c:"#7c3aed"},
    {l:"Unallocated",v:"£319.10",sub:"No practitioner assigned",c:"#64748b"},
    {l:"Issues",v:visibleIssues.filter(i=>!resolved.has(i.id)).length,sub:"Needing attention",c:"#dc2626"},
  ];

  const SEV={critical:{c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",l:"Critical"},warning:{c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",l:"Warning"},info:{c:"#2563eb",bg:"#dbeafe",l:"Info"}};
  const STATUS_COL={submitted:"#2563eb",rejected:"#dc2626",approved:"#16a34a",paid:"#16a34a",not_submitted:"#94a3b8",adjusted:"#d97706"};

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Reconciliation Command Centre</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Connecting claims · payments · practitioners · issues in one view</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting open issues…")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export Issues</button>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Running full reconciliation…")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>⟳ Reconcile Now</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Filters */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"10px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
      <input type="date" value={dateRange.from} onChange={e=>setDateRange(p=>({...p,from:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}/>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>to</span>
      <input type="date" value={dateRange.to} onChange={e=>setDateRange(p=>({...p,to:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}/>
      {[
        {label:"Practitioner",val:filterPractitioner,set:setFilterPractitioner,opts:PRACTITIONERS},
        {label:"Severity",val:filterSeverity,set:setFilterSeverity,opts:["All","critical","warning","info"]},
        {label:"Issue Type",val:filterIssue,set:setFilterIssue,opts:["All","no_claim","claim_unpaid","claim_rejected","underpaid","unallocated","adjusted","period_mismatch"]},
      ].map(f=>(
        <select key={f.label} value={f.val} onChange={e=>f.set(e.target.value)}
          style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",color:"#374151"}}>
          {f.opts.map(o=><option key={o} value={o}>{o==="All"?f.label+": All":o}</option>)}
        </select>
      ))}
      <label style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",cursor:"pointer"}}>
        <input type="checkbox" checked={showResolved} onChange={e=>setShowResolved(e.target.checked)}/> Show resolved
      </label>
      <div style={{flex:1}}/>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{visibleIssues.length} issues · Updated just now</span>
    </div>

    {/* KPI cards */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
      {kpis.map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"11px 14px",minWidth:130,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>{k.l}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:1}}>{k.sub}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",gap:0,flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"issues",l:"⚠ Issues",badge:visibleIssues.filter(i=>!resolved.has(i.id)).length},{id:"practitioner",l:"👤 Practitioner Allocation"},{id:"payments",l:"💷 NHS Payments"},{id:"exceptions",l:"📋 Claim Exceptions"},{id:"audit",l:"🔒 Audit Trail"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"10px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
          {t.l}{t.badge>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:9,background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff"}}>{t.badge}</span>}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tab content */}
    <div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",minHeight:0}}>

    {/* ── ISSUES ── */}
    {tab==="issues"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
      <div style={{overflowX:"auto",minWidth:1100}}>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:11}}>
          <thead>
            <tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
              {["Patient","Practitioner","Date","Claim Ref","Status","Expected","Submitted","Approved","Paid","Diff","Issue","Severity","Actions"].map(h=>(
                <th key={h} style={{padding:"8px 12px",textAlign:"left",fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:10,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{h}</th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {visibleIssues.length===0&&<tr><td colSpan={13} style={{padding:40,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:13}}>✓ No issues match the current filters</td></tr>}
            {visibleIssues.map(i=>{
              const sev=SEV[i.severity];
              const isRes=resolved.has(i.id);
              return(
                <tr key={i.id} style={{borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",background:isRes?"#f0fdf4":i.severity==="critical"?"#fff5f5":"#fff",opacity:isRes?0.7:1}}>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{i.patient}<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{i.nhs||"—"}</div></td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",color:i.practitioner?"#374151":"#dc2626",fontStyle:i.practitioner?"normal":"italic"}}>{i.practitioner||"⚠ Missing"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:10,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{i.txDate}<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{i.daysOpen}d open</div></td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:10,color:i.claimRef?"#374151":"#94a3b8"}}>{i.claimRef||"—"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}><span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:(STATUS_COL[i.claimStatus]||"#94a3b8")+"18",color:STATUS_COL[i.claimStatus]||"#94a3b8"}}>{i.claimStatus.replace("_"," ")}</span></td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right"}}>£{i.expected.toFixed(2)}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:i.submitted?"#374151":"#94a3b8"}}>{i.submitted!=null?"£"+i.submitted.toFixed(2):"—"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:i.approved!=null?"#374151":"#94a3b8"}}>{i.approved!=null?"£"+i.approved.toFixed(2):"—"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:i.paid!=null?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{i.paid!=null?"£"+i.paid.toFixed(2):"—"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",fontWeight:700,color:i.diff>0?"#dc2626":"#16a34a"}}>£{i.diff.toFixed(2)}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",maxWidth:180}}><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>{i.issue}</div></td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px"}}><span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:sev.bg,color:sev.c}}>{sev.l}</span></td>
                  <td style={{padding:"9px 12px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4}}>
                      <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening claim for "+i.patient)} style={{padding:"3px 7px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>Claim</button>
                      <button onClick={()=>doToast("Note saved")} style={{padding:"3px 7px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Note</button>
                      <button onClick={()=>{setResolved(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.add(i.id);return n;});doToast("✓ Marked resolved");}} style={{padding:"3px 7px",border:"none",borderRadius:5,background:"#0d9488",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>✓</button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── PRACTITIONER ALLOCATION ── */}
    {tab==="practitioner"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Practitioner-Level NHS Reconciliation</div>
      <div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
          <thead>
            <tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
              {["Practitioner","Completed","Submitted","Approved","Paid","Unallocated","Rejected","Adjustments","Net Allocatable"].map(h=>(
                <th key={h} style={{padding:"10px 14px",textAlign:h==="Practitioner"?"left":"right",fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:10,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{h}</th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {PRACTITIONER_ALLOC.map((p,i)=>(
              <tr key={i} style={{borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{p.name}</td>
                {[p.completed,p.submitted,p.approved,p.paid].map((v,vi)=>(
                  <td key={vi} style={{padding:"11px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151"}}>£{v.toFixed(2)}</td>
                ))}
                <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",color:p.unallocated>0?"#dc2626":"#94a3b8",fontWeight:p.unallocated>0?700:400}}>£{p.unallocated.toFixed(2)}</td>
                <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",color:p.rejected>0?"#dc2626":"#94a3b8",fontWeight:p.rejected>0?700:400}}>£{p.rejected.toFixed(2)}</td>
                <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",color:p.adjustments>0?"#d97706":"#94a3b8"}}>£{p.adjustments.toFixed(2)}</td>
                <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488"}}>£{p.net.toFixed(2)}</td>
              </tr>
            ))}
            <tr style={{borderTop:"2px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc"}}>
              <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontWeight:800,fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>TOTAL</td>
              {["completed","submitted","approved","paid","unallocated","rejected","adjustments","net"].map(k=>(
                <td key={k} style={{padding:"10px 14px",textAlign:"right",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488"}}>
                  £{PRACTITIONER_ALLOC.reduce((s,p)=>s+p[k],0).toFixed(2)}
                </td>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── NHS PAYMENTS ── */}
    {tab==="payments"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>NHS Payment Records — BSA Matching</div>
      <div style={{overflowX:"auto"}}>
        <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,overflow:"hidden",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
          <thead>
            <tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
              {["Payment Ref","Date","Claim Ref","Practitioner","Expected","Paid","Difference","Match Status"].map(h=>(
                <th key={h} style={{padding:"10px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:10,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em"}}>{h}</th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {NHS_PAYMENTS.map((p,i)=>{
              const mc={matched:{c:"#16a34a",bg:"#dcfce7",l:"Matched"},underpaid:{c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",l:"Underpaid"},unallocated:{c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",l:"Unallocated"},adjusted:{c:"#7c3aed",bg:"#ede9fe",l:"Adjusted"}}[p.status];
              return(
                <tr key={i} style={{borderTop:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#0f172a"}}>{p.ref}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:"#64748b"}}>{p.date}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11}}>{p.claimRef}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",color:p.practitioner?"#374151":"#dc2626",fontStyle:p.practitioner?"normal":"italic"}}>{p.practitioner||"⚠ Unallocated"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{p.expected.toFixed(2)}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:700}}>£{p.paid.toFixed(2)}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:p.diff>0?"#dc2626":"#94a3b8"}}>{p.diff>0?"−£"+p.diff.toFixed(2):"—"}</td>
                  <td style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:mc.bg,color:mc.c}}>{mc.l}</span></td>
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── CLAIM EXCEPTIONS ── */}
    {tab==="exceptions"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Claims Requiring Attention</div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,maxWidth:900}}>
        {ISSUES.filter(i=>["claim_rejected","no_claim","underpaid","unallocated","adjusted"].includes(i.issueType)).map((i,idx)=>{
          const sev=SEV[i.severity];
          return(
            <div key={idx} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,border:`1.5px solid ${sev.c}30`,padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
              <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:sev.c,flexShrink:0,marginTop:5}}/>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{i.patient}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:sev.bg,color:sev.c}}>{sev.l}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{i.txDate} · {i.practitioner||"No practitioner"}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#475569"}}>{i.issue}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3}}>Expected: £{i.expected.toFixed(2)} · Claim: {i.claimRef||"None"} · Open {i.daysOpen} days</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexShrink:0}}>
                <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening claim")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>Open Claim</button>
                <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Marked reviewed")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"none",borderRadius:7,background:"#0d9488",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#fff",fontWeight:700}}>✓ Review</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── AUDIT TRAIL ── */}
    {tab==="audit"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:14}}>Reconciliation Audit Trail</div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>All manual corrections and reviews</div>
        {AUDIT.map((e,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"11px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#dbeafe",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#1d4ed8",flexShrink:0}}>{e.user.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("")}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a",marginBottom:2}}>{e.user} <span style={{fontWeight:400,color:"#64748b"}}>changed {e.field} on {e.record}</span></div>
              {e.from&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>From: <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"0 5px",borderRadius:3}}>{e.from}</span> → <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"0 5px",borderRadius:3}}>{e.to}</span></div>}
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginTop:2,fontStyle:"italic"}}>Reason: {e.reason}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{e.at}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS WALES APRIL 2026 — CARE PACKAGE WORKFLOW REFINEMENTS
// + NHS ENGLAND APRIL 2026 — OPERATIONAL CHANGES
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// Wales April 2026 treatment catalogue
const WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS=[
  {code:"W9300",l:"Stabilisation",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP_STAB",generatesPkg:true},
  {code:"W9301",l:"New Patient Examination",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP1",isNewPatient:true},
  {code:"W9302",l:"Recall Examination",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP1",isRecall:true},
  {code:"W9303",l:"18–24 Month Recall Examination",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP1",isRecall18m:true},
  {code:"W9304",l:"Anterior RCT (Prep only)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP4",isPrepOnly:true},
  {code:"W9305",l:"Posterior RCT (Prep only)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP4",isPrepOnly:true},
  {code:"W9306",l:"Permanent Filling (Stabilisation)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP_STAB",autoInclude:true},
  {code:"W9307",l:"Denture Reline/Rebase",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP6",replacesDep:"405"},
  {code:"W9308",l:"Denture Addition",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP6",replacesDep:"407"},
  {code:"W9309",l:"Antibiotics — ANUG",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:null,isCDSOnly:true},
  {code:"W9310",l:"Bite Raising Appliance",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP2",isPrepOnly:false},
  {code:"W9311",l:"Trauma Related Injury",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CPE"},
  {code:"W9312",l:"Ortho Urgent Issues",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CPE"},
  {code:"W9313",l:"Veneer Repair/Refix",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP2",isWarrantyEligible:true},
  {code:"W9314",l:"Dry Socket",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CPE"},
  {code:"W9370",l:"RCT Molar/Premolar (Stabilisation)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP_STAB",autoInclude:true},
  {code:"W9371",l:"RCT Anterior (Stabilisation)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP_STAB",autoInclude:true},
  {code:"W9373",l:"Non-Surgical Extractions (Stabilisation)",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:"CP_STAB",autoInclude:true},
  {code:"W9399",l:"NHS Note",cat:"Wales Apr 2026",pkg:null,isNHSNote:true,generatesPkg:false,noCDS:true,noCharge:true},
];

// England Apr 2026 — Unscheduled Care credit model
const ENG_UNSCHEDULED={
  activityCredit:60.00,  // claimable
  slotCredit:15.00,      // non-claimable, tracking only
  totalRemuneration:75.00,
};

// England Apr 2026 — deprecated treatment mappings
const ENG_DEPRECATED_CATS=[
  {oldCode:"405",oldLabel:"Denture Repair",newCode:"W9307",newLabel:"Denture Reline/Rebase",since:"2026-04-01"},
  {oldCode:"407",oldLabel:"Addition to Denture",newCode:"W9308",newLabel:"Denture Addition",since:"2026-04-01"},
];

// Nurse-eligible fluoride varnish codes
const NURSE_FV_CODES=["155","204"];

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS ENGLAND APRIL 2026 PAGE
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSEnglandApr2026Page(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("unscheduled");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [unscheduledClaims,setUnscheduledClaims]=useState([
    {id:"UC001",patient:"Tom Bright",nhs:"881 234 7755",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",role:"Dentist",date:"14 May 2026",
     is_unscheduled:true,failedAttendance:false,activityCredit:60.00,slotCredit:15.00,bandCalculated:"N/A",status:"draft",
     treatments:[{code:"600",label:"Emergency Appointment",fvEligible:false}]},
    {id:"UC002",patient:"Lily Chen",nhs:null,practitioner:"Amy Grant",role:"NHS Nurse",date:"12 May 2026",
     is_unscheduled:false,failedAttendance:false,activityCredit:0,slotCredit:0,bandCalculated:"Band 1",status:"draft",
     treatments:[{code:"155",label:"Fluoride Varnish",fvEligible:true,nurseLed:true,patientAge:8}]},
    {id:"UC003",patient:"James Wright",nhs:"114 773 6690",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",role:"Dentist",date:"10 May 2026",
     is_unscheduled:false,failedAttendance:false,activityCredit:0,slotCredit:0,bandCalculated:"Band 2",status:"draft",
     treatments:[{code:"158",label:"Fissure Sealant",fvEligible:false,band2Override:true}]},
  ]);
  const [selClaim,setSelClaim]=useState(null);
  const [practitioners,setPractitioners]=useState([
    {name:"Dr. S. Patel",role:"Dentist",nhsEnabled:true,nhsNurse:false},
    {name:"Dr. M. Chen",role:"Dentist",nhsEnabled:true,nhsNurse:false},
    {name:"Amy Grant",role:"Hygienist",nhsEnabled:true,nhsNurse:true,nurseFVOnly:true},
  ]);
  const [deprecatedUsage]=useState([
    {code:"405",patient:"Robert Hall",date:"10 May 2026",status:"should_migrate"},
    {code:"407",patient:"Lisa Park",date:"08 May 2026",status:"should_migrate"},
  ]);

  const toggleUnscheduled=(id)=>{
    setUnscheduledClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==id?c:{...c,is_unscheduled:!c.is_unscheduled,
      activityCredit:!c.is_unscheduled?ENG_UNSCHEDULED.activityCredit:0,
      slotCredit:!c.is_unscheduled?ENG_UNSCHEDULED.slotCredit:0,
      bandCalculated:!c.is_unscheduled?"N/A":c.bandCalculated
    }));
    doToast("✓ Unscheduled Care status updated — logged to audit");
  };

  const validateNurseClaim=(cl)=>{
    const errs=[];
    cl.treatments.forEach(t=>{
      if(cl.role==="NHS Nurse"){
        if(!NURSE_FV_CODES.includes(t.code))errs.push("NHS Nurses can only claim eligible fluoride varnish treatments");
        if(t.patientAge>=16)errs.push("Fluoride varnish claims via NHS Nurse require patient to be under 16");
      }
    });
    return errs;
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS England — April 2026 Changes</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Unscheduled Care · Nurse-Led FV · Band Updates · Denture Category Migration</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 England only · From 1 Apr 2026</div>
    </div>

    {/* KPI row */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Unscheduled Care claims",v:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.is_unscheduled).length,c:"#7c3aed"},
        {l:"Activity credit total",v:"£"+unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.is_unscheduled).reduce((s,c)=>s+c.activityCredit,0).toFixed(2),c:"#16a34a"},
        {l:"Slot credit (non-claimable)",v:"£"+unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.is_unscheduled).reduce((s,c)=>s+c.slotCredit,0).toFixed(2),c:"#94a3b8"},
        {l:"Nurse-led FV claims",v:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.treatments.some(t=>t.nurseLed)).length,c:"#0d9488"},
        {l:"Band 2 fissure sealants",v:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.treatments.some(t=>t.band2Override)).length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"Deprecated categories",v:deprecatedUsage.length,c:"#dc2626"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:130,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[
        {id:"unscheduled",l:"⚡ Unscheduled Care"},
        {id:"nurse",l:"💉 Nurse-Led FV"},
        {id:"bands",l:"🦷 Band Updates"},
        {id:"dentures",l:"😁 Denture Migration"},
        {id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"},
      ].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {t.l}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {/* ── UNSCHEDULED CARE ── */}
    {tab==="unscheduled"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:10}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:18}}>⚡</span>
        <div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>Unscheduled Care — April 2026 Remuneration Model</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#1e40af",marginTop:2}}>
            Fixed £75 total: <strong>£60 activity credit</strong> (claimable) + <strong>£15 slot credit</strong> (non-claimable, tracking only). Failed attendance: only £60 activity credit claimable.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {unscheduledClaims.map((cl,i)=>{
        const nurseErrs=validateNurseClaim(cl);
        return(
        <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${cl.is_unscheduled?"#7c3aed":"#e2e8f0"}`,marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:cl.is_unscheduled?"#f5f3ff":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.patient}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{cl.role}</span>
                {cl.is_unscheduled&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f5f3ff",color:"#7c3aed",border:"1px solid #ddd6fe"}}>⚡ Unscheduled Care</span>}
                {!cl.is_unscheduled&&cl.bandCalculated&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{cl.bandCalculated}</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.practitioner} · {cl.date} · {cl.treatments.map(t=>t.label).join(", ")}</div>
            </div>

            {/* Unscheduled Care toggle — Image 3 style */}
            <button onClick={()=>toggleUnscheduled(cl.id)}
              style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:8,border:`1.5px solid ${cl.is_unscheduled?"#7c3aed":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:cl.is_unscheduled?"#7c3aed":"#f8fafc",color:cl.is_unscheduled?"#fff":"#64748b",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span>⚡</span>{cl.is_unscheduled?"Unscheduled Care ✓":"Set as Unscheduled Care"}
            </button>
          </div>

          {cl.is_unscheduled&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:8}}>
              {[
                {l:"Activity Credit",v:"£"+cl.activityCredit.toFixed(2),c:"#16a34a",note:"Claimable"},
                {l:"Slot Credit",v:"£"+cl.slotCredit.toFixed(2),c:"#94a3b8",note:"Non-claimable"},
                {l:"Total Remuneration",v:"£"+(cl.activityCredit+cl.slotCredit).toFixed(2),c:"#7c3aed",note:"Fixed rate"},
                {l:"Claim Value",v:"£"+cl.activityCredit.toFixed(2),c:"#0d9488",note:"Activity only"},
              ].map(s=>(
                <div key={s.l} style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>{s.l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.note}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <label style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",cursor:"pointer"}}>
              <input type="checkbox" checked={cl.failedAttendance} onChange={e=>{
                setUnscheduledClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==cl.id?c:{...c,failedAttendance:e.target.checked}));
                doToast("Failed attendance recorded — slot credit removed from claim");
              }}/>
              Failed Attendance — claim activity credit only (£60), remove slot credit
            </label>
          </div>}
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>}

    {/* ── NURSE-LED FLUORIDE VARNISH ── */}
    {tab==="nurse"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #99f6e4",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488",marginBottom:4}}>💉 Nurse-Led Fluoride Varnish — April 2026</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>Suitably qualified nurses may submit NHS claims for Fluoride Varnish treatments on patients under 16. Patient must be under 16. Nurse must have NHS credentials configured.</div>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>NHS Practitioner Roles & Credentials</div>
        {practitioners.map((p,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#2563eb)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{p.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600}}>{p.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{p.role}{p.nhsNurse?" · NHS Nurse FV eligible":""}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              {p.nhsEnabled&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>NHS Enabled</span>}
              {p.nhsNurse&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f0fffe",color:"#0d9488",border:"1px solid #99f6e4"}}>FV Nurse</span>}
              {p.nurseFVOnly&&<span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>FV only</span>}
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>{setPractitioners(prs=>prs.map((pr,pi)=>pi!==i?pr:{...pr,nhsNurse:!pr.nhsNurse}));doToast("✓ Nurse credentials updated");}}
              style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>
              {p.nhsNurse?"Remove FV":"Enable FV"}
            </button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Nurse-led FV validation rules */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Validation Rules — Nurse FV Claims</div>
        {[
          {rule:"Patient must be under 16",status:"enforced"},
          {rule:"Treatment code must be eligible FV code (155, 204)",status:"enforced"},
          {rule:"Practitioner must have NHS Nurse role enabled",status:"enforced"},
          {rule:"Nurse is set as claiming practitioner on claim",status:"enforced"},
          {rule:"Non-FV treatments cannot be claimed by NHS Nurses",status:"enforced"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12}}>✓</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",flex:1}}>{r.rule}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>{r.status}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── BAND UPDATES ── */}
    {tab==="bands"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#92400e"}}>⚠️ Fissure Sealant — Band 2 from April 2026</div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",fontSize:11,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.7}}>
            Fissure sealants (code 158) are now automatically calculated as <strong>Band 2</strong> rather than Band 1. The band calculation engine has been updated accordingly. Claim review screen reflects the new banding.
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0,borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
            {[{l:"Before April 2026",v:"Band 1",c:"#94a3b8"},{l:"From April 2026",v:"Band 2",c:"#d97706"}].map((b,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:i===0?"1px solid #e2e8f0":"none",textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>{b.l}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:b.c}}>Fissure Sealant → {b.v}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Preformed Crown — Band 2 Sub-band Contribution</div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",fontSize:11,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.7}}>
            Preformed crowns now contribute to Band 2 sub-band calculations. Remuneration is calculated appropriately and reflected in the claim summary. Updated in claim calculation engine and claim review screen.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── DENTURE CATEGORY MIGRATION ── */}
    {tab==="dentures"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fecaca",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626",marginBottom:4}}>⚠️ Deprecated Denture Repair Categories</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#991b1b"}}>From April 2026, "Denture Repair" (405) and "Addition to Denture" (407) are deprecated. New categories: <strong>Denture Reline/Rebase (W9307)</strong> and <strong>Denture Addition (W9308)</strong>.</div>
      </div>

      {ENG_DEPRECATED_CATS.map((dep,i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1.5px solid #fecaca",marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff5f5",borderBottom:"1px solid #fecaca",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#dc2626"}}>DEPRECATED: {dep.oldCode} — {dep.oldLabel}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Deprecated from {dep.since}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>→</span>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>NEW: {dep.newCode} — {dep.newLabel}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            {deprecatedUsage.filter(u=>u.code===dep.oldCode).map((u,ui)=>(
              <div key={ui} style={{flex:1,fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{u.patient} · {u.date} · Status: <span style={{color:"#d97706",fontWeight:600}}>Needs migration</span></div>
            ))}
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Migrated "+dep.oldLabel+" → "+dep.newLabel+" for all affected records")}
              style={{padding:"5px 14px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Migrate All</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Migration Rules</div>
        {["Deprecated categories blocked on new claims","Historical records preserved with audit trail","Auto-migration attempted on save","Historical treatment mappings retained","Manual review available for complex cases"].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
            <span>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── REPORTING ── */}
    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {title:"Nurse-submitted NHS Claims",count:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.role==="NHS Nurse").length,c:"#0d9488"},
          {title:"Unscheduled Care Claims",count:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.is_unscheduled).length,c:"#7c3aed"},
          {title:"Activity Credit Total",count:"£"+unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.is_unscheduled).reduce((s,c)=>s+c.activityCredit,0).toFixed(2),c:"#16a34a"},
          {title:"Band 2 Fissure Sealant Claims",count:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.treatments.some(t=>t.band2Override)).length,c:"#d97706"},
          {title:"Deprecated Category Usage",count:deprecatedUsage.length+" (needs migration)",c:"#dc2626"},
          {title:"Failed Attendance",count:unscheduledClaims.filter(c=>c.failedAttendance).length,c:"#94a3b8"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace",marginBottom:4}}>{r.count}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{r.title}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// NHS WALES ADVANCED — WORKFLOW REFINEMENTS

function NHSWalesAdvancedPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("catalogue");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [showAddToCatalogue,setShowAddToCatalogue]=useState(false);

  // Stabilisation auto-inclusion tracker
  const STAB_AUTO_CODES=["W9306","W9370","W9371","W9373"];

  // Sample urgent referral detection
  const [dapBanner,setDapBanner]=useState({show:true,answered:null}); // null=not answered

  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>

        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Wales — Advanced Care Package Workflows</div>

      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Wales only · From 1 Apr 2026</div>
    </div>

    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {id:"catalogue",l:"📋 Apr 2026 Catalogue"},
        {id:"preponly",l:"🔧 Prep-Only"},

            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{t.code}</span>

              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:500}}>{t.l}</span>

            style={{padding:"8px 20px",background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Yes — DAP Urgent Referral</button>

      {dapBanner.answered==="yes"&&<div style={{background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fecaca",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:14,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:16}}>🚨</span>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626"}}>DAP Urgent Referral — Urgent Care Package (CPE) Generated</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>Treatment marked as urgent referral · Referral source set · Urgent marker included in claim payload</div></div>
        <button onClick={()=>setDapBanner({show:true,answered:null})} style={{marginLeft:"auto",padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:6,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626"}}>Reset</button>
      </div>}

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Urgent Referral Logic</div>
        {[
          {l:"Trigger condition",v:"No non-urgent NHS claim in last 3 years"},
          {l:"Banner prompt",v:"Is this a DAP Urgent Referral? Yes / No"},
          {l:"If Yes → Care Package",v:"Urgent Care Package (CPE) generated"},
          {l:"If Yes → Assessment & Advice",v:"Routes to Urgent Care Package, not Miscellaneous"},
          {l:"If No → Assessment & Advice",v:"Routes to Miscellaneous Care Package"},
          {l:"Referral source",v:"Set automatically on claim form"},
          {l:"Claim payload",v:"Urgent referral marker included"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",gap:16,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r.l}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#dc2626",textAlign:"right"}}>{r.v}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── STABILISATION ── */}
    {tab==="stabilisation"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fde68a",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:3}}>⚙ Stabilisation Care Package Auto-Inclusion</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>When Stabilisation Treatment (W9300) is charted, specific treatments are automatically included in the Stabilisation Care Package. Auto-inclusions are logged in the audit trail.</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Auto-Included in Stabilisation Care Package</div>
        {WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.filter(t=>t.autoInclude).map((t,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"9px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#d97706",flexShrink:0}}/>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{t.code}</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",marginLeft:8}}>{t.l}</span></div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>Auto-include</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{marginTop:12,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>ACORN Duplicate Prevention</div>
        {["If two ACORN codes present on treatment plan — send only once in NHS claim payload","Prevents duplicate ACORN submission","No duplicate warning unless clinically relevant","Auto-deduplication applied at claim generation","Logged in audit trail when deduplication occurs"].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── REPORTING ── */}
    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {l:"Prep-only treatments",v:WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.filter(t=>t.isPrepOnly).length,c:"#0d9488"},
          {l:"NHS Note items",v:WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.filter(t=>t.isNHSNote).length,c:"#16a34a"},
          {l:"Auto-include (Stabilisation)",v:WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.filter(t=>t.autoInclude).length,c:"#d97706"},
          {l:"CDS-only items",v:WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.filter(t=>t.isCDSOnly).length,c:"#2563eb"},
          {l:"Apr 2026 catalogue items",v:WALES_APR2026_TREATMENTS.length,c:"#7c3aed"},
          {l:"Deprecated code replacements",v:ENG_DEPRECATED_CATS.length,c:"#dc2626"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4}}>{r.l}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS CDS ENFORCEMENT — CONSTANTS
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1="2025-08-01";  // warn from
const CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_2="2025-11-30";  // block after

const CDS_NEW_CODES=[
  {code:"9380",label:"Soft Tissue Surgery",band:2,replacesOther:["soft tissue surgery","soft tissue removal"],region:["England","Wales"]},
  {code:"9381",label:"Non-Lab Made Appliance / Splint",band:2,replacesOther:["splint","non-lab appliance","bite guard","occlusal splint (non-lab)"],region:["England","Wales"]},
  {code:"9382",label:"Laboratory Made Splint",band:3,replacesOther:["lab splint","laboratory splint","occlusal splint (lab)"],region:["England","Wales"]},
  {code:"9383",label:"Crown Refix with Post/Core Retention",band:1,replacesOther:["crown refix","crown recement with post","post retained crown refix"],region:["England","Wales"]},
];

// Other Treatment usage patterns that should now use 9380-9383
const DEPRECATED_OTHER_PATTERNS=[
  {matchTerms:["soft tissue","mucocele","fibroma"],suggestCode:"9380",since:CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1},
  {matchTerms:["splint","bite guard","occlusal appliance","non-lab"],suggestCode:"9381",since:CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1},
  {matchTerms:["lab splint","laboratory splint","lab made splint"],suggestCode:"9382",since:CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1},
  {matchTerms:["crown refix","recement","crown retention post"],suggestCode:"9383",since:CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1},
];

// Denture repair CoT routing constants
const COT_ROUTING_RULES={
  band3:"attach_to_existing",
  band2:"create_separate",
  band1:"create_separate",
  none:"create_new",
};

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS CDS COMPLIANCE PAGE
// Settings → NHS Compliance → CDS Migration
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSCDSCompliancePage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("migration");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [migratedCodes,setMigratedCodes]=useState(new Set());

  // Simulated deprecated "Other Treatment" usage found in records
  const [otherTxUsage]=useState([
    {id:"OT001",patient:"John Mills",date:"12 May 2026",desc:"Soft tissue removal lower lip",txCode:"OT",suggestCode:"9380",severity:"error",region:"England"},
    {id:"OT002",patient:"Sarah Chen",date:"10 May 2026",desc:"Occlusal splint (non-lab made)",txCode:"OT",suggestCode:"9381",severity:"error",region:"Wales"},
    {id:"OT003",patient:"Robert Hall",date:"08 May 2026",desc:"Lab-made bite splint",txCode:"OT",suggestCode:"9382",severity:"error",region:"England"},
    {id:"OT004",patient:"Amy Torres",date:"05 May 2026",desc:"Crown recement with post retention",txCode:"OT",suggestCode:"9383",severity:"error",region:"Wales"},
    {id:"OT005",patient:"Tom Bright",date:"03 May 2026",desc:"Extraction (historical Other)",txCode:"OT",suggestCode:null,severity:"info",region:"England"},
  ]);

  // Simulated obturator detection
  const [obturatorCases]=useState([
    {id:"OBT001",patient:"Lisa Park",date:"15 May 2026",txCode:"9309",upperAcrylic:true,appliedTeeth:0,autoClassified:true,status:"draft"},
    {id:"OBT002",patient:"James Wright",date:"12 May 2026",txCode:"9309",upperAcrylic:true,appliedTeeth:3,autoClassified:false,status:"submitted"},
  ]);

  const claimDate=new Date();
  const afterBlockDate=claimDate>new Date(CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_2);
  const afterWarnDate=claimDate>new Date(CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1);

  const migrateItem=(id,code)=>{
    setMigratedCodes(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.add(id);return n;});
    doToast(`✓ Migrated to CDS code ${code} — audit logged`);
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS CDS Treatment-Code Enforcement</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>"Other Treatment" deprecation · CDS 9380–9383 · Obturator detection · Cross-region validation</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:afterBlockDate?"#dc2626":"#d97706",color:"#fff",fontSize:10,fontWeight:800}}>
          {afterBlockDate?"BLOCKING MODE — Post Nov 2025":"WARN MODE — Post Aug 2025"}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* KPI row */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Deprecated 'Other Treatment' usage",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>o.severity==="error").length,c:"#dc2626"},
        {l:"Pending migration",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>!migratedCodes.has(o.id)&&o.suggestCode).length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"Migrated",v:migratedCodes.size,c:"#16a34a"},
        {l:"Obturator auto-detections",v:obturatorCases.filter(o=>o.autoClassified).length,c:"#7c3aed"},
        {l:"New CDS codes active",v:CDS_NEW_CODES.length,c:"#0d9488"},
        {l:"Unresolvable Other Tx",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>!o.suggestCode).length,c:"#94a3b8"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:130,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[
        {id:"migration",l:"🔄 CDS Migration Assistant"},
        {id:"codes",l:"📋 New CDS Codes (9380–9383)"},
        {id:"obturator",l:"🦷 Obturator Detection"},
        {id:"validation",l:"✅ Validation Rules"},
        {id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"},
      ].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {t.l}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {/* ── CDS MIGRATION ASSISTANT ── */}
    {tab==="migration"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
      <div style={{background:afterBlockDate?"#fee2e2":"#fef3c7",borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${afterBlockDate?"#fecaca":"#fde68a"}`,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:10}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:18}}>{afterBlockDate?"⛔":"⚠️"}</span>
        <div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:afterBlockDate?"#dc2626":"#92400e"}}>
            {afterBlockDate
              ?"Blocking: 'Other Treatment' submissions blocked for procedures covered by CDS 9380–9383 (after 30 Nov 2025)"
              :"Warning: Claims should use CDS 9380–9383 instead of 'Other Treatment' (from 1 Aug 2025)"}
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>Detect, suggest, and bulk-migrate deprecated treatments. Historical claims are preserved.</div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>{const toMigrate=otherTxUsage.filter(o=>o.suggestCode&&!migratedCodes.has(o.id));toMigrate.forEach(o=>setMigratedCodes(p=>new Set([...p,o.id])));doToast(`✓ Bulk migrated ${toMigrate.length} items — audit logged`);}}
          style={{marginLeft:"auto",padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0,alignSelf:"center"}}>
          Migrate All
        </button>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"80px 1fr 130px 100px 100px 80px 100px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",gap:8}}>
          <span>Date</span><span>Procedure Description</span><span>Patient</span><span>Region</span><span>Current Code</span><span>→</span><span>Action</span>
        </div>
        {otherTxUsage.map((item,i)=>{
          const isMigrated=migratedCodes.has(item.id);
          const suggestTx=CDS_NEW_CODES.find(c=>c.code===item.suggestCode);
          return(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"80px 1fr 130px 100px 100px 80px 100px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:isMigrated?"#f0fdf4":item.severity==="error"&&!isMigrated?"#fff5f5":"#fff",opacity:isMigrated?0.75:1}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{item.date}</span>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:isMigrated?"#94a3b8":"#0f172a",textDecoration:isMigrated?"line-through":"none"}}>{item.desc}</div>
              {!isMigrated&&item.suggestCode&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:afterBlockDate?"#dc2626":"#d97706",marginTop:1}}>
                {afterBlockDate?"⛔ BLOCKED":"⚠️"} Should use CDS {item.suggestCode} after {CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1}
              </div>}
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{item.patient}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>{item.region}</span>
            <div>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>Other Treatment</span>
              {item.suggestCode&&!isMigrated&&<div style={{marginTop:3}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>→ {item.suggestCode}</span>
              </div>}
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
              {item.suggestCode&&<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>→</span>}
            </div>
            <div>
              {isMigrated
                ?<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Migrated</span>
                :item.suggestCode
                  ?<button onClick={()=>migrateItem(item.id,item.suggestCode)}
                    style={{padding:"4px 10px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>
                    Use {item.suggestCode}
                  </button>
                  :<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No mapping</span>}
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── NEW CDS CODES ── */}
    {tab==="codes"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>New CDS Treatment Codes — Effective 1 August 2025</div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
        {CDS_NEW_CODES.map((code,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1.5px solid #dbeafe",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#eff6ff",borderBottom:"1px solid #dbeafe",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{width:56,height:56,borderRadius:12,background:"#1d4ed8",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{code.code}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{code.label}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:4}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>Band {code.band}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>NHS</span>
                  {code.region.map(r=><span key={r} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",color:"#64748b",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>{r}</span>)}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Effective from</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#1d4ed8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{code.since||CDS_EFFECTIVE_DATE_1}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 16px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:5}}>REPLACES "OTHER TREATMENT" FOR:</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                {code.replacesOther.map(t=><span key={t} style={{fontSize:10,padding:"2px 10px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626",border:"1px solid #fecaca"}}>{t}</span>)}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── OBTURATOR DETECTION ── */}
    {tab==="obturator"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#f5f3ff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #ddd6fe",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#7c3aed",marginBottom:3}}>🦷 Obturator Auto-Detection Logic</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>If treatment code is <strong>9309</strong> and the upper acrylic denture has <strong>zero applied teeth</strong>, the system automatically classifies the item as an Obturator. No manual toggle required. NHS claim submission is allowed without charted teeth.</div>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Detection Rule</div>
        <div style={{padding:"14px"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",padding:"12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontFamily:"monospace",fontSize:11}}>
            <span style={{color:"#1d4ed8"}}>IF</span>
            <span>txCode = <strong>9309</strong></span>
            <span style={{color:"#1d4ed8"}}>AND</span>
            <span>upperAcrylic = <strong>true</strong></span>
            <span style={{color:"#1d4ed8"}}>AND</span>
            <span>appliedTeeth = <strong>0</strong></span>
            <span style={{color:"#7c3aed"}}>→ autoClassify as Obturator</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Detected Obturator Cases</div>
        {obturatorCases.map((ob,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:2}}>{ob.patient}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{ob.date} · Code {ob.txCode} · Applied teeth: {ob.appliedTeeth}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              {ob.autoClassified&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f5f3ff",color:"#7c3aed",border:"1px solid #ddd6fe"}}>⚡ Auto-Obturator</span>}
              {!ob.autoClassified&&<span style={{fontSize:9,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",color:"#94a3b8"}}>Standard Denture</span>}
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>{ob.status}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── VALIDATION RULES ── */}
    {tab==="validation"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {title:"Deprecated 'Other Treatment' Warning (from 1 Aug 2025)",sev:"warning",rules:["If procedure matches CDS 9380–9383 scope","Show: 'This procedure should use CDS code 9381 instead of Other Treatment after 1 Aug 2025'","Suggest replacement code with quick-convert button","Allow submission with warning"]},
          {title:"Deprecated 'Other Treatment' Block (after 30 Nov 2025)",sev:"error",rules:["If procedure matches CDS 9380–9383 scope","Block claim submission","Show: 'Other Treatment cannot be used for this procedure after 30 Nov 2025'","Require migration to correct CDS code before submitting"]},
          {title:"Band Mismatch Validation",sev:"error",rules:["9380 must be Band 2","9381 must be Band 2","9382 must be Band 3 — validation: '9382 must be submitted as Band 3'","9383 must be Band 1"]},
          {title:"Cross-Region Validation",sev:"info",rules:["All four CDS codes apply to both England and Wales","Regional contract must be selected","Wales claims: ethnicity and NHS number status still required","England claims: unscheduled care flag checked separately"]},
          {title:"Obturator Claim Validation",sev:"info",rules:["Code 9309 + upper acrylic + 0 applied teeth → auto Obturator","NHS claim submission allowed without charted teeth","Classification logged in audit trail","No manual obturator toggle required"]},
        ].map((v,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${v.sev==="error"?"#fecaca":v.sev==="warning"?"#fde68a":"#e2e8f0"}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:v.sev==="error"?"#fff5f5":v.sev==="warning"?"#fef9c3":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:`1px solid ${v.sev==="error"?"#fecaca":v.sev==="warning"?"#fde68a":"#e2e8f0"}`,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:14}}>{v.sev==="error"?"⛔":v.sev==="warning"?"⚠️":"ℹ️"}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:v.sev==="error"?"#dc2626":v.sev==="warning"?"#92400e":"#374151"}}>{v.title}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
              {v.rules.map((r,ri)=>(
                <div key={ri} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"4px 0",borderTop:ri>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
                  <span style={{color:"#0d9488",flexShrink:0}}>·</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── REPORTING ── */}
    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {l:"Deprecated Other Tx found",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>o.severity==="error").length,c:"#dc2626"},
          {l:"Migrated to CDS codes",v:migratedCodes.size,c:"#16a34a"},
          {l:"Pending migration",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>o.suggestCode&&!migratedCodes.has(o.id)).length,c:"#d97706"},
          {l:"Obturator auto-detections",v:obturatorCases.filter(o=>o.autoClassified).length,c:"#7c3aed"},
          {l:"Unresolvable Other Tx",v:otherTxUsage.filter(o=>!o.suggestCode).length,c:"#94a3b8"},
          {l:"New CDS codes in use",v:CDS_NEW_CODES.length,c:"#1d4ed8"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4}}>{r.l}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS DENTURE REPAIR WORKFLOW PAGE
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSDentureRepairPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("claims");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [repairClaims,setRepairClaims]=useState([
    {id:"DR001",patient:"John Mills",nhs:"485 777 3456",date:"14 May 2026",component:"Clasp",region:"England",
     existingCoT:{id:"COT-2026-01",band:3,status:"open"},cotRouting:"attach",
     patientCharge:0,udas:1,status:"draft",auditLog:["14 May 2026 10:15 — Draft created","14 May 2026 10:15 — CoT routing: Band 3 open → attach to existing CoT COT-2026-01","14 May 2026 10:15 — Patient charge suppressed: £0 (Denture Repair always free)","14 May 2026 10:15 — 1 UDA allocated automatically"]},
    {id:"DR002",patient:"Sarah Chen",nhs:"312 445 8821",date:"13 May 2026",component:"Tooth",region:"Wales",
     existingCoT:{id:"COT-2026-02",band:2,status:"open"},cotRouting:"separate",
     patientCharge:0,udas:1,status:"draft",auditLog:["13 May 2026 09:00 — Draft created","13 May 2026 09:00 — CoT routing: Band 2 open → create separate repair claim","13 May 2026 09:00 — Patient charge: £0","13 May 2026 09:00 — 1 UDA allocated"]},
    {id:"DR003",patient:"Robert Hall",nhs:"229 663 1157",date:"12 May 2026",component:"Flange",region:"England",
     existingCoT:null,cotRouting:"new",
     patientCharge:0,udas:1,status:"submitted",auditLog:["12 May 2026 11:30 — Draft created","12 May 2026 11:30 — No open CoT — new Band 0 repair claim created","12 May 2026 11:30 — 1 UDA allocated automatically","12 May 2026 11:45 — Claim submitted"]},
  ]);
  const [showNewRepair,setShowNewRepair]=useState(false);
  const [newRepair,setNewRepair]=useState({patient:"",component:"Clasp",region:"England"});
  const [selClaim,setSelClaim]=useState(null);

  const COMPONENTS=["Clasp","Tooth","Flange","Other"];

  const COT_ROUTING_LABEL={attach:"Attached to existing Band 3 CoT",separate:"Separate repair claim (existing Band 1/2 CoT)",new:"New Band 0 repair claim (no open CoT)"};
  const COT_ROUTING_COLOR={attach:"#0d9488",separate:"#d97706",new:"#2563eb"};

  const createRepair=()=>{
    const id="DR"+Date.now();
    const newClaim={id,patient:newRepair.patient||"New Patient",nhs:"—",date:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"2-digit",month:"short",year:"numeric"}),
      component:newRepair.component,region:newRepair.region,existingCoT:null,cotRouting:"new",
      patientCharge:0,udas:1,status:"draft",
      auditLog:[new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")+" — Denture repair claim created",
        new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")+" — CoT routing: no open CoT — new Band 0 claim",
        new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")+" — Patient charge: £0 (always free)",
        new Date().toLocaleString("en-GB")+" — 1 UDA allocated automatically"]};
    setRepairClaims(p=>[newClaim,...p]);
    setShowNewRepair(false);
    setNewRepair({patient:"",component:"Clasp",region:"England"});
    doToast("✓ Denture Repair claim created — Band 0 · 1 UDA · £0 patient charge");
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* New Repair Modal */}
    {showNewRepair&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>New Denture Repair Claim</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Band 0 · No patient charge · 1 UDA automatic · CoT routing applied</div>
        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Patient Name</label>
          <input value={newRepair.patient} onChange={e=>setNewRepair(p=>({...p,patient:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Patient name"
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
        </div>
        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Repair Component Type</label>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {COMPONENTS.map(c=><button key={c} onClick={()=>setNewRepair(p=>({...p,component:c}))}
              style={{padding:"6px 12px",borderRadius:7,border:`2px solid ${newRepair.component===c?"#7c3aed":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:newRepair.component===c?"#f5f3ff":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:newRepair.component===c?700:400,color:newRepair.component===c?"#7c3aed":"#64748b"}}>
              {c}
            </button>)}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{marginBottom:16}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>Region</label>
          <select value={newRepair.region} onChange={e=>setNewRepair(p=>({...p,region:e.target.value}))}
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
            <option>England</option><option>Wales</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #99f6e4",marginBottom:16,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488"}}>
          ✓ Band 0 non-banded · ✓ Patient charge: £0 (always free) · ✓ 1 UDA auto-allocated · ✓ CoT routing applied on save
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowNewRepair(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={createRepair} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#7c3aed",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Create Repair Claim</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Denture Repair — Band 0 Workflow</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>CoT routing · Band 0 · No patient charge · 1 UDA auto-allocated · England & Wales</div>
      </div>
      <button onClick={()=>setShowNewRepair(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#7c3aed",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ New Denture Repair</button>
    </div>

    {/* KPIs */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Total repair claims",v:repairClaims.length,c:"#374151"},
        {l:"Attached to Band 3 CoT",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.cotRouting==="attach").length,c:"#0d9488"},
        {l:"Separate repair claims",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.cotRouting==="separate").length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"New Band 0 claims (no CoT)",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.cotRouting==="new").length,c:"#2563eb"},
        {l:"Total UDAs allocated",v:repairClaims.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.udas,0),c:"#7c3aed"},
        {l:"Patient charges raised",v:"£0.00 (all free)",c:"#16a34a"},
      ].map(k=>(
