        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:140,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"claims",l:"🔧 Repair Claims"},{id:"cot",l:"📋 CoT Routing Rules"},{id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#7c3aed":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#7c3aed":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {t.l}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {tab==="claims"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960,display:"flex",gap:16,minHeight:0}}>
      {/* Claims list */}
      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8}}>
        {repairClaims.map(cl=>(
          <div key={cl.id} onClick={()=>setSelClaim(selClaim===cl.id?null:cl.id)}
            style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${selClaim===cl.id?"#7c3aed":"#e2e8f0"}`,padding:"12px 14px",cursor:"pointer",transition:"border .1s"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:6}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.patient}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f5f3ff",color:"#7c3aed",border:"1px solid #ddd6fe"}}>🔧 {cl.component}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:cl.status==="submitted"?"#dbeafe":"#fef3c7",color:cl.status==="submitted"?"#1d4ed8":"#92400e"}}>{cl.status}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.date} · {cl.region} · NHS {cl.nhs}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"4px 8px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:6}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Patient £</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#16a34a",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£0.00</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"4px 8px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:6}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>UDAs</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{cl.udas}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            {/* CoT routing badge */}
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:(COT_ROUTING_COLOR[cl.cotRouting]||"#64748b")+"15",color:COT_ROUTING_COLOR[cl.cotRouting]||"#64748b",display:"inline-block"}}>
              {COT_ROUTING_LABEL[cl.cotRouting]}
              {cl.existingCoT&&<span style={{fontWeight:400,marginLeft:5}}>({cl.existingCoT.id} · Band {cl.existingCoT.band})</span>}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Detail panel */}
      {selClaim&&(()=>{
        const cl=repairClaims.find(r=>r.id===selClaim);
        if(!cl)return null;
        return(
        <div style={{width:320,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:16,flexShrink:0,height:"fit-content"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:12}}>Claim Review — {cl.id}</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:6,marginBottom:12}}>
            {[{l:"Patient",v:cl.patient},{l:"NHS Number",v:cl.nhs},{l:"Region",v:cl.region},{l:"Component",v:cl.component},{l:"Band",v:"0 (Non-banded)"},{l:"Patient Charge",v:"£0.00 (always free)"},{l:"UDAs",v:cl.udas+" (auto-allocated)"},{l:"CoT Routing",v:COT_ROUTING_LABEL[cl.cotRouting]},{l:"Time Limit",v:"None (no time restriction)"}].map(f=>(
              <div key={f.l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"5px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",gap:10}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0}}>{f.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",textAlign:"right"}}>{f.v}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {/* Audit log */}
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:6}}>Audit Log</div>
          {cl.auditLog.map((e,i)=><div key={i} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",padding:"3px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>{e}</div>)}
          {cl.status==="draft"&&<button onClick={()=>{setRepairClaims(p=>p.map(r=>r.id!==cl.id?r:{...r,status:"submitted"}));doToast("✓ Denture repair claim submitted");setSelClaim(null);}}
            style={{marginTop:12,width:"100%",padding:"9px",background:"#7c3aed",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Submit Repair Claim</button>}
        </div>
        );
      })()}
    </div>}

    {tab==="cot"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {title:"Band 3 CoT Open",routing:"Attach to existing CoT",color:"#0d9488",rule:"Denture repair must be included in the existing Band 3 CoT. No separate repair claim created. Prevents over-claiming.",validation:"'Denture repairs during an open Band 3 course of treatment must be included within the existing CoT.'"},
          {title:"Band 1 or Band 2 CoT Open",routing:"Create separate repair claim",color:"#d97706",rule:"Allow existing CoT to complete normally. Create a separate Band 0 denture repair claim. 1 UDA allocated to the repair claim.",validation:"Separate claim created automatically. No patient charge on repair."},
          {title:"No Open CoT",routing:"New Band 0 repair claim",color:"#2563eb",rule:"No existing CoT present. Create a new NHS claim. Include Denture Repair treatment item. Band 0, 1 UDA, £0 patient charge.",validation:"New claim created. Submission proceeds normally."},
        ].map((v,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${v.color}30`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:v.color+"10",borderBottom:`1px solid ${v.color}30`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:v.color,flexShrink:0}}/>
              <div style={{flex:1}}><span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:v.color}}>{v.title}</span></div>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:v.color+"20",color:v.color}}>{v.routing}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",marginBottom:6}}>{v.rule}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontStyle:"italic",color:"#64748b",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"6px 10px",borderRadius:6,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>{v.validation}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Universal Rules (all scenarios)</div>
          {["Patient charge is always £0 — no exemption check required","No time limit on repairs — appliance age is irrelevant","1 UDA allocated automatically from Denture Repair category","Band 0 — non-banded claim — no banded patient fee","Duplicate repair claims blocked by validation","Repair component type tracked for clinical and reporting purposes"].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#16a34a"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {l:"Total repair claims",v:repairClaims.length,c:"#7c3aed"},
          {l:"Clasp repairs",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.component==="Clasp").length,c:"#0d9488"},
          {l:"Tooth repairs",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.component==="Tooth").length,c:"#d97706"},
          {l:"Flange repairs",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.component==="Flange").length,c:"#2563eb"},
          {l:"Attached to Band 3 CoT",v:repairClaims.filter(r=>r.cotRouting==="attach").length,c:"#0d9488"},
          {l:"UDAs auto-allocated",v:repairClaims.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.udas,0),c:"#374151"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4}}>{r.l}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS NORTHERN IRELAND — MULTI-PANEL + TIER AMOUNT + PRIOR APPROVAL
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const NI_PANEL_LABEL_PRESETS=["Main","Secondary","Tertiary","Locum","Emergency Contract","Out-of-Hours","Bank"];

function NHSNIPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("panels");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  // ── Panel Numbers state ────────────────────────────────────────
  const [panelNumbers,setPanelNumbers]=useState([
    {id:"PN001",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",label:"Main",performerNo:"NI-10234",pin:"4521",isDefault:true,active:true,
     audit:["Created 01 Jan 2024","Set as default 01 Jan 2024"]},
    {id:"PN002",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",label:"Locum",performerNo:"NI-10235",pin:"7893",isDefault:false,active:true,
     audit:["Created 15 Mar 2024"]},
    {id:"PN003",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",label:"Main",performerNo:"NI-20411",pin:"3344",isDefault:true,active:true,
     audit:["Created 01 Jan 2024"]},
    {id:"PN004",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",label:"Emergency Contract",performerNo:"NI-20412",pin:"8812",isDefault:false,active:false,
     audit:["Created 12 Feb 2024","Disabled 01 Mar 2024"]},
  ]);
  const [showAddPanel,setShowAddPanel]=useState(false);
  const [newPanel,setNewPanel]=useState({practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",label:"Main",performerNo:"",pin:""});
  const [editingPN,setEditingPN]=useState(null);

  // ── Tier Amount & Prior Approval state ────────────────────────
  const [tierConfig,setTierConfig]=useState([
    {practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",tierAmount:400.00},
    {practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",tierAmount:350.00},
    {practitioner:"Amy Grant",tierAmount:200.00},
  ]);
  const [niClaims,setNiClaims]=useState([
    {id:"NIC001",patient:"John Mills",date:"14 May 2026",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",panelNo:"NI-10234",panelLabel:"Main",
     value:450.00,tierAmount:400.00,exceedsTier:true,priorApprovalStatus:"awaiting",hcn:"1234567890",chi:null},
    {id:"NIC002",patient:"Robert Hall",date:"12 May 2026",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",panelNo:"NI-20411",panelLabel:"Main",
     value:280.00,tierAmount:350.00,exceedsTier:false,priorApprovalStatus:null,hcn:"9876543210",chi:null},
    {id:"NIC003",patient:"Lisa Park",date:"10 May 2026",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",panelNo:"NI-10235",panelLabel:"Locum",
     value:520.00,tierAmount:400.00,exceedsTier:true,priorApprovalStatus:"approved",hcn:null,chi:"CHI-556677"},
  ]);
  const [showPriorApprovalModal,setShowPriorApprovalModal]=useState(null);
  const [showPanelSelector,setShowPanelSelector]=useState(null);

  const PRACTITIONERS=["Dr. S. Patel","Dr. M. Chen","Amy Grant"];
  const PA_STATUS={
    awaiting:{l:"Awaiting Prior Approval",c:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7"},
    approved:{l:"Prior Approval Approved",c:"#16a34a",bg:"#dcfce7"},
    rejected:{l:"Prior Approval Rejected",c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"},
    required:{l:"Prior Approval Required",c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"},
  };

  const setDefault=(id)=>{
    const pn=panelNumbers.find(p=>p.id===id);
    if(!pn)return;
    setPanelNumbers(p=>p.map(n=>n.practitioner!==pn.practitioner?n:{...n,isDefault:n.id===id,
      audit:n.id===id?[...n.audit,"Set as default "+new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB")]:n.audit
    }));
    doToast("✓ Default panel number updated for "+pn.practitioner);
  };

  const toggleActive=(id)=>{
    setPanelNumbers(p=>p.map(n=>n.id!==id?n:{...n,active:!n.active,
      audit:[...n.audit,(n.active?"Disabled":"Enabled")+" "+new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB")]
    }));
    doToast("✓ Panel number status updated — logged");
  };

  const addPanel=()=>{
    if(!newPanel.performerNo.trim()||!newPanel.pin.trim()){doToast("Performer number and PIN required");return;}
    if(panelNumbers.some(p=>p.performerNo===newPanel.performerNo)){doToast("⚠ This performer number already exists");return;}
    const id="PN"+Date.now();
    const hasDefault=panelNumbers.some(p=>p.practitioner===newPanel.practitioner&&p.isDefault);
    setPanelNumbers(p=>[...p,{id,practitioner:newPanel.practitioner,label:newPanel.label,
      performerNo:newPanel.performerNo,pin:newPanel.pin,isDefault:!hasDefault,active:true,
      audit:["Created "+new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB")]}]);
    setShowAddPanel(false);
    setNewPanel({practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",label:"Main",performerNo:"",pin:""});
    doToast("✓ Panel number added — audit logged");
  };

  const updateTier=(practitioner,val)=>{
    const n=parseFloat(val);
    if(isNaN(n)||n<0){doToast("⚠ Enter a valid positive tier amount");return;}
    setTierConfig(p=>p.map(t=>t.practitioner!==practitioner?t:{...t,tierAmount:n}));
    doToast("✓ Tier Amount updated for "+practitioner+" — logged");
  };

  const submitPriorApproval=(claimId)=>{
    setNiClaims(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==claimId?c:{...c,priorApprovalStatus:"awaiting"}));
    setShowPriorApprovalModal(null);
    doToast("✓ Prior approval submitted — claim status: Awaiting Prior Approval");
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Prior Approval Modal */}
    {showPriorApprovalModal&&(()=>{
      const cl=niClaims.find(c=>c.id===showPriorApprovalModal);
      if(!cl)return null;
      return(
      <div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:440,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:4}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:22}}>⚠️</span>
            <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626"}}>Prior Approval Required</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16,lineHeight:1.6}}>
            This claim exceeds <strong>{cl.practitioner}'s</strong> NHS NI Tier Amount of <strong>£{cl.tierAmount.toFixed(2)}</strong>.<br/>
            Claim value: <strong style={{color:"#dc2626"}}>£{cl.value.toFixed(2)}</strong> · Excess: <strong style={{color:"#dc2626"}}>£{(cl.value-cl.tierAmount).toFixed(2)}</strong>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:11,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:16}}>
            A prior approval submission is required before this claim can be submitted to NHS Northern Ireland.
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setShowPriorApprovalModal(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Save Draft</button>
            <button onClick={()=>{setShowPriorApprovalModal(null);doToast("Submission cancelled");}} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
            <button onClick={()=>submitPriorApproval(cl.id)} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁮󠁩󠁲󠁿 Begin Prior Approval</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      );
    })()}

    {/* Add Panel Number Modal */}
    {showAddPanel&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Add Panel Number</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁮󠁩󠁲󠁿 NHS Northern Ireland performer credentials</div>
        {[{l:"Practitioner",k:"practitioner",opts:PRACTITIONERS},{l:"Label",k:"label",opts:NI_PANEL_LABEL_PRESETS}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>{f.l}</label>
            <select value={newPanel[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewPanel(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
              {f.opts.map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
            </select>
          </div>
        ))}
        {[{l:"Performer Number",k:"performerNo",ph:"NI-XXXXX"},{l:"Performer PIN",k:"pin",ph:"4-digit PIN",type:"password"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input type={f.type||"text"} value={newPanel[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewPanel(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:16}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddPanel(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={addPanel} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Add Panel Number</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:22}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁮󠁩󠁲󠁿</span>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Northern Ireland</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Multi-Panel Numbers · HCN/CHI · Tier Amounts · Prior Approval</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* KPIs */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Total panel numbers",v:panelNumbers.length,c:"#1d4ed8"},
        {l:"Active panel numbers",v:panelNumbers.filter(p=>p.active).length,c:"#16a34a"},
        {l:"Practitioners with NI config",v:[...new Set(panelNumbers.map(p=>p.practitioner))].length,c:"#0d9488"},
        {l:"Claims requiring prior approval",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.exceedsTier).length,c:"#dc2626"},
        {l:"Awaiting prior approval",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.priorApprovalStatus==="awaiting").length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"Prior approval approved",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.priorApprovalStatus==="approved").length,c:"#16a34a"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:130,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"panels",l:"🔢 Panel Numbers"},{id:"tier",l:"💷 Tier & Prior Approval"},{id:"claims",l:"📋 NI Claims"},{id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#1d4ed8":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
          {t.l}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {/* ── PANEL NUMBERS ── */}
    {tab==="panels"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14}}>
        <div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Panel Numbers — NHS NI Performers</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:1}}>Each practitioner can have multiple performer/PIN sets. One default per practitioner.</div></div>
        <button onClick={()=>setShowAddPanel(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ Add Panel Number</button>
      </div>

      {PRACTITIONERS.map(pr=>{
        const prPanels=panelNumbers.filter(p=>p.practitioner===pr);
        if(prPanels.length===0)return null;
        return(
        <div key={pr} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:14}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:34,height:34,borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#7c3aed)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{pr.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
            <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>{pr}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{prPanels.filter(p=>p.active).length} active · {prPanels.length} total</span>
          </div>
          {prPanels.map((pn,i)=>(
            <div key={pn.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"12px 16px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center",background:!pn.active?"#f8fafc":"#fff"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:3}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:pn.active?"#0f172a":"#94a3b8"}}>{pn.label}</span>
                  {pn.isDefault&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>DEFAULT</span>}
                  {!pn.active&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f1f5f9",color:"#94a3b8"}}>DISABLED</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>
                  No: <strong style={{color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{pn.performerNo}</strong> &nbsp;·&nbsp; PIN: <strong>{"·".repeat(pn.pin.length)}</strong>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
                {!pn.isDefault&&pn.active&&<button onClick={()=>setDefault(pn.id)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #dbeafe",borderRadius:7,background:"#eff6ff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#1d4ed8",fontWeight:600}}>Set Default</button>}
                <button onClick={()=>setEditingPN(editingPN===pn.id?null:pn.id)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Edit PIN</button>
                <button onClick={()=>toggleActive(pn.id)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:pn.active?"#fff5f5":"#f0fdf4",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:pn.active?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",fontWeight:600}}>{pn.active?"Disable":"Enable"}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>}

    {/* ── TIER AMOUNT & PRIOR APPROVAL ── */}
    {tab==="tier"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff7ed",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fed7aa",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:10}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:18}}>💷</span>
        <div>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#c2410c"}}>NHS NI Tier Amount Thresholds</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>When a claim value exceeds the practitioner's configured Tier Amount, prior approval is automatically required before submission.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tier configuration */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Practitioner Tier Amounts</div>
        {tierConfig.map((tc,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"11px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,flex:1}}>{tc.practitioner}</span>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Tier Amount: £</span>
              <input type="number" defaultValue={tc.tierAmount} min="0" step="0.01"
                onBlur={e=>updateTier(tc.practitioner,e.target.value)}
                style={{width:90,padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",textAlign:"right"}}/>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Threshold for prior approval</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Claims exceeding tier */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span>Claims Requiring Prior Approval</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{niClaims.filter(c=>c.exceedsTier).length} claims above threshold</span>
        </div>
        {niClaims.map((cl,i)=>{
          const pas=cl.priorApprovalStatus?PA_STATUS[cl.priorApprovalStatus]:null;
          return(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"11px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center",background:cl.exceedsTier&&!pas?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.patient}</span>
                {cl.exceedsTier&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>⚠ Exceeds Tier</span>}
                {pas&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:pas.bg,color:pas.c}}>{pas.l}</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.practitioner} · {cl.panelLabel} ({cl.panelNo}) · {cl.date}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:900,color:cl.exceedsTier?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{cl.value.toFixed(2)}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Tier: £{cl.tierAmount.toFixed(2)}</div>
            </div>
            {cl.exceedsTier&&!cl.priorApprovalStatus&&<button onClick={()=>setShowPriorApprovalModal(cl.id)}
              style={{padding:"5px 12px",background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>Prior Approval</button>}
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── NI CLAIMS ── */}
    {tab==="claims"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:12}}>NHS NI Claims — Panel Number & HCN Verification</div>
      {niClaims.map((cl,i)=>{
        const pas=cl.priorApprovalStatus?PA_STATUS[cl.priorApprovalStatus]:null;
        return(
        <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"11px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.patient}</span>
                {pas&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:pas.bg,color:pas.c}}>{pas.l}</span>}
                {cl.exceedsTier&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>Above Tier</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.date} · {cl.practitioner}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:900,color:cl.exceedsTier?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{cl.value.toFixed(2)}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>PANEL NUMBER</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#1d4ed8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{cl.panelNo}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{cl.panelLabel}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>HCN</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:cl.hcn?"#374151":"#dc2626"}}>{cl.hcn||"Not provided"}</div>
              {cl.chi&&<div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>CHI: {cl.chi}</div>}
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>CLAIM VALUE vs TIER</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:cl.exceedsTier?"#dc2626":"#16a34a",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{cl.value.toFixed(2)} / £{cl.tierAmount.toFixed(2)}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{cl.exceedsTier?"Exceeds by £"+(cl.value-cl.tierAmount).toFixed(2):"Within tier"}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>}

    {/* ── REPORTING ── */}
    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[
          {l:"Claims by NI-10234 (Dr. Patel Main)",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.panelNo==="NI-10234").length,c:"#1d4ed8"},
          {l:"Claims by NI-10235 (Dr. Patel Locum)",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.panelNo==="NI-10235").length,c:"#7c3aed"},
          {l:"Claims requiring prior approval",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.exceedsTier).length,c:"#dc2626"},
          {l:"Awaiting prior approval",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.priorApprovalStatus==="awaiting").length,c:"#d97706"},
          {l:"Prior approval approved",v:niClaims.filter(c=>c.priorApprovalStatus==="approved").length,c:"#16a34a"},
          {l:"Active panel numbers",v:panelNumbers.filter(p=>p.active).length,c:"#0d9488"},
        ].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4,lineHeight:1.4}}>{r.l}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS UDAs/UOAs PERFORMANCE REPORTING
// Pro Dental Connect — Reports → NHS UDAs/UOAs
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSUDAReportPage(){
  const [actType,setActType]=useState("UDA"); // UDA | UOA
  const [dateRange,setDateRange]=useState({from:"2026-04-01",to:"2026-05-31"});
  const [filterPractitioner,setFilterPractitioner]=useState("All");
  const [drillTarget,setDrillTarget]=useState(null); // null or {type, label}
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};

  const CONTRACTS=[
    {id:"C001",name:"NHS England Standard — Dr. S. Patel",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",target:4560,targetUOA:null,achieved:2341,submitted:2180,region:"England"},
    {id:"C002",name:"NHS England Standard — Dr. M. Chen",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",target:3200,targetUOA:null,achieved:1420,submitted:1380,region:"England"},
    {id:"C003",name:"NHS Ortho Contract — Dr. S. Patel",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",target:null,targetUOA:1200,achieved:0,achievedUOA:540,submittedUOA:520,region:"England"},
  ];

  const PRACTITIONERS_DATA=[
    {name:"Dr. S. Patel",udas:2341,submitted:2180,completed:47,avgPerClaim:3.2,contractTarget:4560,region:"England"},
    {name:"Dr. M. Chen",udas:1420,submitted:1380,completed:31,avgPerClaim:2.8,contractTarget:3200,region:"England"},
    {name:"Amy Grant",udas:186,submitted:180,completed:18,avgPerClaim:1.1,contractTarget:null,region:"England"},
  ];

  const MONTHLY_TREND=[
    {month:"Apr 26",udas:520,submitted:490,target:380},
    {month:"May 26",udas:487,submitted:451,target:380},
  ];

  const CLAIM_STATUSES=[
    {status:"Completed",count:112,udas:1820,c:"#16a34a"},
    {status:"Submitted",count:48,udas:680,c:"#2563eb"},
    {status:"Queued",count:12,udas:195,c:"#d97706"},
    {status:"Queried",count:5,udas:72,c:"#dc2626"},
    {status:"Error",count:3,udas:40,c:"#dc2626"},
  ];

  const contractTotal=CONTRACTS.filter(c=>actType==="UDA"?c.target:c.targetUOA);
  const totalTarget=contractTotal.reduce((s,c)=>s+(actType==="UDA"?c.target||0:c.targetUOA||0),0);
  const totalAchieved=PRACTITIONERS_DATA.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.udas,0);
  const achievedPct=totalTarget>0?Math.round((totalAchieved/totalTarget)*100):0;

  // Forecast: project year-end based on current rate (2 months of 12)
  const monthsElapsed=2;
  const monthsTotal=12;
  const forecastedYearEnd=Math.round((totalAchieved/monthsElapsed)*monthsTotal);
  const forecastPct=totalTarget>0?Math.round((forecastedYearEnd/totalTarget)*100):0;
  const forecastVariance=forecastedYearEnd-totalTarget;

  const BAR_MAX=Math.max(...PRACTITIONERS_DATA.map(p=>p.contractTarget||p.udas));

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>Pro Dental Connect — NHS {actType}s/UOAs Performance</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Contract-level · Practitioner analytics · Forecast engine · Compass/WebEDI reconciliation</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",borderRadius:8,overflow:"hidden",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2)"}}>
          {["UDA","UOA"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setActType(t)} style={{padding:"5px 14px",border:"none",background:actType===t?"#0d9488":"transparent",color:actType===t?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:actType===t?700:400}}>{t}s</button>)}
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("Exporting NHS "+actType+" report to CSV…")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15)",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.08)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.7)",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Filters */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"9px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
      <input type="date" value={dateRange.from} onChange={e=>setDateRange(p=>({...p,from:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none"}}/>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>to</span>
      <input type="date" value={dateRange.to} onChange={e=>setDateRange(p=>({...p,to:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none"}}/>
      <select value={filterPractitioner} onChange={e=>setFilterPractitioner(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none"}}>
        <option value="All">All Practitioners</option>
        {PRACTITIONERS_DATA.map(p=><option key={p.name}>{p.name}</option>)}
      </select>
      <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:4}}>Activity counted by <strong>Treatment Plan Completion Date</strong> (not submission date)</div>
    </div>

    {/* KPI row */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Contract Target",v:totalTarget.toLocaleString()+" "+actType+"s",c:"#374151"},
        {l:"Achieved (completion date)",v:totalAchieved.toLocaleString()+" "+actType+"s",c:"#16a34a"},
        {l:"Submitted to BSA",v:PRACTITIONERS_DATA.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.submitted,0).toLocaleString(),c:"#2563eb"},
        {l:"Progress",v:achievedPct+"%",c:achievedPct>=50?"#16a34a":"#d97706"},
        {l:"Forecast year-end",v:forecastedYearEnd.toLocaleString()+" "+actType+"s",c:forecastPct>=100?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"},
        {l:"Forecast variance",v:(forecastVariance>=0?"+":"")+forecastVariance.toLocaleString(),c:forecastVariance>=0?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:140,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:17,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:960,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:16}}>

        {/* ── PRACTITIONER PERFORMANCE ── */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>👤 Practitioner Performance — {actType}s</div>
          {PRACTITIONERS_DATA.filter(p=>filterPractitioner==="All"||p.name===filterPractitioner).map((p,i)=>{
            const pct=p.contractTarget?Math.round((p.udas/p.contractTarget)*100):null;
            const forecast=p.contractTarget?Math.round((p.udas/monthsElapsed)*monthsTotal):null;
            const fPct=p.contractTarget&&forecast?Math.round((forecast/p.contractTarget)*100):null;
            return(
            <div key={i} style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:10}}>
                <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:9,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0d9488,#2563eb)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{p.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
                <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{p.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{p.completed} claims completed · avg {p.avgPerClaim} {actType}s/claim</div></div>
                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12,textAlign:"right"}}>
                  {[{l:"Achieved",v:p.udas+" "+actType+"s",c:"#16a34a"},{l:"Submitted",v:p.submitted,c:"#2563eb"},{l:"Progress",v:pct!=null?pct+"%":"N/A",c:pct&&pct>=50?"#16a34a":"#d97706"},{l:"Forecast",v:fPct!=null?fPct+"%":"N/A",c:fPct&&fPct>=100?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}].map(s=>(
                    <div key={s.l}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.l}</div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div></div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
              {p.contractTarget&&<div>
                <div style={{height:8,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:4,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:3}}>
                  <div style={{height:"100%",borderRadius:4,background:pct>=100?"#16a34a":pct>=70?"#0d9488":"#d97706",width:Math.min(100,pct||0)+"%",transition:"width .3s"}}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>
                  <span>{p.udas.toLocaleString()} {actType}s achieved</span>
                  <span>Target: {p.contractTarget.toLocaleString()} {actType}s</span>
                </div>
              </div>}
            </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* ── CONTRACT ANALYTICS ── */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>📄 Contract-Level Analytics</div>
          {CONTRACTS.filter(c=>actType==="UDA"?c.target:c.targetUOA).map((ct,i)=>{
            const target=actType==="UDA"?ct.target:ct.targetUOA;
            const achieved=actType==="UDA"?ct.achieved:ct.achievedUOA||0;
            const pct=target?Math.round((achieved/target)*100):0;
            const forecast=Math.round((achieved/monthsElapsed)*monthsTotal);
            const remaining=target-achieved;
            return(
            <div key={i} style={{padding:"14px 16px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:8}}>
                <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{ct.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{ct.region}</div></div>
                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:16,textAlign:"right"}}>
                  {[{l:"Target",v:target?.toLocaleString()+" "+actType+"s"},{l:"Achieved",v:achieved.toLocaleString(),c:"#16a34a"},{l:"Remaining",v:remaining.toLocaleString(),c:remaining>0?"#dc2626":"#16a34a"},{l:"Forecast",v:forecast.toLocaleString(),c:forecast>=target?"#16a34a":"#d97706"}].map(s=>(
                    <div key={s.l}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.l}</div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:s.c||"#374151",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.v}</div></div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{height:6,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                <div style={{height:"100%",borderRadius:3,background:pct>=100?"#16a34a":pct>=70?"#0d9488":"#d97706",width:Math.min(100,pct)+"%"}}/>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:3,textAlign:"right"}}>{pct}% of annual target · {monthsElapsed} of {monthsTotal} months elapsed</div>
            </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* ── CLAIM STATUS BREAKDOWN ── */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>📊 Claims by Status — {actType}s (click to drill-down)</div>
          <div style={{padding:"16px",display:"flex",gap:8,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {CLAIM_STATUSES.map((s,i)=>(
              <div key={i} onClick={()=>setDrillTarget(drillTarget?.label===s.status?null:{type:"status",label:s.status})}
                style={{flex:1,minWidth:120,padding:"12px",borderRadius:10,border:`2px solid ${drillTarget?.label===s.status?s.c:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:drillTarget?.label===s.status?s.c+"12":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:s.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{s.count}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:s.c,marginBottom:3}}>{s.status}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{s.udas} {actType}s</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {drillTarget&&<div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f0fffe",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700}}>Showing: {drillTarget.label} claims</span>
            <button onClick={()=>setDrillTarget(null)} style={{padding:"3px 10px",border:"1px solid #99f6e4",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488"}}>← Back to report</button>
          </div>}
        </div>

        {/* ── MONTHLY TREND ── */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>📈 Monthly Activity Trendline</div>
          <div style={{padding:"16px",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"flex-end",height:120}}>
            {MONTHLY_TREND.map((m,i)=>{
              const maxVal=Math.max(...MONTHLY_TREND.map(t=>Math.max(t.udas,t.target||0)));
              const barH=Math.round((m.udas/maxVal)*80);
              const tgtH=Math.round(((m.target||0)/maxVal)*80);
              return(
              <div key={i} style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",alignItems:"center",gap:4}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700}}>{m.udas}</div>
                <div style={{width:"100%",display:"flex",gap:2,alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
                  <div style={{flex:1,height:barH,background:"#0d9488",borderRadius:"3px 3px 0 0"}}/>
                  <div style={{flex:1,height:tgtH,background:"#e2e8f0",borderRadius:"3px 3px 0 0"}}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{m.month}</div>
              </div>
              );
            })}
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginLeft:8}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><div style={{width:10,height:10,borderRadius:2,background:"#0d9488"}}/><span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>Achieved</span></div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}><div style={{width:10,height:10,borderRadius:2,background:"#e2e8f0"}}/><span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>Monthly target</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* ── COMPASS/WebEDI Reconciliation ── */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>🔄 Compass / WebEDI Schedule Reconciliation</span>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Importing NHS schedule from Compass…")} style={{padding:"5px 14px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:7,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Import Schedule</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"14px 16px"}}>
            {[
              {period:"Apr 2026",scheduleUDAs:490,claimedUDAs:520,diff:30,status:"Discrepancy"},
              {period:"Mar 2026",scheduleUDAs:412,claimedUDAs:408,diff:-4,status:"Minor variance"},
              {period:"Feb 2026",scheduleUDAs:398,claimedUDAs:398,diff:0,status:"Reconciled"},
            ].map((r,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"8px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b",width:70,flexShrink:0}}>{r.period}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,flex:1}}>Schedule: <strong>{r.scheduleUDAs}</strong> / Claimed: <strong>{r.claimedUDAs}</strong></span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",color:r.diff===0?"#16a34a":r.diff>0?"#d97706":"#dc2626"}}>{r.diff===0?"—":(r.diff>0?"+":"")+r.diff}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:r.diff===0?"#dcfce7":r.diff>10?"#fee2e2":"#fef3c7",color:r.diff===0?"#16a34a":r.diff>10?"#dc2626":"#92400e"}}>{r.status}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

const NHS_CONTRACTS_DATA=[
  {id:"WC001",name:"Dentally GDS",contractNo:"1234567890",startDate:"2021-04-04",endDate:"2022-04-08",udaTarget:2500,uoaTarget:0,location:"Fulham",locationId:"Y03456",active:true},

const PERFORMER_ASSIGNMENTS=[
  {id:"PA001",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",contractId:"WC001",startDate:"2021-04-04",endDate:"2023-03-31",active:true},
  {id:"PA002",practitioner:"Dr. M. Chen",contractId:"WC001",startDate:"2021-04-04",endDate:null,active:true},
  {id:"PA003",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",contractId:"WC002",startDate:"2021-06-11",endDate:"2021-12-31",active:false},
];

function NHSClaimCompliancePage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("invalid");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2600);};
  const [selInvalid,setSelInvalid]=useState(null);
  const [selQueried,setSelQueried]=useState(null);
  const [resolvedClaims,setResolvedClaims]=useState(new Set());
  const [acceptedValues,setAcceptedValues]=useState(new Set());
  const [contracts,setContracts]=useState(NHS_CONTRACTS_DATA);
  const [performerAssignments]=useState(PERFORMER_ASSIGNMENTS);
  const [xmlCheckResult,setXmlCheckResult]=useState(null);
  const [xmlInput,setXmlInput]=useState({patient:"Tom Bright",surname:"Bright",address:"14 Maple Avenue, East Molesey",postcode:"KT8 9AB",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel",contractNo:"NHS-C001"});
  const [filterPractitioner,setFilterPractitioner]=useState("All");
  const [filterCategory,setFilterCategory]=useState("All");
  const [overlapTestDate,setOverlapTestDate]=useState({start:"2026-01-01",end:"2026-03-31"});
  const [overlapResult,setOverlapResult]=useState(null);

  const runXMLCheck=()=>{
    const issues=[];
    if(xmlInput.surname.length<2)issues.push({field:"surname",cat:"validation",msg:"Surname minimum 2 characters required",sev:"error",fix:"Enter full patient surname"});
    if(/[<>&'"\\]/.test(xmlInput.patient))issues.push({field:"patient_name",cat:"xml",msg:"Patient name contains XML-unsafe characters",sev:"error",fix:"Remove <, >, &, ', \" or \\ from patient name"});
    if(!/^[A-Z]{1,2}\d{1,2}\s?\d[A-Z]{2}$/i.test(xmlInput.postcode.replace(/\s/g,"")))issues.push({field:"postcode",cat:"validation",msg:"Postcode format may cause XML rejection",sev:"warning",fix:"Verify postcode format e.g. KT8 9AB"});
    if(!xmlInput.contractNo)issues.push({field:"contract_no",cat:"contract",msg:"Contract number missing",sev:"error",fix:"Assign NHS contract before submission"});
    const specialChars=/[^\x20-\x7E]/.test(xmlInput.patient+xmlInput.address);
    if(specialChars)issues.push({field:"text_fields",cat:"encoding",msg:"Non-printable or non-ASCII characters detected",sev:"error",fix:"Remove hidden characters from patient or address fields"});
    setXmlCheckResult({issues,riskScore:issues.filter(i=>i.sev==="error").length>0?"HIGH":issues.length>0?"MEDIUM":"LOW",timestamp:new Date().toLocaleTimeString("en-GB")});
  };

  const detectOverlap=()=>{
    const start=new Date(overlapTestDate.start);const end=new Date(overlapTestDate.end);
    const conflicts=NHS_INVALID_CLAIMS.filter(c=>{
      const cs=new Date(c.txStart);const ce=new Date(c.txEnd);
      return start<=ce&&end>=cs;
    });
    setOverlapResult({start:overlapTestDate.start,end:overlapTestDate.end,conflicts});
    doToast(conflicts.length>0?`⚠️ ${conflicts.length} overlapping claim(s) detected`:"✓ No overlaps detected for this date range");
  };

  const resolveInvalid=(id)=>{setResolvedClaims(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.add(id);return n;});doToast("✓ Claim marked resolved — resubmission logged");setSelInvalid(null);};
  const acceptValue=(id)=>{setAcceptedValues(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.add(id);return n;});doToast("✓ Awarded value accepted — claim marked completed");};
  const updateLocationId=(cid,lid)=>setContracts(p=>p.map(c=>c.id!==cid?c:{...c,locationId:lid}));

  const invalidVisible=NHS_INVALID_CLAIMS.filter(c=>!resolvedClaims.has(c.id)&&(filterPractitioner==="All"||c.practitioner===filterPractitioner)&&(filterCategory==="All"||c.errors.some(e=>e.category===filterCategory)));
  const queriedVisible=NHS_QUERIED_CLAIMS.filter(c=>!resolvedClaims.has(c.id));
  const contractsMissingLoc=contracts.filter(c=>c.active&&!c.locationId);

  // Continuation eligibility engine
  const [contTestClaim,setContTestClaim]=useState({start:"2026-05-14",band:2,contract:"Dentally GDS",patient:"John Mills"});
  const [contResult,setContResult]=useState(null);
  const checkContinuation=()=>{
    const s=new Date(contTestClaim.start);
    const window2m=new Date(s);window2m.setMonth(window2m.getMonth()-2);
    // Simulated previous claims lookup
    const prev=[
      {ref:"NHS-089",patient:"John Mills",contract:"Dentally GDS",band:3,completed:"2026-03-14",status:"completed"},
      {ref:"NHS-045",patient:"John Mills",contract:"NHS Standard",band:2,completed:"2025-12-01",status:"completed"},
    ];
    const qualifying=prev.filter(p=>p.patient===contTestClaim.patient&&p.contract===contTestClaim.contract&&p.band>=contTestClaim.band&&new Date(p.completed)>=window2m&&new Date(p.completed)<=s);
    setContResult({qualifying,allPrev:prev,window2m:window2m.toISOString().slice(0,10)});
  };

  // SQ indicator state
  const [sqClaims]=useState([
    {id:"SQ001",ref:"NHS-203",patient:"Sarah Chen",sqInd:"REPLACE",originalRef:"NHS-180",originalState:"Acknowledged",eligible:true,status:"draft"},
    {id:"SQ002",ref:"NHS-207",patient:"Tom Bright",sqInd:"REPLACE",originalRef:"NHS-191",originalState:"Invalid Before Processing",eligible:false,status:"draft",reason:"Original claim never accepted — use NEW"},
  ]);

  // PIN validation state
  const [practitioners_pins]=useState([
    {name:"Dr. S. Patel",pin:"4521",status:"active",verified:true,verifiedAt:"01 Jan 2024",gdc:"123456",performerNo:"NI-10234"},
    {name:"Dr. M. Chen",pin:"",status:"missing",verified:false,verifiedAt:null,gdc:"234567",performerNo:"NI-20411"},
    {name:"Amy Grant",pin:"3344",status:"active",verified:false,verifiedAt:null,gdc:"345678",performerNo:"NI-10235"},
  ]);

  const TABS=[
    {id:"invalid",l:"⛔ Invalid Claims",badge:invalidVisible.length},
    {id:"queried",l:"🔍 Queried Claims",badge:queriedVisible.filter(c=>c.resolution===null).length},
    {id:"xml",l:"🔧 XML Diagnostics"},
    {id:"tenure",l:"📅 Contract Tenure"},
    {id:"overlap",l:"⚠️ Overlap Detection"},
    {id:"location",l:"📍 Location IDs",badge:contractsMissingLoc.length},
    {id:"treatment",l:"💊 Treatment Validation"},
    {id:"continuation",l:"🔄 Continuation Validation"},
    {id:"pin",l:"🔑 Performer PIN"},
    {id:"sq",l:"↩ SQ Indicator"},
    {id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"},
  ];

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Claim Compliance Centre</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Invalid · Queried · XML · Tenure · Overlap · Location · Treatment — Pro Dental Connect</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
        {[{c:"#dc2626",v:invalidVisible.length,l:"Invalid"},{c:"#d97706",v:queriedVisible.length,l:"Queried"},{c:"#1d4ed8",v:contractsMissingLoc.length,l:"Missing Loc ID"}].map(k=>(
          k.v>0&&<div key={k.l} style={{padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:k.c+"20",border:`1px solid ${k.c}40`,color:k.c,fontSize:10,fontWeight:800}}>{k.v} {k.l}</div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto",scrollbarWidth:"none"}}>
      {TABS.map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#dc2626":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#dc2626":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap",display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
          {t.l}
          {t.badge>0&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:9,background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff"}}>{t.badge}</span>}
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",minHeight:0}}>

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── INVALID CLAIMS ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="invalid"&&<>
      {/* Left: claim list */}
      <div style={{width:selInvalid?380:undefined,flex:selInvalid?undefined:1,overflowY:"auto",borderRight:selInvalid?"1px solid #e2e8f0":"none"}}>
        {/* Filters */}
        <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
          <select value={filterPractitioner} onChange={e=>setFilterPractitioner(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"4px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,outline:"none"}}>
            <option value="All">All Practitioners</option>
            {[...new Set(NHS_INVALID_CLAIMS.map(c=>c.practitioner))].map(p=><option key={p}>{p}</option>)}
          </select>
          <select value={filterCategory} onChange={e=>setFilterCategory(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"4px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,outline:"none"}}>
            <option value="All">All Error Types</option>
            {Object.entries(NHS_ERROR_CATEGORIES).map(([k,v])=><option key={k} value={k}>{v.label}</option>)}
          </select>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginLeft:"auto"}}>{invalidVisible.length} invalid</span>
        </div>
        {invalidVisible.length===0&&<div style={{padding:32,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12}}>✓ No invalid claims match filters</div>}
        {invalidVisible.map(cl=>{
          const mainErr=cl.errors[0];
          const ec=NHS_ERROR_CATEGORIES[mainErr?.category]||NHS_ERROR_CATEGORIES.validation;
          const isSel=selInvalid===cl.id;
          return(
          <div key={cl.id} onClick={()=>setSelInvalid(isSel?null:cl.id)}
            style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",cursor:"pointer",background:isSel?"#fff5f5":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${isSel?"#dc2626":"transparent"}`}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:5}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.ref}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>INVALID</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:ec.bg,color:ec.c}}>{ec.label}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",fontWeight:600}}>{cl.patient}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.practitioner} · {cl.contract} · {cl.daysOpen}d open</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>Band {cl.band}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{cl.udas} UDA / {cl.charge}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:ec.bg,borderRadius:7,border:`1px solid ${ec.c}30`,fontSize:10,color:ec.c,fontWeight:600}}>
              ⛔ {mainErr?.msg}
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Right: claim detail + resolution */}
      {selInvalid&&(()=>{
        const cl=NHS_INVALID_CLAIMS.find(c=>c.id===selInvalid);
        if(!cl)return null;
        return(
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,background:"#fafafa"}}>
          {/* Claim header — matches Image 1 */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>{cl.ref}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>Band - {cl.band} ({cl.udas} UDA) / {cl.charge}</div>
          </div>

          {/* Submission history banner */}
          {cl.resubmissions>0&&<div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",marginBottom:8,fontSize:11,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>
            {cl.resubmissions} previous submission{cl.resubmissions!==1?"s":""} · Last submitted {cl.submitted}
          </div>}

          {/* Late-submission warning */}
          <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fde68a",marginBottom:12,fontSize:11,color:"#92400e"}}>
            ⚠️ This claim may be rejected as the end date is more than 2 months ago
          </div>

          {/* Status / error box */}
          {cl.errors.map((err,ei)=>{
            const ec=NHS_ERROR_CATEGORIES[err.category]||{c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"};
            return(
            <div key={ei} style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:ec.bg,borderRadius:9,border:`1.5px solid ${ec.c}40`,marginBottom:12}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:ec.c,marginBottom:3}}>Status: Invalid · {err.msg}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.6}}>{err.detail}</div>
              <div style={{marginTop:8,padding:"6px 10px",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>
                <strong>Suggested fix:</strong> {err.suggestion}
              </div>
            </div>
            );
          })}

          {/* Patient info */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:12,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#1d4ed8)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{cl.patient.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.patient}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Treatment Plan #{cl.id.replace("NHC","")}</div></div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Region</div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.region}</div></div>
          </div>

          {/* Treatments table — matches Image 1 */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 60px 80px 60px 100px",padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",gap:8}}>
              <span>Treatment</span><span>Clinical Data Set</span><span>Band</span><span>Free Repair</span><span>Urgent</span><span>Date Completed</span>
            </div>
            {cl.treatments.map((tx,ti)=>(
              <div key={ti} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 60px 80px 60px 100px",padding:"9px 12px",borderTop:ti>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:tx.freeRepair==="Yes"?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11}}>{tx.name}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{tx.cds}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,textAlign:"center"}}>{tx.band}</span>
                <span style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:tx.freeRepair==="Yes"?"#fee2e2":"#f8fafc",color:tx.freeRepair==="Yes"?"#dc2626":"#94a3b8",border:tx.freeRepair==="Yes"?"1px solid #fecaca":"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>{tx.freeRepair}</span>
                </span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{tx.urgent}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{tx.dateCompleted}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Resubmission history */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>Submission History</div>
            {cl.submissionHistory.map((h,hi)=><div key={hi} style={{padding:"6px 12px",borderTop:hi>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{h}</div>)}
          </div>

          {/* Actions */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening treatment plan for amendment…")} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>✏ Amend Treatment Plan</button>
            <button onClick={()=>resolveInvalid(cl.id)} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>↻ Resubmit & Resolve</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })()}
    </>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── QUERIED CLAIMS ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="queried"&&<>
      <div style={{width:selQueried?380:undefined,flex:selQueried?undefined:1,overflowY:"auto",borderRight:selQueried?"1px solid #e2e8f0":"none"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
          <span>{queriedVisible.length} QUERIED CLAIMS</span>
          <span style={{color:queriedVisible.filter(c=>c.lateSubmission).length>0?"#dc2626":"#94a3b8"}}>
            {queriedVisible.filter(c=>c.lateSubmission).length} late submissions
          </span>
        </div>
        {queriedVisible.map(cl=>{
          const isSel=selQueried===cl.id;
          const isAccepted=acceptedValues.has(cl.id);
          return(
          <div key={cl.id} onClick={()=>setSelQueried(isSel?null:cl.id)}
            style={{padding:"12px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",cursor:"pointer",background:isSel?"#fff9f0":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${isSel?"#d97706":"transparent"}`}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:6}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.ref}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#d97706"}}>QUERIED</span>
                  {cl.lateSubmission&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>⚠ LATE</span>}
                  {isAccepted&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Accepted</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{cl.patient} · {cl.practitioner}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.daysInQuery} days in query · {cl.queryCategory.replace(/_/g," ")}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{cl.requestedCharge}</div>
                {cl.awardedCharge&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#d97706",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>Awarded: {cl.awardedCharge}</div>}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"5px 10px",background:"#fef9c3",borderRadius:6,border:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:10,color:"#92400e"}}>💬 {cl.nhsComment}</div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {selQueried&&(()=>{
        const cl=NHS_QUERIED_CLAIMS.find(c=>c.id===selQueried);
        if(!cl)return null;
        const isAccepted=acceptedValues.has(cl.id);
        return(
        <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20,background:"#fafafa"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>{cl.ref}</div>
            <button onClick={()=>setSelQueried(null)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>✕ Close</button>
          </div>

          {/* Late submission banner */}
          {cl.lateSubmission&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #fde68a",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:2}}>⚠️ Late Submission Risk</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>This claim may be rejected as the end date is more than 2 months ago. {cl.nhsComment}</div>
          </div>}

          {/* NHS comment */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>NHSBSA Response</div>
            <div style={{padding:"12px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#d97706",marginBottom:4}}>{cl.queryCategory.replace(/_/g," ").toUpperCase()}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.6}}>{cl.queryReason}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginTop:6,fontStyle:"italic"}}>NHS Comment: {cl.nhsComment}</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Treatment plan key dates — matches Image 6 tooltip */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Treatment Plan Key Dates</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
              {[{l:"Start Date",v:cl.txStart},{l:"End Date",v:cl.txEnd},{l:"Submitted",v:cl.submitted}].map((f,i)=>(
                <div key={i} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:i<2?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{f.v}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Awarded value section */}
          {cl.awardedCharge&&!isAccepted&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1.5px solid #fde68a",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fef9c3",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#92400e"}}>💷 NHS-Awarded Value Differs</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Requested</div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{cl.requestedCharge}</div></div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>NHS Awarded</div><div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#d97706"}}>{cl.awardedCharge}</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>}
          {isAccepted&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#dcfce7",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",marginBottom:12,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Awarded value accepted — claim marked completed</div>}

          {/* Resolution actions */}
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Reopening treatment plan for amendment…")} style={{padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>✏ Amend & Resubmit</button>
            {cl.awardedCharge&&!isAccepted&&<button onClick={()=>acceptValue(cl.id)} style={{padding:"9px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Accept Awarded Value</button>}
            {cl.lateSubmission&&<button onClick={()=>{resolveInvalid(cl.id);doToast("✓ Late claim settled — removed from queue, audit logged");}} style={{padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626"}}>🗑 Settle Without Value</button>}
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Query marked resolved")} style={{padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Mark Resolved</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })()}
    </>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── XML DIAGNOSTICS ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="xml"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fecaca",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:10}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:18}}>🔧</span>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626"}}>NHS Invalid XML Prevention Engine</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>Run a pre-submission XML check to detect malformed data, invalid characters, missing fields, and encoding issues before they cause NHS rejection.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* XML Check form */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Test Claim Data — XML Pre-Validation</div>
          <div style={{padding:16}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:12}}>
              {[{l:"Patient Full Name",k:"patient",ph:"Full name"},{l:"Patient Surname",k:"surname",ph:"Surname (min 2 chars)"},{l:"Address",k:"address",ph:"Street address"},{l:"Postcode",k:"postcode",ph:"e.g. KT8 9AB"},{l:"Practitioner",k:"practitioner",ph:"Dr. Name"},{l:"Contract Number",k:"contractNo",ph:"NHS-CXXXXX"}].map(f=>(
                <div key={f.k}>
                  <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
                  <input value={xmlInput[f.k]} onChange={e=>setXmlInput(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph}
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <button onClick={runXMLCheck} style={{padding:"9px 24px",background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>⚡ Run XML Validation Check</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* XML Check results */}
        {xmlCheckResult&&<div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12,padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="HIGH"?"#dc2626":xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="MEDIUM"?"#d97706":"#16a34a"}`}}>
