            <div style={{width:44,height:44,borderRadius:10,background:xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="HIGH"?"#fee2e2":xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="MEDIUM"?"#fef3c7":"#dcfce7",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:18,flexShrink:0}}>
              {xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="HIGH"?"🔴":xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="MEDIUM"?"🟡":"🟢"}
            </div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="HIGH"?"#dc2626":xmlCheckResult.riskScore==="MEDIUM"?"#d97706":"#16a34a"}}>
                XML Risk Score: {xmlCheckResult.riskScore}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{xmlCheckResult.issues.length} issue{xmlCheckResult.issues.length!==1?"s":""} detected · Checked at {xmlCheckResult.timestamp}</div>
            </div>
            {xmlCheckResult.issues.length===0&&<span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Safe to submit</span>}
          </div>
          {xmlCheckResult.issues.map((iss,i)=>{
            const ec=NHS_ERROR_CATEGORIES[iss.cat]||{c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2"};
            return(
            <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:`1.5px solid ${ec.c}40`,padding:"12px 14px",marginBottom:8}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:5}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:12}}>{iss.sev==="error"?"⛔":"⚠️"}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:ec.c}}>
                  {iss.field.toUpperCase().replace(/_/g," ")} — {iss.msg}
                </span>
                <span style={{marginLeft:"auto",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:ec.bg,color:ec.c}}>{ec.label}</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151",padding:"5px 10px",background:ec.bg,borderRadius:6}}>
                <strong>Fix:</strong> {iss.fix}
              </div>
            </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── CONTRACT TENURE ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="tenure"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:16}}>
          {/* NHS Contracts — matches Image 4/8 */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>NHS Contracts — Date Ranges</span>
              <button onClick={()=>doToast("New contract form opened")} style={{padding:"4px 12px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:6,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>+ New</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 90px 90px 60px",padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
              <span>Name / Contract #</span><span>Start Date</span><span>End Date</span><span>Status</span>
            </div>
            {contracts.map((ct,i)=>{
              const now=new Date();const end=new Date(ct.endDate);const daysLeft=Math.ceil((end-now)/(1000*86400));
              const expiringSoon=ct.active&&daysLeft>=0&&daysLeft<30;
              const expired=ct.active&&daysLeft<0;
              return(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 90px 90px 60px",padding:"10px 12px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:expired?"#fff5f5":expiringSoon?"#fffbf7":"#fff"}}>
                <div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:1}}>{ct.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8"}}>{ct.contractNo} · {ct.location}</div>
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{ct.startDate}</span>
                <div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:expired?"#dc2626":expiringSoon?"#d97706":"#64748b"}}>{ct.endDate}</span>
                  {expiringSoon&&<div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#d97706",fontWeight:700}}>⚠ {daysLeft}d left</div>}
                  {expired&&<div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>EXPIRED</div>}
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:ct.active?"#dcfce7":"#f1f5f9",color:ct.active?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{ct.active?"Active":"Inactive"}</span>
              </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Performer Assignments */}
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Performer Contract Assignments</div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 90px 60px",padding:"6px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
              <span>Practitioner</span><span>Contract</span><span>Period</span><span>Status</span>
            </div>
            {performerAssignments.map((pa,i)=>{
              const ct=contracts.find(c=>c.id===pa.contractId);
              const now=new Date();const end=pa.endDate?new Date(pa.endDate):null;
              const expired=end&&end<now&&!pa.active;
              return(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 90px 60px",padding:"10px 12px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:expired?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{pa.practitioner}</span>
                <div><div style={{fontSize:10}}>{ct?.name||pa.contractId}</div><div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#94a3b8",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{ct?.contractNo}</div></div>
                <div><div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{pa.startDate}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:expired?"#dc2626":"#64748b"}}>{pa.endDate||"Open"}</div></div>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:pa.active?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:pa.active?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{pa.active?"Active":"Expired"}</span>
              </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Tenure validation engine */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Tenure Validation Rules</div>
          {[
            {rule:"Treatment completion date must fall within contract active dates",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
            {rule:"Treatment completion date must fall within practitioner assignment period",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
            {rule:"Contract must be active at time of claim submission",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
            {rule:"Practitioner must be assigned to selected contract",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
            {rule:"Expired contracts flagged 30 days before end date",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
            {rule:"Expired performer assignments blocked from new claims",check:"✓",c:"#16a34a"},
          ].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{color:r.c,fontWeight:800}}>{r.check}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r.rule}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── OVERLAP DETECTION ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="overlap"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Overlap Detection — Test Claim Date Range</div>
          <div style={{padding:16}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Claim Start Date</label><input type="date" value={overlapTestDate.start} onChange={e=>setOverlapTestDate(p=>({...p,start:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"6px 9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none"}}/></div>
              <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Claim End Date</label><input type="date" value={overlapTestDate.end} onChange={e=>setOverlapTestDate(p=>({...p,end:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"6px 9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none"}}/></div>
              <div style={{paddingTop:16}}><button onClick={detectOverlap} style={{padding:"8px 20px",background:"#7c3aed",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Check Overlaps</button></div>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Default start date: date of first completed treatment item · Default end date: date of first submission</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {overlapResult&&<div>
          {overlapResult.conflicts.length===0
            ?<div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:"#dcfce7",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ No overlapping claims detected for {overlapResult.start} — {overlapResult.end}</div>
            :<div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:10,border:"1.5px solid #fecaca",marginBottom:10,fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626"}}>
                ⚠️ This claim overlaps with {overlapResult.conflicts.length} existing claim{overlapResult.conflicts.length!==1?"s":""}
              </div>
              {overlapResult.conflicts.map((cl,i)=>(
                <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:"1.5px solid #fecaca",padding:"10px 14px",marginBottom:8}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:4}}>{cl.ref} — {cl.patient}</div>
                  <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>
                    <div><div style={{fontWeight:700}}>Date Range</div><div>{cl.txStart} → {cl.txEnd}</div></div>
                    <div><div style={{fontWeight:700}}>Contract</div><div>{cl.contract}</div></div>
                    <div><div style={{fontWeight:700}}>Status</div><div style={{color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>{cl.status.toUpperCase()}</div></div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{marginTop:8,padding:"6px 10px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,color:"#92400e"}}>
                    📋 Guidance: Withdraw the previous claim first, then submit this replacement claim after the withdrawal has processed.
                  </div>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,marginTop:8}}>
                    <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening claim "+cl.ref)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488"}}>Open Claim</button>
                    <button onClick={()=>doToast("Withdrawal workflow started")} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:6,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:700}}>Withdraw Previous</button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>}
        </div>}

        {/* Overlap rules */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Duplicate & Overlap Detection Rules</div>
          {["Checks same patient · same contract · same performer · overlapping dates","Blocks submission when valid (non-withdrawn) overlap detected","Default start: first completed treatment item date","Default end: first claim submission date (editable before submit)","Warns when edited dates create overlap or invalid range","Does not auto-withdraw — user must explicitly initiate withdrawal","Withdrawn claim overlap is permitted — clean submission allowed"].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── LOCATION IDs ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="location"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        {contractsMissingLoc.length>0&&<div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fee2e2",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #fecaca",marginBottom:14,fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#dc2626"}}>
          ⛔ {contractsMissingLoc.length} active contract{contractsMissingLoc.length!==1?"s":""} missing NHS Location ID — claims will be rejected at submission
        </div>}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 1fr 80px 100px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
            <span>Contract Name</span><span>Contract #</span><span>Location</span><span>Status</span><span>Location ID</span>
          </div>
          {contracts.map((ct,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 1fr 80px 100px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:ct.active&&!ct.locationId?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{ct.name}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{ct.contractNo}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{ct.location}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:ct.active?"#dcfce7":"#f1f5f9",color:ct.active?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{ct.active?"Active":"Inactive"}</span>
              <div>
                <input value={ct.locationId} onChange={e=>updateLocationId(ct.id,e.target.value)} placeholder={ct.active?"Required":"N/A"}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"4px 7px",border:`1px solid ${ct.active&&!ct.locationId?"#dc2626":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:6,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box",background:ct.active&&!ct.locationId?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}/>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Location IDs saved — audit logged")} style={{marginTop:12,padding:"9px 24px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save Location IDs</button>

        {/* Validation rules */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Location ID Validation Rules</div>
          {["Contract must have a valid NHS Location ID before claim submission","Location ID must match configured contract location","Submission blocked if Location ID blank or invalid","Quick-link from claim error to contract settings for correction","All Location ID changes audit-logged"].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#16a34a"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── TREATMENT VALIDATION ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {tab==="treatment"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>NHS Significant Treatment Validator</div>
          <div style={{padding:16}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:14}}>
              {[
                {l:"Treatment is a filling",v:"Checkbox — marks for NHS filling validation (Image 9 reference)",icon:"☑"},
                {l:"NHS UDA Band",v:"Band 1 / Band 2 / Band 3 / Band 0 — auto-calculated by treatment category",icon:"🏷"},
                {l:"NHS Treatment Category",v:"Examination / Periodontal / Fillings / Endodontic / Surgical / etc.",icon:"📋"},
              ].map((f,i)=>(
                <div key={i} style={{padding:"12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:16,marginBottom:4}}>{f.icon}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.5}}>{f.v}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Validation rules */}
        {[
          {title:"✓ Valid NHS Treatment",checks:["Treatment marked as NHS","Valid NHS Treatment Category configured","Valid NHS Band assigned","NHS-claimable flag set","Region-compatible"]},
          {title:"⛔ Blocked — No Significant Treatment",checks:["All treatments marked Private","No NHS Treatment Category configured","NHS Band missing","CDS mapping absent","Treatment plan payment plan = NHS but no NHS items"]},
          {title:"⚠ Warnings Generated",checks:["Payment plan = NHS but treatment = Private mismatch","NHS category configured but band missing","Treatment claimable flag not set","Treatment in Other category (deprecated)"]},
        ].map((v,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${v.title.startsWith("✓")?"#bbf7d0":v.title.startsWith("⛔")?"#fecaca":"#fde68a"}`,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:10}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:v.title.startsWith("✓")?"#f0fdf4":v.title.startsWith("⛔")?"#fff5f5":"#fef9c3",borderBottom:`1px solid ${v.title.startsWith("✓")?"#bbf7d0":v.title.startsWith("⛔")?"#fecaca":"#fde68a"}`,fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:v.title.startsWith("✓")?"#16a34a":v.title.startsWith("⛔")?"#dc2626":"#92400e"}}>{v.title}</div>
            {v.checks.map((r,ri)=>(
              <div key={ri} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"7px 14px",borderTop:ri>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>·</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
            ))}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── REPORTING ── */}
    {/* ══════════════════════════════════════════ */}
    {/* ── CONTINUATION VALIDATION ── */}
    {tab==="continuation"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#1d4ed8",marginBottom:3}}>🔄 Continuation of Treatment — 2-Month Eligibility Engine</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>Validates continuation claims have a qualifying previous claim within 2 calendar months on the same contract at same or higher band. Matching Image 1 — Continuation: No/Yes dropdown.</div>
        </div>

        {/* Test form */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Test Continuation Eligibility</div>
          <div style={{padding:16}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:12}}>
              {[{l:"Patient",k:"patient",ph:"Patient name"},{l:"Contract",k:"contract",ph:"NHS Contract"},{l:"Claim Start Date",k:"start",ph:"YYYY-MM-DD",type:"date"},{l:"Claim Band",k:"band",ph:"1/2/3",type:"number"}].map(f=>(
                <div key={f.k}>
                  <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
                  <input type={f.type||"text"} value={contTestClaim[f.k]} onChange={e=>setContTestClaim(p=>({...p,[f.k]:f.type==="number"?parseInt(e.target.value)||1:e.target.value}))}
                    style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <button onClick={checkContinuation} style={{padding:"8px 20px",background:"#1d4ed8",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Check Continuation Eligibility</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Results */}
        {contResult&&<div>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",borderRadius:10,border:`1.5px solid ${contResult.qualifying.length>0?"#bbf7d0":"#fecaca"}`,background:contResult.qualifying.length>0?"#f0fdf4":"#fff5f5",marginBottom:12,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:18}}>{contResult.qualifying.length>0?"✅":"⛔"}</span>
            <div>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:contResult.qualifying.length>0?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>
                {contResult.qualifying.length>0?`✓ Continuation valid — ${contResult.qualifying.length} qualifying claim(s) found`:"No qualifying continuation claim found"}
              </div>
              {contResult.qualifying.length===0&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151",marginTop:2}}>
                This claim is marked as Continuation of Treatment, but no qualifying same-contract, same-or-higher-band claim was found within 2 calendar months (window: {contResult.window2m} → {contTestClaim.start}).
              </div>}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"80px 1fr 80px 80px 100px 100px",padding:"8px 12px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
              <span>Ref</span><span>Contract</span><span>Band</span><span>Completed</span><span>In Window</span><span>Qualifies</span>
            </div>
            {contResult.allPrev.map((p,i)=>{
              const s=new Date(contTestClaim.start);const w=new Date(contResult.window2m);
              const comp=new Date(p.completed);
              const inWindow=comp>=w&&comp<=s;
              const sameCt=p.contract===contTestClaim.contract;
              const bandOk=p.band>=contTestClaim.band;
              const qualifies=inWindow&&sameCt&&bandOk;
              return(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"80px 1fr 80px 80px 100px 100px",padding:"9px 12px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:qualifies?"#f0fdf4":"#fff"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{p.ref}</span>
                <div><span style={{fontSize:11,color:sameCt?"#374151":"#dc2626",fontWeight:sameCt?400:700}}>{p.contract}</span>{!sameCt&&<div style={{fontSize:8,color:"#dc2626"}}>Contract mismatch</div>}</div>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:bandOk?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>Band {p.band}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{p.completed}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:inWindow?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:inWindow?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{inWindow?"In window":"Outside"}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:qualifies?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:qualifies?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{qualifies?"✓ Qualifies":"✗ Does not"}</span>
              </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {contResult.qualifying.length===0&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:12}}>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Continuation marker removed")} style={{padding:"8px 16px",background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Remove Continuation Marker</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Opening previous claims…")} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>View Previous Claims</button>
            <button onClick={()=>doToast("Claim saved as draft")} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Save Draft</button>
          </div>}
        </div>}

        {/* Rules reference */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Continuation Validation Rules</div>
          {["Previous claim must be on same NHS contract","Previous claim must be within 2 calendar months before continuation start","Continuation band must be same or lower than previous claim band (Band 3 → supports 1/2/3, Band 2 → 1/2, Band 1 → 1 only)","Previous claim must be completed/successfully submitted","Claims on different contracts do not qualify as continuation references"].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── PERFORMER PIN VALIDATION ── */}
    {tab==="pin"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #fde68a",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#92400e",marginBottom:3}}>🔑 Performer PIN Validation — matching Image 2 (Practitioner edit screen)</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>NHS claim submission is blocked if the claiming practitioner has no valid Performer PIN. PINs are validated before every submission and can be marked as Compass-verified.</div>
        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 80px 80px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
            <span>Practitioner</span><span>GDC No</span><span>Performer #</span><span>PIN</span><span>Status</span><span>Compass</span>
          </div>
          {practitioners_pins.map((p,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 80px 80px 80px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:!p.pin?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{p.name}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{p.gdc}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{p.performerNo}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:p.pin?"#374151":"#dc2626"}}>{p.pin?("·".repeat(p.pin.length)):"Missing"}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:{active:"#dcfce7",missing:"#fee2e2"}[p.status]||"#f1f5f9",color:{active:"#16a34a",missing:"#dc2626"}[p.status]||"#94a3b8"}}>{p.status}</span>
              <div style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
                {p.verified?<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Verified</span>
                :<button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ PIN marked as Compass-verified for "+p.name)} style={{padding:"3px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488"}}>Verify</button>}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>PIN Validation Rules</div>
          {["Practitioner must have Performer PIN before NHS claim submission","PIN format validated before submission","PIN must be active/enabled — disabled PINs block submission","Missing PIN shows ⚠ warning on claim form with block","Compass-verified PIN marked with timestamp and user","Invalid PIN NHS response → diagnostic shown with edit-practitioner quick link"].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:"#0d9488"}}>✓</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── SQ INDICATOR ── */}
    {tab==="sq"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#f5f3ff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #ddd6fe",padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#7c3aed",marginBottom:3}}>↩ NHS SQ Indicator — NEW vs REPLACE Logic</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>When resubmitting a claim, the system automatically determines whether it should be submitted as NEW or REPLACE based on whether NHS previously acknowledged the original claim.</div>
        </div>

        {sqClaims.map((cl,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${cl.eligible?"#bbf7d0":"#fecaca"}`,marginBottom:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:cl.eligible?"#f0fdf4":"#fff5f5",borderBottom:`1px solid ${cl.eligible?"#bbf7d0":"#fecaca"}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{cl.ref}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:cl.sqInd==="REPLACE"?"#f5f3ff":"#dbeafe",color:cl.sqInd==="REPLACE"?"#7c3aed":"#1d4ed8"}}>SQ: {cl.sqInd}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:cl.eligible?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:cl.eligible?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{cl.eligible?"✓ REPLACE eligible":"⛔ Use NEW instead"}</span>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{cl.patient} · Original: {cl.originalRef} · Original state: {cl.originalState}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
              {cl.eligible
                ?<div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>✓ Original claim ({cl.originalRef}) was <strong>acknowledged by NHSBSA</strong>. REPLACE submission is valid.</div>
                :<div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:6}}>⛔ Original claim ({cl.originalRef}) — "{cl.originalState}"</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151",marginBottom:8}}>{cl.reason}. Submitting as REPLACE will generate: "SQ Ind claim where original has already been deleted or is in error."</div>
                  <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Claim converted to NEW submission — SQ Ind updated")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:"#7c3aed",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Convert to NEW Submission</button>
                </div>}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:8}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>SQ Indicator Decision Logic</div>
          {[{rule:"Use REPLACE if: original claim was Acknowledged/Accepted by NHSBSA",c:"#16a34a"},{rule:"Use NEW if: original claim was Invalid Before Processing",c:"#dc2626"},{rule:"Use NEW if: original claim was Rejected Before Processing",c:"#dc2626"},{rule:"Use NEW if: NHS never acknowledged the original claim",c:"#dc2626"},{rule:"Auto-detection based on claims.nhs_submission_state field",c:"#0d9488"},{rule:"Manual override available for admin users with audit log",c:"#7c3aed"}].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}><span style={{color:r.c,fontWeight:800}}>·</span><span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{r.rule}</span></div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

        {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
          {[
            {l:"Invalid claims",v:NHS_INVALID_CLAIMS.length,c:"#dc2626"},
            {l:"Queried claims",v:NHS_QUERIED_CLAIMS.length,c:"#d97706"},
            {l:"Resolved this session",v:resolvedClaims.size,c:"#16a34a"},
            {l:"XML validation failures",v:2,c:"#7c3aed"},
            {l:"Contracts missing Location ID",v:contractsMissingLoc.length,c:"#dc2626"},
            {l:"Expired performer assignments",v:performerAssignments.filter(p=>!p.active).length,c:"#d97706"},
            {l:"Late submission claims",v:NHS_QUERIED_CLAIMS.filter(c=>c.lateSubmission).length,c:"#dc2626"},
            {l:"Accepted awarded values",v:acceptedValues.size,c:"#16a34a"},
            {l:"Most common error",v:"Free Repair/XML",c:"#374151"},
          ].map((r,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"14px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:19,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4,lineHeight:1.4}}>{r.l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS WALES CARE PACKAGE ENGINE
// Matches Images 6/7 (full CP summary) + Images 10/11 (transitional)
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const WALES_CP_RULES=[
  {pkgId:"CP_CROWN",name:"Crown, Bridge, Inlay, Onlay and Veneer Care Package",txCodes:["350","351","352","353","380","381","382","W9313"],patientCharge:140.44,practiceFee:280.88,color:"#1d4ed8",bg:"#eff6ff",border:"#bfdbfe"},
  {pkgId:"CP_SIMPLE_REST",name:"Simple Restorative Care Package",txCodes:["200","201","202","203","210","211","212","213","214","220","221"],patientCharge:36.03,practiceFee:72.06,color:"#16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#bbf7d0"},
  {pkgId:"CP_GUAR_PERM",name:"Guaranteed Permanent Restorations Care Package",txCodes:["222","226","227"],patientCharge:0,practiceFee:0,color:"#94a3b8",bg:"#f8fafc",border:"#e2e8f0"},
  {pkgId:"CP_EXAM",name:"Assessment and Prevention Care Package",txCodes:["100","102","103","150","151","155","156","158"],patientCharge:14.70,practiceFee:47.00,color:"#7c3aed",bg:"#f5f3ff",border:"#ddd6fe"},
  {pkgId:"CP_ENDO",name:"Endodontic Care Package",txCodes:["250","251","252","253","W9304","W9305"],patientCharge:62.10,practiceFee:124.20,color:"#0891b2",bg:"#ecfeff",border:"#a5f3fc"},
  {pkgId:"CP_EXTRACT",name:"Surgical/Extraction Care Package",txCodes:["300","301","302"],patientCharge:47.00,practiceFee:94.00,color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",border:"#fecaca"},
  {pkgId:"CP_PROS",name:"Prosthetics Care Package",txCodes:["400","401","402","403","W9307","W9308"],patientCharge:203.00,practiceFee:203.00,color:"#d97706",bg:"#fef3c7",border:"#fde68a"},
  {pkgId:"CP_URGENT",name:"Urgent Care Package",txCodes:["600","601","602","W9311","W9312","W9314"],patientCharge:0,practiceFee:14.70,color:"#dc2626",bg:"#fee2e2",border:"#fecaca"},
];

const WARRANTY_TYPES=["N/A","Permanent Restorations","Root Fillings","Crowns, Bridges, Inlays, Onlays and Veneers"];
const WARRANTY_PERIODS=["N/A","12 months","24 months"];
const TRANSITION_DATE=new Date("2026-04-01");

function calcPackages(items,labFees){
  const pkgMap={};
  items.forEach(item=>{
    WALES_CP_RULES.forEach(rule=>{
      if(rule.txCodes.some(c=>item.code.startsWith(c))){
        if(!pkgMap[rule.pkgId])pkgMap[rule.pkgId]={...rule,items:[],labs:[]};
        pkgMap[rule.pkgId].items.push(item);
      }
    });
  });
  (labFees||[]).forEach(lab=>{
    Object.values(pkgMap).forEach(pkg=>{
      if(pkg.items.some(i=>i.id===lab.txId))pkg.labs.push(lab);
    });
  });
  return Object.values(pkgMap);
}

function NHSWalesCPEnginePage(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [urgentReferral,setUrgentReferral]=useState(false);
  const [expandedPkgs,setExpandedPkgs]=useState(new Set(["CP_CROWN"]));
  const togglePkg=id=>setExpandedPkgs(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.has(id)?n.delete(id):n.add(id);return n;});
  const [showCPDetail,setShowCPDetail]=useState(null);

  // Sample treatment plan (started before April 2026 → transitional)
  const [plan,setPlan]=useState({
    id:"TP-WALES-001",name:"NHS Wales — Crown & Fillings",
    startDate:"2026-03-18",region:"Wales",
    exemption:null,
    isUrgentReferral:false,
    isContinuation:false,
    treatmentOnReferral:false,
    reg11:"None",
    items:[
      {id:"I1",code:"350",l:"Porcelain Crown",tooth:"LR3",date:"Mon 16 Mar 26",nhs:true,done:true,warranty:"N/A",warrantyPeriod:"N/A"},
      {id:"I2",code:"210",l:"Amalgam Filling",tooth:"LR4-O",date:"Mon 16 Mar 26",nhs:true,done:true,warranty:"N/A",warrantyPeriod:"N/A"},
      {id:"I3",code:"210",l:"Amalgam Filling",tooth:"UR3-I",date:"Mon 16 Mar 26",nhs:true,done:true,warranty:"N/A",warrantyPeriod:"N/A"},
    ],
    labFees:[
      {id:"L1",txId:"I1",desc:"Porcelain Crown",lab:"East Molesey Lab",type:"NHS",amount:100.00,completed:true},
    ],
  });

  const [expandedItems,setExpandedItems]=useState(new Set());
  const toggleItem=id=>setExpandedItems(p=>{const n=new Set(p);n.has(id)?n.delete(id):n.add(id);return n;});

  const packages=calcPackages(plan.items,plan.labFees);
  const isTransitional=new Date(plan.startDate)<TRANSITION_DATE;
  const totalPatient=packages.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.patientCharge,0);
  const totalPractice=packages.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.practiceFee,0);
  const totalLabs=plan.labFees.filter(l=>l.type==="NHS"&&l.completed).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.amount,0);

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 NHS Wales — Care Package Engine</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Real-time auto-calculation · Lab fee integration · Warranty · Urgent referral · Transitional pricing</div>
      </div>
      <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ NHS Wales Care Package claim submitted")} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#22c55e",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Submit Care Package Claim</button>
    </div>

    {/* Banners — matches Images 6/7 */}
    {!plan.exemption&&<div style={{padding:"9px 20px",background:"#ecfeff",borderBottom:"1px solid #a5f3fc",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#0891b2",flexShrink:0}}>
      <span style={{fontSize:14}}>ℹ️</span>No NHS exemption associated with this course of treatment
    </div>}
    <div style={{padding:"9px 20px",background:"#fef9c3",borderBottom:"1px solid #fde68a",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <span style={{fontSize:14}}>⚠️</span>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#92400e",flex:1}}>New Urgent Referral?</span>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#92400e"}}>No</span>
        <button onClick={()=>{setUrgentReferral(v=>!v);setPlan(p=>({...p,isUrgentReferral:!p.isUrgentReferral}));doToast(urgentReferral?"DAP Urgent Referral removed":"✓ DAP Urgent Referral — Urgent Care Package generated");}}
          style={{width:40,height:22,borderRadius:11,border:"none",background:urgentReferral?"#dc2626":"#d1d5db",cursor:"pointer",position:"relative",padding:0,transition:"background .2s",flexShrink:0}}>
          <div style={{width:16,height:16,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:3,left:urgentReferral?21:3,transition:"left .2s",boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}/>
        </button>
        <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#92400e"}}>Yes</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Claim settings — matches Image 1/3 */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"10px 20px",display:"flex",gap:20,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
      <label style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,cursor:"pointer"}}>
        <span style={{color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Continuation:</span>
        <select value={plan.isContinuation?"Yes":"No"} onChange={e=>setPlan(p=>({...p,isContinuation:e.target.value==="Yes"}))} style={{padding:"3px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
          <option>No</option><option>Yes</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,cursor:"pointer"}}>
        <span style={{color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Treatment on Referral:</span>
        <select value={plan.treatmentOnReferral?"Yes":"No"} onChange={e=>setPlan(p=>({...p,treatmentOnReferral:e.target.value==="Yes"}))} style={{padding:"3px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
          <option>No</option><option>Yes</option>
        </select>
      </label>
      <label style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11}}>
        <span style={{color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>Regulation 11:</span>
        <select value={plan.reg11} onChange={e=>setPlan(p=>({...p,reg11:e.target.value}))} style={{padding:"3px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
          {["None","10%","20%","30%","50%"].map(v=><option key={v}>{v}</option>)}
        </select>
      </label>
      <div style={{marginLeft:"auto",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Plan: {plan.name} · Started: {plan.startDate}</div>
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1000}}>

        {/* Appointment 1 — matches Images 6/7 */}
        <div style={{background:"#dbeafe22",border:"2px solid #bfdbfe",borderRadius:12,marginBottom:8,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"rgba(219,234,254,.5)",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:24,height:24,borderRadius:6,background:"#1d4ed8",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:11,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>1</div>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>Appt. 1 · Hide {plan.items.filter(i=>i.done).length} completed treatments</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Not yet booked</span>
          </div>
          {plan.items.map((item,ii)=>(
            <div key={item.id} style={{borderTop:ii>0?"1px solid rgba(191,219,254,.5)":"none"}}>
              <div onClick={()=>toggleItem(item.id)} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"8px 14px",alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer",background:expandedItems.has(item.id)?"rgba(219,234,254,.3)":"transparent"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",width:8}}>{expandedItems.has(item.id)?"▼":"▶"}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",width:110,flexShrink:0}}>{item.date}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",width:60,fontWeight:600,flexShrink:0}}>{item.tooth}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flex:1}}>{item.l}</span>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,color:"#22c55e"}}>FR</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>NHS</span>
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",width:40,textAlign:"right"}}>0 min</span>
                <div style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:4,border:`1.5px solid ${item.done?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:item.done?"#0d9488":"#fff",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>{item.done&&<span style={{fontSize:8,color:"#fff"}}>✓</span>}</div>
              </div>
              {/* Expanded item — matches Image 5 (Under Warranty dropdown) */}
              {expandedItems.has(item.id)&&<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"220px 1fr",gap:0,borderTop:"1px solid rgba(191,219,254,.3)"}}>
                <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:"1px solid rgba(191,219,254,.3)"}}>
                  {[
                    {l:"Duration",v:<span style={{fontSize:11}}>0 <span style={{color:"#94a3b8"}}>minutes</span></span>},
                    {l:"Completed on",v:<span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>—</span>},
                    {l:"Payment plan",v:<select style={{padding:"3px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}><option>NHS</option><option>Private</option></select>},
                    {l:"Practitioner *",v:<select style={{padding:"3px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}><option>Dr. S. Patel</option></select>},
                    {l:"Referrer",v:<select style={{padding:"3px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}><option>Dr. S. Patel</option></select>},
                    {l:"Under Warranty",v:(
                      <select value={item.warranty} onChange={e=>{setPlan(p=>({...p,items:p.items.map(it=>it.id!==item.id?it:{...it,warranty:e.target.value})}));doToast("Warranty type updated");}}
                        style={{padding:"3px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                        {WARRANTY_TYPES.map(w=><option key={w}>{w}</option>)}
                      </select>
                    )},
                    {l:"Warranty Period",v:(
                      <select value={item.warrantyPeriod} onChange={e=>setPlan(p=>({...p,items:p.items.map(it=>it.id!==item.id?it:{...it,warrantyPeriod:e.target.value})}))}
                        style={{padding:"3px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}
                        disabled={item.warranty==="N/A"}>
                        {WARRANTY_PERIODS.map(w=><option key={w}>{w}</option>)}
                      </select>
                    )},
                  ].map((f,fi)=>(
                    <div key={fi} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",padding:"4px 0",borderTop:fi>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8}}>
                      <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",flexShrink:0}}>{f.l}</span>
                      <span>{f.v}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                {/* Labs tab — matches Image 5 */}
                <div style={{padding:"10px 14px"}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:10}}>
                    {["Notes","Labs"].map(t=><span key={t} style={{padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:5,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:10,cursor:"pointer",background:t==="Labs"?"#fff":"transparent",fontWeight:t==="Labs"?700:400}}>{t}</span>)}
                  </div>
                  {plan.labFees.filter(l=>l.txId===item.id).map((lab,li)=>(
                    <div key={li} style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:8}}>
                      <select value={lab.type==="NHS"?"NHS - NHS":"Private - Private"} style={{flex:1,padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #1d4ed8",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                        <option>NHS - NHS</option>
                        <option>Private - Private</option>
                      </select>
                      <input type="checkbox" checked={lab.completed} onChange={e=>setPlan(p=>({...p,labFees:p.labFees.map(l=>l.id!==lab.id?l:{...l,completed:e.target.checked})}))}/>
                      <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Completed</span>
                      <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Price</span>
                      <input value={lab.amount.toFixed(2)} style={{width:80,padding:"4px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",textAlign:"right"}}/>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                  {!plan.labFees.some(l=>l.txId===item.id)&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center",padding:"12px 0"}}>No lab fees — <button onClick={()=>{setPlan(p=>({...p,labFees:[...p.labFees,{id:"L"+Date.now(),txId:item.id,desc:item.l,lab:"Lab",type:"NHS",amount:0,completed:false}]}));}} style={{color:"#0d9488",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>Add Lab</button></div>}
                </div>
              </div>}
            </div>
          ))}
          {/* Lab row — matches Images 6/7 */}
          {plan.labFees.map((lab,li)=>(
            <div key={li} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"7px 14px 7px 44px",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(191,219,254,.3)",alignItems:"center",background:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>🧪 Lab</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",flex:1}}>{lab.type==="NHS"?"NHS - NHS":"Private - Private"}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151"}}>£{lab.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
              <div style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:4,background:lab.completed?"#1d4ed8":"#e2e8f0",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",flexShrink:0}}>{lab.completed&&<span style={{fontSize:8,color:"#fff"}}>✓</span>}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
          {/* Appointment total */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"flex-end",gap:20,padding:"8px 14px",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(191,219,254,.5)",background:"rgba(219,234,254,.2)"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>0 min</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£0.00</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Calendar divider */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",padding:"4px 0",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{width:32,height:32,borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#fff",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,color:"#94a3b8"}}>📅</div>
        </div>

        {/* Care Package summary table — matches Images 6/7/10/11 */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:0,border:"none",marginBottom:4}}>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 120px 120px",padding:"8px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",marginBottom:0}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>Care Package</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",textAlign:"right"}}>Patient charge</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",textAlign:"right"}}>Practice fee</span>
          </div>
          {packages.map((pkg,pi)=>{
            const isExp=expandedPkgs.has(pkg.pkgId);
            const hasLabs=pkg.labs.length>0;
            return(
            <div key={pkg.pkgId} style={{borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div onClick={()=>togglePkg(pkg.pkgId)}
                style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 120px 120px",padding:"12px 0",alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer"}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",width:16}}>{isExp?"▼":"▶"}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{pkg.name}</span>
                  {hasLabs&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#eff6ff",color:"#1d4ed8",display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}>🧪 Lab Fees: ({pkg.labs.length})</span>}
                </div>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:pkg.patientCharge>0?"#374151":"#94a3b8"}}>£{pkg.patientCharge.toFixed(2)}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,fontFamily:"monospace",textAlign:"right",color:pkg.practiceFee>0?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>£{pkg.practiceFee.toFixed(2)}</span>
              </div>
              {isExp&&<div style={{paddingLeft:26,paddingBottom:8}}>
                {pkg.items.map((item,ii)=>(
                  <div key={ii} style={{fontSize:11,padding:"3px 0",color:"#374151"}}>{item.l}</div>
                ))}
                {pkg.labs.map((lab,li)=>(
                  <div key={li} style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",padding:"3px 0",gap:8}}>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>🧪 Lab Fee for: {lab.desc}</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151",marginLeft:"auto",paddingRight:120}}>£{lab.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>}
            </div>
            );
          })}
          {packages.length===0&&<div style={{padding:"16px 0",fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8",textAlign:"center"}}>No treatments charted — add treatments to auto-generate Care Packages</div>}
        </div>

        {/* Transitional banner — matches Images 10/11 */}
        {isTransitional&&<div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,padding:"8px 12px",background:"#eff6ff",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #bfdbfe",marginTop:4,fontSize:11,color:"#1d4ed8"}}>
          <span>ℹ️</span>
          <span>Treatment course started before 1st April 2026. Banded patient charge applied.</span>
        </div>}

        {/* Claim totals */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"14px 16px",marginTop:16,display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
          {[{l:"Total Patient Charge",v:"£"+totalPatient.toFixed(2),c:"#374151"},{l:"Total Practice Fee",v:"£"+totalPractice.toFixed(2),c:"#16a34a"},{l:"NHS Lab Fees",v:"£"+totalLabs.toFixed(2),c:"#1d4ed8"}].map(s=>(
            <div key={s.l} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"10px"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:4}}>{s.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,fontFamily:"monospace",color:s.c}}>{s.v}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Optional dataset items — matches Image 3 */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Optional Dataset Items</div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
            {["Medical History","Social History","Dental History","Periodontal Health","Tooth Decay","Number of Teeth in the Mouth","Other Dental Need"].map((f,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"7px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",borderRight:i%2===0?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{f}</span>
                <select style={{padding:"2px 6px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:5,fontSize:10,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  <option>—</option><option>Low</option><option>Medium</option><option>High</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS WALES ACORN ASSESSMENT SYSTEM
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const ACORN_TEMPLATE={
  version:"1.0",name:"ACORN Clinical Assessment — Wales",
  sections:[
    {title:"Patient Risk Assessment",fields:[
      {id:"decay_risk",label:"Caries Risk",type:"select",options:["Low","Medium","High"],required:true},
      {id:"perio_risk",label:"Periodontal Risk",type:"select",options:["Low","Medium","High"],required:true},
      {id:"erosion_risk",label:"Erosion Risk",type:"select",options:["Low","Medium","High"]},
      {id:"diet_analysis",label:"Diet Analysis Complete",type:"checkbox"},
      {id:"smoking",label:"Smoking Status",type:"select",options:["Non-smoker","Ex-smoker","Current smoker"]},
    ]},
    {title:"Clinical Findings",fields:[
      {id:"bpe",label:"BPE Score",type:"text",placeholder:"e.g. 0022*"},
      {id:"teeth_present",label:"Number of Teeth",type:"number",min:0,max:32},
      {id:"decayed",label:"Decayed Teeth",type:"number",min:0,max:32},
      {id:"filled",label:"Filled Teeth",type:"number",min:0,max:32},
      {id:"missing",label:"Missing Teeth",type:"number",min:0,max:32},
      {id:"plaque_score",label:"Plaque Score %",type:"number",min:0,max:100},
    ]},
    {title:"Prevention Delivered",fields:[
      {id:"dboh",label:"DBOH Prevention Offered",type:"checkbox"},
      {id:"fluoride",label:"Fluoride Advice Given",type:"checkbox"},
      {id:"diet_advice",label:"Diet Advice Given",type:"checkbox"},
      {id:"smoking_advice",label:"Smoking Cessation Advice",type:"checkbox"},
      {id:"recall_interval",label:"Recall Interval (months)",type:"number",min:3,max:24},
      {id:"notes",label:"Clinical Notes",type:"textarea"},
    ]},
  ],
};

function NHSWalesACORNPage(){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("templates");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [responses,setResponses]=useState({});
  const [importText,setImportText]=useState('');
  const [templates,setTemplates]=useState([
    {id:"T1",name:"ACORN Clinical Assessment — Wales",version:"1.0",active:true,createdAt:"01 Apr 2026",fields:15,region:"Wales"},
    {id:"T2",name:"ACORN Assessment — Pilot v2",version:"2.0",active:false,createdAt:"14 May 2026",fields:18,region:"Wales (Pilot)"},
  ]);
  const [completedAssessments]=useState([
    {id:"A1",patient:"John Mills",date:"14 May 2026",template:"ACORN v1.0",status:"completed",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel"},
    {id:"A2",patient:"Sarah Chen",date:"12 May 2026",template:"ACORN v1.0",status:"draft",practitioner:"Dr. S. Patel"},
  ]);

  const importTemplate=()=>{
    try{const t=JSON.parse(importText);setTemplates(p=>[...p,{id:"T"+Date.now(),name:t.name||"Imported Template",version:t.version||"1.0",active:false,createdAt:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-GB"),fields:(t.sections||[]).flatMap(s=>s.fields||[]).length,region:"Wales"}]);doToast("✓ Template imported and validated — inactive until activated");}
    catch(e){doToast("⚠ Invalid JSON — template not imported: "+e.message);}
    setImportText('');
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 NHS Wales ACORN Assessment System</div>
      <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Dynamic treatment forms · JSON import · Historical versioning · PDF export · Pilot compliance</div>
    </div>
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"templates",l:"📋 Templates"},{id:"assess",l:"📝 Complete Assessment"},{id:"history",l:"🕒 History"},{id:"import",l:"⬆ Import Template"},{id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#16a34a":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#16a34a":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
      ))}
    </div>
    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {tab==="templates"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 100px 80px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
          <span>Template Name</span><span>Version</span><span>Fields</span><span>Created</span><span>Region</span><span>Status</span>
        </div>
        {templates.map((t,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 80px 80px 100px 80px 80px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{t.name}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#7c3aed"}}>v{t.version}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,textAlign:"center"}}>{t.fields}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{t.createdAt}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>{t.region}</span>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:t.active?"#dcfce7":"#f1f5f9",color:t.active?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8"}}>{t.active?"Active":"Inactive"}</span>
              {!t.active&&<button onClick={()=>{setTemplates(p=>p.map(tp=>({...tp,active:tp.id===t.id})));doToast("✓ Template activated");}} style={{fontSize:9,color:"#0d9488",background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"underline"}}>Activate</button>}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="assess"&&<div style={{maxWidth:780}}>
      {ACORN_TEMPLATE.sections.map((sec,si)=>(
        <div key={si} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:12}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",borderBottom:"1px solid #bbf7d0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#16a34a"}}>{sec.title}</div>
          <div style={{padding:14,display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10}}>
            {sec.fields.map((f,fi)=>(
              <div key={fi} style={{gridColumn:f.type==="textarea"?"1/-1":"auto"}}>
                <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.label}{f.required&&<span style={{color:"#dc2626"}}> *</span>}</label>
                {f.type==="select"&&<select value={responses[f.id]||""} onChange={e=>setResponses(p=>({...p,[f.id]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                  <option value="">—</option>{f.options.map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
                </select>}
                {f.type==="checkbox"&&<label style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",cursor:"pointer"}}><input type="checkbox" checked={!!responses[f.id]} onChange={e=>setResponses(p=>({...p,[f.id]:e.target.checked}))}/><span style={{fontSize:11}}>Yes</span></label>}
                {(f.type==="text"||f.type==="number")&&<input type={f.type} value={responses[f.id]||""} onChange={e=>setResponses(p=>({...p,[f.id]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.placeholder||""} min={f.min} max={f.max}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>}
                {f.type==="textarea"&&<textarea value={responses[f.id]||""} onChange={e=>setResponses(p=>({...p,[f.id]:e.target.value}))} rows={3}
                  style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",resize:"vertical",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ ACORN assessment saved")} style={{flex:1,padding:"10px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save Assessment</button>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Assessment exported to PDF")} style={{padding:"10px 18px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:9,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#16a34a",fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export PDF</button>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="history"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 120px 100px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
          <span>Patient</span><span>Date</span><span>Template</span><span>Practitioner</span><span>Status</span>
        </div>
        {completedAssessments.map((a,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 120px 100px 80px",padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{a.patient}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{a.date}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{a.template}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10}}>{a.practitioner}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:a.status==="completed"?"#dcfce7":"#fef3c7",color:a.status==="completed"?"#16a34a":"#92400e"}}>{a.status}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="import"&&<div style={{maxWidth:780}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>⬆ Import Treatment Form Template (JSON)</div>
        <div style={{padding:16}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8}}>Expected format: {"{"}"name","version","sections":[{"{"}"title","fields":[...]{"}"}] {"}"}</div>
          <textarea value={importText} onChange={e=>setImportText(e.target.value)} placeholder='Paste JSON template here…' rows={10}
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",resize:"vertical",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:10}}>
            <button onClick={importTemplate} style={{padding:"8px 20px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>Validate & Import</button>
            <button onClick={()=>setImportText('')} style={{padding:"8px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Clear</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="reporting"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[{l:"Templates imported",v:templates.length,c:"#7c3aed"},{l:"Active templates",v:templates.filter(t=>t.active).length,c:"#16a34a"},{l:"Assessments completed",v:completedAssessments.filter(a=>a.status==="completed").length,c:"#0d9488"},{l:"Assessments in draft",v:completedAssessments.filter(a=>a.status==="draft").length,c:"#d97706"},{l:"Wales pilot sites",v:1,c:"#1d4ed8"},{l:"PDF exports today",v:0,c:"#94a3b8"}].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"14px",borderTop:`3px solid ${r.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:20,fontWeight:900,color:r.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{r.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginTop:4}}>{r.l}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS WALES LAB FEE MANAGEMENT
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSWalesLabFeePage(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("labs");
  const [labs,setLabs]=useState([
    {id:"LF001",patient:"John Mills",treatment:"Porcelain Crown LR3",txPlan:"TP-001",type:"NHS",amount:100.00,tariff:120.00,actual:100.00,completed:true,warrantyRelated:false,nhsClaimable:true,hc3Applied:false,invoiced:true},
    {id:"LF002",patient:"Sarah Chen",treatment:"Porcelain Crown UR6",txPlan:"TP-002",type:"Private",amount:180.00,tariff:null,actual:180.00,completed:true,warrantyRelated:false,nhsClaimable:false,hc3Applied:false,invoiced:true},
    {id:"LF003",patient:"Robert Hall",treatment:"Crown Recement (Warranty)",txPlan:"TP-003",type:"Private",amount:120.00,tariff:null,actual:120.00,completed:false,warrantyRelated:true,nhsClaimable:false,hc3Applied:false,invoiced:false},
    {id:"LF004",patient:"Amy Torres",treatment:"Amalgam Filling + Private Uplift",txPlan:"TP-004",type:"NHS",amount:60.00,tariff:80.00,actual:60.00,completed:true,warrantyRelated:false,nhsClaimable:true,hc3Applied:true,invoiced:true},
  ]);
  const [showAddLab,setShowAddLab]=useState(false);
  const [newLab,setNewLab]=useState({patient:"",treatment:"",type:"NHS",amount:"",tariff:""});

  const addLab=()=>{
    if(!newLab.patient||!newLab.amount)return;
    const a=parseFloat(newLab.amount)||0,t=parseFloat(newLab.tariff)||999;
    setLabs(p=>[...p,{id:"LF"+Date.now(),patient:newLab.patient,treatment:newLab.treatment,txPlan:"TP-NEW",type:newLab.type,amount:Math.min(a,t),tariff:newLab.type==="NHS"?t:null,actual:a,completed:false,warrantyRelated:false,nhsClaimable:newLab.type==="NHS",hc3Applied:false,invoiced:false}]);
    setShowAddLab(false);setNewLab({patient:"",treatment:"",type:"NHS",amount:"",tariff:""});
    doToast("✓ Lab fee added — tariff validation applied");
  };

  const nhsTotal=labs.filter(l=>l.nhsClaimable&&l.completed).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.amount,0);
  const privateTotal=labs.filter(l=>!l.nhsClaimable).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.amount,0);
  const warrantyTotal=labs.filter(l=>l.warrantyRelated).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.amount,0);
  const hc3Adjusted=labs.filter(l=>l.hc3Applied).reduce((s,l)=>s+l.amount,0);

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {showAddLab&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Add Lab Fee — NHS Wales</div>
        {[{l:"Patient",k:"patient"},{l:"Treatment",k:"treatment"},{l:"Lab Amount (£)",k:"amount",type:"number"},{l:"NHS Tariff Limit (£)",k:"tariff",type:"number"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input type={f.type||"text"} value={newLab[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewLab(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Charge Type</label>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            {["NHS","Private"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setNewLab(p=>({...p,type:t}))} style={{flex:1,padding:"6px",borderRadius:7,border:`2px solid ${newLab.type===t?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,background:newLab.type===t?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:newLab.type===t?700:400,color:newLab.type===t?"#0d9488":"#64748b"}}>{t}</button>)}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",marginBottom:14}}>
          {newLab.type==="NHS"?"✓ NHS lab: included in NHS claim · Subject to tariff limit · HC3 exemptions apply":"⚠ Private lab: always invoiced to patient · Not included in NHS claim"}
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddLab(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={addLab} style={{flex:2,padding:"8px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add Lab Fee</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 NHS Wales — Lab Fee Management</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>NHS vs Private · HC3 logic · Tariff validation · Warranty exclusion · Claim transmission</div>
      </div>
      <button onClick={()=>setShowAddLab(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ Add Lab Fee</button>
    </div>

    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[{l:"NHS lab fees (claimable)",v:"£"+nhsTotal.toFixed(2),c:"#0d9488"},{l:"Private lab fees",v:"£"+privateTotal.toFixed(2),c:"#7c3aed"},{l:"Warranty labs (excluded)",v:"£"+warrantyTotal.toFixed(2),c:"#94a3b8"},{l:"HC3 adjusted",v:"£"+hc3Adjusted.toFixed(2),c:"#d97706"}].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:140,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"labs",l:"🧪 Lab Fees"},{id:"hc3",l:"💊 HC3 Logic"},{id:"tariff",l:"📏 Tariff Validation"},{id:"reporting",l:"📊 Reporting"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
    {tab==="labs"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 80px 80px 80px 80px 80px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
          <span>Patient / Treatment</span><span>Tx Plan</span><span>Type</span><span>Amount</span><span>Tariff</span><span>Claimable</span><span>Warranty</span><span>HC3</span>
        </div>
        {labs.map((lab,i)=>(
