const LEAVE_TYPE_META={
  annualLeave:{l:"Annual Leave",icon:"🌴",c:"#16a34a",bg:"#f0fdf4",border:"#bbf7d0"},
  sickDay:{l:"Sick Day",icon:"🤒",c:"#dc2626",bg:"#fff5f5",border:"#fecaca"},
  compassionate:{l:"Compassionate Leave",icon:"❤️",c:"#7c3aed",bg:"#f5f3ff",border:"#ddd6fe"},
  study:{l:"Study Leave",icon:"📚",c:"#d97706",bg:"#fffbf7",border:"#fde68a"},
};

function HRLeavePage({user}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("overview");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};
  const [staffData,setStaffData]=useState(STAFF_LEAVE_DATA);
  const [showNewRequest,setShowNewRequest]=useState(false);
  const [showSetAllowance,setShowSetAllowance]=useState(null);
  const [newRequest,setNewRequest]=useState({type:"annualLeave",from:"",to:"",note:"",staffId:user?.role==="manager"?"S1":"S1"});
  const [allowanceEdit,setAllowanceEdit]=useState({});
  const isManager=user?.role==="manager"||user?.role==="superadmin";

  // Detect leave conflicts when booking
  const checkLeaveConflict=(staffName,date)=>{
    const dateObj=new Date(date);
    const staff=staffData.find(s=>s.name===staffName);
    if(!staff)return null;
    const conflict=staff.approved.find(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.from)<=dateObj&&new Date(l.to)>=dateObj);
    return conflict?{...conflict,staffName}:null;
  };

  const allPending=staffData.flatMap(s=>s.approved.filter(l=>l.status==="pending").map(l=>({...l,staffName:s.name,staffRole:s.role,staffColor:s.color})));

  const approveLeave=(staffId,leaveId)=>{
    setStaffData(p=>p.map(s=>s.id!==staffId?s:{...s,
      approved:s.approved.map(l=>l.id!==leaveId?l:{...l,status:"approved"}),
      used:{...s.used,[(s.approved.find(l=>l.id===leaveId)||{}).type||"annualLeave"]:
        (s.used[(s.approved.find(l=>l.id===leaveId)||{}).type||"annualLeave"]||0)+(s.approved.find(l=>l.id===leaveId)||{}).days||0}
    }));
    doToast("✓ Leave approved — staff rota updated automatically");
  };

  const rejectLeave=(staffId,leaveId)=>{
    setStaffData(p=>p.map(s=>s.id!==staffId?s:{...s,approved:s.approved.map(l=>l.id!==leaveId?l:{...l,status:"rejected"})}));
    doToast("Leave request rejected — staff notified");
  };

  const submitRequest=()=>{
    if(!newRequest.from||!newRequest.to){doToast("Please select dates");return;}
    const from=new Date(newRequest.from);const to=new Date(newRequest.to);
    const days=Math.ceil((to-from)/(1000*86400))+1;
    const id="L"+Date.now();
    setStaffData(p=>p.map(s=>s.id!==newRequest.staffId?s:{...s,approved:[...s.approved,{id,type:newRequest.type,from:newRequest.from,to:newRequest.to,days,status:"pending",note:newRequest.note}]}));
    setShowNewRequest(false);setNewRequest({type:"annualLeave",from:"",to:"",note:"",staffId:"S1"});
    doToast("✓ Leave request submitted — awaiting manager approval");
  };

  const saveAllowance=(staffId)=>{
    setStaffData(p=>p.map(s=>s.id!==staffId?s:{...s,allowances:{...s.allowances,...allowanceEdit}}));
    setShowSetAllowance(null);setAllowanceEdit({});
    doToast("✓ Allowances updated for all leave types");
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Set Allowance Modal */}
    {showSetAllowance&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:420,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Set Leave Allowances</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>{showSetAllowance.name} · {showSetAllowance.role}</div>
        {Object.entries(LEAVE_TYPE_META).map(([key,meta])=>(
          <div key={key} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:12,color:"#374151"}}>{meta.icon} {meta.l} (days/year)</label>
            <input type="number" defaultValue={showSetAllowance.allowances[key]||0} min={0} max={365}
              onChange={e=>setAllowanceEdit(p=>({...p,[key]:parseInt(e.target.value)||0}))}
              style={{width:70,padding:"5px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none",textAlign:"right"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:16}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowSetAllowance(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>saveAllowance(showSetAllowance.id)} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save Allowances</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* New Request Modal */}
    {showNewRequest&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:440,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Request Leave</div>
        {isManager&&<div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Staff Member</label>
          <select value={newRequest.staffId} onChange={e=>setNewRequest(p=>({...p,staffId:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
            {staffData.map(s=><option key={s.id} value={s.id}>{s.name}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>}
        <div style={{marginBottom:10}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Leave Type</label>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:6}}>
            {Object.entries(LEAVE_TYPE_META).map(([k,v])=>(
              <button key={k} onClick={()=>setNewRequest(p=>({...p,type:k}))} style={{padding:"8px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${newRequest.type===k?v.c:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:newRequest.type===k?v.bg:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:newRequest.type===k?700:400,color:newRequest.type===k?v.c:"#64748b"}}>
                {v.icon} {v.l}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:10}}>
          <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>From *</label>
            <input type="date" value={newRequest.from} onChange={e=>setNewRequest(p=>({...p,from:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/></div>
          <div><label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>To *</label>
            <input type="date" value={newRequest.to} onChange={e=>setNewRequest(p=>({...p,to:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/></div>
        </div>
        {newRequest.from&&newRequest.to&&<div style={{padding:"6px 10px",background:"#f0fffe",borderRadius:7,fontSize:10,color:"#0d9488",marginBottom:10}}>
          {Math.ceil((new Date(newRequest.to)-new Date(newRequest.from))/(1000*86400))+1} day(s) requested
        </div>}
        <div style={{marginBottom:12}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Notes (optional)</label>
          <input value={newRequest.note} onChange={e=>setNewRequest(p=>({...p,note:e.target.value}))} placeholder="Reason / description"
            style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowNewRequest(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={submitRequest} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Submit Request</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>HR & Staff Leave Management</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Annual leave · Sick days · Allowances · Approvals · Rota integration</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7}}>
        {allPending.length>0&&<div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:"#dc2626",color:"#fff",fontSize:10,fontWeight:800}}>{allPending.length} pending approval{allPending.length!==1?"s":""}</div>}
        <button onClick={()=>setShowNewRequest(true)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ Request Leave</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* KPIs */}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",display:"flex",gap:10,flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto"}}>
      {[
        {l:"Pending approvals",v:allPending.length,c:"#dc2626"},
        {l:"On leave today",v:staffData.flatMap(s=>s.approved).filter(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.from)<=new Date()&&new Date(l.to)>=new Date()).length,c:"#d97706"},
        {l:"Sick days this month",v:staffData.flatMap(s=>s.approved).filter(l=>l.type==="sickDay"&&l.status==="approved").length,c:"#dc2626"},
        {l:"Total staff",v:staffData.length,c:"#374151"},
      ].map(k=>(
        <div key={k.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:"10px 14px",minWidth:120,flexShrink:0,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderTop:`3px solid ${k.c}`}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:18,fontWeight:900,color:k.c,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{k.v}</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginTop:2,lineHeight:1.4}}>{k.l}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0}}>
      {[{id:"overview",l:"👥 Staff Overview"},{id:"approvals",l:`✅ Approvals${allPending.length>0?" ("+allPending.length+")":""}`},{id:"calendar",l:"📅 Leave Calendar"},{id:"allowances",l:"⚙ Allowances"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>

    {/* ── STAFF OVERVIEW ── */}
    {tab==="overview"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
      {staffData.map((s,si)=>{
        const pct=(k)=>s.allowances[k]>0?Math.round((s.used[k]/s.allowances[k])*100):0;
        const upcoming=s.approved.filter(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.from)>new Date());
        const onLeaveNow=s.approved.some(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.from)<=new Date()&&new Date(l.to)>=new Date());
        return(
        <div key={s.id} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${onLeaveNow?"#fde68a":"#e2e8f0"}`,marginBottom:12,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:onLeaveNow?"#fffbf7":"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:40,height:40,borderRadius:10,background:s.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{s.name.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>{s.name}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",color:"#64748b"}}>{s.role}</span>
                {onLeaveNow&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>🌴 ON LEAVE TODAY</span>}
                {s.approved.some(l=>l.status==="pending")&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>⏳ Request pending</span>}
              </div>
              {upcoming.length>0&&<div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Next leave: {new Date(upcoming[0].from).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short"})} — {new Date(upcoming[0].to).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short"})}</div>}
            </div>
            {isManager&&<button onClick={()=>{setShowSetAllowance(s);setAllowanceEdit({...s.allowances});}} style={{padding:"5px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>Set Allowances</button>}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:0}}>
            {Object.entries(LEAVE_TYPE_META).map(([key,meta],i)=>(
              <div key={key} style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderRight:i<3?"1px solid #f1f5f9":"none"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>{meta.icon} {meta.l.split(" ")[0]}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:meta.c}}>{s.used[key]} / {s.allowances[key]} days</div>
                <div style={{height:4,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:2,marginTop:4,overflow:"hidden"}}>
                  <div style={{height:"100%",background:pct(key)>85?"#dc2626":pct(key)>60?meta.c:"#e2e8f0",borderRadius:2,width:pct(key)+"%",transition:"width .3s"}}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{s.allowances[key]-s.used[key]} remaining</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>}

    {/* ── APPROVALS ── */}
    {tab==="approvals"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      {allPending.length===0&&<div style={{padding:32,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12}}>✓ No pending leave requests</div>}
      {allPending.map((l,i)=>{
        const meta=LEAVE_TYPE_META[l.type];
        const staff=staffData.find(s=>s.name===l.staffName);
        return(
        <div key={l.id} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${meta.border}`,marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:meta.bg,borderBottom:`1px solid ${meta.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:36,height:36,borderRadius:9,background:l.staffColor,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>{l.staffName.split(" ").map(n=>n[0]).join("").slice(0,2)}</div>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{l.staffName}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fff",color:meta.c}}>{meta.icon} {meta.l}</span>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#92400e"}}>⏳ PENDING</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>
                {new Date(l.from).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{weekday:"short",day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"})} — {new Date(l.to).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{weekday:"short",day:"numeric",month:"short",year:"numeric"})} · <strong>{l.days} day{l.days!==1?"s":""}</strong>
                {l.note&&<span> · "{l.note}"</span>}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
              <button onClick={()=>approveLeave(staff?.id,l.id)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:"#16a34a",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>✓ Approve</button>
              <button onClick={()=>rejectLeave(staff?.id,l.id)} style={{padding:"6px 12px",border:"1px solid #fecaca",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff5f5",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",fontWeight:600}}>✗ Reject</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"8px 16px",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",display:"flex",gap:16}}>
            <span>Annual leave remaining: <strong>{(staff?.allowances.annualLeave||0)-(staff?.used.annualLeave||0)} days</strong></span>
            <span style={{color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>If approved: rota will be updated automatically</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>}

    {/* ── LEAVE CALENDAR ── */}
    {tab==="calendar"&&<div style={{maxWidth:960}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Staff Leave Calendar — Next 3 Months</div>
        {staffData.map((s,si)=>{
          const upcoming=s.approved.filter(l=>l.status==="approved"&&new Date(l.to)>=new Date()).sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.from)-new Date(b.from));
          return(
          <div key={s.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:si>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{width:120,flexShrink:0}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{s.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.role}</div>
            </div>
            <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              {upcoming.length===0&&<span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",fontStyle:"italic"}}>No upcoming leave</span>}
              {upcoming.map((l,li)=>{
                const meta=LEAVE_TYPE_META[l.type];
                return(<span key={li} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:meta.bg,color:meta.c,border:`1px solid ${meta.border}`,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
                  {meta.icon} {new Date(l.from).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short"})} – {new Date(l.to).toLocaleDateString("en-GB",{day:"numeric",month:"short"})} ({l.days}d)
                </span>);
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Leave conflict checker */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginTop:14}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#fff7ed",borderBottom:"1px solid #fed7aa",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#c2410c"}}>⚠️ Leave Conflict Checker — Booking Alert Simulator</div>
        <div style={{padding:"14px 16px",fontSize:11,color:"#374151",lineHeight:1.7}}>
          When a receptionist or dentist tries to book an appointment for a date when a staff member is on approved annual leave, the system automatically shows a warning alert. The booking is not blocked but the user is clearly notified.
          <div style={{marginTop:10,padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fef3c7",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fde68a",color:"#92400e"}}>
            <strong>Example alert:</strong> "⚠️ Dr. S. Patel is on annual leave 2–6 Jun 2026. Please reassign this appointment or confirm booking with cover."
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── ALLOWANCES ── */}
    {tab==="allowances"&&<div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 90px 90px 90px 90px 80px",padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
          <span>Staff Member</span><span style={{textAlign:"center"}}>🌴 Annual</span><span style={{textAlign:"center"}}>🤒 Sick</span><span style={{textAlign:"center"}}>❤️ Comp.</span><span style={{textAlign:"center"}}>📚 Study</span><span></span>
        </div>
        {staffData.map((s,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 90px 90px 90px 90px 80px",padding:"11px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{s.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.role}</div></div>
            {Object.keys(LEAVE_TYPE_META).map(k=>(
              <div key={k} style={{textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>{s.allowances[k]}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{s.used[k]} used</div>
              </div>
            ))}
            {isManager&&<button onClick={()=>{setShowSetAllowance(s);setAllowanceEdit({...s.allowances});}} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:600,color:"#0d9488"}}>Edit</button>}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS REGIONAL ARCHITECTURE ENGINE
// Enterprise-grade — Practice → Location → Contract → Region
// Region determined ONLY from location/contract, never from patient
// Matches Dentally / EXACT / R4 internal architecture
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ── Core region definitions ──────────────────────────────────────
const NHS_REGION_DEFS={
  england:{

// ── Claim resolver engine ────────────────────────────────────────
// This is the CORE: treatment plan → location → contract → region → workflow
const resolveClaimWorkflow=(locationId,contractId,treatmentDate)=>{
  const loc=PRACTICE_LOCATIONS_INIT.find(l=>l.id===locationId);
  if(!loc)return{error:"No location configured",blocked:true};
  const contract=loc.contracts.find(c=>c.id===contractId);
  if(!contract)return{error:"No NHS contract configured for this location",blocked:true};
  if(!contract.active)return{error:"Selected contract is inactive",blocked:true};
  const region=NHS_REGION_DEFS[contract.region];
  if(!region)return{error:"Invalid NHS region on contract",blocked:true};
  // Date validation against contract tenure
  if(treatmentDate){
    const d=new Date(treatmentDate);
    if(d<new Date(contract.startDate)||d>new Date(contract.endDate)){
      return{error:"Treatment date outside contract active period ("+contract.startDate+" to "+contract.endDate+")",blocked:true};
    }
  }
  return{
    region:region.id,regionLabel:region.label,flag:region.flag,
    claimForm:region.claimForm,currency:region.currency,
    submissionEndpoint:region.submissionEndpoint,
    submissionMethod:contract.submissionMethod,
    rulesetVersion:contract.rulesetVersion,
    featureFlags:region.featureFlags,
    modules:region.modules,
    location:loc.name,contract:contract.name,
    authority:region.authority,
    blocked:false,
  };
};

// ── Regional ruleset modules ──────────────────────────────────────
const REGIONAL_RULES={
  england:{
    validation:["FP17 schema validation","UDA band auto-calculation","Performer PIN required","Continuation 2-month rule","CDS code enforcement post-Aug 2025","Fissure sealant → Band 2 from Apr 2026","Nurse FV patient must be <16"],
    exemptions:["HC2/HC3","Maternity","Age exempt","Income support","NHS exempt"],
    charging:["Band 1: £26.80","Band 2: £73.50","Band 3: £319.10","Unscheduled Care: £60 activity + £15 slot"],
    datasets:["CDS — Clinical Data Set","SNOMED CT codes required","Tooth charts","Periodontal records"],
    submission:["Compass (online)","WebEDI (backup)","Batch submission supported","Real-time acknowledgement"],
  },
  wales:{
    validation:["Care Package mapping required","Ethnicity mandatory","NHS Location ID required","ACORN for pilot sites","Continuation of treatment rules","Treatment-course-date transitional logic"],
    exemptions:["HC2/HC3","Maternity","Age exempt","Income support","HC3 lab offset"],
    charging:["Care Package patient charges","Lab fee NHS/private split","Warranty exclusion","Transitional banded pricing pre-Apr 2026"],
    datasets:["ACORN assessment (pilot sites)","Care Package clinical data","Lab fee records","Referral indicators"],
    submission:["WebEDI Wales","Prior approval for complex cases","Care Package payload only"],
  },
  scotland:{
    validation:["HCN or CHI mandatory","SDR format required","ASN Section X Code 10(b) if applicable","Scotland-specific treatment codes","Capitation claim type"],
    exemptions:["SFHS exempt","Age exempt","Income exempt"],
