// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NHS REGIONAL ARCHITECTURE PAGE
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function NHSRegionalArchitecturePage({user}){
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("locations");
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),3000);};
  const [locations,setLocations]=useState(PRACTICE_LOCATIONS_INIT);
  const [selLocation,setSelLocation]=useState("LOC001");
  const [selContract,setSelContract]=useState("C001");
  const [testDate,setTestDate]=useState("2026-05-16");
  const [routeResult,setRouteResult]=useState(null);
  const [showAddLocation,setShowAddLocation]=useState(false);
  const [showAddContract,setShowAddContract]=useState(null); // locationId
  const [newLoc,setNewLoc]=useState({name:"",address:"",region:"england",odsCode:""});
  const [newContract,setNewContract]=useState({name:"",contractNo:"",region:"england",type:"GDS",udaTarget:4560,startDate:"",endDate:"",submissionMethod:"Compass"});

  const activeLoc=locations.find(l=>l.id===selLocation);
  const activeContract=activeLoc?.contracts.find(c=>c.id===selContract);
  const activeRegion=NHS_REGION_DEFS[activeLoc?.region||"england"];

  const runResolver=()=>{
    const result=resolveClaimWorkflow(selLocation,selContract,testDate);
    setRouteResult(result);
    doToast(result.blocked?"⛔ "+result.error:"✓ Claim routed to "+result.claimForm+" — "+result.regionLabel);
  };

  const addLocation=()=>{
    const id="LOC"+Date.now();
    setLocations(p=>[...p,{id,name:newLoc.name,address:newLoc.address,region:newLoc.region,active:true,isHeadquarters:false,nhsAuthority:"",odsCode:newLoc.odsCode,contracts:[]}]);
    setShowAddLocation(false);setNewLoc({name:"",address:"",region:"england",odsCode:""});
    doToast("✓ Location added — configure NHS contracts to enable claiming");
  };

  const addContract=(locationId)=>{
    const id="C"+Date.now();
    const contractRegion=NHS_REGION_DEFS[newContract.region];
    setLocations(p=>p.map(l=>l.id!==locationId?l:{...l,contracts:[...l.contracts,{id,name:newContract.name,contractNo:newContract.contractNo,region:newContract.region,type:newContract.type,udaTarget:newContract.udaTarget||0,uoaTarget:0,startDate:newContract.startDate,endDate:newContract.endDate,locationId:l.odsCode,submissionMethod:newContract.submissionMethod,credentials:{},practitioners:[],active:true,rulesetVersion:newContract.region+"@"+contractRegion?.rulesetVersion||"2026.04"}]}));
    setShowAddContract(null);setNewContract({name:"",contractNo:"",region:"england",type:"GDS",udaTarget:4560,startDate:"",endDate:"",submissionMethod:"Compass"});
    doToast("✓ NHS contract added — region "+contractRegion?.label+" auto-configured");
  };

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden",background:"#f1f5f9"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:14,right:18,padding:"9px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",borderRadius:10,fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,zIndex:999,boxShadow:"0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Add Location Modal */}
    {showAddLocation&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:480,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Add Practice Location / Site</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Each location has its own NHS region, contracts, and submission credentials — exactly like Dentally and R4.</div>
        {[{l:"Location Name",k:"name",ph:"e.g. Cardiff Branch"},{l:"Address",k:"address",ph:"Full address"},{l:"ODS Code",k:"odsCode",ph:"e.g. W01234"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input value={newLoc[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewLoc(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Default NHS Region</label>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:6}}>
            {Object.values(NHS_REGION_DEFS).map(r=>(
              <button key={r.id} onClick={()=>setNewLoc(p=>({...p,region:r.id}))} style={{padding:"8px 6px",borderRadius:8,border:`2px solid ${newLoc.region===r.id?r.color:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:newLoc.region===r.id?r.bg:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:newLoc.region===r.id?700:400,color:newLoc.region===r.id?r.color:"#64748b",textAlign:"center"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:14,marginBottom:2}}>{r.flag}</div>
                <div>{r.label.replace("NHS ","")}</div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddLocation(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={addLocation} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add Location</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Add Contract Modal */}
    {showAddContract&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:480,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Add NHS Contract</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:14}}>The NHS region on this contract automatically determines the claim form, ruleset, and submission endpoint.</div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:10}}>
          {[{l:"Contract Name",k:"name",ph:"e.g. NHS GDS Contract"},{l:"Contract Number",k:"contractNo",ph:"e.g. C123456"},{l:"UDA Target",k:"udaTarget",ph:"0",type:"number"},{l:"Submission Method",k:"submissionMethod",ph:"Compass"}].map(f=>(
            <div key={f.k}><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</label>
              <input type={f.type||"text"} value={newContract[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewContract(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/></div>
          ))}
          {[{l:"Start Date",k:"startDate"},{l:"End Date",k:"endDate"}].map(f=>(
            <div key={f.k}><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</label>
              <input type="date" value={newContract[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewContract(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"6px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:7,fontSize:11,outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/></div>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
          <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>NHS Region (determines claim form & ruleset automatically)</label>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {Object.values(NHS_REGION_DEFS).map(r=>(
              <button key={r.id} onClick={()=>setNewContract(p=>({...p,region:r.id}))} style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,border:`2px solid ${newContract.region===r.id?r.color:"#e2e8f0"}`,background:newContract.region===r.id?r.bg:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:newContract.region===r.id?700:400,color:newContract.region===r.id?r.color:"#64748b"}}>
                {r.flag} {r.label.replace("NHS ","")}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          {newContract.region&&<div style={{marginTop:6,padding:"6px 10px",background:NHS_REGION_DEFS[newContract.region]?.bg,borderRadius:7,fontSize:10,color:NHS_REGION_DEFS[newContract.region]?.color,fontWeight:600}}>
            → Claim form: {NHS_REGION_DEFS[newContract.region]?.claimForm} · Submission: {NHS_REGION_DEFS[newContract.region]?.submissionEndpoint?.replace("https://","").split("/")[0]||"Private invoice"}
          </div>}
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddContract(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>addContract(showAddContract)} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add NHS Contract</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Header */}
    <div style={{background:"#0c1a28",padding:"14px 20px",display:"flex",gap:14,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{flex:1}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff"}}>NHS Regional Architecture — Enterprise Configuration</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.4)",marginTop:1}}>Practice → Location → Contract → Region auto-resolved · Dentally / EXACT / R4 pattern</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"5px 12px",borderRadius:7,background:"rgba(255,255,255,.1)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,.8)",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700}}>
        {locations.filter(l=>l.active).length} active sites · {locations.flatMap(l=>l.contracts).filter(c=>c.active).length} active contracts
      </div>
    </div>

    {/* Tabs */}
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"0 20px",display:"flex",flexShrink:0,overflowX:"auto",scrollbarWidth:"none"}}>
      {[{id:"locations",l:"🏥 Locations & Contracts"},{id:"resolver",l:"🔀 Claim Resolver"},{id:"rules",l:"⚙ Regional Rules Engine"},{id:"routing",l:"📡 Submission Routing"},{id:"versioning",l:"📅 Rules Versioning"}].map(t=>(
        <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"9px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#0c1a28":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#0c1a28":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
      ))}
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",minHeight:0}}>

    {/* ── LOCATIONS & CONTRACTS ── */}
    {tab==="locations"&&<>
      {/* Location tree — left panel */}
      <div style={{width:280,flexShrink:0,borderRight:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflowY:"auto",background:"#fff"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800,color:"#374151"}}>Practice Hierarchy</span>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddLocation(true)} style={{padding:"3px 10px",border:"1px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:6,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>+ Site</button>
        </div>
        {/* Group header */}
        <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
          <div style={{width:28,height:28,borderRadius:7,background:"#0c1a28",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:10,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",flexShrink:0}}>PD</div>
          <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:800}}>Pro Dental Group</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{locations.length} locations · {locations.flatMap(l=>l.contracts).length} contracts</div></div>
        </div>
        {locations.map(loc=>{
          const region=NHS_REGION_DEFS[loc.region];
          const isSelected=selLocation===loc.id;
          return(
          <div key={loc.id}>
            <div onClick={()=>setSelLocation(loc.id)} style={{padding:"8px 14px",cursor:"pointer",background:isSelected?"#f0fffe":"#fff",borderLeft:`3px solid ${isSelected?region.color:"transparent"}`,borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:14}}>{region.flag}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0f172a"}}>{loc.name}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{region.label} · {loc.odsCode}</div>
                </div>
                {loc.isHeadquarters&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>HQ</span>}
                {!loc.active&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 5px",borderRadius:4,background:"#f1f5f9",color:"#94a3b8"}}>INACTIVE</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,flexWrap:"wrap",paddingLeft:22}}>
                {loc.contracts.map(c=>(
                  <span key={c.id} onClick={e=>{e.stopPropagation();setSelLocation(loc.id);setSelContract(c.id);}} style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:c.active?region.bg:"#f1f5f9",color:c.active?region.color:"#94a3b8",cursor:"pointer",border:`1px solid ${c.active?region.border:"#e2e8f0"}`}}>
                    {c.contractNo}
                  </span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Location detail — right panel */}
      {activeLoc&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{width:48,height:48,borderRadius:12,background:activeRegion.color,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:24,flexShrink:0}}>{activeRegion.flag}</div>
          <div style={{flex:1}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>{activeLoc.name}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{activeLoc.address}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>NHS Region</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:activeRegion.color}}>{activeRegion.label}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{activeRegion.authority}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Location NHS config grid */}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:10,marginBottom:16}}>
          {[{l:"Claim Form",v:activeRegion.claimForm},{l:"Currency",v:activeRegion.currency},{l:"ODS Code",v:activeLoc.odsCode},{l:"NHS Authority",v:activeLoc.nhsAuthority},{l:"Ruleset",v:activeRegion.rulesetVersion},{l:"Submission",v:activeRegion.submissionEndpoint?.replace("https://","").split("/")[0]||"Private"}].map(f=>(
            <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"10px 12px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:9,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",wordBreak:"break-all"}}>{f.v}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* NHS Contracts */}
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:8}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>NHS Contracts ({activeLoc.contracts.length})</span>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddContract(activeLoc.id)} style={{padding:"4px 12px",border:"1px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:7,background:"#f0fffe",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>+ Add Contract</button>
        </div>
        {activeLoc.contracts.map((ct,i)=>{
          const cr=NHS_REGION_DEFS[ct.region];
          const isSel=selContract===ct.id;
          return(
          <div key={ct.id} onClick={()=>setSelContract(ct.id)} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${isSel?cr.color:"#e2e8f0"}`,marginBottom:10,overflow:"hidden",cursor:"pointer"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:isSel?cr.bg:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:7,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:2}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{ct.name}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:cr.bg,color:cr.color}}>{cr.flag} {cr.label.replace("NHS ","")}</span>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f8fafc",color:"#64748b"}}>{ct.type}</span>
                  {!ct.active&&<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:5,background:"#f1f5f9",color:"#94a3b8"}}>INACTIVE</span>}
                </div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{ct.contractNo} · {ct.startDate} → {ct.endDate}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:cr.color,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{cr.claimForm}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{ct.submissionMethod}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",display:"flex",gap:12,fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>
              <span>Ruleset: <strong style={{color:"#374151"}}>{ct.rulesetVersion}</strong></span>
              {ct.udaTarget>0&&<span>UDA target: <strong>{ct.udaTarget.toLocaleString()}</strong></span>}
              {ct.uoaTarget>0&&<span>UOA target: <strong>{ct.uoaTarget.toLocaleString()}</strong></span>}
              <span>Submission: <strong>{ct.submissionMethod}</strong></span>
              <span style={{marginLeft:"auto",color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:700}}>→ {cr.submissionEndpoint?.replace("https://","").split("/")[0]||"N/A"}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>}
    </>}

    {/* ── CLAIM RESOLVER ── */}
    {tab==="resolver"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:840}}>
        <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0c1a28 0%,#1a1035 100%)",borderRadius:14,padding:"20px",marginBottom:20}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:4}}>🔀 Claim Resolver Engine</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,.6)",lineHeight:1.7}}>
            Select a location, contract, and treatment date. The engine automatically determines the NHS region, claim form, validation rules, and submission endpoint — exactly as Dentally/EXACT/R4 do internally. Staff never choose FP17 vs Wales claim vs SDR manually.
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:16}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>Resolution Inputs</div>
          <div style={{padding:16,display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>1. PRACTICE LOCATION</label>
              <select value={selLocation} onChange={e=>{setSelLocation(e.target.value);setSelContract(locations.find(l=>l.id===e.target.value)?.contracts[0]?.id||"");setRouteResult(null);}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                {locations.map(l=><option key={l.id} value={l.id}>{NHS_REGION_DEFS[l.region]?.flag} {l.name}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>2. NHS CONTRACT</label>
              <select value={selContract} onChange={e=>{setSelContract(e.target.value);setRouteResult(null);}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
                {(locations.find(l=>l.id===selLocation)?.contracts||[]).map(c=><option key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.contractNo} — {c.name}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:4}}>3. TREATMENT DATE</label>
              <input type="date" value={testDate} onChange={e=>{setTestDate(e.target.value);setRouteResult(null);}} style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"0 16px 16px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"center"}}>
            <button onClick={runResolver} style={{padding:"10px 40px",background:"#0c1a28",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
              🔀 Resolve NHS Workflow
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {routeResult&&<div>
          {routeResult.blocked
            ?<div style={{background:"#fff5f5",borderRadius:12,border:"1.5px solid #fecaca",padding:"16px",marginBottom:14}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:"#dc2626",marginBottom:4}}>⛔ Claim Blocked — Cannot Route</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{routeResult.error}</div>
            </div>
            :<div style={{background:"#f0fdf4",borderRadius:12,border:"1.5px solid #bbf7d0",padding:"16px",marginBottom:14}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:12}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:32}}>{routeResult.flag}</span>
                <div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#16a34a"}}>✓ Claim Resolved — {routeResult.regionLabel}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>Auto-generated: <strong>{routeResult.claimForm}</strong> claim via <strong>{routeResult.submissionMethod}</strong></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:12}}>
                {[{l:"NHS Region",v:routeResult.regionLabel},{l:"Claim Form",v:routeResult.claimForm},{l:"Currency",v:routeResult.currency},{l:"NHS Authority",v:routeResult.authority},{l:"Submission Endpoint",v:routeResult.submissionEndpoint?.replace("https://","").split("/")[0]||"Private"},{l:"Ruleset Version",v:routeResult.rulesetVersion},{l:"Location",v:routeResult.location},{l:"Contract",v:routeResult.contract},{l:"Submission Method",v:routeResult.submissionMethod}].map(f=>(
                  <div key={f.l} style={{padding:"8px 10px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
                    <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:2}}>{f.l}</div>
                    <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151"}}>{f.v}</div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:6}}>ACTIVE MODULES FOR THIS CLAIM:</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                {routeResult.modules?.map(m=><span key={m} style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dbeafe",color:"#1d4ed8"}}>{m}</span>)}
              </div>
            </div>}
        </div>}

        {/* Architecture note */}
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:8}}>Architecture: How Region is Determined</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center",fontSize:11,color:"#374151",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {["Treatment Plan","→","Appointment / Location","→","NHS Contract","→","NHS Region","→","Claim Form + Ruleset + Routing"].map((step,i)=>(
              <span key={i} style={step==="→"?{color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:14}:{padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:step==="Treatment Plan"?"#f8fafc":step==="NHS Region"?"#f0fdf4":step.includes("Claim Form")?"#dbeafe":"#eff6ff",fontWeight:600,color:step.includes("Claim Form")?"#1d4ed8":step==="NHS Region"?"#16a34a":"#374151"}}>{step}</span>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{marginTop:10,fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1.7}}>
            Region is NEVER determined from patient nationality, postcode, or address. It is always resolved from the practice location → contract chain. This matches Dentally, EXACT, and R4 internal architecture.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── REGIONAL RULES ENGINE ── */}
    {tab==="rules"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:960,display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14}}>
        {Object.entries(REGIONAL_RULES).map(([rid,rules])=>{
          const region=NHS_REGION_DEFS[rid];
          return(
          <div key={rid} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,border:`1.5px solid ${region.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
            <div style={{padding:"12px 16px",background:region.bg,borderBottom:`1px solid ${region.border}`,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:22}}>{region.flag}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:region.color}}>{region.label}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#64748b"}}>Ruleset v{region.rulesetVersion} · {region.claimForm} · {region.currency}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            {Object.entries(rules).map(([ruleType,ruleList])=>(
              <div key={ruleType} style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${region.border}30`}}>
                <div style={{padding:"6px 14px",background:region.bg+"60",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:region.color,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".07em"}}>{ruleType}</div>
                {ruleList.map((r,ri)=>(
                  <div key={ri} style={{display:"flex",gap:7,padding:"5px 14px",borderTop:ri>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
                    <span style={{color:region.color,fontSize:10,flexShrink:0}}>·</span>
                    <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#374151"}}>{r}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── SUBMISSION ROUTING ── */}
    {tab==="routing"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
          {Object.values(NHS_REGION_DEFS).filter(r=>r.id!=="private").map((region,i)=>{
            const regionContracts=locations.flatMap(l=>l.contracts).filter(c=>c.region===region.id&&c.active);
            return(
            <div key={region.id} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1.5px solid ${region.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px",background:region.bg,borderBottom:`1px solid ${region.border}`,display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:20}}>{region.flag}</span>
                <div style={{flex:1}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:800,color:region.color}}>{region.label}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{region.authority}</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{textAlign:"right"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:region.color}}>{region.claimForm}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{regionContracts.length} active contract{regionContracts.length!==1?"s":""}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{padding:"10px 16px"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:4}}>SUBMISSION ENDPOINT</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151",background:"#f8fafc",padding:"5px 9px",borderRadius:6,marginBottom:8}}>{region.submissionEndpoint||"N/A — Private invoice only"}</div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:"#dcfce7",color:"#16a34a"}}>v{region.rulesetVersion}</span>
                  {regionContracts.map(c=><span key={c.id} style={{fontSize:9,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:region.bg,color:region.color}}>{c.contractNo}</span>)}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* ── RULES VERSIONING ── */}
    {tab==="versioning"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:900}}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:12,fontWeight:800}}>NHS Rules Version History — Effective Dates</div>
          {[
            {region:"England",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿",version:"2026.04",change:"Fissure sealant Band 2 · Nurse-led FV · Unscheduled Care £60+£15 · Denture category migration",effective:"2026-04-01",status:"active",c:"#1d4ed8"},
            {region:"Wales",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿",version:"2026.04",change:"Care Package system · April 2026 catalogue · Transitional pricing · ACORN pilot",effective:"2026-04-01",status:"active",c:"#16a34a"},
            {region:"England",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿",version:"2025.11",change:"CDS codes 9380-9383 mandatory — Other Treatment deprecated",effective:"2025-11-30",status:"active",c:"#1d4ed8"},
            {region:"England",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿",version:"2025.08",change:"CDS codes 9380-9383 introduced — Other Treatment warning period begins",effective:"2025-08-01",status:"active",c:"#1d4ed8"},
            {region:"All",flag:"🌍",version:"2024.10",change:"SNOMED CT codes mandatory on all NHS claim items",effective:"2024-10-01",status:"active",c:"#0d9488"},
            {region:"England",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿",version:"2024.04",change:"Band 3 charge uplift to £319.10 · Band 1 to £26.80 · Band 2 to £73.50",effective:"2024-04-01",status:"active",c:"#1d4ed8"},
            {region:"Scotland",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿",version:"2026.01",change:"ASN capitation — Section X Code 10(b) · HCN mandatory",effective:"2026-01-01",status:"active",c:"#7c3aed"},
            {region:"NI",flag:"🏴󠁧󠁢󠁮󠁩󠁲󠁿",version:"2026.01",change:"Multi-panel number support · Tier Amount prior approval",effective:"2026-01-01",status:"active",c:"#dc2626"},
          ].map((v,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 14px",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none",alignItems:"center"}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:14,flexShrink:0}}>{v.flag}</span>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",marginBottom:2}}>{v.change}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{v.region} · Ruleset v{v.version} · From {v.effective}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:5,background:v.c+"20",color:v.c}}>v{v.version}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN FEATURES — with working Manage Per-Practice modal
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA=[
  {id:"P1",name:"Riverside Dentistry",location:"Southampton SO14",plan:"Growth",enabled:[]},
  {id:"P2",name:"City Smile Clinic",location:"London EC1",plan:"Enterprise",enabled:["whatsapp","receptionai","ai_growth","lab_pro"]},
  {id:"P3",name:"Northside Dental",location:"Manchester M1",plan:"Starter",enabled:[]},
  {id:"P4",name:"Bayview Dentists",location:"Bristol BS1",plan:"Growth",enabled:["whatsapp"]},
  {id:"P5",name:"The Smile Studio",location:"Edinburgh EH1",plan:"Growth",enabled:["lab_pro"]},
  {id:"P6",name:"Dental House",location:"Birmingham B1",plan:"Starter",enabled:[]},
  {id:"P7",name:"Sunshine Dental",location:"Leeds LS1",plan:"Growth",enabled:["whatsapp"]},
  {id:"P8",name:"Coastal Dentistry",location:"Brighton BN1",plan:"Starter",enabled:[]},
];
const FEATURES_DATA=[
  {id:"whatsapp",   name:"WhatsApp Business",icon:"💬",desc:"Two-way patient messaging via Meta WhatsApp Business API",price:39,provider:"Meta",stable:true},
  {id:"receptionai",name:"Reception AI",icon:"📞",desc:"24/7 AI phone receptionist — books, cancels, transfers",price:79,provider:"Twilio + OpenAI",stable:true,new:true},
  {id:"ai_growth",  name:"AI Growth Tools",icon:"🤖",desc:"AI-powered recall, short-notice slot filler, review gating",price:49,provider:"OpenAI",stable:true},
  {id:"lab_pro",    name:"Lab Portal Pro",icon:"🔬",desc:"Full lab case tracking, kanban, turnaround analytics",price:29,provider:"Internal",stable:true},
  {id:"xray_cloud", name:"X-Ray Cloud Sync",icon:"☢️",desc:"DICOM cloud storage, sharing, and remote viewing",price:59,provider:"AWS S3",stable:false},
  {id:"finance",    name:"Patient Finance",icon:"💰",desc:"Chrysalis, Medenta, Novuna — patient payment plans",price:0,provider:"Multiple",stable:true,note:"Revenue share"},
];

function AdminFeatures(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [practiceFeatures,setPracticeFeatures]=useState(()=>{
    const map={};
    ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.forEach(p=>{map[p.id]=new Set(p.enabled);});
    return map;
  });
  const [manageModal,setManageModal]=useState(null); // feature obj
  const [addFeatureModal,setAddFeatureModal]=useState(false);
  const [newFeature,setNewFeature]=useState({name:"",price:"",provider:"",desc:""});

  const togglePracticeFeature=(featureId,practiceId)=>{
    setPracticeFeatures(prev=>{
      const s=new Set(prev[practiceId]||[]);
      s.has(featureId)?s.delete(featureId):s.add(featureId);
      return {...prev,[practiceId]:s};
    });
  };
  const countEnabled=(featureId)=>Object.values(practiceFeatures).filter(s=>s.has(featureId)).length;
  const totalAddOnRev=FEATURES_DATA.reduce((s,f)=>s+(f.price*countEnabled(f.id)),0);

  return(
  <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* Manage Per-Practice Modal */}
    {manageModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:520,maxHeight:"80vh",overflowY:"auto",boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"16px 20px",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",position:"sticky",top:0,background:"#fff",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800}}>{manageModal.icon} {manageModal.name} — Per-Practice Control</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{manageModal.price>0?`£${manageModal.price}/mo per practice`:manageModal.note||"Revenue share"} · {countEnabled(manageModal.id)}/{ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.length} enabled</div>
          </div>
          <button onClick={()=>{setManageModal(null);doToast("✓ Feature settings saved");}} style={{border:"none",background:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:20,color:"#94a3b8",lineHeight:1}}>✕</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 20px"}}>
          {ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.map((p,i)=>{
            const on=practiceFeatures[p.id]?.has(manageModal.id);
            return(
            <div key={p.id} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",padding:"10px 0",borderTop:i>0?"1px solid #f8fafc":"none"}}>
              <div style={{flex:1}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{p.name}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{p.location} · {p.plan}</div>
              </div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:10,color:on?"#16a34a":"#94a3b8",fontWeight:600}}>{on?"Enabled":"Disabled"}</span>
                <button onClick={()=>togglePracticeFeature(manageModal.id,p.id)}
                  style={{width:44,height:24,borderRadius:12,border:"none",background:on?"#0d9488":"#d1d5db",cursor:"pointer",position:"relative",padding:0,transition:"background .2s",flexShrink:0}}>
                  <div style={{width:18,height:18,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#fff",position:"absolute",top:3,left:on?23:3,transition:"left .2s",boxShadow:"0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"}}/>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",borderTop:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{countEnabled(manageModal.id)} practices · £{manageModal.price*countEnabled(manageModal.id)}/mo add-on revenue</span>
          <button onClick={()=>{setManageModal(null);doToast(`✓ ${manageModal.name} settings saved across all practices`);}} style={{padding:"8px 20px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Save Changes</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Add Feature Modal */}
    {addFeatureModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:440,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Add New Feature Module</div>
        {[{l:"Feature Name",k:"name",ph:"e.g. Online Booking"},{l:"Monthly Price (£)",k:"price",ph:"0 for revenue share"},{l:"Provider",k:"provider",ph:"e.g. Stripe, Internal"},{l:"Description",k:"desc",ph:"Short description…"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input value={newFeature[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewFeature(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginTop:14}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setAddFeatureModal(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>{doToast(`✓ ${newFeature.name||"Feature"} added to feature catalogue`);setAddFeatureModal(false);setNewFeature({name:"",price:"",provider:"",desc:""}); }} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add Feature</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:16}}>
      <div>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:3}}>Optional Feature Management</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#64748b"}}>Control which optional features are enabled per practice. Changes update the monthly bill automatically.</div>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:12,textAlign:"right"}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Total Add-on Revenue</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:22,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>£{totalAddOnRev}/mo</div>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>setAddFeatureModal(true)} style={{padding:"10px 18px",background:"#f97316",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>+ Add Feature</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr))",gap:12}}>
      {FEATURES_DATA.map(f=>{
        const enabled=countEnabled(f.id);
        return(
        <div key={f.id} style={{background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:12,padding:16,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:26,flexShrink:0}}>{f.icon}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
                {f.name}
                {f.new&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#fef3c7",color:"#d97706"}}>NEW</span>}
                {!f.stable&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:5,background:"#ede9fe",color:"#7c3aed"}}>BETA</span>}
              </div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginTop:2}}>{f.desc}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>Provider: {f.provider}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3}}>
                <span>{enabled}/{ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.length} practices enabled</span>
                <span>{Math.round(enabled/ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.length*100)}% adoption</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{height:5,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:3,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${enabled/ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.length*100}%`,background:"#0d9488",borderRadius:3}}/></div>
            </div>
            <div style={{textAlign:"right",flexShrink:0}}>
              {f.price>0?<><div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,color:"#0d9488"}}>£{f.price}<span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:400,color:"#94a3b8"}}>/mo</span></div>
              <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>£{f.price*enabled}/mo total</div></>
              :<div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#d97706"}}>{f.note||"Revenue share"}</div>}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setManageModal(f)} style={{flex:1,padding:"7px",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151",transition:"all .1s"}}
              onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f0fffe"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background="#f8fafc"}>
              Manage Per-Practice
            </button>
            <button onClick={()=>setManageModal(f)} style={{padding:"7px 10px",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>⚙</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN PRACTICES — with working Add Practice + click to manage
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminPractices(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [search,setSearch]=useState("");
  const [practices,setPractices]=useState([
    {id:"P1",name:"Riverside Dentistry",location:"Southampton SO14",plan:"Growth",users:8,seats:15,patients:2847,uda:3200,mrr:149,addons:["whatsapp","lab"],status:"active"},
    {id:"P2",name:"City Smile Clinic",  location:"London EC1",   plan:"Enterprise",users:15,seats:99,patients:6120,uda:8500,mrr:299,addons:["whatsapp","ai","lab"],status:"active"},
    {id:"P3",name:"Northside Dental",   location:"Manchester M1",plan:"Starter",  users:4,seats:5, patients:1240,uda:1600,mrr:99, addons:[],status:"active"},
    {id:"P4",name:"Bayview Dentists",   location:"Bristol BS1",  plan:"Growth",   users:7,seats:15,patients:3100,uda:3200,mrr:149,addons:["whatsapp"],status:"active"},
    {id:"P5",name:"The Smile Studio",   location:"Edinburgh EH1",plan:"Growth",   users:6,seats:15,patients:2200,uda:2400,mrr:149,addons:["lab"],status:"active"},
    {id:"P6",name:"Dental House",       location:"Birmingham B1",plan:"Starter",  users:3,seats:5, patients:890, uda:1200,mrr:99, addons:[],status:"suspended"},
    {id:"P7",name:"Sunshine Dental",    location:"Leeds LS1",    plan:"Growth",   users:5,seats:15,patients:1800,uda:2800,mrr:149,addons:["whatsapp"],status:"active"},
    {id:"P8",name:"Coastal Dentistry",  location:"Brighton BN1", plan:"Starter",  users:4,seats:5, patients:1100,uda:1600,mrr:99, addons:[],status:"active"},
  ]);
  const [selPractice,setSelPractice]=useState(null);
  const [showAddPractice,setShowAddPractice]=useState(false);
  const [newP,setNewP]=useState({name:"",location:"",plan:"Starter",seats:5,uda:0});

  const totalMRR=practices.reduce((s,p)=>s+p.mrr,0);
  const filtered=practices.filter(p=>!search||p.name.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase())||p.location.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()));
  const PLAN_C={"Starter":"#94a3b8","Growth":"#0d9488","Enterprise":"#7c3aed"};

  const addPractice=()=>{
    if(!newP.name.trim())return;
    const id="P"+Date.now();
    setPractices(p=>[...p,{id,name:newP.name,location:newP.location||"—",plan:newP.plan,users:1,seats:parseInt(newP.seats)||5,patients:0,uda:parseInt(newP.uda)||0,mrr:{Starter:99,Growth:149,Enterprise:299}[newP.plan]||99,addons:[],status:"active"}]);
    setShowAddPractice(false);setNewP({name:"",location:"",plan:"Starter",seats:5,uda:0});
    doToast("✓ Practice added — onboarding email sent");
  };

  if(selPractice){
    const p=selPractice;
    return(
    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:20}}>
      {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:16}}>
        <button onClick={()=>setSelPractice(null)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",display:"flex",gap:4,alignItems:"center"}}>← Back to All Practices</button>
        <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>{p.name}</div>
        <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:p.status==="active"?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:p.status==="active"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{p.status.toUpperCase()}</span>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12,marginBottom:16}}>
        {[{l:"Plan",v:p.plan,c:PLAN_C[p.plan]},{l:"MRR",v:"£"+p.mrr+"/mo",c:"#0d9488"},{l:"Users",v:p.users+"/"+p.seats,c:"#374151"},{l:"Patients",v:p.patients.toLocaleString(),c:"#374151"},{l:"UDA Target",v:p.uda.toLocaleString(),c:"#1d4ed8"},{l:"Add-ons",v:p.addons.length||"None",c:"#7c3aed"}].map(s=>(
          <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"12px 16px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:3}}>{s.l}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800,color:s.c}}>{s.v}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:16,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        {[{l:"🔑 Reset Password",c:"#374151"},{l:"📧 Resend Invite",c:"#1d4ed8"},{l:"⚡ Change Plan",c:"#7c3aed"},{l:"⏸ Suspend Practice",c:"#dc2626"},{l:"📊 View Reports",c:"#0d9488"}].map(btn=>(
          <button key={btn.l} onClick={()=>doToast("✓ "+btn.l+" for "+p.name)} style={{padding:"7px 16px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:btn.c}}>{btn.l}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px",marginBottom:12}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:8}}>Active Add-on Features</div>
        {p.addons.length===0?<div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>No add-ons enabled</div>:
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>{p.addons.map(a=><span key={a} style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:"#f0fffe",color:"#0d9488",border:"1px solid #99f6e4"}}>{a}</span>)}</div>}
      </div>
      {/* Per-practice integrations */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{padding:"10px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center"}}>
          <span style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Integrations & Configuration</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>Configured per-practice — push updates instantly</span>
        </div>
        <div style={{padding:"12px 14px"}}>
          <IntegrationsPage practiceName={p.name}/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    );
  }

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}

    {showAddPractice&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:440,padding:24,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:14}}>Add New Practice</div>
        {[{l:"Practice Name *",k:"name",ph:"e.g. Riverside Dentistry"},{l:"Location",k:"location",ph:"e.g. Southampton SO14"},{l:"UDA Target",k:"uda",ph:"0 for private only",type:"number"}].map(f=>(
          <div key={f.k} style={{marginBottom:10}}>
            <label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>{f.l}</label>
            <input type={f.type||"text"} value={newP[f.k]} onChange={e=>setNewP(p=>({...p,[f.k]:e.target.value}))} placeholder={f.ph}
              style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
          </div>
        ))}
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:8,marginBottom:12}}>
          <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Plan</label>
            <select value={newP.plan} onChange={e=>setNewP(p=>({...p,plan:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
              <option>Starter</option><option>Growth</option><option>Enterprise</option>
            </select></div>
          <div><label style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",display:"block",marginBottom:3}}>Seat Limit</label>
            <input type="number" value={newP.seats} onChange={e=>setNewP(p=>({...p,seats:e.target.value}))} style={{width:"100%",padding:"7px 8px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"monospace",outline:"none"}}/></div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowAddPractice(false)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={addPractice} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#f97316",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Add Practice</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    <div style={{padding:"12px 20px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{position:"relative",flex:1}}>
        <input value={search} onChange={e=>setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="Search practices by name or location…"
          style={{width:"100%",padding:"8px 10px 8px 34px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none",boxSizing:"border-box"}}/>
        <span style={{position:"absolute",left:10,top:"50%",transform:"translateY(-50%)",fontSize:13}}>🔍</span>
      </div>
      <div style={{padding:"8px 14px",background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",flexShrink:0}}>MRR: £{totalMRR.toLocaleString()}</div>
      <button onClick={()=>setShowAddPractice(true)} style={{padding:"8px 18px",background:"#f97316",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>+ Add Practice</button>
    </div>

    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto"}}>
      <table style={{width:"100%",borderCollapse:"collapse",fontSize:12}}>
        <thead><tr style={{background:"#f8fafc",position:"sticky",top:0}}>
          {["Practice","Location","Plan","Users / Seat Limit","Patients","UDA Target","Add-ons","MRR"].map(h=><th key={h} style={{padding:"9px 14px",textAlign:"left",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:".06em",borderBottom:"2px solid #e2e8f0"}}>{h}</th>)}
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>{filtered.map((p,i)=>(
          <tr key={p.id} onClick={()=>setSelPractice(p)} style={{borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",background:p.status==="suspended"?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}}
            onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=p.status==="suspended"?"#fff0f0":"#f0fffe"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.background=p.status==="suspended"?"#fff5f5":"#fff"}>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488",cursor:"pointer"}}>{p.name}</div>
              {p.status==="suspended"&&<span style={{fontSize:8,fontWeight:800,padding:"1px 6px",borderRadius:4,background:"#fee2e2",color:"#dc2626"}}>SUSPENDED</span>}
            </td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",color:"#64748b"}}>{p.location}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px"}}><span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 9px",borderRadius:6,background:PLAN_C[p.plan]+"20",color:PLAN_C[p.plan]}}>{p.plan}</span></td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px"}}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",gap:6,alignItems:"center"}}>
                <span style={{fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.users} / {p.seats}</span>
                <div style={{width:50,height:4,background:"#f1f5f9",borderRadius:2,overflow:"hidden"}}><div style={{height:"100%",width:`${(p.users/p.seats)*100}%`,background:p.users/p.seats>0.8?"#dc2626":"#0d9488",borderRadius:2}}/></div>
              </div>
            </td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.patients.toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{p.uda.toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px"}}><div style={{display:"flex",gap:4,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>{p.addons.length===0?<span style={{color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:10}}>None</span>:p.addons.map(a=><span key={a} style={{fontSize:9,padding:"1px 7px",borderRadius:4,background:"#f0fffe",color:"#0d9488",border:"1px solid #99f6e4"}}>{a}</span>)}</div></td>
            <td style={{padding:"11px 14px",fontFamily:"monospace",fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>£{p.mrr}/m</td>
          </tr>
        ))}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DATA MANAGER
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminDataManager(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [selPractice,setSelPractice]=useState("all");
  const [activePractice,setActivePractice]=useState(null);
  const [showConfirm,setShowConfirm]=useState(null);
  const [running,setRunning]=useState(null);
  const [showImportModal,setShowImportModal]=useState(false);
  const [uploadedFile,setUploadedFile]=useState(null);
  const [importSource,setImportSource]=useState("r4");
  const [importStep,setImportStep]=useState(1); // 1=upload, 2=preview, 3=done
  const [importProgress,setImportProgress]=useState(0);
  const fileInputRef=useRef(null);

  const goPractice=()=>{
    if(selPractice==="all"){setActivePractice(null);doToast("Scope: All Practices");}
    else{const p=ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.find(x=>x.id===selPractice);setActivePractice(p);doToast("Scope set to: "+p?.name);}
  };

  const handleFileSelect=(e)=>{
    const f=e.target.files[0];
    if(f){setUploadedFile(f);setImportStep(2);}
  };

  const startImportRun=()=>{
    setImportStep(3); setImportProgress(0);
    const iv=setInterval(()=>setImportProgress(p=>{
      if(p>=100){clearInterval(iv);doToast("✓ Data Import / Migration completed for "+(activePractice?.name||"All Practices"));return 100;}
      return p+Math.floor(Math.random()*12)+4;
    }),180);
  };

  const runAction=(item)=>{
    if(item.title==="Data Import / Migration"){setShowImportModal(true);setImportStep(1);setUploadedFile(null);setImportProgress(0);return;}
    if(item.title==="GDPR Data Export"){
      setRunning(item.title);
      setTimeout(()=>{setRunning(null);doToast("✓ GDPR export ready — download link sent to admin email");},1200);
      return;
    }
    if(item.destructive&&!showConfirm){setShowConfirm(item);return;}
    setShowConfirm(null);
    setRunning(item.title);
    const practiceLabel=activePractice?activePractice.name:"All Practices";
    setTimeout(()=>{setRunning(null);doToast("✓ "+item.title+" completed for "+practiceLabel);},1500);
  };

  const ITEMS=[
    {title:"GDPR Data Export",icon:"⬇",desc:"Export all patient data in machine-readable format (JSON/CSV). UK GDPR Article 20 compliant.",btn:"Export Data",c:"#1d4ed8",destructive:false},
    {title:"Data Import / Migration",icon:"⬆",desc:"Import patient records, appointments, and clinical notes from R4, Dentally, EXACT.",btn:"Start Import",c:"#0d9488",destructive:false},
    {title:"Archive Practice",icon:"📦",desc:"Archive a suspended practice. Data retained for 7 years per CQC. Only available for suspended practices.",btn:"Archive Practice",c:"#d97706",destructive:true},
    {title:"Data Integrity Check",icon:"🔍",desc:"Scan all records — orphaned records, missing NHS numbers, duplicate patients, broken relationships.",btn:"Run Check",c:"#7c3aed",destructive:false},
    {title:"Database Backup",icon:"☁️",desc:"Trigger immediate backup to AWS S3. AES-256 encrypted. Adds to existing automated backup schedule.",btn:"Backup Now",c:"#16a34a",destructive:false},
    {title:"Purge Deleted Records",icon:"🗑",desc:"Permanently delete records past their retention period. Irreversible — requires explicit confirmation.",btn:"Review & Purge",c:"#dc2626",destructive:true},
  ];

  return(
  <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600,boxShadow:"0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1)"}}>{toast}</div>}

    {/* File Upload / Import Modal */}
    {showImportModal&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.55)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:900}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:16,width:520,padding:28,boxShadow:"0 24px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"center",marginBottom:20}}>
          <div style={{fontSize:16,fontWeight:800}}>⬆ Data Import / Migration</div>
          <button onClick={()=>{setShowImportModal(false);setImportStep(1);}} style={{background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:18,color:"#94a3b8"}}>✕</button>
        </div>

        {/* Step 1: Choose source + upload */}
        {importStep===1&&<>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8}}>Source system</div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:18,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            {[{id:"r4",l:"R4+"},{id:"dentally",l:"Dentally"},{id:"exact",l:"EXACT"},{id:"soe",l:"SOE Exact"},{id:"csv",l:"Generic CSV"}].map(s=>(
              <button key={s.id} onClick={()=>setImportSource(s.id)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:`2px solid ${importSource===s.id?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,borderRadius:8,background:importSource===s.id?"#f0fffe":"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:importSource===s.id?700:400,color:importSource===s.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b"}}>{s.l}</button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8}}>Upload data file</div>
          <div onClick={()=>fileInputRef.current?.click()} style={{border:"2px dashed #cbd5e1",borderRadius:12,padding:"32px 20px",textAlign:"center",cursor:"pointer",background:"#f8fafc",transition:"border-color .15s"}}
            onMouseOver={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#0d9488"} onMouseOut={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#cbd5e1"}>
            <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:8}}>📁</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,color:"#374151",marginBottom:4}}>Click to upload or drag & drop</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94a3b8"}}>Supports .csv, .xml, .json, .zip · Max 500MB</div>
            <input ref={fileInputRef} type="file" accept=".csv,.xml,.json,.zip" style={{display:"none"}} onChange={handleFileSelect}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{marginTop:14,padding:"9px 12px",background:"#fffbeb",border:"1px solid #fde68a",borderRadius:8,fontSize:10,color:"#92400e"}}>
            ⚠ Always test imports on a non-production environment first. Imports will be validated before committing.
          </div>
        </>}

        {/* Step 2: Preview */}
        {importStep===2&&uploadedFile&&<>
          <div style={{padding:"12px 14px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:10,marginBottom:16,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:20}}>📄</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>{uploadedFile.name}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{(uploadedFile.size/1024).toFixed(1)} KB · {importSource.toUpperCase()} format · {activePractice?.name||"All Practices"}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,color:"#16a34a",padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:6,background:"#dcfce7"}}>✓ Valid</span>
          </div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:8}}>Import preview</div>
          <div style={{background:"#f8fafc",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"12px",marginBottom:14}}>
            {[{l:"Patients detected",v:"2,847",c:"#0d9488"},{l:"Appointments",v:"14,203",c:"#0369a1"},{l:"Clinical notes",v:"8,941",c:"#7c3aed"},{l:"Duplicates found",v:"23",c:"#d97706"}].map(r=>(
              <div key={r.l} style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",padding:"5px 0",borderBottom:"1px solid #f1f5f9",fontSize:11}}>
                <span style={{color:"#64748b"}}>{r.l}</span><span style={{fontWeight:800,fontFamily:"monospace",color:r.c}}>{r.v}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
            <button onClick={()=>setImportStep(1)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11}}>← Back</button>
            <button onClick={startImportRun} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>▶ Start Import</button>
          </div>
        </>}

        {/* Step 3: Progress */}
        {importStep===3&&<>
          <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"10px 0"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:36,marginBottom:12}}>{importProgress>=100?"✅":"⏳"}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:14,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>{importProgress>=100?"Import Complete!":"Importing data…"}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:20}}>{importProgress>=100?"All records imported and validated":"Processing your file — please don't close this window"}</div>
            <div style={{height:10,background:"#e2e8f0",borderRadius:10,overflow:"hidden",marginBottom:8}}>
              <div style={{height:"100%",background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#0d9488,#0369a1)",borderRadius:10,width:importProgress+"%",transition:"width .3s"}}/>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#0d9488"}}>{importProgress}%</div>
            {importProgress>=100&&<button onClick={()=>{setShowImportModal(false);setImportStep(1);}} style={{marginTop:16,padding:"9px 24px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Done ✓</button>}
          </div>
        </>}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {/* Confirm modal for destructive actions */}
    {showConfirm&&<div style={{position:"fixed",inset:0,background:"rgba(0,0,0,.5)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",zIndex:800}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:14,width:380,padding:22,boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25)"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:6}}>Confirm: {showConfirm.title}</div>
        <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:6}}>Practice: <strong>{activePractice?.name||"All Practices"}</strong></div>
        <div style={{padding:"8px 12px",background:"#fff5f5",borderRadius:8,border:"1px solid #fecaca",fontSize:11,color:"#dc2626",marginBottom:14}}>⚠ This action is {showConfirm.title==="Purge Deleted Records"?"permanent and cannot be undone":"significant and requires your confirmation"}.</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setShowConfirm(null)} style={{flex:1,padding:"9px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>Cancel</button>
          <button onClick={()=>runAction({...showConfirm,destructive:false})} style={{flex:2,padding:"9px",background:showConfirm.c,color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>Yes, {showConfirm.btn}</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>}

    <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Data Manager</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:14}}>GDPR export, import, archive, and data integrity tools. Select a specific practice or operate across all.</div>

    {/* Practice selector */}
    <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,background:"#fff",padding:"10px 14px",borderRadius:10,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0"}}>
      <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b",flexShrink:0}}>Practice scope:</span>
      <select value={selPractice} onChange={e=>setSelPractice(e.target.value)}
        style={{flex:1,padding:"7px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"inherit",outline:"none"}}>
        <option value="all">All Practices</option>
        {ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.name} — {p.location}</option>)}
      </select>
      <button onClick={goPractice} style={{padding:"7px 20px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>Go →</button>
      {activePractice&&<span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,padding:"3px 10px",borderRadius:6,background:"#f0fffe",color:"#0d9488",border:"1px solid #99f6e4",flexShrink:0}}>✓ {activePractice.name}</span>}
    </div>

    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
      {ITEMS.map((item,i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:`1px solid ${running===item.title?"#0d9488":"#e2e8f0"}`,padding:"16px",transition:"border .2s"}}>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:10}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:26,flexShrink:0}}>{item.icon}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2}}>{item.title}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",lineHeight:1.5}}>{item.desc}</div>
              {item.destructive&&<div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#dc2626",marginTop:3}}>⚠ Requires confirmation</div>}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
            <button onClick={()=>runAction(item)}
              disabled={running===item.title}
              style={{padding:"8px 18px",background:running===item.title?"#e2e8f0":item.c,color:running===item.title?"#94a3b8":"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:8,cursor:running===item.title?"not-allowed":"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,transition:"all .2s"}}>
              {running===item.title?"Running…":item.btn}
            </button>
            {activePractice&&<span style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>→ {activePractice.name}</span>}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SYSTEM MONITORING
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminSystemMonitoring(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("health");
  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 18px",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:2}}>System Monitoring</div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,marginTop:8}}>
        {["health","api","errors","performance"].map(t=><button key={t} onClick={()=>setTab(t)} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t?700:400,color:tab===t?"#0d9488":"#64748b",textTransform:"capitalize"}}>{t}</button>)}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
      {tab==="health"&&<div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
        {[{l:"API Gateway",v:"✓ Online",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Latency: 42ms"},{l:"Database",v:"✓ Healthy",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Pool: 12/50"},{l:"NHS BSA Compass",v:"✓ Connected",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Last sync: 2m ago"},{l:"WebEDI Wales",v:"⚠ Degraded",c:"#d97706",sub:"Response slow"},{l:"WhatsApp API",v:"✓ Connected",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Meta verified"},{l:"Twilio (AI Phone)",v:"✓ Active",c:"#16a34a",sub:"8 AI agents online"},{l:"AWS S3 Backup",v:"✓ Synced",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Last: 5m ago"},{l:"Email / SMTP",v:"✓ Healthy",c:"#16a34a",sub:"SendGrid — 98% delivery"},{l:"System Uptime",v:"99.98%",c:"#16a34a",sub:"Last 30 days"}].map(s=>(
          <div key={s.l} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${s.c}30`,padding:"12px 14px",borderLeft:`3px solid ${s.c}`}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",marginBottom:3}}>{s.l}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:800,color:s.c}}>{s.v}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8",marginTop:2}}>{s.sub}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}
      {tab==="api"&&<div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {[{endpoint:"/api/v3/claims/submit",calls:"4,821",p95:"142ms",errors:"0.2%"},{endpoint:"/api/v3/patients",calls:"12,449",p95:"38ms",errors:"0.0%"},{endpoint:"/api/v3/nhs/fp17",calls:"892",p95:"318ms",errors:"1.1%"},{endpoint:"/api/v3/calendar",calls:"8,234",p95:"51ms",errors:"0.0%"},{endpoint:"/api/v3/auth/login",calls:"2,103",p95:"89ms",errors:"0.4%"}].map((r,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:11,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#1d4ed8",flex:1}}>{r.endpoint}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",width:70,textAlign:"right"}}>{r.calls}/day</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",width:60,textAlign:"right"}}>{r.p95}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,width:50,textAlign:"right",color:r.errors==="0.0%"?"#16a34a":r.errors>"1%"?"#dc2626":"#d97706"}}>{r.errors}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>}
      {(tab==="errors"||tab==="performance")&&<div style={{padding:40,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:12}}>✓ No issues in the last 24 hours</div>}
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

function AdminSecurityCompliance(){

  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  return(
  <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}
    <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:4}}>Security & Compliance</div>
    <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b",marginBottom:16}}>Platform-wide security posture, compliance status, and access control.</div>
    <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
      {[{t:"Data Encryption",v:"✓ AES-256 at rest · TLS 1.3 in transit",c:"#16a34a"},{t:"UK GDPR Compliance",v:"✓ Article 28 DPA · ICO registered",c:"#16a34a"},{t:"CQC Data Retention",v:"✓ 7-year audit trail · Immutable logs",c:"#16a34a"},{t:"2FA Enforcement",v:"✓ All managers · 94% adoption",c:"#16a34a"},{t:"Penetration Testing",v:"Last test: Jan 2026 · No critical findings",c:"#d97706"},{t:"ISO 27001",v:"In progress — certification Q3 2026",c:"#d97706"}].map((s,i)=>(
        <div key={i} style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:10,border:`1px solid ${s.c}30`,padding:"12px 16px",display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center",borderLeft:`3px solid ${s.c}`}}>
          <div><div style={{fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:2}}>{s.t}</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>{s.v}</div></div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
    <div style={{marginTop:14,background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",padding:"16px"}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:13,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:10}}>Security Actions</div>

        {["Force 2FA Reset — All Users","Download GDPR Compliance Report","View Failed Login Attempts","Rotate API Keys","Export Security Audit"].map(a=>(
          <button key={a} onClick={()=>doToast("✓ "+a)} style={{padding:"7px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:600,color:"#374151"}}>{a}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}
