// CLOUD BACKUP
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminCloudBackup(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  return(
  <div style={{padding:18,overflowY:"auto",flex:1}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}
    <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:16}}>
      <div><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800}}>Cloud Backup — All Practices</div><div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#64748b"}}>AWS S3 · AES-256 · Real-time replication · 90-day retention</div></div>
      <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Emergency backup triggered for all practices")} style={{padding:"8px 18px",background:"#0d9488",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:9,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700}}>☁ Backup All Now</button>
    </div>
    <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 80px 80px 100px",padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"2px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
        <span>Practice</span><span>Last Backup</span><span>Size</span><span>Status</span><span>Action</span>
      </div>
      {ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.map((p,i)=>{
        const statuses=["Synced","Synced","Synced","Synced","Synced","Failed","Synced","Synced"];
        const s=statuses[i];
        return(
        <div key={p.id} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 100px 80px 80px 100px",padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",gap:8,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{p.name}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{p.location}</div></div>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{i===5?"3 days ago":"2m ago"}</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace"}}>{(Math.random()*500+100).toFixed(0)}MB</span>
          <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:s==="Synced"?"#dcfce7":"#fee2e2",color:s==="Synced"?"#16a34a":"#dc2626"}}>{s}</span>
          <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Backup triggered for "+p.name)} style={{padding:"4px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:6,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:9,fontWeight:600}}>Backup Now</button>
        </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ACTIVITY LOG + APPOINTMENT AUDIT (combined with tabs)
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const APPT_AUDIT_DATA=[
  {id:"AA1",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",practiceId:"P1",time:"Today 11:32",user:"Emma Wilson",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment Deleted",patient:"John Mills",apptTime:"Tomorrow 09:30",reason:"Patient requested cancellation",type:"delete"},
  {id:"AA2",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",practiceId:"P1",time:"Today 10:15",user:"Dr. S. Patel",role:"Dentist",action:"Appointment Rescheduled",patient:"Amy Torres",apptTime:"14 May 14:00 → 16 May 14:00",reason:"Dentist availability",type:"edit"},
  {id:"AA3",practice:"City Smile Clinic",practiceId:"P2",time:"Today 09:45",user:"Tom Baker",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment Deleted",patient:"Sarah Chen",apptTime:"Today 11:00",reason:"DNA — no show",type:"delete"},
  {id:"AA4",practice:"Northside Dental",practiceId:"P3",time:"Yesterday 17:00",user:"Dr. M. Chen",role:"Dentist",action:"Appointment Created",patient:"Robert Hall",apptTime:"20 May 10:00",reason:"New patient booking",type:"create"},
  {id:"AA5",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",practiceId:"P1",time:"Yesterday 14:30",user:"Emma Wilson",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment Status Changed",patient:"David Park",apptTime:"Yesterday 14:00",reason:"Marked as DNA",type:"status"},
  {id:"AA6",practice:"Bayview Dentists",practiceId:"P4",time:"2 days ago 16:00",user:"Sarah Phillips",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment Deleted",patient:"Unknown patient",apptTime:"2 days ago 09:00",reason:"Duplicate booking removed",type:"delete"},
];

function AdminActivityLog(){
  const [toast,setToast]=useState(null);
  const doToast=m=>{setToast(m);setTimeout(()=>setToast(null),2500);};
  const [tab,setTab]=useState("activity");
  const [selPractice,setSelPractice]=useState("all");
  const TYPE_C={delete:"#dc2626",edit:"#d97706",create:"#16a34a",status:"#1d4ed8"};
  const TYPE_BG={delete:"#fee2e2",edit:"#fef3c7",create:"#dcfce7",status:"#dbeafe"};
  const filteredAudit=selPractice==="all"?APPT_AUDIT_DATA:APPT_AUDIT_DATA.filter(a=>a.practiceId===selPractice);

  return(
  <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
    {toast&&<div style={{position:"fixed",top:64,right:18,padding:"10px 16px",background:"#f0fdf4",border:"1px solid #bbf7d0",borderRadius:9,fontSize:12,color:"#16a34a",zIndex:999,fontWeight:600}}>{toast}</div>}
    <div style={{padding:"12px 18px 0",background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #e2e8f0",flexShrink:0}}>
      <div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:800,marginBottom:8}}>Activity Log & Appointment Audit</div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0}}>
        {[{id:"activity",l:"📋 Activity Log"},{id:"appointments",l:"📅 Appointment Audit"}].map(t=>(
          <button key={t.id} onClick={()=>setTab(t.id)} style={{padding:"8px 16px",border:"none",borderBottom:`2px solid ${tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"transparent"}`,background:"transparent",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:11,fontWeight:tab===t.id?700:400,color:tab===t.id?"#0d9488":"#64748b",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{t.l}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>

    {tab==="activity"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,marginBottom:12,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        <select style={{padding:"6px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
          <option>All Practices</option>
          {ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.map(p=><option key={p.id}>{p.name}</option>)}
        </select>
        <select style={{padding:"6px 10px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
          <option>All Actions</option>
          <option>Login</option><option>Data Edit</option><option>Deletion</option><option>NHS Claim</option><option>Settings</option>
        </select>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Activity log exported to CSV")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export CSV</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        {[{time:"Today 11:32",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",user:"Emma Wilson",role:"Reception",action:"Patient record updated",detail:"John Mills — Medical history updated",type:"edit"},{time:"Today 10:15",practice:"City Smile Clinic",user:"Dr. S. Patel",role:"Dentist",action:"FP17 claim submitted",detail:"Band 2 — Amy Torres — £73.50",type:"create"},{time:"Today 09:30",practice:"Northside Dental",user:"Admin System",role:"System",action:"Automated backup completed",detail:"147ms · 234MB · AES-256",type:"status"},{time:"Yesterday 17:00",practice:"Bayview Dentists",user:"Tom Baker",role:"Reception",action:"Appointment deleted",detail:"Robert Hall — 14:00 — Reason: DNA",type:"delete"},{time:"Yesterday 16:00",practice:"Riverside Dentistry",user:"Dr. Kim (Manager)",role:"Manager",action:"Staff password reset",detail:"Emma Wilson — reset triggered",type:"edit"},{time:"2 days ago 14:30",practice:"City Smile Clinic",user:"Reception AI",role:"System",action:"Appointment booked via AI",detail:"Priya Sharma — 10:00 — New patient",type:"create"}].map((a,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"flex",gap:12,padding:"10px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",alignItems:"center"}}>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#94a3b8",width:120,flexShrink:0}}>{a.time}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",width:140,flexShrink:0}}>{a.practice}</span>
            <div style={{flex:1}}>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:600}}>{a.user}</span>
              <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94a3b8"}}> · {a.role}</span>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#374151"}}>{a.action} — {a.detail}</div>
            </div>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:TYPE_BG[a.type],color:TYPE_C[a.type],flexShrink:0}}>{a.type}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>}

    {tab==="appointments"&&<div style={{flex:1,overflowY:"auto",padding:18}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:8,alignItems:"center",marginBottom:14,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
        <label style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700,color:"#64748b"}}>Practice:</label>
        <select value={selPractice} onChange={e=>setSelPractice(e.target.value)} style={{padding:"7px 12px",border:"1.5px solid #0d9488",borderRadius:8,fontSize:12,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit",background:"#f0fffe",color:"#0d9488",fontWeight:600}}>
          <option value="all">All Practices</option>
          {ADMIN_PRACTICES_DATA.map(p=><option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.name}</option>)}
        </select>
        <select style={{padding:"7px 12px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,fontSize:11,outline:"none",fontFamily:"inherit"}}>
          <option>All Actions</option><option>Deleted</option><option>Rescheduled</option><option>Created</option><option>Status Changed</option>
        </select>
        <span style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",marginLeft:"auto"}}>{filteredAudit.length} records</span>
        <button onClick={()=>doToast("✓ Appointment audit exported")} style={{padding:"6px 14px",border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",borderRadius:8,background:"#f8fafc",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:10,color:"#64748b",fontWeight:600}}>⬇ Export</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:12,border:"1px solid #e2e8f0",overflow:"hidden"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"120px 1fr 80px 140px 80px",padding:"8px 16px",background:"#f8fafc",borderBottom:"2px solid #e2e8f0",fontSize:9,fontWeight:700,color:"#94a3b8",textTransform:"uppercase",gap:8}}>
          <span>Time</span><span>Patient / Detail</span><span>Action By</span><span>Appointment</span><span>Type</span>
        </div>
        {filteredAudit.map((a,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"120px 1fr 80px 140px 80px",padding:"11px 16px",borderBottom:"1px solid #f8fafc",gap:8,alignItems:"center",background:a.type==="delete"?"#fff8f8":"#fff"}}>
            <div><div style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#64748b"}}>{a.time}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{a.practice}</div></div>
            <div><div style={{fontSize:11,fontWeight:700}}>{a.patient}</div><div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#64748b"}}>{a.action}{a.reason&&" — "+a.reason}</div></div>
            <div><div style={{fontSize:10,fontWeight:600}}>{a.user}</div><div style={{fontSize:9,color:"#94a3b8"}}>{a.role}</div></div>
            <span style={{fontSize:10,fontFamily:"monospace",color:"#374151"}}>{a.apptTime}</span>
            <span style={{fontSize:9,fontWeight:800,padding:"2px 8px",borderRadius:5,background:TYPE_BG[a.type],color:TYPE_C[a.type]}}>{a.type}</span>
          </div>
        ))}
        {filteredAudit.length===0&&<div style={{padding:24,textAlign:"center",color:"#94a3b8",fontSize:11}}>No appointment audit records for this practice</div>}
      </div>
    </div>}
  </div>
  );
}

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN SUPPORT — with working View Log
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

export default function App(){
  const [user,setUser]=useState(null);
  const [userPerms,setUserPerms]=useState(INIT_USER_PERMS());
  const [page,setPage]=useState("dashboard");
  const [patientId,setPatientId]=useState(null);
  const [patientDefaultTab,setPatientDefaultTab]=useState("details");
  const [alertQueue,setAlertQueue]=useState([]);
  const [acked,setAcked]=useState(new Set());
  const [notifs,setNotifs]=useState([{id:"N1",type:"alert",title:"Patient waiting too long",desc:"Tom Bright — 22 min",at:"09:43",read:false},{id:"N2",type:"task",title:"FP17 reminder",desc:"Amy Torres — 2 days overdue",at:"09:00",read:false},{id:"N3",type:"lab",title:"Lab case overdue",desc:"Sarah Chen — Crown UR6",at:"08:30",read:false},{id:"N4",type:"clinical",title:"Clinical note incomplete",desc:"Tom Bright — 13 May",at:"08:00",read:true}]);
  const [waiting,setWaiting]=useState(WAITING_INIT);
  const [copilotOpen,setCopilotOpen]=useState(false);
  const [copilotSubscribed,setCopilotSubscribed]=useState(false);

  const tasks=useMemo(()=>[{title:"Submit FP17 — Amy Torres",priority:"urgent",done:false,src:"auto"},{title:"Confirm tomorrow's appointments",priority:"urgent",done:false,src:"auto"},{title:"Chase lab — Sarah Chen",priority:"normal",done:false,src:"auto"}],[]);

  const [prevPatientId,setPrevPatientId]=useState(null);
  const openPatient=useCallback((pid,tab)=>{
    const pt=PATIENTS.find(p=>p.id===pid);if(!pt)return;
    setPrevPatientId(patientId);
    setPatientId(pid);
    setPatientDefaultTab(tab||"details");
    const alertFeature=GLOBAL_FEATURE_CONFIG.find(f=>f.id==="mandatory_alert_ack");
    const alertsEnabled=alertFeature?alertFeature.enabled:true;
    if(pt.alerts.length>0&&alertsEnabled)setAlertQueue([pt]);
  },[patientId]);
  const ackAlert=()=>{setAlertQueue([]);};

  const renderContent=()=>{
    if(patientId&&PATIENTS.find(p=>p.id===patientId))return <PatientRecord patient={PATIENTS.find(p=>p.id===patientId)} user={user} defaultTab={patientDefaultTab||"details"} openPatient={openPatient} onBack={()=>{setPatientId(null);setAlertQueue([]);setPatientDefaultTab("details");}}/>;
    if(user?.role==="superadmin"){
      const AP={
        admin_dash:<AdminDashboard/>,
        admin_practices:<AdminPractices/>,
        admin_pricing:<AdminPricing/>,
        admin_updates:<AdminUpdates/>,
        admin_users:<AdminUsers/>,
        admin_support:<AdminSupport/>,
        admin_receptionai:<AdminReceptionAI/>,
        admin_features:<AdminFeatures/>,
        admin_tickets:<AdminTickets/>,
        admin_support_config:<AdminSupportConfig/>,
        admin_seat_control:<AdminSeatControl/>,
        admin_ai:<AdminDashboard/>,
        admin_data:<AdminDataManager/>,
        admin_monitoring:<AdminSystemMonitoring/>,
        admin_security:<AdminSecurityCompliance/>,
        admin_backup:<AdminCloudBackup/>,
        admin_tx_plans:<AdminDashboard/>,
        admin_audit:<AdminActivityLog/>,
        admin_appt_audit:<AdminActivityLog/>,
        admin_integrations:<IntegrationsPage/>,
      };
      return AP[page]||<GenericPage page={page}/>;
    }
    const PP={
      nba:<NBAPage role={user?.role||"reception"} setPage={p=>{setPage(p);setPatientId(null);}} openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      dashboard:<Dashboard openPatient={openPatient} waiting={waiting} setWaiting={setWaiting}/>,
      calendar:<CalendarPage openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      waiting:<WaitingPage waiting={waiting} setWaiting={setWaiting}/>,
      patients:<PatientsPage patients={PATIENTS} openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      charting:<ChartingPage openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      notes:<ClinicalNotesPage openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      xray:<XRayPage/>,
      fp17:<FP17Page/>,
      uda:<UDAPage/>,
      teamchat:<TeamChat user={user}/>,
      whatsapp:<WhatsAppPage/>,
      receptionai:<ReceptionAIPage rxEnabled={true} user={user}/>,
      comms:<CommsPage/>,
      recovery:<RevenueRecoveryPage/>,
      shortnotice:<ShortNoticePage/>,
      lab:<LabPage/>,
      accounts:<AccountsPage/>,
      payments:<PaymentsPage/>,
      reports:<ReportsPage/>,
      myreports:<MyReportsPage user={user}/>,
      tasks:<TasksPage user={user}/>,
      rota:<RotaPage user={user}/>,
      manager:<ManagerPortal userPerms={userPerms} setUserPerms={setUserPerms}/>,
      subscription:<SubscriptionFeaturesPage/>,
      helpsupport:<HelpSupportPage user={user}/>,
      templates:<TemplatesPage/>,
      audit:<AuditPage/>,
      integrations:<IntegrationsPage/>,
      settings:<SettingsPage user={user}/>,
      usermgmt:<UserManagementPage plan="Growth"/>,
      finance:<FinancePage openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      huddle:<MorningHuddlePage openPatient={openPatient}/>,
      online_booking:<OnlineBookingPage setPage={p=>{setPage(p);setPatientId(null);}}/>,
      daily_priorities:<NBAPage role={user?.role||"reception"} setPage={p=>{setPage(p);setPatientId(null);}} openPatient={openPatient}/>,
    };
    return PP[page]||<GenericPage page={page}/>;
  };

  if(!user)return <LoginScreen onLogin={u=>{setUser(u);setPage(u.role==="superadmin"?"admin_dash":"dashboard");}}/>;

  return <div style={{display:"flex",height:"100vh",overflow:"hidden",fontFamily:"system-ui,'Segoe UI',sans-serif",color:C.text,background:C.bg}}>
    {alertQueue[0]&&<AlertModal patient={alertQueue[0]} onAck={ackAlert} onCancel={()=>{setAlertQueue([]);setPatientId(prevPatientId||null);setPrevPatientId(null);}}/>}
    <BusinessCopilot open={copilotOpen} onClose={()=>setCopilotOpen(false)} subscribed={copilotSubscribed} onSubscribe={()=>setCopilotSubscribed(true)}/>
    
    <Sidebar page={patientId?"patients":page} setPage={p=>{setPage(p);setPatientId(null);setAlertQueue([]);}} user={user} onLogout={()=>{setUser(null);setPage("dashboard");setPatientId(null);}} waiting={waiting} tasks={tasks} unread={notifs.filter(n=>!n.read).length} userPerms={user?userPerms[user.id]:undefined}/>
    <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",overflow:"hidden"}}>
      <Header user={user} notifs={notifs} onClearNotifs={()=>setNotifs(p=>p.map(n=>({...n,read:true})))} onCopilot={()=>setCopilotOpen(true)} copilotSubscribed={copilotSubscribed}/>
      <div style={{flex:1,display:"flex",overflow:"hidden"}}>{renderContent()}</div>
    </div>
  </div>;
}
